Luke1:25 “Midangte kiangah ka thuak gensiatna, Topa in hong paihkhiatsak nadingin kei hong en-in, hih bangin keima tungah hong bawl zo hi,” ci-in kha nga tawntung inn sungah a bucip hi." 
Luke1:26 Kha nga khit ciangin, Galile gam Nazareth kici khua khatah," 
Luke1:27 David’ suan Josef min neipa tawh a kingai nungak kiangah, Pasian in a vangtungmi Gabriel a sawl hi. Tua nungak’ min in Mari ahi hi." 
Luke1:28 Gabriel in ama kiang a tun’ ciangin, “Thupha a ngah nungak aw, na cidam ta hen. Topa in nang tawh a omkhawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:29 Mari in tua thugenna hangin lungmang a, “Hih hopihna in bangci bang hopihna ahi ding hiam?” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Luke1:30 Vantungmi in, “Mari aw, lau kei in. Nang in Pasian maipha na ngah zo hi." 
Luke1:31 Gai-in tapa na nei ding hi. Tua tapa’ min Zeisu na phuak ding hi. 
Luke1:32 Tua ta in milian hi ding a, Sang Bel Pasian’ Tapa kici ding hi. A pa David’ tokhom Pasian in pia ding a," 
Luke1:33 amah in Jakob’ suante a tawntungin uk ding a, ama gam in a bei ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:34 Mari in, “Hih thu in bangci piang ding ahi hiam? Pasal ka nei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:35 Vantungmi in zong, “Kha Siangtho in nangma tungah hong tung a, Sang Bel Pasian’ vangliatna in nang hong liah ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin, tua siangtho a piang ta in Pasian’ Tapa a kici ding hi." 
Luke1:36 Tua longal, tasel kici na beh Elisabeth in zong a teek zawh hangin tapa gai a, tu-in kha guk a pha zo hi." 
Luke1:37 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Pasian in sep theih loh a nei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:38 Mari in, “Pasian’ sila numei ka hi hi, nangma thu bangin kei tungah hong piang ta hen,” a cih khit ciangin, vantungmi in ama kiang panin a paikhia hi." 
Luke1:39 Tua lai takin Mari ding a, khamtungah Judah khuapi khatah manlangin pai a," 
Luke1:40 Zekhariah’ innah lutin Elisabeth va hopih hi. 
Luke1:41 Mari hopihna thu Elisabeth in a zak ciangin, a gil sunga om naungeek diang a, amah in Kha Siangtho tawh kidim hi." 
Luke1:42 “Nangmah in numei lakah thupha ngah na hi hi. Na gil sunga om naungeek in thupha a ngah ding hi. 
Luke1:43 Ka Topa’ nu kei kiangah hong pai nadingin bang hangin hehpihna ke’n ka ngah hiam? 
Luke1:44 Nong hopihna aw ke’n ka zak ciangin ka gil sunga om naungeek in lungdamna tawh a diang hi. 
Luke1:45 Thu-um numei in thupha a ngah ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, tua numei kiangah Topa’ thugente hong tangtung ding hi,” ci-in aw lian tawh a gen hi." 
Luke1:46 Mari in zong, “Keima lungsim in Topa a pahtawi hi." 
Luke1:47 Keimah hong gum Topa Pasian hangin ka kha a nuam hi. 
Luke1:48 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, ama sila numei’ kiniamsakna hong en zo hi. Tu-a kipanin khang khempeuhte in kei thupha a ngah mi hong ci ding hi." 
Luke1:49 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, vangliatna a neipa in keima tungah a lian thute hong hih zo hi. Tua pa min’ a siangtho hi." 
Luke1:50 Amah kihta mite tungah, Khang khat pan khang khat dongin ama hehpihna a om tawntung ding hi." 
Luke1:51 Ama ban tawh vangliatna a lak zo hi. Amau ngaihsutna lungsim uh a kiphasakte kikhenthang sak zo hi. 
Luke1:52 Amah in kumpite a kumpi tokhom tung pan kiasak a, mizawngte khangtosak zo hi." 
Luke1:53 A gilkial mite an pha tawh vak a, Sum haute khut guak tawh a paikhiasak zo hi." 
Luke1:54 I pu i pate kiangah a gen ngei mah bangin, Abraham akipan ama suan leh khakte tungah," 
Luke1:55 Hehpihna thupha a tawntungin a ngaihsut theih nadingin, Ama sila Israel kiangah huhna a pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:56 Mari in Elisabeth kiangah kha thum a om khit ciangin, innah a ciahkik hi." 
Luke1:57 Elizabeth suah hun a cin’ khit ciangin, tapa a suak hi." 
Luke1:58 Topa in a lian hehpihna Elisabeth tungah a bawl, a inn vengte leh a behte in a zak uh ciangin, amah tawh kibangin lungdamin a nuam uh hi." 
Luke1:59 Ni giat ni khit ciangin, naungeek’ vun at dingin amaute hong pai uh a, a pa min zui-in Zekhariah a phuak nuam uh hi." 
Luke1:60 Ahih hangin a nu in, “Hi lo hi, a min Johan kiphuak ding hi,” a cih ciangin," 
Luke1:61 amaute in, “Hih min in na behte lakah khat beek kiphuak lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke1:62 A pa kiangah, “Bang phuak nuam na hi hiam?” ci-in lim tawh a dong uh hi." 
Luke1:63 Zekhariah in lai ngen a, “Ama min in Johan ahi ding hi,” ci-in a gelh ciangin amaute khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Luke1:64 Tua leh, thakhatin Zekhariah kam kihong a, a leii kikhah a, Pasian phatin a pau thei hi." 
Luke1:65 A inn vengte khempeuh lau uh a, tua thu khempeuh Judah gam khamtung khempeuh ah kizeel hi." 
Luke1:66 A za khempeuhte in a lungsim sung uh ah ciamteh uh a, “Hih naungeek in bangci bang mi hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Topa’ khut in amah tawh a omkhawm hi." 
Luke1:67 Tua naungeek’pa Zekhariah in Kha Siangtho tawh kidim a, kamsan’na tawh a gen-inah:" 
Luke1:68 “Israel mipawl’ Topa Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen. 
Luke1:69 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tanglai ama kamsang siangthote’ kam tawh a gen kholh mah bangin," 
Luke1:70 Eite in i galte’ khut sung pan i kikhahkhiat khit ciangin, Ama mai-ah i khan’ tawntung sian’thona leh thumanna in," 
Luke1:71 Lau loin ama’ na i sep theih nading ahi zongin, i pa Abraham tungah thuciamna leh" 
Luke1:72 A siangtho ama kamciamsa thu a ngaihsut nading ahi zongin, i pu i pate tungah hehpihna thupha hong bawl nading ahi zongin," 
Luke1:73 Ama mi pawlte hong veh in, a hong tankhia zo hi, Eite in i galte khut sung pan ahi zongin," 
Luke1:74 A hong mudah khempeuhte khut sung pan ahi zongin, hong gupkhiat nadingin," 
Luke1:75 Ama sila David’ suan lak panin, Eite adingin kii khat ahi alian hong Gumpa a piangsak zo hi." 
Luke1:76 Ahi hi, naungeek aw, nangmah in Sang Bel Topa’ kamsangpa hong kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, eite Pasian hong hehpihna thupha hangin ah Ama mi pawlte’ khialhna maisakna tawh," 
Luke1:77 Gupna thu ama mipawlte na theihsak nading ahi zongin, ama lampi na sial nading ahi zongin, Nang in Topa mai-ah na pai ding hi. Tua hehpihna hangin" 
Luke1:78 Khuamial leh sihna lim sungah a tu mite tungah, khuavak hong tan’ nading ahi zongin, Nopna lampi ah eite hong kha ding ahi zongin," 
Luke1:79 A tung panin ni suakin eite kiangah hong tang ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke1:80 Tua naungeek khang a, a lungsim siamna khangto a, Israel mite kiangah a kilah ni matengin gampa lakah a om hi." 
Luke2:1 Tua lai takin leitung mi khempeuh a kisim nadingin, Kaisar kumpipa Augustas in thu a pia hi." 
Luke2:2 Kurinias in Siria gam menzi ahih lai takin hih kisimna a masa pen ahi hi. 
Luke2:3 Mi khempeuhte in kisim dingin amau khua ciatah a pai uh hi. 
Luke2:4 Josef in zong David’ suan ahih ciangin, a kidongsa a lawmnu Mari tawh kisim dingin, Galile gam Nazareth khua panin Judah gam Bethlehem kici David’ khua-ah a pai uh hi." 
Luke2:5 Tua Mari a gai zawh a sawt zo hi. 
Luke2:6 Amau Bethlehem khua-ah a om lai takun a suah hun tung a; 
Luke2:7 a ta cil suak a, puanin a tun khit ciangin zin tun’na innah omna ding om lo ahih ciangin, bawng ankuang sungah naungeek a sial hi." 
Luke2:8 Tua gamah tuucingte in gam lakah giakin amau tuu honte zanin a cing uh hi. 
Luke2:9 Topa’ vantungmi khat in amaute kiangah ding a, a kiimkot ah Pasian’ vang tang a, amaute in a kihta mahmah uh hi." 
Luke2:10 Ahih hangin vantungmi in, “Lau kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khempeuh ading nakpi nuamna thu note kong zasak ding hi." 
Luke2:11 Tuni-in, David’ khua-ah Topa Khazih ahi hong Gumpa in note adingin a suak zo hi." 
Luke2:12 Note in, ‘Bang limin thei ding ka hi uh hiam?’ na cih uh leh naungeek puanin kitun a, bawng an nekna kuang sungah kisialin a om na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:13 Tua khit ciangin vantungmi tawh vantung galkap tampite in thakhatin hong kikhawm uh a," 
Luke2:14 “Van a sang belna-ah Pasian minthang ta hen. Leitung a deih mite tungah nopna om ta hen,” ci-in Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Luke2:15 Vantungmite in vantungah a ciah khit uh ciangin tuucingte in, “Eite Bethlehem khua-ah pai-in, Pasian hong lah hih a piangsa thu va en ni,” ci-in khat leh khat a kihopih uh hi." 
Luke2:16 Manlangin pai uh a, Mari, Josef leh bawng an nekna kuang sungah kisial a, om naungeek a mu uh hi." 
Luke2:17 A muh khit uh ciangin, amau kiangah naungeek thu kigensa thu teng a zasak uh hi." 
Luke2:18 Tuucingte’ thugenna zate khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Luke2:19 Mari in ahih leh, tua thute khempeuh ciamteh a, a lungsim sungah a lungngai hi." 
Luke2:20 Tuucingte in amau kiangah a gensa mah bangin, a zaksa a muhsa uh khempeuhte hangin Pasian’ min phatna lasa-in a ciah uh hi." 
Luke2:21 Tua naungeek’ vunat nading ni giat a cin’ khit ciangin, a gai ma-a vantungmi in a phuah kholh mah bangin a min Zeisu a phuak uh hi." 
Luke2:22 Tua nung ciangin Moses’ Thukham bangin, amau kisian’thosak nading ni a cin’ ciangin, amaute in naungeek Jerusalem khuapi ah a paipih uh hi." 
Luke2:23 “A ta upa pasal khempeuh in Topa ading a siangtho hi, a kici ding hi,” ci-in Topa’ Thukhamna lai sungah a kigelh bangin," 
Luke2:24 Topa kiangah a piak khit uh ciangin, “Vakhu nupa kop ahi zongin, kawl vakhu neu ahi zongin,” ci-in Topa’ Thukhamna lai sungah a kigelh bangin biakna a pia uh hi." 
Luke2:25 Tua lai takin Simeon kici mi khat Jerusalem khuapi ah a om hi. Tua pa dik a, Pasian zahtak a, Israel mipawlte’ nopsak nading a lamen hi. Kha Siangtho in ama tungah a om hi." 
Luke2:26 “Topa Khazih na muh matengin na si kei ding hi,” ci-in Kha Siangtho in a hilh zo hi." 
Luke2:27 Tua lai takin amah in Kha Siangtho tawh biakna innpi-ah pai a, a nu leh pate in naungeek Zeisu hangah Thukham ngeina bang hih dingin a paipih lai takun," 
Luke2:28 Simeon in Zeisu a ang-ah pomin Pasian a phat-inah” 
Luke2:29 “Topa aw, na genkholh mah bangin, Na sal in nopsakna tawh a pai nadingin thu hong pia in." 
Luke2:30 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, na mipawl Israelte’ minthan’na ahi zongin Gentailte tungah khuavak nading ahi zongin," 
Luke2:31 Mipawl khempeuhte mai-ah na bawl gupna," 
Luke2:32 Ka mitin ka mu zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:33 A nu leh pate in naungeek a genna thu lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Luke2:34 Simeon in amaute thupha a piak khit ciangin a nu Mari kiangah, “Hih naungeek in Israel mi tampite kipuk nading ahi zongin, thawh nading ahi zongin, mi tampi a lungngaihna a kilat nading ahi zongin, nialna a thuak nading lim a pian’ nading ahi zongin a kikoih hi." 
Luke2:35 Ahi hi. Namsau in nangma lungsim hong sun ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:36 Tua lai takin Asher pawl ahi, Fanuel’ tanu Anna min nei numei kamsang khat a om hi. Amah teek a, a nungak lai pan akipanin kum sagih bek pasal tawh a teen’ khit ciangin," 
Luke2:37 kum sawmgiat leh kum li dong meigong a, thungetna leh an tan’na tawh sun tawh zan tawh pelh loin bia-in biakna innpi lawi loin a om hi." 
Luke2:38 Amah tua lai takin tunga Pasian hehpihna phatin, Jerusalem khuapi suahtak nading a lamen mi khempeuhte kiangah tua naungeek thu teng a gen hi." 
Luke2:39 Amaute in Topa’ Thukhamna bangin na khempeuh a bawl khit uh ciangin, Galile gam amau khua Nazareth-ah a ciah uh hi." 
Luke2:40 Naupang khangto a, a thahatna khang a, lungpilna tawh a kidim hi. Pasian’ hehpihna thupha zong ama tungah a om hi." 
Luke2:41 A nu leh pate in kum simin Paisan pawikhamna Jerusalem khua ah a pai uh hi. 
Luke2:42 Zeisu kum sawm leh kum nih a phak ciangin, ngeina bangin Paisan pawikhamna-ah a paito uh hi." 
Luke2:43 Pawikham ni a cin’ khit ciangin, a nu leh pate a ciah lai takin naupang Zeisu in Jerusalem khua-ah a om lai hi." 
Luke2:44 A nu leh pate in thei loin a lawmte tawh naupang ton hi ci-in um-in ni khat lam a pai uh hi. Tua ciangin a behte a meeltheihte lakah a zong uh a; 
Luke2:45 a muh loh uh ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah nungkikin a zong uh hi. 
Luke2:46 Ni thum khit ciangin, naupang biakna innpi sungah thuhilhte lai zangah tu a, amaute thu ngai a, amaute kiangah thu dongin a om a mu uh hi." 
Luke2:47 Ama thu a za khempeuhte in a pilna leh a dawn’ kiknate lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Luke2:48 A nu leh pate in amah a muh uh ciangin lungmang uh a, a nu in, “Ka ta aw, bang hangin kote tungah hih bangin hong bawl na hi hiam? Na pa leh keimah in dahna lungsim tawh kong zong uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:49 Naupang in, “Bang hangin kei hong zong na hi uh hiam? Ka Pa innah om ka hih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke2:50 Amau kiangah a genna thu amaute in a thei kei uh hi. 
Luke2:51 Amah in amaute tawh ciahsuk khawm a, Nazareth khua-ah tungin amaute thu mangin a om hi. A nu in hih thu khempeuh a lungsim sungah a ciamteh hi." 
Luke2:52 Zeisu’ lungpilna leh pumpi khang semsem a, Pasian mai leh mite mai-ah maipha a ngah semsem hi." 
Luke3:1 Kaisar kumpipa Tiberias a man’ zawh kum sawm leh kum nga ciangin, Judah gamah Pontias Pilat mangpi hi a, Galile gamah Herod menzi hi a, Iturea gam leh Trakhonis gamah Herod’ nau Filip menzi hi a, Abilene gamah Lisanias menzi hi a;" 
Luke3:2 Annas leh Kaiafas in siampi ukte ahih lai takin, khamtung a, om Zekhariah’ tapa Johan tungah Pasian thu a tung hi." 
Luke3:3 Kamsangpa Isaiah’ Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Johan in Jordan gun dungah vak kawikawi a, mawhna maisak nading kisik kikna tawh kituakin baptaizna thu a hilh hi." 
Luke3:4 Isaiah gelhna in: “Gampa lakah kikopa’ aw in, ‘Topa paina lam na sial un. Ama lampi na tangsak un." 
Luke3:5 Mualkuam thuk khempeuh kivuk dim ding a, Mual lian leh mual neu khempeuh kito niam ding a, Lam kawi khempeuh kitangsak ding hi, Lei hamte a kinelsak ding hi;’" 
Luke3:6 Mi khempeuh in Pasian’ gupna thu a thei ding uh hi,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
Luke3:7 Tua lai takin Johan in ama khut tungah kibaptaiz dingin hong pai mihonpite kiangah, “No mualtan’ suante aw, a hong tung ding hehna pan na taikhiat nadingun kua in hong hilhkhol hiam?" 
Luke3:8 Tua ahih ciangin kisikkikna tawh kilawm gah na gah un. ‘Abraham ka pa uh hi,’ ci-in na lungsim sung uh ah lungngaih ding na kipan kei un. Ke’n kong cih-inah, Pasian in hih suangte nangawn zong Abraham’ tate a suaksak thei hi." 
Luke3:9 Tu-in zong sing phungah hei a om zo hi. A gah hoih gah lo kung khempeuh phuk pai-in mei sungah kikhul ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:10 Mihonpite in, “Tua bang ahih leh, kote in bang ci hih ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Luke3:11 Johan in, “Puan ak nih a neite in puan ak nei lote tawh hawm ta hen. An nek ding a neite in zong tua bangin hih ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:12 Siahdongte in zong kibaptaiz dingin hong pai uh a, “Sia aw, kote in bang ci hih ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Luke3:13 Johan in, “Note in thu hong kipia zah khengin dong kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:14 Galkapte in zong, “Kote in zong bang ci hih ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Johan in, “Note in kuama kiangah zawhthawhna tawh la kei un la, midangte zuau thu tawh na mawhsak kei un. Na khasum ngah zah uh tawh lungkim un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke3:15 Mi khempeuh in Johan in Khazih ahi kha ding hiam ci-in, lamenin a lungsim sung uh ah a lungngai uh hi." 
Luke3:16 Johan in, “Note tui sungah ka hong baptaiz hi. Kei sangin a lian zaw pa khat hong pai ding hi. Ama khedap khau sut dingin zong ka kilawm kei hi. Tua pa in Kha Siangtho leh mei sungah note hong baptaiz ding hi." 
Luke3:17 Ama buh phual a zapsiang nadingin a khutin lawhpi a tawi hi. A tak teng a sal sungah koih ding hi. A site ahih leh, mit ngeilo mei-in hal ding hi,” ci-in a hilh hi." 
Luke3:18 Tua bangin Johan in hansuahna tawh Lungdamna Thu mite kiangah a hilh hi. 
Luke3:19 Ahih hangin, menzipa in a nau’ zi Herodias leh ama mawhna teng hangin Johan in taai ahih ciangin," 
Luke3:20 Herod in ama mawhna khempeuh tungah hih mawhna behlapin, Johan thong sungah a khia hi." 
Luke3:21 Mi khempeuh a kibaptaiz khit uh a ciangin, Zeisu in zong kibaptaiz a, thu a nget lai takin van kihong a," 
Luke3:22 Kha Siangtho pum nei-in vakhu bangin ama tungah kumsuk a, “Nangmah in ka lung hong damsak ka it, ka Tapa na hi hi,” ci-in vantung panin aw khat a ging hi." 
Luke3:23 Zeisu in thuhilh a kipat ciangin kum sawmthum bang a pha hi. Mite upna bangin Zeisu in Josef ta ahi hi. Josef in Heli’ ta hi," 
Luke3:24 Heli in Matthat’ ta hi, Matthat in Levi’ ta hi, Levi in Melkhi’ ta hi, Melkhi in Jannai’ ta hi, Jannai in Josef ta hi." 
Luke3:25 Josef in Mattathias’ ta hi, Mattathias in Amos’ ta hi, Amos in Nahum' ta hi, Nahum in Esli’ ta hi, Esli in Naggai’ ta hi," 
Luke3:26 Naggai in Maath’ ta hi, Maath in Mattathias’ ta hi, Mattathias in Semein’ ta hi, Semein in Josek’ ta hi," 
Luke3:27 Josek in Joda’ ta hi, Joda in Joanan’ ta hi, Joanan in Resa’ ta hi, Resa in Zerubbabel’ ta hi, Zerubbabel in Shealtiel’ ta hi, Shealtiel in Neri’ ta hi," 
Luke3:28 Neri in Melkhi’ ta hi, Melkhi in Addi’ ta hi, Addi in Kosam’ ta hi, Kosam in Elmadam’ ta hi," 
Luke3:29 Elmadam in Er’ ta hi, Er in Joshua’ ta hi, Joshua in Eliizer’ ta hi, Eliezer in Jorim’ ta hi, Jorim in Matthat’ ta hi, Matthat in Levi’ ta hi," 
Luke3:30 Levi in Simeon’ ta hi, Simeon in Judah’ ta hi, Judah in Jonam’ ta hi," 
Luke3:31 Jonam in Eliakim’ ta hi, Eliakim in Melea’ ta hi, Melea in Menna’ ta hi, Menna in Mattatha’ ta hi, Mattatha in Nathan’ ta hi, Nathan in David’ ta hi," 
Luke3:32 David in Jessi’ ta hi, Jessi in Obed’ ta hi. Obed in Boaz’ ta hi, Boaz in Shelah’ ta hi. Shelah in Nahshon’ ta hi, Nahshon in Amminadab’ ta hi," 
Luke3:33 Amminadab in Admin’ ta hi, Admin in Arni’ ta hi, Arni in Hezron’ ta hi. Hezron in Perez’ ta hi, Perez in Judah’ ta hi," 
Luke3:34 Judah in Jakob’ ta hi, Jakob in Issak’ ta hi, Issak in Abraham’ ta hi, Abraham in Terah’ ta hi, Terah in Nahor’ ta hi," 
Luke3:35 Nahor in Serug ta hi, Serug in Reu’ ta hi, Reu in Peleg’ ta hi, Peleg in Ebar’ ta hi, Ebar in Shelah’ ta hi," 
Luke3:36 Shelah in Kainan’ ta hi, Kainan in Arfasat’ ta hi, Arfasat in Shem’ ta hi, Shem in Noah’ ta hi, Noah in Lamek’ ta hi," 
Luke3:37 Lamek in Methuselah’ ta hi, Methuselah in Enok’ ta hi, Enok in Jared’ ta hi, Jared in Mahalate-el’ ta hi, Mahalale-el in Kainan’ ta hi," 
Luke3:38 Kainan in Enos’ ta hi, Enos in Seth’ ta hi, Seth in Adam’ ta hi, Adam in Pasian’ ta hi." 
Luke4:1 Zeisu in Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Jordan gun pan a ciah ciangin, Kha Siangtho in gampa lakah paipih a," 
Luke4:2 ni sawmli tawntung dawimangpa in a kheem hi. Tua hun sung khempeuh Zeisu in an ne lo a, a ni a cin’ ciangin a gil kial hi." 
Luke4:3 Dawimangpa in, “Nang in Pasian’ Tapa na hih takpi leh, hih suang khomun suaksak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:4 Zeisu in, “Mite in khomun bek tawh nungta lo hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:5 Tua lai takin dawimangpa in Zeisu paipihto a, leitung gam khempeuh neukha sungin a lak hi." 
Luke4:6 “Hih vangliatnate leh amau minthan’nate kong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, kei hong kipia zo a, ka piak nop mi kiangah ka pia thei hi." 
Luke4:7 Tua ahih ciangin, hong bia leteh hihte khempeuh nangma aa ahi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:8 Zeisu in zong, “Na Topa Pasian na bia ding hi. Ama na bek na sem ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:9 Tua khit ciangin, dawimangpa in Zeisu Jerusalem khuapi sungah paipihin, biakna innpi khum zangah a koih khit ciangin, “Nang in Pasian’ Tapa na hih takpi leh, na pumpi kikiasuk sak in." 
Luke4:10 Bang hang hiam na cih leh: ‘Amah in ama vantungmite nang ading thu a pia ding hi,’ leh" 
Luke4:11 ‘Na khe in suang tawh a kisuk khak loh nadingin, Amau in khut tawh nang hong dom ding uh hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:12 Zeisu in, “Na Topa Pasian na ze-et kei in,’ a kici hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:13 Dawimangpa in kheemna a vekpi-in ahih khit ciangin a kiang panin tomkha sung a paikhia hi. 
Luke4:14 Zeisu in Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna tawh, Galile gamah ciahkik hi. Ama thu a kimkot gam khempeuh ah kizeelin a thang hi." 
Luke4:15 Amaute kikhopna innah thu hilh a, mi khempeuh in amah a phat uh hi." 
Luke4:16 A khan’na Nazareth khua-ah Zeisu pai a, ngeina bangin Nipi ni-in kikhopna innah lut a, Lai Siangtho sim dingin a ding hi." 
Luke4:17 Kamsangpa Isaiah’ Lai Siangtho a kipiak ciangin phen a: 
Luke4:18 “Topa’ Kha Siangtho in keima tungah a om hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, mizawngte kiangah Lungdamna Thu zasak dingin hong sawl zo hi. A kiman a kikhum mite a kikhah nading ahi zongin, Mittawte in khua a muh kik theih nading ahi zongin, Bawlsiatna a thuak mite khah nading ahi zongin," 
Luke4:19 Topa’ hehpihna kum ahi, ci-in zaksak nading ahi zongin, Kei hong sawl zo hi,” ci-in kigelhna mun a mu hi." 
Luke4:20 Lai Siangtho zial a, kikhopna inn nasempa a piak khit ciangin a tu hi. Kikhopna inn sungah a om mi khempeuh in tel takpi-in a en uh hi." 
Luke4:21 Zeisu in, “Tuni-in hih Lai Siangtho thu in note zak dingin tangtung zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:22 Mi khempeuhte in Zeisu thu mang uh a, ama kam sung pan a paikhia lungsim phawn’sakna thu, lamdang a sa uh a, “Hih pa in Josef tapa hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke4:23 Zeisu in, “A tel takpi-in note in, ‘Zatopa aw, nangmahmah na kidamsak in. Kapernaum khua-ah na bawlna khempeuh kote in ka zak bangun, nangma gamah zong bawl in,’ ci-in thugentehna tawh kei kiangah nong ci ding uh hi." 
Luke4:24 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, kamsang kuamah peuhmah ama gamah mite in a deih kei uh hi." 
Luke4:25 Ahih hangin ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, Elijah khan’ lai-in kum thum leh kha guk tawntung guahtui kang a, gam sung khempeuh ah kial a tun’ lai takin, Israel mipawlte lakah meigong tampi a om uh hi." 
Luke4:26 Tua meigong khat beek kiangah Elijah a sawl kei hi. Sidon gam Zarephat khua a, meigong khat kiang bekah a sawl hi." 
Luke4:27 Kamsang Elisha a khan’ lai takin, Israel mipawlte lakah miphak tampi a om uh hi. Ahih hangin Siriapa Na-aman longal kuamah in damna a ngah kei uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke4:28 Kikhopna innah a om mi khempeuh in tua a zak uh ciangin, a heh mahmah uh hi." 
Luke4:29 Amaute ding-in Zeisu khua nawlah a hawlkhiat khit uh ciangin, khua omna mual dawn kui-ah bungbu sawnkhiat dingin a paipih uh hi." 
Luke4:30 Ahih hangin Zeisu in amaute lai zang pan paikhia-in a pai mang hi. 
Luke4:31 Zeisu Galile gam Kapernaum khua-ah a paisuk khit ciangin, Nipi ni-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke4:32 Amaute in ama thuhilhna lamdang a sa uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amah in ukpa bangin thu a hilh hi." 
Luke4:33 Tua kikhopna inn sungah kihhuai dawi kha a lut mi khat a om hi. 
Luke4:34 Amah in, “Nazareth mi Zeisu aw, kote in nang tawh bang kikum i hi hiam? Kote susia dingin hong pai na hi hiam? Nang kua mi na hih ke’n kong thei hi. Pasian’ misiangtho na hi hi,” ci-in aw lianpi tawh a kiko hi." 
Luke4:35 Zeisu in, “Pau kei in la, ama sung pan paikhia in,” ci-in a taai hi. Dawi in amaute lai zangah amah a puksak khit ciangin, natna bawl loin ama sung pan a paikhia hi." 
Luke4:36 Mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh a, “Hih thu in bang thu ahi hiam? Thu tawh, vangliatna tawh, kihhuai dawite thu a piak ciangin amau a paikhia uh hi,” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Luke4:37 Ama thu in a kimkot mun khempeuh ah a thang hi. 
Luke4:38 Zeisu in kikhopna inn pan a paikhiat khit ciangin Simon’ innah a lut hi. Simon’ sungnu in nakpi-in nattun’ a, a dam nading Zeisu kiangah a thuum uh hi." 
Luke4:39 Zeisu in ama kiangah ding-in cinatna a taai khit ciangin, a nattun’ dam a, thakhatin thoin zinte a vak hi." 
Luke4:40 Ni a tum ciangin, cinatna pawlpawl a neite khempeuh Zeisu kiangah hong paipih uh a, amah in amaute khempeuh tungah khut nga-in a damsak hi." 
Luke4:41 Dawite in zong, “Nang in Pasian’ Tapa na hi hi,” ci-in kikoin mi tampite sung pan a paikhia uh hi. Amah in Khazih ahih lam a theih manun, Amah in amaute taii-in kam khat beek a pausak kei hi." 
Luke4:42 Khua a vak ciangin Zeisu paikhia a, gampa lakah a pai hi. Mihonpite in zong uh a, a kiang a tun’ uh ciangin, amaute kiang pan a paikhiat loh nadingin a kho nuam uh hi." 
Luke4:43 Ahih hangin Zeisu in, “Pasian Gam’ Lungdamna Thu khua dangah zong ka hilh ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua bang deihna-in kei hong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:44 Tua lai takin Zeisu in Galile gam kikhopna innte ah thu hilhin a om hi. 
Luke5:1 Tua lai takin Zeisu kiangah, mihonpite in neh uh a, Pasian thu a ngaih lai takun Gennesaret tuili geiah amah a ding hi." 
Luke5:2 Tua lai takin tuipi gei a, khawl gunkuang nih om a mu hi. Ngasa bengte in gunkuang sung panin paikhia uh a, ngente a sawp uh hi." 
Luke5:3 Simon’ gunkuang ahi tua gunkuangte khat tungah Zeisu a tuan’ khit ciangin, gunkuang tuipi gei pan tomno a kihal nadingin Simon kiangah a gen hi. Zeisu in gunkuang tungah tu-a mihonpite thu a hilh hi." 
Luke5:4 A thuhilh a tawp khit ciangin, “Tui thukna-ah khin in la, ngasa khuh na’ng ngen paai in,” ci-in Simon thu a pia hi." 
Luke5:5 Simon in zong, “Topa aw, kote in zankhua-in ka hahkat uh hangin, khat beek ka man kei uh hi. Ahih hangin thu nong piak bangin ngen ka paai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:6 Tua banga a paih khit ciangin, ngasa tam mahmah khuh kha a, ngen a kikeek hi." 
Luke5:7 Adang gunkuang khatah a om a lawmte zong hong pai-in, hong huh nadingin amaute khut van a, amaute hong pai-in gunkuang nih ngasa tawh kidim-in a tum dek tak hi." 
Luke5:8 Simon Piter in a muh ciangin Zeisu khuk kiangah bokin, “Topa aw, mawhnei mi ka hih ciangin ka kiang pan paikhia in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:9 Bang hangin hih bangin gen hiam i cih leh, amah tawh a omkhawm mi khempeuhte in a khuhsa ngasate lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Luke5:10 Tua mah bangin Simon’ lawmte Zebedi’ tapa Jakob leh Johante in zong lamdang a sa uh hi. Zeisu in Simon kiangah, “Lau kei in. Tu-a kipan nang in mite na man ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke5:11 Amaute in tuipi geiah gunkuang a khawlsak khit uh ciangin, amaute neihsa khempeuh nusia-in Zeisu’ nung a zui uh hi." 
Luke5:12 Khua khatah Zeisu a om lai takin, a pumtang a phak mi khat a om hi. Tua pa in Zeisu a muh ciangin bok a, “Topa aw, nong hih nop leh, kei nong damsak zo ding hi,” ci-in a thuum hi." 
Luke5:13 Zeisu in a khut zanin lawng a, “Ka hih nuam hi, na dam ta in,” a cih leh, thakhatin a dam pah hi." 
Luke5:14 Zeisu in hih thu kuama kiangah a gen loh nadingin thu a pia hi. “Pasian’ siampi kiangah pai in la, va kilak in. Amau in a theih nadingun Moses’ thu piaksa bangin biakna na pia in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:15 Ahih hangin Zeisu thu kizeel semsem a, mihonpite in thu ngai ding ahi zongin, cinate in damna ngah ding ahi zongin a kikhawm uh hi." 
Luke5:16 Ahih hangin amah gampa lakah pai a, thu a ngen hi." 
Luke5:17 Ni khat Zeisu in thu a hilh lai takin, Jerusalem khuapi pan a kipan Galile gam leh Judah gam khua khempeuh pan hong pai Farisaite leh Pasian’ Thukham siate in a kiangah a tu uh hi. Cinatna a damsak thei dingin Topa’ vangliatna Zeisu tungah a tung hi." 
Luke5:18 Tua lai takin mite in khut leh khe si mi khat a lupna tawh a puak uh ciangin inn sungah paipih a, Zeisu mai-ah koih nading a zong uh hi." 
Luke5:19 Mihonpi kikhawm ahih manin, lut nading lam a muh zawh loh uh ciangin, innkhum tungah kahto uh a, innkhum a vuhlet khit uh ciangin, lupna tawh cinapa Zeisu mai-ah mite lai zangah a khiasuk uh hi." 
Luke5:20 Zeisu in amaute’ upna a theih ciangin, “Lawm aw, na mawhnate kimaisak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:21 Laitheite leh Farisaite in, “Pasian tungah a pau a khial hih mi kua mi ahi hiam? Pasian longal kua in mawhna maisak zo hiam?” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Luke5:22 Zeisu in amaute ngaihsutna a theih ciangin, “Note in bang hangin na lungsim sung uh ah tua bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke5:23 Bang ci leng a baih zaw hiam? ‘Na mawhnate kimaisak zo hi,’ ci leng a baih zaw hiam? ‘Tho in la pai in,’ ci leng a baih zaw hiam?" 
Luke5:24 Ahih hangin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhna a maisak theih nading thu a neih lam na theih nadingun, ‘Tho in, na lupna pua in la, na innah ciah in,’” ci-in khut leh khe sipa kiangah a ci hi." 
Luke5:25 Amah in amaute mai-ah thakhatin tho a, a lupna pua-in Pasian’ min phatin a ciah hi." 
Luke5:26 Tuate khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh a, Pasian a phat uh hi. “Eite in tuni-in nalamdang a tuam i mu zo hi,” ci-in a lau uh hi." 
Luke5:27 Tua nung ciangin Zeisu paikhia a, Levi kici siahdon’na bukah tu-in a om a mu hi. “Ka nung hong zui in,” a cih ciangin," 
Luke5:28 ding-in, a neihsa khempeuh nusia-in a nung a zui hi." 
Luke5:29 Levi in ama innah lawmvakna pawi a bawl hi. Siahdongte leh midang tampite in amaute tawh an ne-in a tu khawm uh hi. 
Luke5:30 Farisaite leh laitheite in, “Note in siahdongte leh mawhneite tawh, bang hangin an nekhawm tui dawnkhawm na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a nungzuite a ko uh hi." 
Luke5:31 Zeisu in, “Cidamte in zato deih lo uh hi. Cinate bek in a deih uh hi." 
Luke5:32 Miphate sam dingin hong pai ka hi kei hi. Mawhneite sam dingin hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:33 Amaute in, “Johan’ nungzuite in an nek tang zeelin, thu a ngen uh hi. Farisaite’ nungzuite in zong tua bangin ahih uh hi. Ahih hangin na nungzuite in an ne-in tui a dawn uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke5:34 Zeisu in zong, “Zipipa in a lawmte tawh a omkhawm lai takin tuate in an a tang sak zo ding uh hiam?" 
Luke5:35 Ahih hangin a hun hong tung ding a, zipipa in a lawmte tawh a kikhen khit ciangin, tua ni-in amaute in an nek a tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:36 Tua lai takin Zeisu in thugentehna thu a hilh-inah, “Kuamah in puan thak bek khat eukhia a, puan lui a thuap ngei kei uh hi. Tua bang a thuap leh, a puan thak keek a, puan thak bek in puan lui tawh a kilem kei ding hi." 
Luke5:37 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahtui thak a thun ngei kei hi. Tua bangin a thun leh, leenggah tui in savun tamsak ding a, leenggahtui luangkhia-in, savun zong a kisia gawp ding hi." 
Luke5:38 Leenggahtui thak savun um thak sungah a kithun ding hi. 
Luke5:39 Kuamah in leenggahtui lui a dawn khit ciangin, leenggahtui thak a duh kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Leenggahtui lui a pha hi, a ci hi,” ci-in Zeisu in a gen hi." 
Luke6:1 Nipi ni khatvei Zeisu in buhlei ah a vak leh, a nungzuite in buhvui zut uh a, khut tawh nuai-in a ne uh hi." 
Luke6:2 Farisaite kimkhat in, “Nipi ni-in ahih tuak loh na bang dingin na hih uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke6:3 Zeisu in, “David in ama lawmte tawh a gilkial lai takin," 
Luke6:4 Pasian biakna inn sungah lut a, siampite longal midangte nek ding kilawm lo khomun siangtho la-in ne a, a lawmte zong a piak thu sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:5 Mihing Tapa in Nipi ni ukpa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke6:6 Adang Nipi ni-in Zeisu in kikhopna inn sungah lut a, thu a hilh hi. Tua lai-ah a khut langkhat a si mi khat a om hi." 
Luke6:7 Nipi ni-in cinatna damsak ding hiam damsak lo ding hiam, ci-in laitheite leh Farisaite in Zeisu a mawhsak nop manun a en uh hi." 
Luke6:8 Ahih hangin Zeisu in amau’ sinsung ngaihsutna uh a theih ciangin, “Tho in la, a lai zangah ding in,” ci-in khut sipa kiangah a ci hi. Amah thoin a ding hi." 
Luke6:9 Zeisu in, “Note kong dong ding hi; ‘Nipi ni-in phatna bawl tuak hiam? Siatna bawl tuak hiam? Nuntakna khatpeuh a gup tuak hiam? Nuntakna siatsak tuak ahi hiam?’” ci-in amaute kiangah a dong hi." 
Luke6:10 Amaute khempeuh en kawikawi a, “Na khut zan in,” ci-in tuapa kiangah ci-a, a khut a zan leh, a dam hi." 
Luke6:11 Ahih hangin amaute heh mahmah uh a, Zeisu tungah, “Bangci i hih ding hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Luke6:12 Tua lai takin Zeisu in thu ngen dingin mual tungah kahto a, Pasian kiangah thu ngenin zan khat tawntung a om hi." 
Luke6:13 Khua a vak ciangin a nungzuite sam a, Sawm-le-nihte teelin, ‘Sawltakte’ ci-in a phuak hi." 
Luke6:14 Tuate in: Simon, a min thak a phuah Piter leh a naupa Andru, Jakob leh Johan, Filip leh Bartholomai," 
Luke6:15 Mattiu leh Thomas, Alefas’ tapa Jakob leh Zealot kici Simon," 
Luke6:16 Jakob’ tapa Judas leh Topa lehheekpa Judas Iskariot ahi uh hi. 
Luke6:17 Zeisu in amaute tawh mual tung pan kumsuk khawm a, mun zangah a ding hi. Thu ngaih nading ahi zongin, cidamna ngah nading ahi zongin, Judah gam pan akipan, Jerusalem khuapi pan, Tai-ar leh Sidon khua tuipi gei pan, mi tampite leh ama nungzuite tampite zong hong pai uh hi." 
Luke6:18 A kihhuai dawi’ bawlsiatna a thuak mite in zong cidamna a ngah uh hi. 
Luke6:19 Mihonpite khempeuh in Zeisu a lawn’ nading a zong uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, ama tung pan vangliatna paikhia a, mi khempeuh a damsak hi." 
Luke6:20 Zeisu in a nungzuite en a, “Mizawng note in thupha na ngah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ Gam in note gam ahi ding hi." 
Luke6:21 Tu lai taka gilkial note in, thupha na ngah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, gilvahna na ngah ding uh hi. Tu lai taka a kap note in thupha na ngah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na nui ding uh hi." 
Luke6:22 Mite in Mihing Tapa hangin note muhdah uh a, hong hawlkhiat uh a, hong kosiat uh a, na min uh hong siatsak ciangin, thupha na ngah ding uh hi." 
Luke6:23 Tua lai takin nuam un la, lungdamin na diang un. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, vantungah nop tuamna lian na ngah ding uh hi. A pute a pate un zong kamsangte tua bangin a bawlsia uh hi." 
Luke6:24 Sumhau note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nopna na ngah zo uh hi." 
Luke6:25 Tu lai takin an kham note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note na gilkial ding uh hi. Tu lai taka nui note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in thuumin na kap ding uh hi." 
Luke6:26 Mi khempeuh in note hong phat ciangin, gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a pute a pate un thuzuau kamsangte tungah tua bangin a bawl uh hi." 
Luke6:27 Ka kam a za note kiangah kong cih-inah, na galte na it un. Hong mudahte tungah thupha na bawl un." 
Luke6:28 Hong phuisamte tungah thupha na pia un. 
Luke6:29 Hong bawlsiate ading thu na ngetsak un. Na pang langkhat hong bengte, pang langkhat zong na bengsak un. Na puanza a late, na puan ak lak ding na khaam kei un." 
Luke6:30 A hong ngen khempeuhte na pia un. Na sum a late kiangah, na sum na ngen kik kei un." 
Luke6:31 Note tungah hong kibawl ding na deih bangun, mite tungah zong na bawl un." 
Luke6:32 Hong itte bek na it uh leh, bang phattuamna na nei uh hiam? Migilote in zong amau a itte a it uh hi." 
Luke6:33 Note tungah thupha hong bawl mite tung bekah thupha na bawl uh leh, bang phattuamna na nei uh hiam? Migilote in zong tua bangin ahih uh hi." 
Luke6:34 Midangte sum na leitawisak uh ciangin, hong lohkik ding ci-in, lamenin na tawisak uh leh, bang phattuamna na nei uh hiam? Migilote in zong a piak bang a ngah kik nadingin migilote a leitawisak uh hi." 
Luke6:35 Note na hih uh leh, na galte na it un, amaute tungah thupha na bawl un. Na khatpeuh ka ngah ding hi ci-in lamen loin na leitawisak un. Tua bang na hih uh leh, na noptuamna uh lian ding a, Sang Bel Pasian’ tate na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in hehpihna a thukkik lo mi leh migilote a hehpih hi." 
Luke6:36 Na Pa un hehpihna lungsim a neih bangin note in zong hehpihna lungsim na nei un.” 
Luke6:37 “Midangte’ thu na tan kei uh leh, thu tanna tawh na kipelh ding uh hi. Midangte na mawhsak kei uh leh, mawhsakna tawh na kipelh ding uh hi. Midangte’ mawhna na maisak uh leh, note mawhna a kimaisak ding hi." 
Luke6:38 Midangte na piak uh leh, note hong kipia ding hi. Seeng a, teh hoih bek tham lo, a kinengcip, a kilok a kitat a dimlet a, om na ang sung uh ah hong kisung ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, midangte na piakna uh seengin, note zong hong kipia kik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke6:39 Tua lai takin Zeisu in thugentehna a hilh-inah, “Mittawte in mittawte lam a hilh zo ding hiam? A nih mahin leihawm sungah kia ding hilo ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:40 A nungzuite in a siapa sangin lianzaw lo hi. Ahih hangin a kicingsa-a om a nungzui khempeuhte in a siapa mah bangin ahi ding uh hi. 
Luke6:41 Na mit sungah singluang lungngai loin, na u na nau’ mit sungah ninneng tang bang hangin na en hiam?" 
Luke6:42 Na mit sungah singluang om napi-in na u na nau kiangah, ‘Unau aw, na mittang sungah a om ninneng tang hong paaikhiasak in,’ bang hangin ci na hi hiam? Nang mi simtatpa aw, na mit sungah a om singluang paaikhia masa in. Tua khit ciangin, na u na nau’ mit sunga ninneng tang paihkhiat ding na tel muh thei ding hi.”" 
Luke6:43 “Gah hoih lo a gah singkung hoih a om kei hi. Gah hoih a gah kung hoih lo a om kei hi. 
Luke6:44 Kung khempeuh a gahin kithei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, lingkungah mite in thei gah a lo ngei kei uh hi. Thangling kungah leenggah a lo ngei kei uh hi." 
Luke6:45 Miphate in ama lungsim sung sumkholna hoih sung pan a pha nate a pusuaksak hi. Mipha lote in a hoih lo sumkholna sung pan a pha lo nate a pusuaksak uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua pa’ lungsim a dim bangin a kam in a gen hi.”" 
Luke6:46 “Keima thu ngai loin, ‘Topa aw, Topa aw,’ ci-in bang hangin hong ci na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:47 Ka kiangah hong pai a, ka thu za a, a ngaite khempeuh in, kua mi tawh kibang ahih lam kong lak ding hi." 
Luke6:48 Amah in inn a lam ciangin, thukpi-in to a, suang tungah khuam a phut mi tawh kibang hi. Tui a khan’ ciangin hawktui in tua inn a nawt hangin, pha takin kilam ahih ciangin a liingsak zo kei hi." 
Luke6:49 Ka thu a zak ciangin a zui lo mi in, khuam phut lo lei tungah inn a lam mi tawh kibang hi. Hawktui in tua inn a nawk ciangin thakhatin a puk hi. Tua inn siatna in siatna lian ahi hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke7:1 Zeisu in thu khempeuh mihonpite zak dingin a hilh khit ciangin, Kapernaum khua-ah a lut hi." 
Luke7:2 Galkap mangpa khat in a it mahmah nasempa khat nei a, tua nasempa cina-in a si dek tak hi." 
Luke7:3 Galkap mangpa in Zeisu thu a galzak ciangin, Judah upate a kiangah va sawl a, Topa hong pai-in tua nasempa a damsak nadingin a ngensak hi." 
Luke7:4 Tua upate in Zeisu kiang a tun’ uh ciangin, “Tua thu ama ading na hih nadingin tua pa a kilawm hi." 
Luke7:5 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah in ei pawl hong it a, eite kikhopna inn a lamsak hi,” ci-in a va thuumsak uh hi." 
Luke7:6 Zeisu in amaute tawh a paikhawm hi. Galkap mangpa’ inn hong naih uh ciangin, galkap mangpa in a lawmte khat sawlin “Topa aw, na kigimsak kei in. Keima inn khum nuai-ah nong lut dingin ka kilawm kei hi." 
Luke7:7 Tua mah bangin Topa kiangah kong pai ding kilawm ka sa kei hi. Na kamin thu pia leteh, ka nasempa a dam ding hi." 
Luke7:8 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, keimah in zong mangza-ah hong kikoih hi. Ka nuai-ah zong galkapte a om hi. Tua galkapte khat kiangah, ‘Pai in,’ ka cih ciangin a pai hi. Adang khat kiangah, ‘Hong pai in,’ ka cih ciangin a hong pai hi,” ci-in a gensak hi." 
Luke7:9 Zeisu in tua thu a zak ciangin lamdang sa a, ama nung a zui mihonte kiangah kihei a, “Ke’n kong cih-inah, hih zah tak upna Israel mipawlte lakah ka mu ngei kei hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke7:10 A sawltakte in inn a tun’ uh ciangin nasempa damin a om a mu uh hi. 
Luke7:11 A sawt loin Zeisu in Nain kici khua khatah pai a, a nungzuite leh mihonpite in amah tawh a pai khawm uh hi." 
Luke7:12 Khua kongpi kiang a tun’ uh ciangin, numei in ta khat bek a neih si a, a luang a puakkhiat lai tak uh ahi hi. Tua numei in meigong hi a, khuapihte tampi amah tawh a paikhawm uh hi." 
Luke7:13 Zeisu in tua numei a muh ciangin hehpihhuaisa a, “Kap kei in,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:14 A khut tawh lang lawng a, a puate a khawlsak hi. Zeisu in, “Tangvalpa aw, tho in ci-in nangma kiangah kong ci hi,” a cih leh," 
Luke7:15 misipa tho a, thu a gen hi." 
Luke7:16 Zeisu in tua pa a nu kiangah a pia hi. Mi khempeuh in lau uh a, “A lian mahmah kamsangpa in eite lakah hong piang zo hi. Pasian in ama mipawlte kiangah hong hawh zo hi,” ci-in Pasian’ min a phat uh hi." 
Luke7:17 Tua thu in Judah gam khempeuh akipan a kimkot gam sung khempeuh ah a kizeel khin hi. 
Luke7:18 Johan’ nungzuite in hih thu a vekpi-in ama kiangah a gen uh hi. 
Luke7:19 Johan in ama nungzuite nih sam a, Topa kiangah sawlin, “Nangmah in hong pai dingpa taktak na hi hiam? A hih kei leh midang khat ka lamen lai ding uh hiam?” ci-in a dongsak hi." 
Luke7:20 Tuate in Zeisu kiang a tun’ uh ciangin, “Nangmah in hong pai dingpa taktak na hi hiam? Ahih kei leh, midang ka lamen lai ding uh hiam? ci-in baptaizpa Johan in nangma kiangah kote hong dongsak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:21 Tua hun lai takin Zeisu in cinatna, zawngkhalna leh, dawi gilo a vei mi tampi damsak a, mittaw tampite zong khua a musak thei hi." 
Luke7:22 Tua ciangin, “Note pai un la, na zaksa, na muhsa uh thute Johan kiangah va gen un. Mittawte in khua mukik thei uh hi. Khebaite in lam a pai thei uh hi. Phakte in damna a ngah kik uh hi. Bengngongte in khua a za thei uh hi. Misite in hin’na a ngah kik uh hi. Mizawngte kiangah Lungdamna Thu kihilh hi." 
Luke7:23 Keimah hangin pukna a ngah lo peuhmah in thupha a ngah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:24 Johan’ kamtaite a paikhiat khit uh ciangin, Zeisu in mihonte kiangah Johan thu a gen-inah, “Note in bang en dingin gampa lakah paikhia na hi uh hiam? Huih mut a, a vuang pumpeeng en ding paikhia na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke7:25 Bang en ding paikhia na hi uh hiam? Puanneel silhte en dingin paikhia na hi uh hiam? En un, puan hoih tawh kizeem a, mi nuamsate in kumpite’ inn sungah a om uh hi." 
Luke7:26 Ahih kei leh, bang en dingin paikhia na hi uh hiam? Kamsangpa en dingin paikhia na hi uh hiam? Ahi mah hi. Pasian’ kamsangpa sang in a lianzaw hi kong ci hi." 
Luke7:27 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh bangin: ‘En in, na pai nading lam sial ding, Na mai-ah ka sawltakpa ka paisak hi,’ a cihna in, tua mipa a cihna ahi hi." 
Luke7:28 Ke’n kong cih-inah, numei sung pan a suakte lakah Johan sangin a lianzaw khat beek a om kei hi. Ahih hangin, Vantung Gam sungah mi neupen in tuapa sangin a lianzaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:29 Siahdongte akipan mite khempeuh in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, Johan’ baptaizna a ngah manun Pasian dik a sa uh hi." 
Luke7:30 Ahih hangin, Farisaite leh laitheite in amau noptuam nadingin Pasian’ deihna a nial uh a, Johan’ baptaizna a sang kei uh hi." 
Luke7:31 Zeisu in, “Tulai khang mite bang tawh ka genteh ding hiam? Kua mi tawh kibang ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke7:32 Sumbukah tu-a a om naupangte in khat leh khat kiko-inah, ‘Tamngai ka tum uh hangin, na laam kei uh hi. Ka thuum uh hangin na kap kei uh hi.’ A kici naupangte tawh kibang uh hi." 
Luke7:33 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, baptaizpa Johan in an lum ne lo, leenggahtui dawn loin hong pai a, note in, ‘Hihpa dawilawm nei hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Luke7:34 Mihing Tapa in an ne tui dawnin hong pai a, note in, ‘Hihpa in an hai zu haipa hi. Siahdongte leh migilote tawh zawlin a kiman hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Luke7:35 Lungpilna in a tate khempeuh tung panin diksakna a ngah hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke7:36 Tua lai takin Farisaite khat in an vak dingin Zeisu a sap khit ciangin, tua Farisaipa’ inn sungah lutin an a ne hi." 
Luke7:37 Tua khua sungah numei gilo khat a om hi. Amah in Farisaipa’ innah Zeisu in an ne, ci-in a theih ciangin paknamtui suangngo thawl khat paipih a," 
Luke7:38 a nung lam pan a khe kiangah ding-in kap a, a khe khitui tawh kawtsakin, a sam tawh a nul hi. Ama khe zong nam a, paknamtui tawh a zut hi." 
Luke7:39 Zeisu an a vak Farisaipa in a muh ciangin, “Hih mi in Pasian’ kamsangpa ahih takpi leh, a lawng hih numei in bang mi ahi, a gilo numei hi, ci-in a thei ding hi,” ci-in a lungsim sungah a gen hi." 
Luke7:40 Zeisu in zong, “Simon aw, nangma kiangah kong gen ding khat a om hi,” a cih ciangin amah in, “Sia aw, hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:41 Zeisu in, “Sum neipa khat in leiba mi nih a nei hi. Khat in dangka zanga, khat in dangka sawmnga a ba hi." 
Luke7:42 Amaute in leiba loh nading a neih loh uh ciangin sum neipa in, tuate gel’ leiba a maisak hi. Tua bang ahih leh, tua nihte lakah kua pen in sum neipa a it zaw ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke7:43 Simon in, “A maisakna tam zaw a ngah mi in it zaw-in ka um hi,” a ci hi. Zeisu in, “Na up bang a man hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke7:44 Tua ciangin numei lam kihei a, “Nang in hih numei na mu hiam? Na innah kong lut lai-in khe sil nading tui nong pia kei hi. Hih numei in ka khe khitui tawh kawtsak a, a sam tawh a nul zo hi." 
Luke7:45 Na hong nam kei hi. Amah in ahih leh, inn kong lut khit phet akipan ka khe a nam tawntung hi." 
Luke7:46 Ka lu sathau nong nilhsak kei hi. Amah in ahih leh, ka khe paknamtui tawh hong nilhsak hi." 
Luke7:47 Tua ahih ciangin, ke’n kong cih-inah ama mawhna tam napi-in a kimaisak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah in tampi-in a it hi. A tawmno khat mawhna a kimaisak mi in tawmkha-in a it thei hi,” ci-in Simon kiangah a gen hi." 
Luke7:48 Numei kiangah, “Na mawhna kimaisak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:49 Amah tawh an ne khawmte in, “Mawhna teng a maisak hih pa in kua mi ahi hiam?” ci a, amau lungsim sung uh ah a gen uh hi." 
Luke7:50 Zeisu in,”Na upna in nang hong gum zo hi. Nuam in la, pai in,” ci-in numei thu a pia hi." 
Luke8:1 Tua nung a sawt loin, Zeisu in khuapi khuaneu-ah vak kawikawi in thu hilh a, Pasian’ Gam Lungdamna Thu a zasak hi. Amah tawh Sawm-le-nihte a pai khawm uh hi." 
Luke8:2 Dawi gilo lut leh cinatna a damsak numeite in a zui uh hi. Tuate lakah dawi gilo sagih a hawlkhiatna, Magdalene kici Mari," 
Luke8:3 Herod’ nasempa Khuza’ zi Joanna leh Susanna a kipan adang tampite in zong amau sum tawh amaute kivakin a zui uh hi. 
Luke8:4 Mi tampite hong kikhawm uh a, khua khempeuh panin mite in ama kiangah hong pai lai takun, Zeisu in thugentehna tawh thu a hilh-inah," 
Luke8:5 “Khaici vawhpa in khaici vawh dingin a kuankhia hi. Khaici a vawh lai takin kimkhatte in, lam geiah kia a, kisik gawpna thuak a, van a, vasate in tawmin a ne uh hi." 
Luke8:6 Kimkhatte in suang lakah kia a, a po ciangin lei kawt zo lo ahih manin a vul gawp hi." 
Luke8:7 Kimkhatte in ling lakah a kia hi. Ling kungte in amau tawh pokhawm uh a, a dep gawp uh hi." 
Luke8:8 Kimkhattte in lei hoihna-ah kia a, kung po a, a zah zakhat a gah hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin, “Zak nading bil a nei teng in na za ta un!” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Luke8:9 A nungzuite in, “Tua thugentehna bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke8:10 Zeisu in, “Note in Pasian’ Gam thusimte na theihtheih nadingun thu hong kipia hi. Midangte ahih leh, en napi-in mu lo ding uh hi. Ngai napi-in a khiatna a theih loh nadingun thugentehna tawh kihilh ding hi.”" 
Luke8:11 “Thugentehna in hih bang ahi hi; Khaici in Pasian’ thu ahi hi. 
Luke8:12 Lampi geiah a kiate in, thu a zak khit uh ciangin thu um uh a, gupna a ngah loh nadingun, dawimangpa hong pai-in, a sinsung uh pan thu a lakkhiatte ahi uh hi." 
Luke8:13 Suang lakah a kiate in, thu a zak ciangin lungdamin a mang pahte ahi uh hi. Amaute in zung kip nei lo uh a, tawlkhat kikal a up uh hangin khemna a thuak uh ciangin a tawp kik uh hi." 
Luke8:14 Ling lakah a kiate in, thu a zak khit uh ciangin amau deihna bang zui-in, lunghihmawhna, sum hauhna leh leitung lungdamnate in dep gawp a, gah a gah lote ahi uh hi." 
Luke8:15 Lei hoih ah a kiate in, thuman leh apha lungsim tawh thu a zak khit uh ciangin keem uh a, lungkipin a gahte ahi uh hi.”" 
Luke8:16 “Meivak a vak khit ciangin beel a khuh ahi zongin, lupna nuai-ah a koih ahi zongin kuamah a om kei hi. A lut mite in meivak taang a muh nadingun kho sangah a vak uh hi." 
Luke8:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a kipholaak lo ding thusim bangmah om lo hi. Khuavak in taan’ in, a kithei lo dinga a kiseelsim thei bangmah om lo hi." 
Luke8:18 Tua ahih ciangin note in bangci na zak uh hiam, na kikeem un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a neite kipiak beh ding hi. A nei lote kiang pan a neihsa a upmawh nangawn kilakhia ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke8:19 Tua lai takin Zeisu’ nu leh a sanggamte in a kiangah a pai uh hangin, mihonpi a om manun ah a va nai thei kei uh hi." 
Luke8:20 “Na nu leh na sanggamte in hong hopih nuamin inn pua lamah ding-in a om uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin," 
Luke8:21 Zeisu in, “Pasian’ thu za-a a mangte in ka nu, ka sanggampa, ka sanggamnu ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:22 Ni khat Zeisu in a nungzuite tawh gunkuang ah a tuang hi. “Tuili gal khatah pai ni,” a cih khit ciangin a pai uh hi." 
Luke8:23 Gunkuang tungah tuangin a pai lai takun Zeisu a ihmu hi. Tuipi tungah huihpi nakpi nungsuk a, gunkuang sungah tui kidim a, amaute in kisiat ding a lau uh hi." 
Luke8:24 Zeisu kiangah pai uh a, “Topa, Topa aw, kote ka si dek tak uh hi,” ci-in a phong uh hi. Zeisu tho a, huihpi leh tui kilok a taai khit ciangin khawlin, a dai hi." 
Luke8:25 Zeisu in, “Na upna uh koi-ah om hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute lau uh ahih ciangin, lamdang a sa uh a, “Hih mi in kua mi ahi hiam? Huih leh tui nangawn thu a piak ciangin a ngai tazen uh hi,” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Luke8:26 Galile gam galah Geresa gam a tung uh a," 
Luke8:27 Zeisu lei tungah a kahtoh ciangin tua khua panin dawi lut mi khat in a dawn hi. Tua pa in sawtveipi puan silh lo a, innah om loin han lakah a om hi." 
Luke8:28 Amah in Zeisu a muh ciangin, a mai-ah bokin, “Sang Bel Pasian’ Tapa Zeisu aw, nang tawh bang kikum i hi hiam? Kei nong bawlsiat loh nadingin kong thuum hi,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko hi." 
Luke8:29 Hih thu bang hangin a thuum hiam i cih leh, Zeisu in kihhuai dawi in tua pa sung pan a taikhiat nadingin thu a pia hi. Dawi in tua pa tamveipi a man zo hi. Sikkhau tawh kihen a, kolbulh in, a kikhum hangin, a sikkhau peeksat a, dawi in gampa lakah a hawlkhia hi." 
Luke8:30 Zeisu in, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Ka min Legion ahi hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, dawite tampi in ama sungah a lut zo uh hi." 
Luke8:31 A thuk leinuai-ah pai nading thu a piak loh nadingin dawite in a thuum uh hi. 
Luke8:32 Tua san tak mual tungah vok honpi khat gamta-in a om uh hi. Amaute in vok sungah lut nading thu a piak na’ng dawite in a nget uh ciangin, Zeisu in thu a pia hi." 
Luke8:33 Dawite in tua pa sung pan paikhia uh a, vokte sungah a lut uh leh, vok honpite in kensang tung pan taisuk uh a, tuili sungah tuakin a si khin uh hi." 
Luke8:34 Vokcingte in tua thu a muh uh ciangin, tai uh a, khua sung leh gam sungah hih thu a gen uh hi." 
Luke8:35 Mite in bang thu piang hiam ci-in en dingin a kuankhia uh hi. Amaute in Zeisu kiang a tun’uh ciangin, dawi paikhiatnapa puan silhin mipil bangin Zeisu’ khe kiangah tu-in a om a mu uh a, a lungmang uh hi." 
Luke8:36 A mu mite in dawi lutpa in bangci cidamna ngah hiam ci-in amaute in a zasak uh hi. 
Luke8:37 Geresa gam mi khempeuhte in launa lungsim nei uh ahih ciangin, amaute kiang pan a paikhiat nading Zeisu a nget uh ciangin, gunkuang sungah tuangin a ciah hi." 
Luke8:38 Dawite a paikhiatnapa in Zeisu tawh a omkhawm nadingin thu a nget ciangin," 
Luke8:39 Zeisu in, “Na innah ciah in la, Pasian in nangma tungah bangzah takin noptuamna hong bawl cih na zasak in,” ci-in a sawl hi. Tua pa pai a, Zeisu in ama tungah bangzah tak noptuamna bawl hiam ci-in khua sung khempeuh thu a kizeelsak hi." 
Luke8:40 Zeisu a ciahkik ciangin, mihonpite in nuamin a tungsak uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amah lamenin a om uh hi." 
Luke8:41 Tua lai takin Jairas min nei, kikhopna inn ukpa khat in va nai a, Zeisu’ khe kiangah bokin ama innah a pai nading thu a ngen hi." 
Luke8:42 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, kum sawm leh kum nih a pha tanu khat nei a, tua a tanu si dek tak hi. Zeisu a pai lai takin, mihonpi in amah a phukha uh hi." 
Luke8:43 Tua lai takin, kum sawm leh kum nih tawntung si luang cinatna vei a, a neihsa tengin zatote a guaih hangin kuamah in a damsak zawh loh numei khat in," 
Luke8:44 a nung lamah pai-in a puan mongteep a lawn’ ciangin thakhatin a si suahna a kang hi. 
Luke8:45 Zeisu in, “Kua in hong lawng hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Mi khempeuh in a nial uh ciangin Piter in, “Topa aw, mihonpite in nang hong phukha a, hong sukha uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:46 Zeisu in, “Mi khat in kei hong lawng hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka tung panin vangliatna a paikhia ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:47 Numei in amah bu zo lo ci-in a theih ciangin, liingin hong pai a, Zeisu mai-ah bokin, bang hangin Zeisu lawnga thakhatin bangci damna a ngah pah thu, mi khempeuh mai-ah a gen hi." 
Luke8:48 Zeisu in, “Ka tanu aw, na upna in nang hong damsak zo hi. Nuam takin na ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:49 Zeisu in tua thu a gen lai takin, kikhopna inn ukpa’ inn panin mi khat hong pai a, “Na tanu a si zo hi. Siapa gimsak kei in,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke8:50 Ahih hangin Zeisu in a zak ciangin, “Lungmang kei in, upna na neih leh, amah a dam ding hi,” ci-in kikhopna inn ukpa kiangah a gen hi." 
Luke8:51 Zeisu in a inn a tun’ ciangin Piter, Johan, Jakob leh numeino’ nu leh pate longal, midang kuamah amah tawh inn sungah a lut khawm nading thu a pia kei hi." 
Luke8:52 Mi khempeuh in numeino hangin nakpi-in a kap uh a, thuumin a om uh hi. Zeisu in, “Kap kei un." 
Luke8:53 Amah a si kei hi, a ihmu hi,” a cih ciangin, numeino a si cih amau thei uh ahih ciangin, Zeisu zahpihin a nuihsan uh hi." 
Luke8:54 Zeisu in numeino’ khut len a, “Numeino aw, tho in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:55 Tua ciangin a kha ciahkik a, thakhatin a tho hi. Amah an a piak nadingin thu a pia hi." 
Luke8:56 A nu leh pate in lamdang a sa uh hi. Ahih hangin Zeisu in a kihih nate kuamah kiangah gen lo dingin a kham hi. 
Luke9:1 Tua lai takin Zeisu in Sawm-le-nihte a sap khit ciangin, dawite zawh nading leh cinate a damsak theih nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Luke9:2 Tuate in Pasian’ Gam thu hilh ding ahi zongin, cinate damsak ding ahi zongin a sawl hi." 
Luke9:3 “Note in lampi ah zat ding bangmah na keng kei un. Ciangkhut ahi zongin, thung-ip ahi zongin, khomun ahi zongin, dangka ahi zongin, na keng kei un. Puanak nih na nei kei un." 
Luke9:4 Inn khatpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin, tua inn ah na paikhiat matengun na om un." 
Luke9:5 Mi khatpeuh in note hong nolh leh, amau khua pan na paikhiat uh ciangin, amau lang khatah teci a pang dingin, na khepeek nuai-a leivuite na singkhia un,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Luke9:6 Amaute paikhia uh a, Lungdamna Thu hilhin, cinate damsakin, khuapi leh khuaneute ah a pai kawikawi uh hi." 
Luke9:7 Tua lai takin Menzipa Herod in Zeisu hihna thu khempeuh a zak ciangin a lungmang hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, mi kimkhat in, “Johan in a sihna pan a thokik zo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:8 Mi kimkhat in, “Elijah hong kilang kik zo hi,” a ci uh hi. Mi kimkhat in, “Tanglai kamsangte khatpeuh mah a thokik zo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:9 Herod in, “Johan’ ngawng ka tan zo hi. Hih bang thu ka zakna hih pa in kua ahi hiam?” ci-in Zeisu mu dingin a zong hi." 
Luke9:10 Sawltakte in Zeisu kiangah a paikik uh ciangin, ahihna thu khempeuh a zasak uh hi. Zeisu in amaute paipih a, gam daihna Bethsaida kici khua khatah a tung uh hi." 
Luke9:11 Mihonpite in a theih uh ciangin a delh uh hi. Zeisu in amaute hawlkhia loin Pasian’ Gam thu hilh a, dam nading a deihte a damsak hi." 
Luke9:12 Ni a tum dektak ciangin, sawm-le-nihte in va nai uh a, “Mihonpite in a kimkot khuaneu leh lo lai-ah pai-in, giah na’ng leh an nek ding zong dingin paisak ta in. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih laitak in gamlak ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:13 Zeisu in, “Amau nek ding an note’n na pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in “Kote in pai-in hih mi khempeuh ading an ka lei kei uh leh, khomun pum nga leh ngasa tawn nih longal bangmah ka nei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:14 Bang hangin hih bangin a gen uh hiam i cih leh, pasal bek zong tulnga bang a pha uh hi. Zeisu in, “Mite pawl khat sawmnga, a pawlpawlin tusak un,” ci-in a nungzuite thu a pia hi." 
Luke9:15 A nungzuite in a thupiak mah bangin a hih uh a, a om mite khempeuh a tusak uh hi." 
Luke9:16 Zeisu in khomun pum nga leh ngasa tawn nih la a, vantung lam ento-in thupha a piak khit ciangin balnen a, mite mai-ah lui dingin a nungzuite a pia hi." 
Luke9:17 Amaute’n ne uh a, a vekpi un a kham khit uh ciangin, a val a neng a themte a tawm uh a, seeng sawm leh seeng nih dim a ngah uh hi." 
Luke9:18 Khatvei Zeisu in gam daihna-ah thu a nget lai takin, amah tawh a nungzuite a omkhawm uh hi. Zeisu in, “Mihonpite in kei kua hi hong ci uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Luke9:19 amaute in, “‘Baptaizpa Johan,’ a ci uh hi. Kimkhatte in, ‘Elijah,’ a ci uh hi. Midangte in, ‘Tanglai kamsangte khatpeuh a hingkik hi,’ a ci ciat uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Luke9:20 Zeisu in, “Note in kei kua hi nong ci uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Piter in, “Nangmah in Pasian’ Khazih na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:21 Zeisu in hih thu kuamah kiangah gen lo dingin a nungzuite a kham hi. 
Luke9:22 “Mihing Tapa in gimna tampi thuak ding a, upate, siampi liante leh laitheite in nial ding uh a, amah in thahna zong thuak ding a, ni thum khit ciangin a thokik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:23 Mi khempeuh kiangah Zeisu in, “Mi khatpeuh in kei hong zuih nop leh, a pumpi nial a, ama singlamteh ni simin pua-in hong zui ta hen." 
Luke9:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a nuntakna a gum nuamte in a nuntakna a mangthangsak ding hi. Keima hangah a nuntakna a mangsakte in a nuntakna a gum ding hi." 
Luke9:25 Mi khatpeuh in leitung khempeuh a ngah hangin, ama nuntakna mangthang leh, bang phattuamna ngah ding ahi hiam?" 
Luke9:26 Keimah hang ahi zongin, ka thu hang ahi zongin a maizum peuhmah, Mihing Tapa in ama phatna, Pa phatna leh a siangtho vantungmite’ phatna tawh hong pai ciangin, tua mi a maizumsak ding hi." 
Luke9:27 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, Pasian’ Gam hih san takah a ding mi kimkhat in a muh uh matengin a si kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:28 Hih thu a gen khit ni giat bang a phak ciangin, Zeisu in Piter, Johan leh Jakob te samin, thungen dingin mual tungah a kahto uh hi." 
Luke9:29 Thu a nget lai takin a meel kilamdang a, a puan zong paak a, a leng mahmah hi." 
Luke9:30 Moses leh Elijah ahi nihte in meel lamdangin kilang uh a," 
Luke9:31 Zeisu tawh kihoin Jerusalem khuapi-ah sihna a thuak nading thu a gen uh hi. 
Luke9:32 Piter leh amah tawh a omkhawmte a lusu uh hi. Ahih hangin a khan’lawh khit uh ciangin, Zeisu’ minthan’na leh amah tawh a ding khawmte a mu uh hi." 
Luke9:33 Tuate in Zeisu tawh a kikhen lai takun Piter in, “Topa aw, hih lai takah kote kong om uh ahoih hi. Nang ading buk khat, Moses ading buk khat, Elijah ading buk khat, buk thum kote hong lamsak in,” ci-in gen ding adang thei loin a gen hi." 
Luke9:34 Hih thu a gen lai takin meii khat in amaute tuam a, amaute in meii sungah a tum lai takun a lau uh hi." 
Luke9:35 “Hih pa in ka teelsa ka Tapa ahi hi. Ama thu na ngai un,” ci-in meii lak pan aw khat a ging hi." 
Luke9:36 Aw a gin’ khit ciangin Zeisu bek om a kimu hi. Amaute pau loin, tua hun lai taka a muh uh nate kuamah kiangah a gen kei uh hi." 
Luke9:37 Zingsang ciangin amaute mual tung pan a kumsuk khit uh ciangin, mihonpite in Topa a dawn uh hi." 
Luke9:38 Mihonpi lak pan mi khat in, “Sia aw, ka tapa hong en in, ci-in kong thuum hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah bek ta ka nei hi." 
Luke9:39 Dawi in amah manin amah thakhatin kiko a, a kam sung pan cilphuan bua dongin kongkawsak a, nakpi-in bawlsia-in a paikhia hak mahmah hi." 
Luke9:40 Dawi hawlkhia dingin na nungzuite kiangah ka nget hangin ahih thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Luke9:41 Zeisu in, “Thu upna nei lo a lungkhauh pawlte aw, kei in note tawh bang tanvei omkhawm ding ka hi hiam? Note bang tanvei hong thuak zo ding ka hi hiam? Na tapa ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:42 A pai lai takin dawi in naupang lei ah puksakin a kongkawsak hi. Zeisu in kihhuai dawi taai a, naupang a damsak khit ciangin a pa kiangah a pia hi." 
Luke9:43 Amau khempeuh in Pasian’ vangliatna lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Luke9:44 Ahih hangin mi khempeuh in Zeisu hihna khempeuh lamdang a sak uh ciangin, a nungzuite kiangah Zeisu in, “Na lungsim uh ah hih thute tum ta hen. Mihing Tapa in mite khut tungah kiheek ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:45 Amaute in tua thu a thei kei uh a, a theih loh nadingun a kiseel hi. A cihnopna zong amaute in a dong ngam kei uh hi." 
Luke9:46 Tua lai takin a nungzuite in amaute lakah kua lianbel hiam ci-in khat leh khat a kiseel uh hi. 
Luke9:47 Zeisu in amaute lungsim sungah kiseelna a theih ciangin, naupang khat samin ama kiangah a koih khit ciangin," 
Luke9:48 “Keima min tawh hih naupangno a ngai peuhmah in, kei zong hong ngai hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note lakah a neu penpa in milian ahi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:49 Johan in, “Sia aw, nangma min tawh dawite a hawlkhia mi khat ka mu uh hi. Amah in eite hong zui lo ahih ciangin ka kham uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke9:50 Zeisu in, “Tua pa na kham kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note lang khatah a pang lo mi in note tawh kipawlin a om hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke9:51 Vantungah kilaktoh ding hun a tun’ dek tak ciangin, Zeisu in Jerusalem khua lam mainawhin a pai hi." 
Luke9:52 A mai-ah kamtaite a paisak hi. Tuate pai uh a, Zeisu ading mun bawl khol dingin Samaria khua khatah a lut uh hi." 
Luke9:53 Zeisu in Jerusalem khua lam pai dingin a mainawt ahih ciangin tua khua mite in a nolh uh hi. 
Luke9:54 Tua thu a nungzuite Jakob leh Johan in a muh uh ciangin, “Topa aw, kote in vantung panin mei kiasakin tua mite a kat nading na awi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke9:55 Zeisu kihei a, amaute a taai khit ciangin khua dangah a pai uh hi." 
Luke9:56  
Luke9:57 Lampi ah a pai lai takun mi khat in, “Na paina khempeuh ah kong zui ding hi,” ci-in Zeisu kiangah a gen hi." 
Luke9:58 Zeisu in, “Ngiate in kua a nei uh hi. Vasate in zong bu a nei uh hi. Ahih hangin, Mihing Tapa ahih leh, a lutang ngak nading mun a nei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:59 Midang khat kiangah, “Kei hong zui in,” a cih ciangin amah in, “Topa aw, ka pa ka vui masak nading thu hong pia in,” ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke9:60 Zeisu in, “Misite in amau misite na vui ta hen. Nang na hih leh, pai in la, Pasian’ Gam’ thu na hilh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:61 Midang khat in, “Topa aw, nangmah kong zui ding hi. Ahih hangin ka innah a om mite mangpha ka vaikhak masak nading thu hong pia in,” a cih ciangin," 
Luke9:62 Zeisu in, “Lawi lokhawhna leeng letsan len kawm a, nunglam a en mi in Pasian’ Gam tawh kituak lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:1 Tua khit ciangin Topa in a dang sawmsagihte koih a, a pai nading khuapi, khuaneu tengah ama mai-ah nih tek, nih tekin a sawl hi." 
Luke10:2 Tuate kiangah thu a piakna in, “Buh at ding tampi om hi. Ahih hangin a at ding mite tawm hi. Tua ahih ciangin buh-at nasem ding hong sawl in ci-in, buh nei Topa kiangah thu na ngen un." 
Luke10:3 Pai un. Ngia hon lakah tuuno kikhahte bangin no kong sawl hi. 
Luke10:4 Dangka-ip, thung-ip, khedap, tuate na keng kei un. Lampi ah na pai lai takun kuamah na hopih kei un." 
Luke10:5 Inn khatpeuh mah na lut uh ciangin, ‘Hih inn sungah thupha om ta hen,’ ci-in a masa-in na gen un." 
Luke10:6 Tua innah thupha deih mi a om leh, note thupha a tungah a tung ding hi. A om kei leh, note kiangah hong kileh kik ding hi." 
Luke10:7 Tua innah na om uh ciangin an ne tui dawnin, amau hong piak uh bangin na ne un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nasempa in thaman ngah ding kilawm hi. Inn khat panin inn khatah kawm themthum kei un." 
Luke10:8 Khua khatpeuh mah na lut uh ciangin, khua mite in hong tun’sak uh leh, note mai-ah hong lui khempeuh na ne un." 
Luke10:9 Cinate na damsak un. ‘Pasian’ Gam in note kiangah hong nai zo hi,’ ci-in thu na hilh un." 
Luke10:10 Khua khatpeuh mah na lut uh ciangin, khua mite in no hong nolh leh, tua khua lampi ah na paikhia un la," 
Luke10:11 ‘Ka khepeek uh ah hong belh no khua leivui nangawn note langkhat ah ka nulkhia uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ Gam hong nai zo hi ci-in na thei ta un,’ ci-in na gen un." 
Luke10:12 Ke’n kong cih-inah, tua Ni ciangin tua khua in Sodom khua sangin gimna a thuak zaw ding hi.”" 
Luke10:13 “Khorazin khuapi aw, nangmah in gimna na thuak ding hi. Bethsaida khuapi aw, nangmah in gimna na thuak ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note sungah hong kilak vangliatna in Tai-ar khuapi leh Sidon khuapi sungah kilak ngei hi leh, amau in sawtpekin khautang puan silhin, vut tawh kibuakin a kisik kik zo ding uh hi." 
Luke10:14 Thukhen ni ciangin note in Tai-ar leh Sidon khuapi sangin gimna na thuak zaw ding uh hi. 
Luke10:15 Nang Kapernaum khuapi aw, vantung khua dongin minthan’na na ngah ding hiam? Nang in hel khua dongin na kiasuk ding hi." 
Luke10:16 Note thu a ngaite in ka thu a ngai hi. Note hong nolhte in kei zong hong nolh hi. Kei hong nolhte in kei hong sawlpa zong a nolh hi,” ci-in Zeisu in a gen hi." 
Luke10:17 Tua sawmsagihte in lungdamna tawh hong ciahkik uh a, “Topa aw, na minin dawite nangawn ka zo uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke10:18 Zeisu in, “Satan in khuaphia bangin vantung pan hong kiasuk ke’n ka mu zo hi." 
Luke10:19 En un, note in gul gilote leh aikamte na sikgawp nading uh leh na galte’ vangliatna khempeuh na zawh nadingun thu ke’n kong pia hi." 
Luke10:20 Note bangmah in hong bawlsia kei ding hi. Ahih hangin dawite na zawh uh hangin lungdam kei un. Vantung khua sungah na min uh a kigelh manin na lungdam ta un,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:21 Tua lai takin Zeisu in Kha Siangtho tawh lungdam a, “Vantung leh leitung a uk ka Pa aw, nangmah in hih thute mipilte leh misiamte kiangah im-inah, naupangte tungah lak na hih ciangin, na hehpihna ka phat hi. Ahi mah hi ka Pa aw, tua bangin na deih hi." 
Luke10:22 Ka Pa in na khempeuh kei hong pia zo hi. Pa longal kuamah in Tapa a thei kei hi. Tapa mahmah leh Tapa in a theihsak nopte longal kuamah in Pa a thei kei hi.” a ci hi. 
Luke10:23 Zeisu in a nungzuite lamah kihei a, “No na muh nate a mu mittangte in thupha a ngah ding uh hi." 
Luke10:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na muhte uh Pasian’ kamsang tampite leh kumpi tampite in a muh nop uh hangin a mu kei uh hi. Na zakte uh a zak nop uh hangin a za kei uh hi ci-in kong gen hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke10:25 Thukham siapa khat ding-in Zeisu ze-et a, “Sia aw, tawntung nuntakna luah nadingin bang ka hih ding hiam? ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke10:26 Zeisu in, “Thukhamna sungah bang a kigelh hiam? Bangci na sim hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
Luke10:27 amah in, “Na Topa Pasian, na lungsim khempeuh, na kha khempeuh, na thahatna khempeuh, na pilna khempeuh tawh na it in. Na pumpi na it bangin na lawmte na it in,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke10:28 Zeisu in, “Na dawn’na thu ahi takpi hi. Tua bangin na hih leh, na nungta ding hi.” a ci hi." 
Luke10:29 Tua pa in ama phatna thu a lah nop manin, “Ka lawmte kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in Zeisu a dong hi." 
Luke10:30 Zeisu in zong, “Mi khat in Jerusalem khua panin Jerikho khua-ah a paisuk lai takin, misuamte tawh kituak hi. Misuamte in tua pa’ puan hawkkhia a, nakpi-in a sat khit uh ciangin, si dek takin a nusia uh hi." 
Luke10:31 Tua lampi ah siampi khat paikha zenzen a, tua pa a muh ciangin peelin a nusia hi." 
Luke10:32 Tua mah bangin Levi mi khat hong tung a, tua pa a muh ciangin peelin a pai leuleu hi." 
Luke10:33 Ahih hangin Samaria mi khat in khualzinin a pai lai takin ama omna hong tung a; 
Luke10:34 a muh ciangin hehpihhuai sa a, va nai-in ama liammate sathau leh leenggahtui nuh a, puan tawh a gak khit ciangin ama la tungah tuangsakin, zintun’na innah paipihin a khoi hi." 
Luke10:35 Zingsang a paikhiat ciangin peek nih la a, zintun’ inn ukpa a piak khit ciangin, “Hih mi na khoi in, a bei khempeuh kong paikik ciangin kong loh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:36 Nang bangci ngaihsut na hi hiam? Tua mi thum sung panin kua pen in misuamte tawh a kituakpa’ lawm ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. 
Luke10:37 Thukham siapa in, “Tua a hehpihpa in a lawmpa ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Zeisu in, “Nang zong pai in la, tua mah bangin na hih in,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:38 Amaute lampi ah a pai lai takun, khua khatah lut uh a, Martha kici numei khat in ama innah a tungsak hi." 
Luke10:39 Tua numei in Mari a kici sanggam numei khat a nei hi. Tua Mari in Zeisu khe kiangah tu-in ama thu a ngai hi. 
Luke10:40 Ahih hangin Martha ahih leh, an bawlin gim a, Zeisu kiangah va nai-in, “Topa aw, kei bek in an bawlin ka nau in hong huh loh ding na awi hiam? Amah in kei hong huh nading thu pia in,” ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke10:41 Zeisu in, “Martha aw, Martha aw, nang in na tampi na lunghimawh a, gimna na thuak hi." 
Luke10:42 Ahih hangin sapna khat bek a om hi. Mari in ahih leh, na hoih khat a teel zo hi. Tua na in ama tung pan kilakhia lo ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke11:1 Zeisu in mun khatah thu ngen a, a tawp khit ciangin a nungzuite khat in, “Topa aw, Johan in ama nungzuite thunget nading ahilh mah bangin, kote zong hong hilh in,” ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke11:2 Zeisu in, “Note in thu na nget uh ciangin hih bangin na ngen un: ‘Pa aw, Nangma min siangtho ta hen; Na Gam hong piang ta hen;" 
Luke11:3 Ni simin ka khamkhop ding uh an hong pia in; 
Luke11:4 Ko tungah hong mawhte ka maisak uh bangin, kote mawhna zong hong maisak ta in; Kheemna hong thuaksak kei in,’ ci-in na ngen un,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:5 Zeisu in, “Note khatpeuh in lawm nei a, zankim lai takin ama innah pai a, ‘Lawm aw, keima lawmte khat hong zin a, kei kiangah hong tung zo hi." 
Luke11:6 Amah ka vak nading bangmah om lo ahih ciangin, khomun pum thum hong leitawisak in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke11:7 A lawmpa in inn sung panin, ‘Kei hong bawlsia kei in. Tu-in kong kikhak zo hi. Ka tate tawh ka lum khin zo uh hi. Kei thoin nang kong pia zo kei ding hi,’ a ci ding hiam?" 
Luke11:8 Ke’n kong cih-inah ama lawmpa ahih man-inah, thoin a pia kei zongin, ngen teitei ahih manin thoin a deih teng khempeuh a pia ding hi.”" 
Luke11:9 “Khatvei ka cih-inah, ngen un. Na nget uh leh, hong pia ding hi. Zong un, Na zon’ uh leh, na mu ding uh hi. Kongkhak kiu un. Na kiuh uh leh, hong kihon’ ding hi." 
Luke11:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a ngente khempeuh in a ngah ding uh hi. A zongte khempeuh in a mu ding uh hi. A kiute khempeuh ading kongkhak a hon’ ding hi." 
Luke11:11 A ta in khomun ngen leh, suang a pia ding, ngasa ngen leh, gul a pia ding," 
Luke11:12 aktui ngen leh, aikam a pia ding note lakah kua a om hiam?" 
Luke11:13 Note in mi gilo na hi napi-un na tate uh a hoih na piak uh leh, tua sangin vantungah a om na Pa un a ngen mite Kha Siangtho hong pia zaw ding hilo ahi hiam?” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke11:14 Zeisu in a pau thei lo dawi a hawlkhia hi. Dawi a paikhiat khit ciangin, a pau thei lopa a pau thei hi." 
Luke11:15 Mihonpite in lamdang a sa uh hi. Ahih hangin mi kimkhat in, “Amah in Beelzebub suangin dawite a hawlkhia hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke11:16 Kimkhat in zong ze-et nuamin vantung pan lim a ngen uh hi. 
Luke11:17 Zeisu in amau lungsim ngaihsutna thei-in, “Gam sung mi kilem loin a kikhen gam khempeuh in kisia ding hi. Inn khat zong inn dang tawh kilem loin a kikhen leh, a puk ding hi." 
Luke11:18 Keimah in Beelzebub suangin dawite ka hawlkhia hi, ci-in note’n nong gen man-unah Satan in amah leh amah kilem loin a kikhen leh, ama gam bangci a kip zo ding hiam?" 
Luke11:19 Keimah in Beelzebub suangin dawite hawlkhia leng na tate un kua suangin dawite a hawlkhia ding uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin, amaute in note tungah thukhen dingte ahi uh hi." 
Luke11:20 Ahih hangin, Pasian’ khutme tawh dawite ka hawlkhiat leh, Pasian’ Gam in note kiangah hong tung zo hi." 
Luke11:21 Mi thahat in hiam tawi-in ama inn tualah a cin lai takin ama sumte a bit hi. 
Luke11:22 Ahih hangin amah sangin a hatzaw mi hong pai a, a zawh khit ciangin, amah in a muan a hiamte sut a, a sumte la-in a hawm ding hi." 
Luke11:23 Keimah tawh a kipawl lote in keima langkhat ah a pang hi. Keimah tawh a khawmkhawm lote in a kithehthangsak hi.” 
Luke11:24 “A kihhuai dawi in mi sung pan a paikhiat khit ciangin, mun keuna-ah vakin khawl nading a zong hi." 
Luke11:25 A muh loh ciangin, ‘Ka paikhiatna inn lamah ciahkik ning,’ ci-a a pai leh, a tun’ ciangin tua inn awng a, kiphiat a, kipuah a, om a mu hi." 
Luke11:26 Tua ciangin pai a, amah sangin a gilo zaw dawi sagih va sam a, tua pa sungah a lut uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin, tua pa a pian’ nunung pen in a pian’ masak sangin a sia zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:27 Zeisu in tua thu a gen lai takin, mihonpi lak panin numei khat in, “Nang hong paii gil leh na teep nawi in thupha a ngah ding hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Luke11:28 Zeisu in, “Pasian thu za a, a mangte in thupha a ngah zaw ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke11:29 Mihonpite in Zeisu kiangah a kikhop lai takun amah in, “Hih khang mite in mi gilote ahi uh hi. Amau in lim a zon’ uh hangin Jonah lim longal, lim dang amau tungah a kilak kei ding hi." 
Luke11:30 Jonah in Nineveh khuapihte tungah lim ahih bangin, Mihing Tapa in hih khang mite tungah lim ahi ding hi." 
Luke11:31 Khanglam gam kumpinu in thu a khen ciangin tu-a khang mite langkhat ah ding a, amaute a mawhsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in Solomon’ lungpilna thu ngai dingin, leimong panin a hong pai hi. Hih lai takah Solomon sangin a lianzaw mi khat a om hi." 
Luke11:32 Thu a khen ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite in tu-a khang mite langkhat ah ding-in a mawhsak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Jonah in thu a hilh manin amau mawhna a kisikkik uh hi. Hih lai takah Jonah sangin a lianzaw mi khat a om hi.”" 
Luke11:33 “Kuamah in mei a vak khit uh ciangin buliahna-ah a koih kei a; seeng zong a khuh kei hi. A lut mite in meivak a muh nadingun kho sangah a vak hi. 
Luke11:34 Na mittang in na pumpi’ meivak ahi hi. Na mit a vak leh, na pumpi zong a vak kim ding hi. Na mit a man’ leh, na pumpi khempeuh zong a mial ding hi." 
Luke11:35 Tua ahih ciangin, na sungah a om khuavak in khuamial ahi hiam, hi lo hiam na en in." 
Luke11:36 Tua ahih ciangin, mun khat beek mial loin, na pumpi a vak leh, meivak’ vang tang in nang khuavak a hong pia bangin, na pumpi in khuavak tawh a kidim ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:37 Tua thu a gen lai takin Farisaite khat in, Zeisu an vak dingin a sap leh, pai a, an ne dingin a sabuai ah a tu hi." 
Luke11:38 Zeisu in an a nek ma-in a kisil loh Farisaipa in a muh ciangin lamdang a sa hi. 
Luke11:39 Topa in, “No Faraisaite in hai leh dalkuangte a pua lam na silsiang uh hangin, na sung lam uh ah ngongtatna leh gitlohna tawh na kidim uh hi." 
Luke11:40 No mi pilote aw, a pualam a bawlpa in a sunglam zong bawl hilo ahi hiam?" 
Luke11:41 Ahih hangin kuang sunglam a om nate mizawngte na pia un. Tua bang na hih uh leh, na khempeuh note mai-ah a siangtho ding hi.”" 
Luke11:42 “Farisaite aw, note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, leengmasel leh anis leh meh namkim sehsawm suah sehkhat na piak uh hangin, aman thukhenna leh Pasian itna na nusia uh hi. Adangte tang lo tuan loin, hihte zong tan’ ding kilawm hi." 
Luke11:43 Farisaite aw, note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kikhopna inn sungah tokhom sang bel ahi zongin, sumbuk ah zahtakna tawh hopihna ahi zongin na deih uh hi." 
Luke11:44 Note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a kilang lo hankhuk tawh kibang na hi uh hi. A tungah a pai mite in han om ci-in a thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke11:45 Thukham siate khat in, “Sia aw, tua bang na gen ciangin ko zong na hong taai hi,” a cih ciangin," 
Luke11:46 Zeisu in, “No thukham siate aw, no zong gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a puak hak van midangte na suat uh hangin, na khutme khat nangawnun na lawng nuam kei uh hi." 
Luke11:47 Note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na pu na pate un a thah Pasian’ kamsangte’ han na bawl uh a, tua ahih ciangin na pu na pate’ hihsa nate thei-in na awi uh hi." 
Luke11:48 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in Pasian’ kamsangte a that uh a, note in amau han bawlin teci na pang uh hi." 
Luke11:49 Tua ahih ciangin, Pasian’ lungpilna in, ‘Kamsangte leh sawltakte amaute kiangah ka sawl ding hi. Amau in tuate kimkhat that uh a, a bawlsia ding uh hi!’" 
Luke11:50 Tua ahih ciangin Abel’ si akipan biakna tau leh biakna innpi kikal a, kithat Zekhariah’ si dongin, leitung pian’ akipan a kibuasa Pasian’ kamsangte khempeuh’ si in hih khang mite tungah a kingen ding hi." 
Luke11:51 Ahi hi. Ke’n kong cih-inah, tua si tu lai khang mite tungah a kisiik ding hi." 
Luke11:52 No Thukham siate aw, gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in lungpilna’ konghon’na na lakhia uh hi. No lah lut loin, a lut nuamte zong na kham uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:53 Zeisu in tua mun pan a paikhiat lai takin, laitheite leh Farisaite in nakpi-in hansuahin," 
Luke11:54 ama kam pan mat nading a pang uh a, kam tampi a gen nadingin thu tampi a dong kawikawi uh hi." 
Luke12:1 Tua lai takin khat leh khat khe kisik kha dongin mi tul tampite a kikhawm uh hi. Zeisu in a nungzuite kiangah a gen masak pen-inah: “Mi simtatna ahi Farisaite’ silngo kikem un la, na tang un." 
Luke12:2 A kilak lo ding a kisincip bangmah om lo hi. A kithei lo ding a ki-imcip bangmah om lo hi. 
Luke12:3 Tua ahih ciangin, khuamial sungah na gen khempeuh khuavakna-ah kiza ding hi. Inndei sung leh bil sunga na gen thu in innkhum vumah a kiko ding uh hi.”" 
Luke12:4 “Ka lawmte aw, note kong hilh-inah, pumpi a thah khit cianga bangmah ahih zo lo nate kihta kei un." 
Luke12:5 Kua mi na kihta ding ci-in kong gen ding hi; pumpi a thah khit ciangin hel khua sungah a khul zo Pa na kihta un. Ahi hi, tua pa na kihta un kong ci hi." 
Luke12:6 Gitta nga in dangkasan peek nih tawh kizuak hilo ahi hiam? Tuate khat beek Pasian in a mangngilh kei hi. 
Luke12:7 Na sam uh zong kisim khin hi. Na kihta kei un; note in gitta tampi sangin na manpha zaw uh hi.” 
Luke12:8 “Ke’n kong cih-inah, mite mai-ah kei hong mang hong ngai khempeuh, Mihing Tapa in Pasian’ vantungmite mai-ah a ngai ding hi." 
Luke12:9 Mite mai-ah hong nialte Pasian’ vantungmite mai-ah kinial ding hi. 
Luke12:10 Mihing Tapa a gensiate in maisak nading thu a ngah ding uh hi. Kha Siangtho a gensiate in maisak nading thu a ngah kei ding uh hi. 
Luke12:11 Amaute in kikhopna inn mai-ah ahi zongin, upate mai-ah ahi zongin, thukhente mai-ah ahi zongin, note hong paipih uh ciangin bangci ka thukkik ding hiam, bang thu ka gen ding hiam ci-in lunghimawh kei un." 
Luke12:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na gen ding uh thu tua hun lai takin, Kha Siangtho in hong hilh ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke12:13 Mihonpi lakah mi khat in, “Sia aw, ka u in ka pa’ gamh sum hong hop nadingin thu na pia in,” a cih leh," 
Luke12:14 Zeisu in, “Mipa aw, nomau thukhen ding ahi zongin, sum hawmsak ding ahi zongin kua in kei hong koih hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke12:15 Tua zawh ciangin Zeisu in, “Note in huaihamna khempeuh kikemin na tang un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mihing nuntakna in sum hauh nading ahi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:16 Thugentehna khat a gen-inah, “Sumhaupa khat in a lo panin an tampi a nei hi." 
Luke12:17 An teng koih nading om lo ahih ciangin, bang ka ci hih ding hiam ci-in a lungsim sungah a ngaihsun hi." 
Luke12:18 Hih bangin bawl ning; ka sal ka phel ding a, a lianzaw ka lam ding hi. Tua sal sungah ka an leh ka sum khempeuh ka koih ding hi." 
Luke12:19 Ka kha kiangah, ‘Kha aw, kum tampi zat ding na tampi a kikhol zo hi. Khawl in la, anne tuidawn, nuamsa-in om in, ka ci ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke12:20 Ahih hangin Pasian in, ‘Mi haipa aw, tu nitakin na kha a kila ding hi. Na kholsa nate kua in luah ding hiam?’ a ci hi." 
Luke12:21 Tua mah bangin, ama ading sum a khol hangin, Pasian mai-ah a zawng mi in tua pa tawh kibang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:22 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong gen-inah, bang ka ne ding hiam ci-in na nuntak nading uh lunghimawh kei un. Bang ka silh ding hiam ci-in na pumpi ading uh lunghimawh kei un." 
Luke12:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, an sangin nuntakna a lianzaw hi. Puan sangin pumpi a lianzaw hi." 
Luke12:24 Va-akte na lungngai un. Amaute in khaici tuh lo, a at kei uh hi. Beem ahi zongin, saal ahi zongin a nei kei uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in tuate a vak hi. Vasate sangin note in bangzahvei a manpha zaw na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke12:25 A lunghihmawh manin na tun san’na uh tong khat bek a khangsak thei note lakah kua a om hiam? 
Luke12:26 Tua ahih ciangin, a neupen thu nangawn na hih zawh kei uh leh, adangte ading bang hang lunghimawh na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke12:27 Unok kungte in bangci khang thei ahi uh hiam ci-in na lungngai un. Amaute in na lah sem lo, khau lah kheek lo uh hi. Ahih hangin Solomon nangawn in a minthan’na puan a silh lai takin, tua unok khat bangin kizeem lo hi ci-in kong gen hi." 
Luke12:28 Upna neute aw, tuni-in om a, zing ciangin meikhuk ah kikhul thei lopate Pasian in puan silhsak ahih ciangin, tua tham loin note zong puan hong silhsak ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Luke12:29 Bang ka ne ding hiam, bang ka dawn ding hiam ci-in na ngaihsun kei un." 
Luke12:30 Upkhialh lungsim nei kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, leitung mipawlte in hih nate khempeuh a zong uh hi. Note ahih leh, na Pa un tua nate khempeuh na sap uh ahih lam a thei hi." 
Luke12:31 Ama Gam na zong masa un. Na zon’ uh leh tua nate khempeuh zong hong kipia thuah ding hi.” 
Luke12:32 “Tuu honno aw, na lau kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na Pa un note kiangah Gam a hong pia nuam hi."
