Luke12:33 Na neihsa teng zuak un la, hehpihna na pia un. A lui thei lo dangka-ip na bawl un. Gutate’n naih zo lo a, nget in a suksiat theih lohna vantungah a bei thei lo sum na khol un." 
Luke12:34 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na sum kholna munah na lungsim uh zong a om ding hi.”" 
Luke12:35 “Note in na kawng uh gak un la, meivak vaksa-in na om un." 
Luke12:36 A topa in mo la lawm an vakna pan hong ciah a, kong a kiuh ciangin thakhatin ama ading kong hon’ thei ding a lamente tawh kibangin na om un." 
Luke12:37 Topa hong ciah ciangin, ngakin a om nasemte in thupha a ngah ding uh hi. Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, topa in a kawng gakin tua naseemte an ne dingin tusak a, hong pai-in amaute a vak ding hi." 
Luke12:38 Zankim lai tak ahi zongin, khuavak dek lai tak ahi zongin, topa hong ciah ciangin tua banga om a muh nasemte in thupha a ngah ding uh hi." 
Luke12:39 Ahih hangin gutate hong pai ding hun, inn neipa in theikhol leh, ama inn a suksiat loh nadingin a pang ding hi ci-in na thei ta un." 
Luke12:40 Note in zong kigingkhol un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na ngaihsut loh uh hun lai takin, Mihing Tapa a hong pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:41 Piter in, “Topa aw, hih thugentehna ko bek hong hilh na hi hiam? Ahih kei leh, mi khempeuh na hilh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke12:42 Topa in, “A topa in a hun a tun’ ciangin, a innkuanpihte’ annek tuidawn a hawmsak dinga a koih, a diktat a lungpil nasempa kua ahi hiam?" 
Luke12:43 A topa hong ciah ciangin, tua banga gamta-a a om a muh nasempa in thupha a ngah ding hi." 
Luke12:44 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, ama topa in a sum khempeuh tua nasempa a uksak ding hi." 
Luke12:45 Ahi zongin tua nasempa in, “Ka topa hong pai hak ding hi,” ci-in a lungsim sungah ngaihsun a, nasem pasalte leh nasem numeite satgawp a, anne tuidawnin, zu kham an khamin;" 
Luke12:46 a lamet loh ni leh a theih loh kalin a topa hong tung ding a, tua nasempa vua-in, a diktat lote tawh a omkhawm sak ding hi.”" 
Luke12:47 “Nasempa in ama topa’ deihna thei napi-in kiging khol lo a, a topa’ deihna bangin na sem kei leh, nakpi satna a thuak ding hi." 
Luke12:48 A topa’ deihna thei lo a, sat nading a kilawm a gamta nasempa in tawmno satna a thuak ding hi. Hehpihna tampi a ngahte tung panin tampi kingen ding hi. Amaute in mi khatpeuh mah tampi a piak leh, tua mi kiang pan na tampi a ngen kik ding uh hi.”" 
Luke12:49 “Leitungah mei kuangsak dingin hong pai ka hi hi. Tua mei tu-in kihal leh, bang ka deih lai ding hiam?" 
Luke12:50 Ahih hangin, baptaizna khat thuak ding ka nei hi. Tua baptaizna ka thuak matengin ka lungkim lo ding hi." 
Luke12:51 Leitungah kilemna pia dingin hong pai hi, ci-in na um uh hiam? Ahi kei hi. Kikhenna pia dingin hong pai ka hi hi." 
Luke12:52 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tu-a kipanin innkuanpih nga a om sung pan nih pawlkhat, thum pawlkhat in a kikhen ding uh hi." 
Luke12:53 Pa leh tapa, tapa leh pa, nu leh tanu, tanu leh nu, teeknu leh monu, monu leh teeknu, khat leh khat a kikhen tek ding uh hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke12:54 Zeisu in mihonpite kiangah a cihna in, “Note in ni tumna lamah meii kai khat na muh uh ciangin, ‘Guah hong zu ding hi,” thakhatin na ci uh hi. Na cih uh mah bangin ahi thei hi." 
Luke12:55 Khanglam pan huih hong nung na muh uh ciangin, ‘Ni hong sa ding hi,’ na ci uh hi. Na cih uh mah bangin ahi thei hi." 
Luke12:56 Mi simtatte aw, note in van leh lei maitang na khen thei uh hi. Tu lai tak hun bang hangin khen thei lo na hi uh hiam?”" 
Luke12:57 “Note in zong bang hangin thu khatpeuh aman hiam, man lo hiam ci-in khen thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke12:58 Na kitotpih pa tawh thukhen mangpa kiangah na paikhop lai takin, kilem dingin na hahkat in. Tua ahih kei leh, amah in thukhen mangpa kiangah hong kai ding hi. Thukhen mangpa in palikte kiangah hong pia ding a, palikte in thong sungah hong khum ding uh hi." 
Luke12:59 Na liau ding dangkasan na piak khit matengin, thong sung pan na paikhia thei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:1 Tua lai takin mi kimkhat hong pai-in Pilat mangpa in Galile mite’ sisan amau pasian biakna sa tawh a hel gawpna thu Zeisu kiangah a gen uh hi. 
Luke13:2 Zeisu in, “Tua bang a thuak Galile mite in Galile midangte khempeuh sangin mawhna a hauh zawk uh um na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:3 Ahi kei hi, kong ci hi. Note in zong na mawhna uh na kisikkik kei uh leh, tua mah bangin na kisia khin ding uh hi." 
Luke13:4 Tua tham loin Siloam inn sangpi puk a, a delhlup mi sawm leh giatte in Jerusalem khua sungah a om mi khempeuhte sangin mawhna a hauh zawk uh um na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:5 Ahi kei hi, kong ci hi. Note in zong na mawhna na kisikkik kei uh leh, tua mah bangin na kisia khin ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:6 Zeisu in hih thugentehna a gen-inah, “Mi khat in a lo lai-ah theikung khat a suan hi. Theigah zong dingin tua kung kiangah a pai hangin, gah a om kei hi." 
Luke13:7 “Topa in lo nasempa kiangah, ‘En in, kum thum tua theikung’ gah zong dingin kong pai hangin ka mu kei hi. Na phuk in. Bang hangin lei a nainawngsak hiam?’ ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Luke13:8 Lo nasempa in, ‘Topa aw, tukum hici koih phot dih in. Keimah in a phung kimkot ah tovungin, eklei ka sung ding hi." 
Luke13:9 Tu nung ciangin gah hong gah leh, a hoih hi. Ahih kei leh na phuk ding hi,’ a ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke13:10 Nipi ni khatin Zeisu in kikhopna inn sungah thu a hilh hi. 
Luke13:11 Tua lai-ah kum sawm leh kum giat a cina numei khat a om hi. Ama nung kulgawp a, a pum neukha beek a kizan thei kei hi." 
Luke13:12 Zeisu in tua numei a muh ciangin sam a, “Numei aw, nang na cinatna pan hong kikhah ta hi,” a cih khit ciangin a tungah a khut a ngak leh," 
Luke13:13 thakhatin a pumpi tang a, Pasian’ min a phat hi." 
Luke13:14 Zeisu in Nipi ni-in cina a damsak man-inah kikhopna inn ukpa heh a, mihonpite kiangah, “Nasep nadingin ni guk a om hi. Tua nite sungin hong pai un la, cidamna na ngah ding uh hi. Nipi ni-in hong pai kei un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke13:15 Ahih hangin Topa in, “Mi simtatte aw, no na vekpi-un Nipi ni-in na bawng ahi zongin, na la ahi zongin, buk sung pan khahkhia-in tui ne dingin paipih hilo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:16 Kum sawm leh kum giat Satan in a hencip Abraham’ tanu hih numei in Nipi ni-in kikhah tuak hilo ahi hiam?” ci-in a gen hi. 
Luke13:17 Zeisu in hih thu a gen ciangin, a galte a vekpi-un a zum uh hi. Mihonpite khempeuh in ama bawlna pha hangin a nuam uh hi." 
Luke13:18 Zeisu in, “Pasian’ Gam in bang tawh kibang ahi hiam? Bang tawh ka genteh ding hiam?" 
Luke13:19 Mi khat in huanah a cin ankam tang tawh kibang hi. Ankam tang khangin kung suak a, vana vasate in a hiangah a tuang thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:20 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Pasian’ Gam in bang tawh ka genteh ding hiam?" 
Luke13:21 Numei khat in buhneel seeng thum a pawm khit mateng a sawh silngo tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:22 Zeisu in khuapi leh khuaneu ah pai kawikawi a, thu hilhin Jerusalem khuapi zuanin a zin hi." 
Luke13:23 Mi khat in, “Topa aw, gupna ngahte tawm ding ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke13:24 Zeisu in, “Kong kawciik ah na lut zawh nadingun hahkat un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tampi in a lut nop ding uh hangin a lut zo kei ding uh hi, kong ci hi." 
Luke13:25 Inn neipa tho a, kongkhak a khak khit ciangin, inn pua lamah ding-in kong na kiu uh a, ‘Topa aw, kong hong hon’ in,’ na cih uh hangin topa in, ‘Note kuami na hi uh hiam ke’n kong thei kei hi,’ hong ci ding hi." 
Luke13:26 Tua lai takin note in, ‘Nang tawh an i ne tui i dawn khawm zo hi. Ko khua lamzingte ah thu na hilh ngei hi,’ ci-in na gen uh hangin," 
Luke13:27 topa in, ‘Note kuami na hi uh hiam, ke’n kong thei kei hi. Mawhna ahih te aw, kei kiang pan paikhia un kong ci hi,’ ci-in hong gen ding hi." 
Luke13:28 Abraham, Isaak leh Jakob-te akipan, Pasian’ kamsangte khempeuh in Pasian’ Gam sungah a om na muh uh ciangin, note in hawlkhiatna na thuak ding uh a, kahna leh hagawina om ding hi." 
Luke13:29 Ni suahna lam leh ni tumna lam pan, khang lam leh sak lam panin amaute hong pai ding uh a, Pasian’ Gam sungah a tu ding uh hi." 
Luke13:30 A nunung kim khatte in a masa ding uh hi.” a ci hi. 
Luke13:31 Tua lai takin Farisaite kimkhat hong pai uh a, “Paikhia in la, tai in. Herod in nang hong that nuam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke13:32 Zeisu in, “Pai un la, ‘Tuni leh zingsang ciangin dawi ka hawlkhia ding a, cinatna ka damsak ding a, ni thum ni-in ka kikhin ding hi,’ ci-in tua ngia kiangah na hilh un." 
Luke13:33 Ahih hangin tuni, zing ciang leh thai ciangin ka pai ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kamsangpa in Jeursalem khua sim loh mun dangah a si thei kei ding hi.”" 
Luke13:34 “Pasian’ kamsangte that a, na kiangah hong kisawlte zong suang tawh a deeng Jerusalem, Jerusalem khuapi aw, akpi in a nongeekte a kha nuai-ah a khop bangin, na tate tamveipi ka khawm nuam zo a; nang na ut kei hi." 
Luke13:35 En in, na inn in mi om lo gam simthamin kinusia ding hi. Ke’n kong cih-inah: ‘Pasian’ min tawh hong paipa in thupha ngah ta hen,’ na cih matengin kei nong mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:1 Nipi ni khatvei Zeisu in Farisaite upa khat’ inn sungah an ne dinga a lut ciangin, amaute in amah a en uh hi." 
Luke14:2 Tuipuak natna vei khat in ama mai-ah a om hi. 
Luke14:3 Zeisu in, “Nipi ni-in cinatna damsak tuak ahi hiam, damsak tuak lo ahi hiam?” ci-in thukham siate leh Farisaite kiangah a dot ciangin pau loin a om uh hi." 
Luke14:4 Tua ciangin, Zeisu in tua pa a damsak khit ciangin a paikhiasak hi." 
Luke14:5 Zeisu in, “Mi khat in la ahi zongin, bawng ahi zongin nei a, Nipi ni-in leihawm sungah kia leh, thakhatin a lakhia lo ding note lakah kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
Luke14:6 amau in a dawng kik thei kei uh hi. 
Luke14:7 A kisamte in tokhom sangbel a teel uh Zeisu in a muh ciangin, amaute kiangah thugentehna a hilh-inah," 
Luke14:8 “Mi khatpeuh in mo la lawmvakna-ah note hong sap ciangin, tokhom a sang belna-ah na tu kei un. Tua bangin na tut leh, nangmah sangin a lianzaw khat kisam kha a;" 
Luke14:9 hong sampa leh amah hong pai-in, ‘Hih pa ading omna na awn in,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua ciangin zumna tawh a niampen munah na tu ding hi." 
Luke14:10 Mi khatpeuh in hong sap ciangin pai in la, omna niam ah na tu in. Nang hong sampa hong pai ciangin, ‘Lawm aw, a sangah na tuto in,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua lai takin, nang tawh an a ne khawm mi khempeuhte mai-ah minthan’na na ngah ding hi." 
Luke14:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama pumpi a phat mi khempeuh in niamkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi. A kiniamkhiat mi in minphatna a ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:12 A sampa kiangah Zeisu in, “Sun an ahi zongin, nitak an ahi zongin na vaak ciangin, na lawmte ahi zongin, na u na nau ahi zongin, na beh na phung ahi zongin, sumhau na inn veengte ahi zongin na sam kei in. Tua bangin na sap leh, amaute in nang hong sam kikin, nang hong thuk ding uh hi." 
Luke14:13 Pawi na kham ciangin mizawngte, mipoite, khebaite leh mittawte na sam in." 
Luke14:14 Amaute in nang hong thukkik nading bangmah nei lo uh ahih ciangin, thupha na ngah ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, midikte’ thawhkik ni ciangin nang hong kithukkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:15 Zeisu tawh an a nekhawm mi khat in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Pasian’ Gam sungah an a nei dingte in thupha ngah ding hi,” a cih leh," 
Luke14:16 Zeisu in, “Mi khat in pawipi kham a, mi tampi a sam hi." 
Luke14:17 An nek a hun ciangin, ‘Hong pai un. Tu-in na khempeuh a baihsa-in om hi,’ ci-in a khohsate kiangah gen dingin a nasempa a sawl hi." 
Luke14:18 Amaute khempeuh in kithutuakin kam a zong uh hi. A masa pen in, ‘Lo ciing khat ka lei a, pai-in ka va en ding hi. Kei hong maisak in,’ ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke14:19 Khat in, ‘Ke’n bawng kap nga ka nei zo hi. Tel-et dingin ka va pai ding hi. Kei hong maisak in,’ ci-in thu a ngen hi." 
Luke14:20 Khat leuleu in, ‘Ke’n zi ka pi zo hi. Tua ahih ciangin kong hawh man kei ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke14:21 Nasempa ciah a, tua thu khempeuh a topa a zasak hi. Tua lai takin inn teekpa heh a, “Khua sung lamlian ah ahi zongin, lamneu ah ahi zongin pai in la, mizawngte, mipoite, mittawte, khebaite hong tumpih in,’ ci-in a nasempa sawl hi." 
Luke14:22 A nasempa in, ‘Topa aw, na cih mah bangin ka sap hangin omna a awng lai hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke14:23 A topa in, ‘Ka inn a dim nadingin lampi leh lo lamah pai in la, amaute zawhthawhna tawh hong tumsak in." 
Luke14:24 Ke’n kong cih-inah, a kikhosate ahih uh leh, khat beek in ka an a ciam kei ding hi,’ ci-in a nasempa thu a pia hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke14:25 Tua lai takin mihonpite in Zeisu tawh a paikhawm uh hi. 
Luke14:26 Amah kihei a, “Kei kiangah hong pai nuamte in a nute, a pate, a zite, a tate, a sanggampate, a sanggamnute ahi zongin, tua tham loin ama nuntakna nangawn a muhdah kei leh, keima nungzui a suak zo kei ding hi." 
Luke14:27 A singlamteh pua a, ka nung hong zui lote in keima nungzui a suak zo kei ding hi." 
Luke14:28 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khat in inn sangpi a lam nop leh, a zawhzawh nading dangka a nei hiam ci-in a masa-in tu-in, a sim phot lo note lakah kua om ahi hiam?" 
Luke14:29 Ahih kei leh, a khuam a phuh khit ciangin, inn a zop zawh kei leh, a mu mi khempeuh in" 
Luke14:30 “Hih pa in inn lam ding a kipat khit ciangin a zom zo kei hi,’ ci-in amah a ko ding uh hi." 
Luke14:31 Ahih kei leh, kumpi khat in adang kumpipa tawh kido dingin a paikhiat ciangin, then nih tawh hong kuante then khat tawh nang zo ding hiam ci-in a masa-in tu-a lungngai lo kumpi om ding hiam?" 
Luke14:32 A zawh kei ding leh, adang kumpipa gamla-ah a om lai takin upa sawl a, gal kilem nading thu a ngen ding hi." 
Luke14:33 Tua mah bangin note lakah mi khatpeuh in a neihsa khempeuh a nusiat kei leh, ka nungzui a suak zo kei ding hi.”" 
Luke14:34 “Tua ahih ciangin ci apha hi. Ahih hangin a alna a man’ leh, bangci a al kik ding hiam?" 
Luke14:35 Lei ading ahi zongin, eekkholna ading ahi zongin apha kei hi. Mite in pua lamah a paikhia uh hi. Zak nading bil a nei teng in na za ta un!” a ci hi." 
Luke15:1 Tua lai takin siahdongte leh migilote khempeuh in Zeisu’ thu ngai dingin a kiangah a nai uh hi. 
Luke15:2 Farisaite leh laitheite in, “Hihpa in migilote ngai a, amau tawh an a nekhawm hi,’ ci-in a ko uh hi." 
Luke15:3 Tua lai takin Zeisu in hih thugentehna a gen-inah," 
Luke15:4 “Mi khat in tuu zakhat nei a, tuu khat a man’sak leh, tuu sawmkua leh kua gam lakah nusia-in a mang tuu khat a muh matengin a zong lo ding note lakah kua ahi hiam?" 
Luke15:5 A muh kik ciangin lungdamin a liangko ah pua a, inn a tun’ ciangin," 
Luke15:6 a lawmte leh a inn veengte sam a, ‘Hong lungdampih ta un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka man’suahsa tuu ka mukik zo hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:7 Ke’n kong cih-inah, tua bangin vantungah kisikkikna kisam a kisa lo sawmkua leh kuate sangin, mawhna a kisik migilo khat tungah nuamna a lianzaw hi.”" 
Luke15:8 “Lam khat panin, numei khat in dangka sawm nei a, khat a man’suah leh’ meivak vakin a muh matengin a inn phiatin a zong kawikawi lo ding kua ahi hiam?" 
Luke15:9 A muhkik ciangin a lawmte leh a inn veengte sam a, ‘Hong lungdampih ta un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka man’suahsa dangka ka mukik zo hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:10 Ke’n kong cih-inah, tua mah bangin a kisikkik mawhneipa khat hangin Pasian’ vantungmite’ omna munah nuamna a om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:11 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Mi khat in tapa nih a nei hi." 
Luke15:12 A taneu in a pa kiangah va pai a, ‘Pa aw, ka ngah dinga kilawm luahna sum hong pia in,’ ci-in a ngen hi. A pa in a tate tungah a sum hawmsak hi." 
Luke15:13 Tua nung ciangin sawtvei kihal loin a taneu in ama sum khempeuh khawm a, gamlapi gamah pai-in tua santak ah noptatna lamsang uang lua ahih ciangin, a sum teng a zang khin hi." 
Luke15:14 A sum khempeuh a beikhit ciangin tua gamah nakpi-in kial tung a, amah in nakpi a zawng hi." 
Luke15:15 Tua lai takin amah pai-in tua gam mi khat beel a, vok cing dingin a topa in lo lamah a sawl hi." 
Luke15:16 Amah in vok an nek begapte nangawn duhgawhin a nekpih nuam hi. Ahih hangin kuamah in an a pia kei hi. 
Luke15:17 A lungngaih kik ciangin, ‘Ka pa’ inn sungah nasemte khamval bangzah tak a om hiam! Kei ka hih leh hih gamah gilkialin puksi dek takin ka om hi." 
Luke15:18 Kei thoin ciah ning! Ka pa kiangah, ‘Pa aw, Pasian tung leh nangma mai-ah ka khial zo hi." 
Luke15:19 Tu-a kipanin na ta kicih nadingin ka kilawm kei hi. Nangma nasemte khat mah bangin hong koih in, ka ci ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:20 Tua lai takin tho a, a pa kiangah va ciah hi. Ahih hangin inn pan gamlapi-ah a om lai takin a pa in mu a, hehpihhuai sa-in delh meengmeeng a, a ta ngawngkawi-in a nam hi." 
Luke15:21 A ta in, ‘Pa aw, Pasian tung leh nangma mai-ah ka khial zo hi. Tu-a kipanin na ta kicih nadingin ka kilawm kei hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:22 Ahih hangin a pa in, ‘Puan hoih bel hong la meengmeeng un la, silhsak un. Ama khut ah zungbuhte hong butsak un." 
Luke15:23 Khedap zong bulhsak un. Bawngno a thau hong paipihin go un la, an ne-in nuamsa ni." 
Luke15:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a sisa ka tapa a nungta kik hi. A mangsa ahih hangin tu-in kimu kik hi,’ ci-in a nasemte a sawl hi. Amaute in lungdamin pawi a kham uh hi.”" 
Luke15:25 “A tapa lianzaw in lo kuanin a om hi. Amah hong ciah a, inn a naih ciangin lasakna leh laamna hu ging a za hi." 
Luke15:26 Nasemte khat sam a, ‘Hih a ging bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke15:27 Nasempa in, ‘Na naupa hong ciah zo hi. Cidamin na pa in mu kik ahih ciangin bawngno thau a go zo hi,’ ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke15:28 Ahih hangin amah heh a, inn sungah a lut nuam kei hi. A pa pusuakin a zol hi." 
Luke15:29 A ta in, ‘Hih tanvei, kum sawtpi nangma na ka sem zo hi. Nangma thukham khat beek ka khial kei hi. Ahih hangin ka lawmte tawh nopna ka bawl nadingin keelno khat zong khatvei beek nong pia ngei kei hi." 
Luke15:30 Ahih hangin numei gilote tawh kikhawla na sum na pai a mangsak, na tapa hong tun’ ciangin ama ading bawngno thau na gawhsak hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:31 A pa in, ‘Ta aw, keimah tawh na om tawntung a, ka neih ka lam khempeuh nangma neih nangma lam ahi hi." 
Luke15:32 Ahih hangin, na nau ahih leh tuma-in a si hi, tu-in a nungta kik hi. Tuma-in a mang hi, tu-in a kimu kik ahih man-inah nopna leh lungdamna bawl tuak hi,’ ci-in a gen hi,” ci-in a hilh hi." 
Luke16:1 Khatvei Zeisu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Sumhaupa khat in sumkempa khat a nei hi. Tua sumkempa in a topa sum a thangbawl thu midangte in topa kiangah a ko uh hi." 
Luke16:2 A topa in sumkempa sam a, ‘Nang thu ka zak teng bangci thu ahi hiam? Na sumkep ciamtehna lai hong pia in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, sumkep na nasem nawn kei ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:3 Sumkempa in, ‘Tu-in ka topa in sumkep za panin hong kiasak zo ahih ciangin, bang ka ci hih ding hiam? Lo laih nading tha ka nei kei hi. Khutdawh ngen dingin ka maizum hi." 
Luke16:4 Sumkepna za hong kiatsak khit ciangin, midangte in amau innah hong tun’sak nadingun bang ka ci hih ding hiam ka thei ta hi,’ ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Luke16:5 Tua khit ciangin a topa’ sum bate a vekpi-un sam a, ‘Ka topa kiangah leiba bangzah loh ding a om hiam?’ ci-in a masa penpa a dong hi." 
Luke16:6 Amah in, ‘Sathau langva phel zakhat ka ba hi,’ ci hi. Sumkempa in, ‘Na kiciamna lai la in la, tu-in sawmnga at meegmeeng in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:7 Midang khat kiangah, ‘Nang in bangzah na ba hiam” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, ‘Mangbuh seeng zakhat ka ba hi,” a ci hi. Sumkempa in, ‘Na kiciamna lai la in la, sawmgiat na at ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:8 Thuman lo sumkempa in pilna tawh ahih ciangin a topa in a phat hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, leitung’ tate in amau khang lakah khuavak’ tate sangin a pil zaw uh hi." 
Luke16:9 Ke’n kong cih-inah, aman lo sum tawh lawmte na ngah ding uh hi. Tua hi leh, tua sumte a bei ciangin a om tawntung buk sungah amaute in a hong tungsak ding uh hi.”" 
Luke16:10 “Thu neute tungah a diktat mi in, thu liante tungah a diktat ding hi. Thu neute tungah a diktat lo mi in thu liante tungah a diktat kei ding hi." 
Luke16:11 Tua ahih ciangin leitunga a naman lo sum tungah na diktat kei uh leh, sum taktak kua in no hong kemsak ding hiam?" 
Luke16:12 Midangte’ sum tungah na diktat kei uh leh, kua in note sum hong kemsak ding hiam?" 
Luke16:13 To nih’ na a sem khawm zo nasempa a om kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a tote khat mudahin khat a it ding hi. Khat beelin khat a simmawh ding hi. Note in Pasian’ na leh leitung sum na nasem khawm zo kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke16:14 Dangka a deihgawh Farisaite in hih thu khempeuh a zak uh ciangin Zeisu a zahko uh hi. 
Luke16:15 Zeisu in, “Note in mite mai-ah phatna na lak nuam uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in note lungsim uh a thei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mite phatna in Pasian mai-ah kihhuaina ahi hi.”" 
Luke16:16 ‘Johan hong pai dongin Pasian’ Thukham leh Pasian’ kamsangte thu akipanin Pasian’ Gam Lungdamna Thu kihilh a, mi khempeuh in tua gam sungah zawhthawh bawlin a lut nuam uh hi." 
Luke16:17 Ahih hangin Pasian’ Thukham neupen a kipaihkhiat ding sangin, van leh lei a man’than nading a baihzaw ding hi.”" 
Luke16:18 “A zi ma-a numei dang tawh a kiteengte in numei tawh a mawh hi. Pasal tawh a kikhensa numei a teen’pihte in numei tawh a mawh hi.” 
Luke16:19 “Nidang lai-inah sumhaupa khat a om hi. Tua pa in puansan leh saihadial puan silhin ni simin nuamin an pha bel ne-in a om hi. 
Luke16:20 Lazaras kici mizawng khat in a pumtangin meima vei a; sumhaupa’ kongbiang kiangah," 
Luke16:21 a sabuai tung pan an neng kiate a ngen hi. Uite in zong pai a, a meimate a liak uh hi." 
Luke16:22 Tua nung ciangin mizawngpa si a, vantungmite in Abraham’ ang ah a pua uh hi." 
Luke16:23 Sumhaupa zong si a, a kivui hi. Meikuang sungah gimna nakpi a thuak lai takin a khuadak leh, Abraham leh Abraham’ ang ah Lazaras a om gamlapi panin a gal muh hi." 
Luke16:24 ‘Pa Abraham aw, kei hong hehpih in, Lazaras in a khutme dawn tui ah diah hen la, ka lei hong votsak nadingin ka kiangah hong sawl in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, hih meikuang sungah gimna nakpi ka thuak hi,’ ci-in a kiko hi." 
Luke16:25 Abraham in, ‘Ka ta aw, nang na nuntak lai-in nopsakna na ngah a, tua mah bangin Lazaras in zong a pha lo nate ngah hi ci-in na ngaihsun kik in. Tu-in ahih leh, amah in nopna a ngah kik hi. Nang na hih leh, gimna na thuak hi." 
Luke16:26 Tua tham loin nang leh ko kikalah a thuk mahmah guam khat a om hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih santak panin nangma kiangah a galkah nuamte in, a galkah zo kei uh hi. Tua santak pan ko kiangah hong galkah nuamte in zong hong galkah zo kei uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:27 Sumhaupa in, ‘Pa aw, tua bang ahih leh, keimah in sanggam nga ka nei hi." 
Luke16:28 Amaute in hih gimna sungah a tun’ loh nading thu a hilh dingin ka pa’ innah Lazaras nong sawlsak nadingin kong ngen hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:29 Abraham in, ‘Amaute in Moses leh Pasian’ kamsangte a nei uh hi." 
Luke16:30 Tuate thu ngai ta hen,’ a ci hi. Sumhaupa in, ‘Hi kei, pa Abraham aw, mi sisa khat hong thokikin amaute kiangah a pai leh, amaute in mawhna a kisikkik ding uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:31 Abraham in, ‘Tuate in Moses’ thu leh Pasian’ kamsangte’ thu a ngaih kei uh leh, mi khat in sihna pan a hingkik zongin a taksang kei ding uh hi,’ a ci hi,” ci-in Zeisu in a gen hi." 
Luke17:1 Tua lai takin Zeisu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Puk nading om loh na’ng thu a om kei hi. Ahih hangin a puksakpa in gimna a thuak ding hi." 
Luke17:2 Hih naupangte khatpeuh a puksakpa in a ngawngah an-gawina suang khihin tuipi thuk sungah tumcip leh, ama ading a hoih zaw ding hi." 
Luke17:3 Note na kikem un. Na u na nau in a khialh leh, thu hilhin na taai in. A kisik kik leh, a mawhna na maisak in." 
Luke17:4 Ni khatin na tungah sagih vei hong khialh khit ciangin hong kihei a, sagih vei dongin, ‘Ka kisikkik hi,’ hong cih leh, ama khialhna na maisak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:5 Sawltakte in, “Komau’ upna khangsak ta in,” ci-in Topa kiangah a gen uh hi." 
Luke17:6 Topa in, “Note in ankamtang khat cia bang upna nei le-uhteh hih theikung kiangah, ‘Zung tawh kibotkhia-in tuipi sungah na po in,’ na cih uh leh, na thu uh a mang ding hi.”" 
Luke17:7 “Note in nasem khat nei-in, lo kuanin ahi zongin, tuu cingin ahi zongin hong ciah ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Thakhatin hong pai in la, an nekna sabuai ah hong tu in,’ a ci ding no lakah kua ahi hiam?" 
Luke17:8 ‘Keima an nek ding hong bawl in; an ka nek tui ka dawn khit matengin kawnggak in la, an hong pia in. Tua nung ciangin nangin an ne-in tui na dawn ding hi,’ ci-in nasempa kiangah gen ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Luke17:9 Nasempa in a topa thupiak bangin a hih maninah a topa in a phat hiam? 
Luke17:10 Tuamah bangin note in zong thu khempeuh hong piak bang na hih khit uh ciangin, ‘Kote in a pha bawl lo nasemte ka hi uh hi. Nasemte ka hih uh ciangin a kituak bek ka hih zo uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke17:11 Zeisu in Jerusalem khuapi lamah a pai lai takin, Samaria gam leh Galile gam a paisuak hi." 
Luke17:12 Khua khat sungah a lut lai takin miphak sawm in amah dawn uh a, a gamla pan ding-in," 
Luke17:13 “Topa Zeisu aw, kote hong hehpih in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Luke17:14 Zeisu in tuate a muh ciangin, “Pai un la, Pasian’ siampi kiangah va kilak un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amaute a pai lai takun damna a ngah uh hi." 
Luke17:15 Amaute lakah khat in damna a ngah a theih ciangin pai kik a, aw lianpi tawh Pasian phat a;" 
Luke17:16 Zeisu khe kiangah bokin hehpihna a phat hi. Tua pa in Samaria mi ahi hi. 
Luke17:17 Zeisu in, “Mi sawmte in damna ngah hilo ahi hiam? Adang kua teng koiah om ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke17:18 Hih mi namdangpa khat sim loh hong paikik a, Pasian a phat kuamah om lo ahi hiam?" 
Luke17:19 Nang ding in la, pai in. Na thu upna in nang hong damsak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:20 Farisaite in, “Pasian’ Gam in cik ciangin hong tung ding hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangun Zeisu in, “Pasian’ Gam in mittangin kimu loin a hong tung hi." 
Luke17:21 ‘En in, hih san takah om hi; hua san takah om hi,’ a kici thei kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ Gam in note sungah a om hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:22 Zeisu in khatvei a nungzuite kiangah, “Note in Mihing Tapa’ hun leh nite khat na muh nop hun uh a hong tung ding hi; ahih hangin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Luke17:23 Mite in, ‘En un, hih lai takah a om hi. En un, hua lai takah a om hi,’ ci-in note kiangah hong gen uh hangin na paikhia kei un la, amau nung na zui kei un." 
Luke17:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, khuaphialep in van mongkhat panin phia a, van mongkhat dongin a taan’ mah bangin, Mihing Tapa’ ni ciangin a hong tung ding hi." 
Luke17:25 Ahih hangin a masa-in amah in gimna tampi thuakin, hih khang mite in hong nial ding uh hi." 
Luke17:26 Noah khan’ lai bangin Mihing Tapa’ ni ciangin zong a hong piang ding hi. 
Luke17:27 Noah in teembaw sungah a lut ni dongin mite in an ne tui dawnin, kipi kiteengsakin a om uh a, tuiciin a tun’ ciangin amaute khempeuh kisia uh hi." 
Luke17:28 Tua mah bangin, Lot a khan’ lai takin amaute in an ne tui dawn, sum lei sum zuak, an tuh inn lamin a om uh hi." 
Luke17:29 Ahih hangin Lot in Sodom khua sung pan a taikhiat ni-in, vantung panin mei leh kat guah bangin hong zu a, amaute khempeuh kang gawp hi." 
Luke17:30 Mihing Tapa a kilat ni ciangin tua tawh kibangin a piang ding hi. 
Luke17:31 Tua ni-in inn khum tungah a om mi in inn sunga a sum koih la dingin kumsuk kei hen. Lo lai-ah a omte in tua mah bangin ciahkik kei hen. 
Luke17:32 Lot’ zi na lungngai un. 
Luke17:33 Ama nuntakna a gum nuam peuhmah in nuntakna a mangthangsak ding hi. A nuntakna a mangthangsak peuhmah in nuntakna a gum ding hi. 
Luke17:34 Ke’n kong cih-inah, tua zanin lupna tungah a omkhawm mi nih in, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Luke17:35 An gawi khawm numei nih in khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi; 
Luke17:36 lo lai-a nasem khawm mi khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke17:37 Amaute in, “Topa aw, koi lai takah tua bangin a piang ding hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin, Zeisu in, “Sapul omna peuhah musanete zong hong kikhawm ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke18:1 Amaute in lungkia loin thu a nget ngitnget nadingun, Zeisu in thugentehna tawh thu a hilh-inah," 
Luke18:2 “Khuapi khat sungah Pasian kihta lo, mi zahtak lo thukhen mangpa khat a om hi." 
Luke18:3 Tua khuapi sungah meigong khat a om hi. Amah in thukhen mangpa kiangah tamveipi pai-in, ‘Keima galte a kituak bekin thu hong khensak in,’ ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke18:4 Ahih hangin thukhen mangpa in thu khensak loin sawtpi a om hi. Tua nung ciangin amah in, ‘Keimah in Pasian kihta loin mite ka zahtak loh hangin," 
Luke18:5 hih meigong in kei hong nainawn’sak man-inah ama ading thu ka khen ding hi. Ahih kei leh, hong pai ngitngetin ka lung hong gimsak ding hi,’ ci-in a lungsim sungah a ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke18:6 Topa in, “Aman lo thukhen mangpa’ thugenna na ngaihsun un." 
Luke18:7 Pasian’ teelsate in sun leh zanin ama kiangah kiko-in thu a nget uh leh, amaute’ thu khensak ding hilo ahi hiam? Amaute sawtpi thuak ding ahi hiam?" 
Luke18:8 Ke’n kong cih-inah, amaute ading thu a khensak mengmeng ding hi. Ahih hangin Mihing Tapa hong kum ciangin leitungah upna a mu ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke18:9 Amaute kidiksak a, midang khempeuh a zahtak lo mite kiangah, hih thugentehna Zeisu in a gen-inah," 
Luke18:10 “Mi nih in thu ngen dingin biakna innpi ah a paito uh hi. Khat in Farisai hi a, khat pen siahdongpa ahi hi." 
Luke18:11 Farisaipa ding-in amah leh amah kigen-in thungen a, ‘Pasian aw, keimah in mi zawhthawh bawla sut ahi zongin, mi thuman lo gamta ahi zongin, mi’ zi tawh mawh thei mi tham loin, hia siahdongpa tawh kibang ka hi kei hi. Nangma hehpihna ka phat hi." 
Luke18:12 Keimah in ni sagih lakah ni nih an ka tang hi. Ka neih ka lam khempeuh sung pan sehsawm suah sehkhat ka khia hi,’ ci-in kisialin thu a ngen hi." 
Luke18:13 Siahdongpa ahih leh, gamlapi-ah ding-in vantung lam nangawn en ngam loin a awm beengin, ‘Pasian aw, mawhnei keimah hong hehpih in,’ ci-in thu a ngen hi." 
Luke18:14 Ke’n kong cih-inah, hihpa in mawhmaisakna ngahin innah a ciah hi. Farisaipa in ahih leh, mawhmaisakna a ngah kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah leh amah a kiphat mi khempeuh in niamkhiatna a ngah ding hi. A kiniamkhiatte in minphatna a ngah ding uh hi,’” a ci hi." 
Luke18:15 Tua lai takin amaute in naupangte a lawn’ nading deihin Zeisu kiangah hong paipih uh hi. Ahih hangin a nungzuite in a muh uh ciangin a kham uh hi. 
Luke18:16 Zeisu in naupangte sam a, “Naupangte ka kiangah hong pai ta hen; na kham kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ Gam in tua bangte’ gam ahi hi." 
Luke18:17 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, naupang bangin Pasian’ Gam a sang lo peuhmah in tua gam sungah a lut kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:18 Tua lai takin hausa khat in, “Sia pha aw, tawntung nuntakna ka luah nadingin bang ka gamta ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke18:19 Zeisu in, “Bang hangin kei mipha hong ci na hi hiam? Pasian sim loh mipha khat beek a om kei hi." 
Luke18:20 Thukhamte na thei hi. Mi’zi tawh na mawh kei in. Mi na that kei in. Mi’ sum na gu kei in. Ahi lo teci na pang kei in. Na nu leh na pa zahtak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:21 “Tua thu khempeuh ka neu lai a kipan ka tang zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:22 Zeisu in tua a zak ciangin, “Na khat na sam lai hi. Na neihsa teng zuak in la, mizawngte kiangah na hawmsak in. Tua hi leh, vantungah sum na nei ding hi.Tua khit ciangin ka nung hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:23 Hausapa in tua thu a zak ciangin, nakpi-in a lungkim kei hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, sum a hau hi." 
Luke18:24 Zeisu in tua pa a et lai takin, “Sum tam neite adingin Pasian’ Gam sung lut nading a haksa mahmah hi." 
Luke18:25 Sai khat phim vangah a khumhak sangin sumhau mite in Pasian’ Gam sungah lut nading a haksa zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:26 Tua thu a zate in, “Tua bang ahih leh, gupna kua in ngah zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke18:27 Zeisu in, “Mihing in ahih zawh loh nate Pasian in ahih thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:28 Tua lai takin Piter in, “Kote in ka neih khempeuh uh nusia-in nangmah kong zui uh hi,” a cih ciangin," 
Luke18:29 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, Pasian’ Gam hangin a inn, a zi, a sanggamte, a nu a pa, a tate a nusia leh," 
Luke18:30 tu lai takin a zah tampi ngah a, a hong piang ding hunah tawntung nuntakna a ngah lo ding kuamah a om kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:31 Tua lai takin Zeisu in sawm-le-nihte sam a, “En un, eite Jerusalem khuapi ah i pai ding hi. Pasian’ kamsangte gelh kholhsa thu khempeuhte in Mihing Tapa tungah a tung ding hi." 
Luke18:32 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Gentailte khut tungah kipia ding a, zahkona, bawlsiatna leh cilphihna a thuak ding hi." 
Luke18:33 Amaute in amah satgawpin, a that ding uh hi. Ni thum ni ciangin a thokik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:34 Amaute in hih thu khat beek a thei kei uh hi. Hih thu heem gen ahih ciangin a cihnopna a thei kei uh hi. 
Luke18:35 Zeisu in Jerikho khuapi a naih ciangin, mittaw khat in khutdawh ngenin lam geiah a tu hi." 
Luke18:36 Tua mittawpa in mi tampi lam pai a zak ciangin, “Kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke18:37 Amaute in, “Nazareth mi Zeisu hong pai hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke18:38 “David’ Tapa, Zeisu aw, hong hehpih in,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Luke18:39 A mai-a a pai mite in tua pa a tawp nadingin a taai uh hangin, “David’ Tapa aw, kei hong hehpih in,” ci-in a kiko sawnsawn hi." 
Luke18:40 Zeisu ding-in, “Tua pa hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:41 Mittawpa in a kiang a naih ciangin, “Nang ading bang ka bawl ding deih na hi hiam?” ci-in Zeisu in a dot ciangin, “Topa aw, ka mittang khua muh nading ka deih hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:42 Zeisu in, “Na mit in khua mu hen. Na upna in hong damsak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:43 Amah in thakhatin khua mu thei a, Pasian’ min phatin Zeisu nung a zui hi. Mi khempeuhte in a muh uh ciangin Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Luke19:1 Zeisu Jerikho khuapi sungah lut a, khua sung a paisuak lai takin," 
Luke19:2 Zakkhias kici mi khat a om hi. Amah in siahdongte’ ukpa ahih manin sum a hau hi. 
Luke19:3 Tua pa in Zeisu bang mi ahi hiam ci-in a mu nuam hi. Ahih hangin a tun’ tom mi ahih ciangin mi a tam luat manin a mu thei kei hi. 
Luke19:4 A mai lam tai a, Zeisu en dingin theitheek kung khat tungah a kahto hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tua lampi in Zeisu pai nading lam ahi hi." 
Luke19:5 Zeisu in tua mun a tun’ ciangin ento a, “Zakkhias aw, a manlangin hong kum in. Tuni-in nangma innah kong taam ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:6 Zakkhias kum mengmeng a, nuam mahmahin Topa a tungsak hi." 
Luke19:7 Tua thu amaute in a muh uh ciangin, “Mawhneipa’ inn sungah a taam hi,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Luke19:8 Zakkhias ding a, “Topa aw, keimah in ka neihsa kimkhat mizawngte ka pia ding hi. Mi khatpeuh na ka lakkhak leh, a zah li-in ka loh kik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:9 Zeisu in, “Hih pa in Abraham’ tapa ahih man-inah tuni-in hih inn sungah gupna a tung hi." 
Luke19:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Mihing Tapa in a mangthang mite zong ding leh gum dingin hong pai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:11 Tua thu a zak lai takun Jerusalem khuapi tawh kinai tung ta a, Pasian’ Gam a manlangin hong tung ding hi ci-in mite in a up man-unah, thugentehna khat Zeisu in a hilh hi." 
Luke19:12 Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Mihau khat in gam dang khatah kumpi za ngah ding leh tua khit ciangin a ciahkik dingin a paikhia hi." 
Luke19:13 Amah in a nasemte sawm sam a, sum tawi sawm a pia hi. ‘Ka hong tun’ kik matengin summet na bawl un,’ ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Luke19:14 A gam mite in amah mudah uh a, ‘Hih mi in eite kumpi dingin ka deih kei uh hi,’ ci-in ama kiangah mi a sawl uh hi." 
Luke19:15 Hausapa in a gam a ngah khit ciangin hong ciahkik a, a sum a kepsak nasemte in sum bawlna pan a met bangzah a ngah uh hiam cih a theih nadingin tuate a samsak hi." 
Luke19:16 A masa belpa in a topa va nai a, ‘Topa aw, na dangka tawi khat-in tawi sawm a met kingah zo hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:17 A topa in, ‘Thuman nasempa aw, a pha hi: Nang thu neute tungah diktat na hih maninah khuapi sawm na uk ding hi,’ ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke19:18 A nihna nasempa in va nai a, ‘Topa aw, na sum tawi khat in tawi nga a met kingah zo hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:19 Topa in, ‘Nang in khuapi nga na uk in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:20 Adang khat in va nai a, ‘Topa aw, en in. Ka dial ah tunin ka kepsa na sum tawi hiah a om hi." 
Luke19:21 Nang mi haksa na hi hi. Na koih lohna pan na la hi; na vawh lohna-ah na at ahih maninah kong kihta hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:22 A topa in, ‘Nasem gilopa aw, nangma kam sung panin thu kong khen ding hi. Keimah in mi haksa ka hi a, ka koih lohna pan ka lak leh ka vawh lohna-ah ka at hi ci-in na thei hi." 
Luke19:23 Tua ahih ciangin, kong tun’ kik ciangin dangka teng leh a met ka ngah khop nadingin, sum sinpa kiangah ka sum bang hangin pia lo na hiam?’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:24 A kianga dingte kiangah, ‘Sum tawi khat hihpa khut sung pan lakhia un la, tawi sawm neipa na pia un,’ ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke19:25 Amaute in, ‘Topa aw, hihpa in dangka tawi sawm a nei zo hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:26 ‘Ke’n kong cih-inah, a neite khempeuh a kipiak beh ding hi. A nei lote kiang pan a neihsa nangawn a kilakhia ding hi." 
Luke19:27 Tua tham loin kei uk ding a ut lo ka galte hong paipih un la, keima mai-ah na that un,’ ci-in thu a pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:28 Tua thu a gen khit ciangin, Zeisu Jerusalem khuapi-ah pai dingin a pai masa hi." 
Luke19:29 Zeisu in Oliv kici mualah a om Bethfage khua leh Bethani khua a naih ciangin a nungzuite nih sawl a," 
Luke19:30 “Na mai uh ah a om khua-ah pai un. Tua khua-ah na lut uh ciangin, kuama tuan’ ngei lohna khau kikhihsa a, om lano khat thakhatin na mu ding uh hi. Lano khau sut un la, ka kiangah hong paipih ta un." 
Luke19:31 Mi khatpeuh in, “Bang hangin lano khau sut na hi uh hiam?” hong cih leh, ‘Topa in a deih hi,’ na ci un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke19:32 A sawltakte pai uh a, Zeisu cih bangin a mu uh hi." 
Luke19:33 La khau a sut lai takun la neite in, “Bang hangin khau sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Luke19:34 “Topa in a deih hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:35 Amaute in lano Zeisu kiangah paipih uh a, a tungah amau puante a phah khit uh ciangin Zeisu a tuangsak uh hi." 
Luke19:36 Amah a pai lai takin lampi-ah puante a phah uh hi. 
Luke19:37 Jerusalem khua tawh kinai Oliv Mual tung pan a paisukna mun a tun’ lai takun, a nungzuite khempeuh lungdam uh a, a muhsa uh nalamdangte khempeuh hangin nakpi-in Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Luke19:38 “Pasian’ min tawh hong pai Kumpipa in thupha ngah ta hen; Vantungah nopna leh, A sang belna-ah minthan’na om ta hen,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Luke19:39 Mihonpi lakah Farisaite kimkhat in, “Sia aw, na nungzuite na taai in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:40 Zeisu in, “Ke’n kong cih-inah, hih mite a daih uh leh, suangte in a kiko ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:41 Zeisu in a naih ciangin khuapi mu-in kap a," 
Luke19:42 “Nang in tu lai taka nopsakna tawh kipawl nate thei lecin nang ading a pha ding hi. Tu-in ahih leh, na mittang pan a kiseel hi." 
Luke19:43 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, na galte in na kimkot ah kan bawlin hong uumcip a, mun khempeuh panin hong khakcip ding uh hi." 
Luke19:44 Nang akipan na sunga om na tate leitungah a kipuksak ding ni a hong tung ding a; na sunga suang khat tungah suang kiciang khat beek a omsak kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Pasian hong hawhna hun na thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:45 Zeisu biakna innpi sungah a lut ciangin sum zuakte hawlkhia a; 
Luke19:46 “Ka inn in thungetna inn ahi ding hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh hangin, note in guta buluhte omna na suaksak tazen uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:47 Zeisu in ni simin biakna innpi sungah thu a hilh hi. Ahih hangin siampi liante, laitheite leh miliante in amah thah nading a zong uh hi." 
Luke19:48 Ahih hangin mite in ama thu ngai-in beel uh ahih ciangin amah thah nading thu a mu zo kei uh hi. 
Luke20:1 Ni khat Zeisu in biakna innpi sungah mite thu hilh a, Lungdamna Thu a gen lai takin, siampi liante, laitheite leh upate ama kiangah a pai uh hi." 
Luke20:2 “Hih nate kua thu tawh bawl na hi hiam? Hih thu kua in hong pia ahi hiam?” hong hilh in ci-in a dong uh hi. 
Luke20:3 Zeisu in, “Note zong ke’n kam khat kong dong ding hi. Hong dawng un. Johan’ baptaizna thu koi pan hong piang ahi hiam?" 
Luke20:4 Vantung pan hong piang ahi hiam, mi tung pan hong piang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke20:5 Amaute in, “Vantung pan hong piang hi ci leeng, ‘Note in ama thu bang hangin um lo na hi uh hiam?’ ci-in hong dong zel ding hi." 
Luke20:6 ‘Mi tung pan hong piang hi ci leeng mi khempeuhte in suang tawh hong deeng ding uh hi.’ Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amaute in Johan in kamsangpa a sa uh hi,” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Luke20:7 Tua khit ciangin, “Koi pan hong piang cih ko ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in Zeisu kiangah a gen uh ciangin," 
Luke20:8 Zeisu in, “Tua mah bangin hih nate, kua thu tawh ka bawl kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:9 Tua lai takin Zeisu in hih thugentehna mihonpite kiangah a gen-inah, “Mi khat in lo lai-ah leenggah kungte suan a, lo khote khawhlawhsakin gamdang ah pai a, sawtpi a tam hi." 
Luke20:10 A hun a cin ciangin lo khawhlawhte in leenggah a piak nadingin ama nasemte khat a sawl hi. Tua lo khawhlawhte in a nasempa satin khut guak tawh a ciahsak uh hi. 
Luke20:11 Khatvei nasem dang khat sawl kik a, tua pa zong satin a zahhuaisak khit uh ciangin, khut guak tawh a ciahsak uh hi." 
Luke20:12 Khatvei nasem thumna zong sawl leuleu a, amau in tua pa satgawpin a hawlkhia uh hi." 
Luke20:13 Tua ciangin lo neipa in, ‘Bang ka ci hih ding hiam? Ka it mahmah ka tapa ka sawl ding hi. Amaute in ka tapa a zahtak kha ding uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke20:14 Ahih hangin lo khawhlawhte in a tapa a muh uh ciangin, ‘Hih pa in a inn luah dingpa ahi hi. Luah na’ng teng i ngah theih nadingin amah that ni,’ ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Luke20:15 Lo neipa’ tapa leenggah lo nawlah paikhiatpihin a that uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin lo neipa in lo khawhlawhte tungah bangci a bawl ding hiam? 
Luke20:16 Amah hong pai-in tua lokhawh lawhte sugawpin, a leenggah lo midangte a cingsak ding hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Tua bang hi kei hen!” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:17 Zeisu in amaute a et lai takin, “Tua ahih leh, ‘Inn lamte in a nilkhiat suang in anung ciangin innkiu suang a piang hi,’ ci-in a kigelh thu, bang cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Luke20:18 Hih suang tungah a kiate khempeuh a kitan ding uh hi. A tungah hih suang kia a, a deen’khak peuhmahte in leivui bangin kizan gawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:19 Tua lai takin laitheite leh siampi liante in Zeisu mat dingin a zon’ uh hangin mite a kihta uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amau cihna-a hih thugentehna a gen ahih lam a thei uh hi." 
Luke20:20 Tua lai takin amaute in Zeisu ensim uh a, mangpipa’ vaihawmna leh thukhente tungah a piak nadingun, ama kampau tawh mat theih nadingin thusim kante a kiangah a sawl uh hi." 
Luke20:21 Tuate in, “Sia aw, nang in thutak genin thu na hilh a, mi khentuam nei loin Pasian’ lampi a tang takin na hilh hi cih ka thei uh hi." 
Luke20:22 Kote in Kaisar kumpipa kiangah siah piak tuak ahi hiam, piak tuak lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke20:23 Zeisu in amaute khemna a theih ciangin," 
Luke20:24 “Denarias peek khat hong lak un. Kua lim leh kua min ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Kaisar kumpipa’ lim leh min hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:25 Zeisu in, “Tua ahih leh Kaisar kumpipa’ sum Kaisar kumpipa na pia un; Pasian’ sum Pasian na pia un,’ a ci hi." 
Luke20:26 Amaute in mite mai-ah hih thu panin a man zo kei uh hi. Zeisu’ dawn’na thu lamdang a sa uh a, pau loin a om uh hi." 
Luke20:27 “Misite’ thawhkikna om lo hi,” a ci Saddusite kimkhat in tua lai takin Zeisu kiangah va pai uh a;" 
Luke20:28 “Topa aw, ‘Mi khat in zi nei a, ta nei loin a sih leh, a nau in a zi luah hen la, a u’ khang a man’ loh nadingin kizom ta hen,’ ci-in Moses in eite lai hong pia hi." 
Luke20:29 Tua ahih ciangin, unau sagih a om uh hi. A upa pen in zi nei a, ta nei loin a si hi." 
Luke20:30 A naupa leh a thumna akipanin, unau sagihte in a teen’pih uh a, ta nei loin a si uh hi." 
Luke20:31  
Luke20:32 A nung ciangin numei zong a si hi. 
Luke20:33 Tua bang ahih leh, thawhkik ni ciangin tua numei in amaute lakah kua pen’ zi ahi ding hiam? Bang hang hiam na cih leh, tua sagihte in tua numei tawh a kiteeng uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:34 Zeisu in, “Tu lai khang mite kiteengin, a kiteen’sak uh hangin," 
Luke20:35 hong tung ding hun leh thawhkikna ngah dinga kilawm, misite lak pana a thokik mite kipi kiteengin a om nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Luke20:36 Amaute cikmah hunin a si thei kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in vantungmite tawh kibangin, thawhkikna’ tate ahih manunah Pasian’ tate ahi ding uh hi." 
Luke20:37 Moses in sawlkawm lakah Topa a hopih lai-in ‘Abraham’ Pasian, Isaak’ Pasian, Jakob’ Pasian aw, a cih ciangin misite kithokiksak ding hi cih a lak ahi hi." 
Luke20:38 Pasian in a site’ Pasian hi loin, a nungtate’ Pasian ahi hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khempeuhte in Pasian ading a nungta uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:39 Laithei kimkhatte in, “Sia aw, a kituak mahmahin na gen zo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:40 A nung ciangin, amaute in thudang a dong ngam nawn kei uh hi." 
Luke20:41 Zeisu in, “Khazih in David’ Ta hi bangci a kici thei hiam?" 
Luke20:42 David in: ‘Topa in Na galte na khe nuai-ah ka koih matengin," 
Luke20:43 Ka ziat lamah na tu in, ci-in ka Topa kiangah a ci hi,’ ci-in Late Lai Siangtho sungah a ci hi." 
Luke20:44 Tua ahih ciangin David in, ‘Khazih in Topa hi,’ a cih leh bangci-in ama ta hi thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke20:45 Mi khempeuhte in a thu a ngaih lai takin Zeisu in a nungzuite kiangah," 
Luke20:46 “Laitheite na kikeem un. Amaute in puantual silhin a vak nuam uh hi. Sumbukah zahtakna tawh hopih ahi zongin, pawikhamna sungah tutna phabel ahi zongin a deih uh hi." 
Luke20:47 Amaute in meigongte’ neihsa a ne mang uh a, mawhna a kilat loh nadingin sauveipi thu a ngen uh hi. Tuate in mawhsakna lianzaw a thuak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:1 Tua lai takin Zeisu in en a, sumhaute in sumkholna sungah sum a khiat uh a mu hi." 
Luke21:2 A zawng meigong khat in dangka pai nih a khiat a muh ciangin," 
Luke21:3 “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, mi khempeuh lak panin tua numei in tam a khia bel hi." 
Luke21:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua mi khempeuhte in a sumval lak pan a khia uh hi. Tua numei ahih leh, zawng napi-in a kivaak nading khempeuh nangawn a khia hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke21:5 Mi kimkhat in biakna innpi suangmanpha leh mite piakna tawh kizepna thu a gen uh ciangin," 
Luke21:6 Zeisu in, “Tua na muh uh nate ahih leh, a kiphelkhia lo ding suang khat tungah suang kiciang khat beek a om theih loh ding hun a hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:7 Amaute in “Topa aw, tua thute in cikciangin hong tung ding ahi hiam? A pian’ ding hong naih ciangin bang limin a hong kihil ding hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke21:8 Zeisu in, “Note kuamah in hong kheem zawh loh nadingin na kikem un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi tampite in, ‘Kei tua pa ka hi hi. A hun hong tung dektak hi,’ ci-in keima min tawh hong pai ding uh hi." 
Luke21:9 Tua mite na zui kei un. Galdona thu leh gamlumna thu na zak uh ciangin lunghimawh kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua thute a piang masa ding uh hi. Ahih hangin, a beina a tung nai kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:10 Tua ciangin Zeisu in, “Mi namkhat leh namkhat, gamkhat leh gamkhat hong kido ding uh hi." 
Luke21:11 Ziin nakpi hong liing ding a, mun khat khatah kial leh pul hong tung ding hi. Van panin kihtakhuai nate leh lim lianpite hong kilang ding uh hi." 
Luke21:12 Tua thu khempeuh a pian’ ma-in, keima min hangin amaute in hong man ding uh a, kikhopna inn sung leh thong sungah hong pia ding uh a; kumpite leh mangpite mai-ah hong paipih ding uh a, hong bawlsia ding uh hi." 
Luke21:13 Tuate in note’ teci pan nading ahi hi. 
Luke21:14 Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Bang ka ci thukkik ding hiam?’ ci-in na ngaihsut kholh loh nadingun, na lungsim sung uh ah na ciamteh un." 
Luke21:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na galte khempeuh un hong nial theih loh hong sel theih loh nadingin gen theihna kam leh pilna note kong pia ding hi." 
Luke21:16 Na nute na pate, na sanggampate, na behte leh na lawmte nangawn in note hong pia ding uh a, note kimkhat zong hong sisak ding uh hi." 
Luke21:17 Keima min hangin mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh hi. 
Luke21:18 Ahih hangin na sam uh zang khat beek a kisia kei ding hi. 
Luke21:19 Lung kipna tawh nuntakna na ngah ding uh hi.” 
Luke21:20 “Jerusalem khuapi galkapte in a uumcip na muh uh ciangin, tua khua siat nading a nai cih na thei ta un." 
Luke21:21 Tua lai takin Judah gamah a omte in mual tungah tai ta hen. Jerusalem khuapi sungah a omte in paikhia ta hen. Gampa lakah a omte in a sungah lut loin om ta hen. 
Luke21:22 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua ni ciangin a kigelh kholsa khempeuh a tun’ nadingin daanpiak ni ahi ding hi." 
Luke21:23 Tua lai takin naupai numeite leh naungeek nei numeite in gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih gamah gimna tung ding a, hih pawlte tungah hehna a tung ding hi." 
Luke21:24 Amaute in tem tawh sihna a thuak ding uh a, gam khempeuh ah salin kipaipihna a thuak ding uh hi. Gentailte’ hun a cin’ matengin, Gentailte in Jerusalem khuapi khe tawh a tuancil ding uh hi.”" 
Luke21:25 “Tua lai takin ni, kha leh aksite tungah lim kilang ding a, leitungah mi a pawlpawlte in tuipi lian leh tui kilok ging hangin lungmangin, gimna a thuak ding uh hi." 
Luke21:26 Leitungah a tung ding gimna teng mite in a lamen ding uh a, kihta-in a sibup ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, vanah a om vangliatnate a kiliing ding uh hi." 
Luke21:27 Tua lai takin vangliatna leh minthan’na tawh, Mihing Tapa in meii tungah hong kumsuk a mu ding uh hi." 
Luke21:28 Ahih hangin hih thu hong piang a kipat lai takin note suahtakna hun nai zo ta ahih maninah, khuadakin na lutang uh phongto ta un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke21:29 Khatvei Zeisu in thugentehna a hilh-inah, “Theikung akipan kung khempeuh va en un." 
Luke21:30 A tehno na muh uh ciangin khuakhal a nai zo hi ci-in no na thei uh hi. 
Luke21:31 Tua mah bangin, tua thu hong piang na muh uh ciangin, Pasian’ Gam hong nai zo hi ci-in na thei ta un." 
Luke21:32 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, hih khang mite a beima-in hih thu khempeuh hong piang ding hi." 
Luke21:33 Van leh lei a mangthang ding hi; ka thu ahih leh, a mangthang ngei kei ding hi.”" 
Luke21:34 “Note na kikeem ta un. Ahih kei leh, annek tuidawn hih nuntakna leh lungman’na hangin na lungsim uh a gim lai takin, tua Ni in thang kisai bangin note tungah a hong tung ding hi." 
Luke21:35 Tua mah bangin leitungah a teeng mi khempeuh tungah hong tung ding hi. 
Luke21:36 Ahih hangin, note in hong piang ding tua thute khempeuh tawh na kipelh theih nading uh leh, Mihing Tapa mai-ah na din’ theih nadingun a tawntungin thungen un la, na ngak ta un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke21:37 Zeisu in ni simin biakna innpi sungah thu hilh a, nitak simin paikhia a, Oliv kici mualah a giak hi." 
Luke21:38 Zingsangin mi khempeuh in a thu ngai dingin biakna innpi-ah ama kiangah a kikhawm uh hi. 
Luke22:1 Paisan kici silngo om lo khomun pawikham ding a nai zo hi. 
Luke22:2 Siampi liante leh laitheite in Zeisu bangci thatlum ding ci-in a zong uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amaute in mite a kihta uh hi." 
Luke22:3 Tua lai takin Satan in sawm-le-nihte lakah khat Iskariot kici Judah sungah a lut hi. 
Luke22:4 Amah siampi liante leh biakna innpi palik mangte kiangah va pai a, amaute khut tungah Zeisu bangci piak theih ding ci-in a vaihawm uh hi." 
Luke22:5 Amaute nuam uh a, “Dangka-in kong guai ding uh hi,” ci-in a kiciam uh hi." 
Luke22:6 Amah in zong mang a, mihonpi a om loh lai takin Topa amaute khut tungah a piak theih nading a zong hi." 
Luke22:7 Paisan tuuno a kigawh nading, silngo om lo khomun nek pawikham ni a tun’ ciangin Zeisu in Piter leh Johan kiangah, “Pai un la, Paisan pawi an nek ding na bawl un,” ci-in a sawl hi," 
Luke22:8  
Luke22:9 amau in, “Koi lai takah hong bawlsak le-ung na deih hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke22:10 Zeisu in, “Khua sungah na tum uh ciangin, tuibeel a pua mi khat tawh na kituak ding uh hi. Tua mi a lutna inn sungah na zui un la," 
Luke22:11 inn neipa kiangah, ‘Sia in, Keimah in ka nungzuite tawh Paisan pawi ka nek nadingin zin tun’na inndei koi lai-ah a om hiam? a ci hi,’ ci-in na gen un." 
Luke22:12 Tua mi in a kibawlsa dei tungnung a lian khat hong lak ding hi. Tua dei sungah na bawl khol un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Luke22:13 Amaute pai uh a, Zeisu gen mah bangin a mu uh a; Paisan pawi nek ding a bawl uh hi." 
Luke22:14 A hun a tun’ ciangin Zeisu in a sawltakte tawh a tukhawm hi. 
Luke22:15 Zeisu in, “Ka sih ma-in hih Paisan pawi note tawh nekkhop ka ut mahmah hi." 
Luke22:16 Ke’n kong cih-inah, Pasian’ Gam sungah deihna a kicin’ matengin, hih pawi ka ne nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:17 Tua lai takin Zeisu in hai la a, hehpihna a phat khit ciangin, “Hih hai la un la, note lakah na hawm tek un." 
Luke22:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ Gam a hong tun’ matengin tu-a kipan, leenggahtui ka dawn nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:19 Amah in khomun la a, hehpihna a phat khit ciangin, khomun balnenin, “Hih khomun in note ading a kipia ka pumpi ahi hi. Kei nong ngaihsut nadingun hih bangin na hih un,” ci-in a nungzuite a pia hi." 
Luke22:20 Tua mah bangin an a nek khit uh ciangin hai la a, “Hih hai in note ading a kibua, kiciamna thak a lak ka si ahi hi." 
Luke22:21 Ahih hangin kei hong lehheekpa’ khut in sabuai tungah keima khut tawh a omkhawm hi. 
Luke22:22 Mihing Tapa in a kisehkhol mah bangin a pai ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a lehheekpa in gimna a thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:23 A nungzuite in, “Hih ahih ding kua ahi hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kidong uh hi." 
Luke22:24 Amaute lakah kua lianbel hiam? ci-in nungzuite khat leh khat a kiseel uh hi. 
Luke22:25 Zeisu in, “Gentaile’ hausate in amau tungah a mang uh a; amau tungah a ukte mi hehpihpa a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:26 Ahih hangin note tua bang na hi kei ding uh hi. Note lakah a lianpen in a neupen bangin om ta hen. A makaipa in nasem bangin om ta hen. 
Luke22:27 Kua lianzaw hiam: sabuai ah tupa lianzaw hiam? Nasempa lianzaw hiam? Sabuai ah a tupa lianzaw hilo ahi hiam? ahih hangin note lakah nasempa mah bangin ka om hi. 
Luke22:28 Gimna ka thuak lai takin, note in kei tawh hong omkhawm mi na hi uh hi." 
Luke22:29 Ka pa in Kumpi Gam khat hong piak mah bangin; 
Luke22:30 note zong keima Gam sungah ka sabuai ah an ne-in tui na dawn theih nadingun note thu kong pia ding hi. Note in thukhen tokhom tungah tu-in, Israel mipawl sawm leh nihte tungah thu na khen ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:31 Zeisu in, “Simon, Simon aw, Satan in buhhum bangin nang hong haih nuam hi." 
Luke22:32 Ahih hangin nangma upna a siat loh nadingin ke’n thu kong ngetsak zo hi. Na kikheel kik khit ciangin ute naute na kipsak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:33 Simon in, “Topa aw, thong kiatna ahi zongin, sihna ahi zongin nang tawh ka thuakkhawm ngam ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:34 Zeisu in, “Piter aw, ke’n kong cih-inah, nangmah in, ‘Ke’n ka thei kei hi,’ ci-in kei thumvei nong nial matengin, tuni-in aak a khuang kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:35 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Dangka-ip, thung-ip, khedapte keng loin note kong sawl lai-in, na sapna uh a om hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Sapna khat beek a om kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:36 “Tu-in ahih leh, dangka-ip a nei mi in la ta hen. Tua mah bangin thung-ip a nei mi in la ta hen. Namsau a nei lo mi in a puan zuak hen la, namsau lei ta hen." 
Luke22:37 Ke’n kong cih-inah, ‘Amah mawhneite tawh a kisimkhawm ding hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna thu in keima tungah hong tung ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keima thu khempeuh in a tangtung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:38 Amaute in, “Topa aw, namsau nih a om hi,” a cih uh ciangin, “Pha hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:39 Tua lai takin Zeisu paikhia a, a ngeina bangin Oliv Mual tungah kahto a, a nungzuite in a zui uh hi." 
Luke22:40 Tua mun a tun’ ciangin, “Kheemna tawh na kipelh theih nadingun thu na ngen un,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Luke22:41 a nungzuite tawh suang lot khat tan bang kikhen a," 
Luke22:42 khukdin’in, “Pa aw, na deih leh, hih hai kei tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahih hangin keima deihna bang hi kei hen; nangma deihna bang hi ta hen,” ci-in thu a ngen hi." 
Luke22:43 Vantung panin vantungmi khat hong pai a, Zeisu’ tha a hatsak hi." 
Luke22:44 Amah gim mahmah ahih ciangin, nakpi-in thungen a, a khua-ul in lei tungah sisan malgol bangin a kia hi." 
Luke22:45 Thu a nget khit ciangin tho a, a nungzuite kiangah a paikik ciangin, amaute dahna tawh ihmu a om uh a mu hi." 
Luke22:46 Amaute kiangah, “Note in bang hangin ihmu na hi uh hiam? Tho un la, kheemna tawh na kipelh theih nadingun thu na ngen un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:47 Zeisu in a gen lai takin mihonpi hong pai uh a, nungzui sawm-le-nihte lakah khat Judah kici in amai ah a pai hi. Zeisu nam dingin a kiangah a va naih ciangin," 
Luke22:48 Zeisu in, “Judah aw, nang in napna tawh Mihing Tapa na lehhek ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke22:49 Zeisu kimkot ah a omte in a piang ding thu a theih uh ciangin, “Topa aw, kote in namsau tawh ka sat ding uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:50 Khat in siampi ukpa’ nasem khat a sat leh, a bil taklam a satkhia hi." 
Luke22:51 Zeisu in, “Tua zah hisak in,” ci-a a bil a khut tawh lawngin a damsak hi." 
Luke22:52 Tua ciangin Zeisu in amah man dinga hong pai siampi liante, biakna inn mangte leh upate kiangah, “Note in galgumat bangin kei man dingin namsau leh molhtumte tawi-in hong pai na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke22:53 Keimah in ni simin biakna innpi sungah note tawh ka omkhop lai takin na hong man kei uh hi. Ahih hangin hih hun in note hun leh khuamial’ vangliatna hun ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:54 Amaute in Zeisu man uh a, siampi ukpa’ innah a paipih uh hi. Piter in gamla sim kihalin a zui hi." 
Luke22:55 Amaute in inntual lai zangah mei cih uh a, a tutkhawm khit uh ciangin, Piter zong amau lakah a tu hi." 
Luke22:56 Piter mei awi-a om numeino khat in a muh ciangin lim takin en a, “Hih mi in Zeisu tawh a kipawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:57 Piter in, “Numei aw, tua pa ke’n ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a nial hi." 
Luke22:58 Tua nung a sawt loin midang khat in Piter mu a, “Hua mite khat na hi hi,” a ci hi. Piter in, “Lawm aw, ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:59 Tua nung nai khat bang ciangin midang khat in, “Hih mi in Zeisu tawh a kipawl takpi hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in Galile mi ahi hi,” ci-in uphuaina tawh a ci hi." 
Luke22:60 Piter in, “Lawm aw, nang na cih pen ke’n ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi. A gen lai takin thakhat mahin aak a khuang pah hi." 
Luke22:61 Tua lai takin Topa kihei-in Piter a en hi. Piter in, “Tuni-in aak a khuan’ ma-in nang in thumvei nong nial ding hi,” Topa in a cihna thu a phawk kik hi." 
Luke22:62 Amah pusuak a, nakpi-in a kap hi." 
Luke22:63 Zeisu a len mite in amah zahkoin a sat uh hi. 
Luke22:64 A maitang a tuam khit uh ciangin, “Nang kua in hong beeng hiam? Kamsangte bangin hong gen in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:65 Kam dang tampi tawh Zeisu lang pangin a zahko uh hi. 
Luke22:66 Khua a vak ciangin mite lakah upate, siampi liante leh laitheite kikhawm uh a, Zeisu amau zumah a paipih uh hi." 
Luke22:67 “Nang Khazih na hih leh, kote hong hilh in,” a cih uh ciangin, “Ke’n kong gen leh, nong um kei ding uh hi." 
Luke22:68 Ke’n kong dot leh, nong dawng kik kei ding uh hi." 
Luke22:69 Ahih hangin tu-a kipanin Mihing Tapa in Pasian’ vangliatna ziat lamah a tu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:70 Amaute khempeuh in, “Tua ahih leh, Pasian’ Tapa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Zeisu in, “Na gen bangun ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:71 Tua lai takin amaute in, “Adang bang teci thu deih lai i hi hiam? Ama kam pan eite in i thei zo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:1 Tua lai takin a kikhawm mi khempeuhte ding-in Zeisu Pilat mangpa kiangah a paipih uh hi. 
Luke23:2 “Hih pa in komau pawlte kheem a, ‘Khazih kici kumpipa ka hi hi. Kaisar kumpipa phiangsiah pia kei un,’ ci-in a kham kote’n ka za uh hi,” ci-in Zeisu a mawhsak uh hi." 
Luke23:3 Pilat in, “Nang Judah Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, Zeisu in, “Na cih mah bangin ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:4 Pilat in, “Hih pa tungah mawhna ka mu kei hi,” ci-in siampi liante leh mihonpite kiangah a gen hi." 
Luke23:5 Amaute kiko semsemin, “Amah in Galile gam pan akipan hih lai gam dongin, Judah gam sung khempeuh ah thu hilhin mi a zol hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:6 Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin, “Hih mi in Galile mi ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke23:7 Zeisu Herod’ uksung mi ahih lam a theih ciangin, Herod kiangah a paisak hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tua lai takin Herod Jerusalem khuapi-ah a om hi." 
Luke23:8 Herod in Zeisu a muh ciangin nakpi-in a lungdam hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu thu za ngei ahih maninah a muh nopna sauvei zoin, Zeisu’ nalamdang bawl a mu nuam hi." 
Luke23:9 Amah in thu tampi a dot hangin, Zeisu in kam khat beek a dawng kik kei hi." 
Luke23:10 Tua lai takin siampi liante leh laitheite ding-in nakpi-in a mawhsak uh hi. 
Luke23:11 Herod in a galkapte tawh Zeisu simmawhin a zahko uh a, puan hoih a silhsak khit uh ciangin, Pilat kiangah a paisak kik uh hi." 
Luke23:12 Tua ni-in Pilat leh Herod te, khat leh khat a kilem kik uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, nidangin a kiho thei kei uh hi." 
Luke23:13 Pilat in siampi liante, upate leh mite sam a," 
Luke23:14 “Mite a kheem thei mi bangin hih mipa kei kiangah nong paipih uh hi. Note mai-ah amah ka dot hanginah, na mawhsakna uh bangin mawhna khat beek ama tungah ka mu kei hi." 
Luke23:15 Herod in zong a mu kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Herod in kei kiangah hong puak kik zo hi." 
Luke23:16 Hih mi in sihna thuak nading a kilawm bangmah a hih kei hi. 
Luke23:17 Tua ahih ciangin, ka sat khit ciangin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:18 Ahih hangin mite in, “Tua pa that in la, ko kiangah Barabbas hong khah in,” ci-in aw khatin a kiko uh hi." 
Luke23:19 Tua Barabbas in khua sungah misuam a, mi a thah manin thong sungah a kikhum hi." 
Luke23:20 Pilat in Zeisu khah nuamin amaute kiangah thu a gen kik hi. 
Luke23:21 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Tua pa singlamteh tungah that in, singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Luke23:22 Pilat in, “Bang hang hiam? Amah in mawhna bang ta khial ahi hiam? Ama sih nadingin a kilawm ama tungah thu khat beek ka mu kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka sat khit ciangin ka khah ding hi,” ci-a thumveina a gen hi." 
Luke23:23 Ahih hangin amaute in Zeisu singlamteh tungah thah nading nakpi takin a kiko uh hi. 
Luke23:24 Amaute aw in zo a; Pilat in amaute’ ngetna bang a piang dingin thu a khen hi. 
Luke23:25 Mi suam a, mi a thah maninah thong sungah a kikhumpa amaute’ ngetna bangin khah a, amau ut bangin a bawl dingun Zeisu a pia hi." 
Luke23:26 Amaute in Zeisu a paipih lai takun, gampa lak panin hong pai Simon kici Sairin mi khat, Zeisu nung lamah singlamteh pua dingin a tungah a suan uh hi." 
Luke23:27 Mi tampi leh Zeisu hangin nakpi a thuum numei tampite in a nung a zui uh hi. 
Luke23:28 Zeisu in kihei a, “Jerusalem’ tanute aw, kei adingin kap kei un. No ading leh na tate uh ading na kap zaw un." 
Luke23:29 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ‘Tasel numei leh ta a paii ngeilo gil leh a kine ngeilo nawite in thupha a ngah ding uh hi,’ a cih ding uh hun hong tung ding hi." 
Luke23:30 Tua lai takin mite in, ‘Komau tungah hong kia un. Komau hong vuk un,’ ci-in mualte a sam ding uh hi." 
Luke23:31 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, sing hing tungah a hici bawl uh leh, sing keu tungah bangci bawl ding ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke23:32 Tua lai takin Zeisu tawh migilo, mi that ahi adang mi nih thah dingin a paipih khawm uh hi." 
Luke23:33 ‘Lutang Guh’ kici mun a tun’ uh ciangin, Zeisu tawh migilo nih a ziatlam khat, a veilam khat singlamteh tungah a khaikhawm uh hi." 
Luke23:34 Zeisu in, “Pa aw, amau in bang ahih uh cih thei lo ahih uh ciangin amau mawhna na maisak in,” a ci hi. Amau in lai aisaan-in a puante a hawm uh hi." 
Luke23:35 Mite in enin a ding uh hi. A ukte in, “Hih pa in midangte a gum thei hi. Pasian’ teelsa Khazih ahih takpi leh, ama pumpi kigum ta hen,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Luke23:36 Galkapte zong pai uh a, tuithuk pia-in," 
Luke23:37 “Nang Judah Kumpipa na hih takpi leh, na pumpi kigum in,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Luke23:38 “HIHPA IN JUDAHTE’ KUMPIPA HI,” ci-in kigelhna lai a tungah a om hi." 
Luke23:39 Tua lai takin a kikhai migilote khat in, “Nang Khazih hilo na hi hiam? Nang leh ko hong gum in,” ci-in Zeisu a zahko hi." 
Luke23:40 Khat in ahih leh, “Nangmah in hih pa mah bangin mawhna thu tanna na thuak napi-in, Pasian kihta lo na hi hiam?" 
Luke23:41 Eite in thuman thu tanna i thuak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, eite’ hihna tawh kituak i thuak hi. Hih pa ahih leh, bangmah mawhna a bawl kei hi,” ci-in a lawmpa a taai hi." 
Luke23:42 Zeisu kiangah, “Topa aw, na Gam sungah na lut khit ciangin kei hong ngaihsun in,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke23:43 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, tuni-in nangmah in kei tawh Paradis ah na omkhawm ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:44 Tua lai takin sun nai sawm-le-nih lai tak ahi hi. Nai thum dongin nitaang a bei maninah, leitung khempeuh ah khua a mial hi." 
Luke23:45 Biakna innpi dalna puan a lai zang pan a kikeek hi. 
Luke23:46 Zeisu in, “Ka Pa aw, ka kha nangma khut tungah ka pia hi,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko khit ciangin a si hi." 
Luke23:47 Galkap mangpa in tua thu piangte a muh ciangin, “Hih pa in mi diktat mi ahi hi,” ci-in Pasian’ min a phat hi." 
Luke23:48 Tua thu en dinga hong pai mihonpi khempeuhte in, tua thu piangte a muh uh ciangin awm beengin a ciah uh hi." 
Luke23:49 Tua lai takin Zeisu a thei mi khempeuhte leh Galile gam pan hong zui numeite in zong gamlapi panin tuate a gal-et uh hi. 
Luke23:50 Tua lai takin Judah gam Arimathea khua mi Josef kici, upa vaihawmte laka khat in upa dangte’ deihna leh gamtatna zui loin, Pasian’ Gam lamenin, a diktat mipha khat ahi hi." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Tua pa Pilat kiangah pai a, Zeisu’ luang a ngen hi." 
Luke23:53 Amah in Zeisu’ luang lasukin saihadial puan tawh a tun khit ciangin, mi kivui ngei lohna suang kikhuak han sungah a sial hi." 
Luke23:54 Tua ni in Kigin ni hi a, Nipi ni a nai hi." 
Luke23:55 Galile gam pan Zeisu tawh hong pai numeite in zui uh a, han leh a luang bangci koih ahi hiam ci-in a en uh hi." 
Luke23:56 Amaute ciah uh a, paknamtui leh sathau namtui a bawl uh hi. Thukham bangin Nipi ni-in nasem loin a om uh hi." 
Luke24:1 Ni sagih lakah ni kipat ni zingtungin numeite in amau bawlsa paknamtui tawi-in hanah a pai uh hi. 
Luke24:2 Han vang pan suang kilikkhia a, om mu uh a," 
Luke24:3 a sungah a tum uh leh, Zeisu’ luang a mu kei uh hi." 
Luke24:4 Amaute in lamdang a sak lai takun, mi nih in mit leng thei puan silhin amaute kiangah a ding uh hi." 
Luke24:5 Numeite in kihta ahih manunah boksukin a om lai takun tua tangvalte in, “Note in misite lakah a nungta mi bang hangin zong na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:6 Hih lai takah om nawn lo hi. 
Luke24:7 A thokik zo hi. Mihing Tapa in migilote khut sungah kipia-in, singlamteh tungah kithat ding a, nithum khit ciangin a thokik ding hi,’ ci-in Galile gamah a om lai-in," 
Luke24:8 note hong hilhna thu ngaihsun un,” a cih uh ciangin numeite in a phawk kik uh hi." 
Luke24:9 Han pan paikhia uh a, tua thu khempeuh sawm-le-khatte akipan adang Christiante kiangah a ko uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Tua numeite in Magdalene khua Mari leh Joanna leh Jeim’ nu Mari te ahi uh hi. Numei dangte in tuate tawh tua thu sawltakte kiangah a ko khawm uh hi. 
Luke24:11 Sawltakte in tua thute a mawkna thu sa uh a, a um kei uh hi." 
Luke24:12 Ahih hangin Piter tho-in hanah a tai hi. A tun’ ciangin kumsuka a et leh, saihadial puan bek a muh ciangin tua banga piangte lamdangsa-in innah a ciah hi." 
Luke24:13 Tua ni-in Christian nih Jerusalem khuapi pan tai giat a kigamla Emmaus kici khua-ah a pai uh hi. 
Luke24:14 Tua lai takin a piangsa thu khempeuh khat leh khat a kikum uh hi. 
Luke24:15 A kikup lai takun Zeisu in va nai a, amaute tawh a paikhawm hi." 
Luke24:16 Amaute in Zeisu ahih lam a theih loh nadingun a mit uh a mang hi. 
Luke24:17 Zeisu in, “Note in lam na pai lai takun na kikup uh thu in bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, maikhingin a khawl uh hi." 
Luke24:18 Tuate khat Kleopas kici in, “Jerusalem khuapi-ah hawh napi-in tulai taka tua khua a, thu piangte khempeuh thei lo nang bek na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke24:19 Zeisu in, “Bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-a a dot leh, tua pa in, “Nazareth mi Zeisu’ thu ahi hi. Tua pa in Pasian mai-ah ahi zongin, mite mai-ah ahi zongin, kam siamna leh khut siamna tawh a dim kamsangpa ahi hi." 
Luke24:20 Siampi liante leh ei upate in tua pa a sih nadingin pia uh a, singlamteh tungah a that uh hi." 
Luke24:21 Tua pa in Israel pawlte tan dingpa ahi hi ci-in kote in ka lamen uh hi. Tua tham loin, hih thu khempeuh a pian’ zawh ni thum pha zo hi." 
Luke24:22 Ko pawlpi numei kimkhatte zingtungin hanah pai uh a," 
Luke24:23 a luang a muh loh uh ciangin hong pai uh a, ‘Zeisu a nungta zo hi,’ ci-a a gen vantungmite a kilang a muh thu hong gen uh a, lamdang ka sa uh hi." 
Luke24:24 Tua lai takin kote lakah mi kimkhatte hanah pai uh a, numeite’ gen mah bangin a muh uh hangin Zeisu a mu kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:25 Zeisu in, “Kamsangte hong genkholh thu khempeuh up nadinga pilna nei lote aw," 
Luke24:26 Zeisu in hih bang teng thuakin minthan’na a ngah nading thu om lo ahi hiam?” a cih khit ciangin," 
Luke24:27 Moses leh kamsangte khempeuh pan akipan, Lai Siangtho sungah amah a cihnopna thute tel takin a hilh hi." 
Luke24:28 Amaute in a paina khua a naih uh ciangin, Zeisu in tua khua paisan ding bangin a pai leh," 
Luke24:29 amaute in, “Kote tawh hong giakkhawm in. Ni tumin khua a mial dek zo hi,” ci-in Zeisu nakpi-in a khoh uh ciangin, amah in amaute tawh giakkhawm dingin inn sungah a lut hi." 
Luke24:30 Sabuai-ah amaute tawh a tutkhawm lai takin khomun la a, hehpihna a phat khit khit ciangin khomun balneenin a pia hi." 
Luke24:31 Tua lai takin amaute’ mit kihong a, Zeisu ahih lam a thei uh a; tua ciangin amau kiang panin amah a mang hi." 
Luke24:32 Amaute in, “Lampi-ah eite hong hilh a, Lai Siangtho thu hong gen lai takin, i dip kuasak hilo ahi hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kiho uh hi." 
Luke24:33 Tua hun lai takin amaute tho uh a, Jerusalem khuapi-ah a ciahkik uh a, sawm-le-khatte a lawmte tawh kikhawm a om a mu uh hi." 
Luke24:34 Tuate in, “Topa thokik takpi a, Simon kiangah a kilang hi,” a cih uh ciangin," 
Luke24:35 amaute in zong lampi-ah thu piang khempeuh leh khomun a balnen lai takin a kilakna thu a gen uh hi. 
Luke24:36 Tua thu a gen lai takun Zeisu amaute lai zangah ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” a cih ciangin;" 
Luke24:37 amaute in sikha sa uh a, kigaihin a lau uh hi." 
Luke24:38 Zeisu in, “Bang hangin lauin lungmang na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin na lungsim sung uh ah up khialhna na nei uh hiam?" 
Luke24:39 Ka khut hong en un la, ka khe zong en un. Kei pumpi mahmah ahih lam hong en un la, na khut uh tawh hong lawng un." 
Luke24:40 Nong muh uh bangin guh leh sa ka nei hi; sikha in a nei kei hi,” ci-in a khut leh khe a lak hi." 
Luke24:41 Amaute in lamdang sa uh a, lungdam lua ahih uh ciangin um zo lo lailai-in, “Note in nek ding khatpeuh na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dot khit ciangin;" 
Luke24:42 nga emsa tum khat a pia uh hi. Tua ngasa Zeisu in la a, amaute mai-ah a ne hi." 
Luke24:43  
Luke24:44 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Moses’ Thukhamna ahi zongin, kamsangte’ gelhna thu ahi zongin, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thu ahi zongin keima thu a kigelhsa khempeuh a tangtung ding hi ci-in ke’n note tawh ka om khop lai takin kong gen khempeuhte in hih thu ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:45 Tua lai takin Lai Siangtho a theih nadingun amaute lungsim a hon’sak hi. 
Luke24:46 Khatvei Zeisu in,, “Khazih in sihna thuak a, ni thum khit ciangin thokik ding a;" 
Luke24:47 ama min tawh kisikkikna thu leh mawhmaisakna thu Jerusalem khua pan akipan mi pawl khempeuhte’ kiangah a kigen ding hi ci-in kigelh hi. 
Luke24:48 Hih thute-ah teci na hi uh hi. 
Luke24:49 Pa’ thuciamna kong pia ding hi. Ahih hangin vantung pan vangliatna na ngah matengun, hih khua-ah na ngak lai un,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:50 Tua khit ciangin Zeisu in amaute paipih a, Bethani khua pam a tun’ uh ciangin a khut lamto-in thupha a pia hi." 
Luke24:51 Tua bang a thupha a piak lai takin, amaute tawh kikhen a, vantungah kilato hi." 
Luke24:52 Amaute in Zeisu a biak khit uh ciangin lungdamna tampi tawh Jerusalem khua-ah ciah uh a; 
Luke24:53 Pasian’ min phatin biakna innpi sungah a pai tawntung uh hi. 
John1:1 A kipatcil-in Thu a om hi. Thu in Pasian tawh a omkhawm hi. Thu in Pasian ahi hi. 
John1:2 Amah in a kipatcil-in Pasian tawh a omkhawm hi. 
John1:3 Thu tawh na khempeuh a kipiangsak hi. A kipiangsak khempeuh lakah, Thu loin a kipiangsak khat beek a om kei hi." 
John1:4 Ama sungah nuntakna a om hi. Tua nuntakna in leitung mite ading khuavak ahi hi. 
John1:5 Tua khuavak in khuamial lakah taang a, khuamial in amah a zo zo kei hi." 
John1:6 Johan kici mi khat Pasian in hong sawl hi. 
John1:7 Mi khempeuh in ama hangin thu um dingin teci pang a, khuavakna thu teci pang dingin a hong pai hi." 
John1:8 Amah in khuavak ahi kei hi. Khuavakna thu teci pang dingin hong pai bek ahi hi. 
John1:9 Khuavak taktak a om hi. Tua khuavakna in leitung a, piang mi khempeuh a vaksak hi." 
John1:10 Amah in leitungah a om zo hi. Amah tawh leitung kipiangsak hi. Leitung in amah a thei kei hi. 
John1:11 Amah in ama mite kiangah hong pai-in, ama mite in amah a sang kei uh hi." 
John1:12 Ahih hangin amah sang a, ama min a umte khempeuh in Pasian’ tate suah theih na’ng thu a pia hi." 
John1:13 Tua tate in si leh sa tawh suak ahi kei uh hi; mihing’ deihna bangin a suak kei uh hi, Pasian’ deihna bangin a suak uh hi." 
John1:14 Thu in mi bangin hong suak a, hehpihna leh thuman thutak tawh kidimin eite lakah a om hi. Pa in a Ta khat bek a piaksa minthan’na bangin ama minthan’na ka mu uh hi." 
John1:15 Johan in ama ading teci pangin a kikona in, “Ka nungah hong paipa in kei om ma-in om ahih ciangin, kei sangin a lianzaw hi, kong cihna in hih pa ahi hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
John1:16 Ama kicin’na pan i ngah hehpihna in khat banah khat i ngah sawnsawn hi. 
John1:17 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Thukhamna Moses khut tungah kipia hi; ahih hangin hehpihna leh thuman thutak in Zeisu Khazih khut tungah a hong piang hi." 
John1:18 Pasian kuamah in a mu ngei kei hi. Pa’ ang sungah a om Tapa khat bek in Pasian hong kilangsak hi. 
John1:19 Judah mite in, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in Johan dong dingin siampite leh Levite Jerusalem khua panin a paisak uh hi." 
John1:20 Johan in tua a teci pan’na im loin, “Kei in Khazih ka hi kei hi,” ci-in tel takin a gen hi." 
John1:21 Tuate in zong, “Tua ahih leh, nang kua na hi hiam? Elijah na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin amah in, “Elijah ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi. “Pasian’ kamsangpa na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin, “Ka hi kei hi.” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
John1:22 Tua ciangin amau in, “Nang kua na hi hiam? Ko hong sawlte kiangah ka genkik theih nadingun, nangmah mah bang kici na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongkik uh hi." 
John1:23 Johan in, “Kamsangpa Isaiah in a gen bangin, ‘Topa paina lam na tangsak in,’ ci-in gampa lakah a kiko aw ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:24 Tua mite in Farisaite’ paisak ahi uh hi. 
John1:25 Amaute in, “Khazih hi lo, Elijah hi lo, kamsangpa hi lo na hih leh, bang dingin na baptaiz hiam?” ci-in a dongkik uh hi." 
John1:26 Johan in zong, “Keimah in tui sungah ka baptaiz hi. Nomau lakah ding-in a om na theih loh uh ka nungah hong pai mi khat a om hi." 
John1:27 Ama khedap khau phel ding nangawnin ka kilawm kei hi,” a ci kik hi." 
John1:28 Johan baptaizna mun Jordan gun galkhat Bethani khua-ah hih thu khempeuh a piang hi. 
John1:29 Zingsang ciangin Zeisu hong pai Johan in a muh ciangin, “En un, leitung’ mawhna a puakhia Pasian’ Tuuno!" 
John1:30 Kei ka om ma-in om ahih ciangin kei sangin a lianzaw ka nungah hong pai hi kong cihpa in hihpa ahi hi. 
John1:31 Kei in tua pa ka thei hi. Ahih hangin amah in Israel mite kiangah a kilat nadingin, keimah in tui sungah baptaiz-in hong pai ka hi hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John1:32 Tua lo adang Johan teci pan’na in, “Kha Siangtho vantung pan vakhu bangin hong kumsuka, tua pa tungah a tuang ka mu hi." 
John1:33 Tua pa ka thei kei hi. Ahih hangin tui sungah baptaiz dingin kei hong sawlpa in, ‘Mi khat tungah Kha Siangtho hong kumsuka, a tuang na muh leh, tuapa in Kha Siangtho sungah baptaizpa ahi hi,’ ci-in thu hong pia hi." 
John1:34 Keimah in ka mu zo a, hih pa in Pasian’ Tapa hi ci-in teci ka pang zo hi,” ci-in Johan in a gen hi." 
John1:35 A zing ciangin Johan in a nungzuite nih tawh a din’khop lai takin Zeisu lampi-ah a pai mu a, “Pasian’ Tuuno, en un!” a ci hi." 
John1:36  
John1:37 A nungzui nihte in ama thu a zak uh ciangin, Zeisu’ nung a zui uh hi." 
John1:38 Zeisu kihei a, amaute in a nung a zui uh a muh ciangin, “Bang zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Rabbi aw, koi lai-ah om na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Rabbi a khiatna in ‘Sia’ cihnopna ahi hi." 
John1:39 Zeisu in, “Hong pai le-uh teh na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute pai-in ama omna a mu uh hi. Tua laitak in nitak nai li hi a, ama kiangah a tamkhawm uh hi." 
John1:40 Johan’ thu za a Zeisu’nung a zui nihte khat in Simon Piter’ nau Andru ahi hi. 
John1:41 Amah in a u Simon zong masa a, “Messiah ka mu zo uh hi,” ci-in Zeisu kiangah a paipih hi. Messiah a khiatna in ‘Khazih’ cihnopna ahi hi." 
John1:42 Zeisu in tua pa en a, “Nang in Johan’ tapa Simon na hi hi. Kefas hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Kefas in Piter cihnopna hi." 
John1:43 Zing ciangin Zeisu in Galile gamah pai ning ci a, Filip a muh ciangin, “Ka nung hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
John1:44 Filip in Andru leh Piter-te’ teen’na khua Bethsaida khuami ahi hi. 
John1:45 Filip in Nathanael zong a, “Moses in Pasian’ Thukhamna Lai Siangtho sung leh kamsangte in lai sungah a gelhkholhsa Nazareth mi Josef’ tapa Zeisu ka mu zo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:46 Nathanael in, “Nazareth khua sung pan na hoih khat hong piang thei ding hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, Filip in, “Hong pai in la, hong en in,” a ci hi." 
John1:47 Nathanael hong pai Zeisu in a muh ciangin, “En un, ama sungah kheemna om lo Israel mi taktak ahi hi,” ci-in tua pa’ thu a gen hi." 
John1:48 Nathanael in, “Topa aw, bangci hong theih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Zeisu in, “Filip in nang hong sap ma-in Theikung nuai-ah na om lai takin ke’n kong mu hi,” ci-in a gen kik hi." 
John1:49 Nathanael in, “Rabbi aw, nangmah in Pasian’ Tapa na hi hi. Israel mite’ kumpipa lah na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:50 Zeisu in, “Theikung nuai-ah nang kong mu hi ka cih manin hong um na hi hiam? Tua sang a lianzaw nate na mu ding hi." 
John1:51 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, van kihongin Pasian’ vantungmite in Mihing Tapa tungah kahsuk kahto a, om na mu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:1 Ni nih khit ciangin, Galile gam Kana khua-ah mo la lawmvakna om a, Zeisu’ nu zong tua lai-ah a om hi." 
John2:2 Zeisu leh a nungzuite zong lawmvakna-ah a sam uh hi. 
John2:3 Leenggahtui a bei ciangin Zeisu’ nu in Zeisu kiangah, “Leenggahtui a nei kei uh hi,” ci-in a ko hi." 
John2:4 Zeisu in, “Numei aw, kei tawh bang kikum i hi hiam? Ka hun a tung nai kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:5 A nu in nasemte kiangah, “Ama hong sawl khempeuh na hih un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John2:6 Judah mite ngeina bangin, siangtho biakna adingin tua munah seeng nih seeng thum bang a ta thei leibeel guk a kikoih hi." 
John2:7 Zeisu in, “Hih tui beelte tui na dimsak un,” ci-in nasemte a sawl hi." 
John2:8 Tuate in let dektakin a dimsak uh hi. “Tu-in suak un la, lawmvakna pawi ukpa kiangah paipih un,” a cih ciangin a paipih uh hi." 
John2:9 Pawi ukpa in tui a ciap ciangin, leenggahtui suak a, tui tawi nasemte in tua leenggahtui ngahna a theih uh hangin pawi ukpa in a thei kei hi." 
John2:10 Zipipa sam a, “Mi khempeuh in leenggahtui hoihte hawm masa-in, mite in a kham khit uh ciangin a hoih lote a hawm uh hi. Nang in a hoih leenggahtui tudongin na koihcing hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:11 Zeisu in a masapen hih nalamdang Galile gam Kana khua-ah bawl a, ama minthan’na kilangsakin a nungzuite in zong amah a um uh hi." 
John2:12 Tua nung ciangin a nu akipan a naute leh a nungzuite tawh Zeisu in Kapernaum khua-ah a pai uh hi. Tua khua-ah sawt lo khat a tam uh hi. 
John2:13 Judah mite’ Paisan pawikham hun ahih ciangin, Jerusalem khua-ah Zeisu a paito hi."
