John2:14 Biakna innpi sungah bawngte, tuute, vakhute a zuakte leh sumkheekte tu-a om uh a muh ciangin;" 
John2:15 a sat nading khautep a bawl khit ciangin tuate khempeuh, tuu leh bawngte biakna inn sung pan hawlkhia a, sumkheekte’ dangkate bua-in amaute sabuaite a sawnpai hi." 
John2:16 Vakhu zuakte kiangah zong, “Hih nate na paimangpih un. Ka Pa’ inn sumzuakna inn na suaksak kei un,” a ci hi." 
John2:17 Tua lai takin a nungzuite in, “Nangma inn ka deih luatna in kei hong netum ding hi,” ci-a a kigelh a phawk uh hi." 
John2:18 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in, “Nang in hih bang na hihna tawh bang nalamdang hong lak na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John2:19 Zeisu in zong, “Hih biakna innpi na phel gawp uh leh, ni thum sungin ka lamkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:20 Judah mite in, “Hih biakna innpi kum sawmli leh kum guk tawntung kilam hi. Ni thum bek lam ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John2:21 Ahih hangin tua bang a genna in ama pumpi biakna inn a cihnopna-in a gen ahi hi. 
John2:22 Tua ahih ciangin, sihna pan a thawhkik ciangin hih thute a nungzuite in phawkkik uh a, Lai Siangtho leh Zeisu thu a um uh hi." 
John2:23 Paisan pawi sung Jerusalem khua-ah a om lai takin, Zeisu in nalamdang a lahte mi tampi in a muh uh ciangin Zeisu a um uh hi." 
John2:24 Ahih hangin Zeisu in amaute’ thu mang lo hi. 
John2:25 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amah in mi khempeuh thei a; mite sungah a omte khempeuh zong thei ahih ciangin, mi khat in midang khat thu ama kiangah a gensak ding a kul kei hi." 
John3:1 Judah upa ahi Nikodemas kici, Farisaite lakah mi khat a om hi." 
John3:2 Tua pa zan lai takin Zeisu kiangah pai a, “Rabbi aw, nangmah in Pasian kiang pan hong pai thuhilhpa na hi cih kote in ka thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, na bawl nalamdangte Pasian in nangmah tawh a omkhawm kei leh, kuamah in a bawl thei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:3 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, mi khatpeuh mah in khatvei a suahkik kei leh, Pasian’ Gam a mu thei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:4 Nikodemas in, “Mi khat a teek zawh ciangin bangci suakkik thei ding ahi hiam? A nu gil sungah tum kikin suakkik thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John3:5 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, mi khatpeuh in tui leh Kha Siangtho tawh a suakkik kei leh, Pasian’ Gam sungah a tum thei kei ding hi." 
John3:6 Ci-le-sa ah a piang mi in ci-le-sa ahi hi. Kha Siangtho ah a piang mi in kha ahi hi. 
John3:7 Khatvei na suakkik ding hi ka cihna lamdang sa kei in. 
John3:8 Huih in ama ut bangin a nung hi. Tua huih ging na zak hangin koi pan hong pai a, koilam pai ding cih na thei kei hi. Kha Siangtho tawh a suakte khempeuh in tua bang ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:9 Nikodemas in, “Hih thute bangci piang zo ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin;" 
John3:10 Zeisu in, “Nang in Israelte’ siapa na hi napi-in, hih thute thei lo na hi hiam?" 
John3:11 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, kote in ka theih uh thu ka gen uh hi. Ka muhte uh teci ka pang uh hi. Ahih hangin kote’ teci pan’na na mang kei uh hi." 
John3:12 Leitung thu kong gen ciangin na up kei leh, vantung thu kong gen hangin bangci up ding na hi hiam?" 
John3:13 Vantungah om a, vantung pan hong kumsuk Mihing Tapa khat longal kuamah vantungah a kahto ngei kei hi.”" 
John3:14 “Moses in gamlakah gul a khai bangin Mihing Tapa a kikhai ding hi. 
John3:15 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah a um mi khempeuh in nuntak tawntungna a ngah nading uh ahi hi.”" 
John3:16 “Pasian in a Tapa a um mi khempeuhte in kisia lo a, nuntak tawntungna a ngah nadingin a Tapa khat bek a piak dongin leitung mite a it hi." 
John3:17 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, leitung mite’ thukhen dingin Pasian in a Tapa leitungah hong paisak kei hi. Leitung mite in amah hangin gupna a ngah nadingun a hong paisak hi." 
John3:18 Amah a um mi in thukhenna a thuak kei hi. Amah a um lo mi ahih leh, tu-in thukhenna a thuak zo hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amah in Pasian’ Tapa khat bek min a um kei hi." 
John3:19 Thukhenna thu in leitungah khuavakin hong tunga; mite in khuavak sangin khuamial a deihzaw uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amaute’ gamtatna man lo ahih hang hi." 
John3:20 A hoih lo-a gamta mi khempeuh in khuavak a mudah uh a; amau gamtatnate a kilat loh nadingin khuavakna-ah a pai kei uh hi. 
John3:21 Ahih hangin thuman a gamta mi in ama gamtatna Pasian’ deihna tawh kituak cih a kilatsak nadingin khuavakna-ah a pai hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John3:22 Tua nung ciangin Zeisu a nungzuite tawh Judah gamah pai a, tuasan takah amaute tawh omkhawmin a baptaiz hi." 
John3:23 Johan in zong Salim tawh kinai Ainon khua-ah baptaiz-in a om hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tuasan takah tui tam a om hi." 
John3:24 Mite hong pai uh a, a kibaptaiz uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Johan thong sungah kikhia nai lo hi." 
John3:25 Tua ahih ciangin Johan’ nungzuite in siangtho biakna thu Judah mi khat tawh a kiseel uh ciangin," 
John3:26 Johan kiangah a pai uh a, “Rabbi aw, Jordan gun gal khatah nangmah tawh a omkhawm, ama thu teci na pan’na pa in baptaiz a, mi khempeuh ama kiangah a pai uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John3:27 Johan in, “Vantung panin a kipiak kei leh, kuamah in bangmah a ngah thei kei hi." 
John3:28 Keimah in Khazih ka hi kei hi. Khazih mai-ah hong paipa ka hi hi ke’n kong ci zo a, note zong ka teci na hi uh hi." 
John3:29 Zipipa in zi neipa ahi hi. Ahih hangin zi neipa kiangah ding a, ama thu a za a lawmpa in zi pipa’ aw a zak manin a lungdam mahmah hi. Tua mah bangin keima lungdamna a kicing hi." 
John3:30 Tua pa in lian semsem ding a, kei ka kiam semsem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:31 A tung pan hong kumpa in na khempeuh tungah a uk hi. Leitungah a hong piang mi in leitung mi hi a, leitung thu a gen hi. Vantung pan hong paipa in na khempeuh tungah a uk hi." 
John3:32 A muhsa leh a zaksa thute teci a pang hi. Kuamah in ama teci pan’na thu a mang kei uh hi. 
John3:33 Ama teci pan’na thu a mangte in, Pasian in thuman thutak hi ci-in a ciamteh hi." 
John3:34 Pasian hong sawl mi in Pasian’ thu a gen hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Pasian in Kha Siangtho kiteh loin a pia hi." 
John3:35 Pasian in a Tapa it a, na khempeuh ama khut sungah a pia zo hi." 
John3:36 Tapa thu a umte khempeuh in nuntak tawntungna a nei hi. Ahih hangin Tapa a um lo mi in nuntakna a ngah kei ding hi, Pasian’ hehna in tua pa tungah a om hi." 
John4:1 Zeisu in Johan sangin nungzui tamzaw a suahsakna leh a baptaiz thu, Farisaite in thei cih Topa in a theih ciangin," 
John4:2 Judah gam pan Galile gamah a paikik hi. 
John4:3 Ahih hangin Zeisu in a baptaiz kei hi; a nungzuite in a baptaiz uh hi. 
John4:4 Amah in Samaria gam paltan a; 
John4:5 Jakob in a tapa Josef a piak lo cing khat tawh kinai, Samaria gam Saikhar kici khua-ah a tung hi." 
John4:6 Tua munah Jakob’ tuikhuk a om hi. Tua ahih ciangin, Zeisu a lam paina gim ahih ciangin tuikhuk gei-ah a tu hi. Tua hun in sun laitak ahi hi." 
John4:7 Samaria numei khat in tuitawi dingin hong pai ciangin Zeisu in, “Ka dawn ding tui hong pia in,” ci-in a ngen hi." 
John4:8 Bang hang hih bangin ngen hiam i cih leh, a nungzuite an lei dingin khua sungah a pai khin zo uh hi." 
John4:9 Samaria numei in, “Nang Judah mi na hi napi-in kei Samaria numei kiangah bang hangin tui dawn ding hong ngen na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Judah mite in Samaria mite tawh a kihopih thei kei uh hi." 
John4:10 Zeisu in, “Pasian’ hehpihna leh ‘Dawn ding tui hong pia in,’ ci-a hong ngenpa kua mi ahih thei le-cin ama kiangah tui na ngen ding a, amah in nuntakna tui a hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:11 Numei in, “Topa aw, nangmah in tui dip nading na nei kei hi. Tuikhuk lah a thuk hi. Tua nuntakna tui bangci ngah ding na hi hiam?" 
John4:12 Hih tuikhuk hong piapa leh, amah akipan a tate leh a ganhingte in a dawn uh i pu Jakob sangin na lianzaw hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John4:13 Zeisu in, “Hih tui a dawn mi khempeuh in a nung ciangin tui a duh kik ding uh hi." 
John4:14 Ahih hangin ke’n ka piak tui a dawnte in a tawntungin a dangtak nawn kei ding hi. Ke’n ka piaksa tui in tua mi sungah nuntak tawntungna tuikhukin a piang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:15 Numei in, “Topa aw, kei in tui ka duh nawn loh nadingin ahi zongin, tuitawi dingin hihsan takah kong pai nawn loh nading ahi zongin tua tui hong pia in,” ci-in a ngen hi." 
John4:16 Zeisu in, “Pai in, na pasal sam in la, hong paikik in,” a ci hi." 
John4:17 Numei in, “Ke’n pasal ka nei kei hi,” a cih ciangin Zeisu in, “Pasal ka nei kei hi,’ na cihna thu aman hi." 
John4:18 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, pasal nga na nei ngei zo hi. Tu-a na neih mi in na pasal ahi kei hi. Hih thu aman takpi-in na gen hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:19 Numei in, “Topa aw, nangmah in Pasian’ kamsangpa na hih lam ka thei hi." 
John4:20 Ka pute ka pate un hih mual tungah Pasian a bia ngei uh hi. Note in ahih leh, ‘Jerusalem khua bekah mite in Pasian a bia ding uh hi,’ na ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:21 Zeisu in, “Numei aw, ka thu hong um in. Hih mual tungah ahi zongin, Jerusalem khua sungah ahi zongin Pa Pasian na biak loh nading uh hun hong tung ding hi." 
John4:22 Note in na theih lohpi uh na bia uh hi. Kote in ka theih uh ka bia uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Judah mite sung pan gupna a piang hi." 
John4:23 A bia taktakte in Kha leh thuman thutak tawh, Pa Pasian a biak ding uh hun hong tung ding tham loin a hong tung zo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Pa Pasian in amah bia dingin tua bang mite a zong hi." 
John4:24 Pasian in Kha ahi hi. Amah a biate in Kha leh thuman thutak tawh a bia ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John4:25 Numei in, “Khazih kici Messiah hong tung ding ke’n ka thei hi. Amah hong tun’ ciangin thu khempeuh hong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:26 Zeisu in, “Nang tawh a kiho keimah in Messiah ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:27 Tua ciangin ama nungzuite hong pai uh a, numei tawh a kihopihna lamdang a sa uh hi. Ahih hangin, “Bang deih na hi hiam? Tua numei tawh bang hangin thugen na hi hiam?” ci-in kuamah in a dong ngam kei uh hi." 
John4:28 Numei in a tuiphel nusia-in, khua sungah ciah a;" 
John4:29 “Hong pai un la, ka gamtatna khempeuh hong lakpa en un. Tua pa in Khazih ahi hiam?” ci-in mite kiangah a ko hi." 
John4:30 Amaute khua sung pan paikhia uh a, a kiangah a pai uh hi." 
John4:31 Amaute a tun’ ma-in a nungzuite in, “Rabbi aw, an ne in,” a ci uh hi." 
John4:32 Zeisu in, “Note theih loh an nek ding ka nei hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:33 Tua ahih ciangin a nungzuite in, “Mi khatpeuh in an nek ding hong puak zo hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
John4:34 Zeisu in, “Keimah hong sawlpa’ deihna bang hih a, ama nasepna ka zawhna in ka an nekna ahi hi." 
John4:35 Tu-a kipan kha li ciangin buh at a hun ding hi, ci thei hilo na hi uh hiam? Ke’n kong cih-inah, buh min zo a, a at hun ta hi ci-in khua dakin en un." 
John4:36 Buh atte in thaman ngah thei a, nuntak tawntung nadingin gah a khawm ding uh hi. Tua bang ahih ciangin, a vawhte leh a atte a lungdam khawm ding uh hi." 
John4:37 Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Mi khat in a vawh hi; midang in a at hi,’ a cihna thu a man hi." 
John4:38 Lo na khawh lohna uh ah buh at dingin ke’n note kong sawl hi. Midangte in a kho uh a, note in amau sepna-ah na tum zo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:39 Numei in, “Ka gamtatna khempeuh hong lak hi,” ci-a teci a pan’na thu hangin tua Samaria khuami tampite in Zeisu thu a um uh hi." 
John4:40 Tua hi a, Samaria mite a kiangah a tun’ uh ciangin, amau khua-ah a tam nadingin a thuum uh ciangin ni nih a tam hi." 
John4:41 Ama thu hangin mi tampi in a up beh uh hi. 
John4:42 Amaute in numei kiangah, “Tu-in ahih leh, kote in na genna hangin um ka hi kei uh hi. Kote in zong ka za teekteek uh a, hih pa in leitung mite’ Gumpa ahi takpi hi ci-in ka thei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John4:43 Zeisu in ni nih ciangin tua mun pan paikhia a, Galile gam a tung hi." 
John4:44 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu in, “Kamsangpa in ama omna gamah minthan’na ngah lo hi,” ci-in a tel takpi-in a gen hi." 
John4:45 Tua ahih ciangin, Galile gam a tun’ ciangin Galile mite in amah a ngai uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Jerusalem khua pawikhamna-ah a bawl nate khempeuh a mu uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tuate zong pawikhamna-ah a pai uh hi." 
John4:46 Tui leenggahtui a suah sakna mun; Galile gam Kana khua-ah a paikik hi. Tua lai takin Kapernaum khua-ah upa khat’ tapa cina-in a om hi. 
John4:47 Zeisu in Judah gam pan Galile gamah a tun’ tua pa in a zak ciangin ama kiangah pai a, hong paisukin a si dektak a tapa a damsak nadingin a thuum hi." 
John4:48 Zeisu in, “Note in nalamdang leh lim na muh kei uh leh, na um kei ding uh hi.” a cih ciangin," 
John4:49 upa in, “Topa aw, ka tapa a sih ma-in hong paisuk in,” a ci hi." 
John4:50 Zeisu in, “Ciah in, na tapa a nungta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua pa in Zeisu’ thupiakna umin a ciah hi." 
John4:51 Amah lampi-ah a paisuk lai takin a silate in hong dawn uh a, “Na tapa a dam zo hi topa aw,” ci-in a ko uh hi." 
John4:52 Tua ahih ciangin, “Bang hunin a noptuam a kipan hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amau in, “Zanni-in nai sawm leh nai khat lai takin a natna a dam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John4:53 Tua hun in, “Na tapa a nungta ding hi,” ci-in Zeisu in a cih hun ahi hi ci-in a theih ciangin, amah akipan a innkuanpihte khempeuh tawh Zeisu thu a um uh hi." 
John4:54 Hih nalamdang Zeisu in Judah gam panin Galile gamah hong tun’ khit ciangin a bawl nihveina ahi hi. 
John5:1 Tua nung ciangin Judah mite’ pawikhamna a tun’ lai takin, Zeisu Jerusalem khua-ah a paito hi." 
John5:2 Jerusalem khua-ah Tuu Kongkhak tawh kinai, Hebru pau-in Bethzatha kici bual khat a om hi. Tua bual kimkot ah buk nga a om hi." 
John5:3 Tuate ah mittaw, khezaw, pum langkhat si akipan cina tampite a lum uh hi." 
John5:4 (Topa’ vantungmi khat ahun hunin hong paisuk zel a, tui a kiloksak hi. Tui a kilawh hun sungin tua bualtui sung a tung masapen pen, a natna peuhpeuh a damsiang pahpah hi)." 
John5:5 Kum sawmthum leh kum giat tawntung a kumzawn mi khat in tuasan takah a om hi. 
John5:6 Tua pa luma om Zeisu in a mu hi. Sawt veipi cina-a om cih a theih ciangin, “Nang cidam na ut hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John5:7 Cinapa in, “Topa aw, tui a tat ciangin bual sungah hong koih ding mi ka nei kei hi. Kei ka pai lai takin midangte ka mai-ah a tum uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John5:8 Zeisu in, “Tho in, na lupna pua in la, pai in,” a cih ciangin," 
John5:9 thakhatin tuapa dam a, a lupna pua-in lam a pai hi. Tua ni in Sabbath ni ahi hi." 
John5:10 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in a kiangah, “Tuni in Sabbath ni ahi hi; lupna puak tuak lo hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
John5:11 Amah in, “Kei hong damsakpa in, ‘Na lupna pua in la, lam pai in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
John5:12 Judah mite in, “Na lupna pua in la, lam pai in,” hong ci kua ahi hiam? ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John5:13 Ahih hangin cidamna a ngahpa in kua ahi hiam a thei kei hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tua munah mihonpi om ahih ciangin Zeisu a paikhia sim hi." 
John5:14 Tua nung ciangin Zeisu in biakna innpi sungah tua pa a muh ciangin, “Nang na ci dam zo hi. Tua gimna sangin a haksa zaw na thuak loh nadingin, a nung ciangin mawhna na hih nawn kei in,” a ci hi." 
John5:15 Tua pa paikhia a, amah a damsakpa in Zeisu hi, ci-in Judah mite kiangah a gen hi." 
John5:16 Tua thu Sabbath ni-in bawl ahih ciangin, Judah mite in Zeisu bawlsia-in thah theih nading thu a zong uh hi." 
John5:17 Zeisu in, “Ka Pa in tudongin a sem hi; ke’n zong ka sem hi,” ci-in a dawng kik hi." 
John5:18 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sabbath ni siasak tham loin, Pasian nangawn “Ka Pa hi” ci-in Pasian bangin kibawl hi ci-in, Judah mite in Zeisu a that nuam semsem zaw uh hi." 
John5:19 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, Tapa in ama deih bangin a hih thei kei hi. Pa’ hihna a muh bangin a bawl thei hi. Pa in a bawl mah bangin Ta in zong a bawl hi." 
John5:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pa in Ta it a, a hihna khempeuh Tapa a musak hi. Note in lamdang nasak nadingun hih sangin a lianzaw nate Tapa a musak ding hi." 
John5:21 Pa in mi sisate a thosak, a hingsak kik mah bangin Tapa in zong ama deihte a hingsak thei hi." 
John5:22 Mi khempeuh in Pa a zahtak bangin Tapa zong a zahtak nadingin, Pa in kuamah thu a khen kei hi." 
John5:23 Thukhen nading thu khempeuh Tapa a pia hi. Tapa a zahtak lo mi in Tapa a sawlpa zong a zahtak kei hi.” 
John5:24 “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, keima thu za a, keimah hong sawlpa a um mi in, nuntak tawntungna ngah zo ahih ciangin, thukhenna a thuak kei hi; sihna pan paikhia a, nuntakna-ah a tung zo hi." 
John5:25 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, a sisate in Pasian’ Tapa’ aw a zak nading uh a hun hong tung ding tham loin tu-in zong a tung zo hi. Tua aw a zate in a nungta ding uh hi." 
John5:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pa in a sungah nuntakna a neih bangin, Tapa in zong a sungah nuntakna a neih nadingin thu a pia zo hi." 
John5:27 Tapa in Mihing Tapa ahih maninah thukhen dingin Pa in thu a pia hi. 
John5:28 Hih thu lamdang na sa kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, han sungah a omte khempeuh in ama aw za uh a, a hong pusuak hun hong tung ding hi." 
John5:29 A pha-a gamtate in nuntakna ngah dingin hong thokik ding uh a; a sia-a gamtate in thukhenna thuak dingin hong thokik ding uh hi.” 
John5:30 “Keimah in ka ut bangin ka hih thei kei hi. Ka zak bangin thu ka khen hi. Ka thukhenna in thu taktak ahi hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keima deihna bang hi loin, kei hong sawlpa’ deihna bangin ka hih hi." 
John5:31 Keima ading teci ka pan’ leh, ka teci pan’na thu a man kei hi." 
John5:32 Kei ading teci pang ding mi khat a om hi. Kei adinga ama teci pan’na thu in aman hi ci-in ka thei hi. 
John5:33 Note in Johan kiangah na sawl zo uh hi. Amah in thuman thutak teci a pang zo hi. 
John5:34 Ahih hangin ka teci pan’na thu in mite’ teci pan’na ahi kei hi. Note in gupna na ngah nadingun hih thu teng kong gen hi. 
John5:35 Amah in kuanga a taang meivak hi a, note in ama khuavakna-ah tawlkhat nopsak ding bek na ut uh hi." 
John5:36 Ahih hangin Johan’ teci pan’na sangin teci pan’na a lianzaw ka nei hi. Bang ahi hiam na cih uh leh, nasepna ka zawh nading ka Pa in hong piak tu-a ka sepna thute in, Pa in kei hong sawl ahihna thu keima ading teci hong pang uh hi." 
John5:37 Kei hong sawl ka Pa in kei ading teci hong pang zo hi. Note in tua Pa’ aw na za kei uh a, a meel na mu ngei kei uh hi." 
John5:38 Ama thu in zong nomau sungah a om kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a hong sawlpa no na um kei uh hi." 
John5:39 Lai Siangtho hangah nuntak tawntungna ngah nung ci-in na up manunah Lai Siangtho na tel et uh hi. Hih Lai Siangtho in keima ading teci ahi hi. 
John5:40 Note in nuntakna na ngah nadingun ka kiangah nong pai kei uh hi. 
John5:41 Mite piak minthan’na ka sang kei hi. 
John5:42 Ahih hangin, Pasian itna lungsim na neih loh uh ke’n ka thei hi." 
John5:43 Kei in ka Pa’ min tawh kong pai hangin nong sang kei uh hi. Midang khatpeuh amahmah min tawh hong pai leh, na sang ding uh hi." 
John5:44 Khat leh khat kipiak minthan’na na ngah uh a, Pasian khat bek’ piak theih minthan’na a zong lo note in bangci up theih ding na hi uh hiam?" 
John5:45 Pa mai-ah hong mawhsak ding hi ci-in hong um kei un. Note hong mawhsak ding mi khat a om lai hi. Tua pa in kua mi ahi hiam ci-in na dot uh leh, na muanpa uh Moses ahi hi." 
John5:46 Note in Moses’ thu na up uh leh, keima thu zong nong um ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Moses in keima thu a gelh hi." 
John5:47 Ama gelhna lai na up kei uh leh, keima thu bangci up thei ding na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a gen hi." 
John6:1 Tua nung ciangin Zeisu in Tiberias tuili kici, Galile tuili gal khatah a pai hi." 
John6:2 Cinate tungah a lamdang lim a lahna a mu mihonpite in a nung a zui uh hi. 
John6:3 Zeisu mual tungah kahto a, a nungzuite tawh a tukhawm hi." 
John6:4 Tua lai takin Judah mite’ Paisan pawikham hun a nai zo hi. 
John6:5 Tua ahih ciangin, Zeisu in a khuadak leh mihonpite ama kiangah hong pai a muh ciangin Filip kiangah, “Hih mite nek ding khomun bang lak pan i lei ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John6:6 Tua bang a dotna in bang hang hiam i cih leh, amah in bangci a bawl ding thei napi-in Filip ze-etna bekin a dong hi." 
John6:7 Filip in, “Mi a vekpi-in themkha khat tek a ngah nadingun dangka zanih man khomun a cing kei ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:8 Simon Piter’ nau Andru a kici ama nungzui khat in," 
John6:9 “Hihsan takah khomun pum nga leh nganeu tawn nih a nei naupang khat a om hi. Ahih hangin mi hizah tak a tam lakah hih khomun leh ngasa nih in bang tham hi ding hiam?” a ci hi. 
John6:10 Zeisu in, “Mite na tusak un,” a ci hi. Tua munah lopa tampi a om hi. Amaute sim le-hang pasal tul nga bang a tu uh hi." 
John6:11 Zeisu in khomun la a, hehpihna a phat khit ciangin a tute lakah a hawmsak hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa zong mite’ deih zahzahin a hawm uh hi." 
John6:12 Amaute in a kham khit uh ciangin Zeisu in, “Bang mah a man’ loh nadingin khamval teng tawm kik un,” ci-in a nungzuite thu a pia hi." 
John6:13 Tua ahih ciangin, khomun pum nga panin an nete’ khamval a neng a themte a top uh ciangin, seeng sawm leh seeng nih dim a ngah uh hi." 
John6:14 Tua bangin Zeisu in nalamdang a bawl tua mite in a muh uh ciangin, “Hih pa in leitungah hong pai ding Pasian’ kamsangpa taktak ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:15 Tuate hong pai-in Topa kumpipa-a koih nadingin a hahbawl ding uh cih Zeisu in a theih ciangin, mual tungah amah guak a kahto kik hi." 
John6:16 Nitak ciangin a nungzuite tuili-ah paisuk uh a," 
John6:17 gunkuang ah tuangin Kapernaum khua tung dingin a pai uh hi. Tua lai takin khua miala Zeisu amaute kiang a hong tung nai kei hi. 
John6:18 Huih nakpi nung ahih ciangin tui a kilok hi. 
John6:19 Tua ahih ciangin, tai nih tai thum bang a hot khit uh ciangin, Zeisu tuili tungah pai a, gunkuang hong naih a muh uh ciangin a lau uh hi." 
John6:20 Zeisu in, “Keimah ka hi hi, lau kei un,” a cih ciangin," 
John6:21 lungdamin Topa gunkuang tungah a la uh a; gunkuang in amau pai nopna lei thakhatin a tun’ hi. 
John6:22 Zingsang ciangin, tuili gal khatah a ding mihonpite in gunkuang khat longal gunkuang dang a mu kei uh hi." 
John6:23 Amau in khomun a nekna phual uh tawh kinai Tiberias khua pan gunkuangte hong tung uh hi. Zeisu in a nungzuite tawh tua gunkuang sungah lut khawm loin, a nungzuite bek a pai uh a mu uh hi." 
John6:24 Tua ahih ciangin tuasan takah Zeisu ahi zongin, a nungzuite ahi zongin a om loh uh mihonpite in a theih uh ciangin, amau zong gunkuang tungah tuangin Zeisu zong dingin Kapernaum khua-ah a pai uh hi." 
John6:25 Tuili gal khatah Zeisu a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Rabbi aw, cik a, hih lai-ah hong tung na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John6:26 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, note in nalamdang na muh manun kei hong zong na hi kei uh hi; khomun na ne uh a, na kham uh ciangin hong zong na hi uh hi." 
John6:27 A sia thei an ngah nadingin hahkat kei un; Mihing Tapa in no hong piak ahing tawntung nuntak tawntungna an na ngah nadingun hahkat un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ ciamtehna a ngahpa in tua Tapa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:28 Tua ciangin tuate in, “Pasian’ na ka sep theih nadingun bangci ka hih ding uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John6:29 Zeisu in, “Pasian hong sawlpa upna in Pasian nasepna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:30 Tua ahih ciangin, amau in, “Topa aw, kong muh uh a, kong up na’ngun nalamdang bang hong lak na hi hiam? Bang hong bawl ding na hi hiam?" 
John6:31 Vantung panin khomun a mau nek ding a pia hi ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh bangin, i pute i pate in gampa lakah khomun a ne uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:32 Tua ahih ciangin, Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, vantung pan khomun a piapa in Moses ahi kei hi; ka Pa in vantung khomun taktak note hong pia hi." 
John6:33 Pasian’ khomun in vantung pan hong paisuk a, leitung mite nuntakna a pia khomun ahi hi,” a cih leh," 
John6:34 “Topa aw, tua khomun ko hong pia tawntung in,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:35 Zeisu in, “Keimah in nuntakna khomun ka hi hi. Kei kiangah hong pai mi in a nung ciangin a gilkial ngei nawn kei ding hi. Kei hong um mi in a nung ciangin a dangtak nawn kei ding hi." 
John6:36 Ahih hangin note in kei hong mu napi-in nong um kei uh hi kong ci zo hi. 
John6:37 Pa in kei hong piakte khempeuh kei kiangah hong pai ding uh hi. Ka kiangah hong pai mite ka hawlkhia ngei kei ding hi. 
John6:38 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keima deih bangin gamta dingin vantung pan hong kumsuk ka hi kei hi; kei hong sawlpa’ deihna bang gamta dingin hong kumsuk ka hi hi." 
John6:39 Kei hong sawlpa’ deihna in kei hong piak mite khempeuh khat beek ka man’suah loh nadingin Ni tawp ni ciangin ka thokik sak ding hi. 
John6:40 Tapa mu a, a umte khempeuh in nuntak tawntungna a ngah nading in Pa’ deihna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:41 “Vantung pan hong kumsuk khomun ka hi hi,” Zeisu in a cih ciangin" 
John6:42 Judah mite in, “Hih pa in Josef’ tapa Zeisu hilo ahi hiam? A nu leh pa thei hilo i hi hiam? Tua ahih leh, ‘Vantung pan kong paisuk zo hi,’ bang hangin ci thei hiam?” ci-in a gensia uh hi." 
John6:43 Zeisu in, “Khat leh khat in hong gensia kei un." 
John6:44 Kei hong sawl Pa in a sawl kei leh, kuamah in ka kiangah hong pai thei kei hi. Keimah in ni tawp Ni ciangin tua mi ka thosak ding hi." 
John6:45 ‘Pasian in tuate a hilh ding hi,’ ci-in Pasian’ kamsangte’ lai sungah a kigelh hi. Pa kiangah thu ngai a, a kisin mite khempeuh keima kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
John6:46 Tua bang ka cih ciangin, Pasian kiang pan hong paipa longal mi khat beek in Pasian a mu zo hi ka cihnopna ahi kei hi." 
John6:47 Vantung pan hong paipa in Pa a mu zo hi. Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, a hong umte in nuntak tawntungna a nei uh hi." 
John6:48 Nuntakna khomun ka hi hi. 
John6:49 Na pute na pate un gampa lakah khomun a ne uh a, a si uh hi." 
John6:50 Vantung pan hong kumsuk hih khomun a nete in sihna tawh a kipelh ding hi. 
John6:51 Keimah in vantung pan hong kumsuk nuntakna khomun ka hi hi. Hih khomun a nete in a tawntungin a nungta ding hi. Ahi hi. Ka hong piak khomun in leitung mite’ nuntak nading ka piak ka sa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:52 Tua ciangin Judah mite in, “Hih pa in ama sa nek dingin bangci hong piak thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kiseel uh hi." 
John6:53 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, Mihing Tapa’ sa ne-in a si na dawn kei uh leh, note sungah nuntakna a om kei ding hi." 
John6:54 Keima sa ne a, ka si a dawnte in nuntak tawntungna a nei uh hi. Ni tawp ni ciangin tua mi ka thokiksak ding hi." 
John6:55 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka sa in an taktak ahi hi; ka si in dawn ding taktak ahi hi." 
John6:56 Ka sa ne a, ka si a dawnte in kei sungah om a, ama sungah kei ka om ding hi." 
John6:57 A nungta Pa in hong sawl a, Pa hangin ka nuntak mah bangin, keimah hong nete in kei hangin a nungta ding hi." 
John6:58 Hih khomun in vantung pan hong kumsuk khomun ahi hi. Pute pate in khomun ne-in a si uh bang hi loin, hih khomun a nete in a nungta tawntung ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:59 Kapernaum khua-ah kikhopna inn sungah Zeisu in a hilh lai takin hih thu teng a gen hi. 
John6:60 Tua ahih ciangin, ama nungzui tampite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Hih thu a haksa mahmah hi, kua in theitel zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John6:61 Ahih hangin Zeisu in tua thu hangin ah a nungzuite in a phunpihna thu a sin sungah a theih ciangin, “Hih thu in note hong puksak hiam?" 
John6:62 Mihing Tapa in ama omna ngeiah a kahtokik na muh uh ciangin, bangci na ngaihsun ding uh hiam?" 
John6:63 Nuntakna a piapa in kha ahi hi. Sa in phattuamna a pia zo kei hi. Note kiangah kong thugenna in kha leh nuntakna ahi hi. 
John6:64 Ahih hangin note lakah a um lo mi kimkhat a om hi. 
John6:65 Tua ahih ciangin, ka Pa in thu a piak kei leh, kuamah kei kiangah hong pai thei kei hi kong ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua bang a cihna in bang hang hiam i cih leh, kua in um lo ding ahi zongin, kua in lehheek ding cih ahi zongin Zeisu in a cil panin a thei hi." 
John6:66 Tua-a kipanin ama nungzui tampite in Zeisu tawh kipawl nawn loin a kihei kik uh hi. 
John6:67 Zeisu in, “Note zong paikhia ding na hi uh hiam?” ci-in sawm-le-nihte kiangah a dot ciangin," 
John6:68 Simon Piter in, “Topa aw, kote in kua kiangah pai ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
John6:69 Nang in nuntak tawntungna thu na nei hi. Nangmah in Pasian’ misiangtho na hi ci-in kote in umin ka thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:70 Zeisu in, “sawm-le-nihte hong teel hilo ka hi hiam? Ahih hangin note lakah khat in dawi hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John6:71 Tua bang a cihna in, sawm-le-nihte lakah amah lehheek ding Simon Iskariot’ tapa Judas a cihnopna hi." 
John7:1 Tua nung ciangin Zeisu Galile gam sungah a vak hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Judah mite in Topa thah dingin zong uh ahih ciangin, Judah gam sungah vak ding a ut kei hi." 
John7:2 Tua lai takin Judah mite’ Buk pawikham ding a nai zo hi. 
John7:3 Zeisu’ sanggamte in, “Na bawl nate na nungzuite in a muh nadingun, hih pan paikhia in la, Judah gamah na pai in." 
John7:4 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, mite kiangah a kithei nuampa in a kilang lona sungah bangmah a hih kei hi. Hih nate na bawl leh, leitungah na pumpi na kilangsak in,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
John7:5 Bang hangin tua bangin a ci uh hiam i cih leh, a sanggamte in zong Zeisu a um kei uh hi." 
John7:6 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in, “Ka hun a tung nai kei hi; note hun ahih leh, a kicingkhol niloh hi." 
John7:7 Leitung mite in no hong mudah thei kei uh hi. Kei hong mudah uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amau’ gamtatna a hoih kei ci-in teci ka pang hi." 
John7:8 Tua pawikhawmna ah no na pai un. Kei hih pawikhamna sungah ka pai nai kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John7:9 Tua thu a gen khit ciangin, Galile gamah a om lai hi." 
John7:10 A sanggamte pawikhamna-ah a paikhit uh ciangin, Zeisu zong a kilang loin a paisim hi." 
John7:11 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in, “Koi lai-ah a om hiam?” ci-in dong uh a, pawi sungah a zong uh hi." 
John7:12 Mihonpite in ama hangin thu tampi kikum uh hi. Mi kimkhat in, “Amah mipha ahi hi,” ci uh a, mi kimkhat in, “Mipha ahi kei hi, mihonpite a kheempa ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:13 Ahih hangin Judah mite a kihtak manunah kuamah in a tel takin a gen ngam kei uh hi. 
John7:14 Pawikhamna a kimkhat a bawl lai takun, Zeisu biakna innpi-ah paito-a thu a hilh hi." 
John7:15 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in, “Hih mi in laisim ngei lo napi-in bangci lai a thei hiam?” ci-in lamdang a sa uh hi." 
John7:16 Tua ciangin Zeisu in, “Ka thuhilhna in keima thu ahi kei hi; kei hong sawlpa’ thu ahi hi." 
John7:17 Mi khatpeuh mah in Pasian’ deih bangin a gamtat nop leh, hih thu Pasian’ thu ahi hiam, keima utthu banga gen ka hi hiam a thei ding hi." 
John7:18 Ama utthu bang a hihpa in ama minthan’na a zong hi. A hong sawlpa minthan’na a zong mi ahih leh, thuman thutak mi hi a, ama sungah diklohna a om kei hi." 
John7:19 Moses in Thukhamna no hong pia hilo ahi hiam? Ahih hangin note khat beek in hih Thukhamna na tang kei uh hi. Kei thah dingin bang hangin na hong zong uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
John7:20 Mihonpite in, “Nang dawilawm nei na hi hi. Nang thah dingin kua in hong zong ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:21 Zeisu in, “Sabbath ni-a ka bawlna thu khat note khempeuh in lamdang na sa uh hi." 
John7:22 Moses in vunatna thu no hong pia hi. Ahih hangin Moses kiang pan na ngah uh ka ci kei hi; tanglai i pu i pate kiang pan na ngah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin, Sabbath ni-in vun na at uh hi." 
John7:23 Moses’ Thukhamna a siat thei loh nadingin Sabbath ni-in mi in vunatna a ngah hi. Ahih hangin Sabbath ni-in mi’ pumpi khat ka damsak ciangin bang hangin kei tungah heh na hi uh hiam? 
John7:24 Maitang zahtakna tawh thu na khen kei un; aman takin thu na khen un,” a ci hi." 
John7:25 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khuami kimkhat in, “Hih pa in thah dinga a zon’pa uh hilo ahi hiam?" 
John7:26 En un, amah in a kilangin thu a hilh hangin kuamah in a kham kei hi. Hih pa in Khazih hi cih upa vaihawmte in a thei takpi uh hiam?" 
John7:27 Ahih hangin hihpa koipan hong pai cih i thei hi. Khazih hong pai ciangin ama pian’na kuamah in a thei kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:28 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in, “Note in kei nong thei uh hi. Ka pian’na lah nong thei uh hi. Ahih hangin keima ut bangin hong pai ka hi kei hi. Kei hong sawlpa in thuman thutak tawh a dim hi. Tua pa na thei kei uh hi." 
John7:29 Keimah in ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama kiang panin kong pai a, amah in kei hong sawl hi,” ci-in biakna innpi sungah a hilh lai takin a kiko hi." 
John7:30 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa mat nadingin a vaihawm uh hangin ama hun tung nai lo ahih ciangin, kuamah in ama tungah khut a nga kei hi." 
John7:31 Mihonpi lakah mi tampite in amah um uh a, “Khazih hong pai ciangin hih pa’ lah sangin nalamdang zaw a lak ding hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:32 Mihonpite kikupna thu a theih uh ciangin, siampite leh Farisaite in Topa man dingin palikte a sawl uh hi." 
John7:33 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in, “Note tawh tawlkhat bek ka om khit ciangin kei hong sawlpa kiangah ka ciahkik ding hi." 
John7:34 Nong zon’ uh hangin nong mu kei ding uh hi. Ka omna mun nong tung zo kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John7:35 Tua ahih ciangin, Judah mite in, “Ei muh zawh loh dingin amah koilam pai ding hiam? A kitheh zak a, om Grik mite lakah pai ding a, Grik mite kiangah thu a hilh ding hiam?" 
John7:36 ‘Nong zon’ uh hangin nong mu kei ding uh hi,’ leh, ‘Ka omna mun na tung zo kei ding uh hi,’ a cihna in bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
John7:37 Pawikham a tawp ni alianpen ni-in Zeisu ding a, “Mi khatpeuh in tui a duh leh, ka kiangah hong pai-in dawn ta hen." 
John7:38 Kei hong umte Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh bangin, ama sung pan nuntakna guntui a luangkhia ding hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
John7:39 Tua bang a cihna in a umte’ ngah ding Kha Siangtho a cihna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu in minthan’na ngah nai lo ahih ciangin Kha Siangtho a kipia nai kei hi." 
John7:40 Tua ahih ciangin mihonpi kimkhat in tua thu a zak uh ciangin, “Hih pa in aman takpi-in kamsangpa ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:41 Kimkhat in, “Hih pa in Khazih hi,” a ci uh hi. Kimkhat in, “Khazih in Galile gam pan hong suak thei ding hiam?" 
John7:42 Khazih in David’ suan hi a, David’ omna Bethlehem khua sungah a suak ding hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho in ci hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:43 Tua ahih ciangin, mihonpite lakah amah hangin thu kituak loin a kikhenthang uh hi." 
John7:44 Tua bangin mi kimkhatte in Topa a mat nop uh hangin kuamah in ama tungah khut a nga kei hi. 
John7:45 Tua ahih ciangin palikte, siampi liante leh Farisaite kiangah a ciahkik uh ciangin tuate in, “Bang hangin hong paipih lo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John7:46 Palikte in, “Tua pa’ hilh bangin kuamah in a hilh ngei kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:47 Tua ahih ciangin, Farisaite in, “No nangawn hong kheem zo ahi hiam?" 
John7:48 Upa vaihawmte lakah ahi zongin, Farisaite lakah ahi zongin amah a um mi khat beek a om hiam?" 
John7:49 Thukhamna a thei lo hih mihonpite in kosiatna ngahte ahi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:50 A nidanga Zeisu kiangah hong pai, amaute laka khat Nikodemas in," 
John7:51 “Eite Thukhamna in mi thu za a, a gamtatna thu a theih ma-in a thu khen thei hiam?” a ci hi." 
John7:52 Amaute in, “Nang zong Galile mi na hi hiam? Galile gam sung pan kamsangpa a piang ngei hiam ci-in na zon’ leh piang ngei lo ci-in na thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:53 Tua ahih ciangin, mi khempeuh amau innah a ciah uh hi." 
John8:1 Zeisu Oliv Mual ah a pai hi. 
John8:2 Zingsang tungin biakna innpi-ah a paikik leh, mi khempeuh ama kiangah hong pai uh a, Zeisu in tua mite thu a hilh hi." 
John8:3 Laitheite leh Farisaite in numei khat pasal tawh a mawh laitak a muh uh ciangin, manin hong paipih uh a, mite lai zangah a koih khit uh ciangin," 
John8:4 “Sia aw, hih numei a khialh laitak kimu hi." 
John8:5 Thukhamna sungah hih bang mi, ‘Suang tawh deenglum un,’ ci-in Moses in thu hong vaikhak hi. Ahih hangin nang bang na ci hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:6 Tua bang a cih uh ciangin, Zeisu tungah mawhna zon’ nadingun ci-in a ze-et uh hi. Ahih hangin Zeisu kun a, a khutme tawh leiah lai a gelh hi." 
John8:7 Amaute in a dot sawnsawn uh ciangin ding a, “Note lakah mawh nei lo mi khat in numei suang tawh deeng masa hen,” a cih khit ciangin," 
John8:8 khatvei kun kikin a khutme tawh leiah a gelh hi. 
John8:9 Tua thu a zak uh ciangin, a teekpen pan a khangnopen dongin khat nungah khat a paikhia uh hi. Zeisu guak om a, numei zong a lai zangah a om hi." 
John8:10 Zeisu ding kik a, “Numei aw, amaute koi lai-ah a om uh hiam? Kuamah in nang thu hong khen lo hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John8:11 Numei in, “Kuamah in hong khen lo hi, Topa aw,” a ci hi. Zeisu in, “Ke’n zong kong khen kei ding hi. Pai in la, a nung ciangin na mawh nawn kei in,” a ci hi." 
John8:12 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Keimah in hih leitung khuavak ka hi hi. Ka nung hong zuite in khuamial lakah pai loin nuntakna khuavak a ngah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:13 Tua ahih ciangin Farisaite in, “Nang ading nangma’n teci na pang hi. Na teci pan’na aman kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John8:14 Zeisu in, “Keimah in kei ading teci ka pan’ hangin ka teci pan’na a man hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in koi lam pan hong pai a, koi lamah ka pai ding cih ka thei hi. Note in ahih leh, koi lam pan hong pai a, koi lamah ka pai ding cih na thei kei uh hi." 
John8:15 Note in si leh sa khen bangin thu na khen uh a; kei in kuamah thu ka khen kei hi. 
John8:16 Ahi hi. Keimah in thu ka khen zongin ka thukhenna a man hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah guak ka hi kei hi; kei hong sawl Pa in kei tawh a omkhawm hi." 
John8:17 Ahi hi; teci nih a om leh, thu aman hi ci-in note Thukhamna lai sungah kigelh hi." 
John8:18 Keimah in keima ading teci ka pang hi. A hong sawl Pa in keima a ding teci a pang hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John8:19 Tua hi-a amaute in, “Na Pa koi lai-ah om hiam?” ci-a a dot uh ciangin Zeisu in, “Note in kei nong theih kei uh leh, ka Pa zong na thei kei ding uh hi. Kei nong theih uh leh, ka Pa zong na thei ding uh hi,” a ci kik hi." 
John8:20 Biakna innpi sungah thu a hilh lai takin, sumkholna dei sungah hih thu a gen hi. A hun tung nai lo ahih ciangin kuamah in a man kei uh hi." 
John8:21 Tua ahih ciangin khatvei Zeisu in, “Kei ka ciah ding hi. Note in nong zon’ uh hangin nomau mawhna sungah na si ding uh hi. Ka paina mun nong tung zo kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:22 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in, ‘Ka paina mun nong tung zo kei ding uh hi,” ci ahih ciangin amahmah kithat ding hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:23 Zeisu in, “Note in nuailam mi na hi uh hi. Kei in tunglam mi ka hi hi. Note in hih leitung pan a piang na hi uh hi. Kei in hih leitung pan a piang ka hi kei hi." 
John8:24 Tua ahih ciangin, nomau mawhna sungah na si ding uh hi kong ci hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in tua pa ka hih lam na up kei uh leh, nomau mawhna sungah na si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:25 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Zeisu in, “Keimah in a cil pek panin note kiangah kong gen bangin ka hi hi," 
John8:26 Note tungah gen ding leh khen ding thu tampi ka nei hi; ahih hangin kei hong sawlpa in thumanpa ahi hi. Ama kiang pan ka zak bang bekin leitung mite kiangah ka hilh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:27 Amah in Pa thu a gen ahih lam a thei kei uh hi. 
John8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in, “Note in Mihing Tapa na khaitoh khit uh ciangin, tua pa ka hih leh ka deih bang hih loin ka Pa in hong sinsak bangin hih thu ka gen hi cih note’n na thei ding uh hi." 
John8:29 Kei hong sawlpa in kei tawh a omkhawm hi. Amah in kei hong nusia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama deihna bangin ka hih tawntung hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:30 Tua thu a gen lai takin mi tampi in a um uh hi. 
John8:31 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in amah a um Judah mite kiangah, “Ka thuhilhna na zuih uh leh ka nungzui taktakte na hi ding uh hi." 
John8:32 Thuman taktak zong na thei ding uh a, tua thuman thutak in note hong suaktasak ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John8:33 Tuate in, “Kote in Abraham’ suante ka hi uh hi. Cikmah hunin mi’ sila-in ka om ngei kei uh hi. Note hong suaktasak ding hi, bang hangin ci na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong kik uh hi." 
John8:34 Zeisu in, “Aman takpi kong cih-inah, ‘Mawhna a bawlte khempeuh in mawhna’ sila ahi uh hi." 
John8:35 Sila in inn sungah a om tawntung kei hi; ahih hangin tapa ahih leh a om tawntung hi. 
John8:36 Tua ahih ciangin, Tapa in note hong suahtaksak leh suaktate taktak na hi ding uh hi." 
John8:37 Note in Abraham’ suante na hih uh ka thei hi. Ahih hangin, ka thuhilhna in note sungah om nading ngah lo ahih ciangin note in thah dingin kei nong zong uh hi." 
John8:38 Keimah in ka Pa kiangah ka muh bangin kong hilh hi. Note in zong na pa uh kiangah na zak bangun na gamta uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:39 Amaute in, “Ka pa uh Abraham ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Zeisu in zong, “Note in Abraham’ suan na hih uh leh, Abraham gamtat bangin na gamta ding uh hi." 
John8:40 Ahih hangin ka Pa kiangah ka zak bangin note kiangah thuman thutak hong hilhpa keimah thah dingin tu-in na hong zong uh hi. Abraham in tua bangin a gamta kei hi. 
John8:41 Note in na pa uh a gamtat bangin na gamta uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Kote in zawlta ka hi kei uh hi; Pasian kici Pa khat bek ka nei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John8:42 Zeisu in, “Pasian in note’ Pa ahih takpi leh, note in kei nong it ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in Pasian kiang pan hong pusuakin kong pai hi. Keima ut bangin kong pai kei hi, Amah in kei hong sawl hi." 
John8:43 Bang hangin ka thu thei lo na hi uh hiam? Ka thuhilhna ngai nuam lo na hih uh ciangin, ka thu na thei kei uh hi." 
John8:44 Note in na pa uh dawimangpa’ suan na hi uh hi. A gilo na pa uh deihna bangin na gamta nuam uh hi. Amah in a cil panin mi thatpa hi a, thumanna nei lo ahih ciangin thuman thutak sungah a kip kei ding hi. Amah in thuzuau a gen ciangin ama thu a gen hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in zuauthu gen leh thuzuaupa lah ahi hi." 
John8:45 Thuman thutak ka gen ciangin ka thu na um kei uh hi. 
John8:46 Ka tungah mawhna a om hi ci-in note lakah kua in hong lak ahi hiam? Keimah in thuman thutak hilh ka hih leh, bang dingin kei hong um lo na hi uh hiam?" 
John8:47 Pasian tawh a kipawlte in Pasian’ thu a ngai thei hi. Note in Pasian tawh kipawl lo na hih uh ciangin ka thu na ngai kei uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John8:48 Judah mite in, “Nang Samaria mi na hi a, dawilawm nei na hi kong cihna uh man hilo ahi hiam?” a ci kik uh hi." 
John8:49 Zeisu in, “Keimah in dawilawm nei ka hi kei hi. Ka Pa ka zahtak a, note in kei nong simmawh uh hi." 
John8:50 Ahih hangin keimah in minthan’na ka zong kei hi. Ka minthan’ nading a zong thukhen ding khat a om hi. 
John8:51 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, mi khatpeuh in ka thu a ngaih leh, sihna tawh a tawntungin a kipelh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:52 Judah mite in, “Nang dawilawm nei na hi ci-in tu-in ka thei uh hi. Abraham akipan kamsangte a si khin zo uh hi. Nang in, ‘Mi khatpeuh in keima thu a ngaih leh, sihna a thuak kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
John8:53 A sisa ka pa uh Abraham sangin lianzaw na hi hiam? Pasian’ kamsangte zong a si zo uh hi. Nang kua lima kibawl na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. 
John8:54 Zeisu in, “Keima minthan’na kong lah leh, ka minthan’na a mawkna ahi ding hi. Ka min a thangsakpa in ka Pa ahi hi. Tua Pa in, ‘Kote Pasian ahi hi,’ na cihpa uh ahi hi." 
John8:55 Note in tua Pasian na thei kei uh hi. Ahih hangin ke’n ahih leh, ka thei hi. Ka thei kei hi ci leng, note bangin zuauthu gen ka hi ding hi. Ahih hangin tua Pasian thei-in ama thu ka ngai hi." 
John8:56 Na pa uh Abraham in keima ni a mu nuam hi. A mu-a a lungdam mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:57 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in, “Kum sawmnga zong na pha nai kei hi. Abraham mu zo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:58 Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, Abraham’ pian’ ma-in kei ka om hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:59 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Zeisu suang tawh deeng dingin suang tawm uh a, ahih hangin Zeisu bu-in biakna innpi sung pan a paikhia hi." 
John9:1 Zeisu lampi-ah a pai lai takin a nu’ sung pan mittaw khat a mu hi. 
John9:2 A nungzuite in, “Rabbi aw, kua mawhna hanga hihpa’ mittaw ahi hiam? Ama mawhna hang ahi hiam, a nu leh pa’ mawhna hang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:3 Zeisu in, “Hih pa’ mawhna hang ahi zongin, a nu leh pa’ mawhna hang ahi zongin ahi kei hi. Pasian’ nasepna ama tungah a kilat theih nadingin mittaw-in a suak hi." 
John9:4 Ni a om lai teng kei hong sawlpa’ na i seem ding hi. Kuamah in na a sep theih loh hun zan hong tung ding hi. 
John9:5 Leitungah ka om lai tengin leitung’ khuavak ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:6 Tua khit ciangin lei tungah a cil sia a, cil tawh buan a bawl khit ciangin mittawpa’ mit ah buan nuhsak a," 
John9:7 “Pai in la, Siloam bual tui sungah na mit na sil in,” ci-in a sawl hi. Siloam a khiatna in “Hong sawl hi” cihnopna hi. Tua ahih ciangin, tua pa pai-in a sil khit ciangin a mit in khua mu-in hong ciahkik hi." 
John9:8 Tua ahih ciangin amah in khutdawh ngen mi ahih lam a inn veengte leh amah a mu ngeite in, “Hih pa in tu-a khutdawh ngenpa hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John9:9 Midangte in, “Ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Kimkhat in, “Ahi kei hi, a kibang hi,” a ci uh hi. Amah in, “Kei tua pa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:10 Tua ahih ciangin amau in, “Tua ahih leh, na mittang bangci-a hong vak ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John9:11 Amah in, “Zeisu kici mi khat in buan bawla ka mitah a nuh khit ciangin, ‘Siloam bualah pai in la, sil in,’ hong cih bangin pai-in ka sil leh, khua ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:12 Amau in, “Tua pa koi lai-ah om hiam?” ci-a a dot uh ciangin, “Ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:13 Amaute in tua mittawpa Farisaite kiangah a paipih uh hi. 
John9:14 Zeisu in buan bawlin mit a vaksak ni in Sabbath ni ahi hi. 
John9:15 Tua ahih ciangin khatvei Farisaite in zong, “Na mitang bangci a hong vak hiam?” ci-in a dong kik uh hi. Amah in, “Ka mitah buan hong nuh a, ka sil khit ciangin khua ka mu thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:16 Tua ahih ciangin Farisaite kimkhat in, “Hih mi in Sabbath ni tang lo ahih ciangin Pasian sawl mi ahi kei hi,” a ci uh hi. Kimkhat in, “Mawhnei mi khat in hih bang nalamdang a lak thei ding hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kithutuak loin a kikhenthang uh hi." 
John9:17 Tua ciangin khatvei amau in, “Na mit hong vaksakpa kua tawh kibang ahi hiam? Bangci na ngaisun hiam?” ci-in mittaw ngeipa a dong uh hi. Amah in, “Pasian’ kamsangpa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:18 Tua ciangin Judah mite in mittaw khua mukikpa’ nu leh pa sam uh a, “Hih pa in a suahpih mittaw ahi na cih na tapa uh ahi hiam?" 
John9:19 Tua ahih leh, bangci tu-in khua mu thei hiam?” ci-in a dot matengun amah in nidang lai mittawsa a nung ciangin khua mu kik cih a um kei uh hi." 
John9:20 A nu leh pate in, “Hih pa in komau tapa hi a, a suahpih mittaw ahih ka thei uh hi." 
John9:21 Ahih hangin tu-in bangci a khua mukik thei hiam ci-in ka thei kei uh hi. Kua in ama mit vaksak hiam ci-in ka thei kei uh hi. Amah khan’ cing zo hi; amah na dong un, amah in ama thu hong gen ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John9:22 A nu leh pate in Judah mite a kihtak manunah tua bangin a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, “Zeisu in Khazih ahi hi a ci mi khempeuh biakna innpi pan kihawlkhia ding hi,” ci-in amaute in a vaihawm zo uh hi." 
John9:23 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “Amah a khan’ cing zo hi, amah na dong un,” a ci uh hi." 
John9:24 Tua ahih ciangin, a mittaw ngeipa sam kik uh a, “Pasian phat in, hih mi in mawhnei mi ahih kote’n ka thei uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin," 
John9:25 amah in, “Mawhnei mi hiam hi lo hiam ka thei kei hi. Thu khat ka thei hi; nidangin mittaw ka hi a, tu-in khua ka mu thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:26 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nangma tungah bang hong bawl ahi hiam? Na mittang bangci a hong vaksak hiam?” ci-in a dot kik uh leh," 
John9:27 amah in, “Keimah in khatvei kong gen khit hangin na ngai kei uh hi. Bang hangin za kik nuam na hi uh hiam? Ama nungzui suak nuam na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng kik hi." 
John9:28 Amaute in, “Nangmah in ama nungzui na hi hi. Ahih hangin kote ka hih uh leh, Moses’ nungzuite ka hi uh hi." 
John9:29 Pasian in Moses kiangah thu pia zo cih ka thei uh hi. Ahih hangin hih pa ahih leh, koi pan hong piang hiam ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a gensia uh hi." 
John9:30 Amah in, “Ka mittang hong vaksak hi napi-in a pian’na na theih loh uh lamdang hi." 
John9:31 Pasian in mawhneite’ thu ngai lo hi ci-in eite i thei hi. Pasian zahtaka ama deihna a zui mite thu Pasian in a ngai hi. 
John9:32 Lei piancil akipanin kuamah in suahpih mittaw khua a musak kik hi ci-in a kiza ngei kei hi. 
John9:33 Hih pa in Pasian kiang pan hong pai kei leh, bangmah a hih thei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:34 Amaute in, “Nangmah in na suah akipan khialhna tawh kidim hi napi-in, kote thu hong hilh ding na hi hiam?” ci-in tua pa biakna innpi pan a hawlkhia uh hi." 
John9:35 Amaute in amah a hawlkhiatna thu Zeisu in za a, tua pa a muh ciangin, “Pasian’ Tapa na um hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John9:36 Amah in, “Topa aw, amah ka up nadingin Pasian’ Tapa kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng kik hi." 
John9:37 Zeisu in, “Amah na mu zo tham loin nang tawh tu-in thu genpa in Pasian’ Tapa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:38 Amah in, “Topa aw, ka um hi,” ci-in amah a bia hi." 
John9:39 Zeisu in, “Khua mu thei lote a muh nading ahi zongin, khua mu theite in mittawt nading ahi zongin thu khen dingin leitungah kong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:40 Ama kiangah a om Farisaite kimkhat in tua thu a zak uh ciangin, “Ko zong mittaw ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:41 Zeisu in, “Note mittaw na hih uh leh, mawhna na nei kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin ‘Khua ka mu uh hi,’ ci na hih uh ciangin na mawhna uh a om lai hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John10:1 “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, tuukhumna sungah kongpi lam pan lut lo a, lamdang pan kahto-a a lut mi in guta buluh ahi hi." 
John10:2 Kongpi pan a lut mi in tuucing ahi hi. 
John10:3 Kongcingpa in ama ading hon’ thei a, a tuute in ama kam a ngai uh hi. Amah in tuute a minin sam a, pua lamah a paipih hi." 
John10:4 Ama tuute khempeuh a khah khit ciangin a mai-ah pai a, tuute in a zui uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in ama aw a thei uh hi." 
John10:5 Ahih hangin midang nung a zui kei ding uh a; a kiang pan a taikhia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, midangte’ aw a thei kei uh hi,” ci-in Zeisu in a hilh hi." 
John10:6 Tua thugentehna Zeisu in a hilh hangin, amaute in a khiatna a thei kei uh hi." 
John10:7 Tua ahih ciangin khatvei Zeisu in, “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, keimah in tuukhumna kongpi ka hi hi." 
John10:8 Ka mai-a hong paite khempeuh in guta buluhte ahi uh hi. Ahih hangin tuate’ aw tuute in a ngai kei uh hi. 
John10:9 Keimah in kongpi ka hi hi. Mi khat in kei tung tawnin a lut leh, gal tawh kipelh ding a, sungtum pusuakin an nek ding lonona mun a mu ding hi." 
John10:10 Gutate in gu ding that ding leh susia ding longal a hong pai kei uh hi. Kei ka hih leh, tuute in nuntakna ngah tham loin nuntakna a dimtak a ngah nadingun kong pai hi." 
John10:11 Keimah in migi tuucing ka hi hi. Migi tuucing in a tuute tang dingin a nuntakna a paai hi. 
John10:12 Tuu neipa hi lo a kicial tuucing ahih leh, ngia hong pai a muh ciangin tuute nusia-in tai a; ngia in tuute manin a kithehthangsak hi." 
John10:13 Amah in a kicial hi a, tuute’ phat nading ngaihsun loin a taisan hi." 
John10:14 Migi tuucing ka hi hi. Pa in kei hong thei-a kei in Pa ka theih bangin," 
John10:15 ka tuute ka thei a; ka tuute in zong kei hong thei uh hi. Keimah in zong tuute tangdingin ka nuntakna ka paai hi. 
John10:16 Hih tuukhumna sunga om lo tuute zong ka nei lai hi. Tua tuute zong ka hong paipih lai ding hi. Amaute in ka aw a ngai ding uh a, amaute hon’ khat suakin tuucing khat a om ding hi." 
John10:17 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in ka nuntakna ka lak kik dingin paai ka hih ciangin, ka Pa in kei hong it hi." 
John10:18 Ka nuntakna kuamah in hong sut kei hi, keima ut thu-in ka paai hi. Ka nuntakna paaikhia-a lakkik theih nading thu ka nei hi. Tua thu ka Pa in hong pia hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John10:19 Tua thu hangin Judah mite kithutuak loin a kikhenthang kik uh hi. 
John10:20 Amau lakah mi tampite in, “Amah dawilawm nei mihai ahi hi; ama thu bang hangin ngai na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John10:21 Kimkhat in, “Tua thu in dawilawm neite’ thu ahi kei hi. Dawi in mittawte khua musak thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John10:22 Jerusalem khua-ah ki-apna pawikhamna a om lai takin phalbi lai hi a; 
John10:23 Zeisu biakna innpi tual Solomon’ innliim ah a kawi pai hi. 
John10:24 Tua lai takin Judah mite in Zeisu kimkotin hong kikhawm uh a, “Bang tanvei ko hong lungkhamsak ding na hi hiam? Nang Khazih na hih leh, tangtakpi-in hong gen in,” a ci uh hi." 
John10:25 Zeisu in, “Kong hilh khit hangin na um kei uh hi. Ka Pa’ min tawh ka bawl nalamdangte in ka teci ahi hi." 
John10:26 Ahih hangin note ka tuuhon sungah om lo na hih uh ciangin na um kei uh hi. 
John10:27 Ka tuute in keima aw a ngai uh a, ka tuute ka thei a, keima nung hong zui uh hi." 
John10:28 Keimah in amaute nuntak tawntungna ka pia a, cikmah ciangin a kisia kei ding uh hi. Kuamah in ka tuute ka khut sung pan hong sut zo kei ding hi." 
John10:29 Amaute hong pia ka Pa in na khempeuh sangin lianzaw ahih ciangin, ka Pa’ khut pan kuamah in a sut zo kei ding hi." 
John10:30 Keimah in ka Pa tawh pumkhat ka hi uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John10:31 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in suang tawh deeng dingin suang a tawm kik uh hi. 
John10:32 Zeisu in, “Pasian kiang pan ka ngah thupha tampi kong lak zo hi. Tua thu lakah bang thu hangin suang tawh deeng dingin hong kipan na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John10:33 Judah mite in, “Apha bawlna hangin suang tawh hong deeng ding ka hi kei uh hi. Nang mihing hi napi-in Pasian bangin na kibawl a, Pasian na gensiat maninah suang tawh hong deeng ding ka hi uh hi,” a ci kik uh hi." 
John10:34 Zeisu in, “Note in pasiante na hi uh hi ka ci hi,’ ci-in note’ Thukhamna lai sungah kigelh hilo ahi hiam?" 
John10:35 Pasian thu a ngahte in pasiante ahi uh a kicih leh, Pasian Lai Siangtho kinial lo ahih ciangin," 
John10:36 Pa in ama adingin a sian’thosak a, leitung ah a paisak keimah in, ‘Pasian’ Tapa ka hi,’ ka cih ciangin, ‘Pasian na gensia hi,’ hong ci na hi uh hiam?" 
John10:37 Kei in ka Pa’ ut bangin ka gamtat kei leh, hong um kei un." 
John10:38 Ahih hangin, ka gamtat leh, kei nong um kei uh zongin ka bawlna thu um un. Tua bangin na up uh leh, Pa in kei sungah om a, kei in Pa sungah ka om cih thei-in na ciamteh ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John10:39 Amaute in Topa mat nading a zon’ kik uh ciangin amaute’ khut sung pan a paikhia hi. 
John10:40 Johan in a masa bel a baptaizna mun Jordan gun galah Zeisu pai kik a, tuasan takah a om hi." 
John10:41 Mi tampite a kiangah va pai uh a, “Johan in nalamdang a lah loh hangin hih mi thu Johan in a genna khempeuh a man hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John10:42 Tuasan takah mi tampite in Topa a um uh hi. 
John11:1 Mari leh a sanggamnu Martha omna Bethani khua-ah Lazaras kici mi khat cina-in a om hi. 
John11:2 Cinapa Lazaras’ sanggamnu Mari in Zeisu’ khe sathau nuh a, a sam tawh a nulsaknu hi." 
John11:3 Tua hi a, a sanggamnute in Zeisu kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Topa aw, na itpa cina-in a om hi,” ci-in a ko uh hi." 
John11:4 Zeisu in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Hih cinatna in sih nading natna ahi kei hi. Pasian’minthan’ nading leh Pasian’ Tapa’ minthan’na a kilah nading hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:5 Zeisu in Martha, a sanggamnu leh Lazaras a it hi." 
John11:6 Tua ahih ciangin Lazaras’ cinat thu a zak ciangin pai loin ama omna munah ni nih a om lai hi. 
John11:7 Tua nung ciangin, “Tu-in Judah gam lamah pai kik ni,” ci-in a nungzuite kiangah a gen hi." 
John11:8 A nungzuite in, “Rabbi aw, Judah mite in tu nangawnin nang suang tawh deen’ dingin hong zong uh ahih ciangin, tua lam pai kik ding na hi hiam? a ci uh hi." 
John11:9 Zeisu in, “Nisuah leh nitum kikal nai sawm leh nai nih pha hilo ahi hiam? Mi khat in sun lai takin a pai leh, leitung khuavak a muh maninah a kipuk thei kei ding hi." 
John11:10 Ahih hangin mi khat in khuamial lai takin a pai leh, ama sungah khuavak om lo ahih ciangin a puk thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:11 Tua thu amah in gen a, tua nung ciangin Zeisu in, “I lawmpa Lazaras ihmu-in a om hi. A phong dingin ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:12 A nungzuite in, “Topa aw, a ihmut leh, a nuamtuam ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:13 Zeisu in Lazaras’ sihna thu a gen hangin a ihmu taktak a cihna bangin a nungzuite in a ngaihsun uh hi. 
John11:14 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in, “Lazaras a si zo hi," 
John11:15 note in na up nadingun tuasan takah om lo ka hih ciangin ka lungdam hi. Ahih hangin tu-in ama kiangah va pai ni,” ci-in a tel gen hi." 
John11:16 Didimas kici Thomas in nungzui a lawmte kiangah, “Ei zong Topa tawh sihna thuakkhawm dingin pai ni,” a ci hi." 
John11:17 Zeisu a tun’ ciangin Lazaras han sungah ni li a pha zo hi ci-in a thei hi. 
John11:18 Bethani khua in Jerusalem khua tawh tai nih dektak a kigamla hi. 
John11:19 Martha leh Mari’ sanggampa si ahih ciangin, a hehnem dingin Judah mite tampi a hong pai uh hi." 
John11:20 Zeisu hong paina thu Martha in a zak ciangin a dawn dingin a pai hi. Mari ahih leh, inn sungah tu-in a om lai hi." 
John11:21 Martha in, “Topa aw, nang om lecin ka sanggampa a si kei ding hi." 
John11:22 Tu nangawnin Pasian kiangah na nget khempeuh Pasian in hong pia ding cih ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:23 Zeisu in, “Na sanggampa a thokik ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John11:24 Martha in, “Ni tawp Ni-a thawhkikna-ah a thokik ding cih ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:25 Zeisu in, “Keimah in thawhkikna leh nuntakna ka hi hi. Kei hong umte in a sih hangin a nungtakik ding hi." 
John11:26 Kei hong um a nungtate in zong cikmah ciangin a si ngei kei ding hi. Hih thu na um hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
John11:27 amah in, “Ka um hi, Topa aw, Leitungah hong pai ding Pasian’ Tapa Khazih na hih ka um hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:28 Tua bang a cih khit ciangin Martha ciah a, a sanggamnu kiangah, “Sia hong tung zo a, nang hong sam hi,” ci-in a ko sim hi." 
John11:29 Tua thu a zak ciangin Mari thakhatin tho a, Zeisu va dawn hi." 
John11:30 Tua lai takin Zeisu khua sungah a lut nai kei hi; Martha’ dawnna munah a om lai hi. 
John11:31 Tua ciangin dahna hehnem dinga inn sungah Mari tawh a omkhawm Judah mite in, amah tho meengmeenga a paikhiat a muh uh ciangin, amah kap dingin hanah a pai ding hi ci-in a nung a zui uh hi." 
John11:32 Tua ahih ciangin, Mari in Zeisu omna munah tung a, Topa a muh ciangin a khe mai-ah bokin, “Topa aw, nang om lecin ka sanggampa a si kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:33 Mari akipan amah tawh hong paikhawm Judah mite a kap uh Zeisu in a muh ciangin, a sin sungah khuisa-a lungmangin," 
John11:34 “Koiah, na vui uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, “Topa, hong pai in la, hong en in,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:35 Zeisu a kap hi. 
John11:36 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite in, “En un, amah in bangzah takin Lazaras a it hiam!” a ci uh hi." 
John11:37 Amaute lakah mi kimkhatte in, “Mittawpa khua a musak thei hih pa in hih mi zong a sih loh nadingin bawl thei lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John11:38 Tua ciangin Zeisu in a sungah khuisa kawmin hanah a pai hi. Tua han in leihawm hi a, suang tawh a kisin hi." 
John11:39 Zeisu in, “Suang lemkhia un,” a ci hi. Misipa’ sanggamnu Martha in, “Topa aw, tu-in ahih leh, a uih zo ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, ni li pha zo hi,” a cih leh," 
John11:40 Zeisu in, “Nang na up leh, Pasian’ minthan’na na mu ding hi, hong ci zo hilo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John11:41 Tua ahih ciangin amau in suang a lemkhia uh hi. Zeisu dakto a, “Pa aw, nang in keima thu hong ngai na hih ciangin na hehpihna ka phat hi." 
John11:42 Nang in keima thu nong ngai niloh cih ke’n ka thei hi. Ahih hangin kei na hong sawl ka hih hong um mihonpite in a up nadingun, amau ading tua thu ka gen hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:43 Tua bang a cih khit ciangin, “Lazaras aw, hong paikhia in,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko hi." 
John11:44 A sipa in a khut a khe han puan tawh kitun a, a maitang dial tawh kitunin a paikhia hi. Zeisu in, “Amah phel un la, na khahkhia un,” a ci hi." 
John11:45 Tua ahih ciangin Mari kiangah hong pai Judah mi tampite in Zeisu’ bawlna a muh uh ciangin a um uh hi. 
John11:46 Ahih hangin kimkhat ahih leh, Farisaite kiangah a pai uh a, Zeisu bawlna thu khempeuh a zasak uh hi." 
John11:47 Tua ahih ciangin siampi liante leh Farisaite in upa vaihawmte kikhawmsak uh a, “Eite in bangci hih ding i hi hiam? Hih mi in nalamdang tampi a lak hi." 
John11:48 Hih mi i koihkhong leh, mite khempeuh in amah a um ding uh a, Rom mite hong pai-in eite omna gam ahi zongin, eite pawl ahi zongin hong susia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:49 Amau lakah mi khat, tua kum siampi ukpa ahi Kai-afas in, “Note in bangmah na thei kei uh hi." 
John11:50 Mi tampi tangding mi khat hong sih leh, Judah mite a kisiat sangin a pha zaw ci-in ngaihsun lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
John11:51 Tua bang a cihna in ama ut thu gen ahi kei hi. Tua kumin amah siampi ukpa ahih ciangin, Zeisu in mite tangding a si ding tham loin," 
John11:52 mun khempeuh ah a kikhenthang Pasian’ tate a kikhawm kiksak dingin a si ding hi,” ci-in kamsangpa bangin a gen hi." 
John11:53 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-a kipan Zeisu a thah nadingun amaute kikumin a vaihawm uh hi. 
John11:54 Tua ahih ciangin Judah mite lakah a kilangin Zeisu a pai nawn kei hi. Tua mun panin paikhia-in, gammang tawh kinai Efraim kici khua-ah pai a, a nungzuite tawh a omkhawm hi." 
John11:55 Judah mite’ Paisan pawikham ding nai a, mi tampi in a kisian’thosak nadingun Paisan pawi ma-in gam khempeuh panin Jerusalem khua-ah a paito uh hi." 
John11:56 Tua ahih ciangin, tuate in Zeisu zong uh a, “Bangci na ngaihsun uh hiam? Amah pawikhamna sungah hong pai lo ding hi ci-in na um uh hiam?” ci-in biakna innpi sungah ding-in a kidong uh hi." 
John11:57 Siampi liante leh Farisaite in Zeisu’ omna mun a thei a om leh, amaute in a mat theih nadingun hong hilh ta hen, ci-in tua lai takin lai a hawm uh hi." 
John12:1 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in Paisan pawikham nading ni guk a sap lai takin a sisa a thawhkiksakpa Lazaras omna Bethani khua-ah a pai hi. 
John12:2 Tua ciangin tuasan takah nitak an a vak uh hi. Martha in an a vak hi. Lazaras in Topa tawh an ne pawlte lakah a om hi. 
John12:3 Tua lai takin Mari in tampi a man mard paknamtui thawl khat la a, Zeisu’ khe nuhin a sam tawh a nul hi. Tua paknamtui in inn sung teng a zeel hi." 
John12:4 A nungzuite khat Zeisu lehheekpa Judas Iskariot in," 
John12:5 “Hih paknamtui dangka zathum tawh zuakin mizawngte bang hangin pia lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
John12:6 Tua bang a cih in mizawngte phattuamna ding ngaihsun hi lo hi; amah in gutapa hi a, dangka-ip tawi ahih ciangin, a sunga omsa teng sawk thei ahih hang hi." 
John12:7 Zeisu in, “Ka luang vui ding ni dongin amah in hih paknamtui koihkhol ta hen." 
John12:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mizawngte in note tawh a omkhawm ngitnget uh hi. Kei ka hih leh, note tawh omkhawm ngitnget ding ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:9 Tuasan takah Zeisu a om Judah mite in a theih uh ciangin, amaute in Zeisu hang bek hi lo, a sisa a thawhkiksak Lazaras zong en dingin a hong pai uh hi." 
John12:10 Ahih hangin siampi liante in Lazaras zong thah dingin a vaihawm uh hi. 
John12:11 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amah hangin Judah mi tampite paikhia uh a, Zeisu a um uh hi." 
John12:12 Zingsang ciangin pawikhamna-ah a hong pai mite in, Jerusalem khua-ah Zeisu hong pai ding cih a thei uh hi." 
John12:13 Tua ciangin nisuh hiang tawi-in Topa dawn dingin a paikhia uh a, “Hosanna, Pasian’ min tawh hong pai Israel Kumpipa in, Thupha ngah ta hen!” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
John12:14 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh bangin, Zeisu in lano khat ngah a, a tungah tuangin," 
John12:15 “Zion’ tanu aw, lau kei in; En in, na Kumpipa in, Lano tungah tuangin hong pai ding hi.” a ci hi." 
John12:16 Tua thute a cilin a nungzuite in a theih loh uh hangin, Zeisu in minthan’na a ngah khit ciangin Topa thu tua bangin kigelh a, ama tungah tua bangin a bawl ding hi a cihna thu a phawk uh hi." 
John12:17 Lazaras han sung pan samkhia a, sihna pan a thawhkiksak lai takin, Zeisu tawh a omkhawm mihonpite in teci a pang uh hi." 
John12:18 Tua theihsakna lim a bawlna mihonpite in a zak uh ciangin a dawn dingin a paikhia uh hi. 
John12:19 Tua ahih ciangin Farisaite in, “En un, bangmah na zo kei uh hi. Leitung mite khempeuh in ama nung a zui khin ta uh hi,” ci-in khat leh khat a kici uh hi." 
John12:20 Pawikhamna sungah Pasian bia dinga hong paite lakah Grik mi zong a om uh hi. 
John12:21 Tua ahih ciangin tuate in Galile gam Bethsaida khuami Filip kiangah va pai uh a, “Zeisu ka mu nuam uh hi, lawm aw,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
John12:22 Filip pai-a Andru va hilh hi. Andru leh Filip in a nih un Zeisu kiangah a ko uh hi. 
John12:23 Zeisu in, “Mihing Tapa in minthan’na a ngah hun hong tung zo hi." 
John12:24 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, buhhum khat in lei tungah kia-a a sih kei leh, amah bek a om ding hi. Ahih hangin a sih leh, tampi a gah thei ding hi." 
John12:25 Ama nuntakna a itte in nuntakna a mangthangsak ding hi. Hih leitungah a nuntakna a mudahte in nuntak tawntungna a nei ding hi. 
John12:26 Ka na hong semte in ka nung hong zui ta hen. Keima omna munah ka nasemte zong a om ding hi. Ka na hong semte Pa in a pahtawi ding hi.” 
John12:27 “Tu-in ka lungmang a, bang ka gen ding hiam! Pa aw, hih hun pan hong gum in ka ci ding hiam? Hi lo hi, hih thu hangin hih hun kong tung zo hi." 
John12:28 Pa aw, na min na thangsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin, vantung pan aw khat ging a, “Ka thangsak zo a, khatvei ka thangsak kik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:29 A kimkot a, ding mihonpite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Van ging hi,’ a ci uh hi. Kimkhat in, “Vantungmi khat in amah tawh kiho hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John12:30 Zeisu in, “Hih aw in kei ading hong pai ahi kei hi, note’ adinga hong pai ahi hi." 
John12:31 Tu-in hih leitung in thukhenna a thuak ding hi. Tu-in hih leitung ukpa kihawlkhia ding hi. 
John12:32 Keimah leitung pan hong kikhai ciangin mi khempeuh keima kiangah ka kai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:33 Tua bang a cih ciangin ama sihna ding lim a genna ahi hi. 
John12:34 Tua hi a, mihonpite in, “Khazih a om tawntung ding hi,’ ci-in Thukhamna sungah ka za zo uh hi. Tua bang ahih leh, ‘Mihing Tapa in kikhaina a thuak ding hi,’ bang hangin ci na hi hiam? Hih Mihing Tapa kua mi ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John12:35 Tua ciangin Zeisu in, “Khuavakna in note kiangah tawlkhat a om lai ding hi. Khuamial in no hong lap loh nadingin khuavak a om lai takin na pai un. Khuamial lakah a pai mi in a tun’na ding a thei kei hi.”" 
John12:36 “Khuavak in note tawh a omkhawm lai takin khuavak’ tate na suah nadingun khuavak na um un,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua thu teng Zeisu in a gen khit ciangin, paikhia-in a bu hi." 
John12:37 Tua zah nalamdang tampi amaute mai-ah a lah hangin, amau in a um kei uh hi." 
John12:38 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Pasian’ kamsangpa Isaiah hilhna thu a tun’ nading hi. Tua thu in: “Topa aw, ka genna thu uh kua in hong um ahi hiam? Pasian’ khut kua kiangah kilang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John12:39 Khatvei Isaiah in a gen kikna thu in: 
John12:40 “A mit uh tawsakin, a lungsim uh a khauhsak hi. Tua bang hih kei leh, a mit uh tawh mu-in, A lungsim uh tawh thei ding uh a; Amau cinatna ka damsak ding hi,” a cihna thu hangin amaute in a um kei uh hi." 
John12:41 Isaiah in Zeisu’ minthan’na mu khol ahih ciangin tua bangin ama thu a genkhol hi. 
John12:42 Tua bang ahih hangin upa vaihawm tampite nangawn in Zeisu a up uh hangin, biakna innpi sung pan Farisaite in a hawlkhiat ding a lau manunah a kilangin a mang kei uh hi." 
John12:43 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Pasian’ piak minthan’na sangin mite piak minthan’na a deih zaw uh hi." 
John12:44 Zeisu in, “Kei hong um mi in kei bek hong um kei hi." 
John12:45 Kei hong sawlpa zong a um hi. Kei hong mu mi in kei hong sawlpa zong a mu hi. 
John12:46 Kei hong um mi in khuamial lakah a om loh nadingin kei khuavakin leitungah kong pai hi. 
John12:47 Ka thu za a, a zui lo mi ke’n thu ka khen kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, leitung mite thu khen dingin hong pai ka hi kei hi. Leitung mite gum dingin hong pai ka hi hi." 
John12:48 Kei hong nolh a, ka thu a ngai lo mi in thukhen ding mi khat a nei hi. Ka hilhna thu in ni tawp Ni ciangin tua mi tungah thu a khen ding hi." 
John12:49 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka ut bangin ka gen kei hi, kei hong sawl Pa kiang panin bangci gen ding, bangci hilh ding ci-in thupiakna ka ngah hi." 
John12:50 Ama hong thupiakna in nuntak tawntungna ahi hi ci-in ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka hilhna teng Pa in keima kiangah hong piak bangin a hilh ka hi hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
John13:1 Paisan pawikham ma-in Zeisu in leitung pan Pa kiangah a ciah ding hun tung cih a theih ciangin, leitungah a om ama mite it ahih ciangin a tawp dongin a it hi." 
John13:2 Dawimangpa in Simon’ tapa Judas Iskariot sungah Zeisu a lehheek nadingin lungsim a guan’ khit ciangin; nitak an a nek lai takun," 
John13:3 Pa in na khempeuh ama khut tungah a apna thu ahi zongin, amah in Pasian kiang pan a hong paina thu ahi zongin, Pasian kiangah a paikik nading ahi zongin a theih ciangin," 
John13:4 Zeisu ding a, a puanza suahin dial tawh a kawng a gak hi." 
John13:5 Tua ciangin kuang sungah tui sungin a nungzuite’ khe silsak a, a kawng a, a ten’ dial tawh a nul hi." 
John13:6 Tua ahih ciangin Simon Piter kiang a tun’ ciangin Piter in, “Topa aw, kei’ khe zong sil ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John13:7 Zeisu in, “Tu lai taka ka bawlna thu na thei kei hi. Tu nung ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:8 Piter in “Ka khe cikmah hunin na sil kei ding hi,” a cih ciangin Zeisu in, “Nang kong sil kei leh, kei tawh na kipawl thei kei ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John13:9 Tua ciangin Simon Piter in, “Topa aw, ka khe bek hong sil kei in, ka khut leh ka lu zong hong silsak in,” a ci hi." 
John13:10 Zeisu in, “A kisilsate in khe longal sil ding a deih kei hi, a pumpi a siang hi. No na sian’ uh hangin na vekpi-un na siang kim kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:11 A lehheek ding pa theikhol ahih ciangin, “Note na vekpi-un na siang kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:12 Tua bangin amau khe a sil khit ciangin a puan silh a, a tut khit ciangin, “Tu-a note tungah kong bawlna thu na thei uh hiam?" 
John13:13 Note in keimah ‘Sia’ leh ‘Topa’ nong ci uh hi. Tua thu aman hi, nong cih uh bangin ka hi hi." 
John13:14 Tua ciangin keimah in note Topa leh Sia ka hi napi-in na khe uh kong silsak leh, note in zong khat leh khat’ khe na kisilsak ding uh hi." 
John13:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in note tungah ka hih bangin note in na hih nadingun lim kong lak hi." 
John13:16 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, sila in a topa sangin a lianzaw kei hi. Sawltak in a sawlpa sangin a lianzaw kei hi." 
John13:17 Tua nate thei-in na hih le-uh teh, thupha na ngah ding uh hi." 
John13:18 Note khempeuh kong ci nuam kei hi. Ka teel mite ka thei hi. ‘Keima an a ne mi in a khetul tawh hong peek hi,” ci-a Lai Siangtho thu a tun’ nading ahi hi." 
John13:19 Hih thute hong tun’ ciangin tua pa ka hih lam na theih nadingun, hong tun’ ma-in no kiangah kong genkhol hi." 
John13:20 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, ka sawlpa a ngai mi in kei zong hong ngai hi. Kei hong ngai mi in kei hong sawlpa zong a ngai hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:21 Tua bangin Zeisu in a gen khit ciangin, a lungmang mahmah a, “Note khat in hong lehheek ding hi,” ci-in a tel gen hi." 
John13:22 Kua a cihna hiam ci-in a nungzuite kimuangmawh ciatin, khat leh khat a ki-en uh hi." 
John13:23 Zeisu in a it nungzui khat in Zeisu’ ang-ah lumin, kingamin a om hi." 
John13:24 “Kua a cihna hiam?” ci-a dong dingin Piter in lim a lak hi. 
John13:25 Tua pa in Zeisu’ ang ah kingamin lum a, “Topa aw, kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John13:26 Zeisu in, “Ama ading khomun kam khat ka diah khit ciangin ka piakpa ahi hi,” a cih khit ciangin, khomun kamkhat diah a, Simon’ tapa Judas Iskariot a pia hi." 
John13:27 Tua khomun kam khat a san’ khit ciangin Satan ama sungah a lut hi. Tua ciangin Zeisu in, “Na bawl nading thu a manlangin hih in,” a ci hi." 
John13:28 Bang hangin tua bang a gen hiam ci-in a sabuai-a tute kuamah in a thei kei uh hi. 
John13:29 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, mi kimkhat in Judas in dangka-ip tawi ahih ciangin, “Pawikhamna-ah i zat ding na khatpeuh peuh lei in,” ci ahih kei leh, “Mizawngte na khatpeuh na pia in,” a ci hi ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
John13:30 Amah in khomun kamkhat a san’ khit ciangin thakhatin a paikhia hi. Tua lai tak zan ahi hi. 
John13:31 Tua ahih ciangin Judas a paikhiat khit ciangin Zeisu in, “Tu-in Mihing Tapa kiminthangsak a, ama sungah Pasian a kiminthangsak ding hi." 
John13:32 Ama sungah Pasian a kiminthan’sak leh, Pasian in Tapa a minthangsak ding a, thakhatin a min a thangsak ding hi." 
John13:33 Ka tanote aw, keimah in note tawh tawlkhat bek ka omkhawm ding hi. Note in kei nong zong ding uh hi. ‘Ka paina munah nong tung zo kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in Judah mite kiangah ka cih mah bangin, tu-in note kiangah kong ci hi." 
John13:34 Thupiakna thak kong pia hi: Note khat leh khat na ki-it un la, keimah in note kong it mah bangin khat leh khat na ki-it un." 
John13:35 Note khat leh khat na ki-it uh leh, mite khempeuh in note ka nungzuite na hih lam uh a thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:36 Simon Piter in, “Topa aw, koi lam pai ding na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin Zeisu in, “Ka paina lamah tu-in nong zui zo kei ding hi. Tu nung ciangin na hong zui ding uh hi,” a ci kik hi." 
John13:37 Piter in, “Topa aw, keimah in tu-in bang hangin hong zui zo lo ding ka hi hiam? Nang adingin ka nuntakna ka paai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:38 Zeisu in, “Kei adingin na nuntakna na paai ding hiam? Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, thumvei na hong nial ma-in aak a khuang kei ding hi,” ci-in a gen kik hi." 
John14:1 Khatvei Zeisu in, “Note lungmang kei un; Pasian um un la, kei zong hong um un." 
John14:2 Ka Pa’ inn sungah omna tampi a om hi. A om kei leh, no kiangah kong gen zo ding hi. Note om nading mun bawlkhol dingin ka pai ding hi." 
John14:3 Pai-in na om nading uh ka bawl leh, no kiangah kong paikik ding a; ka omna munah na om nadingun ka hong la ding hi." 
John14:4 Ka pai nading mun lampi na thei uh hi,” a cih leh," 
John14:5 Thomas in, “Topa aw, na pai nading thei lo ka hih uh ciangin, lampi bangci theih ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
John14:6 Zeisu in, “Keimah in lampi ka hi hi, thuman thutak ka hi hi, nuntakna lah ka hi hi. Kei hong suang loin kuamah in Pa kiang a tung zo kei ding hi." 
John14:7 Note in kei nong theih uh leh, ka Pa zong na thei ding uh hi, tu-a kipanin ka Pa na mu zo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:8 Filip in, “Topa aw, Pa hong lak lecin ka deihna uh a kicing ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:9 Zeisu in, “Filip aw, kei in note tawh hih tanvei ka omkhawm hangin hong thei lo na hi hiam? Kei hong mu mi in Pa zong a mu zo hi. ‘Pa hong lak in,’ bang hangin na ci hiam?" 
John14:10 Pa sungah ka om a, kei sungah Pa a om cih um lo na hi hiam? Note kiangah kong gen thu in keima thu hong hilh ka hi kei hi. Kei sunga teeng ka Pa in na hong sem ahi hi." 
John14:11 Pa sungah ka om a, Pa in kei sungah a om thu hong um in. Ahih kei leh zong ka bawl nalamdangte’ thu ngaihsunin hong um un.”" 
John14:12 “Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, kei hong um mi in ka bawl bang nate bawlin tua sangin a lianzaw a bawl ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pa kiangah ka ciah ding hi." 
John14:13 Note in keima min suangin thu na nget khempeuh uh Ta tungah Pa’ minthan’na a kilat nadingin ka hih ding hi. 
John14:14 Kei min suangin na nget peuhmah uh kong hih ding hi.” 
John14:15 “Kei nong it uh leh, ka thupiakna na mang ding uh hi." 
John14:16 Keimah in Pa kiangah thu ka ngen ding a, note tawh a omkhawm tawntung dingin Kha Siangtho ahi adang Huhpa hong pia ding hi." 
John14:17 Tua Kha Siangtho leitung mite in mu loin thei lo uh ahih ciangin a sang zo kei uh hi. Tua Kha Siangtho in note tawh omkhawmin, note sungah om ding ahih ciangin amah na thei ding uh hi.”" 
John14:18 “Keimah in note tagahte bangin kong nusia kei ding a, note kiangah kong pai lai ding hi." 
John14:19 Tawlkhat khit ciangin leitung mite in kei hong mu lo ding uh hi. No na hih uh leh, nong mu ding uh hi. Keimah nungta ka hih ciangin, note zong na nungta ding uh hi." 
John14:20 Pa sungah kei om a, kei sungah note na om uh leh, note sungah kei ka om tua ni ciangin na thei ding uh hi." 
John14:21 Ka thupiakna nei a, a zui mi in kei hong it hi. Kei hong it mi ka Pa in a it ding hi. Keimah in zong amah ka it ding a, ama kiangah ka kilang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:22 Judas Iskariot hi lo adang Judas in, “Topa ko kiangah na kilat hangin, leitung mite kiangah bang hang kilang lo ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John14:23 Zeisu in, “Kei hong it mi in ka thu zui ding a, ka Pa in amah a it ding a, ama kiangah hawhin, amah tawh ka omkhawm ding uh hi." 
John14:24 Kei hong it lo mi in ka thu a zui kei hi. Note zak thute in kei thu hi lo kei hong sawl Pa’ thu ahi hi.” 
John14:25 “Note tawh ka omkhawm lai takin hih thu kong hilh zo hi. 
John14:26 Ahih hangin ka min tawh Pa in hong sawl ding Huhpa a kici Kha Siangtho in na khempeuh hong hilh ding a, no kiangah kong gen khempeuh hong phawkkik sak ding hi." 
John14:27 Nopna note kong pia hi; keima nopna kong pia hi. Leitung mite in a piak bangin kong pia kei hi. Na lungmang kei un la, na lau kei un." 
John14:28 ‘Ka ciah hangin no kiangah kong paikik ding hi,’ ka cihna thu na za uh hi. Nong it uh leh, Pa kiangah ciah ding ka hih ciangin na nuam ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kei sangin Pa a lianzaw hi." 
John14:29 Tua thu a tun’ ciangin na up nadingun, hong tun’ ma-in kong genkhol zo hi." 
John14:30 Tu-a kipanin note kiangah thu tampi kong gen nawn kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih leitung ukpa hong pai a; ahih hangin kei tungah thu a nei kei ding hi." 
John14:31 Ahih hangin keimah in Pa’ hong thupiakna bangin ka hih a, Pa ka it cih leitung mite in a theihtheih nading ahi hi. Tho un, paikhia ni.”" 
John15:1 “Keimah in leenggah gui ka hi a, ka Pa in leenggah gui locingpa ahi hi." 
John15:2 Kei tungah a gahlo hiangte khempeuh a sattan ding hi. A gah thei hiang khempeuh in a gah semsem nadingin a hahsiang ding hi. 
John15:3 Ka thuhilhna hangin note tu-in na siangtho uh hi. 
John15:4 Kei sungah om un. Keimah in zong note sungah ka om ding hi. Leenggah hiang in gui tungah a om kei leh, ama ut bangin a gah zo lo bangin, note in zong keima sungah na om kei uh leh, na gah zo kei ding uh hi." 
John15:5 Keimah in leenggah gui ka hi hi. Note in a hiang na hi uh hi. Keima sungah om a, ama sungah ka om leh, tua mi in tampi a gah thei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kei sungah na om kei uh leh, bangmah na hih thei kei ding uh hi." 
John15:6 Kei sungah a om lote in a kipaiikhia hiangte bangin a kikeusak hi. Tua ciangin mite in khawm uh a, mei sungah khulin mei in a kangtum hi." 
John15:7 Kei sungah na om uh a, ka thu in note sungah a om leh, na ngetpeuh peuh uh na ngah ding uh hi." 
John15:8 Note in tampi na gah uh leh, ka Pa’ minthan’na na kilangsak ding uh a, note in ka nungzuite na hi takpi ding uh hi." 
John15:9 Pa in kei hong it bangin no kong it hi; ka itna sungah om un. 
John15:10 Keimah in ka Pa’ thupiaknate zui a, hong itna sungah ka om mah bangin, note in ka thupiaknate na zuih uh leh, kei sungah na om ding uh hi." 
John15:11 Note sungah ka lungdamna om a, note lungdamna a kicin’ nadingin hih thute note kiangah kong gen zo hi.”" 
John15:12 “Ka thupiakna ahih leh, keimah in no kong it mah bangin note khat leh khat na ki-it un." 
John15:13 Ama lawmte tangding a nuntakna a paai itna sangin, itna lianzaw kuamah in a nei kei hi." 
John15:14 Note in ka thupiakna bangin na hih uh leh, ka lawmte na hi ding uh hi." 
John15:15 Tu-a kipanin note sila kong ci nawn kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, silate in a topa bawlna thu a thei kei uh hi. Lawmte kong ci ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka Pa kiangah thu ka zakte no kong theisak zo hi." 
John15:16 Note in kei nong teel kei uh hi; no kong teel hi. Note pai-in, a tampi na gah khit uh ciangin, na gah uh a kip nadingin kong koih zo hi; tua ciangin ka min tawh thu na nget khempeuh uh Pa in hong pia ding hi." 
John15:17 Hih in keima thupiakna ahi hi; Khat leh khat na ki-it un.” 
John15:18 “Leitung mite in no hong muhdah uh leh, note hong muhdah ma-in kei hong mudah uh hi ci-in na thei ta un."
