John15:19 Note in leitung mite tawh na kipawl uh leh, leitung mite in amau mipawl note hong it ding uh hi. Ahih hangin leitung mite lak pan note kong teelkhia hi; leitung mite tawh na kipawl kei uh a, tua ahih ciangin leitung mite in no hong mudah uh hi." 
John15:20 ‘Sila in a topa sangin lianzaw kei,’ ci-in ka gensa thu na ngaihsun un. Amau in kei hong bawlsia uh ahih manin note zong hong bawlsia ding uh hi. Amau in kei thu zui le-uh, note thu zong a zui ding uh hi." 
John15:21 Amau in kei hong sawlpa thei lo uh ahih ciangin, ka min hangin tua thu khempeuh no tungah hong bawl ding uh hi." 
John15:22 Kei hong pai loin amau kiangah thu hilh lo hi leng, amaute in mawhna a nei kei ding uh hi. Tu-in ahih leh, amau mawhna pan suahtak theih nading a nei kei uh hi." 
John15:23 Kei hong mudah mi in ka Pa zong a mudah hi. 
John15:24 Midangte in a bawl ngei loh nalamdangte amaute lakah bawl lo hi leng, mawhna a nei kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tu-in amaute in hih nalamdangte mu khin napi-in kei leh ka Pa hong mudah veve uh hi." 
John15:25 Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Thu om loin kei hong mudah uh hi,’ ci-in amau Thukhamna sungah a kigelh bangin a tun’ nading ahi hi.”" 
John15:26 “Pa kiang pan a pusuak, thuman thutak Kha Siangtho ahi Pa kiang pan no kiangah kong sawl ding Huhpa in a hong tun’ ciangin, keima ading teci a pang ding hi." 
John15:27 Note in zong a cil pan akipan kei tawh omkhawm na hih uh ciangin, teci na pang ding uh hi.”" 
John16:1 “Note na kipuk loh nadingun hih thu kong genkhol hi. 
John16:2 Amau in kikhopna innsung pan note hong hawlkhia ding uh hi. Ahi hi; hong that mite khempeuh in Pasian’ na ka sem hi ci-in a ki-um ding uh hi. 
John16:3 Amaute in ka Pa thei loin kei zong hong thei lo uh ahih ciangin, tua thu a bawl ding uh hi." 
John16:4 Amau hun a tun’ ciangin kong gensa hih thute na phawk kik nadingun tu-in kong genkhol hi.” “Acil panin hih thute note kiangah kong gen ngei kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note tawh keimah ka omkhawm lai hi." 
John16:5 Ahih hangin tu-inah kei hong sawlpa kiangah pai ding ka hih ciangin, ‘Koi lai-ah pai ding na hi hiam?’ ci-in note lakah kuamah in nong dong kei uh hi." 
John16:6 Ahih hangin hih thute note kiangah kong gen ciangin, note lungsung uh dahna tawh a kidim zo hi." 
John16:7 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, kei ka ciah leh, note’ ading a pha zaw ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kei ka ciah kei leh, Huhpa in note kiangah hong pai lo ding hi. Ahih hangin ka ciah leh, tua pa note kiangah kong sawl ding hi." 
John16:8 A hong tun’ ciangin, mawhna, siangthona leh thukhenna leitung mite kiangah a pulak ding hi." 
John16:9 Amau in kei hong um lo uh ahih ciangin, a mawhna uh a pulak ding hi." 
John16:10 Pa kiangah kei ciah ding a, note in kei hong mu nawn lo ding na hih uh ciangin, sian’thona a pulak ding hi." 
John16:11 Hih leitung ukpa in thukhenna thuak zo ahih ciangin, thukhenna a pulak ding hi.”" 
John16:12 “Note kiangah gen ding thu tampi a om hangin tu-in na sang zo kei ding uh hi. 
John16:13 Ahih hangin thuman thutak Kha Siangtho hong tun’ ciangin, thuman thutak a vekpi-in note hong hilh ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama ut bang hong gen ahi kei hi, a zaksa thu khempeuh hong gen ding hi. Anung ciangin hong piang ding thu khempeuh zong hong hilh ding hi." 
John16:14 Amah in keima minthan’na hong langsak ding hi, bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keima’ aa la-in note kiangah hong gen ding hi." 
John16:15 Ka Pa’ neihsa khempeuh keima’ aa ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin, keima’ aa la-in note kiangah a hong gen ding hi kong ci hi.”" 
John16:16 “Tawlkhat khit ciangin nong mu kei ding uh hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu kik ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John16:17 Tua ahih ciangin, a nungzuite kimkhat in, “Tawlkhat khit ciangin nong mu kei ding uh hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu kik ding uh hi,’ leh ‘Pa kiangah ka pai man-inah, a cihna in bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kici uh hi." 
John16:18 Tua ahih ciangin, “Tawlkhat khit ciangin,’ a cihna in bang ahi hiam? Bang a cihnopna hiam ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
John16:19 Amaute in a dot nop uh Zeisu in a theih ciangin, “Tawlkhat khit ciangin note in kei nong mu nawn kei ding uh hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin, note in kei nong mu kik ding uh hi ka cihna thu note na kidong tek uh hiam?" 
John16:20 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, note kapin na kiko ding uh hi. Leitung mite ahih leh, a lungdam ding uh hi. Note na dah ding uh hangin, na dahna uh lungdamna a suak ding hi." 
John16:21 Numei in ta a suah lai takin a hun tung ahih ciangin a dah hi. Ahih hangin ta a suah khit ciangin leitungah mi khat suak ahih ciangin lungdam a, a gimna a phawk nawn kei hi." 
John16:22 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na dah uh hangin a nung ciangin keimah in note kong mukik ding a, no na lungdam ding uh hi. Note lungdamna kuamah in hong sut zo kei ding hi." 
John16:23 Tua ni ciangin kei kiangah bangmah nong dong kei ding uh hi. Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, note in keima min tawh Pa kiangah thu na nget khempeuh uh a hong pia ding hi." 
John16:24 Tudongin ka min suangin bangmah na ngen kei uh hi. Na lungdamna uh a kicin’ nadingin ngen un, na ngah ding uh hi.”" 
John16:25 “Tua thute thugentehna tawh kong gen zo hi. Thugentehna tawh gen loin, Pa’ thu note kiangah a tel takin kong gen nading ahun hong tung ding hi." 
John16:26 Tua ni ciangin note in ka min suangin thu na ngen ding uh hi; note ading Pa kiangah ke’n ngen ning ka ci kei hi. 
John16:27 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in kei nong it uh a, Pa kiang pan kong pai hi cih um na hih uh ciangin, Pa in zong note hong it ding hi." 
John16:28 Keimah in Pa kiang pan pusuakin leitungah kong kumsuk a; khatvei leitung pan pusuakin Pa kiangah ka pai kik ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John16:29 A nungzuite in, “Tu-in thugentehna zang loin a tel takpi-in nong gen hi!" 
John16:30 Na khempeuh na thei khin a, kuamah in nang hong dot nading thu a om kei hi ci-in tu-in ka thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin nangmah in Pasian’ kiang pan hong pai na hi ci-in ka um uh hi.” a ci uh hi." 
John16:31 Zeisu in zong, “Tu-in nong um uh hiam?" 
John16:32 En un, note in na omna ciat uhah na kikhenthang ding uh a, kei guak na hong nusiat nading uh ahun hong tung ding a, a tung zo hi. Ahih hangin kei guak ka om kei hi; Pa in kei tawh a omkhawm hi." 
John16:33 Note in keima sungah nopna na neih nadingun hih thute kong genkhol hi. Note in leitungah gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Ahih hangin lunghimawh kei un, leitung ka zozo hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John17:1 Zeisu in hih thute a gen khit ciangin vantung lam ento a, “Pa aw, ahun a tung zo hi. Tapa in nang hong minthan’sak nadingin, na Tapa hong minthangsak in." 
John17:2 Nang in Ta’ khut sungah na piaksate khempeuh, nuntak tawntungna a piak nadingin mi pawl khempeuh uk nading thu Ta na pia hi." 
John17:3 Amaute in nang Pasian taktak khat bek leh na sawlpa Zeisu Khazih a theihna un nuntak tawntungna ahi hi. 
John17:4 Ka sep dinga nong piak na khempeuh sem zo ka hih man-inah leitungah na min ka thangsak zo hi. 
John17:5 Pa aw, leitung a om ma-in nangma kiangah ka neihsa minthan’na tawh tu-in nangma kiangah kei hong minthangsak in.”" 
John17:6 “Leitungah na hong piaksa mite kiangah na min ka lak zo hi. Tuate in nangma neihsa ahi uh a, kei nong pia zo hi. Nangma thu amaute in a zui uh hi." 
John17:7 Tu-in kei na hong piakte khempeuh in nangma’ aa ahi hi cih amaute in a thei uh hi. 
John17:8 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, nong piak thute amaute ka pia a, amaute in a sang uh a; nangma kiang pan kong pai cih thei-in nangmah in na hong sawl hi cih a um takpi uh hi." 
John17:9 Amaute ading thu ka ngen hi. Leitung mite ading thu ka ngen kei hi. Na hong piak mite in nangma mi ahih man-unah amau ading thu ka ngen hi. 
John17:10 Ka neihsate khempeuh nangma’ aa ahi hi. Nangma neihsate khempeuh keima’ aa ahi hi. Amaute hangin minthan’na ka ngah hi. 
John17:11 Tu-a kipanin leitungah ka om kei ding hi. Hih mite in leitungah a om lai ding uh hi. Nangma kiangah kei kong pai ding hi. A siangtho Pa aw, nang leh kei in pumkhat i hih mah bangin, amaute zong pumkhat a suah nadingun kei nong piaksa mite nangma min tawh kipsak in." 
John17:12 Amaute tawh ka omkhawm lai takin nong piaksa mite nangma min tawh ka kipsak zo a; amaute ka kem zo hi. Lai Siangtho a tun’ nadingin, amaute lakah kisiatna’ tapa khat longal kuamah a kisia kei hi." 
John17:13 Tu-in keimah in nangma kiangah kong pai ding hi. Keima lungdamna hih mite sungah a dim nadingin hih thute leitungah ka om lai-in ka gen hi. 
John17:14 Amaute kiangah nangma thu ka pia zo hi. Keimah in leitung tawh ka kipawl loh bangin, amaute zong leitung tawh kipawl lo ahih uh ciangin, leitung mite in amaute a mudah uh hi." 
John17:15 Amaute leitung pan na lakhia in ci-in thu kong ngen kei hi. Gilopa tawh a kipelh nadingun amaute na kep nadingin thu kong ngen hi. 
John17:16 Keimah in leitung tawh ka kipawl loh bangin, amaute zong leitung tawh a kipawl kei uh hi." 
John17:17 Thuman thutak tawh amaute na siangthosakin. Nangma thu in thuman thutak ahi hi. 
John17:18 Nang in leitungah kei nong sawl mah bangin, amaute leitungah ka sawl hi." 
John17:19 Amaute zong thutak tawh a kisian’thosak nadingun, keimah ka kisiangthosak hi.”" 
John17:20 “Hih mite ading bekin thu kong ngen kei hi. Amaute’ thuhilhna hangin kei hong um mite adingin zong thu kong ngen hi. 
John17:21 Nang in kei nong sawl cih leitung mite in a up nadingun Pa aw, keima sungah na om a, kei in nangma sungah ka om bangin, amaute zong eimau sungah om-in pumkhat a suah nadingun thu kong ngen hi." 
John17:22 Eite in pumkhat i hih bangin, keimah in amaute sungah ka om a, nang keima sungah na om bangin, amaute pumkhat suak uh a, pumkhat a kicin’ nadingin nang in kei nong sawl a, keimah nong it bangin amaute na it cih leitung mite in a theih nadingun, nong piaksa minthan’na amaute kiangah ka pia zo hi.”" 
John17:23  
John17:24 “Pa aw, kei nong piak mite in zong nong piaksa minthan’na a muh nadingun ka omna-ah na omkhawmsak dingin ka deih hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, lei pian’ ma-inah nong it hi." 
John17:25 A siangtho ka Pa aw, leitung mite in nang a hong theih loh uh hangin, kei in kong thei hi. Hih mite in kei nong sawlpa ka hihna a thei uh hi." 
John17:26 Kei nong it bang itna amaute sungah om a, keimah in amaute sungah ka om nadingin, nangma min amaute kiangah ka lak zo a, ka lak lai ding hi,” ci-in thu a ngen hi." 
John18:1 Zeisu in hih bangin thu a nget khit ciangin, a nungzuite tawh tua mun nusia-in Kidron Kuam a kantan uh hi. Tua kuam galkhat ah Oliv huan khat a om hi; tua huan sungah amah leh a nungzuite a lut uh hi." 
John18:2 Amah a lehheekpa Judas in zong tua mun a thei hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu leh a nungzuite in tuasan takah tamveipi a pai uh hi." 
John18:3 Tua lai takin Judas in galkap pawlkhat tawh, siampi liante leh Farisaite’ paisak palik mangte tawh a kipawl khit ciangin, meivak, meilah leh hiamte tawi-in tua munah a pai uh hi." 
John18:4 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in ama tungah a piang ding thu khempeuh thei ahih ciangin paikhia a, “Note in kua zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John18:5 Amaute in, “Nazareth mi Zeisu ka zong uh hi,” a cih uh leh, “Kei tua pa ka hi hi,” a ci hi. A lehheekpa Judas in amaute tawh a ding khawm hi." 
John18:6 Tua lai takin Zeisu in, “Kei tua pa ka hi hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin amaute nunglamah kin uh a, lei ah a puk uh hi." 
John18:7 Tua ciangin Zeisu in, “Note in kua zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot kik leh, amaute in, “Nazareth mi Zeisu ka zong uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John18:8 Zeisu in, “Kei tua pa ka hi hi kong ci zo hi,” a ci hi." 
John18:9 ‘Kei na hong piak mite khat beek a mangthang kei hi,’ a cihna thu a tun’ nadingin Zeisu in, “Kei hong zong na hih uh leh, hih mite paikhia ta hen!” a ci hi." 
John18:10 Tua lai takin Simon Piter in a namsau puak a dawh khit ciangin, siampi ukpa’ silapa sat a, a taklam bil a satkhia hi. Tua silapa min in Malkhas ahi hi." 
John18:11 Tua lai takin Zeisu in Piter kiangah, “Namsau a pai sungah siat kik in. Pa in kei hong piak hai dawn lo ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a gen hi." 
John18:12 Tua lai takin galkapte akipan galkap mangpa leh Judah upa nasemte in Zeisu a man uh a; khau tawh a hen khit uh ciangin," 
John18:13 Annas kiangah a paipih masa uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Annas in tua kuma siampi ukpa Kai-afas’ sungpa ahi hi." 
John18:14 Tua Kai-afas in, “Mite tangdingin mi khat a sih leh a pha hi,” ci-a Judah mite tawh a vaihawmpa ahi hi." 
John18:15 Simon Piter leh adang nungzuite khat in Zeisu nung a zui uh hi. Tua nungzuipa in siampi ukpa tawh kimeeltheih a, Zeisu tawh siampi ukpa’ inn tualah a lut khawm hi." 
John18:16 Ahih hangin Piter in pualam kongpi kiangah a ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampi ukpa tawh a kimeeltheih nungzuipa paikhia a, kongpi a cing numei kiangah a gen khit ciangin Piter a lutsak hi." 
John18:17 Tua lai takin kongpi a cing numei in, “Nang hih mi’ nungzui khat hilo na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John18:18 Tua lai takin silate leh nasemte in meiphual cih uh a, tuasan takah mei awi-in a ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, khua a dam hi. Piter zong amaute tawh omkhawm a, ding-in mei a awi hi." 
John18:19 Tua ahih ciangin siampi ukpa in ama nungzuite leh ama thuhilhna thu Zeisu kiangah a dong hi. 
John18:20 Zeisu in, “Leitung mite mai-ah a kilangin ka gen zo hi. Judah mite’ kikhopna innte leh biakna innpi sungah a tawntungin thu ka hilh a, thu ka hilhsim ngei kei hi." 
John18:21 Bang dingin kei hong dong na hi hiam? Ka thu hong zate kiangah bang thu ka gen cih na dong in. Ka thugenna amaute in a thei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:22 Tua bangin a dawn’ ciangin, a kianga ding nasemte khat in, “Tua bangin siampi ukpa na dawngkik hiam?” ci-in a khut tawh Zeisu a beeng hi." 
John18:23 Zeisu in, “Aman lo ka gen leh, aman lohna hong lak in. Aman ka gen leh bang hangin hong beeng na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng kik hi." 
John18:24 Tua ciangin Annas in siampi ukpa Kai-afas kiangah kihensa-in Zeisu a paisak hi. 
John18:25 Tua lai takin Simon Piter ding a, mei a awi lai takin amaute in, “Nang Zeisu a nungzui khat hilo na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin, “Ka hi kei hi,” ci-in a nial hi." 
John18:26 Piter in a bil a satpa tawh a kibeh, siampi ukpa’ sila khat in Piter kiangah, “Nang Zeisu tawh huan sungah hong mu hilo ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
John18:27 Piter in a nial kik hi. Tua ciangin thakhatin aak a khuang hi. 
John18:28 Tua ahih ciangin amau in Kai-afas kiang pan mang innah a paipih uh hi. Tua laitak in zingsang tung ahi hi. Amaute in Paisan pawi a nek theih nadingun kisian’suah nuam uh ahih manin mang inn sungah a tum kei uh hi. 
John18:29 Tua ahih ciangin Pilat in amaute kiangah paikhia a, “Hih mi’ tungah mawhsakna bang na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John18:30 Amaute in, “Hih pa migilo hi kei leh, nang kiangah kong pia kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John18:31 Tua ahih ciangin Pilat in, “Hih pa la un la, note ngeina bangin thu na khen un,” a ci hi. Judah mite in, “Kote in mi thah theih nading thu ka nei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John18:32 Tua bang a cihna in, Zeisu in bangci a sih ding ci-in lim lak a, a genkholh mah bangin a tun’ nading ahi hi." 
John18:33 Pilat mang inn sungah a lut khit ciangin Zeisu sam a, “Nang Judah Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John18:34 Zeisu in, “Nangma ut bangin hih bangin hong dong na hi hiam? Ahih kei leh, midangte in keima thu hong gen zo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:35 Pilat in, “Judah mi na hi hiam? Nangma mipawlte leh siampi liante in nang kei khut sungah hong pia uh hi. Nang in bang hih khial na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
John18:36 Zeisu in, “Keima gam in leitung gam ahi kei hi. Keima gam in leitung gam hi leh, Judah mite khut sung ka tun’ loh nading ka mite in a do ding uh hi. Tu-in, ka gam in hih lai takah a om kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John18:37 Pilat in, “Tua bang ahih leh, nang Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Zeisu in, “Kumpipa na hi nong ci hi. Kei ka hih leh, thuman thutak ading teci pang dingin ah leitungah kong kum a, kong suak hi. Thuman thutak a deih mi khempeuh in keima’ aw a ngai uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John18:38 Pilat in, “Thuman thutak bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua thu a gen khit ciangin Judah mite kiangah paikhia a, “Hih mi tungah mawhna ka mu kei hi." 
John18:39 Ahih hangin Paisan Pawi khamna-ah mi khat no kiangah ka khah ding ngeina khat a om hi. Tua ahih ciangin no kiangah Judahte’ Kumpipa ka khah ding nong awi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
John18:40 Amaute in, “Hih mi khah ding ka deih kei uh hi; Barabbas na khah ding ka deih uh hi,” ci-in nakpi-in kiko kikin a ngen uh hi. Barabbas in misuampa ahi hi." 
John19:1 Tua lai takin Pilat in Zeisu a sap khit ciangin a satsak hi. 
John19:2 Galkapte in ling tawh lukhu ganin ama lu tangah a khusak uh a, puanza san a silhsak khit uh ciangin," 
John19:3 “Judahte’ Kumpipa aw, nang na ci dam ta hen!” ci-in khut tawh a beeng uh hi." 
John19:4 Pilat va paikhia kik a, “Hih mi tungah bangmah mawhna ka muh loh na theih nadingun note kiangah kong lakhia hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:5 Tua ahih ciangin, Zeisu in ling lukhu khu-in, puanza san silhin a paikhia hi. Pilat in, “En un, hih pa,” a ci hi." 
John19:6 Siampi liante leh upate in Zeisu a muh uh ciangin, “Singlamteh tungah that in! “Singlamteh tungah that in!” ci-in a kiko kik uh hi. Pilat in, “Nomau in amah la un la, singlamteh tungah that un. Ama tungah mawhna ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:7 Tua ciangin Judah mite in, “Kote in thukhamna ka nei uh hi. Tua thu tawh kituakin hih pa si dingin kilawm hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah in, ‘Pasian’ Tapa ka hi hi,’ a ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
John19:8 Tua thu Pilat in a zak ciangin lau semsem a; 
John19:9 mang inn sungah lut kikin, “Nang koi pan hong piang na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, Zeisu in kamkhat beek a dawng kei hi." 
John19:10 Tua ahih ciangin Pilat in, “Kei kiangah thu hong gen nuam lo na hi hiam? Keimah in nang kong khah nading thu ahi zongin, singlamteh tungah thah nading thu ahi zongin ka neih thei lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John19:11 Zeisu in, “Tung lam pan thu na ngah kei leh, kei tungah bangmah na hih thei kei ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin nangma khut sungah kei a hong piapa in khialhna golzaw a nei hi,” ci-in a thuk hi." 
John19:12 Tua a kipanin Pilat in Zeisu a khah nading a zong zaw hi. Ahih hangin Judah mite in, “Hih pa na khah leh, Kaisar kumpipa’ lawm na hi kei hi; Kaisar kumpipa’ gal ahi kumpipa-a kibawl tawm mi na hi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John19:13 Tua thu a zak ciangin Pilat in Zeisu paikhiatpih a, Hebru kamin ‘Gabbatha’ kici ‘Suangphah’ a cihna munah thukhenna tokhom tungah a tu hi." 
John19:14 Tua lai takin, Paisan pawi kigin ni sun lai tak nai sawm leh nai nih ahi hi. Pilat in, Judah mite kiangah, “En un, note’ Kumpipa,” ci-a a gen ciangin" 
John19:15 amaute in, “Tua pa that in, tua pa that in, singlamteh tungah that in!” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Pilat in, “Note’ Kumpipa singlamteh tungah that ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Kaisar kumpipa longal adang kumpipa ka nei kei uh hi,” ci-in siampi liante in a dawng kik uh hi." 
John19:16 Tua ciangin, Pilat in Zeisu singlamteh tungah thah dingin amaute’ khut sungah a pia hi." 
John19:17 Tua lai takin amaute in Zeisu la-in a paipih uh hi. Zeisu in ama singlamteh pua a, Hebru kamin ‘Golgotha’ kici ‘Lutangguh Mun’ kicihna ah pai dingin a paikhia hi." 
John19:18 Tua san takah amaute in Zeisu singlamteh tungah a khai uh hi. Amah tawh a lang tuakah mi nih zong a khai uh hi. Zeisu a lai zangah a om hi. 
John19:19 Pilat in laigelh a, singlamteh tungah a suang hi. Tua lai in, “JUDAHTE’ KUMPIPA, NAZARETH KHUAMI ZEISU AHI HI,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
John19:20 Hih lai Judah mi tampite in a sim uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu singlamteh tungah a kithahna mun in khuapi tawh kinai a; Hebru kam, Latin kam leh Grik kam tawh a kigelh hi." 
John19:21 Tua ahih ciangin, Judah siampi liante in Pilat kiangah va pai uh a, ‘Judahte’ Kumpipa, ci-in gelh kei in; ‘Kei in Judahte’ Kumpipa ka hi hi, a ci hi,’ ci-in laigelh in,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John19:22 Pilat in, “Ka gelhsa in ka gelhsa hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:23 Galkapte in Zeisu singlamteh tungah a khai khit uh ciangin, a puante la a, seh li suahin seh khat ciatin a hawm uh a; puanak zong a la uh hi. Hih puanak kikhui loin a lu pan a taw dongin a kiphan ahi hi." 
John19:24 Tua ahih ciangin, “Hih puan balkeek kei ni. Kua in ngah ding hiam lai-ai i saan ding hi,” ci-in, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna thu a tun’ nadingin galkapte a kikum uh hi. Tua thu in: “Amaute khat leh khat in ka puan a hawm uh hi; Ka puan tungah lai-ai a saan uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi. Galkapte in tua thu a bawl uh hi." 
John19:25 Zeisu’ singlamteh kiangah a nu leh a nu’ sanggamnu, Klopas’ zi Mari leh Magdala khua Mari-te a ding uh hi." 
John19:26 Tua hi a, Zeisu in a nu leh a it nungzuipa a kianga ding a muh ciangin, “Numei aw, nang in na tapa en in!” a ci hi." 
John19:27 A nungzuipa kiangah, “Nang na nu en in!” a ci hi. Tua akipanin tua nungzuipa in, Zeisu’ nu ama innah a khoi hi." 
John19:28 Tua nung ciangin Zeisu in thu khempeuh kizo khin zo cih a theih ciangin, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin a tun’ nadingin, “Tui ka duh hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:29 Tua munah tuikha tawh kidim beel khat om a, amaute in tuipaan khat tuikha sungah a diah khit uh ciangin, pumpeeng dawnah bulhin ama kamah a bak uh hi." 
John19:30 Tua hi a, Zeisu in tui a ngah khit ciangin, “A zo zo hi,” ci-a a lu su-in a si hi." 
John19:31 Tua ni in kigin ni ahih ciangin, Nipi ni-in a luang singlamteh tungah a om loh nadingin, Judah mite in Pilat kiangah a khe kuaitanin a luang a paihkhiat nading thu a va ngen uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tua Nipi ni in ni lian mahmah ahi hi." 
John19:32 Tua ahih ciangin galkapte hong pai uh a, Zeisu tawh singlamteh tungah kithat mi khat’ khe a kuaih tan khit uh ciangin, adang khatpa’ khe a kuaitan uh hi." 
John19:33 Zeisu kiang a tun’ uh ciangin amah si zo ta cih a muh uh ciangin, a khe a kuaitan kei uh hi." 
John19:34 Ahih hangin galkap khat in a pang teipi tawh sun a, si leh tui thakhatin a luangkhia hi." 
John19:35 Tua thu a mu mi in teci a pang hi. Ama teci pan’na thu aman hi. Note in na up theih nadingun ama genna thu aman hi ci-in a thei hi. 
John19:36 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, “A guh khat beek a kikuaitan kei ding hi,” ci-a Lai Siangtho sungah a gen bangin a tun’ nadingin hih teng a kibawl hi." 
John19:37 Adang Lai Siangtho sungah “Tua mite in amaute sutpa a en ding uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
John19:38 Tua nung ciangin, Arimathea khua Josef in Judah mite a kihtak manin a kilang loin Zeisu’ thu a zui mi hi a; Zeisu’ luang a paipih nadingin Pilat kiangah a ngen hi. Pilat in thu a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua pa hong pai a, Zeisu’ luang a paipih hi." 
John19:39 Nidanga zan lai taka Zeisu kiangah a pai Nikodemas in pound zakhat a khai mirrah leh aloes kihel paknamtui a paipih hi. 
John19:40 Tua lai takin amaute in Zeisu’ luang la uh a, Judah mite’ kivui ngeina bangin paknamtui tawh dial sungah a tun uh hi." 
John19:41 Singlamteh tungah thahna mun tawh kinai-ah huan khat om a, tua huan sungah kuama kivui ngei lohna han thak khat a om hi." 
John19:42 Judah mite kigin kholh ni nai ahih ciangin, tua hanah Zeisu a vui uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tua han a nai hi." 
John20:1 Ni sagih lakah a kipat ni, khuavak ma zingtungin Magdala khua Mari hanah pai a, han kong khakna suang kilakhia zo-a om a mu hi." 
John20:2 Tua ahih ciangin tai mengmeng a, Piter leh Zeisu’ it nungzuipa kiangah tungin, “Han sung pan Topa’ luang a paikhiatpih zo uh hi. Koi lai takah a koih uh hiam ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John20:3 Tua lai takin, Piter leh adang nungzuipa paikhia uh a, han lamah a tai uh hi." 
John20:4 Amaute nih a kibangin a tai uh hi; ahih hangin adang nungzuipa in Piter makhelhin han a tung masa hi. 
John20:5 Amah kunsukin a sung a et ciangin dial puan a om a muh ciangin han sungah a lut kei hi. 
John20:6 Simon Piter in a nung zui a, a tun’ ciangin han sungah lut a;" 
John20:7 dial puan a om hangin, a lu tunna puan tawh omkhawm loin a tuamtuak a, kizialin a om a mu hi." 
John20:8 Tua lai takin, han a tung masa adang nungzuipa zong han sungah lut a, a muh ciangin a um hi." 
John20:9 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu in sihna pan thokik ding a cihna Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu a thei nai kei uh hi." 
John20:10 Tua ahih ciangin tua nungzuite amau innah a ciah uh hi. 
John20:11 Ahih hangin Mari in han pua lamah ding-in a kap hi. A kah lai takin kunsuk-in han sung en a," 
John20:12 vantungmi nih puanpak silhin Zeisu’ luang a kisialna a lu lam ah khat, a taw lam ah khat tu-a om a mu hi." 
John20:13 Amaute in, “Numei aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam?” ci-a a dot uh ciangin Mari in, “Ka Topa a paikhiatpih zo uh a, koi-ah a koih uh cih ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:14 Tua banga a gen khit ciangin a nung lam a kihei leh, Zeisu ding-a om a mu hi; ahih hangin Zeisu a hih lam a thei kei hi." 
John20:15 Zeisu in, “Numei aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Kua zong na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, Mari in Zeisu pen huan cingpa a sak man-inah, “Topa aw, amah na paikhiatpih leh koi-ah na koih hiam hong gen in. Keimah in ka va la ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:16 Zeisu in, “Mari aw,” a cih ciangin Mari kihei a, Hebru kamin, “Rabboni aw,” a ci hi. Rabboni a khiatna in ‘Topa’ a cihnopna hi." 
John20:17 Zeisu in, “Hong len kei in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, ka Pa kiangah ka kahto nai kei hi. Ka sanggamte kiangah pai in la, ‘Ka Pa ahi note’ Pa, ka Pasian ahi note’ Pasian kiangah ka kahto ding hi,’ ci-in amaute kiangah va gen in,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
John20:18 Tua mah bangin Magdala khua Mari zong pai a, “Topa ka mu zo a, tua thute hong gen zo hi,” ci-in a nungzuite kiangah a gen hi." 
John20:19 Ni sagih lakah ni kipat ni, a nitak ciangin Judah mite a kihtak man-unah a nungzuite in kikhopna-ah kongkhakte khakin a om uh a, tua sungah Zeisu hong lut a, amau lai zangah ding-in, “Nopna na ngah ta un!” a ci hi." 
John20:20 Tua bang a cih khit ciangin a khut leh a pang a lak hi. Tua nungzuite in Topa a muh uh ciangin a lungdam uh hi. 
John20:21 Zeisu in khatvei, “Nopna na ngah ta un, Pa in kei hong sawl bangin note kong sawl hi,” a ci kik hi." 
John20:22 Tua ciangin amaute tungah mut a, “Kha Siangtho na sang ta un." 
John20:23 Mi’ mawhna na maisak uh leh, tua mi’ mawhna kimaisak ding hi. Mi’ mawhna na maisak kei uh leh, tua mi’ mawhna kimaisak lo ding hi,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
John20:24 Zeisu hong pai lai takin, sawm-le-nihte laka khat Didimas kici Thomas in amaute tawh a omkhawm kei hi." 
John20:25 Tua ahih ciangin nungzui dangte in, “Topa ka mu zo uh hi,” ci-in Thomas kiangah a gen uh ciangin amah in, “A khut a, sikkhetna pawn mu-in, sikkhetna pawn sung ka khutme tawh lawng a, ama pang zong ka khut tawh ka lawn’ kei leh, ka um kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:26 Tua nung ni giat ni ciangin, a nungzuite inn sungah khatvei kikhawm kik uh a, Thomas zong a om hi. Kongkhakte a kikhak lai takin Zeisu zong hong pai a, amau laizang ah ding-a “Nopna na ngah ta un,” a ci hi." 
John20:27 Tua lai takin Thomas kiangah, “Na khutmete zan in la, ka khut en in. Na khut zan in la, ka pang hong lawng in, um khial kei in la, um in,” a ci hi." 
John20:28 Thomas in, “Ka Topa leh ka Pasian aw,” a cih ciangin," 
John20:29 Zeisu in, “Nong muh man-inah um na hi hiam? Hong mu lo napi-in a um mite in thupha a ngah uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:30 Hih laibu sungah a kigelh lo lim dang tampi zong Zeisu in a nungzuite mai-ah a lak hi. 
John20:31 Zeisu in Khazih hi a, Pasian’ Tapa ahih note’n na up theih nading uh leh, ama min umin tua min hangin nuntakna na ngah theih nadingun hih laibu a kigelh zo hi." 
John21:1 Tua nung ciangin, Tiberias tuili geiah a nungzuite kiangah Zeisu a kilak hi. A kilahna thu in hih bang ahi hi." 
John21:2 Simon Piter leh Didimas kici Thomas akipan, Galile gam Kana khuami Nathanael leh Zebedi’ tate nih in adang nungzuite nih tawh a omkhawm uh hi." 
John21:3 Simon Piter in, “Kei nga beng dingin pai ning,” a cih ciangin, “Ko zong kong pai ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Amaute paikhia uh a, gunkuang sungah lutin tua zanin ngasa khat beek a man kei uh hi." 
John21:4 Khua a vak lai takin Zeisu tui geiah a ding hi. Ahih hangin Zeisu ahih lam a nungzuite in a thei kei uh hi. 
John21:5 Tua lai takin Zeisu in, “Ka taneute aw, ngasa na man uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Ka man het kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng kik uh hi." 
John21:6 Zeisu in, “Khatvei gunkuang ziat lamah ngen na paai un. Tua hi leh ngasa na man ding uh hi,” ci-in a hilh hi. Tua bangin amau in ngen a paih uh leh, ngasa tampi khuhkha uh ahih ciangin, ngen a kai zo kei uh hi." 
John21:7 Tua lai takin Zeisu’ it nungzuipa in Piter kiangah, “Topa ahi hi,” a ci hi. Topa ahih lam Simon Piter in a theih ciangin, puanak tungsilh guak tawh tuili sungah a tuaksuk hi." 
John21:8 A dang nungzuite in tui gei tawh kigamla lo, lam sawmnga bek kihal ahih maninah ngasa tawh kidim ngen a kai uh a, gunkuang tungah tuangin a pai uh hi." 
John21:9 Amaute leilak a tun’ uh ciangin mei-am leh a am tungah ngasa leh khomun kihanga om a mu uh hi. 
John21:10 Zeisu in, “Tu-a na mat uh ngasa kimkhat hong paipih un,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
John21:11 Simon Piter gunkuang tungah kahto-in ngasa za leh sawmnga leh thum tawh a dim ngen lei ah a kaito hi. Tua zahin a tam hangin ngen a kikeek kei hi. 
John21:12 Zeisu in, “Hong pai un la, zing an ne un,” a ci hi. Topa ahih lam a nungzuite in a theih uh ciangin, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in kuamah in a dong ngam kei uh hi." 
John21:13 Zeisu hong pai a, khomun leh ngasa a lak khit ciangin amaute a pia hi." 
John21:14 Hih kilakna in Zeisu sihna pan a thawhkik khit ciangin, a nungzuite kiangah thumvei a kilakna ahi hi." 
John21:15 Tua ahih ciangin an a nek khit uh ciangin Zeisu in, “Johan’ tapa Simon aw, hih mite in kei hong it sangin nang hong itzaw na hi hiam?” ci-in Simon Piter a dong hi. Piter in, “Ahi hi, Topa aw, nang kong it na thei hi,” a cih ciangin, “Ka tuunote na vak in,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
John21:16 Khatvei Zeisu in Piter kiangah, “Johan’ tapa Simon aw, kei hong it na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Ahi hi, Topa aw, nang kong it na thei hi,” a cih ciangin, “Ka tuute na cing in,” a ci hi." 
John21:17 Zeisu in, “Johan’ tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in thumveina a dong hi. “Nang in kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in thumvei a dot man-inah Piter dah a, “Topa aw, nang in na khempeuh na thei a, ke’n nang kong it na thei hi,” a cih ciangin Zeisu in, “Ka tuute na vak in." 
John21:18 Ke’n aman takpi kong cih-inah, nang na tangval lai-in na kawng gakin, na utna mun khempeuh ah na pai thei hi. Ahih hangin na teek ciangin na khut zan-inah midangte in nang hong hen ding uh a, na ut lohna munah hong paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John21:19 Tua a genna in, Piter in bang ci-in a sihna tawh Pasian minthangsak ding cih lim a lah nopna ahi hi. Tua thu a gen khit ciangin Piter kiangah, “Ka nung hong zui in,” ci-in a gen hi." 
John21:20 Zeisu in nitak an a nek lai takin a ang-ah kingam a, “Topa aw, nang kua in hong lehheek ding hiam?” ci-a a dong Zeisu’ it nungzuipa Piter in kihei-in a muh ciangin," 
John21:21 Piter in Zeisu kiangah, “Topa aw, hih mipa in bang ahih ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John21:22 Zeisu in, “Kong paikik hun matengin hih mi a om nading ka ut leh, nang in bang phamawhsa na hi hiam? Nang na hih leh, ka nung hong zui in,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
John21:23 Tua thu hangin sanggamte in, “Tua nungzuipa a si kei ding hi,” ci-in a gen thang uh hi. Ahih hangin, “A si kei ding hi,” ci-in Zeisu in a ci kei hi. “Kong paikik hun matengin tua pa a om nading ka ut leh, nang in bang phamawhsa na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John21:24 Hih thu khempeuh ading teci pang a, a gelhpa in tua nungzuipa ahi hi. Ama teci pan’na aman hi ci-in kote in ka thei uh hi." 
John21:25 Zeisu’ hihna thu adang tampi a om lai hi. Tua ahih nate khempeuh gelh khin lehang a kigelhna laibu leitungah ta zo lo ding hi ci-in ka um hi. 
Acts1:1 Theofilas aw, Zeisu in ama teelsa sawltakte Kha Siangtho tawh a vaikhak khit ciangin," 
Acts1:2 a tunglam a kilaktoh ni dong matengin a bawlsa leh a thuhilh khempeuh, a masa lai sungah ka gelh zo hi." 
Acts1:3 Tua Zeisu in gimna a thuak khit ciangin amau kiangah ni sawmli tawntung kilangin, hihna tampi tawh a nungta taktak ahihna lak a, Pasian’ Gam thu a hilh hi." 
Acts1:4 Tua sawltakte tawh a omkhawm lai takin, Jerusalem khuapi panin paikhia loin, “Keimah kiangah na zaksa uh Pa’ kamciamna letsong na ngak un." 
Acts1:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Johan in tui sungah hong baptaiz hi. Ahih hangin a sawt loin note in Kha Siangtho sungah na kibaptaiz ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts1:6 Amaute a kikhop lai takun, “Topa aw, tu lai takin Israel mipawlte in amau gam na ki-uksak kik ding hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Acts1:7 Zeisu in, “Pa in ama ukna-ah a koihsa a hun ahi zongin, a ni ahi zongin na theih nadingun thu a om kei hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahih hangin Kha Siangtho in nomau tungah hong kumsuk khit ciangin vangliatna na ngah ding uh a, Jerusalem khua-a kipan Judah gam, Samaria gam khempeuh leh leimong dongin ka teci na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts1:9 Tua thu a gen khit ciangin sawltakte in a et lai takun, Zeisu vantung lamah kilato a, amau in a muh loh nadingun meii khat in a liah hi." 
Acts1:10 Zeisu a paito amaute in vantungah a et cian lai takun, mi nih in puanpaak silhin amau kiangah dingin," 
Acts1:11 “Galile mite aw, bang hangin vantung lam ento na hi uh hiam? Note kiang pan vantungah a kilato Zeisu in vantungah a pai na muh uh bangin khatvei hong kumsuk kik ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts1:12 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua tawh kinai, Nipi ni pai theih tan a gamla Oliv Mual panin sawltakte Jerusalem khua-ah a paikik uh hi." 
Acts1:13 A tun’ uh ciangin Piter, Johan, Jeim leh Andru, Filip leh Thomas, Bartholomai leh Mattiu, Alfe-as’ tapa Jeim, Simon Zealot leh Jeim’ tapa Judas-te a tun’na uh inndei tungah a paito uh hi." 
Acts1:14 Tua mi khempeuhte in Zeisu’ nu Mari a kipan numeite leh Zeisu’ sanggamte tawh lungsim kikhatin thu a ngen niloh uh hi. 
Acts1:15 Tua lai takin mi za leh sawmnihte a kikhop lai takun, Piter in amau laizang ah ding-a" 
Acts1:16 “Ute naute aw, Zeisu a man mite lam hilhpa Judas Iskariot thu Kha Siangtho in David’ kam sung panin thu hong genkholh Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu a tun’ nading a om hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in kote tawh kisimkhawm a, thuhilhna za a ngah zo hi." 
Acts1:17  
Acts1:18 (Tua pa in a gilohna thaman tawh lo khat a lei khit ciangin, a bungbu-in kia a, a gilpi kitamin a gil khempeuh a buakhia hi." 
Acts1:19 Tua thute Jerusalem khua-ah mite in a zak uh ciangin amau kam in tua lo “Akeldama” ci uh a, tua in “Sisan’ Lo” a cihnopna hi)." 
Acts1:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “Ama omna mundai suak hen, Ama omna-ah kuamah teeng kei hen,” cih leh, “Ama za midang khat in ngah ta hen,” ci-in Late Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh hi." 
Acts1:21 Tua ahih ciangin Johan’ baptaizna pana kipan Topa Zeisu in eite tawh a kikhen ni dongin, a sungah a lutkhawm, a pusuak khawm lai takin," 
Acts1:22 kote tawh a tawntung a kikhawl mite sung panin khat in kote tawh Zeisu’ thawhkikna thu teci a suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts1:23 Tua ciangin mi nih, Barsabbas kici, a mindang Justas ahi Josef leh Matthias a teel uh hi." 
Acts1:24 “Mi khempeuh’ lungsim a thei Topa aw," 
Acts1:25 Judas in ama omna phualah pai dingin thuhilh-za leh sawltak-za pan tawp kik a, tua za a ngah dingin hih mi nih lakah na teel penpen hong lak in,” ci-in thu a nget khit uh ciangin lai-ai a san uh a," 
Acts1:26 Matthias in a ngah ciangin sawltak sawm-le-khatte tawh a kisimkhawm hi. 
Acts2:1 Pentekost pawikham ni a tun’ ciangin amaute khempeuh mun khatah a omkhawm uh hi. 
Acts2:2 Tua lai takin huihpi nung bangin vantung panin awging khat thakhatin hong suak a, amau tutna inn a dim sak hi." 
Acts2:3 Tua lai takin meikuang tawh kibang leiite kikhenin, amaute kiangah kilang uh a, amau a vekpi tungah tung kim uh a," 
Acts2:4 amaute khempeuh in Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin, Kha Siangtho in thu a piak bangin kam tuamtuam tawh thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts2:5 Tua lai takin van nuai gam khempeuh panin a hong pai, Pasian a zahtak Judah mite Jerusalem khua-ah a om uh hi." 
Acts2:6 Tua awging a zak uh ciangin mihonpi kikhawm uh a, mi kim in ama kam ciat tawh thu a gen a zak ciangun lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Acts2:7 Amaute khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh a, lungmangin, “Hih thuhilhte khempeuh in Galile mite hilo ahi uh hiam?" 
Acts2:8 Tua bang ahih leh, eite a tuamtuam i pian’pih kam tawh bang ci-in i za thei hiam?" 
Acts2:9 Parthia mi a kipan Media mi, Elam mi, Mesopotamia gam, Judah gam, Kappadokia gam, Pontas gam, Asia gam," 
Acts2:10 Frigia gam, Pamfilia gam, Izipt gam, Sairin khua kimkot Libia gam sungah a teeng mite, Rom khua pan hong pai zinte," 
Acts2:11 Judah mi ahi zongin, Judah ngeina sungah a tum mite ahi zongin, Krete leh Arab ahi eite khempeuh in Pasian’ nalamdangte eite’ kam tawh hong gen uh i za hi!”a ci uh hi. Amaute khempeuh in lamdangsa-in lung-am uh a, “Bang ahi hiam?” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Acts2:12  
Acts2:13 Mi kimkhat in, “Hih mite in leenggahzu thak a kham uh hi,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Acts2:14 Tua lai takin sawm leh khatte tawh Piter ding a, kiko-in tua mite kiangah thu a hilh inah: “Jerusalem khua-ah a teengte khempeuh leh Judah mite aw, note in hih thu na thei un la, ka thu a tel takin na ngai ta un." 
Acts2:15 Tu hun in zingsang nai kua ahih ciangin na up uh bangin hih mite in zukhamin a om kei uh hi. 
Acts2:16 Hih thute in kamsangpa Joel in a hilh ngeisa thu ahi hi. 
Acts2:17 ‘A nunung nite ciangin Mi khempeuh tungah ka Kha ka bua ding hi. Na tapate na tanute un thu hilhkhol ding uh hi. Na tangvalte un mang a mu ding uh a, Na puteekte un mang a man’ ding uh hi." 
Acts2:18 Tua lai takin ka nasem pasal leh numeite tungah, Ka kha ka bua ding a, thu a hilhkhol ding uh hi." 
Acts2:19 Tunglam vantungah nalamdang ka lak ding a, Van nuai leitungah lim ka lak ding hi. Si tawh, meikuang tawh, meikhu tawh ka lak ding hi." 
Acts2:20 Topa’ Ni vanglian leh lamdang hong tun’ ma-in Ni hong mial ding a, Kha in sisan a suak ding hi." 
Acts2:21 Tua lai takin Topa’ min tawh thu a ngen peuhmahte in Gupna a ngah ding uh hi, ci-in Pasian in a gen hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts2:22 “No Israel mite aw, hih thu na ngai ta un. No na theih uh mah bangin Pasian in Nazareth mi Zeisu tungah vangliatnate leh nalamdangte leh lungman’nate, note lakah hong hih theihna tawh Pasian in note kiangah tua Zeisu a dik hi ci-in a lak hi." 
Acts2:23 Tua Zeisu Pasian’ hanciamna leh theihkholhna hangah a kipiak khit ciangin note in migilote’ khut tungah pia-in singlamteh tungah na sisak uh hi. 
Acts2:24 Ahih hangin sihna in tua pa lencip zo lo ahih ciangin Pasian in sihna gimna a sutkhiat khit ciangin, a hing kiksak hi." 
Acts2:25 David in tua mi a genkholhna in: ‘Kei in Topa Pasian ka maitang ah a om ka mu tawntung hi, Bang hang hiam i cih leh, ka kikhin theih loh nadingin ka ziat lamah a om hi." 
Acts2:26 Tua ahih ciangin ka lungdam a, Ka leii zong a nuam hi. Tua tham loin, ka sa in lamenin a nungta ding hi." 
Acts2:27 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, nangmah in ka Kha, Sihna gam sungah na nusia kei ding hi. Na Misiangtho zong muatna na thuaksak kei ding hi." 
Acts2:28 Nangmah in nuntakna Lampi nong hilh zo a, Na meel mu-in lungdamna tawh Kei nong dimsak ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts2:29 “Ute naute aw, pian’na pu David thu a tel takin note kiangah kong gen-inah, tua David si a, a kivuina han in tuni dongin eite kiangah a om hi." 
Acts2:30 Amah in kamsangpa hi a, ama suan sung pan mi khat ama tokhom tungah a tusak ding hi ci-in Pasian in a kiciam hi cih theikhol ahih ciangin Khazih’ thawhkikna thu a gen hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua Zeisu pen sihna gam sungah kinusia lo a, a sa in zong muatna a thuak kei hi." 
Acts2:31  
Acts2:32 Tua Zeisu Pasian in a thawhkiksakna thu kote khempeuh in teci ka hi uh hi. 
Acts2:33 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Pasian’ ziat lamah pahtawina ngah a, Pa kiangah Kha Siangtho kiciamna a ngah khit ciangin, no na muh na zak uh nate hong bua zo hi." 
Acts2:34 David in vantung ah a kahto kei hi. Ahih hangin amah in: ‘Topa in ka to kumpipa tungah, Na galte nangma khe ngakna-in ka bawl matengin" 
Acts2:35 Ka taklam ah tu in,’ a ci hi." 
Acts2:36 Tua ahih ciangin note in singlamteh tungah na thah uh Zeisu pen Pasian in Topa leh Khazih a suaksak hi ci-in Israel mi khempeuh in a man takpi thei ta uh hen,” a ci hi." 
Acts2:37 Tua mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lung uh vut a, “Ute naute aw, bang ka ci hih ding uh hiam?” ci-in Piter a kipan adang sawltakte kiangah a dong uh hi." 
Acts2:38 Piter in, “Na mawhnate uh kisikkik un la, na vekpi un, mawh kimaisak nadingin Zeisu Khazih’ min tawh kibaptaiz un, Tua bang na hih uh leh, Kha Siangtho’ thupha letsong na ngah ding uh hi." 
Acts2:39 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, kiciamna in note leh na tate uh ahi zongin, gamla-ah a om Topa i Pasian in a sap ding mi khempeuh ading ahi hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts2:40 “Hih gilo khang mite lak panin kigumkhia un,” ci-in thudang tampi tawh hansuah a, thu a hilh hi." 
Acts2:41 Tua thu a mang mite in kibaptaiz uh a, tua ni-in mi tulthum bang a kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts2:42 Amaute in sawltakte’ thuhilhna a mang uh a, kipawl khawmna, khomun balnenna leh thungetna a bawl tawntung uh hi." 
Acts2:43 Mi khempeuh a lau uh a, sawltakte in nalamdang tampi leh lim tampi a bawl uh hi." 
Acts2:44 Thu-um mi khempeuh pawlkhat bekin a om uh a, amaute neihsa khempeuh gawmin a zangkhawm uh hi." 
Acts2:45 Amaute in a neih a lamte uh a zuak khit uh ciangin mite’ kisapna bangin a hawmsak uh hi. 
Acts2:46 Amaute in biakna innpi sungah ni simin lungsim kituakin a om uh a, amau innah anlum balnenin, a siangtho lungdamna tawh anne tuidawn uh a, Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Acts2:47 Mi khempeuh mai-ah maipha a ngah uh hi. Gupna a ngah mite zong ni simin Pasian in a kibehlapsak hi. 
Acts3:1 Tua lai takin Piter leh Johan in thungetna hun nai thum lai takin biakna innpi-ah a kahtoh lai takun," 
Acts3:2 a nu gil sung pan a khebai mi khat midangte in pua uh a, biakna innpi-a lut mite kiangah khutdawh ngen dingin Hoih Kongkhak kici gei-ah ni simin a koih uh hi." 
Acts3:3 Piter leh Johan-te in biakna innpi sungah a lut ding uh tua pa in a muh ciangin a khut dawhin hehpihna a ngen hi. 
Acts3:4 Piter leh Johan in tua pa lim takin en uh a, “Hong en in,” a cih uh ciangin," 
Acts3:5 amah in na khat peuhmah a ngah ding lamenin sawltakte a ento hi. 
Acts3:6 Piter in, “Kham leh ngun ka nei kei hi. Ahih hangin ka neihsa kong pia ding hi." 
Acts3:7 Nazareth khua mi Zeisu Khazih’ min tawh tho in la, kalsuan in,” ci-in a ziatlam khut lenin a phot lai takin a khepeek leh a siakmit guh hat a," 
Acts3:8 thakhatin tho a, a din’ khit ciangin lam pai-in diang a, Pasian’ min phatin sawltakte tawh biakna innpi sungah a lutkhawm hi." 
Acts3:9 Tua bangin kalsuan a, Pasian’ min phatin a om, mihonpite in a muh uh ciangin," 
Acts3:10 biakna innpi Hoih Kongkhak gei-ah khutdawh ngen-a om mipa ahih lam thei uh a, ama tungah a piang thu hangin lamdangsakna leh lungman’na tawh a kidim uh hi." 
Acts3:11 Tua pa in Piter leh Johan beela a om lai takin Solomon’ Talap kici sungah mi khempeuh in lungmangin a tai uh a, amau kiangah a va kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts3:12 Piter in tua mite a muh ciangin, “Israel mite aw, hih thu bang hangin lamdangsa na hi uh hiam? Kote vangliatna leh phatna tawh kote in hih pa lam a paisak bangin bang hangin kote hong en gega na hi uh hiam?" 
Acts3:13 Abraham, Isaak leh Jakob’ Pasian, i pu i pate’ Pasian in ama Sila Zeisu a min thangsak zo hi. Note in tua Topa pen gam vaihawmte tungah pia-in, Pilat in khah ding a sawm hangin ama maitang ah tua pa na nial uh hi." 
Acts3:14 Note in Mi Pha Mi Siangtho na nial uh a, mi thatpa khah nadingin na ngen uh a," 
Acts3:15 nuntakna hong pia Mangpa na that tazen uh hi! Ahih hangin Pasian in amah a thawhkiksak thu kote in teci ka hi uh hi. 
Acts3:16 Tua min upna hangin tua Topa’ min in na muh na theih uh hih mi a hatsak hi. Ahi hi, tua Zeisu hanga kingah upna in nomau khempeuh mai-ah hih mi a kicingsak zo hi." 
Acts3:17 “Tu-in ute naute aw, note akipan no hong ukte in thei loin ahih uh ka thei hi." 
Acts3:18 Amah Khazih in gimna a thuak ding hi ci-in Pasian in kamsang khempeuhte’ kam tawh a genkholh bangin a tungsak khin zo hi. 
Acts3:19 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian kiang pan nopna hun hong tung a, note ading hong koihsa Khazih Zeisu hong paisak nadingin, note mawhna a sawpsiang nading na kisik un la, na lungsim uh na kikheel un." 
Acts3:20  
Acts3:21 Tanglai panin ama kamsang siangthote’ kam uh tawh a genkholh mah bangin na khempeuh a bawl thak kik hun matengin, vantung in Zeisu a sang ding hi." 
Acts3:22 Moses in, ‘Topa Pasian in nomau ute naute lakah keimah bangin kamsangpa khat note ading a piangsak ding hi. Amah in nomau kiangah thu a gen khempeuh na ngai ding uh hi." 
Acts3:23 Tua kamsangpa’ thugenna a ngai lo khempeuhte in amau pawl lak pan kimangthangsak ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts3:24 Samuel pan akipan Pasian’ kamsangte khempeuh leh a nung cianga hong piangte in a gen khempeuhte in, hih nite thu a genkhol zo uh hi." 
Acts3:25 Note in kamsangte’ suante na hi uh hi. Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Nang na suante hangin leitung mipawl khempeuh in thupha a ngah ding uh hi,’ ci-in na pute na pate uh tawh kiciamna a bawlpihte’ suante zong na hi uh hi." 
Acts3:26 Pasian in a Silapa hong thawhsak khit ciangin, note na vekpi un na khialhna uh pan hong kikheelsakin, note thupha hong pia dingin note kiangah hong paisak masa hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts4:1 Piter leh Johan in mihonpite kiangah thu a gen lai takun biakna innpi ukpa akipan siampite leh Saddusi mite hong pai uh a," 
Acts4:2 sawltakte in mite kiangah thu a hilh uh a, Zeisu hangin sihna pan thawhkikna thu a hilh manunah a lungmang uh hi." 
Acts4:3 Amaute a mat khit uh ciangin nitak ahih maninah, a zingsang dongin thong sungah a khum uh hi." 
Acts4:4 Ahih hangin thuhilhna a za mi tampite in um uh a, pasal teng tulnga bang a pha uh hi." 
Acts4:5 A zingsang ciangin amaute ukte, laitheite, siampi ukpa Annas, Kai-afas, Johan Alekzander akipan siampi ukpa’ suante khempeuh tawh Jerusalem khua-ah a kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts4:6  
Acts4:7 Amaute laizangah sawltakte ding sak uh a, “Note in bang vangliatna tawh, a kua min tawh, hih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Acts4:8 Tua lai takin Piter in Kha Siangtho tawh kidim a," 
Acts4:9 “Makaite leh upate aw, a zawngkhal mi khat tungah noptuamna pia a, ama cinatna bangci dam hiam ci-in note in tuni-in nong dot uh leh," 
Acts4:10 note in singlamteh tungah na thah khit uh ciangin, Pasian in sihna pan a thawhkik sak Nazareth mi Zeisu’ min tawh hih pa in note mai-ah cidamin a ding hi cih, note akipan Israel mi khempeuh in thei ta un." 
Acts4:11 Tua Topa in innlam note in na paih uh, a nung cianga kiukawi bul a suakkik suang ahi hi." 
Acts4:12 Tua mi simloh midang tungah gupna thu a om kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama min simloh eite’ gupna ngah nadingin hong kipia mindang khat beek van nuai mite lakah a om kei hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts4:13 Amaute in Piter leh Johan’ han’na mu uh a, lai siam lo, pilna hau lo ahih lam uh a theih uh ciangin lamdang a sa uh a, Zeisu tawh a omkhawm ngei zo uh hi ci-in a phawk uh hi." 
Acts4:14 Cidamna a ngahpa in amaute tawh ding khawma om a muh uh ciangin nial nading a mu zo kei uh hi. 
Acts4:15 Sawltakte vaihawmna pan a paikhiat ding uh thu a piak khit uh ciangin," 
Acts4:16 “Hih mite tungah bang i ci hih ding hiam? Amaute tung tawnin nalamdang lian a kilak zo hi ci-in Jerusalem khua mi khempeuh in a thei uh a, eite in i nial zo kei hi." 
Acts4:17 Ahih hangin mite lakah a kizelh semsem loh nadingin tu nung ciangin tua min tawh kuama kiangah thu hilh nawn lo dingin amaute tawngin thu pia ni,” ci-in khat le khat a kikum uh hi." 
Acts4:18 Tua ciangin sawltakte sam kik uh a, ‘Zeisu’ min tawh thu gen nawn peuhmah lo ding leh thu hilh nawn peuhmah lo dingin a kham uh hi." 
Acts4:19 Piter leh Johan in, “Topa’ thu sangin note’ thu ngaih ding Pasian mai-ah a kilawm zaw hiam, kilawm lo zaw hiam cih note in thu na khen ta un." 
Acts4:20 Kote ka hih uh leh, ka muhsa uh, ka theihsa uh thute gen loin ka om thei kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts4:21 Amaute in mihonpi hangin Piter leh Johan mawhna daan piak na’ng thu a ngah loh uh ciangin, khatvei a tawn’ kik khit uh ciangin a khah uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, hih bawlna thu hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian’ min a phat uh hi." 
Acts4:22 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, hih cidamna a ngah nalamdang bawlna a ngahpa in kum sawmli val a pha zo mi ahi hi." 
Acts4:23 Sawltakte a kikhah khit uh ciangin amau mipawlte kiangah a pai uh a, siampi liante leh upate in amau kiangah a genna khempeuh a zasak uh hi." 
Acts4:24 Tua mite in a zak uh ciangin lungsim kikhatin, Pasian kiangah kiko-in, “Vantung leh leitung, tuipi leh tuipi sungah a om khempeuh a Bawlpa, Topa aw," 
Acts4:25 ‘Gentailte in bang hangin a gamlum uh hiam? Mihonpite in bang hangin a mawkna-in a hanciam uh hiam? 
Acts4:26 ‘Topa leh ama Khazih do dingin Leitung kumpite ding uh a, Gam-ukte in a kikhawm uh hi,’ci-in Kha Siangtho tawh nang in ka pa uh David’ kamin na cih mah bangin," 
Acts4:27 hih khua sungah Herod leh Pontias Pilat in Gentailte leh Israelte tawh nangmah na khut leh na ciamtehna in hong piang ding thu a piakkholh bangin," 
Acts4:28 sathau na nilhsa na Sila siangtho Zeisu tungah hih ding a kikhawm takpi uh hi. 
Acts4:29 Tu-in Topa aw, amau tawn’na thu na ciamteh in la, cinatna a damsak nadingin na khut na zan lai takin na silate in," 
Acts4:30 lau loin na thu a gen na’ngun a siangtho Sila Zeisu’ min tawh lim leh nalamdang a kibawl theih na’ngin hong hehpih in,” ci-in thu a ngen uh hi." 
Acts4:31 Tua thu a nget khit uh ciangin a kikhopna mun uh liing a, amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Pasian’ thu hang takin a gen uh hi." 
Acts4:32 Thu-um mite in a lungsim leh a ngaihsut uh kikhat a, kuamah in ama neihsa khatpeuh peuh pen ama’ aa tuamin ngaihsun loin, a neih khempeuh uh a neikhawm uh hi." 
Acts4:33 Sawltakte in Topa Zeisu’ thawhkikna thu vangliatna tawh teci a pang uh a, amaute khempeuh in hehpihna thupha tampi a ngah uh hi." 
Acts4:34 Amaute lakah mizawng khat beek a om kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, inn ahi zongin, lo ahi zongin, a neih khempeuh uh a zuak khit uh ciangin a ngah a mante," 
Acts4:35 Sawltakte’ khe mai-ah koih uh a, mikim in a sapna tawh kituakin a vekpi-un a hawm ciat uh hi." 
Acts4:36 Josef kici, “Hehnem’ Ta” cihnopna ahi sawltakte in Barnabas min a phuah thak uh," 
Acts4:37 Levi pawl, Saipras mi khat in lo nei a, a zuak khit ciangin a dangka ngah teng hong paipih a, sawltakte’ khe kiangah a koih hi." 
Acts5:1 Ahih hangin Ananias leh a zi Sapfira min nei nupa khat in a neihsa kimkhat a zuak khit uh ciangin," 
Acts5:2 a zi tawh lungsim kituakin a man kimkhat seel-in, kimkhat hong paipih khit uh ciangin, sawltakte’ khe kiangah a koih uh hi." 
Acts5:3 Piter in, “Ananias aw, nang in Kha Siangtho kheem a, lei na zuak a man kimkhat na seel nadingin Satan in nang lungsim bang tawh hong dimsak hiam?" 
Acts5:4 Tua lo, nangma khut sungah a om lai takin nangma neihsa hilo ahi hiam? Na zuak khit ciangin na ngah a man in nangma sum hilo ahi hiam? Bang dingin na lungsim sungah hih bang hanciam na hi hiam? Mi tung bek a, zuauthu gen na hi kei hi, Pasian tungah zuauthu gen na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:5 Ananias in tua thute a zak ciangin pukin a si hi. Tua thu a zate khempeuh in nakpi-in a lau uh hi. 
Acts5:6 Tangvalte ding uh a, a luang puan tawh a tun khit uh ciangin a paipih uh a, a vui uh hi." 
Acts5:7 Tua nung nai thum bang ciangin a zi in tua a piangsa thute thei loin a hong tum hi. 
Acts5:8 Piter in, “Hi zah tawh na lo zuak na hi hiam? Hong gen in,” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, “Ahi mah hi, hih zah tawh ka zuak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:9 Piter in, “Note in Topa’ Kha ze-et dingin bang hangin kilungtuak na hi uh hiam? En in! Na pasal vuite’ khe in kongkhak kiangah a om uh hi; nang zong a hong puakhia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:10 Tua lai tak thakhatin amah in Piter’ khe kiangah pukin a si hi. Tangvalte in hong tum uh a, tua numei a si-a om a muh uh ciangin a puakhia uh a, ama pasal kiangah a vui uh hi." 
Acts5:11 Pawlpi buppi akipan tua thu a zate khempeuh in nakpi launa tawh a dim uh hi. 
Acts5:12 Sawltakte’ khut tungah mite mai-ah lim leh nalamdang tampi tak a kihih hi. Amaute in Solomon’ Talap-ah lungsim kikhatin a omkhawm uh hi. 
Acts5:13 Midangte khat beek in a pawlpih ngam loh uh hangin mite in amaute a phat uh hi. 
Acts5:14 Tua bangin thu-um mi pasal leh numei tampi in Topa tawh a kibehlap uh hi. 
Acts5:15 Tua ahih ciangin Piter lam a pai lai takin khatpeuh peuh ama liim in a liah nadingin, mi cinate a puakhia uh a, a lupna puan tungah lam kiangah a koih uh hi." 
Acts5:16 Jerusalem kimkot khuate panin mi tampite in cina khempeuh leh dawi bawlsiatte hong paipihin a kikhawm uh a, tua micinate khempeuh in damna a ngah kim uh hi." 
Acts5:17 Tua lai takin siampi ukpa leh amah tawh a kipawl Saddusi mite khempeuh a ding uh a, hazatna tawh a dim uh hi." 
Acts5:18 Amaute in sawltakte a mat khit uh ciangin thong sungah a khum uh hi. 
Acts5:19 Ahih hangin zan lai takin Topa’ vantungmi khat in thonginn kongkhak a hon’ khit ciangin amaute lakhia a," 
Acts5:20 “Note pai un la, biakna innpi sungah ding un la, hih Nuntakna thu mite kiangah va hilh un,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Acts5:21 Amaute in tua thu a zak uh ciangin a zingsang tungin biakna innpi sungah a lut uh a, thu a hilh uh hi. Pasian’ siampi ukpa leh amah tawh kipawlte hong pai uh a, upa vaihawmte akipan Israel upate khempeuh a kikhopsak khit uh ciangin, sawltakte hong paipih dingin thong sungah mi a sawl uh hi." 
Acts5:22 Palikte a pai uh a, sawltakte thong sungah a muh loh uh ciangin a ciahkik uh hi." 
Acts5:23 “Thong kongkhak pha takpi-in kikhak a, thong cingte kong pua lamah dingin a om uh ka mu uh hi. Ahih hangin ka hon’ khit uh ciangin thong sungah mi khat beek ka mu kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts5:24 Biakna innpi ukpa leh siampite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, hih thu in bangci thu hi ding hiam ci-in a lunghimawh uh hi." 
Acts5:25 Tua lai takin mi khat hong pai a, “Thong ah na khum mite in biakna innpi sungah ding-in mite thu a hilh uh hi,” ci-in a ko hi." 
Acts5:26 Tua ciangin biakna innpi ukpa leh palikte a paikik uh a, amau mite in suang tawh a den’ ding uh a lau manun ah gamlum loin a paipih uh hi." 
Acts5:27 A paipih uh ciangin upa vaihawmte mai-ah a koih uh a," 
Acts5:28 siampi ukpa in, “Tua min tawh thu na hilh loh nadingun kote in pha takpi-in kong kham uh hangin, Jerusalem khua note’ thuhilhna tawh na dimsak zo uh a, kote tungah hihpa’ si hong tun’ nading note in na hanciam uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts5:29 Piter leh adang sawltakte in, “Mi’ thu sangin Pasian’ thu ka man’ ding uh a kilawm zaw hi." 
Acts5:30 Note in singlamteh tungah khai-in na thah uh Zeisu, i pu i pate’ Pasian in hong thokiksak zo hi." 
Acts5:31 Israel mipawl kisikkikna leh mawh kimaisakna thu a piak nading tua mi in Ukpa leh Gumpa a suah na’ngin Pasian in ama ziat lamah a koih sang hi. 
Acts5:32 Komau in hih thu khempeuh ah teci ka hi uh hi. Topa Pasian in ama thu a mangte a piaksa Kha Siangtho in zong teci ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts5:33 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lungsim kitamkhia dektak zahin heh uh a, sawltakte that dingin khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Acts5:34 Tua lai takin mi khempeuh in a zahtak uh Pasian’ Thukham sia ahi Gamaliel, Farisai khat in vaihawmna lakah ding-a sawltakte pua lamah tomkha sung pusuak sak dingin thu a piak khit ciangin," 
Acts5:35 “Israel mite aw, hih mite tungah bang bawl sawm na hi uh hiam na kikem un." 
Acts5:36 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tuma-in Thudas kici mi khat tho a, ‘Kei in mi mawk ka hi kei hi’ ci-in mi zali bang in a belh khit uh ciangin amah kithat a, ama thu umte khempeuh kikhen thangin a kisia uh hi." 
Acts5:37 Tuapa khit ciangin, mi a kisim lai takin Galille mi Judas tho a, ama nungzui dingin mi kimkhat a zol hi. Amah zong si a, a thu zui mite a kikhenthang uh hi." 
Acts5:38 Tu-in note kong cih inah, tua mite kham loin, hi ci omsak mai un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih hanciamna thu in mite’ hanciamna thu ahih leh, a sia ding hi;" 
Acts5:39 ahih hangin Pasian’ hanciamna ahih leh, amaute na siasak zo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian tawh na kido loh nadingun na kikem un,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:40 Ama kam a ngai uh a, sawltakte a sap khit uh ciangin a sat uh a, Zeisu’ min tawh thuhilh lo dingin a khamcip uh a, a khah uh hi." 
Acts5:41 Tua ciangin sawltakte in Zeisu’ min hanga zumhuaina thuak dinga kilawm a kisak manun ah lungdamin, upa vaihawmna pan a paikhia uh hi." 
Acts5:42 Biakna innpi sungah ahi zongin, amau innah ahi zongin, ni simin, “Zeisu in Khazih ahi hi” ci-in Lungdamna Thu tawlnga loin hilhin, thu a gen uh hi." 
Acts6:1 Tua lai takin nungzui mite a tam tektek uh a, Grik Judah mi meigongte in nisim kivakna a ngah loh manun ah Grik Judah mite in Hebru mite tungah a phun uh hi." 
Acts6:2 Tua ciangin Sawm-le-nihte in nungzui mihonpite a sap khit uh ciangin, “Kote in Pasian’ thu nusia-in anneek sabuai nasep ding pen kilawm lo hi." 
Acts6:3 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, Kha Siangtho tawh ahi zongin, lungpilna tawh ahi zongin a kidim leh zahtakna a ngah, nomau lakah pasal sagih zong un la, hih na a sem dingin kote in ka koih ding uh hi." 
Acts6:4 Kote ka hih uh leh, thungetna, leh thugenna ka hih niloh ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts6:5 Hih thu in mite lungkimsak ahih manin upna leh Kha Siangtho tawh a kidim Stefen akipan Filip, Prokhoras, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas, Judah ngeina a zui Antiok khua mi Nikolas-te teel uh a, sawltakte mai-ah a koih uh hi." 
Acts6:6 Sawltakte in a lutung uh ah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak uh hi. 
Acts6:7 Pasian’ thu kizel-in, Jerusalem khua-ah thu-um mi hong tam semsem a, siampite tampi in zong upna thu hong mang ta uh hi." 
Acts6:8 Stefen in hehpihna thupha leh vangliatna tawh kidimin mite mai-ah nalamdang a bawl hi. 
Acts6:9 Tua lai takin Sal Suakta a kici mipawlte akipan Sairin mi leh Alekzandria mi leh Kilikia mi leh Asia mi kimkhatte in a ding uh a, Stefen tawh a kiseel uh hi." 
Acts6:10 Amaute in Stefen in a zat lungpilna leh Kha Siangtho’ piak kammalte a nial zo kei uh hi. 
Acts6:11 Tua ahih ciangin, “Hih mi in Moses leh Pasian tungah simmawhna thu a gen ka za uh hi!” ci-in a gen ding mite a cial sim uh a," 
Acts6:12 mi honpite, upate leh laitheite a hansuah uh a, Stefen kiangah pai-in a mat khit uh ciangin vaihawmna-ah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts6:13 Mizuau tecite a sam uh a, tuate in, “Hih mi in hih mun siangtho leh Thukham khempeuh tungah a simmawh tawntung hi." 
Acts6:14 Bang thu a gen hiam na cih uh leh, ‘Tua Nazareth mi Zeisu in hih inn a sugawp ding a, Moses in eite hong piak ngeina a kikheelsak ding hi,’ ci-a a gen thu ka za zo uh hi,” ci-in teci a pang uh hi." 
Acts6:15 Vaihawmna sungah a tu mi khempeuh in Stefen a tel takpi a et uh ciangin ama maitang in vantungmi’ maitang tawh a kibat lam a mu uh hi. 
Acts7:1 Tua lai takin siampi ukpa in, “Hih thu a man hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Stefen in," 
Acts7:2 “Ute naute, pate aw, na ngai ta un. Eite i pa Abraham in Haran gamah a om ma-in Mesopotamia gamah a teen’ lai takin minthan’na Pasian kilang a," 
Acts7:3 ‘Nang na gam leh na behte kiang pan na paikhia in la, kong lahna gamah pai in,’ ci-in ama kiangah thu a pia hi." 
Acts7:4 Tua lai takin Abraham in Khaldea gam pan paikhia a, Haran khua tung a, a teeng hi. A pa a sih khit ciangin Pasian in tu-a a omna uh hih gamah tua khua panin a lalsak hi." 
Acts7:5 Hih gamah khe sik nading nangawn luahna a piak loh hangin, ‘Nang akipan na tate na tute kiangah hih gam kong pia ding hi,’ ci-in ta khat beek a nei nai lopi-in thu a ciam hi." 
Acts7:6 Pasian in, “Na suante in gam dangah zin ahi ding uh a, midangte kiangah sila a suak ding uh a, amaute in kum zali a bawlsia ding uh hi." 
Acts7:7 Amaute sila-a a koihte tungah thu ka khen ding hi. A nung ciangin amaute paikhia-in hih gam sungah kei hong bia ding uh hi,’ ci-in thu a piakhol hi." 
Acts7:8 Pasian in vunat kiciamna thu a pia hi. Tua mah bangin Abraham in a tapa Isaak nei a, ni giat ni-in vun a at hi. Isaak’ tapa Jakob, Jakob’ tate, mipawl sawm leh nihte’ pate ahi uh hi." 
Acts7:9 Tua pawlte’ pate in Josef a haza uh a, Izipt gamah a zuak uh hi." 
Acts7:10 Ahi zongin Pasian in amah tawh omkhawm a, gimna tawlna khempeuh lak pan gumkhia a, Izipt kumpi Faro kiangah maipha leh lungpilna pia a, tua kumpipa in Izipt gam leh ama inn Josef a uk sak hi." 
Acts7:11 Tua lai takin Izipt gam leh Kanaan gam khempeuh ah kialpi tung a, nakpi-in gimna a tun’ ciangin i pate in annek ding mu zo lo uh hi." 
Acts7:12 Izipt gamah buhtang a om thu Jakob in a theih ciangin i pate a masa-in a pai sak hi. 
Acts7:13 A nih veina ciangin Josef in a ute a naute kiangah kilak a, tua ciangin Faro in Josef pawlte a thei hi." 
Acts7:14 Tua lai takin Josef in a pa Jokob leh ama behte sawmsagih leh nga thu a kamtai sak hi. 
Acts7:15 Izipt gamah Jakob paisuk a, amah leh i pate zong tua gamah a si khin uh hi." 
Acts7:16 A sih khit uh ciangin a luang uh Shekhem khua-ah pua uh a, Shekhem khua sungah Hamor’ tate tung pan ngun tawh Abraham in a leisa han sungah a vui uh hi." 
Acts7:17 “Pasian in Abraham kiangah a thuciam a hun tun’ dektak lai takin Izipt gam sungah tua mite nasia takin a khangto uh a," 
Acts7:18 Josef a thei lo kumpipa khat in gam a uk hi. 
Acts7:19 Tua kumpipa in ei mipawlte lungpilna tawh kheem a, naungeekte a hin’ theih loh nadingin a paihmang nadingun i pute i pate a bawlsia hi." 
Acts7:20 Tua lai takin a meel hoih mahmah Moses suak a, kha thum tawntung a pa inn sungah a kikhoi hi." 
Acts7:21 Tua nung a kipaihkhiat ciangin Faro’ tanu in tawm a, ama ta bangin a vaak a khoi hi." 
Acts7:22 Moses in Izipt mite’ pilna khempeuh sin a, kam tawh nasepna tawh a siam hi." 
Acts7:23 Kum sawmli a phak tak ciangin Israel pawl ama ute naute et ding a lungngai hi. 
Acts7:24 Izipt mi khat in Israel mi khat a bawlsiat laitak a muh ciangin phula-in, a bawlsiatpa honkhia-in Iziptpa a that hi." 
Acts7:25 Pasian in ama khut tawh amaute a gumkhia ding hi ci-in a sanggamte in thei dingin Josef in a up hangin a thei kei uh hi. 
Acts7:26 Zingsang ciangin amau kiangah pai a, “Lawmte aw, u leh nau hi napi-in bang hangin khat leh khat na kibawlsia uh hiam?’ ci-in kilemna thu a gen hi." 
Acts7:27 A lawmte a bawlsiapa in, ‘Kua in nang ko hong uk ding, thu hong khen dingin hong koih hiam?" 
Acts7:28 Zana Izipt mi na thah bangin kei zong hong that nuam na hi hiam?’ ci-in Moses a nial hi. 
Acts7:29 Tua kam a zak ciangin Moses tai a, Media gamah zinin a om hi. Tua gamah ta nih a nei hi." 
Acts7:30 Tua nung kum sawmli a phak khit ciangin Sinai Mual gampalakah, mei a kuang sawl kawm sungah Pasian’ vantungmi khat kilang hi." 
Acts7:31 Moses in tua lamdang na a muh ciangin a lungmang hi. 
Acts7:32 A en cian dinga a naih ciangin, ‘Keimah in na pute na pate’ Pasian, Abraham’ Pasian, Isaak’ Pasian, Jakob’ Pasian ka hi hi,’ ci-in Topa’ aw a za hi. Tua lai takin Moses liingin a en ngam kei hi." 
Acts7:33 Topa in, ‘Na din’na mun a siangtho ahih ciangin na khedap na suah in." 
Acts7:34 Izipt gamah a om ka mite thuak bawlsiatna ka mu zo a, amau tauna’ aw uh ka za zo hi. Amaute gumkhia dingin kong kumsuk zo hi. Tu-in pai in la, Izipt gamah kong paisak ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts7:35 “A kua in nang uk ding leh thu hong khen dingin hong koih ahi hiam?’ ci-a nialna a thuak hih Moses in a uk ding, a gum dingin Pasian in sawlkawm sungah a kilang vantungmi’ sawlna tawh a paisak hi." 
Acts7:36 Tua pa in Israel mipawlte paikhiatpih a, kum sawmli tawntung Izipt gam San Tuipi sung leh gampa lakah nalamdangte leh limte a bawl hi." 
Acts7:37 ‘Pasian in na ute na naute lakah kei tawh kibang kamsangpa khat note ading kong piangsak ding hi,’ ci-in Israel mipawlte a genna mi in tua Moses ahi hi." 
Acts7:38 Amah in gampalak mi kikhopna lakah ahi zongin, Sinai mual tungah amah tawh a hopih vantungmi tawh ahi zongin, eite pate tawh ahi zongin, omkhawm a, ei hong piak dingin hin’na thu a ngah hi." 
Acts7:39 I pate in ama thu mang loin a nial uh a, ‘Komau mai-ah a pai dingin pasiante hong bawlsak in," 
Acts7:40 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, kote Izipt gam pan hong paikhiatpih hih Moses in bang ci ta hiam, kote in ka thei kei uh hi,’ ci-in Aaron kiangah genin, Izipt gamah a lung a heikik uh hi." 
Acts7:41 Tua lai takin amaute in bawngno milim khat a bawl uh a, tua milim bia-in, amau khut tawh a bawl uh na tawh a lungdam uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in amaute nungngat-in milim biakna sungah a piakhia hi." 
Acts7:42 Pasian’ kamsangte’ laibu sungah: ‘Israel mipawlte aw, note in ganhingte gawhna tawh, biakna-in Gampalakah kum sawmli tawntung kei hong bia na hi uh hiam?" 
Acts7:43 Note in Molok biakna inn leh Refan pasian’ aksi bia dingin na bawlsa milim uh na pua ta uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin keimah in note, Babilon khua gal khatah kong paipih ding hi,’ a cih mah bangin, Pasian in a nungngat a, vantung nate biak nadingin tua mite don nawn lo hi." 
Acts7:44 “Na muhsa lim tawh kibang ciamna puanbuk na bawl in,’ ci-in Moses kiangah a genpa in a vaikhak mah bangin gampa lakah i pate in a nei uh hi." 
Acts7:45 A piang nunung eite pate in tua buk Gentailte’ lei a luah uh ciangin Joshua tawh a paipih uh hi. Tua Gentailte Pasian in David’ khang dongin i pu i pate mai pan a hawlkhia hi. 
Acts7:46 Tua David in Pasian’ thupha ngah a, Jakob’ Pasian om nading mun a lam dingin thu a ngen hi." 
Acts7:47 Ahih hangin Solomon in Pasian ading inn a lam hi. 
Acts7:48 Sang Pen Pasian in mi khut tawh kibawl inn sungah a teeng zo kei hi. Pasian’ kamsangpa in: 
Acts7:49 ‘Vantung in keima tokhom ahi hi. Leitung in keima khe sikna ahi hi. A bang ci bang biakna innpi kei ading na lam ding hiam? Ka khawlna mun in koi lai takah a om ding hiam? 
Acts7:50 Ka khut in hih na teng bawl hilo ahi hiam? ci-in Pasian in a gen hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts7:51 “Lungkhauh a, lungsim leh bil tawh vunat loh mite aw, note in Kha Siangtho a tawntungin na nial uh hi. Na pute na pate uh a gamtat bangin na gamta uh hi." 
Acts7:52 No na pute na pate un a bawlsiat loh kamsang kua ahi hiam? ‘Midik Pa hong pai ding ci-a a genkholh mite a that uh hi. Tu-in tua Midik Pa a heekte, a thatte na suak zo uh hi." 
Acts7:53 Note in vantungmi hong piak bangin Thukham na ngah uh hangin na tang kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:54 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungso uh a, Stefen tungah a ha a gawi uh hi." 
Acts7:55 Amah in Kha Siangtho tawh dim a, vantung a ettoh ciangin Pasian’ vangliatna leh Pasian’ ziat lamah a ding Zeisu a muh ciangin," 
Acts7:56 “En un, van kihong a, Mihing’ Tapa in Pasian’ ziat lamah a ding ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:57 Ahih hangin amaute in nakpi-in kiko uh a, a bil uh humin ama kiangah lungsim kikhatin a tai uh a," 
Acts7:58 khua nawlah a hawlkhiat khit uh ciangin suang tawh a deeng uh hi. Teci a pangte in a puan uh Saul kici tangvalpa khat khe kiangah a koih uh hi. 
Acts7:59 Suang tawh a den’ lai takun Stefen in Pasian kiangah thungenin, “Topa aw, ka kha hong la ta’n,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Acts7:60 khukdin’a, “Hih khialhna tawh amaute na mawhsak kei in,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko khit ciangin a si hi." 
Acts8:1 Saul in Stefen sih nading a thukim hi. Tua lai takin Jerusalem khua-ah a om pawlpite nakpi-in bawlsia uh a, sawltakte sim loh thu-um midangte khempeuh in Judah gam leh Samaria gam mun khempeuh ah a kithehthang uh hi." 
Acts8:2 Thu a zahtakte in Stefen a vui uh a, ama hangin nakpi-in a kap uh hi." 
Acts8:3 Saul a hih leh, pawlpite bawlsia a, inn khempeuh ah a lut khit ciangin pasal leh numeite kaikhia a, thong sungah a khum hi." 
Acts8:4 Tua ahih ciangin gam khempeuh ah a kithehthang mite a vak kawikawi uh a, thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts8:5 Filip in Samaria khua-ah pai-in Khazih thu a gen hi. 
Acts8:6 Mihonte in a za uh a, Filip hih nalamdangte a muh ciangin tua thu lungsim kikhatin a ngai ciat uh hi." 
Acts8:7 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, dawivei mi tampite pan dawite in nakpi-in kiko-in a pusuak uh hi. A pum langkhat a si mi leh khebai mi tampi in damna a ngah uh hi." 
Acts8:8 Tua khua sungah lungdamna tampi a piang hi. 
Acts8:9 Simon min nei mi khat in tua khua sungah mitphial dawi bawlin, “Kei zong milian khat ka hi hi,” ci-in Samaria mite lamdang a sasak ngei hi." 
Acts8:10 A neu a lian a om khempeuh in, “Hih mi in Lian kici Pasian’ vangliatna mah hi,” ci-in ama thu a ngai uh hi." 
Acts8:11 Amah in mitphial bawlin, sawt veipi mite lamdang sasak ahih ciangin amaute in a thu a ngai uh hi." 
Acts8:12 Filip in Pasian’ Gam leh Zeisu Khazih’ minin Lungdamna Thu gen a, tua mite in a up uh ciangin numeite leh pasalte a kibaptaiz uh hi." 
Acts8:13 Simon in zong um a, a kibaptaiz khit ciangin Filip kiangah om a, nalamdang lian leh lim a bawl a muh ciangin lamdang a sa hi." 
Acts8:14 Samaria khuapihte in Pasian’ thu a mang uh a, Jerusalem khua-ah a om sawltakte in a zak uh ciangin Piter leh Johan a sawl uh hi." 
Acts8:15 Tuate a tun’ uh ciangin amaute in Kha Siangtho a ngah nadingun amaute ading thu a ngetsak uh hi. 
Acts8:16 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Topa Zeisu’ min tawh a kibaptaiz khit uh hangin Kha Siangtho in khat beek tungah a tung nai kei hi." 
Acts8:17 Amaute in tua mite tungah a khut uh a ngak khit uh ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngah uh hi. 
Acts8:18 Sawltakte in khut a ngak uh ciangin Kha Siangtho kipia Simon in a muh ciangin," 
Acts8:19 “Keima khut a tungah ka ngaksate in Kha Siangtho a ngah nadingin kei zong thu hong pia in,” ci-in dangka a lui hi." 
Acts8:20 Piter in, “Pasian’ hehpihna dangka tawh kilei thei hi cih ngaihsun na hih ciangin nang tawh na dangka siakhawm ta hen." 
Acts8:21 Nang in hih thu tawh na kikum na kituak kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, nangma lungsim in Pasian mai-ah a man kei hi." 
Acts8:22 Tua ahih ciangin na khialhna na kisikkik in la, na lungsim ngaihsutna a kimaisak nadingin Pasian kiangah thu na ngen in." 
Acts8:23 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, nangmah in a kha sinkha na nei a, mawhna kikhihna na thuak hi cih ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:24 Simon in, “Na thupiak khat beek keima tungah a tun’ loh nadingin Pasian kiangah thu hong ngetsak in,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:25 Amaute in teci a pang uh a, Topa’ thu a hilh khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khuapi-ah a ciah uh a, Samaria mite khua tampi sungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts8:26 Pasian’ vantungmi khat in Filip kiangah, “Nang tho in la, Jerusalem khua panin Gaza khua lam paina khanglam pai in,” ci-in a gen mah bangin Filip tho a, a pai hi. Tua mun in gamlak ahi hi." 
Acts8:27 Tua lai takin Ethiopia gam a uk Kandake kumpinu nuai-ah a vanglian, a vaihawm mang, ama sum khempeuh a uk, Ethiopia mi khat in Pasian bia dingin Jerusalem khua-ah a pai khit ciangin," 
Acts8:28 a ciahkik lai takin a leeng tungah tuangin kamsangpa Isaiah Lai Siangtho a sim hi. 
Acts8:29 Kha Siangtho in, “Tua leeng va nai in la, beel in,” ci-in Filip kiangah thu a piak ciangin Filip in ama kiangah tai a," 
Acts8:30 kamsangpa Isaiah’ lai a sim za a, “Na simna thu na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts8:31 Tua mangpa in, “Hong hilh a om kei leh, bang ci theih ding ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin, Filip in amah tawh kahto a, tukhawm dingin mangpa in a ngen hi." 
Acts8:32 Lai Siangtho a simna in: “Thah dinga a kipaipih tuu bangin amah kipaipih hi. Tuuno in a mul mette mai-ah a ham loh banginah, Amah in zong a kam a ka kei hi." 
Acts8:33 A kilungnemsak lai takin midangte in ama tungah thu a khen uh hi. Ama hin’na leitungah kilakhia ahih ciangin, Ama suante kua in a lak ding hiam?” cih ahi hi." 
Acts8:34 Mangpa in, “Kamsangpa in a kua thu a gen hiam? Amah a kicihnopna-a a gen hiam? Ahih kei leh, midang cihnopna-a a gen hiam?” ci-in Filip kiangah a dong hi." 
Acts8:35 Filip in kam ka a, tua Lai Siangtho pan akipan Zeisu thu a gen hi." 
Acts8:36 Lampi a pai lai takun tui omna-ah a tung uh a," 
Acts8:37 Mangpa in, “Tui a om hi. Keimah kibaptaiz loh nadingin bang thu in hong kham ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Filip in, “Na lungsim khempeuh tawh na up leh ahi thei hi,” a ci hi; Mangpa in zong, ‘Zeisu Khazih in Pasian’ Tapa ahihna thu ka um hi,’ ci-in a pulak ciangin," 
Acts8:38 Mangpa in leeng khawlsak a, Filip leh Mangpa a nihun tui sungah a pai uh a, Filip in a baptaiz hi." 
Acts8:39 Tui sung pan a kahtoh khit ciangin Kha Siangtho in Filip lakhia a, Mangpa in a nung ciangin Filip a mu nawn kei hi; lungdam mahmahin lam a paikik hi." 
Acts8:40 Ahih hangin Filip Azotas khua-ah kimu hi. Tua khua panin Kaisaria khua dongin khua khempeuh ah pai kawikawi-in Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi. 
Acts9:1 Saul in Topa’ nungzuite langpanin tawng a, thah dingin nakpi-in a nakkhiat lai takin," 
Acts9:2 hih Lampi a zui numeite ahi zongin, pasalte ahi zongin a muh ciangin, khau tawh a khih khit ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah paipih dingin Damaskas khua kikhopna inn ukte kiangah vaikhakna lai piak nading siampi ukpa kiangah a ngen hi." 
Acts9:3 Amah lam pai a, Damaskas khua a naih ciangin vantung pan khuavakpi in ama kimkot ah thakhatin a taang hi." 
Acts9:4 Amah in lei tungah puksuk a, “Saul aw, Saul aw, bang dingin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?” a cihna aw a za hi." 
Acts9:5 Saul in, “Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Zeisu in, “Na hong bawlsiat Zeisu ka hi hi, ciang hiam na khe tawh peek leteh a haksa hi;" 
Acts9:6 Ahih hangin tho in la, khua sungah tum in, na gamtat nadingin thu hong kihilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:7 Saul tawh a paikhawm mite in tua aw a zak uh hangin kuamah mu loin, pau thei loin, ding-in a om uh hi." 
Acts9:8 Saul lei pan a thawh ciangin a mit hak a, kuamah mu thei lo ahih maninah amaute in a khut len uh a, Damaskas khua-ah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts9:9 Ni thum sung tawntung bangmah mu loin, an ne lo, tui dawn loin a om hi." 
Acts9:10 Tua lai takin Damakas khua-ah Ananias kici nungzuipa khat a om hi. Tua pa a mang sungah Topa in, “Ananias aw,” ci-in a sap leh, Ananias in, “Ka om hi, Topa aw,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:11 Topa in “Tho in la, Tang a kici lampi-ah pai in; Saul kici Tarsas mi, Judah innah va zong in." 
Acts9:12 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah in thungen a, Ananias kicipa khat a kiangah hong pai-in, ama khua muh nading a tungah a khut a nga khat, a mang sungah a mu zo hi,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Acts9:13 Ananias in, “Topa aw, hih pa in Jerusalem khua-ah na misiangtho hi zah tak a bawlsiatna thu mi tampi kiangah ka za zo hi." 
Acts9:14 Hi san takah zong na min tawh thungen khempeuh khau tawh hen nadingin siampi liante kiangah thu a ngah hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:15 Topa in, “Pai ta in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah in Gentailte mai-ah ahi zongin, kumpite mai-ah ahi zongin, Israelte mai-ah ahi zongin, ka min a puak dingin ka teelsa beel ahi hi." 
Acts9:16 Keima min hangah bangzah takin a thuak nading ke’n ka lak ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts9:17 Ananias pai a, inn sungah lutin Saul tungah a khut nga a, “Ka nau Saul aw, na paina lampi-ah na kiangah hong kilang Topa Zeisu in khua na muhkik theih nading ahi zongin, Kha Siangtho tawh na dim nading ahi zongin, kei hong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:18 Tua lai takin thakhatin Saul’ mit tungah ngasa lip bangin na khat kia pah a, khua mu thei a," 
Acts9:19 tho-in a kibaptaiz khit ciangin an ne a, a thahat kik hi. Saul in Damaskas khua nungzuite tawh ni tawmkha omkhawm a," 
Acts9:20 ‘Zeisu in Pasian’ Tapa hi’ ci-in kikhopna inn sungah thakhatin thu a hilh hi. 
Acts9:21 Thu a za mite in lamdang a sa uh a, “Hih pa in Jerusalem khua sungah tua min tawh thungente a bawlsiapa hilo ahi hiam? Amaute khau-in a hen khit ciangin siampi liante kiangah paipih dingin hih lai takah hong pai hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts9:22 Saul khangto-in siam semsem a, Judah mite’ thugenna hoih takin thukkikin, Zeisu in Khazih ahi takpi hi, ci-in a lak hi." 
Acts9:23 Ni tampi a sawt khit ciangin Judah mite in Saul thah ding a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts9:24 Amau vaihawmna thu Saul in a thei hi. Amaute in Saul thah nading kongpi kiangah sun leh zanin a pang uh hi. 
Acts9:25 Nungzuite in Saul zan lai takin la uh a, seeng khat sungah kulh tung pan amah a khiasuk uh hi." 
Acts9:26 Saul Jerusalem khua a tun’ ciangin nungzuite tawh kipawl ding a ut hangin amaute in Saul nungzui a suahna taksang loin a kihta uh hi. 
Acts9:27 Ahih hangin Barnabas in Pasian’ sawltakte kiangah Saul paipihin, amah in lampi-ah Zeisu a muhna thu ahi zongin, amah tawh a kihona thu ahi zongin, Damaskas khua-ah Zeisu’ min tawh lau loin thu hilhna thu ahi zongin a gen hi." 
Acts9:28 Saul in amaute tawh Jerusalem khua-ah omkhawm a, a pai zel, a ciah zel a," 
Acts9:29 lau loin Zeisu’ min tawh thu hilh a, Grik Judah mite tawh thu kinialin a om hi. Tuate in Saul thah nading a zong uh hi." 
Acts9:30 Ute naute in tua thu a zak uh ciangin Saul Kaisaria khua-ah a kha uh a, Tarsas khua-ah a paisak uh hi." 
Acts9:31 Tua ahih ciangin Judah gam, Galile gam, Samaria gam mun khempeuh ah pawlpite in lungkimin kipna a ngah uh hi. Pasian kihtakna leh Kha Siangtho huhna tawh omin a khang semsem uh hi." 
Acts9:32 Tua lai takin Piter in mun khempeuh ah a kawivak lai takin Lidda khua-ah a om misiangthote kiangah a tung hi. 
Acts9:33 Tua khua-ah Aineas kici a khut a khe a si, kum giat tawntung a lupna tungah a om mi khat a mu hi." 
Acts9:34 Piter in, “Aineas aw, Zeisu in nang hong damsak zo hi. Tho in la, na lupna na phah in,” a cih ciangin amah in thakhatin a tho hi." 
Acts9:35 Lidda khua akipan Saron gamah a om mi khempeuhte in tua pa a muh uh ciangin Topa kiangah a kihei uh hi. 
Acts9:36 Joppa khua-ah Dorkas a cihnopna ahi Tabitha min nei, nungzui a suak numei khat a om hi. Tua numei in a pha gamtatna leh mi hehpihna lungsim a nei hi." 
Acts9:37 Tua lai takin amah a ci na a, a si hi. Amaute in ama luang a sil khit uh ciangin dei tungnung ah koih uh hi." 
Acts9:38 Lidda khua in Joppa khua tawh kinai ahih ciangin Piter tua khua-ah a om ci-in nungzuite in a theih uh ciangin mi nih sawl uh a, “Zekai loin ko kiangah hong pai in,” ci-in a thuum uh hi." 
Acts9:39 Piter tho a, amaute tawh paikhawm hi. A tun’ ciangin dei tungnung sungah a paipihto uh hi. Meigong khempeuh a kiangah a ding uh a, kapin, Dorkas in amaute tawh a omkhawm lai taka a bawlsa puan-akte leh puante a lak uh hi." 
Acts9:40 Piter in tua mi khempeuh a paikhiatsak khit ciangin khukdin’in thungen a, si-luang lam kihei-in, “Tabitha aw, tho in,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:41 Ama mit hak a, Piter a muh ciangin tho-in, a tu hi. Piter in a khut lenin a din’sak khit ciangin misiangthote leh meigongte sam a, Dorkas a nungta-in a lak hi." 
Acts9:42 Tua thu in Joppa khua-ah kithei khin a, mi tampi in Topa a um uh hi." 
Acts9:43 Piter in Joppa khua-ah savun bawlpa Simon kiangah sawt veipi a taam hi. 
Acts10:1 Kaisaria khua-ah Italy kici galkap kuan khat a uk, galkapbu Kornelias kici mi khat a om hi." 
Acts10:2 Tua mi in a diktat mi hi a, a innkuanpihte tawh Pasian kihta a, mite tungah hehpihna tampi pia a, Pasian kiangah thungen nilohin a om hi." 
Acts10:3 Nikai nai thum ciangin mangmu-in, Pasian’ vantungmi khat hong pai tel takin mu a, “Kornelias aw,” ci-in a sam hi." 
Acts10:4 Amah in entel a, lau mahmah ahih ciangin, “Topa aw, bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Vantungmi in, “Na thungetna leh hehpihna na piak teng Pasian in a ngaihsut nadingin hong kahto zo hi." 
Acts10:5 Tu-in Joppa khua-ah mi na paisak in la, a min thak Piter kici Simon na samsak in." 
Acts10:6 Tua pa in tuipi gei-ah a om, savun bawlpa Simon’ innah a tung hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:7 Ama kiangah a gen vantungmi a paikhiat khit ciangin Korenelias in a nasem nih leh ama nasem niloh Pasian a zahtak galkap khat sam a," 
Acts10:8 thu khempeuh a gen khit ciangin Joppa khua-ah a pai sak hi. 
Acts10:9 A zingsang ciangin amau lam pai-in Joppa khua-ah a naih lai takun, nai sawm leh nai nih ciangin Piter in thungen dingin innkhum tungah a kahto hi." 
Acts10:10 A gilkial a, an a duh hi. Mite in an a thuk kholh lai takun amah in mangmu-in," 
Acts10:11 vantung kihong a, puanza bangin kiu li nei-in leitungah hong kiasuk na khat a mu hi." 
Acts10:12 Tua sungah khe li nei ganhing leh bokvak a, pai thei ganhing leh vanah vasa pawlte a om hi." 
Acts10:13 “Piter aw, tho in, go in la, ne in,” cih aw khat a za hi." 
Acts10:14 Piter in, “Topa aw, hi thei lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, a siangtho lo na leh a nin na ke’n khatvei beek ka ne ngei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:15 Khatvei aw in hong kiko a, “Pasian in a sian’ thosakte a siangtho lo na sa kei in,” a ci kik hi."
