Acts10:16 Tua mah bangin thumvei a hih khit ciangin tua na vantungah a kilato kik hi. 
Acts10:17 Piter in a mangmuhna a cihnopna bang ahi hiam ci-in a lunghihmawh lai takin, Kornelias in a sawl mite in, “Simon’ inn koi lai-ah a om hiam?” ci-a a dot khit uh ciangin inn kongkhak mai-ah ding-in" 
Acts10:18 “Piter kici min thak nei Simon hi lai-ah a om hiam?” ci-in a kiko uh hi. 
Acts10:19 Piter in a mangmuhna a ngaihsut lai takin Kha Siangtho in, “Mi thumte in nang hong zong uh hi." 
Acts10:20 Tho in la, kumsuk in. Lunghimawh kei in la, amau tawh na paikhawm in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, tuate keimah in kong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:21 Piter in tua mite kiangah kumsuk a, “Na zon’ uh mi ka hi hi. Bang thu om a, hong pai na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Acts10:22 amaute in, “Pasian a kihta, Judah mi khempeuh in a zahtak, midik, galkap mangpa Kornelias in nangmah hong sam a, nangmah kiang pan thu a zak nading, vantungmi siangtho khat in thu a pia hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts10:23 Tua ahih ciangin Piter in tuate inn sungah sam a, a tung sak hi. Zingsang ciangin Piter tho a, amaute tawh a paikhawm hi. Joppa khua unau kimkhatte in zong a zui uh hi." 
Acts10:24 Zingsang ciangin Kaisaria khua-ah a lut uh hi. Kornelias in a behte, a lawmte kikhawm sakin, lamenin a om hi." 
Acts10:25 Piter a tum ciangin Kornelias in dawn a, a khe mai-ah bokin a bia hi." 
Acts10:26 Piter in amah phongto a, “Tho in. Keimah zong mi ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:27 Amah in Kornelias tawh a kihopih lai takin inn sungah tum uh a, mi tampi kikhawmin a om uh a mu hi." 
Acts10:28 Piter in, “Judah mite in mipawl dangte tawh kipawl a, amau kiangah pai ding a kilawm lo cih na thei uh hi. Ahih hangin a siangtho lo, a nin hi, kuamah ka cih loh nadingin Pasian in hong hilh zo hi." 
Acts10:29 Tua ahih ciangin kei nong sap uh ciangin seel loin ka hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang thu-in kei hong sam na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
Acts10:30 Kornelias in, “Tuni-in ni li a phak zawh ni, tu hun lai tak nai thum thungetna ka inn sungah ka bawl lai takin, puan taang mahmah a silh mi khat in ka mai-ah a ding hi." 
Acts10:31 Kornelias aw, na thungetna teng ka za zo hi. Na hehpihna na piak teng Pasian in a ngaihsun zo hi." 
Acts10:32 Tua ahih ciangin Joppa khua-ah mi paisak in la, a min thak Piter kici Simon va samsak in. Tua pa in tuipi gei savun bawlpa Simon’ innah a tung hi,” ci-in thu a hong pia hi." 
Acts10:33 Tua ahih ciangin nangma kiangah a manlangin mi kong paisak hi. Tu-in nang hong tung na hih ciangin thuhoih ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih san takah Pasian in nangma kiangah thu hong piaksa teng ngai dingin kote khempeuh in Pasian mai-ah ka om uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:34 Piter in a kam ka-in thu a hilh-inah, “Pasian in mite maitang et tuam a nei kei hi cih ka thei takpi hi." 
Acts10:35 Mipawl khempeuh lakah amah kihta uh a, thuman thutak a bawlte amah in a sang hi." 
Acts10:36 Mi khempeuhte’ Topa ahi, Zeisu Khazih hangah thupha Lungdamna Thu kihilhin, Israel mite a vaikhak mah bangin," 
Acts10:37 Johan in baptaizna thu a hilh khit ciangin Galile gam pan akipan Judah gam mun khempeuh dongin a kihilh khin thu note in na thei uh hi. 
Acts10:38 Pasian in Nazareth khua mi Zeisu, Kha Siangtho leh vangliatna tawh sathau a nilh khit ciangin tua Zeisu pai kawikawi a, thupha bawlin dawimangpa in a bawlsiatte khempeuh a damsak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in amah tawh a omkhawm hi." 
Acts10:39 Judah gam sung leh Jerusalem khuapi sungah a bawl na khempeuh’ teci ka hi uh hi. Amaute in amah singkhuam tungah khai-in a that uh hi. 
Acts10:40 Ni thum khit ciangin Pasian in sihna pan a thokik sak a," 
Acts10:41 mi khempeuh’ mai hi lo, Pasian’ teel kholhsa a teci, kote bek mai-ah hong kilat nadingin thu a pia hi. Sihna pan a thawhkik khit ciangin amah tawh an ka nekhawm uh hi." 
Acts10:42 Amah in ‘Mi khempeuh kiangah thuhilh un la, mi nungta leh misite thu khen dingin Pasian’ koihsa mi in tua mi ahi hi ci-in teci na pang un,’ ci-in kote thu hong pia hi." 
Acts10:43 Amah a um mi khempeuh in ama min hangin mawhna maisakna a ngah ding hi ci-in Pasian’ kamsangte khempeuh in teci a pang zo uh hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Acts10:44 Piter in thu a hilh lai takin ama thu a za khempeuh tungah Kha Siangtho a tung hi. 
Acts10:45 Piter tawh a paikhawm Pasian thu-um vunatte khempeuh in Gentailte tungah Kha Siangtho a tung a muh uh ciangin a lungmang uh hi. 
Acts10:46 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, tua mite in kamtuam tawh pau-in, Pasian’ min a phat uh cih a za uh hi." 
Acts10:47 Tua ciangin Piter in, “Eite bangin Kha Siangtho a ngahte in tui sungah kibaptaiz loh nadingin kua in tui a kham zo hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
Acts10:48 amaute Zeisu Khazih’ min tawh kibaptaiz dingin thu a pia hi. Piter ni tawmkhat sung a tam lai na’ngin a thuum uh hi. 
Acts11:1 Gentailte in Pasian’ thu a san’ uh Judah gamah a om sawltakte leh u leh naute in a za uh hi. 
Acts11:2 Piter in Jerusalem khua-ah a paitoh ciangin vunatte in," 
Acts11:3 “Nang in vunat lote kiangah pai-in amau tawh an na ne khawm hi,” ci-in a mawhsak uh hi." 
Acts11:4 Piter in a kizom a kizomin a gen-inah: 
Acts11:5 “Keimah in Joppa khua sungah thu ka ngen hi. Ka nget lai takin mang sungah vantung panin kiu li tawh a kikhaisuk puanza tawh kibang na khat ka muh leh, keima kiangah hong tungsuk hi." 
Acts11:6 Hih puan a tel takpi-in en a, ka ngaihsut lai takin leitungah khe li nei ganhingte tawh, gamsate tawh, bokvak ganhingte tawh, vana vasate tawh ka mu hi." 
Acts11:7 ‘Piter aw, tho in, go in la, ne in,’ hong ci aw khat ka za hi." 
Acts11:8 Keimah in, ‘Topa aw, tua bang hi thei lo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, a nin a siangtho lote keima kam sungah khatvei beek a tum ngei kei hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Acts11:9 ‘Pasian in a sian’ thosakte a siangtho lo na sa kei in,’ ci-in vantung panin nihvei aw in hong ci hi." 
Acts11:10 Tua mah bangin thumvei a hih khit ciangin tua khempeuh vantungah a kaito kik hi. 
Acts11:11 Kaisaria khua pan ka kiangah hong sawl mi thum in thakhatin ka omna inn kiangah a ding uh hi. 
Acts11:12 Kha Siangtho in, ‘Na lung himawh sak loin amau tawh na paikhawm in,’ hong ci hi. Hih unau gukte in zong keimah tawh a paikhawm uh a, tua mipa’ innah a tum uh hi." 
Acts11:13 Amah in, ‘Vantungmi khat in ka inn sungah ding-a om ka mu a, ‘Joppa khua-ah a min thak Piter kici Simon sam dingin sawl in." 
Acts11:14 Tua pa in nangmah leh na innkuanpihte gupna na ngah nadingun hong hilh ding hi,’ hong ci hi’ ci-in hong gen hi." 
Acts11:15 Keimah in thuhilh ka kipat lai takin, amasa-a eite tungah Kha Siangtho a hong tun’ mah bangin amaute tungah a tung hi." 
Acts11:16 ‘Johan in tui sungah hong baptaiz hangin note in Kha Siangtho sungah na kibaptaiz ding uh hi,’ ci-in Topa’ thugenna ka phawk hi." 
Acts11:17 Tua ahih ciangin eite in Topa Zeisu Khazih’ thu i up ciangin Pasian in thupha hong piak mah bangin Pasian in tuate a piak leh, Pasian a nial dingin kei kua ka hi hiam?” ci-in Piter in a gen hi." 
Acts11:18 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin nial loin, “Pasian in Gentailte zong a nuntak nadingin kisikkikna thu a pia hi,” ci-in Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Acts11:19 Stefen tungah kibawlsiatna thu hangin a kithehthang mite in Foenisia gam leh Saipras gam leh Antiok khua dongin a pai uh a, Judah mite kiang bekah Pasian’ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts11:20 Ahih hangin Saipras mi leh Sairin mi kimkhat in Antiok khuapi-ah a tun’ uh ciangin Topa Zeisu’ Lungdamna Thu Grik mite kiangah zong a hilh uh hi. 
Acts11:21 Pasian’ khut in amaute tawh omkhawm a, thu-um mi tampi in Pasian kiangah a kihei uh hi." 
Acts11:22 Tua mite thute Jerusalem khua pawlpite in a zak uh ciangin Antiok khua-ah Barnabas a sawl uh hi. 
Acts11:23 Barnabas a tun’ ciangin Pasian’ hehpihna thupha a muh ciangin a lungdamin amaute in a lungsim tawh Pasian beel dingin mi khempeuh a hansuah hi. 
Acts11:24 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Barnabas in mipha hi a, Kha Siangtho leh thu-upna tawh dim a, Topa tawh mi tampi a kibehlap hi." 
Acts11:25 Tua khit ciangin Saul a zong dingin Barnabas paikhia a, Tarsas khua a tung hi." 
Acts11:26 A muh ciangin Antiok khua-ah a paipih hi. Tuate in pawlpi tawh kum khat omkhawm uh a, mi tampi kiangah thu a hilh uh hi. Zeisu’ nungzuite in Antiok khua-ah Christian a kici masa bel hi." 
Acts11:27 Tua lai takin Jerusalem khua panin Antiok khua-ah Pasian’ kamsangte hong tung uh hi. 
Acts11:28 Tuate lakah Agabas kici khat in ding a, “Gam khempeuh sungah kial hong tung ding hi,” ci-in Kha Siangtho tawh a hilh hi. Tua kialpi in kumpipa Klaudias a man’ lai-in a hong tung hi." 
Acts11:29 Nungzuite in a hih theih zah ciat bangun Judah gamah a om u leh naute kiangah huhna sum khak dingin a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts11:30 Tua mah bangin a bawl uh a, upate kiangah Barnabas leh Saul te’ khut tawh a khak uh hi." 
Acts12:1 Tua lai takin Herod kumpipa in pawlpite kimkhat a kibawlsiat theih nadingin thu pia a," 
Acts12:2 Johan’ sanggampa Jeim namsau tawh a that hi. 
Acts12:3 Hih thu hangin Judah mite a nuam uh a muh ciangin Piter zong a man hi. Tua lai takin Silngo-omlo Anlum pawikham hun ahi hi. 
Acts12:4 Amah in Piter a mat khit ciangin galkap li tek a om, galkap pawl li kemsak a, thong sungah a khia hi. Paisan pawi ni a bei khit ciangin mi honpi mai-ah lahkhiat ding a hanciam hi." 
Acts12:5 Tua ahih ciangin Piter in thong sungah a om lai takin pawlpite in Pasian kiangah amah ading hahkatin thu a ngetsak uh hi. 
Acts12:6 Herod kumpipa in a lakkhiat hun dek tak ni zanin Piter sikkhau nih tawh kihen a, galkap nih kikalah ihmu a, thong kong mai-ah a cingte in a cing uh hi." 
Acts12:7 Pasian’ vantungmi khat in ama kiangah ding a, thong inn sungah khuavak a tang hi. Vantungmi in Piter’ pang beeng a, phongin, “Tho mengmeng in,” a cih ciangin sikkhaute a khut tung pan a kitolkhia hi." 
Acts12:8 Vantungmi in, “Na kawnggak gak in la, na khedap bulh in,” a cih ciangin tua mah bangin a hih hi. “Na puan silh in la, hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Acts12:9 Piter paikhia a, vantungmi’ nung a zuih hangin vantungmi ahih takpi lam thei loin, mangmu a kisa hi." 
Acts12:10 A cingte mun khatna leh mun nihna khengin, khua sungah lutna sik kongpi a tun’ uh ciangin, ama thu thu-in amau ading kihong a, amaute a paikhia uh a, lam khat a pai khit uh ciangin thakhatin vantungmi in Piter tawh kikhenin a paikhia hi." 
Acts12:11 Piter in khua a phawk khit ciangin, “Topa in vantungmi hong sawl a, Herod kumpipa’ khut leh Judah mite’ lametna sung pan kei hong suaktasak takpi ahih ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts12:12 Tua bang a ngaihsut khit ciangin Marka, a min thak Johan’ nu Mari’ innah a pai hi. Tua san takah mi tampi hong kikhawm uh a, thu a ngen uh hi." 
Acts12:12 Tua bang a ngaihsut khit ciangin Marka, a min thak Johan’ nu Mari’ innah a pai hi. Tua san takah mi tampi hong kikhawm uh a, thu a ngen uh hi." 
Acts12:13 Piter in kong a kiuh ciangin Roda min nei nungak khat in va ngai dingin a pai hi. 
Acts12:14 Amah in Piter’ aw hi cih a theih ciangin a lungdam mahmah a, kong hong loin inn sungah tai a, “Piter kongkhak kiangah a ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts12:15 Amaute in, “A hai hi teh,” a cih uh ciangin, amah in, “Piter om takpi hi,” a ci teitei hi. Amaute in, “Piter’ vantungmi hi ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts12:16 Piter in kong kiu lailai a, amaute in kong a hon’ ciangin a mu uh a, a lungmang uh hi." 
Acts12:17 Amah in amaute pau lo-a a om na’ngun a khut a vaan khit ciangin Topa in amah thong sung pan bang ci-a lakhia hiam cih thu a gen hi. “Tua thu Jeim leh sawltakte kiangah va gen un,” a cih khit ciangin tua mun pan paikhia a, a mun dangah a pai hi." 
Acts12:18 A zingsang ciangin Piter koi lamah a om hiam ci-in galkapte in a gamlum uh hi. 
Acts12:19 Herod in amah zongsak a, a muh loh ciangun a cingte thu a dot khit ciangin a thatsak hi. Tua ciangin amah in Judah gam pan Kaisaria khua-ah paisukin, tua lai-ah tawlkhat a om hi." 
Acts12:20 Herod kumpipa in Tai-ar leh Sidon khuapihte tungah heh a, amaute in a lungsim kikhatin ama kiangah a pai uh a, mangpa’ thu vaihawmpipa Blatas amau lawma a mat khit uh ciangin kilemna thu a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amaute gam in kumpipa gam panin an a ngah uh hi." 
Acts12:21 A kiciam kholh ni-in Herod in kumpipuan silhin tokhom tungah tu a, amaute kiangah thu a gen hi." 
Acts12:22 Mi honpite in, “Hih aw in mi’ aw hi lo Pasian’ aw ahi hi!” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts12:23 Amah in Pasian’ min phat lo ahih ciangin Pasian’ vantungmi khat in thakhatin amah sat a, thante in a ne uh a, a si hi." 
Acts12:24 Ahih hangin Pasian’ thu in khangto a, a kizel semsem hi." 
Acts12:25 Barnabas leh Saul in a sep ding bang bang uh a zawh khit uh ciangun Marka kici a min thak Johan tonpihin, Jerusalem khua panin a ciah uh hi." 
Acts12:25 Barnabas leh Saul in a sep ding bang bang uh a zawh khit uh ciangun Marka kici a min thak Johan tonpihin, Jerusalem khua panin a ciah uh hi." 
Acts13:1 Antiok khua pawlpi sungah kamsangte leh thuhilhte a om uh hi. Tuate in Barnabas, Niger kici Simeon, Sairin mi Lukias, Herod tawh a khangkhawm Manean leh Saul-te ahi uh hi." 
Acts13:2 Topa’ na sem uh a, an a tan’ lai takun Kha Siangtho in “Barnabas leh Saul keima nasem ding ka sapsa bangin hong khenkhiat un,” a ci hi." 
Acts13:3 Tua ciangin an tangin thu a nget khit uh ciangin, a tunguh ah a khut uh a ngak khit uh ciangin a pai sak uh hi." 
Acts13:4 Tua bangin Kha Siangtho in amaute pai sak a, Seleukia khua-ah a paisuk uh hi. Tua khua panin teembaw tuangin Saipras gamah a tung uh hi." 
Acts13:5 Salamis khua-ah a om lai takun Judah mite’ kikhopna inn sungah Pasian’ thu a hilh uh hi. Johan in amaute huh dingin a om 
Acts13:6 Pafos khua dongin tua gam khempeuh a paisuak khit uh ciangin Pafos khua-ah tung uh a, Judah mi dawi aisan ahi, a min Bar-Zeisu kici thuzuau kamsangpa khat a mu uh hi." 
Acts13:7 Tua pa in a pil mahmah Sargias Pawlas mangpa kiangah a om hi. Tua mangpa in Pasian’ thu za nuamin, Barnabas leh Saul a sam hi." 
Acts13:8 Ahih hangin mi bum theipa ahi Elimas in amaute nial a, mangpa in thu up loh nadingin a bawl hi." 
Acts13:9 Ahih hangin Paul kici Saul in Kha Siangtho tawh dimin tua pa lim takin enin," 
Acts13:10 “Thuzuaute leh kheemna pawl khempeuh tawh a dim, dawimangpa’ ta, thuman thutak’ gal aw, Pasian’ Lampi tang siasak dingin tawp lo ding na hi hiam?" 
Acts13:11 Tu-in na tungah Pasian’ khut om ding a, ni mu loin tawlkhat na mit taw ding hi,” a cih ciangin thakhatin meii leh khuamial in a tungah tung a, a khut kilenin a paipih dingin mi kawi zon’in a om hi." 
Acts13:12 Tua thu a muh ciangin mangpa in Pasian’ thu lamdangsa-in a um hi. 
Acts13:13 Paul leh a lawmte in Pafos khua panin teembaw tungah tuangin Pamfilia gam sung Perga khua-ah a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin Johan in amaute tawh kikhen a, Jerusalem khua-ah a ciah hi." 
Acts13:14 Amaute in Perga gam a paisuak uh a, Pisidia gam sung Antiok khua-ah a tung uh a, Nipi ni-in kikhopna inn sungah tumin, a tu uh hi." 
Acts13:15 Thukhamna Lai leh Pasian’ kamsangte’ lai a sim khit ciangin kikhopna inn ukpa in amaute kiangah paisakin, “Ute naute aw, mite thu hilh ding na neih uh leh, thu hong gen un,” a ci hi." 
Acts13:16 Tua lai takin Paul ding a, a khut vaanin thu a hilh inah: “Israel mite leh Pasian kihta-te aw, ngai un." 
Acts13:17 Hih Israel mipawlte Pasian in i pu i pate teel a, Izipt gamah a om lai takun, tua mite pahtawi a, tua san tak panin a khut tawh a paikhiatpih hi." 
Acts13:18 Kum sawmli tawntung gampa lakah naungeek bangin kemin a vaak hi. 
Acts13:19 Kanaan gam sung mipawl sagih a suksiat khit ciangin tuate gam ama mite in a luah dingun kum zali leh sawmnga tawntung a hawmsak hi. 
Acts13:20 Tua nung ciangin kamsangpa Samuel dongin thukhen mangte a pia hi. 
Acts13:21 Tua nung ciangin amaute in kumpipa ding ngen uh a, Benjamin pawl mi Kish’ tapa Saul kum sawmli tawntung a pia hi." 
Acts13:22 Tua pa a khinkhiat khit ciangin David kumpipa a koih hi. ‘Ka deih bangin a sem ding, ka lungsim tawh kituak mi, Jessi’ tapa David ka mu zo hi,’ ci-in amah ading teci a pang hi." 
Acts13:23 Johan in amah a pai ma-in Israel mi khempeuh kiangah kisikkik nading baptaizna thu a hilhkholh lai takin tua David’ suante lakah Pasian in a ciamsa mah bangin Israelte ading Gumpa Zeisu a piangsak hi. 
Acts13:24  
Acts13:25 Tua Johan in a nasepna a zawh lai takin, ‘Kei in kua mi ka hi hong um na hi uh hiam? Amah ka hi kei hi. Ahih hangin ka nungah hong pai mi khat a om lai hi. Ama khedap sut ding ka kilawm kei hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts13:26 “Abraham’ suan akipan ute naute leh no lakah Pasian a kihtate aw, hih gupna thu eite kiangah hong khak zo hi." 
Acts13:27 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Jerusalem khuapihte leh amau ukte in amah ahi zongin, Nipi ni simin a kisim Pasian’ kamsangte’ lai ahi zongin thei lo uh ahih ciangin tua thute a tungsak dingin Zeisu a daantat uh hi." 
Acts13:28 A sih nading a kituak thu khatbeek a muh loh uh hangin, thah dingin Pilat mangpa kiangah a ngen uh hi." 
Acts13:29 Ama thu a kigelhkhol a tun’sak khit uh ciangin singlamteh tung pan a lakhia uh a, han sungah a vui uh hi." 
Acts13:30 Ahih hangin sihna sung panin Pasian in a nungta kiksak a," 
Acts13:31 Galile gam panin Jerusalem khua-ah nungzuite mai-ah ni tampi sung a kilang hi. Tua mite in mite mai-ah tu lai takin amah ading teci ahi uh hi. 
Acts13:32 ‘Ka tapa na hi hi. Tu ni-in na Pa ka suak hi,’ ci-in Late Lai Siangtho Nambat nihna sungah a kigelhkholh mah bangin Pasian in Zeisu nungtakik sak a, i pu i pate kiangah a piak kiciamna ei a tate tungah hong tung sak hi ci-in Lungdamna Thu nomau kiangah kong paipih uh hi." 
Acts13:33  
Acts13:34 ‘David kiangah a siangtho leh kip taka ka piak hehpihna thupha note kong pia ding hi,’ ci-in a genkholh mah bangin, tua Topa sihna pan a nungtakik sak a, a nung ciangin a muat nawn kei ding hi." 
Acts13:35 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ‘Na Mi Siangtho a muat nading ka pia kei ding hi,’ ci-in Late Lai Siangtho adang sungah a gen hi." 
Acts13:36 David in Pasian’ deih bangin ama khan’ lai-in na a sep khit ciangin si a, a pute a pate tawh kivui khawm a, muatna a thuak hi." 
Acts13:37 Pasian in sihna panin a nuntakkik sakpa in ahih leh, muatna a thuak kei hi." 
Acts13:38 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, tua pa hangah mawhna kimaisakna thu nomau kiangah hong kihilh zo hi ci-in na thei ta un." 
Acts13:39 Amah a um khempeuh in Moses’ Thukham hangah suakta zo lote zong amah hang inah na suakta thei uh hi. 
Acts13:40 Tua bang ahih leh, Pasian’ kamsangte’ thu in note tungah a tun’ loh nading na kikem un." 
Acts13:41 Tua thu in: ‘Mi gilote aw, en un, Lungmang un la, taimang un! Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nomau khang lai takin na khat ka bawl ding hi, tua bawlna thu mi khat in hong hilh hangin na um kei ding uh hi,’ a ci hi,” ci-in a hilh hi." 
Acts13:42 Paul leh Barnabas kikhopna inn panin a paikhiat lai takun Nipi ni kik ciangin hih thu hilh dingin amaute in a ngen uh hi. 
Acts13:43 Kikhopna a bei khit ciangin Judah mi leh Judah ngeina sungah a tum Pasian zahtak mi tampite in Paul leh Barnbas nung a zui uh a, Pasian’ hehpihna thupha sungah a kip nadingun amaute in thu hilhin, a hansuah uh hi." 
Acts13:44 Nipi ni kik ciangin Pasian’ thu ngai dingin khuazang dektak a kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts13:45 Ahih hangin Judah mite in mihonpi a muh uh ciangin haza uh a, Paul’ thuhilhna a gensia uh hi." 
Acts13:46 Paul leh Barnabas in, “Note kiangah Pasian’ thu hilh masa dingin thu a om hi. Ahih hangin no na paikhia uh a, nuntak tawntungna ngah dingin kilawm kisa lo na hih uh ciangin, Pasian in kote thu hong piak mah bangin Gentailte kiangah ka kihei ding uh hi." 
Acts13:47 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ thupiakna in: ‘Leimong dongin gupna na pian’sak nadingin, Gentailte’ khuavak dingin ka hong koih zo hi,’ a ci hi,” ci-in lau loin a gen uh hi." 
Acts13:48 Gentailte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lung uh a dam mahmah a, Pasian’ thu a phat uh hi. Nuntakna ngah ding Pasian in a teelsate in thu a um uh hi." 
Acts13:49 Topa’ thu in tua gam khempeuh ah a kizel hi. 
Acts13:50 Ahih hangin Judah mite in Pasian a zahtak numei liante leh khua sung miliante a hansuah uh a, Paul leh Barnabas bawlsia-in, amau khua sung pan a hawlkhia uh hi." 
Acts13:51 Ahih hangin amaute in a khepeek tungah leivui amau langkhatah sin’ khiatin, Ikonium khua-ah a pai uh hi." 
Acts13:52 Nungzuite in lungdamna leh Kha Siangtho tawh a kidim uh hi. 
Acts14:1 Ikonium khua Judah mi kikhopna inn sungah a lut uh a, thu a hilh uh ciangin, Judah mi leh Grik mi tampite in a um uh hi." 
Acts14:2 Thu-um lo Judah mite in unaute a huat bawlna dingun Gentailte a hansuah uh hi. 
Acts14:3 Tua ahih ciangin a sawtpi tua san takah a om uh a, lau loin Topa’ min tawh thu a hilh uh hi. Topa in amaute’ khut tungah lim leh nalamdang bawl dingin thu pia-in, ama hehpihna thu ading teci a pang hi." 
Acts14:4 Khua sung mi honpite a kikhen uh a, kimkhat in Judah mite lamah, kimkhat in sawltakte lamah a kipawl uh hi." 
Acts14:5 Gentailte leh Judahte in upate tawh bawlsia uh a, suang tawh a deng dingin nakpi-in a delh ding uh," 
Acts14:6 amaute in a theihkholh uh ciangin Likaonia khua, Listra khua leh Derbe khua akipan," 
Acts14:7 tua khua kim gamah a tai uh a, tua gamah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts14:8 Listra khua-ah a nu gil sung pan a khe zaw a, khatvei beek lam pai ngei lo thahat lo mi khat in tu-in a om hi." 
Acts14:9 Amah in Paul’ thu a ngaih lai takin Paul in amah a tel-et ciangin a dam theih nading upna a neih a muh ciangin," 
Acts14:10 “Na khe tawh na dingtang ta in,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko ciangin, tua pa ding-in lam a pai hi." 
Acts14:11 Paul hihna mihonpite in a muh uh ciangin, “Pasiante in mi meel bangin eite kiangah hong kumsuk hi,” ci-in Likaonia pau-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts14:12 Barnabas pen Zeas ci uh a, Paul in thugen penpa ahih ciangin Hermes a ci uh hi." 
Acts14:13 Khua mai-ah a om Zeas biakna innpi siampipa in pak leh bawngpi la-in kongpi kiangah paipih a, mihonpi tawh bia dingin a kisa uh hi." 
Acts14:14 Sawltakpi Paul leh Barnabas-te in a zak uh ciangin a puan balkek uh a, mihonpi lakah tai-in" 
Acts14:15 “Mite aw, bang hangin hih bangin bawl na hi uh hiam? Komau in note tawh kibang lungsim nei mite ka hi uh a, hih a mawkna paaikhia-in van leh lei, tui lianpi akipan leh a sungah a om teng a piangsak a nungta Pasian kiangah na kihei nadingun Lungdamna Thu kong hilh uh hi." 
Acts14:16 Tua Pasian in khang masa hun lai-in mipawl khempeuhte in, amau ut bangin a gamtat nading uh thu a pia hi." 
Acts14:17 Ahih hangin tecipan’na om loin amahmah a kinusia kei hi; amah in ama gitna hong lakin, vantung pan guahtui leh amau hun ciat a, a gah an hong pia hi; amah in an tampi hong pia-in na lungtang uh lungnopna tawh hong dimsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts14:18 Tua thu tawh mi honpite in a biak loh nadingun haksapi-in a kham uh hi. 
Acts14:19 Ahih hangin Antiok khua leh Ikonium khua panin Judah mite hong pai uh a, mihonte a hansuah khit uh ciangin Paul suang tawh a deng uh a, a si khin ta hi ci-in khua nawlah a kaikhia uh hi." 
Acts14:20 Ahih hangin nungzuite in ama kimkot ah a om lai takun tho a, khua sungah a tum kik hi. Zingsang ciangin Barnabas tawh taikhia a, Derbe khua-ah a tung uh hi." 
Acts14:21 Amaute in tua khua sungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh a, tampitak nungzuite a suaksak khit uh ciangin Listra khua, Ikonium khua leh Antiok khua-ah ciahkik-in, nungzuite a lungkipsak uh a," 
Acts14:22 “Eite in gimna tampi thuakin Pasian’ Gam sungah i tum ding ahi hi,” ci-in upna sungah a kip nadingun, hansuahin thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts14:23 Pawlpite khempeuh ah amaute’ adingin upate a koih sak uh a, an tangin thu a nget khit uh ciangin, amaute in a up uh Pasian’ khut sungah a ap uh hi." 
Acts14:24 Pisidia gamah a paisuak uh a, Pamfilia gamah a tung uh hi." 
Acts14:25 Perga khua-ah Pasian’ thu a hilh khit uh ciangin Attalia khua-ah a paisuk uh hi. 
Acts14:26 Tua khua panin tu-in a zawh khitsa a nasep adingin Pasian’ hehpihna thupha sungah ki-ap uh a, teembaw tuangin Antiok khua a tungkik uh hi." 
Acts14:27 A tun’ uh ciangin pawlpite kikhawmsak uh a, amaute tungah Pasian’ bawlna leh Gentailte ading thu upna kong kihon’na thu teng a zasak uh hi." 
Acts14:28 Nungzuite tawh sawtpi a omkhawm uh hi. 
Acts15:1 Judah gam panin mi kimkhatte hong pai uh a, “Note in Moses’ Thukham bangin vun na at kei uh leh, gupna na ngah kei ding uh hi,” ci-in ute naute kiangah a gen uh hi." 
Acts15:2 Paul leh Barnabas in tua mite tawh tampi a kinial, a kiseel khit uh ciangin Paul, Barnabas leh adang thu-um kimkhatte tua thu kikum dingin Jerusalem khua-ah a om sawltakte leh pawlpi upate’ kiangah a paisak uh hi." 
Acts15:3 Pawlpite in amau lampi-ah kha-in, Paul leh Barnabas in Foenisia leh Samaria gam lam a tawn uh a, Gentailte kiheina thu a zaksak uh ciangin ute naute in nakpi-in a lungdam uh hi." 
Acts15:4 Amaute Jerusalem khua a tun’ uh ciangin pawlpi leh sawltakte leh upate in a tungsak uh a, amau tungah Pasian hihna thu khempeuh a zasak uh hi." 
Acts15:5 Farisai pawl lakah a um kimkhat in a ding uh a, “Gentailte in vun at a, Moses’ Thukham a zuih na’ng uh thu hilh ding a kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts15:6 Sawltakte leh upate in tua thu vaihawm dingun a kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts15:7 A tampi mah a kiseel khit uh ciangin Piter in ding a, thu a gen-inah: “Ute naute aw, Topa Pasian in a masa-in note lak pan keima kam tawh Gentailte in Lungdamna Thu za uh a, a up nadingun hong teel na thei uh hi." 
Acts15:8 Lungsim a thei Pasian in Kha Siangtho kote hong piak mah bangin amaute kiangah pia-in," 
Acts15:9 amaute leh eimaute atuam atuam khen loin upna tawh, amaute lung sungah siangthosakin amau ading teci a pang hi." 
Acts15:10 Tua bang ahih leh, eite ahi zongin, i pu i pate ahi zongin, a puak zawh loh hakkol nungzuite’ ngawng tungah suan dingin bang hangin Pasian na ze-et uh hiam?" 
Acts15:11 I Topa Zeisu’ hehpihna bek tawh tua mite in gupna a ngah khit mah bangin, eite in zong gupna i ngah hi cih thu i um hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts15:12 Barnabas leh Paul in amaute tungah Gentailte kiangah Pasian in nalamdang leh lim a bawlna thu a zaksak lai takun mihonpite in pau loin a ngai uh hi. 
Acts15:13 Amaute in a gen khit uh ciangin Jeim in a gen-inah: 
Acts15:14 “Ute naute aw, kei thu ngai lai ta un. Pasian in ama min ading Gentailte sung pan kimkhat a teelkhiat ding, amasa-in amau kiangah a pai zawh thu Simon in hong hilh zo hi." 
Acts15:15 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin tua thu in kamsangte thu tawh kibang hi. 
Acts15:16 Tua thu in: ‘Kei min tawh kiphuak Gentailte leh A om lai mite in Topa a zon’ na’ngin, A nung ciangin ka hong paikik ding a, A kipuksa David’ buk ka lamkik ding hi." 
Acts15:17 A sia gawpsate zong, ka bawl kik khit ciangin Ka dingsak kik ding hi," 
Acts15:18 ci-in a cil pan hih thu hong theisak Pasian in a gen hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Acts15:19 Tua ahih ciangin Gentailte lak pan Pasian kiangah hong kiheite bawlsia loin," 
Acts15:20 milim kihhuaite ahi zongin, numei tawh khialhna ahi zongin, gawl meek kithat sa ahi zongin, si ahi zongin, a tan’ nadingun a vaikhak ding kilawm ka sa hi." 
Acts15:21 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tanglai panin kikhopna innah Moses’ Thukham Lai Siangtho Nipi ni simin kisimin, khua khempeuh ah thuhilhte a om uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts15:22 Tua ciangin sawltakte leh upate leh pawlpi khempeuh in amaute lakah, unaute lakah milian ahi uh Barsabbas, a min thak Judah leh Silas teelin, Antiok khua-ah Paul leh Barnabas tawh pai khawmsak leng a hoih hi ci-in a ki-awi uh hi." 
Acts15:23 Amaute in lai khat gelh uh a, tuate’ khut tawh hih bangin a khak uh hi: “Sawltakte leh upate ahi uh ute naute in Antiok khua akipan Siria gam leh Kilikia gamah a om Gentail ute naute kiangah itna lai tawh kong zasak uh hi." 
Acts15:24 Mi kimkhatte in ko thupiak lohin kote kiang panin a paikhia uh a, note lungsim uh hong lumletin, hong gimsak zo cih thu ka za uh hi." 
Acts15:25 Tua ahih ciangin kote in Topa Zeisu’ min hangin a nuntakna a paaikhia ka it uh 
Acts15:26 Barnabas leh Paul tawh ka teel uh mite, note kiangah kong pai khawmsak nading uh ka ki-awi uh hi." 
Acts15:27 Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kam tawh hong zasak dingin Judas leh Silas kong paisak uh hi. 
Acts15:28 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, milim biakna ganhing sa ahi zongin, si ahi zongin, a gawl meek kithat sa ahi zongin, numei tawh khiahlna ahi zongin" 
Acts15:29 na tan’ nading uh thukham sim loh van dang note tungah suat nading Kha Siangtho leh kote in ka ki-awi kei uh hi. Tuate tang le-uh teh note ading a pha ding hi. Na cidam ta un,” ci-in lai gelhin a pia hi." 
Acts15:30 Tuate a kikhak khit uh ciangin Antiok khua-ah a pai uh a, mi honpi a kikhopsak khit uh ciangin laikhak a pia uh hi." 
Acts15:31 Amaute in tua lai a sim khit uh ciangin tua noptuamna thute hanginah a lungdam uh hi. 
Acts15:32 Judah leh Silas in Pasian’ kamsang ahih uh ciangin ute naute kiangah thu tampi hilhin, a lungkipsak uh hi." 
Acts15:33 Amaute in sawtpi a tam khit uh ciangin," 
Acts15:34 lungdamna tawh amau in a sawltakte kiangah ute naute a ciahkik sak uh hi. 
Acts15:35 Ahih hangin Paul leh Barnabas in Antiok khua-ah a om uh a, midangte tawh Topa’ thu hilhin a om uh hi." 
Acts15:36 Ni tampi khit ciangin Paul in, “Eite in Topa’ thu i hilhnasa khuate-ah a om u leh naute bang ci-a om uh hiam ci-in en dingin paikik ni,” ci-in Barnabas kiangah a gen hi." 
Acts15:37 Barnabas in Marka kici Johan sap ding a lungngai hi. 
Acts15:37 Barnabas in Marka kici Johan sap ding a lungngai hi. 
Acts15:38 Paul in Pamfilia khua panin Marka in amaute tawh kikhen ahih ciangin, tua banga nasem ding nung zui lo mipa pen sap loh dingin a ngaihsun hi." 
Acts15:38 Paul in Pamfilia khua panin Marka in amaute tawh kikhen ahih ciangin, tua banga nasem ding nung zui lo mipa pen sap loh dingin a ngaihsun hi." 
Acts15:39 Tua thu hangin amaute khat leh khat a kinial ciangun a kikhen uh a, Barnabas in Marka a sap khit ciangin teembaw tungah tuangin Saipras gamah a pai hi." 
Acts15:39 Tua thu hangin amaute khat leh khat a kinial ciangun a kikhen uh a, Barnabas in Marka a sap khit ciangin teembaw tungah tuangin Saipras gamah a pai hi." 
Acts15:40 Ute naute in Pasian’ hehpihna sungah Paul a ap khit uh ciangin amah in Silas samin a paikhia hi. 
Acts15:41 Amaute in pawlpi omsate kipsakin Siria gam leh Kilikia gam sungah a pai uh hi. 
Acts16:1 Paul in Derbe khua leh Listra khua-ah a tung hi. Tua Listra khua-ah Timoti min nei nungzui khat a om hi. A nu in thu-um Judah numei ahi hi. 
Acts16:2 A pa ahih leh, Grik mi ahi hi. Tua pa in Listra khua leh Ikonium khua-ah a om ute naute kiangah maipha a ngah mi ahi hi." 
Acts16:3 Paul in amah a tonpih nuam hi. A pa Grik mi ahih lam tua gamah a om Judah mite in a theih manunah ama vun a atsak hi. 
Acts16:4 Amaute in khuapite-ah a pai lai takun Jerusalem khua-ah a om sawltakte leh upate in thukhensatnate a man’ nadingun pawlpite a pia uh hi. 
Acts16:5 Tua ahih ciangin pawlpite’ upna a kip semsem a, ni simin mimal a khang semsem uh hi." 
Acts16:6 Frigia gam leh Galati gamah a paisuak khit uh ciangun Asia gamah Pasian thu hilh lo dingin Kha Siangtho in a kham hi. 
Acts16:7 Misia gamah a tun’ uh ciangin Bithinia gamah pai ding thu a ngaihsut lai takun Zeisu’ Kha in thu a pia kei hi. 
Acts16:8 Misia gam nawlah pai-in Troas khua-ah a tung uh hi. 
Acts16:9 Zan ciangin Paul in mang a mu hi. Tua mang sungah Makedonia mi khat ding-in, “Makedonia gamah galkah in la, kote hong huh in,” ci-in a thuum hi." 
Acts16:10 Paul in mang a muh khit ciangin Makedonia gamah pai-in, amaute kiangah Lungdamna Thu hilh dingin Pasian in kote hong sawl zo hi ci-in ka ciamteh ka ngaihsun uh ahih ciangin, tua gamah thakhatin pai na’ng ka hanciam uh hi." 
Acts16:11 Tua ahih ciangin Troas khua panin teembaw tungah tuangin Somathroasia kici tuikulh gamah tang takin ka pai uh hi. A zingsang ciangin Neapolis khua-ah ka tung uh hi. 
Acts16:12 Tua khua panin paikhia-in Rom khua kici Makedonia gam sungah a lianbel khua ahi, Filippi khua ka tung uh a, sawt veipi ka tam uh hi." 
Acts16:13 Nipi ni-in komau in khua nawlah paikhia-in, thungetna mun om ngei-a ka upna uh gun gei-ah pai-in, ka tut khit uh ciangin tua san takah a kikhawm numeite thu ka hilh uh hi." 
Acts16:14 Puansan a zuak Thiatira khua mi ahi, Pasian a bia numei a min Lidia in komau thu a za hi. Tua numei in Paul’ thuhilhna a san’ theih nadingin Pasian in ama lungsim a hon’sak hi." 
Acts16:15 Amah in a innkuanpihte tawh a kibaptaiz khit ciangin, “Keimah in Topa sungah thu-um mi khat ka hihna nong up uh leh, keima innah hong tung un la, tam un,” ci-in thuumin, hong kho hi." 
Acts16:16 Tua nung ciangin thungetna mun lam ka pai lai takun aisanin ama tote ading summeet ngah thei, dawi-lut sila nungak khat in kote hong dawn hi." 
Acts16:17 Tua nungak in Paul leh komau hong zui a, “Hih mite in gupna Lampi eite hong hilh, Sang Pen Pasian’ nasemte ahi uh hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Acts16:18 Tua bangin ni tampi a hih hi. Paul in lungdam lo a, kihei-in, “Zeisu Khazih’ min tawh ama sung pan na paikhia in, thu kong pia hi,” a cih ciangin tua dawi in thakhatin a taikhia hi." 
Acts16:19 Ama tote in summeet ngah na’ng lametna om lo hi cih a theih ciangun, Paul leh Silas man uh a, khua ukte mai-a sumbuk lamah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts16:20 Thukhen mangte kiangah a tun’ uh ciangin, “Hih mite in Judah mi hi napi-in kote khua hong bawlsia uh a," 
Acts16:21 Rom mi ahi eite in i san’ ding leh i zuih dinga kilawm lo ngeina thute hong hilh uh hi,” ci-in a ko uh hi." 
Acts16:22 Mihonpite in amau langkhatah a ding uh a, thukhen mangte in amau puan balkek uh a, ciangpum tawh sat nadingin thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts16:23 A tampi a liam khit uh ciangin, “Pha takpi na cing in,” ci-in thong ukpa vaikhakin thong sungah a khum uh hi." 
Acts16:24 Thong ukpa in tua banga vaikhakna thu a ngah khit ciangin thong tawngnung sungah khumin, amau khe ah kol a bulh hi." 
Acts16:25 Zan kim lai takin Paul leh Silas in thungenin Pasian’ min phatna la a sa uh a, thongkia mite in a ngaih lai takun," 
Acts16:26 thakhatin zin nakpi liing a, thong innbul zong liing a, kongkhak khempeuh kihong a, mi khempeuh kisutkhia uh hi." 
Acts16:27 Thong ukpa tho a, kongkhakte hon’sa-a om a muh ciangin, thongkiate khempeuh suakta khin hi ci-in a up ciangin a namsau a paai pan dok a, amahmah kithat dingin a kisa hi." 
Acts16:28 Ahih hangin Paul in, “Nang tungah bangmah na hih kei in, kote khempeuh ka om uh hi,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko hi." 
Acts16:29 Thong ukpa in meivak a nget khit ciangin lut pahin, Paul leh Silas’ khe mai-ah bokin, launa tawh a liing hi." 
Acts16:30 Amah in amaute inn pua-ah a paipih khit ciangin, “Tote aw, gupna ngah nadingin bang ka hih ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts16:31 Amaute in, “Topa Zeisu na up leh, nangmah tawh, na innkuanpihte tawh gupna na ngah ding uh hi,” ci-in," 
Acts16:32 amah akipan a innkuanpihte Topa’ thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts16:33 Tua nai lai takin thong ukpa in Paul leh Silas la a, a kisatna ma a sawpsak khit ciangin, amah leh a innkuanpihte tawh thakhatin a kibaptaiz uh hi." 
Acts16:34 Ama innah lutpih a, an vaak a, Pasian a up manin, a innkuanpihte khempeuh tawh a lungdam uh hi." 
Acts16:35 A zingsang ciangin thukhen mangte in palik bute pai sakin, “Tua mite na khah un,” ci-in a vaikhak uh hi." 
Acts16:36 Thong ukpa in, “Na kikhah nading uh thu thukhen mangte in hong paisak zo hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na paikhia un la, nuam takin na pai un,” ci-in tua thute Paul kiangah a gen hi." 
Acts16:37 Ahih hangin Paul in, “Rom mi ahi kote thukhen loin a kilangin a hong sat khit uh ciangin, thong sungah a hong khum zo uh hi. Tu-in hong khahkhia sim ding ahi uh hiam? Hi lo hi! Amaute hong pai hen la, a kilangin komau hong lakhia uh hen,” ci-in palik bute kiangah a gen hi." 
Acts16:38 Palik bute in hih thu, thukhen mangte kiangah a koh uh ciangin, Paul leh Silas in Rom ahih lam a zak uh ciangin a lau mahmah uh a," 
Acts16:39 amaute mah hong pai uh a, thuumin a lakkhiat khit uh ciangin khua sung pan a paikhiat nading a ngen uh hi." 
Acts16:40 Tua ciangin Paul leh Silas in thong sung pan paikhia-in, Lidia’ innah a lut uh a, ute naute tawh kimu-in, amaute a lungkipsak khit uh ciangin a paikhia uh hi." 
Acts17:1 Amaute in Amfipolis khua leh Apollonia khua-ah a ban’ khit uh ciangin, Thesalonika khua-ah a tung uh hi. Tua khua-ah Judah mi kikhopna inn a om hi." 
Acts17:2 Paul in a ngeina bangin kikhopna innah tumin, amaute kiangah Nipi ni thumvei Lai Siangtho thu panin tuate tawh kiseel a," 
Acts17:3 Khazih in sihna a thuak khit ciangin sihna pan a thawhkik nading thu om a, “Kong thu hilh Zeisu in Khazih ahi hi,” ci-in a tel takin lakin thu a hilh hi." 
Acts17:4 Amaute kimkhat in thu um uh a, Pasian a bia uh Grikte tampi leh a minthang numeite in Paul leh Silas tawh a kipawl khawm uh hi." 
Acts17:5 Ahih hangin Judah mite in eengin, mi gilo kimkhatte a sap khit uh ciangin, mihonpi kikhawmsak-in khua sung a gamlumsak uh a, Jason’ innah a uumcip uh a, amaute mite mai-ah kaihkhiat nading a zong uh hi." 
Acts17:6 A muh loh uh ciangin Jason leh ute naute kimkhat khua ukte kiangah a paipih uh a, “Leitung gam khempeuh a kilumletsak hih mite in hih san dongin hong tung zo uh a, Jason in ama innah a tung sak hi." 
Acts17:7 Tua mi khempeuh in Kaisar kumpipa thu nialin, ‘Zeisu kici kumpipa adang khat a om hi,’ a ci uh hi,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts17:8 Mihonpi akipan khua ukte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungmang uh hi. 
Acts17:9 Tua ciangin Jason akipan midangte kikhamna sum a piaksak khit uh ciangin a khah uh hi. 
Acts17:10 Ute naute in Paul leh Silas zan lai takin Berea khua-ah thakhatin a paisak uh hi. Tua khua-ah a tun’ uh ciangin Judah mi kikhopna innah a tum uh hi. 
Acts17:11 Tua mite in Thesalonika khua mite sangin a dikzaw uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, deih phat mahmahna lungsim tawh Pasian’ thu sangin, hih thute a man hiam a man lo hiam cih a theih nadingun ni simin Lai Siangtho tel takin a sin uh hi." 
Acts17:12 Tua ahih ciangin amaute tampi akipan a minthang Grik numeite leh pasalte in thu a um uh hi. 
Acts17:13 Ahih hangin Paul in Berea khua-ah Pasian’ thu a hilh thu Thesalonika khua Judah mite in a zak uh ciangin, Berea khua-ah hong pai uh a, mihonpi a hansuah khit uh ciangin, a nawngkai sak uh hi." 
Acts17:14 Tua ciangin ute naute in Paul tuipi dongin thakhatin a paisak uh hi. Silas leh Timoti in a tam lai uh hi. 
Acts17:15 Paul a kha mite in Athen khua dongin a khak khit uh ciangin Silas leh Timoti a manlangin hong pai nading vaikhakna thu a ngah khit uh ciangin, a ciah uh hi." 
Acts17:16 Paul in Athen khua-ah Silas leh Timoti ngakin a om lai takin, khua sungah milim a dim a om a muh ciangin a lungmang hi." 
Acts17:17 Tua ahih ciangin kikhopna inn sungah Judah mite tawh akipan Pasian a bia mite leh sumbuk lamah a kituahpihte tawh thu a kikum uh hi. 
Acts17:18 Epikura leh Stoik lungpilte kimkhat in Paul tawh kidem uh a, kimkhatte in, “Hih kam tam pau theipa in bang gen nuam ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Kimkhatte in, “Hih pa in gamdang pasiante thu hilh hi leh kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hangin hih bangin a gen uh hiam i cih leh, Paul in Zeisu leh hin’kikna thu a hilh hang hi." 
Acts17:19 Tua ciangin amau in Paul a sam uh a, Areopagas mualno tungah a paipih khit uh ciangin, “Nang na hilhna thu thak kote theih ding a kilawm hiam?" 
Acts17:20 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, kote in ka zak ngeiloh uh thu na hong zasak hi. Tua thu in bang a cihnopna hiam ka thei nuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts17:21 Athen khua mite khempeuh leh Athen khua-ah a tung zinte in thungaih nading, thu hilh nading sim loh, nadang a sem kei uh hi." 
Acts17:22 Paul in Areopagas mualno tungah ding-in a gen-inah: “Athen mite aw, note in biakna na hahkat mahmah uh cih ka thei hi." 
Acts17:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, lampi-ah ka pai lai takin, na biaknate uh ka et ciangin, ‘Kithei-lo Pasian Ading,’ ci-a kigelh biakna tau khat ka mu hi. Note in na theih lohpi uh a, na biak uh Pasian’ thu kong hilh ding hi." 
Acts17:24 Leitung akipan leitung sung na khempeuh a piangsak Pasian in, van leh lei uk mangpa ahih ciangin, mi’ khut tawh kibawl biakna innah a teeng ahi kei hi." 
Acts17:25 Amah in hin’na tawh, naksuk naktoh akipan na khempeuh hong pia ahih ciangin na khat peuhmah a deih bangin, mite’ khut tawh kivaak ahi kei hi." 
Acts17:26 Amah in leitung mi khempeuh minam khat bek pan bawl a amaute nuntak nading hun ahi zongin, amau omna atuam atuam ahi zongin a ciamteh zo hi." 
Acts17:27 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mite in Pasian zongin a muh khak theih nading hang ahi hi. Tua bang i cih hangin Topa Pasian in eite khempeuh panin a gamla om ahi kei hi." 
Acts17:28 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian hangin eite i hing, i tang, i nungta hi. Tua mah bangin note’ lai-atpa khat in a gen mah bangin, ‘Eite in ama suan i hi hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts17:29 Pasian’ suan i hih ciangin Pasian pen mi lungsim siamna leh khutsiamna tawh a kibawl kham tawh, ngun tawh, suang tawh kibang hi ci-a i up ding a kilawm kei hi." 
Acts17:30 Pasian in mihingte’ theih nai loh hun bang mahin a sim loh hangin tu-in amau mawhna kisik kik nadingun mun khempeuh mite kiangah thu a pia zo hi. 
Acts17:31 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in a sehkholhpa tawh leitung mite, thuman tawh thukhen nading ni a genkhol zo hi. Tua pa sihna pan a thawhkik ciangin a kitel zo hi ci-in mi khempeuh a thei sak zo hi,” ci-in Paul in a gen hi." 
Acts17:32 Amaute in misite hin’kikna thu a zak uh ciangin, kimkhat in a kosia uh hi, kimkhat in, “Hih thu tu nung ciangin ka ngaikik nuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts17:33 Tua ciangin Paul in amaute kiang pan a paikhia hi. 
Acts17:34 Mi kimkhat in Paul beelin thu a um uh hi. Tua mite lakah Areopagas mi Dionisias leh Damaris min nei numei khat akipan midangte zong a om uh hi. 
Acts18:1 Tua nung ciangin Paul in Athen khua pan paikhia a, Korin khua-ah a tung hi." 
Acts18:2 Tua lai takin Klaudia kumpipa in Judah mi khempeuh Rom khua pan a paikhiat nadingun thu pia zo ahih ciangin Pontas gammi ahi, a min Akuila kici Judah mi khat a zi Prisilla tawh, Italy gam panin a sawt loin hong tung uh a, Paul in a muh ciangin a kiangah a tung hi." 
Acts18:3 A nasepna uh a kibang ahih ciangin Paul in amau’ innah teeng a, na a semkhawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amaute in puanbuk khuite ahi uh hi." 
Acts18:4 Paul in Nipi ni simin kikhopna inn sungah thuhilhin Judah mi leh Grik mite a zol hi. 
Acts18:5 Silas leh Timoti in Makedonia gam panin hong tun’ uh ciangin, Paul in thuhilh bek semin, Zeisu in Khazih hi ci-in Judah mite nakpi-in a hilh hi." 
Acts18:6 Judah mite in thu nial uh a, a selpho uh ciangin Paul in langpanna tawh ama puan singkhia-in, “Note’ si uh note lu tungah om ta hen! Keimah ka siang hi. Tu-a kipanin Gentailte kiangah ka pai ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
Acts18:7 tua san tak pan paikhia-in, Pasian a bia Titu Justas min nei, mi khat’ innah a pai hi. Tua pa’ inn in kikhopna inn tawh kinai-in a om hi." 
Acts18:8 Kikhopna inn ukpa Krispas in ama innkuanpihte tawh Topa a um hi. Korin mi tampite in zong thu ngai uh a, umin a kibaptaiz uh hi." 
Acts18:9 Zan lai takin Topa in mang sungah Paul kiangah a gen-inah “Lau kei in. Pau loin om kei in, thu na gen ding hi." 
Acts18:10 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, nangmah tawh hong omkhawm ka hih manin kuamah in nang hong doin hong liamsuah kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, hih khua sungah keimah in mi tampi ka nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts18:11 Paul in tua khua mite kiangah Pasian’ thu hilhin kum khat leh kha guk tawntung a om hi. 
Acts18:12 Gallio in Akhaia gam mangpa za a ngah ciangin Judah mite in lungsim kikhatin Paul a man uh a, thukhenna tokhom mai-ah a paipih khit uh ciangin," 
Acts18:13 “Hih pa in ngeina hi lopi-in Pasian biak nading mite a zol hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts18:14 Paul in kam pau ding a kisak lai takin Gallio in, “Judah mite aw, ngeina ahi lo thu ahi zongin, gitlohna kihhuai thu ahi zongin ahih leh, nomau thu ka ngaih ding a kilawm hi." 
Acts18:15 Tua ahih kei a, thu ahi zongin, min ahi zongin, nomau biakna thukhamna thu ahi zongin ahih leh, no na vaihawm ding uh hi. Tua thute khen ding ka ut kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts18:16 Tua ciangin thukhenna tokhom kiang panin a hawlkhia hi. 
Acts18:17 Mihonpite in kikhopna inn ukpa Sosthenes manin thukhenna tokhom mai-ah a sat uh hi. Gallio in ahih leh, tua thu phamawh sa loin a om hi." 
Acts18:18 Paul in ni tampi a tam khit ciangin ute naute tawh kikhen a, nidang lai-a a kiciamsa bangin Kenkhrea khua-ah a sam a met khit ciangin, Prisilla leh Akuila tawh teembaw tuangin Siria gamah a pai hi." 
Acts18:19 Efesa khua-ah a tun’ uh ciangin Akuila leh Prisilla a nusia hi. Paul ahih leh, kikhopna inn sungah lut a, Judah mite tawh a kikum hi." 
Acts18:20 Amaute in amaute tawh Paul a om lai nadingin thu a nget uh hangin mang loin," 
Acts18:21 “Pasian in hong awi leh, khatvei kong paikik ding hi,” ci-in amaute tawh kikhenin teembaw tuangin Efesa khua pan a paikhia hi." 
Acts18:22 Paul in Kaisaria khua a tun’ khit ciangin pawlpite tawh kihopih dingin a paitoh khit ciangin Antiok khua-ah a paisuk hi. 
Acts18:23 Tua khua-ah sawtpi a om khit ciangin paikik a, Galati gam leh Frigia gam pai-in nungzuite khempeuh a kipsak hi." 
Acts18:24 Alekzandria khua mi Apollos min nei, thuhilh siam, Judah mi khat in Efesa khua-ah a tung hi." 
Acts18:25 Tua pa in Lai Siangtho siam a, Topa’ Lampi thu sintel-in, lungsim lawpna tawh Zeisu thu a tel takpi a hilh hangin, Johan baptaizna thu bek a thei hi." 
Acts18:26 Amah in kikhopna inn sungah lau loin thu a hilh hi. Prisilla leh Akuila in ama thu a zak uh ciangin, a sam uh a, Pasian’ ngeina thu a tel zaw-in a hilh uh hi." 
Acts18:27 Tua ciangin amah in Akhaia gamah pai a sawm ciangin, ute naute in tua lai-a om nungzuite in a tun’sak nadingun vaikhakna lai a pia uh a, a hansuah uh hi. Amah in a tun’ ciangin hehpihna thupha tawh a um mite nakpi-in a huh hi." 
Acts18:28 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Zeisu in Khazih ahi hi cih thu Lai Siangtho tawh tel takin lak a, mite mai-ah Judah mite’ kam a nial hi." 
Acts19:1 Apollos in Korin khua-ah a om lai takin Paul in saklam gam a paisuak khit ciangin, Efesa khua-ah tungin nungzuite tawm a mu hi." 
Acts19:2 “Note in na up khit uh ciangin Kha Siangtho na ngah uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, “Kha Siangtho om hi cih thu kote in zak zong ka za kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts19:3 Paul in, “Tua bang ahih leh, kua min tawh na kibaptaiz uh hiam?” ci-a a dot ciangin, “Johan’ baptaizna ka ngah uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts19:4 Paul in, “Johan in, ‘Kei nungah hong paipa na um ding uh hi,’ ci-in mite kiangah genin, mawhna a kisikkik manunah a baptaiz hi. Tua bang a cihna in Zeisu ahi hi,” ci-in Paul in a gen hi." 
Acts19:5 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Topa Zeisu’ min sungah a kibaptaiz uh hi. 
Acts19:6 Paul in amaute tungah a khut a ngak khit ciangin, Kha Siangtho in amaute tungah hong tung a, amaute in kamtuam pau thei-in thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts19:7 Tua mite a kisim ciangin pasal sawm-le-nih pha hi. 
Acts19:8 Paul in kikhopna innah lutin kha thum tawntung Pasian’ Gam thu gen a, zolin, lau loin a hilh hi." 
Acts19:9 Mi kimkhat in lungkhauh a, um loin a om uh a, Lampi thu mite mai-ah a kosia uh ahih ciangin Paul in amaute kiang pan paikhia a, nungzuite atuamin a khen khit ciangin Tirannas laihilhna sanginn ah ni simin thu a kikum uh hi." 
Acts19:10 Tua mah bangin kum nih tawntung hilh ahih ciangin Asia gam sungah a om Judah mi leh Grik mi khempeuhte in Topa’ thu a za za uh hi. 
Acts19:11 Pasian in Paul’ khut tungah nalamdang liante lak a," 
Acts19:12 Paul’ pumpi tung pan mainulna puan ahi zongin, kawnggak ahi zongin, khatpeuh peuh cinate kiangah a puak uh ciangin cinatna dam a, dawi gilote a paikhia uh hi." 
Acts19:13 Ahih hangin a vak kawikawi aisan Judah mi kimkhatte in dawigilo a lut mite tungah Topa Zeisu’ min tawh thupia-in, “Paul in a hilh Zeisu’ min tawh kong sawl hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts19:14 Skeva kici Judah siampi khat’ tapa sagihte in tua bangin ahih uh hi. 
Acts19:15 Dawi gilote in, “Zeisu ka thei hi, Paul zong ka thei hi. Note in kua mi na hi uh hiam?” a cih khit ciangin," 
Acts19:16 dawigilo lutpa in tuate tungah diangin amah in zo zaw a, amaute in puan nei loin, liamin, inn pan a taikhia uh hi." 
Acts19:17 Tua thu Efesa khua-ah a om Judah mite leh Grik mite khempeuh in a zak ciangin a lau uh a, Topa Zeisu’ min a phat uh hi." 
Acts19:18 A um mi tampite in hong pai uh a, pulakin a gamtatna thu a gen uh hi." 
Acts19:19 A tawm hi lo aisan theite in zong amau laibute hong paipih uh a, mi mai-ah mei-in a hal uh hi. Hih laibute’ man a kiseh ciangin ngun thennga man ahih a kithei hi." 
Acts19:20 Tua bangin Topa’ thu in vangliatna tawh khang a, a gualzo hi." 
Acts19:21 Tua nung ciangin Paul in Makedonia gam leh Akhaia gamah a pai khit ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah pai ding a lungsim sungah hanciamin, “Tua khua ka tun’ khit ciangin Rom khua ka phak teitei kul ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:22 Ama nasem mi nih, Timoti leh Erastas Makedonia gamah a paisak khit ciangin amah in Asia gamah tawlkhat khawl lai hi." 
Acts19:23 Tua lai takin Lampi thu hangin thusia a piang hi. 
Acts19:24 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Demetrias min nei sum sungpa khat in Diana dawi-numei ngun biakna inn neute bawlin, sumsungte a meetsak thei hi." 
Acts19:25 Tua pa in sumsungte leh tua bang nasemte a kikhopsak khit ciangin, “Lawmte aw, hih bang nasepna tawh eite in sum i ngah cih na thei uh hi." 
Acts19:26 Hih Paul in, ‘Mi’ khut tawh kibawl Pasian om lo hi,’ ci-in Efesa khua bek hi lo, Asia gam khempeuh ah mi tampi zol a, a uuksak cih na mu uh, na thei uh hi." 
Acts19:27 Eite nasepna hong siagawp ding tham loin, a lian dawi-numei Diana biakna inn nasim lo a, Asia gam akipan mi khempeuhte in a biak uh a minthan’na zong a kisiat ding lunghihmawh huai hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts19:28 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hehna tawh a dim uh a, “Efesa khua Diana a lian hi!” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts19:29 Khua sung khempeuh gamlumna tawh kidim hi. Amaute in Makedonia pana Paul’ khualzinpihte, Gaias leh Aristarkhus a mat khit uh ciangin, pawikhamna inn sungah lungsim kikhatin a tai uh hi." 
Acts19:30 Paul in kikhopna sungah lut ding a kisak ciangin nungzuite in a kham uh hi. 
Acts19:31 Ama lawmte Asia gamneute a uk ulian kimkhatte in zong pawikhamna inn sungah pai lo dingin, mi sawlin Paul kiangah a thuum uh hi." 
Acts19:32 A kikhawm mite zong gamlumin om uh ahih ciangin, a thu atuam atuam a kiko uh hi. Mi tamzawte in amaute in bang hangin kikhawm ahi uh hiam cih zong a thei kei uh hi." 
Acts19:33 Judah mite in Alekzander sawlin, mihonpi lak pan a sam uh a, mite mai-ah a paisak uh hi. Alekzander in a khut zanin kham a, mite mai-ah mawh kiphelna thu a gen nop hangin," 
Acts19:34 Judah mi ahih lam amaute in a theih uh ciangin, “Efesa khua Diana a lian hi!” ci-in nai nih sung dektak aw kikhatin a kiko uh hi." 
Acts19:35 Khua lai-atpa in mihonpi a daihsak khit ciangin, “Efesa khuapihte aw, Efesa khua in van pan a kiasuk milian Diana biakna inn a kem khuapi hi cih a thei lo kua om ahi hiam?" 
Acts19:36 Hih thute kinial thei lo ahih ciangin note in daitakin na om ding uh kilawm hi. Ngaihsun khol loin bangmah mawk hih kei un. 
Acts19:37 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, biakna inn hong sut lo, eite pasiannu a kosia lo hih mite nong paipih zenzen uh hi." 
Acts19:38 Tua ahih ciangin Demetrias akipan amah tawh a omkhawmte in mi khatpeuh mah tungah thu nei ahih uh leh, zum inn om a, thukhen mangte zong om uh a, amaute in khat leh khat kimawhsak ta uh hen." 
Acts19:39 Ahih hangin thu dang na koh nop uh leh, a ngeina om bangin mi kikhopna sungah thu kikhen ding hi." 
Acts19:40 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tuni-a gamlumna hangin mawhsakna i thuak khak ding lunghihmawhhuai hi. Hih kikhopna-ah thu i gen ding bangmah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:41 Tua thu a gen khit ciangin mi kikhawmte a paikhia sak hi. 
Acts20:1 Tua gamlumna a bei khit ciangin Paul in nungzuite sam a, a hansuah khit ciangin, amaute tawh kikhenin Makedonia gamah a pai hi." 
Acts20:2 Tua gamah paisuakin thu-um mite a hansuah khit ciangin Grik gam a tung hi. 
Acts20:3 Kha thum a om khit ciangin teembaw tawh Siria gamah pai dinga akisak lai takin Judah mite in ama tungah bawlsiatna ding a hanciam uh ahih ciangin, Makedonia gam lamah paikik ding a hanciam kik uh hi." 
Acts20:4 Paul tawh Asia gam a zin dingin a paikhawm mite in Bera khua mi Pirras’ tapa Sopater, Thesalonika khua mi Aristarkhus leh Sekundus, Derbe mi Gaia, Listra mi Timoti, Asia gam mi Tikhikas leh Trofimas-te ahi uh hi." 
Acts20:5 Hih mite a pai masa uh a, Troas khua-ah kote hong ngak uh hi." 
Acts20:6 Silngo-sawh loh Anlum pawikham ni a bei khit ciangin kote in Filippi khua pan teembaw tuangin ka pai uh a, ni nga ni-in amaute kiang Troas khua-ah ka tung uh hi. Tua khua ah ni sagih ka tam uh hi." 
Acts20:7 Ni sagih sung pan ni masa bel ni-in khomun balnen dingin ka kikhop lai takun, Paul in zingsang cianga pai sawm ahih manin amaute tawh kihopih a, zankim dongin thu a hilh hi." 
Acts20:8 Inn dei tungnung kote kikhopna-ah meivak tampi a om hi. 
Acts20:9 Eutikhas min nei tangval khat in kongvangneu gei-ah a tut lai takin lusu-in, a ihmu hi. Paul in sawtveipi thu hilh ahih ciangin tua tangval ihmu a, inn thuap thum tung pan kiasuk a, a si hi." 
Acts20:10 Paul in a nuai-ah kumsukin, ama tungah lum a, a kawi khit ciangin, “Gamlum kei un. Ama sungah hin’na a om lai hi!” a ci hi." 
Acts20:11 Paul paito kik a, khomun balnenin a neek khit uh ciangin, amaute tawh khuavak dongin sawtveipi a kihopih khit uh ciangin paikhia hi." 
Acts20:12 Mite in tangvalnopa a nungta-in innah a paipih uh a, a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Acts20:13 Kote in Paul mai-ah teembaw tawh pai-in Assos khua pan amah lak ding ka hanciam uh a, tua khua-ah ka pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Paul in tua khua dongin lei lam zui a, pai ding a hanciam hi." 
Acts20:14 Assos khua panin ka kituah uh ciangin amah ka la uh a, Mitilena khua-ah ka pai uh hi." 
Acts20:15 Tua khua panin ka paikik uh ciangin, a zingciangin Khios tuikulh kiangah ka tung uh a, ni khat khit ciangin Samos tuikulh ka tung uh a, ni khat khit kik leuleu ciangin Miletas khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts20:16 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Paul in Pentekost pawikham ni a tun’ ma-in Jerusalem khua a tun’ zawh man khak leh ci-in hahkat a, Asia gamah sawtpi om nuam lo ahih ciangin, Efesa khua-ah khawl loin pai ding a hanciam zo hi." 
Acts20:17 Miletas khua panin Paul in Efesa khua-ah mi paisakin pawlpi upate a sam hi. 
Acts20:18 Amaute a tun’ uh ciangin Paul in a gen-inah: “Asia gam ka tun’ ni-a kipan tu dongin nomau tawh bang ci gamtat-in a tawntungin ka omkhawm nong thei uh hi. 
Acts20:19 Lungsim kiniamsakin, khitui luangin Judah mite’ hanciamna hoih lo bawlsiatna thuakin, Topa’ na ka sem hi." 
Acts20:20 Note ading thupha khat beek siit loin mi kikhopna sungah ahi zongin, inn khat pan inn khatah ahi zongin, ka hong hilh hi." 
Acts20:21 Pasian mai-ah kisikkikna thu ahi zongin, eite Topa Zeisu Khazih upna ahi zongin, Judah mi leh Grik mite kiangah ka hilh hi cih note’n na thei uh hi." 
Acts20:22 Tu-in Kha Siangtho kikhihna thuakin Jerusalem khua-ah ka pai ding hi. Tua khua panin ka tungah bang thu a piang ding hiam ka thei kei hi. 
Acts20:23 Ahih hangin kihenna leh thong sung khiat nadingte in kei hong ngak hi ci-in Kha Siangtho in khua khempeuh ah kei hong hilh hi. 
Acts20:24 Ahih hangin Pasian’ hehpihna Lungdamna Thu hilh nading Topa Zeisu’ khut sung pan ka ngah za ahi, ka nasepna ka zawh theih nadingin ka nuntakna keimah ading phamawh ka sa kei hi." 
Acts20:25 Ka pai kawikawi-a Pasian’ Gam thu kong hilh note khempeuh in keima maitang na mu nawn kei ding uh hi cih tu-in ka thei hi. 
Acts20:26 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh’ si tungah khial loin ka om hi ci-in nomau kiangah ka hong lak hi. 
Acts20:27 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ thu buppi note kiangah gen dingin ka pelh kei hi." 
Acts20:28 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in a si tawh a lei pawlpi vaak dingin Kha Siangtho in note a hong koih, tuunote leh nomau pumpi uh pha takin na kem un." 
Acts20:29 Ka pai khit ciangin gilo ngiate in nomau lakah lutin, a tuute a hehpih kei ding uh hi." 
Acts20:30 Nungzuite a zolkhia dingin thuzuau a gen mite in note lakah a piang ding uh hi cih ka thei hi. 
Acts20:31 Tua ahih ciangin kikem un. Keimah in kum thum tawntung sun tawh zan tawh pelh loin mi khempeuh khitui tawh hilhin, ka om na mangngilh kei un." 
Acts20:32 Tu-in Pasian kiangah note kong pia hi. Note hong kipsak nading ahi zongin, misiangthote khempeuh tawh a kibangin note in luahna na ngah nading uh ahi zongin, ahih thei Pasian’ hehpihna thupha ah note kong ap hi." 
Acts20:33 Kuama kham ahi zongin, ngun ahi zongin, puan ahi zongin ka deihgawh kei hi." 
Acts20:34 Hih ka khut in keimah leh keimah tawh a omkhawmte hong vaak note in na thei uh hi. 
Acts20:35 Tua bangin note in na nasep uh a, thahat lo mite na huh ding uh a, ‘Ngahna sangin piakna-ah thupha lianzaw hi,’ ci-in Zeisu in a genna kammal na ngaihsut dingun na khempeuh ah note kiangah thugentehna kong lak zo hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts20:36 Paul in tua bang a gen khit ciangin khukdin’ a, amaute tawh thu a ngen hi." 
Acts20:37 Amaute khempeuh in nakpi-in a kap uh a, Paul’ ngawng kawi-in a nam uh hi." 
Acts20:38 Tu nung ciangin ama maitang a mu nawn kei ding uh hi a cihna kammal hangin a dah pen uh hi. Amaute in Paul teembaw ah a kha uh hi. 
Acts21:1 Tua mite tawh ka kikhen khit uh ciangin teembaw tungah tuangin Kos khua tang takin ka tung uh a, a zingsang ciangin Rodes tuikulhah tungin tua khua panin Patara khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts21:2 Foenisia gamah a pai ding teembaw khat ka muh uh ciangin tuangin ka pai uh hi. 
Acts21:3 Saipras tuikulh ka muh uh ciangin a tak lamah pai-in Siria gam galkahin Tai-ar khua-ah ka khawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam i cih leh, teembaw in tua khua-ah a van puak teng suahkhia ding ahi hi." 
Acts21:4 Tua lai-ah nungzuite ka muh uh ciangin ni sagih tawntung ka tam uh hi. Paul in Jerusalem khua ah pai lo dingin amaute in Kha Siangtho theihsakna tawh a gen uh hi. 
Acts21:5 Ni sagih khit ciangin ka paikik uh a, nungzuite khempeuh in, a zite a tate uh tawh khua nawlah kote hong kha uh a, tuipi gei-ah khukdin’in thu ka nget khit uh ciangin," 
Acts21:6 khat-le-khat mangpha ka kikhak khit uh ciangin teembaw tungah ka kahto uh a, amaute a ciahkik uh hi." 
Acts21:7 Tai-ar khua pan Tolemias khua-ah ka tun’ uh ciangin teembaw tawh paina a om nawn kei hi. Tua khua-a om u leh naute ka hopih uh a, ni khat ka tam khit uh ciangin," 
Acts21:8 zingsang ciangin paikikin Kaisaria khua-ah ka tung uh a, Sagihte laka khat ahi thuhilhsia Filip, innah tungin ka om uh hi." 
Acts21:9 Tua pa in thuhilh thei tanu li a nei hi. 
Acts21:10 Tua innah sawtpi ka om lai takin Agabas min nei kamsangpa khat in Judah gam panin hong paisuk hi. 
Acts21:11 Tua pa in kote kiangah hong tung a, Paul’ kawnggak la-in, a khut a khe a hen khit ciangin, “Hih kawnggak neipa Jerusalem khua-ah a om Judah mite in hih bangin henin, Gentailte’ khut tungah a pia ding uh hi,’ ci-in Kha Siangtho in hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts21:12 Tua thu ka zak uh ciangin kote leh tua khua-ah a om mite in, “Jerusalem khua-ah pai kei in,” ci-in Paul ka thuum uh hi." 
Acts21:13 Paul in zong, “Bang dingin kapin ka lungsim kizan nading na hih uh hiam? Topa Zeisu’ min hangin Jerusalem khua-ah kihen tham loin, sihna nangawn thuak dingin ka omkhol hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts21:14 Ka zolna uh hong man’ loh ciangin kote in, “Topa’ deih bangin hi ta hen,” ci-in zol loin ka om uh hi." 
Acts21:15 Tua nung ciangin ka vante uh la-in Jerusalem khua-ah ka paito uh hi. 
Acts21:16 Kote Kaisaria khua nungzuite kimkhat in hong zui uh hi. Kote zin tun’ nading Manason min nei Saipras gam mi, nungzui a suah zawh a sawt zo, thu-um mipa’ innah hong kha uh hi." 
Acts21:17 Jerusalem khua-ah ka tun’ uh ciangin ute naute in lungdamna tawh hong tungsak uh hi. 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin Paul tawh Jeim kiangah ka tumkhawm uh a, upate khempeuh a kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts21:19 Paul in tua mite a hopih khit ciangin ama thuhilh nasepna hanga Pasian in Gentailte tungah ahihna thu khempeuh khat nungah khat a gen hi. 
Acts21:20 Amaute in a zak uh ciangin Pasian’ min a phat uh hi. Paul kiangah zong, “Sanggam aw, thu-um Judah mi then bangzah a om na thei hi. Tua mite khempeuh in Thukham hahkatin a zui uh hi." 
Acts21:21 Gentailte lakah a om Judah mite khempeuh in amaute’ tate vun atsak lo tham loin ngeina tang loin Moses thu nusia dingin na hilh hi ci-in hih mite in a za zo uh hi. 
Acts21:22 Tua ahih ciangin bang ci hih ding na hi hiam? 
Acts21:23 Na tun’na thu a za ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka cih uh mah bangin na hih ta in. Thu kiciamsa mi li ka nei uh hi. 
Acts21:24 Tua mite la in la, amaute tawh na kisiangtho sak in la, amaute a sam met nadingin dangka na sik ding hi. Tua bang na hih leh, mi khempeuh in nangma thu a zak uh ahi lo thu hi a, Thukham thu tangin khial loin na om hi cih a thei ding uh hi." 
Acts21:25 Thu-um Gentailte ahih uh leh, milim biakna tawh, si tawh, gawl meeka kithat sa tawh, numei tawh khialhna tawh tan’ nadingin thu khenin lai ka gelh zo uh hi,” ci-in amaute in a gen uh hi." 
Acts21:26 Tua ciangin Paul in tua mite paipih a, zingsang ciangin amaute tawh a kisian’thosak khit ciangin biakna innpi sungah pai-in, tuate khempeuh ading biakna a piak khit dongin, kisian’thosakna ni a cing sak hi." 
Acts21:27 Tua ni sagih a cin’ dek tak ciangin Asia gam Judah mite in biakna innpi-ah Paul a muh uh ciangin," 
Acts21:28 mi honpite hansuahin, “Israel mite aw, hong huh un! Hih pa in ei mi pawlte ahi zongin, Thukhamna ahi zongin, hih mun ahi zongin, a kituak loin bawl a, mun khempeuh ah mi vekpi kiangah thu a hilh hi. Tua tham loin Grik mite biakna innpi sungah lut sakin, hih mun siangtho a nin sak hi,” ci-in a man uh hi." 
Acts21:29 Bang hangin hih bangin ahih uh hiam i cih leh, a beisa hun lai-inah Paul leh Trofimas min nei Efesa khua mipa khua sungah a omkhawm a mu zo uh a, Paul in tua mipa biakna innpi sungah a tumsak hi ci-in a um uh hi." 
Acts21:30 Khuazangin kigamlum a, mi tampite tai-in kikhawm uh a, Paul a mat khit uh ciangin biakna innpi sung pan a kaihkhiat khit uh ciangin kong a khak kik uh hi." 
Acts21:31 Amaute in Paul that ding a kisak lai takun, Jerusalem khuazang gamlumin a om uh galkap mangpa kiangah kam a tun’ ciangin," 
Acts21:32 galkapte leh bute a manlangin kisam a, tua mite kiangah a taisuk uh hi. Amaute in galkap mangpa leh galkapte a muh uh ciangin, Paul sat nawn lo uh hi." 
Acts21:33 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in va nai a, Paul a mat khit ciangin sikkhau nih tawh hen ding thu a piak khit ciangin, “Hih mi kua mi ahi hiam? Bang hih khial ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts21:34 Mi kimkhat in kam khat a kiko uh hi, kimkhat in kam khat a kiko uh hi. Mangpa in gamlumna hangin a tel takpi-in thei zo lo ahih ciangin galkap innah Paul a kipaipih nading thu a pia hi." 
Acts21:35 Kahlei-ah a tun’ ciangin mite heh mahmah uh ahih ciangin, galkapte in Paul domin a pua uh hi." 
Acts21:36 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, mi honpite in a nung zui-in, “Amah that ni,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts21:37 Paul in galkap’ inn sungah a tum lai takin, “Kam khat kong gen thei ding hiam?” ci-in galkap mangpa kiangah a dot ciangin, “Nang Grik pau siam na hi hiam?" 
Acts21:38 Nang in, nidang lai-inah mi suam ding hansuahin, a suamte tuili gampa lakah a paipih Izipt mi hilo na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts21:39 Paul in zong, “Kilikia gam Tarsus khua-a suak, Judah mi ka hi hi. Kei teen’na in khua gina lo ahi kei hi. Hih mite kiangah thu ka gen theih na’ngin thu hong pia in cih kong thuum hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts21:40 Galkap mangpa in thu a piak ciangin Paul in kahlei tungah ding-in a khut zanin mite kham a, amaute in a daih khit uh ciangin Hebru pau-in:" 
Acts22:1 “Ute naute leh pate aw, tu-ni ka mawhna kiphelh nading kong genna thu hong ngai ta un,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:2 Hebru pau-in a gen mite in a zak uh ciangin pau lo semsemin a om uh hi. 
Acts22:3 Paul in a gen-inah: “Kilikia gam, Tarsas khua-a suak, Judah mi ka hi hi. Ahih hangin hih khua sungah Gamaliel’ khe kiangah anvaakna ngahin, i pu i pate’ thukhamte sinin a siamsa ka hi a, tuni-a note khatpeuh peuh zahin Pasian’ ading a hahkat mipa ka hi hi." 
Acts22:4 Hih lampi a zui numei leh pasal henin, thong sungah khumin, a sih dongin ka bawlsia hi." 
Acts22:5 Hih thu ah siampi liante leh upate khempeuh in kei lamah teci ahi uh hi. Amaute kiang panin zong ute naute kiangah vaikhakna lai ka ngah khit ciangin Damaskas khua-ah a omte zong daantat dingin, henin, Jerusalem khua-ah paipih dingin ka pai hi." 
Acts22:6 “Lampi ka pai lai takin Damaskas khua ka naih ciangin, sun lai takin vantung panin khuavak a taang mahmah ka kimkot ah thakhatin hong taang hi." 
Acts22:7 Lei tungah ka puk ciangin, ‘Saul aw, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?’ ci-in hong ci aw ka za hi." 
Acts22:8 ‘Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin, ‘Na bawlsiat, Nazareth khua mi, Zeisu ka hi hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:9 Keimah tawh a tonkhawmte in khuavak a muh uh hangin kei kiangah hong genpa’ aw a za kei uh hi. 
Acts22:10 Keimah in zong, ‘Topa aw, bang ka hih ding hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin, ‘Tho in la, Damaskas khua sungah na tum ding hi. Tua khua panin na nasep ding vaikhakna thu khempeuh hong kihilh ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:11 Tua khuavak khauh luatna hangin ka mit in khua mu zo lo ahih ciangin ka tonpihte in khut tawh hong kai-in, Damaskas khua-ah ka tung uh hi." 
Acts22:12 “Tua lai takin thukham lamsangah mawhsakna a om lo, tua san takah a om Judah mi khempeuh tungah minphatna a ngah," 
Acts22:13 Ananias in hong pai a, kei kiangah ding-in ‘Sanggampa Saul aw, na mit in khua mu ta hen! hong cih ciangin, thakhatin amah ka mu thei hi." 
Acts22:14 Amah in zong, ‘I pu i pate’ Pasian in ama deihna na theih ding ahi zongin, ama Mi Siangtho na muh ding ahi zongin, ama kam sung pan aw na zak ding ahi zongin, nangmah hong koih zo hi." 
Acts22:15 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, na muh teng, na zak teng, mi khempeuh mai-ah amah ading teci na hi ding hi." 
Acts22:16 Tu-in zong bang ngak na hi hiam? Tho in, kibaptaiz in la, Pasian kiangah thugenin, na mawhna na kisawpsiang ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:17 “Tua nung ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah ka tun’ ciangin biakna innpi sungah thu ka nget lai takin mang ka mu a," 
Acts22:18 ‘Nang thakhatin Jerusalem khua pan a manlangin na paikhia in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, keima thu na genna amaute in hong sang kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in Pasian in hong gen ka mu hi." 
Acts22:19 Keimah in zong, ‘Topa aw, nangmah hong umte thong sungah ka khum a, kikhopna inn khempeuh sungah ka sat hi ci-in amaute in hong thei uh hi." 
Acts22:20 Nangma teci Stefen’ si a kibuak lai takin, a kiangah ding-in ka thukim tham loin, a that mite’ puan ka cing hi,’ ci-in ka gen ciangin," 
Acts22:21 amah in, ‘Paikhia in. Gentailte kiangah gamlapi-ah nang kong sawl ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts22:22 Hih thute a gen khit dongin amaute in a ngai uh hi. Tua ciangin, “Hih bang mipa, leitung pan paaikhia mang un’. Amah a hing dingin a kilawm kei hi!” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts22:23 Amaute kiko uh a, amau puan suahkhia-in leivui van lamah a lot uh ciangin galkap mangpa in" 
Acts22:24 bang hangin kiko ahi uh hiam cih a theih nadingin, satna tawh Paul thu a kidot nadingin galkap inn sungah tumpih dingin thu a pia hi." 
Acts22:25 Amaute in Paul savun khau tawh a hen khit uh ciangin Paul in a kiangah a ding bupa kiangah, “Thukhenna thuak loin Rom mi sat ding a kilawm hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts22:26 Galkap bupa in tua thu a zak ciangin galkap mangpa kiangah pai a, “Bang na cih ding hiam? Hih mi in Rom mi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:27 Galkap mangpa in Paul kiangah pai a, “Nang, Rom mi na hi takpi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:28 Galkap mangpa in, “Dangka tampi pia-in hih nam min ka ngah hi,” a cih ciangin Paul in, “Ka pian’na panin Rom mi ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:29 Tua ciangin thu dong dinga akisa mite in Paul kiang panin a paikhia pah uh hi. Amah Rom mi ahih thei a, amah khau tawh hen zo ahih ciangin galkap mangpa a lau mahmah hi." 
Acts22:30 A zing ciangin bang hangin Judah mite in Paul a mawhsak uh hiam cih galkap mangpa in tel takpi thei nuamin Paul khahkhia a, siampi liante leh upate a kikhopsak khit ciangin paipihsuk a, amaute mai-ah a koih hi." 
Acts23:1 Paul in upate a tel takpi-in en a, “Ute naute aw, tuni dongin Pasian mai-ah keimah pumpi ka kimawhsak nading om loin ka om hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Acts23:2 siampi mangpa Ananias in, “Ama muk sat un,” ci-in a kiangah a dingte thu a pia hi." 
Acts23:3 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Leikang tawh kizut suangcian’ aw, Pasian in nang hong sat ding hi. Nang in Thukham tawh kei tungah thukhen dingin na tu napi-in, Thukham tawh kibang loin hong sat ding thu na pia hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts23:4 A kiangah a ding mite in zong, “Nang in Pasian’ siampi mangpa zahko na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin," 
Acts23:5 Paul in, “Ute naute aw, amah in Pasian’ siampi mangpa ahih lam ka thei kei hi. ‘No mipawlte a uk mangpa na kosia kei ding hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh zo hi,” a ci hi.." 
Acts23:6 Upa kimkhat Farisai-te, kimkhat Saddusi-te ahih uh Paul in a theih ciangin, “Ute naute aw, Farisai mi ka hi hi. Farisai’ ta ka hi hi. Mi sisate hong thokik ding hi ci-in ka lamet hangin thu dotna ka thuak hi,” ci-in upate kiangah a ko hi." 
Acts23:7 Paul in tua thu a gen ciangin Farisai-te leh Saddusi-te khat leh khat kiseel uh ahih ciangin a kikhawmte a kikhen uh hi. 
Acts23:8 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Saddusi-te in, “Hin’kikna ahi zongin, vantungmi ahi zongin, kha ahi zongin a om kei hi,” a ci uh hi. Farisai-te in ahih leh, a nihin a om uh hi a ci uh hi." 
Acts23:9 Tua ciangin gamlumna piang a, Farisai-te laka laitheite kimkhat ding-in nakpi-in a nial uh a, “Hih pa tungah bangmah mawhna ka mu kei uh hi. Kha ahi zongin, vantungmi ahi zongin ama kiangah a gen leh, bang phamawh ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Acts23:10 Kiseelna a tam ciangin amaute in Paul a sukgawp khak ding uh galkap mangpa lunghimawh ahih ciangin, galkapte paisakin Paul amaute lak pan zawhthawh thu-in la a, galkap innah a paipih dingun a sawl hi." 
Acts23:11 Zing nitak ciangin Topa in Paul kiangah ding a, “Paul aw, lunghimawh kei in. Keima thu Jerusalem khua-ah na gen zo hi. Tua mah bangin Rom khua-ah zong ka teci thu na pang lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:12 Khua a vak ciangin Judah mite kikhawm uh a, “Paul i thah khit matengin an i ne kei ding hi, tui i dawn kei ding hi,” ci-in a kiciam uh hi." 
Acts23:13 Tua banga a kiciamte a kisim ciangin sawmli val pha hi. 
Acts23:14 Tua mite in siampi liante leh upate kiangah a pai uh a, “Kote in Paul ka thah khit matengun bangmah ka ne kei ding uh hi ci-in ka kiciam uh hi." 
Acts23:15 Tua ahih ciangin note in upa vaihawmte tawh Paul thu a pha takpi khen ding bangin a hong paipihsuk nadingun galkap mangpa kiangah na ngen un. Paul in note kiangah hong tun’ ma-in lam kalah that dingin ka omkhol ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Acts23:16 Paul’ sanggamnu’ tapa in tuate lampi kiangah pangin a om uh cih a theih ciangin, galkap inn sungah lut a, Paul kiangah a zasak hi." 
Acts23:17 Paul in galkap khat sam a, “Hih tangval galkap mangpa kiangah va kha in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, thugen ding khat a nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:18 Galkap bupa in tangvalpa pen galkap mangpa kiangah paipih a, “A kikhum Paul in kei hong sam a, ‘Mangpa kiangah koh nop a nei hih tangvalpa nang kiangah va paipih in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:19 Galkap mangpa in tangvalpa’ khut lenin, a kilang lona-ah paipih a, “Bang thu hong ko nuam na hi hiam? ci-in a dong sim hi." 
Acts23:20 Tangvalpa in, “Zing ciangin upa kikhopna-ah Paul hong paipihsuk a, Judah mite in ama thu tel takin a dong ding bangin, nang kiangah hong ngen dingin a vaihawm zo uh hi." 
Acts23:21 Tua ahih ciangin amau deihna bangin zui kei in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Paul a thah khit matengun an ne lo, tui dawn lo ding ci-in a kiciam mi sawmli val lampi gei-ah a ding uh hi. Tu-in tuate in amau thu na man’ ding a ngak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:22 Tua ahih ciangin galkap mangpa in, “Nang in kei kiangah hih thu nong gen kuamah na gen kei in,” ci-in tangvalpa thu pia-in a khah hi." 
Acts23:23 Tangval a ciah khit ciangin galkap mangpa in galkap bupa sam a, “Tu nitak nai kua ciangin Kaisaria khua pai dingin galkap zanih tawh, sakol tuang galkap sawmsagih tawh, teipi tawi galkap zanih tawh kithawisak in." 
Acts23:24 Paul tuan’ nading sakolte pia in. Mangpipa Feliks kiangah pha takpi-in a paipih ding uh hi,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Acts23:25 Amah in hih bangin lai a gelhinah: 
Acts23:26 “Klaudis Lisias in Mangpipa Feliks kiangah lungdamna lai kong khak hi. 
Acts23:27 Judah mite in hih pa a man uh a, a that ding a kisak lai takun, amah in Rom mi ahih thu ka theih ciangin galkapte tawh pai-in, amah ka honkhia hi." 
Acts23:28 Amaute in bang hangin a mawhsak uh hiam cih ka thei nuam a, amaute upa vaihawmte kiangah ka paipihsuk hi." 
Acts23:29 A kithahna ding ahi zongin, thong sungah a kikhum nading ahi zongin a kilawm a khialhna hang ahi lo, amau thukham thu bek in a mawhsak uh hi cih ka thei hi." 
Acts23:30 Tua pa bawlsia dingin amaute a hanciam thu hong kizaksak ciangin, thakhatin kong paisak a, amah mawhsakte in nangma kiangah hong ko dingin thu ka pia zo hi,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
Acts23:31 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa’ vaikhak bangin galkapte in Paul a la uh a, zan lai takin Antipatris khua-ah a tung uh hi." 
Acts23:32 A zing ciangin sakol galkapte in Paul paipih uh a, galkapte a ciah uh hi." 
Acts23:33 Sakol tuang galkapte in Kaisaria khua-ah a tun’ uh ciangin, Mangpipa’ khut tungah lai a pia uh hi. Paul zong Mangpipa mai-ah a koih uh hi." 
Acts23:34 Mangpipa in lai a sim ciangin, “Kua gam mi na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, Kilikia gam mi ahih a theih ciangin," 
Acts23:35 “Nang hong mawhsakte hong tun’ uh ciangin, na thu ka ngai ding hi,” ci-in Herod’ kumpi-inn ah khum dingin thu a pia hi." 
Acts24:1 Ni nga khit ciangin siampi ukpa Ananias in Tertullas kici thugen siampa leh upa vaihawmte tawh Kaisaria khua-ah hong tungsuk uh a, Paul’ thu Mangpipa a ko uh hi." 
Acts24:2 Paul a sap khit uh ciangin, Tertullas in mawhsakna thu a gen-inah: “Alian Mangpipa Feliks aw, kote in nangma hangin lau loin nuam takin ka om uh ahi zongin, nong kepna leh na thumuhkholhna tawh mipawlte tungah kipuah phatna om ahih ciangin," 
Acts24:3 gam khempeuh ah apawlpawl na hehpihna phatin ka om uh hi. 
Acts24:4 Ahih hangin nang kong nokkhak sak loh nadingin, hehpihna tawh komau thu tawm nong ngaih ding kong thuum hi." 
Acts24:5 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Nazareth mipawl ukpa ahi, leitung mun khempeuh ah Judah mi khempeuh misuam dingin a hansuah, hih mi gilo kote’n ka mu zo uh hi." 
Acts24:6 Tua tham loin, amah in biakna innpi a simmawh ciangin ka man uh hi. (Kote Thukham bangin amah thusit ding ka geel zo uh hi;" 
Acts24:7 ahih hangin galkap mangpa Lisias hong pai-in, zawhthawh thu tawh amah ko tung panin hong kaihkhiat sakin, nangma mai-ah ama langte hong pai nading thu a pia hi.)" 
Acts24:8 Ama kiangah thu na dot leh, ka mawhsakna thu uh na thei ding hi,” ci-in a ko hi." 
Acts24:9 Judah mite in zong, “Hih thu ahi takpi hi,” ci-in a mawhsak uh hi." 
Acts24:10 Mangpipa in a khut vanin Paul in a gen dingin thu a piak ciangin Paul in, “Nang in hih pawlte sawtpi sung na uk ka thei ahih ciangin, lungdamin ka mawh kiphelna thu kong gen ding hi." 
Acts24:11 Keimah in bia dingin Jerusalem khua-ah ka paitoh tuni-in nisawm-le-nih bek pha cih na thei zo hi. 
Acts24:12 Biakna innpi sungah kuamah tawh ka kinialna hong mu kei uh hi. Kikhopna inn sung ahi zongin, khua sung ahi zongin, mihonpite ka hansuahna amaute in hong mu kei uh hi." 
Acts24:13 Tua tham loin, kei tungah hong mawhsakna thu a gentel dingin teci hong lak thei kei uh hi." 
Acts24:14 Ahih hangin amaute in biakna pawl tuam a cih uh Lampi thu bangin ka pute ka pate’ Pasian ka bia hi ci-in kong pulak hi. Thukham lai leh Pasian’ kamsangte’ Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh khempeuhte ka um hi. 
Acts24:15 Midik leh midik lote khempeuh in sihna pan a thokik ding hi ci-in amaute’ lamet bangin Pasian suangin ka om hi. 
Acts24:16 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian tungah ahi zongin, mite tungah ahi zongin, ka lungsim sungah kimawhsakna a om lohna dingin, a tawntungin ka hahkat hi." 
Acts24:17 Tu-in kum sawtpi khit ciangin keima pawlte hehpihna leh lungdamna letsong pia dingin kong pai hi. 
Acts24:18 Tua hehpihna ka piak lai takin biakna innpi sungah mi kikhawm lo, gamlum lo, siangtho takin ka bawl Asia gam panin a hong pai Judah mi kimkhatte in hong mu uh hi." 
Acts24:19 Tua mite in kei tungah mawhsak nading a om leh, na mai-ah hong pai-in hong mawhsak leh a kilawm hi." 
Acts24:20 Ahih kei leh, upa vaihawmte mai-ah ka om lai takin," 
Acts24:21 ‘Misite’ thawhkikna thu hangin note mai-ah tuni-in thu dotna ka thuak hi,’ cih ka kikona aw kam khat longal, keima tungah mawhna dang bang hong mu ahi uh hiam, tu-in hih mite in hong gen ta uh hen,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts24:22 Mangpipa in, “Galkap mangpa Lisias hong paisuk ciangin note ka hong dong ding hi,” ci-in tua Lampi thu thei zo ahih ciangin thu khen loin, amaute a khahkhia hi." 
Acts24:23 “Paul thong sungah khum loin, kicingin om hen. Ama lawmte in ama kiangah pai-in, an a piak nop uh leh, na kham kei un,” ci-in galkap bupa kiangah a vaikhak hi." 
Acts24:24 Tua nung ciang a sawt loin Feliks Mangpipa in Judah mi ahi, a zi Drusilla tawh hong paikhawm a, Paul samin Zeisu Khazih upna thu a ngai uh hi." 
Acts24:25 Paul in dikna thu, kidekna thu leh hong tung ding Thukhenna Ni thu a hilh ciangin Feliks Mangpa lau a, “Tu-in pai ta in. Tu nung a kilawm hun ciangin kong samkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts24:26 Paul in amah kisut nading golhguk a piak khak leh ci-in ummawhin tam veipi samin, a hopih hi." 
Acts24:27 Kum nih a cin’ ciangin Porsias Festas in Feliks za a laih hi. Tua Feliks in Judah mite lungdamsak nuamin Paul thong sungah a omsak lai hi. 
Acts25:1 Festas Mangpa tua gamah a tun’ khit ni thum khit ciangin Kaisaria khua panin Jerusalem khua-ah a paito hi. 
Acts25:2 Tua lai takin siampi liante leh Judah miliante in Paul’ thu a ko uh hi. 
Acts25:3 Lampi-ah bukin thah ding a vaihawm uh a, Jerusalem khua-ah a paisak nadingin a thuum uh hi." 
Acts25:4 Ahih hangin Festas in zong, “Paul in Kaisaria khua-ah kikhumin a om hi. Tua khua-ah a sawt loin ka pai ding hi." 
Acts25:5 Tua ahih ciangin note lakah ahi theite in kei hong zui-in, tuapa tungah mawhna a om leh, na mawhsak ta un,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:6 Festas in amaute lakah ni giat bang, ni sawm bang a taam khit ciangin Kaisaria khua-ah pai a, a zing ciangin thukhen tokhom tungah tu-in Paul a samsak hi." 
Acts25:7 Paul a tun’ ciangin Jerusalem khua pan hong pai Judah mite in amah uumin, teci a lak zo lo, a lian mahmah mawhna tampi tawh Paul a mawhsak uh hi." 
Acts25:8 Paul in, “Keimah in Judah ngeina Thukham ahi zongin amau biakna innpi tungah ahi zongin, Kaisar Kumpipa tungah ahi zongin ka khial kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:9 Ahih hangin Festas in, “Jerusalem khua pai a, keimah in hih thu ka hong khensak ding na ut hiam?” ci-in Judah mite lungdamsak nuamin Paul kiangah a dong hi." 
Acts25:10 Paul in zong, “Kaisar Kumpipa’ thukhenna tokhom mai-ah ka ding hi, hih tokhom mai-ah kei’ thu nong khensak ding kilawm hi. Nang na theih bangin Judah mite tungah bangmah ka mawh kei hi." 
Acts25:11 Tua ahih ciangin mi gilo ka hih a, sih nading a, kilawm mawhna ka hih leh, sihna tawh ka kipelh kei ding hi. Ahi zongin tua mite hong mawhsaknate khat beek a man kei leh kuamah in amaute khut tungah hong pia zo kei ding hi. Kaisar Kumpipa kiangah azu ka khan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:12 Tua ciangin Festas Mangpa in upate tawh a vaihawm khit ciangin, “Nang in ‘Kaisar Kumpipa kiangah azu ka khan ding hi,’ na ci ahih ciangin, Kaisar Kumpipa kiangah na pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:13 Tu nung a sawt loin, Agrippa Kumpipa in ama zi Bernike tawh Kaisar a tun’ ciangin Festas a hopih hi." 
Acts25:14 Sau veipi a om khit ciangin Festas Mangpipa in Paul’ thu kumpipa kiangah a gen-inah, “Feliks Mangpipa in thong sungah khumin a nutsiat mi khat a om hi." 
Acts25:15 Jerusalem khua-ah ka om lai takin siampi liante leh Judah upate in tuapa thu hong ko uh a, hong khensak in ci-in hong thuum uh ciangin," 
Acts25:16 keimah in zong, ‘Mawhsakna a thuak mi in a mawhsak mite tawh kimaituah sak a, a tungah a koih mawhna a phelna thu a gen khit matengin kuamah kiangah piak ding Rom ngeina ahi kei hi,’ ci-in ka gen hi." 
Acts25:17 Tua mite in hih san takah hong kikhop uh ciangin khawl loin, a zing ciangin thukhen tokhom tungah tu-in tuapa ka samsak hi." 
Acts25:18 Amaute a ding uh a, ama tungah ka upmawh bangin thusia a koih kei uh hi."
