Acts25:19 Amaute biakna thu leh a sisa mi khat ahi, Zeisu hangah kidongin a mawhsak uh hi. Paul in, ‘Tua Zeisu a nungta hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts25:20 Tua thudotna ka theihtel loh lai takin, ‘Jerusalem khua-ah pai a, hih thu tanna na thuak ding hiam?’ ci-in amah ka dot leh," 
Acts25:21 a lian Kumpipa kiangah azukhan nuam a, amah a kikhum lai nading hong ngen ahih ciangin, Karsar Kumpipa kiangah ka paisak mateng dongin ka khumsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:22 Agrippa in zong, “Tua pa thu ka za nuam hi,” a cih ciangin, Festas in, “Zing ciangin ama thu na za ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:23 Tua ahih ciangin zingsang ciangin Agrippa leh Bernike in kithupi bawlna tawh khua sung uliante tawh hong tung uh a, kikhopna inn sungah a tum uh ciangin Festas in thu a piak ciangin Paul a lutsak uh hi." 
Acts25:24 Festas in, “Kumpipa Agrippa akipan kote tawh a omkhawm mite aw, hih pa na mu uh hi. Jerusalem khua leh hi lai-ah Judah mite khempeuh in ama thu kei hong ko uh a, ‘Amah in tomkha nangawn nungta ding a kilawm kei hi,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Acts25:25 Amah in sihna thuak ding akilawm mawhna ahih loh ka thei a, kumpi lianpa kiangah azukhan nuam ahih ciangin, a pai nading thu ka khensat hi." 
Acts25:26 Ama thu gelh a, Kumpipa kiangah piak ding thu a kitel tak khat beek ka nei kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in na dottel khit uh ciangin lai gelh ding ka neih nadingin nomau mai-ah ahi zongin, kumpipa Agrippa kiangah ahi zongin amah kong paipih zo hi." 
Acts25:27 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a kikhumpa a kimawhsakna lai pia loin paisak leng akilawm kei hi ci-in ka um hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:1 Tua ciangin Agrippa in, “Nang in nang ading na gen thei ding hi,” a cih ciangin Paul in a khut zanin a gen-inah:" 
Acts26:2 “Agrippa Kumpipa aw, nangma mai-ah Judah mite in hong mawhsakna kiphelna thu, tuni-in gen thei ding ka hih ciangin ka nuam hi." 
Acts26:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in Judah ngeina thu leh thu kidotna khempeuh na siam hi. Tua ahih ciangin dam takin ka thu na ngai ta in. 
Acts26:4 “Jerusalem khua sungah ka mipawlte lakah ka om lai takin, ka neu lai pan akipan ka omzia leh ka hihnate Judah mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi." 
Acts26:5 Judah ngeina tel takpi a zui pen pawl Farisai mi ka hihna hih mite in teci a pan’ nop uh leh, a thei masa bel ahi uh hi." 
Acts26:6 Tu-in Pasian in i pute i pate kiangah a piak thu kiciamna lametna hanginah thukhenna thuakin ka om hi. 
Acts26:7 Judah mipawl sawm-le-nihte in sun leh zanin hahkatin Pasian bia-in, thu kiciamna bangin ngah ding a lamen uh hi. Kumpipa aw, hih lametna hangin Judah mite in hong mawhsak uh hi." 
Acts26:8 Pasian in misite a thokiksak ding hi cih thu up theih ding hilo hi ci-in bang hangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? 
Acts26:9 “Nazareth khua mi Zeisu’ min langpanin ahi thei zahzaha sep ding mah hi ci-in ka kizo khin a," 
Acts26:10 Jerusalem khua-ah tua bangin ka hih zo hi. Siampi liante kiang pan thu ka ngah khit ciangin misiangthote thong sungah ka khia hi. Amaute in sihna a thuak uh ciangin ka thukim hi. 
Acts26:11 Mite in Pasian tungah a pau khialh nadingin thatang hat thu-in hanciamin, kikhopna inn khat pan khat ah tamveipi ka pai hi. Nakpi-in ka heh maninah gamdangte khua dongin amaute ka bawlsia hi." 
Acts26:12 “Tua ahih ciangin siampi liante thupiakna leh lai pua-in Damaskas khua lampi ka pai lai takin," 
Acts26:13 ni sangin a tangzaw, kei leh kei tawh hong paikhawmte kimkot ah hong taang, sun lai takin vantung pan khuavak khat ka mu hi, Kumpipa aw," 
Acts26:14 Kote khempeuh in lei tungah ka puk lai takun, ‘Saul aw, Saul aw, bang hangin hong bawlsia na hi hiam? Ciang hiam na khe tawh peek leteh a haksa hi,’ ci-in Hebru kamin a hong ci aw khat ka za hi." 
Acts26:15 ‘Topa aw, nang kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot leh, ‘Na hong bawlsiat Zeisu ka hi hi." 
Acts26:16 Ahih hangin tho in ding in, Judah mite leh Gentail mite khut sung pan nang hong gumkhia a, nang in na muhsa thute leh a nung ciangin kei in nang kiangah kong kilatsak ding thute," 
Acts26:17 hilh a, teci-a pang za-ah nang kong koih nadingin nang kiangah ka hong kilang zo hi." 
Acts26:18 Tua Gentailte in khuamial sung pan khuavak lamah galkah a, Satan’ ukna pan Pasian kiangah kihei ding a, mawhna kimaisakna a ngah ding uh a, kei hong up manunah sian’thosakna a ngahsa mite tawh luahna a ngah khawm nadingun, amau mittang uh na hon’sak dingin, amau kiangah kong paisak ding hi,’ ci-in thu hong pia hi." 
Acts26:19 “Tua ahih ciangin Agrippa Kumpipa aw, vantung mangmuhna ngai loin ka om kei hi." 
Acts26:20 Amaute kisikkik a, kisikkikna tawh kilawm gamtatna bawlin Pasian kiangah a kihei na’ngun Damaskas khua-ah ka gen masak khit ciangin Jerusalem khua akipan Judah gamah a om mi khempeuh kiangah ahi zongin, Gentailte kiangah ahi zongin ka hilh hi." 
Acts26:21 Tua thu hangin Judah mite in biakna innpi sungah kei hong man uh a, hong thah nading uh a hahkat uh hi." 
Acts26:22 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian kiang panin huhna ka ngah khit ciangin tuni dongin ka om a," 
Acts26:23 Khazih in sihna thuak ding a, sihna pan a thokik masabel ahih ciangin, Judah mipawl leh Gentailte kiangah khuavakna thu a piang ding hi ci-in Moses akipan Pasian’ kamsangte’ thugenna mah kei in behlap loin milian, mineute kiangah teci-in ka pang hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:24 Tua mah bangin Paul in mawhna kiphelhna thu a gen lai takin Festas in, “Paul aw, nang mihai bang na hi hi! Lungpilna tam sinin, mihai na suak zo hi,” ci-in nakpi-in a kiko hi." 
Acts26:25 Paul in, “Mangpa Festas aw, ka hai kei hi. Thuman leh sanhuai thute ka gen hi." 
Acts26:26 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, kumpipa mai-ah ka gen ngam hih thute kumpipa in a thei hi. Hih thu a thei lo khat beek a om kei hi ci-in ka sin sungah ka um hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, hih thute a kilang lo-na munah kibawl ahi kei hi." 
Acts26:27 Kumpipa Agrippa aw, nang in kamsangte thu um na hi hiam? Na um cih ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:28 Agrippa in, “Nang in zolna thu tawm tawh kei Christian nong suaksak dektak hi,” ci-in Paul kiangah a ci hi." 
Acts26:29 Paul in, “Nang akipan tuni-in ka thu a za khempeuh in hih sikkol sim lohin, thu tam tawh ahi zongin, thu tawm tawh ahi zongin, kei tawh kibang na suah theih nadingun Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi!” a ci hi." 
Acts26:30 Tua ciangin Kumpipa leh Bernike, mangpipa leh amau tawh a tukhawmte a ding uh a," 
Acts26:31 a paikhiat khit uh ciangin, “Hih mi in sih nading ahi zongin, kikhum nading ahi zongin a bawl kei hi,” ci-in khat leh khat a kikum uh hi." 
Acts26:32 Agrippa in, “Tua pa in, ‘Kaisar kumpipa kiangah azu ka khan ding hi,’ ci hi kei leh, a khah tuak hi,” ci-in Festas kiangah a ci hi." 
Acts27:1 Italy gam teembaw-ah tuangin ka pai ding uh a kitel khit ciangin, Julias min nei Augustus pawl galkap mangpa’ khut tungah Paul leh thong sunga kikhum midangte a pai uh hi." 
Acts27:2 Asia gam tuipi gei-ah a om khuate ah pai dinga kisa Adramittium teembaw tungah tuangin ka pai uh hi. Makedonia gam Thesalonika khua mi Aristarkhas kote tawh a omkhawm hi. 
Acts27:3 A zing ciangin Sidon khua ka tun’ uh ciangin, ama lawmte kiangah pai-in an vakna a ngah theih nadingin Julias in Paul hehpihin thu a pia hi." 
Acts27:4 Tua khua pan ka paikhia uh a, huih kituak lo ahih ciangin Saipras lam gam huih dalsakin pai-in," 
Acts27:5 Kilikia gam leh Pamfilia gam kikal tuipi ka galkah uh ciangin Licia gam Mura khua-ah ka tung uh hi. 
Acts27:6 Tua khua-ah Italy gamah a pai ding Alekzandria teembaw khat galkap mangpa in mu a, tua teembaw tungah kote hong tuang sak hi." 
Acts27:7 Damdamin pai-in, ni tampi ka pai khit uh ciangin Nidas khua tawh a kitang mun haksapi-in ka tun’ khit uh ciangin, huih kiphu zo nawn lo ahih ciangin Krete gam huih kidalsakin Salmone leizum tawh a kitang takin ka pai uh a," 
Acts27:8 Krete gam pamah pai-in Lasia khua tawh kinai Khawlmun Nuam kici mun khatah haksapi-in ka tung uh hi. 
Acts27:9 Ni tampi bei a, antan’na hun bei zo ahih ciangin, tuipi galkah nading launa om ahih manin Paul in," 
Acts27:10 “Tote aw, tuipi galkah leng teembaw leh vante tham loin, eite nuntakna zong kisia ding hi ci-in ka thei hi,” ci-in kikep nading thu a hilh hi." 
Acts27:11 Ahih hangin galkap mangpa in Paul’ kam ngai loin teembaw ukte leh teembaw neite thu a ngai hi. 
Acts27:12 Tua teembaw khawlna munah phalbi sung tawntung om huai lo ahih ciangin, “Tua lai mun pan paikhia-in Foenik khua i tun’ zawh leh, phaibi sung tawntung tua lai-ah tam leng a hoihzaw ding hi,” ci-in mi a tamzaw in a gen uh hi. Foenik khua in Krete gam teembaw khawlna mun hi a, saklam nitumna leh khanglam nitumna lam a maingat khawm hi." 
Acts27:13 Khang lam huih in damtakin hong nun’ ciangin kipai thei ding hi ci-in ngaihsunin khawlna sikkawi lian a khai khit uh ciangin a pai uh a, Krete tuipi gei kinai-ah a pai uh hi." 
Acts27:14 A sawt kihal loin Eurakuilo kici huihpi in lei lam panin nung a," 
Acts27:15 tembaw in phu zo lo ahih ciangin kote in nial zo loin huih mutna lam ka zui uh hi. 
Acts27:16 Kauda kici tuikulh huih kidalsakin ka pai uh a, gunkuang kisia lo dingin haksapi-in ka la uh a," 
Acts27:17 teembaw tungah a khai khit uh ciangin, khau tawh teembaw a gak uh hi. Sirti kici sehnel tungah ka awk khak ding uh hi cih ka lunghihmawh manunah puan a sutkhiat khit ciangin huih in hong mut a, hong lenpih hi." 
Acts27:18 Tui kihot pha mahmaha kiliing ahih ciangin zingsang ciangin vante tui sungah a paaikhia uh hi. 
Acts27:19 Ni thum khit ciangin amaute khut uh tawh teembaw nate a paaikhia uh hi. 
Acts27:20 Ni leh kha leh aksite sawt veipi kimu loin, huihpi nakpi nung ahih ciangin, ka suahtak ding uh lametna a om kei hi." 
Acts27:21 Amaute in an ne loin, sawt veipi a om khit uh ciangin Paul in amaute laizangah ding-in “Tote aw, ka thu na ngaih uh leh, Krete gam panin pai loin na om le-uhcin, hih kisiatna tawh na kipelh ding uh hi." 
Acts27:22 Tu-in ahih leh, lungmang kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, teembaw longal, kuamah a kisia kei ding hi." 
Acts27:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hong uk leh kei in a na ka sepsak Pasian’ vantungmi khat in tuzanin ka kiangah ding a," 
Acts27:24 ‘Paul aw, nang lunghimawh kei in. Kaisar kumpipa mai-ah na ding ding hi. Nangmah tawh teembaw sungah a omkhawm mi khempeuhte Pasian in nang hong pia zo hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts27:25 Tua ahih ciangin tote aw, lungnuamin om un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kei tungah thu hong piak bang ahih ding Pasian suangin ka om hi." 
Acts27:26 Ahih hangin tuikulh khatpeuh tungah i kipaaikhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:27 Ni sawm-le-li ni zaninah Andria tuipi sungah ka kikawi heihei lai takun, zan kim ciangin a kinaipen gam khat peuhmah ka tung dektak uh ci-in teembaw nasemte in ummawh uh a," 
Acts27:28 tui a teh ciangun lam sawmnih a thuk a thei uh hi. Tawmvei khit ciangin tui a tehkik uh ciangin, lam sawm-le-nga a thuk a thei uh hi." 
Acts27:29 Suangpi ka phut khak ding uh a lunghimawh manunah, teembaw tawlam a mong gei panin teembaw khawlna sikkawi li a khia uh a, khuavak ding ka ngak uh hi." 
Acts27:30 Teembaw nasemte in teembaw a taisan nuam uh a, teembaw lu lam panin teembaw khawlna sikkawi khiatsuk bangin, gunkuang a khiatsuk lai takun," 
Acts27:31 Paul in, “Hih mite in teembaw tungah a om kei uh leh, note na suakta kei ding uh hi,” ci-in galkap mangpa leh galkapte kiangah a gen hi." 
Acts27:32 Tua ciangin galkapte in gunkuang khau sat tat uh a, a khahkhia uh hi." 
Acts27:33 Khua a vak dektak lai takin an ne dingin Paul in mi khempeuh hansuah a, “Note in ni sawm-le-li tawntung an ngawlin, gil kialin na om uh hi." 
Acts27:34 Tua ahih ciangin an ne dingin kong thuum hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note noptuam nading ahi hi." 
Acts27:35 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note samzang khat nangawn kisia lo ding hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin Paul in, khomun la a, tua mite mai-ah Pasian’ hehpihna a phat khit ciangin balnenin a ne hi." 
Acts27:36 Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh in zong lungnuamin an a ne uh hi. 
Acts27:37 Teembaw sungah a om komau khempeuh in zanih sawm-sagih-guk ka pha uh hi. 
Acts27:38 An a nek khit uh ciangin buhhumte tuipi sungah khia-in teembaw a zangsak uh hi. 
Acts27:39 Khua a vak ciangin tua gam a theih loh uh hangin, tui gei-ah sehnel a om, tui dawk khat a mu uh hi. Tua sehnel tungah teembaw kikhangsak ding hiam, kikhangsak lo ding hiam ci-in a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts27:40 Sikkawi a khahkhia uh a, tuipi sungah a nutsiat khit uh ciangin, a hawhna a phel uh a, teembaw lu lam panin a puan huih lakah khai-in tui dawk lamah teembaw a phusak uh hi." 
Acts27:41 Tui kilokna nih kituahna mun a phak uh ciangin teembaw leitungah kingam a, teembaw a lulam teng tang thei loin om a, a nung lam tui kilok in satkhia a, a sia hi." 
Acts27:42 Tua lai takin thongkiate in tui peeka a taimang ding uh a lunghihmawh manunah galkapte in, “That ni,” ci-in a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts27:43 Ahih hangin galkap mangpa in Paul a suahtaksak nop maninah galkapte’ hihna kham a, “Tui peek siamte in peek masa uh a, lei tungah a tung masa ding uh hi." 
Acts27:44 A om laite in singpeek tung ahi zongin, teembaw sungah a om nadangte tung ahi zongin, tuangin a pai ding uh hi.” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuhte in lei tungah a suakta uh hi." 
Acts28:1 Ka suahtak khit uh ciangin Malta tuikulh gam hi cih ka thei uh hi. 
Acts28:2 Guahzu a, khua dam ahih ciangin tua gam mite in mei cihin kote khempeuh pha takpi hong hehpih uh hi." 
Acts28:3 Paul in sing lom khat la a, mei tungah a khul lai takin gul khat in meikhu lak pan pusuakin Paul’ khut a tu hi." 
Acts28:4 Tua gam mite in gul in a khutah a om a muh uh ciangin, “Hih pa in mi thatpa ahi takpi zo hi. Tuipi launa pan a suahtak hangin a hin’ nadingin thuman in thu a pia kei hi,” ci-in khat leh khat a kici uh hi." 
Acts28:5 Ahih hangin Paul in gul mei sungah singkhia a, bangmah natna thuak lo hi." 
Acts28:6 Ama pumpi khempeuh bawk ahi zongin, thakhatin pukin a si ding ahi zongin, tua mite in a sawt veipi a ngak uh hangin, ama tungah siatna khat beek piang lo a muh uh ciangin, a lungsim uh kikheel a, “Hih pa in pasian ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts28:7 Tua mun pan kigamla lo Publias kici tuikulh gam sung hausapa a om hi. Tua hausapa in kote hong tung sak a, ni thum tawntung pha takpi-in hong vaak hi." 
Acts28:8 Publias’ pa in nattun leh gilsan vei-in a lum hi. Tua cinapa kiangah Paul in lut a, thu a nget khit ciangin a tungah a khut nga-in, cinatna a damsak hi." 
Acts28:9 Tua bang ahih ciangin tua tuikulh-a cina dangte hong pai uh a, damna a ngah uh hi." 
Acts28:10 Tua mite in lungdamna tampi hong pia uh a, teembaw tungah ka tuan’ kik uh ciangin ka sapnate uh teembaw tungah a koih uh hi." 
Acts28:11 Kha thum khit ciangin Ta Peeng milim a om, tua tuikulh gamah phalbi sung tawntung a khawl Alekzandria teembaw tungah ka tuang kik uh a," 
Acts28:12 Sirakhas khua tungin ni thum ka taam uh hi. 
Acts28:13 Tua san tak panin ka paikik uh ciangin kawi pai-in, Regium khua ka tung uh a, ni khat ka taam khit uh ciangin, khang lam pan huih nung a, ni nihin Puteoli khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts28:14 Tua khua-ah ute naute tawh kimu-in, “Ni sagih sung hong taam un,” hong cih mah bangun ka taam khit uh ciangin, Rom khua-ah ka pai uh hi." 
Acts28:15 Rom khua-ah a om ute naute in kote paina thu a zak uh ciangin hong dawn ding kimkhatte in Appias Sumbuk dongin, kimkhatte in Mangbuk Thum dongin hong pai uh hi. Paul in tua mite a muh ciangin Pasian’ hehpihna phatin a lungdam uh hi." 
Acts28:16 Rom khua-ah ka tun’uh ciangin Paul in a cing galkap tawh a ut bangin a om theih na’ng thu a ngah hi. 
Acts28:17 Ni thum khit ciangin Paul in Judah mi upate a kikhopsak khit ciangin, “Ute naute aw, kei in Judah mite tung ahi zongin, i pute i pate’ ngeina tung ahi zongin, ka khial lo napi-in, Jerusalem khua mite in hong man uh a, Rom mite’ khut sungah hong pia uh hi." 
Acts28:18 Amaute in kei hong dot khit uh ciangin sih nading mawhna thu a muh loh uh ciangin, hong khah nuam uh hi." 
Acts28:19 Tua bang a deihna, Judah mite in a nial uh ciangin, Kaisar Kumpipa kiangah azukhan ding ka ngaihsun hi. Tua bang ka cihna in ka mi pawlte tungah mawhsak nading ka cihna ahi kei hi." 
Acts28:20 Tua ahih ciangin note mu-in, hong hopih dingin kong sam hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Israel pawlte’ lametna thu hangin hih sikkhau khihna ka thuak hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts28:21 Tua mite in “Nang thu zaksakna lai Judah gam panin ka ngah kei uh hi. Tua gam pan a hong tung a, nangmah hong mawhsak ute naute kuamah a om kei hi." 
Acts28:22 Ahih hangin hih biakna in gam khempeuh ah kosiatna a thuak cih thei ka hih manun, na upna thu nangma kiang pan ka ngai nuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts28:23 Kimuh nading ni a seh uh ciangin mi tampite in Paul’ omna-ah hong pai uh a, Paul in Pasian’ Gam thu teci pang a, tuate in Zeisu thu a up nadingun Moses’ Thukham lai leh Pasian’ kamsangte lai paulamin thu hilhin, zingsang akipan nitum dongin a zol hi." 
Acts28:24 Kimkhatte in Paul’ thu gen a um uh hi. Kimkhatte in a um kei uh hi. 
Acts28:25 Tua mah bangin khat leh khat thu kituak loin, Paul in thu khat a gen khit ciangin a paikhia uh hi. Paul in, “Kha Siangtho in kamsangpa Isaiah tungah na pute na pate kiang uh ah a kituakin a gen hi." 
Acts28:26 ‘Pai in la, hih mite tungah hih bangin ci in, zaza napi tel lo; mumu napi thei lo," 
Acts28:27 Amaute in a mit uh tawh a muh loh nading, a bil uh tawh a zak loh nading, A lungsim uh tawh thu a theihtel loh nading, amaute kihei-in damna a ngah loh nadingun, amau lungsim uh mawl a, amau bil uh ngong a, a mit uh a si hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts28:28 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in hong piak hih gupna thu Gentailte kiangah kipuak ding a," 
Acts28:29 amaute in zong a sang ding uh hi ci-in note in thei ta un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts28:30 Paul in kum nih tawntung a sap innah om a, ama kiangah a pai khempeuh tung sak hi." 
Acts28:31 Nawngkaina khat beek om loin, nop takin Pasian’ Gam thu gen a, Topa Zeisu Khazih’ thu a hilh hi." 
Romans1:1 Mipawl lamsang ah David’ suan ahi, sihna pan a thawhkikna hangin a siangtho Kha lamsang ah vangliatna a nei, Pasian’ Ta kici i Topa Zeisu Khazih ahi," 
Romans1:2 Pasian in a Tapa thu nidang lai-inah kamsangte tungah Lai Siangtho sungah thukiciamna Lungdamna Thu hilh nadingin a teelsa sawltak a, hong koih, Khazih Zeisu’ nasem keimah Paul in" 
Romans1:3  
Romans1:4 Rom khua sungah a om misiangtho kikoih Pasian a it khempeuhte kiangah thu kong zasak hi. Tua Topa Zeisu Khazih leh i Pa Pasian’ hehpihna thupha leh nopna in nomau tungah om ta hen. Tua Topa Zeisu’ min hangin mipawl khempeuh in a up nadingin ama kiangah hehpihna thupha leh sawltak-za ka ngah hi. Zeisu Khazih’ mi suah nading hong sapsa note in zong tua mite lakah na om uh hi. 
Romans1:5  
Romans1:6  
Romans1:7  
Romans1:8 Nomau thu-upna in leitung gam khempeuh ah kizel ahih ciangin nomau hangin Zeisu Khazih tawh Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat masa bel hi. 
Romans1:9 Keimah in thu ka nget ciangin, note thu tawh zomin thu ka ngen niloh hi ci-in a Tapa’ Lungdamna Thu hilhin ka lungsim sungah a na ka sep Pasian in keima lamah teci ahi hi." 
Romans1:10 A nunung belin Pasian’ deihna in hong awi leh, nomau kiangah kong tun’ nadingin thu ka ngen hi." 
Romans1:11 Note na lungkip theih nadingun note kiangah Kha Siangtho’ thupha hehpihna khat peuhmah kong piak na’ngin nomau mu nuam ka hi hi. 
Romans1:12 Tua bang ka cihna in keimah leh nomau in thu-upna tawh khat leh khat nopna i ngah khawm ding ka cihnopna hi. 
Romans1:13 Ute naute aw, Gentail adangte lakah gah ka ngah mah bangin nomau lakah zong ka ngah nadingin nomau kiangah pai ning ci-in tamveipi ka hanciam ci-in note in na theih loh ding uh ka deih kei hi. Ahih hangin tu dongin, hong kham a om hi." 
Romans1:14 Grik mite ahi zongin, mi pil lote ahi zongin, siamna a nei mite ahi zongin, siamna a nei lo mite ahi zongin tuate khempeuh tungah leiba nei ka hi hi." 
Romans1:15 Tua ahih ciangin ka hih theih zahin Rom khua-ah a om note kiangah zong Lungdamna Thu kong hilh nuam hi. 
Romans1:16 Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu hangin ka maizum kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua thu in a masa-in Judah mite, a nung ciangin Grik mite akipan a um mi khempeuh in gupna a ngah nading Pasian’ vangliatna ahi hi." 
Romans1:17 “Midikte in thu-upna tawh a nungta ding hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, thu-up nadingin thu-upna tawh Pasian’ dikna a kilang zo hi." 
Romans1:18 Gitlohna tawh thuman thutak a nial mite a gitlohna tungah Pasian’ hehna in vantung panin hong kilang hi. 
Romans1:19 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ thu a kiteltakin amaute lakah a kilang hi." 
Romans1:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama tawntung vangliatna leh siangthona ahi, mit tawh kimu thei lo nate, lei apian’cil a kipan kilangin a kimu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a kisuahtak thei kei ding uh hi." 
Romans1:21 Amaute in Pasian a thei uh hi napi-in Pasian phat ding a kilawm zahin a phat kei uh a, ama hehpihna phat lo uh tham loin, amau in mawkna-in a ngaihsun uh a, ciamteh thei loin amau lungsim uh a mial hi." 
Romans1:22 “Lungpil mi ka hi uh hi,” a cih uh hangin mihai suak uh a," 
Romans1:23 kisia thei lo Pasian’ vangliatna in a sia thei mite ahi zongin, vasate ahi zongin, khe li nei ganhingte ahi zongin, bawkbak a, paite ahi zongin, tuate a milim tawh a kheek uh hi." 
Romans1:24 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in amau pumpi uh, amau mah in a siatsak theih nadingun amaute in lunggulhna a neih uh bangin kihhuaina sungah a pia hi." 
Romans1:25 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ thuman thutak pen thuzuau tawh a kheek uh a, a Piangsakpa nusia-in a pian’sakte a bia uh hi. Tua Topa in thupha a ngah tawntung hi. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Tua bang ahih uh ciangin Pasian in amaute zumhuai lunggulhna khut sungah a pia hi. Amau numeite in a ngeina bang zui loin, a ngeina tawh kituak lo lam a zui uh hi." 
Romans1:27 Tua mah bangin pasalte in zong numeite tawh bawlna ngeina nusia-in, khat leh khat kilunggulh uh a, pasal khat leh khat zumhuai kibawl uh a, amaute mawhna tawh kituak daan a pum sung uh ah a thuak uh hi." 
Romans1:28 Amaute in Pasian thei nuam lo uh ahih ciangin a kituak lo nate ahih nading Pasian in amaute gitlohna lungsim sungah a piak mah bangin," 
Romans1:29 diklohna tawh, gitlohna tawh, duhgawh huaihamna tawh, hazatna tawh, en’na tawh, mi thahna tawh, kitotna tawh, kheemna tawh, etsat muhdahna tawh a dim uh hi." 
Romans1:30 Amaute in mi gendai thei mi, hangsan mi, Pasian mudah mi, kheltat mi, kisathei mi, kiphasak mi, mi’ gitlohna a piangsak mi, a nute a pate’ thu a ngai lo mi," 
Romans1:31 kikepna nei lo mi, kiciam pelh mi, unau it lo mi, hehpih lungsim nei lo mi a suak uh hi." 
Romans1:32 Tua bang gamtate in sihna daan a thuak ding uh ci-in Pasian’ thukham thei napi-in, amaute in ahih uh tham loin, tua bang ahih mite a awi uh hi." 
Romans2:1 Tua ahih ciangin midangte thukhenpa aw, na kisuahtak thei kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, midangte tungah thu na khen bangin nangmah in na hih ahih ciangin midangte thu na khenna in nangma mawhna om hi cih thukhen na suak hi." 
Romans2:2 Tua bang ahihte tungah Pasian’ thukhenna in a mantak hi cih i thei hi. 
Romans2:3 Tua bang ahihte tungah thu na khen lai takin tua bang a hilhpa aw, Pasian’ thukhenna tawh na kipelh ding cih na ki-um hiam?" 
Romans2:4 Pasian’ hehpihna thupha in nang kisikna lamah hong zol ciamteh loin na om lai takin, a kicing hehpihna leh lungduaina leh itnate don lo na hi hiam?" 
Romans2:5 Tua bangin na lungkhauh leh, a kisik nuam lo na lungsim mah bangin Pasian’ hehna leh Pasian’ thuman thukhenna a kilat Ni ciangin na pumpi tungah hehna na khol hi." 
Romans2:6 Pasian in tua Ni ciangin a gamtatna tek bangin mi khempeuh mawhna a thukkik ding hi. 
Romans2:7 A pha lamsang ah gamta a, minthan’na, zahtakna, leh muat lohna a zong mite nuntak tawntungna a pia ding hi." 
Romans2:8 Paupeng lungsim mi, thuman thutak a ngai lo mi, a dik lo thu a ngai mite tungah hehna leh thangpaihna a koih ding hi." 
Romans2:9 A masabel Judah mi, a nung ciangin Grik mi, gitlohna ahihte khempeuh a kha tung uh ah gimna leh dahnate a tung ding uh hi." 
Romans2:10 Amasa belin Judah mi, a nung ciangin Grik mi, a hoih a gamta mi khempeuh tungah minthan’na leh vangliatna leh nopnate a tung ding uh hi." 
Romans2:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in kuama maitang a zahtak kei hi." 
Romans2:12 Thukham thei lo-a khialte in Thukham loin a sia ding uh hi. Thukham thei napi-in mawhna ahihte in Thukham bangin thukhenna a thuak ding uh hi. 
Romans2:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Thukham a zate in Pasian mai-ah dikkisakna a ngah kei ding uh hi; Thukham banga a zuite bek in dikkisakna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans2:14 Pasian Thukham a thei lo Gentailte in amau ngeina thu bangin zui-in Thukham mah bangin ahih uh ciangin, tuate in Thukham a thei lo uh napi-in amau in amaute ading thukham ahi uh hi." 
Romans2:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amau kitheihna lungsim un teci pangin, amau kingaihsutnate in khat leh khat kikumin, kimawhsakin ahi zongin, kimaisakin ahi zongin, amaute lungsim sungah Thukham deihna tawh kituak ciamtehna a om cih a kilangsak hi." 
Romans2:16 Ka thuhilh Lungdamna Thu bangin Pasian in Zeisu Khazih tawh mite’ selsim lungngaihna a khen Ni ciangin tua bangin a khen ding hi. 
Romans2:17 Nang Judah mi kicihna ngah a, Thukham muang a," 
Romans2:18 Pasian hangah kisathei-in ama deihna thei a, Thukham simin lamdang nate a khen thei mi na hi a," 
Romans2:19 mittawte lam hilh mi, khuamial sungah a omte khuavaksak mi," 
Romans2:20 mihaite thuhilh mi, naupangte zong thuhilh mi, Thukham hanga pilna leh thuman thutak a nei mi na hi ci-in na kingaihsun takpi ahih leh," 
Romans2:21 midangte thuhilhpa aw, nangmah zong kihilh lo na hi hiam? Mi’ sum gu kei in ci-a thuhilhpa aw, nangmah in zong na gu hiam?" 
Romans2:22 Mi’ zi tawh mawh kei in ci-a thuhilhpa aw, nangmah in zong mi’ zi tungah mawh na hi hiam? Milim a kihhuaisapa aw, nangmah in milim biakna inn luhgawp na hi hiam?" 
Romans2:23 Thukham suangin a kisatheipa aw, Thukham na khialh maninah Pasian’ min daisak na hi hiam?" 
Romans2:24 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, nangmah hangin Gentailte lakah Pasian’ min kigensia hi." 
Romans2:25 Pasian’ Thukham na zuih leh, vun atna hangin noptuamna a om hi. Ahi zongin Thukham na khialh leh, na vun atna in vun at lohna a suak kik hi." 
Romans2:26 Tua ahih ciangin vun ki-at lo mi in Thukham a zuih leh, ama vun at lohna in vun atna bangin kingaihsun ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Romans2:27 Vun at lo mi in ama thuthuin Thukham a zuih leh, Lai Siangtho leh vun atna a nei napi-in Thukham a khial nangma tungah thu hong khen ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Romans2:28 Pua lam Judah mi in Judah mi hi takpi lo hi. Pua lam pan pumpi tungah sa-ah vun atna in vun atna takpi hi lo hi. 
Romans2:29 A sung lam Judah mi in Judah mi ahi takpi hi. Vun atna in zong thukham Lai Siangtho thu bang hi lo, Kha Siangtho bangin lungsim tawh a kipawl hi. Tua banga vun at mite in mite kiangah phatna ngah loin, Pasian kiangah phatna a ngah uh hi." 
Romans3:1 Tua ahih leh, Judah mite bang a hampha uh hiam? Vun ki-at hangin hamphatna a om hiam?" 
Romans3:2 A pawlpawl phattuamna tampi a om hi. A lianbel phattuamna ahih leh, amaute kiangah Pasian’ thu a kipia zo hi." 
Romans3:3 Judah mi kimkhatte in upna nei lo ahih uh leh, a up lohna un Pasian’ dikna a siasak ding hiam?" 
Romans3:4 Tua bang hi lo ding hi! “Na thupiakna in na thutan’na kilangsak hi, Thukhenna na thuak ciangin na gualzo ding hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin mi khempeuhte in thuciamna a pelh mi a kicih uh hangin, Pasian in thuman thutakpa hi ta hen." 
Romans3:5 Ahih hangin eite diklohna in Pasian’ dikna a kilatsak leh, bang thu gen ding a om hiam? Daan hong pia Pasian in ahi lopi-in bawl ahi hiam ci-in leitung ngeina bangin ka gen hi." 
Romans3:6 Tua bang hi zenzen lo ding hi. Tua bang ahih leh, Pasian in leitung mite bang ci thu a khen thei ding hiam?" 
Romans3:7 Keima thuzuau hanga Pasian’ thuman in a vangliatna a khan’sak leh, bang hangin kei mawhna nei bang hong khen lai ding hiam?" 
Romans3:8 Phatna a pian’ nadingin phat lohna gamta ni ci-in mi kimkhatte in hong kosia uh a, komau kam hong dawn’ kik uh mah bangin ka gen kik lai ding uh hiam? Tua bang a gente in thuman daan a thuak ding uh hi." 
Romans3:9 Tua ahih leh, bang kici ding hiam? Ei Judah mite in tua Gentailte sangin phazaw i hi hiam? Phazaw i hi zenzen kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Judah mi leh Grik mi khempeuhte in mawhna nei tuak uh hi cih thu a masa-in ka lak zo hi." 
Romans3:10 Lai Siangtho sungah: “Midik khat beek a om kei hi. 
Romans3:11 A thei khat beek a om kei hi. Pasian a zong mi khat beek a om kei hi. 
Romans3:12 Amau khempeuh in lam a pial zo uh hi, A vekpi-un a kiman’na om lo hi. A hoih a, gamta a om kei hi, Khat nangawn a om kei hi." 
Romans3:13 Amau gawlgui un a kihongsa hankhuk ahi uh hi. Amau leii uh tawh mi a kheem zo uh hi. Amau muk sung uh ah gul hangsante’ gu a om hi. 
Romans3:14 Amaute kam un hangsan’na leh kamkhauh tawh a dim hi. 
Romans3:15 Amau khe un mi sisan suah dingin a manlang hi. 
Romans3:16 Amau paina lampi-ah kisiatna leh gimna a dim hi. 
Romans3:17 Nopna lampi amau in a thei kei uh hi. 
Romans3:18 Pasian kihtakna thu Amau mittang mai uh ah a om kei hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans3:19 Thukham in a gen thu khempeuh thukham nuai-ah a om mite kiangah a gen hi cih i thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin kam a vekpi kikham uh a, leitungmi khempeuhte in Pasian mai-ah mawhsakna a thuak ding uh hi." 
Romans3:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thukham tawh mawhna kilang ahih ciangin thukham a zuihna tawh, Pasian mai-ah kuamah in dikkisakna a ngah kei ding hi." 
Romans3:21 Tu-in Thukhamna leh kamsangte in teci a pan’ uh mah bangin, thukham loin Zeisu Khazih sungah thu-um mite khempeuh tungah upna hangin hong tung Pasian’ dikna kilang hi." 
Romans3:22 Kilamdan’na neukha beek a om kei hi. 
Romans3:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khempeuh a mawh uh a, Pasian’ maipha a ngah nading uh kisia hi." 
Romans3:24 Ahih hangin Zeisu Khazih in hong tan ahih maninah, a man pia loin Pasian’ hehpihna hangin dikkisakna i ngah hi." 
Romans3:25 Pasian in hong hehpihin a kihih khinsa mawhna a ngaihsut lohna in ama dikna thu kilat nangin ahi zongin," 
Romans3:26 tu laitak ama dikna hong kilangsak a, Zeisu a um mite diksa a, amahmah in dikna a bawl ding ahi zongin, Zeisu’ si thu-upna tawh mawh kimaisakna ding Zeisu a koih hi." 
Romans3:27 Tua ahih ciangin kisaktheih nading koi-ah a om hiam na cih uh leh, a kipaaikhia zo hi. Bang thu tawh kipaai hiam? Gamtatna tawh kipaaikhia ahi hiam? Hi lo hi! Thu-upna tawh kipaaikhia hi." 
Romans3:28 Tua ahih ciangin mi khat in thukham bang gamta loin upna tawh dikkisakna a ngah hi ci-in i ciamteh hi. 
Romans3:29 Pasian in Judah mite’ Pasian bek ahi hiam? Gentailte’ Pasian zong hilo ahi hiam? Ahi mah hi. Pasian khat bek a om leh, Gentailte’ Pasian zong ahi hi." 
Romans3:30 Tua Pasian in upna bangin vun atte leh vun at lote a dik a sa ding hi. 
Romans3:31 Tua ahih leh, upna hangin eite in thukham paaikhia i hi hiam? Tua bang hi lo hi. Thukham i kip sak hi." 
Romans4:1 I pu Abraham in mi lamsang ah bang phattuamna a ngah i ci ding hiam? 
Romans4:2 Abraham in gamtatna hangin dikkisakna a ngah leh, kisaktheih na’ng thu a om hi. Ahih hangin Pasian mai-ah tua bang hi lo hi." 
Romans4:3 Lai Siangtho sungah bang kigelh ahi hiam? “Abraham in Pasian’ thu um ahih ciangin ama upna in amah tang ding dikna-in kiciamteh hi,”" 
Romans4:4 Nasem mi in phattuamna a ngah ciangin hehpihna a ngah hi kici lo hi; thaman a ngah hi kici hi. 
Romans4:5 A sem lo a, Pasian zahtak lo mi a diksakpa’ thu a um mi’ upna in amah tang ding dikkisakna-in kiciamteh hi." 
Romans4:6 Tua mah bangin David in sem loin Pasian’ diksakna a ngah mi thupha a pia hi: 
Romans4:7 “A khialhna uh maisakna leh a mawhna uh seelna a ngah mite in Thupha a ngah uh hi. 
Romans4:8 Pasian’ mawhsakna tawh kipelh mi in Thupha a ngah hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Romans4:9 Tua ahih ciangin hih thupha vun atte bek a pia hiam? Ahih kei leh, vun at lote a pia hiam? Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Abraham tang ding ama thu-upna in dikna-in kiciamteh hi,” i ci hi." 
Romans4:10 Tua bang i cih leh, bang ci kiciamteh hiam? Vun atna a thuak khit ciangin a kiciamteh hiam? Vun atna a thuak ma-in a kiciamteh hiam? A thuak khit ciangin a kiciamteh kei hi." 
Romans4:11 Vun atna a thuak nai loh hangin upna dikna bangin kiciamteh nading i pa Abraham in tua mite’ pa a suah na’ng ahi zongin," 
Romans4:12 vun atna a thuak tham loin i pa Abraham in vun atna a thuak nai loh lai takin upna lam a zuite khempeuh’pa uh a suah nading ahi zongin, Abraham in vun atna a thuak nai loh lai takin upna a neih dikna-a ciamtehna ahi vun atna lim a ngah hi." 
Romans4:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, leitung a luahsak nading Abraham ahi zongin, a suante ahi zongin, a thuciamna a ngahna in thukham tawh a ngah kei uh hi; upna tawh kipawl dikna hangin a ngah uh hi." 
Romans4:14 Thukham tawh kipawlte bek in gamh a luah uh leh, upna thu a siasak a, kiciamna zong a mawkna ahi hi." 
Romans4:15 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, thukham in hehna a piangsak hi. Ahih hangin thukham om kei leh, khialhna zong a om kei hi." 
Romans4:16 Tua ahih ciangin kiciamna in Thukham tawh kipawlte tham loin, Abraham’ upna tawh kipawlte zong Abraham’ suan-le-khakte khempeuh tungah a kip nadingin hehpihna tawh kibangin a pian’ nadingin upna hangin kiciamna a ngah uh hi." 
Romans4:17 “Ke’n nangmah mipawl tampite’ pa ka hong suaksak zo hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin a site thosak a, a piang nai lote a piangsa bangin a ciamtehpa Pasian ahi, amah in a up Pasian mai-ah Abraham in eite khempeuh’ pa ahi hi." 
Romans4:18 “Na suan na khakte in tua bang a piang ding hi,” ci-in thu piakkholhna bangin mipawl tampite’pa a suah nading amah in lawp nading om lo napi-in umin, lawpin a om hi." 
Romans4:19 Tua upna kiam loin ama kum in zakhat dektak pha a, a pum in a sih thu ahi zongin a zi Sarah’ gil a sih thu ahi zongin a ngaihsut hangin," 
Romans4:20 upkhialhna tawh Pasian’ thuciamna lungka loin," 
Romans4:21 upna a lianin Pasian phat a, a ciampa in a ciamna bangin a bawl thei ding hi ci-in pha takpi-in a um hi." 
Romans4:22 Tua ahih ciangin upna in ama tangding dikna-in a kiciamteh hi. 
Romans4:23 Tua bang ciamtehna in Abraham ading bekin Lai Siangtho sungah gelh ahi kei hi. 
Romans4:24 Eite adingin zong a gelh hi. Eite in Topa Zeisu sihna pan a tho kiksakpa i up leh, tua upna eite ading dikna bangin hong ciamteh ding hi." 
Romans4:25 Tua Topa in eite khialhna hangin kipia a, eite in dikkisakna i ngah nadingin a kithosak kik hi." 
Romans5:1 Tua ahih ciangin i upna tawh dikkisakna i ngah ahih ciangin eite Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin Pasian tawh i kilem hi. 
Romans5:2 Tua Topa hangin eite omna hehpihna sungah upna hangin tum theihna thu i ngah hi; Pasian’ vangliatna lamenin lungdamin i om hi. 
Romans5:3 Tua tham loin gimna i thuak ciangin i lungdam hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, gimna in thuakzawhna a piangsak hi." 
Romans5:4 Thuakzawhna in teci kilatsakna a piangsak hi. Teci kilatsakna in lawpna a piangsak hi. 
Romans5:5 Lawpna in hong zumsak lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hong piak Kha Siangtho in Pasian’ itna eite sin sungah hong sung zo hi." 
Romans5:6 Eite in thaneemin i om lai takin a kilawm hunin Khazih in mi gilote tangding a si hi. 
Romans5:7 A dik mi tangdinga a si ding mi haksa hi. Midik tangding a si ngam mi a om kha ding hi taleh," 
Romans5:8 eite in mawh nei i hih lai takin Khazih in eite tang ding si ahih ciangin Pasian in eite hong itna hong kilangsak hi. 
Romans5:9 Tua ahih ciangin ama si tawh dikkisakna i ngah khit ciangin tua Topa hangin Pasian’ hehna tawh i kipelh zaw ding hi. 
Romans5:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in galte i hih lai takin ama Tapa in sihna a thuakna hangin eite in Pasian tawh kilem i hih leh, ama hin’na tawh gupna i ngah zaw ding hi." 
Romans5:11 Tua tham loin, i Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin kilemna thu i ngah zo ahih ciangin, tua Zeisu hangin Pasian kiangah i lungdam hi." 
Romans5:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi khat hangin khialhna in leitungah tung a, mawhna hangin sihna a piang mah bangin, mi khempeuhte in zong a mawh zo uh ahih ciangin, mi khempeuh tungah sihna hong tung hi." 
Romans5:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thukham a om ma-inah leitungah mawhna a om hi. Ahih hangin thukham om lo hi leh, mawhna a om hi cih nading a om kei hi." 
Romans5:14 Ahih hangin Adam’ khang pana kipan Moses’ khang dongin sihna in Adam’ khialhna bangin a khial lote nangawn a uk hi. Tua Adam in a nung ciangin hong piang ding mi’ lim ahi hi. 
Romans5:15 Ahih hangin mawhna leh hehpihna kibang lo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khat a khial ahih maninah, mi tampi a si uh ahih leh, Zeisu Khazih kici mi khat’ hehpihna thupha hanga i ngah lungdamna leh Pasian’ hehpihna thupha in mi tampi ading a kicing hi." 
Romans5:16 Mi khat’ mawhna hangin a piang na leh hehpihna a kibang kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mawhna khat hangin daan thuak hen cihna thu a khen hi. Hehpihna panin mawhna tampi om napi-in mai ta hen cihna thu a khen hi." 
Romans5:17 Mi khat a khial ahih maninah, tua mi hangin sihna in a uk leh, Zeisu Khazih kici mi khat hangah hehpihna thu kicing a, dikna leh hehpihna a ngah mite in nuntakna a ukzaw ding uh hi." 
Romans5:18 Tua ahih ciangin mi khat hangin mi khempeuh in daan thuak hen ci-in thu kikhenna a thuak uh mah bangin dikna tawh kipawl hihna khat hangin mi khempeuhte in nuntakna tawh kipawl dikkisakna a ngah uh hi. 
Romans5:19 Mi khat in thu a ngaih loh maninah, mi tampite in mawhnei mite a suah mah bangin, mi khat in thu a ngaih maninah mi tampite in zong dikna a ngah mite a suak uh hi." 
Romans5:20 Khialhna a khan’ nadingin Thukham in zong a hong tum hi. Ahih hangin khialhna a khan’ hangin hehpihna a khang zaw semsem hi. 
Romans5:21 Tua ahih ciangin mawhna in sihna a pian’sak mah bangin hehpihna in i Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin dikna piangsak a, nuntak tawntungna hong ngah sak hi." 
Romans6:1 Tua ahih ciangin bang i ci gen ding hiam? Hehpihna a khan’ theih nadingin mawhna hihin i om ding hiam? Tua bang hi zenzen lo ding hi! 
Romans6:2 Mawhna ah a si eite in tua mawhna sungah bangci-in i hing lai ding hiam? 
Romans6:3 Khazih Zeisu sungah a kibaptaiz eite khempeuh in ama sihna sungah kibaptaizna i ngah hi ci-in thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Romans6:4 Tua ahih ciangin sihna ah baptaizna-in Zeisu tawh i kivui khawm hi. Khazih in Pa’ vangliatna tawh sihna pan hong thawhkik mah bangin eite in zong hin’na thak i zuih theih nading ahi hi. 
Romans6:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama sihna lim la-in amah tawh eite pumkhat sakhat i suah takpi leh, Topa thawhkikna lim zong la-in pumkhat sakhat i suak hi." 
Romans6:6 Khialhna tawh kipawl pumpi a kisuksiat nading ahi zongin, eite in mawhna’ sila a, i om loh nading ahi zongin, eite pumpi lui in amah tawh singlamteh tungah sihna a thuak khawm zo hi cih i thei hi." 
Romans6:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a sisa mi in mawhna panin a suakta hi." 
Romans6:8 Khazih in sihna pan thokik ahih ciangin, sihna tawh kipelh tawntung a," 
Romans6:9 sihna in a nung ciangin amah a uk loh nading i thei ahih ciangin, eite in Khazih tawh i sih khawm leh, amah tawh i nungta khawm ding hi, ci-in i um hi." 
Romans6:10 Khazih in sihna a thuakna pen khialhna lam pan khatvei bek a si hi. A nuntakna in Pasian ading a nungta hi. 
Romans6:11 Tua mah bangin mawhna lam pan a si mi na hi uh a, Khazih Zeisu hangin Pasian lam pan mihing na hi uh na ciamteh un." 
Romans6:12 Tua ahih leh, note in deihgawhna na zuih nadingun, khialhna in a si thei na pumpi sung uh ah na ki-uksak kei un." 
Romans6:13 Tua tham loin na pum tung nate in diklohna’ hiam a suah nadingun mawhna kiangah na pia kei un. Sihna pan a thokik mi bangin, Pasian kiangah na pumpi uh na pia un. Dikna’ hiam bangin Pasian kiangah na pumpi tung nate zong na pia un." 
Romans6:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thukham nuai-ah om loin, hehpihna nuai-ah na om uh ahih ciangin na mawhna un note hong uk lo ding hi." 
Romans6:15 Tua bang ahih leh, bang i ci hih ding hiam? Thukham nuai-ah om loin, hehpihna nuai-ah i om ahih ciangin khialhna i hih ding hiam? Tua bang hi zenzen lo ding hi." 
Romans6:16 Mi khat kiangah sila dingin note na tum uh leh, tua mi in sihna tawh kituak mawhna thu ahi zongin, dikna tawh kituak thu ngaihna ahi zongin, note’ to ahih thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans6:17 Note in mawhna sila na hih ngei uh hangin, tu-in na ngahsa uh thuhilhna, deihna lungtang tawh na ngai uh ahih ciangin Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat hi." 
Romans6:18 Mawhna’ khut sung pan na suahtak khit uh ciangin, dikna’ sila na suak uh hi." 
Romans6:19 Na lungsim uh nem lai ahih ciangin, leitung ngeina bangin thu kong hilh hi. Note in na pum tung uh nate, kihhuaina leh kheltatna’ sila-ah na om sak uh mah bangin, tu-in na pum tung uh nate a kisian’thosak nadingun dikna’ sila-ah na omsak un." 
Romans6:20 Mawhna’ sila-ah na om lai takun dikna tawh na kipelh uh hi. 
Romans6:21 Tua ahih leh, tu-in zumhuai na sak uh tua gamtatna na bawl lai takun, bang phattuamna na ngah uh hiam? Tua gamtatnate’ tawpna lampi in sihna ahi hi." 
Romans6:22 Tu-in mawhna’ khut sung pan na suakta uh a, Pasian’ sila suak khin na hih ciangun siangtho nadingin phattuamna na ngah uh a, a tawpna-ah nuntak tawntungna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans6:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, sihna in mawhna’ thaman ahi hi. Ahih hangin i Topa Khazih Zeisu hanga nuntak tawntungna in man kipia lo Pasian’ letsong ahi hi." 
Romans7:1 Thukham a thei ute naute aw, mi khat a nuntak lai takin thukham in tua mi a uk hi cih thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans7:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, pasal a nei numei in a pasal a sih matengin thukham bangin a pasal tawh a kikhih khawm hi. A pasal a sih leh, numei in a pasal’ thukham tawh a kipelh hi." 
Romans7:3 Tua ahih ciangin a pasal a nuntak lai-in midang’ zi a suah leh, numei gilo a kici ding hi. Ahih hangin a pasal a sih leh, tua numei in thukham tawh a kipelhkhia a, midang tawh a kiteeng zongin numei gilo a kici kei ding hi." 
Romans7:4 Tua mah bangin ka ute ka naute aw, note in zong midang a kici sihna pan a thokik mi’ zi na hi uh a, Pasian’ deihna bangin gah na gah nadingun Khazih’ pumpi hangin na si uh a, Thukham tawh na kikhen uh hi." 
Romans7:5 Eite in i pumpi ngeina bangin gamta-in i om lai takin, mawhna tawh akipawl i lungsim in Thukham hangin piang a, sihna suahna gah a gah nadingin i pumpi tung nate sungah nasem hi." 
Romans7:6 Tu-in ahih leh, thukham lui muang loin, Kha Siangtho’ nuntakna thak sungah na i sep nadingin hong ukpa lamah i sih khit ciangin thukham pan i suakta zo hi." 
Romans7:7 Tua bang ahih leh, bang i ci gen ding hiam? Thukham in mawhna ahi i ci ding hiam? Tua bang hi zenzen lo hi. Ahi zongin thukham bek hangin mawhna lungsim ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Huaihamna lungsim nei kei in,” ci-in Thukham in na ci kei leh, huaihamna lungsim ke’n ka thei kei ding hi." 
Romans7:8 Ahih hangin mawhna thu in thukham hangah thu ngah ahih ciangin ka lungsim sungah huaihamna apawlpawl a piangsak hi. Thukham om kei leh, mawhna a si ding hi." 
Romans7:9 Nidang lai-inah thukham loin ka nungta hi. Ahih hangin thukham hong pian’ ciangin mawhna nungta kik a, kei ka si hi." 
Romans7:10 Hin’na tawh kipawl thukham in sihna tawh kipawl ahih lam keimah in ka thei hi. 
Romans7:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mawhna in thukham hangin thu ngah a, thukhamna tawh hong kheemin hong that hi." 
Romans7:12 Tua hi a, Thukham in a siangtho hi. A thu in zong a siangtho, a dik, a pha hi." 
Romans7:13 Tua bang ahih leh, a hoih a pha na in keima tungah sihna a suak ahi hiam? Tua bang hi zenzen lo hi. Mawhna in mawhna taktak ahihna a kilat nadingin a pha nate hangin keima sungah sihna thu a piangsak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mawhna in thukham hangin mawhna taktak a pian’ theih nading ahi hi." 
Romans7:14 Thukham in Kha Siangtho tawh kipawl ci-in i thei hi. Keimah in mawhna khut sungah a kizuak, a si thei leitungmi ka hi hi." 
Romans7:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka gamtatna ka thei kei hi. Ka gamtat nop bangin ka gamta kei hi. Ka muhdah gamtatna ka hih hi." 
Romans7:16 Ahih hangin ka gamtat nop lohna ka gamtat leh, Thukham in a pha hi ka ci hi." 
Romans7:17 Tua ahih ciangin gamtatna a hoih lo keimah in ka hih kei hi, keima sungah a om khialhna in a hih hi." 
Romans7:18 Ka sa ahi ka pum sungah a pha khat beek a om kei hi cih ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, a pha gamtat nopna lungsim ka neih hangin a pha gamtat theih nading ka mu kei hi." 
Romans7:19 A pha ka gamtat nop ka hih thei kei hi. Ka gamtat nop loh gitlohna ka hih hi. 
Romans7:20 Ahih hangin gamtat nop loh na ka gamtat leh, keimah in ka gamta kei hi; ka sungah a om mawhna in a gamta hi." 
Romans7:21 Tua hi a, a hoih a gamta nuam keima sungah mawhna thu a om cih ka thei hi." 
Romans7:22 Ka sung mi hangin Pasian’ Thukham a pha ka sa hi. 
Romans7:23 Ahi zongin ka pum tung nate lakah adang thukham khat ka lungsim tawh kido a, ka pum tung nate mawhna khut sungah manin a piak theih ka mu hi." 
Romans7:24 Lunggim mi ka hi takpi hi! Hih a si ding pumpi panin kua in hong honkhia ding hiam? 
Romans7:25 Eite hong hon Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat hi! Tua ahih ciangin ka lungsim hangin Pasian’ thukham deihna ka zuih hangin, ka pumpi hangin mawhna’ Thukham deihna ka zui hi." 
Romans8:1 Tua ahih ciangin si-le-sa deihna bangin kalsuan loin Kha deih bangin a kalsuan, Khazih sungah a om mite in mawhna thukhenna tawh a kipelh zo uh hi." 
Romans8:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih Zeisu hanga a om nuntakna’ Kha tawh kipawl thukham in mawhna leh sihna’ thukham sung pan kei hong honkhia zo hi." 
Romans8:3 Thukham in i ci i sa hangin a thanem ahih ciangin a kibawl zo lo nate, Pasian in mawhna tawh a dim pumpi lim bangin a Tapa mawhna maisak dingin hong sawlin, ci leh sa sungah mawhna a hong khen hi." 
Romans8:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ci leh sa deihna zui loin Pasian’ Kha Siangtho’ deihna zui-in a nungta eite tungah a Thukham hanciamna thu a tun’ nading hi." 
Romans8:5 Ci leh sa a zuite in ci leh sa’ thu a ngai uh hi. Pasian’ Kha Siangtho a zuite in Pasian’ Kha Siangtho’ thu a ngai uh hi. 
Romans8:6 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ci leh sa lungsim in sihna tawh kituak hi. Kha Siangtho lungsim in nuntakna leh nopna tawh kituak hi." 
Romans8:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ci leh sa lungsim in Pasian’ Thukham mang lo tham loin a mang zo lo ahih maninah Pasian tawh a kido hi." 
Romans8:8 Ci leh sa sungah a omte in Pasian a lungdamsak zo kei uh hi. 
Romans8:9 Pasian’ Kha Siangtho in note sungah a teen’ leh, note in ci leh sa sungah na om kei uh hi; Pasian’ Kha Siangtho sungah na om uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih’ Kha Siangtho a nei lo mite in Khazih’ mi ahi kei uh hi." 
Romans8:10 Khazih in note sungah a om leh, na pumpi un mawhna hangin a sih hangin na kha un dikna hangah a nungta hi." 
Romans8:11 Zeisu a thokiksak Pasian’ Kha Siangtho in note sungah a om leh, Khazih Zeisu a thokik sakpa in, note sungah a teeng a Kha Siangtho hangin, a si thei na pumpi uh zong hin’na a pia ding hi." 
Romans8:12 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, eite in ci leh sa thu zuih nadingin, ci sa lei i ba kei hi." 
Romans8:13 Note in ci leh sa thu zui-in na nuntak uh leh, na si ding uh hi. Kha Siangtho hangin na pumpi uh a gamtatna na sihsak uh leh, na nungta ding uh hi." 
Romans8:14 Pasian’ Kha Siangtho’ thuhilhna a mang mi khempeuhte in Pasian’ tate ahi uh hi. 
Romans8:15 Note in kihtak kikkik nading sila’ lungsim na ngah kei uh hi. “Abba, Pa aw,” i cih mah bangin ta suahna lungsim na ngah uh hi." 
Romans8:16 Eite in Pasian’ tate i hi ci-in Kha Siangtho in eite lungsim tawh teci a pang khawm hi. 
Romans8:17 Tate i hih leh, gamhluahte i hi hi. Khazih tawh kibangin vangliatna ngah nadingin amah tawh gimna thuak khawm leng, amah tawh gamluah khawm ding i hi hi." 
Romans8:18 Eite tungah hong kilang ding vangliatna ka ngaihsut ciangin, tu laitak i thuak gimnate ngaihsut tham ka sa kei hi." 
Romans8:19 A kipiangsak nate in Pasian’ tate a kilat ding lamenin, lawp pha-in a ngak uh hi." 
Romans8:20 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, a kipiangsak nate in a kisia gam lam, amau ut bangin zui ahi kei uh hi." 
Romans8:21 Pasian’ tate’ vangliatna tawh kipawl khahkhiat nopsakna ahi, kisiatna hen gawpna panin kikhahkhia-in nopsakna ah a tum ding ci-in lamet nading thu pia a, a kisia thei gam lam a zuisakpa’ deihna bang bek a zui uh hi." 
Romans8:22 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a kipiangsak nate khempeuh in tu dongin a tau uh a, gimna thuakin a om uh i thei hi." 
Romans8:23 Tua tham loin Kha Siangtho a kipatna gah a ngah eite in zong a tate za-ah koihna thu ahi, i pumpi gupkhiatna ngakin i pumpi sungah tau-in i om hi." 
Romans8:24 Eite in lametna hangin gupna i ngah hi. Ahih hangin lametna in i muhsa ahih leh, lamet nading a om kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a muhsate kua in a lamen nawn ding hiam?" 
Romans8:25 I muh loh nate i lamet leh, tuate lungnemna tawh ngakin i om hi." 
Romans8:26 Tua mah bangin Kha Siangtho in i thahat lohnate hong huh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in thunget ding a kilawm bangin thunget ding i thei kei hi. Kha Siangtho mah in muk tawh kipau thei lo tauna tawh, eite ading thu hong ngetsak hi." 
Romans8:27 Lungsim sung a zongpa in Kha Siangtho’ lungsim a thei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua Kha Siangtho in misiangthote ading Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin thu a ngetsak hi." 
Romans8:28 Pasian a it mite ahi uh, a geelna banga a sap mite adingin na khempeuh in hoih nadingin a piang uh hi cih i thei hi." 
Romans8:29 Pasian’ Tapa in unau tampite lakah a upa bel a suah nadingin Pasian in nidang lai-a a theihkhol mite, a Tapa’ lim tawh kibang a suahsak nadingin, nidang lai-in a ciamteh khol hi." 
Romans8:30 Pasian in a ciamtehsa mite a sam hi. A sapsa mite zong a diksak hi. A diksak mite vangliatna a pia hi. 
Romans8:31 Tua bang ahih leh, hih thu hangin bang gen ding i hi hiam? Pasian in eite lamsang ah a om leh, kua in eite lang khatah a pang zo ding hiam?" 
Romans8:32 Ama Tapa khat bek haza lo a, eite khempeuh ading a piapa in man ngen loin nate khempeuh ama Ta tawh hong pia khawm loin a om ding hiam?" 
Romans8:33 Pasian’ teelsate kua in a mawhsak ding hiam? A diksakpa in Pasian ahi hi. 
Romans8:34 Mawhsakna thu a khenpa in kua ahi hiam? Sihna a thuak tham loin, sihna pan thokik a, Pasian’ ziat lamah omin, eite ading thu hong ngetsakpa in Khazih ahi hi." 
Romans8:35 Khazih hong itna tawh eite kua in hong kikhensak zo ding ahi hiam? Gimna, kahna, bawlsiatna, gilkialna, puan neih lohna, kihtakna, namsaute in Khazih hong itna tawh eite hong kikhensak thei ding hiam?" 
Romans8:36 Lai Siangtho sungah: “Nangma tang dingin kote in sunthapai-in thahna ka thuak uh hi; Gawh dinga a kikoih tuu tawh kibangin mite in kote hong ciamteh uh hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans8:37 Khen thei lo ding hi! Ei hong itpa hangin hih nate khempeuh tungah gualzo pente i hi hi. 
Romans8:38 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, sihna ahi zongin, hin’na ahi zongin, vantungmite ahi zongin, ukna ahi zongin, tu lai taka omte ahi zongin, tu nung ciangin a om dingte ahi zongin," 
Romans8:39 a san’na ahi zongin, a niamna akipan a kipiangsaksa khat beek in i Topa Khazih Zeisu hanga i ngah Pasian hong itna tawh hong kikhensak zo kei ding hi ci-in man takin ka um hi." 
Romans9:1 Keima pumpi kitheihna lungsim in Kha Siangtho tawh kibangin kei lamsang ah teci hong pang khawmin, zuauthu gen loin Khazih mai-ah aman takpi ka cih-inah," 
Romans9:2 ka dah mahmah a, ka lungsim sungah tawlnga loin lungmangin gimin ka om hi." 
Romans9:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ci leh sa lamsang ah ka pawl ahi ka u ka naute tang ding Khazih tawh kikhenin hamsiatna thuak dingin lungsim ka nei hi." 
Romans9:4 Tua mite in Israel mite ahih uh ciangin a ta za-a kikoih nading ahi zongin, vangliatna ahi zongin, thu kiciamnate ahi zongin, Thukham koihna ahi zongin, Pasian biakna ahi zongin, thuciamnate ahi zongin," 
Romans9:5 amau ading a pute a pate tawh kizoma piang mi zong ahi uh hi. Khazih in zong ci leh sa lamsang ah tua mite pawl ahi hi. Tua Khazih in zong na khempeuh uk a, thupha a ngah tawntung Pasian ahi hi. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Tua bang ka cih hangin Pasian’ thu a kip kei hi, ka cihnopna ahi kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Israel’ suante khempeuh in Israel mi taktak ahi kei uh hi." 
Romans9:7 Tua mah bangin Abraham’ suan khempeuh in Abraham’ tate taktak ahi kei hi, “Isaak bekah na suan a kici ding hi,” ci-in Pasian in Abraham kiangah a gen hi." 
Romans9:8 Tua ahih ciangin ci leh sa tate in Pasian’ tate taktak ahi kei uh hi, thuciamna tawh kipawl tate in a suan taktak a kici hi." 
Romans9:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thuciamna in, “Tu hun hong tung kik ciangin ka hong pai kik ding a, Sarah in ta a nei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans9:10 Tua tham loin Rebekah in eite pu Isaak tawh a gai khit ciangin 
Romans9:11 Pasian teelkhiatna tawh kipawl hanciamna in gamtatna hang hi lo, a hong sampa’ deihna hangin a kip theih nading ta a suah ma-in amaute in gamtat hoih, gamtat hoih lo a neih ma-un" 
Romans9:12 “A ta uzaw in a ta nauzaw’ na sem ding hi,” ci-in tua numei kiangah a ci hi." 
Romans9:13 Tua mah bangin, “Jakob ka it hi, Esau ka mudah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans9:14 Tua bang ahih leh, bang i ci gen ding hiam? Pasian in thuman lo bawlpa ahi, i ci ding hiam? Tua bang i ci zenzen kei ding hi." 
Romans9:15 “Keimah in ka hehpih nopte ka hehpih ding hi. Ka gup nopte ka gum ding hi,” ci-in Moses kiangah thu a pia hi." 
Romans9:16 Tua bang ahih ciangin a deih mi tawh a kikum kei hi, a hanciam mi tawh zong a kikum kei hi, hong hehpih thei Pasian bek tawh kikum hi." 
Romans9:17 Lai Siangtho sungah Faro kumpipa kiangah, “Ka vangliatna nangma tungah ka lah nading ahi zongin, ka min leitung khempeuh ah a kizelh nading ahi zongin nangmah kong sangsak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans9:18 Tua mah bangin a hehpih nopte a hehpih hi, a lungkhauhsak nopte a lungkhauhsak hi." 
Romans9:19 “Tua bang ahih ciangin, ‘Pasian in bang hangin ko hong mawhsak lai hiam? Kua in a deihna a khamsak hiam’” ci-in keimah hong dong ding na hi uh hi." 
Romans9:20 Pasian a nial mi aw, nang kua mi na hi hiam? A kibawl mi in, “Bang hangin kei hong hi ci bawl hiam?” ci-in a bawlpa kiangah a gen ding hiam?" 
Romans9:21 Beel seekpa in beel lei uk hilo ahi hiam? Beel lei lom khat tawh beel manpha ahi zongin, beel manpha lo ahi zongin bawl thei hilo ahi hiam?" 
Romans9:22 Pasian in ama hehna hong lak a, a vangliatna a kitheihsak nading a deih maninah a kisia ding a bawlsa, hehna a thuak beelte a lungneemna tawh a thuak leh, bang gen ding a om lai hiam?" 
Romans9:23 A vangliatna a lah nading a masa a bawlsa hehpihna a ngah belte ahi 
Romans9:24 Judah mipawl sung pan bek hi lo, Gentailte sung panin zong hong sap eite tungah a kicing vangliatna a kilat nadingin hong bawl leh, bang gen ding a om hiam?" 
Romans9:25 Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah: “Keima mi ahi lote, ‘Keima mite hi,’ ka ci ding hi; Ka ngaih loh mi in, ‘Ka ngaih mi hi,’ ka ci ding hi." 
Romans9:26 Note in, ‘Keima mite na hi kei uh hi,’ a cihna munah, ‘A nungta Pasian’ tapate kicihna a ngah ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen bang ahi hi." 
Romans9:27 Isaiah in Israel thu panin, “Israel mipawlte in tuipi sehnel zahin a tam hangin a kimkhat bek in gupna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans9:28 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa in leitung ah ama thukhenna kipsak a, manlangin a zo ding hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Romans9:29 Isaiah in:, “Vantung Topa in eite ading khaici hong omsak lai hi kei leh, Eite in Sodom leh Gomorrah khuate i bang zo ding hi,” ci-in a masa-a a gen bang ahi hi." 
Romans9:30 Tua bang ahih leh, bang i ci gen ding hiam? Dikna a delh lo Gentailte in tua-upna tawh kipawl dikna a cihnopna ahi dikna a tung uh hi." 
Romans9:31 Ahih hangin dikna thukhamna a delh uh Israelte in tua dikna thukham ah a tung zo kei uh hi. 
Romans9:32 Bang hangin tung zo lo ahi uh hiam na cih uh leh, thu-upna tawh a delh kei uh hi, thukham gamtatna tawh a delh uh hi. Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, amaute in sui-a kipuk na’ng suang a sui kha uh hi." 
Romans9:33 A kigelhna in: “Ngai un, sui-a kipuk khak na’ng suangpi leh mawhsak na’ng suangpi Zion mual tungah ka koih hi. Tua suangpi a um mi in zumna a thuak kei ding hi,” ahi hi." 
Romans10:1 Ute naute aw, Israel mite in gupna a ngah nadingun ka lungsim in deihin, Pasian kiangah thu ka ngetsak hi." 
Romans10:2 Amaute in Pasian lamah lungsim lian a neih uh hangin, lungpilna man ahi kei hi ci-in amaute ading teci ka pang hi." 
Romans10:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in Pasian’ dikna thei loin, amau dikna kipsak nading a zong uh ahih ciangin, Pasian’ dikna thu a mang kei uh hi." 
Romans10:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thu-um mi khempeuh in a dik nadingun thukham’ mong in Zeisu ahi hi." 
Romans10:5 Moses in, “Thukham tawh a kipawl dikna thu a zuite in, tua dikna thu bangin a nungta ding hi,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
Romans10:6 Ahih hangin upna tawh kipawl dikna in: “Vantungah kua in a kahto ding hiam? 
Romans10:7 A thuk sungah kua in a kumsuk ding hiam?” ci-in na lung sungah na ngaihsun kei un a ci hi. Tua bang a cihna in, Khazih hong paipihsuk dingin kua in a kahto ding hiam? Khazih sihna pan a thosak dingin a thuk sungah kua in a kumsuk ding hiam? a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Romans10:8 Bang a ci hiam? Tua thu in nang tawh kinai-in na kam sungah, na lungsim sungah a om hi; ka hilh uh upna thu a cihnopna hi." 
Romans10:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Zeisu in Topa ahi hi” ci-in na kam in mang a, Pasian in amah sihna pan a thosak kik zo hi ci-in na lungsim sungah na up leh, gupna na ngah ding hi." 
Romans10:10 Dikkisakna ngah nadingin lung sungah ki-um hi. Gupna ngah nadingin kam tawh kipulak hi. 
Romans10:11 “Amah a um mi peuhmah in zumna a thuak kei ding hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh hi." 
Romans10:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Judah mipawl, Grik mipawl teeltuam a nei kei hi. Mi khempeuh a uk Pasian khat bek om a, ama kiangah thu a ngen mi khempeuh in a kicing hehpihna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans10:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa’ min tawh thu a ngen mi khempeuh in gupna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans10:14 Ahih hangin a thu-um lo mite in bang a ci thunget ding uh hiam? A thu a zak ngei loh uh Topa bang ci a um thei ding uh hiam? A hilh mi om kei leh, bang ci a za thei ding uh hiam?" 
Romans10:15 A kisawl kei leh, bang ci a hilh thei ding hiam? Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, “Nopna Lungdamna Thu hong zasak mite’ khe in bang zahin kilawm ahi hiam!”" 
Romans10:16 Ahih hangin mite khempeuh in Lungdamna Thu a ngai kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kamsangpa Isaiah in, “Topa aw, kote thuhilhna kua in um ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Romans10:17 Tua ahih ciangin upna in thu zakna hangin a piang hi. Zakna in zong Khazih’ thu hangin a piang hi. 
Romans10:18 Ahih hangin amaute in za hilo ahi uh hiam? A mantakpi a za uh hi: “Amaute aw un leitung khempeuh ah a zel zo hi; Amau thu un leimong dongin a tung zo hi.” 
Romans10:19 Khatvei ka cih-inah, Israel mite in hih thu thei lo ahi uh hiam? Moses in: “Mipawl ahi lo mite hangin note in een’na lungsim na neih nadingun ahi zongin, Pilna nei lo mipawlte hangin na heh nadingun ahi zongin ka bawl ding hi,” a ci masa hi." 
Romans10:20 Isaiah in hang takin: “Kei hong zong lo mite in hong mu zo uh hi, Kei thu hong kan lo mite tungah ka kilang zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans10:21 Israel mipawlte thu panin, “Thungai lo, thu seel thei mipawlte lamah ni khat tawntung ka khutpeek ka zan hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans11:1 Tua bang ahih leh, Pasian in ama mipawlte a paaikhia hiam? A paaikhia kei hi, ka ci hi. Keimah in zong Abraham’ suan, Benjamin’ mipawl Israel mi ka hi hi." 
Romans11:2 Pasian in a theih kholh ama mite a paaikhia kei hi. 
Romans11:3 Kamsangpa Elijah in, “Topa aw, amaute in nangma kamsangte a that zo uh hi; nangma biakna taute a sugawp zo uh hi. Kei guak ka om lai hangin keima nuntakna hong zong uh hi,” ci-in Pasian mai-ah Israel mite lang khatah thu a ngen hi cihna Lai Siangtho thu thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans11:4 Pasian in zong ama kiangah bang ci gen ahi hiam? “Baal mai-ah a khukdin’ lo mi tul sagih keimah ading ka om sak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans11:5 Tua mah bangin tu lai takin hehpihna hangah a kiteelsa kimkhat a om lai uh hi. 
Romans11:6 Hehpihna hangah ahih leh, gamtatna hang ahi kei hi. Tua bang ahih kei leh, hehpihna in hehpihna ahi kei hi." 
Romans11:7 Tua bang ahih leh, bang ci ahi hiam? Israel mite in a zon’ uh hangin a mu kei uh hi. A teelsate bek in a ngah uh hi. A om lai mite in a lung a khauhsak uh hi." 
Romans11:8 Tua mah bangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Pasian a mu thei lo mittang ahi zongin, khua a za thei lo bil ahi zongin, a ihmu nuam lungsim tua mite tungah tuni dongin a pia hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans11:9 David in: “Amau’ ankuang un amau tungah tehlop ahi zongin, thangzak ahi zongin, kisuih khak a, kipukna ahi zongin, daantatna ahi zongin hi ta hen." 
Romans11:10 Amaute in a muh zawh loh nadingun amau mittang uh mial ta hen. Amau nung uh a tawntungin na kulsak in,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
Romans11:11 Tua bang ahih leh, amaute a puk dongun a sui kha uh hiam? Tua bang hi zenzen lo hi. Amau sungah een’na om nadingin, amaute a pukna hangin Gentailte in gupna a ngah uh hi." 
Romans11:12 Amau pukna un leitungmite hauhna hi a, amau tan’na un Gentailte hauhna ahih leh, amaute kicin’na un hauhna tamzaw piang sak ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:13 Gentailte ahi note kiangah kong gen hi. Gentailte’ sawltak ka hi ahih ciangin," 
Romans11:14 ka ci ka sa pawlte lung sungah een’na piang sakin lam khatpeuh mah tawh, kimkhat ka gup zawh khak nadingin, ka za ka phat hi." 
Romans11:15 Tua mite kipaih khiatna un leitung mite’ kilem kikna a pian’sak leh, amau kikoihcin’na un sihna pan thawhkikna hilo ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:16 A kipia masa buhneel a sian’tho leh, a lompi in a siangtho ding hi. A zung a sian’tho leh, a hiangte zong a siangtho ding uh hi." 
Romans11:17 A hiang kimkhat in a kitan khit ciangin gamlak oliv hiang ahi nangmah in, amau pum tungah pehin kibulh a, hiangte tawh kibangin oliv sing thazung tui zomin na neek leh," 
Romans11:18 a kitankhia hiangte kosia-in na kisathei kei in. Na kisaktheih leh, nangmah in a zung na pua kei hi, zung in nang hong pua zaw hi." 
Romans11:19 Tua ahih ciangin nang in, “Kei hong peh nadingin hiangte a kitan hi,” ci-in nong ci ding hi." 
Romans11:20 Hi ta hen. Upna lungsim nei lo ahih ciangun amaute a kitan uh a, nangmah in na upna hang bekin na kip hi. Na kisathei kei in, na kihta in." 
Romans11:21 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Pasian in a hiang taktakte pammaih a sak kei leh, nangmah zong pammaih hong sa ding ahi kei hi." 
Romans11:22 Tua ahih ciangin a puk mite tungah a thukhenna ahi zongin, ama hehpihna sungah na kip leh, nangmah tungah Pasian’ hehpihna ahi zongin, hih thu nih na ngaihsun in. Ama hehpihna sungah na kip kei leh, phuk tanna na thuak ding hi." 
Romans11:23 Amaute in zong amau up lohna sungah a om kei uh leh, a kung tungah zom kikin peh kik nading thu a ngah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in amaute khatvei a peh kik thei hi." 
Romans11:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, gamlak oliv kung taktak panin hong sat tanin, oliv kung hoih tungah ngeina zui loin nang hong kipeh leh, hiang taktakte ahi uh tua mite in amau oliv kungah zomin peh kik nading a ngah zaw ding uh hilo ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:25 Ute naute aw, na kisaktheih loh nadingun Gentailte khempeuh hong lut khit matengin, Israel mite tungah khuamialna tawm a tung hi ci-in hih thuthuk thei loin na om ding uh ka ut kei hi." 
Romans11:26 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in gupna a ngah ding uh hi. Tua a kigelhna in: “Zion Mual tungah Gumpa hong pai ding a, Pasian zahtak lohna Jakob’ suante lak pan a lakhia ding hi." 
Romans11:27 Amaute mawhna ke’n ka lakkhiat khit ciangin, Amau tungah ka piak thuciamna in, tua thu ahi ding hi” a ci hi." 
Romans11:28 Amaute in Lungdamna Thu pan note hangin galte ahi uh hi. Teelkhiatna thu panin pute pate hangin a ki-it mi ahi uh hi. 
Romans11:29 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ hehpihna thupha leh hong sapna in a thu a kidok kik ngei kei hi." 
Romans11:30 Note in nidang lai-inah Pasian’ thu na man’loh uh hangin, tu-in amau thuman’lohna hangin hehpihna na ngah uh mah bangin," 
Romans11:31 note ngahsa hangah amaute in zong hehpihna a ngah nadingun, tu-in thungai loin a om uh hi." 
Romans11:32 Pasian in mi khempeuh hong hehpih theih nadingin mi khempeuh thungaih lohna sungah a khumcip hi. 
Romans11:33 Pasian’ hauhna leh pilna leh siamna in bang zahin thuk hiam! A thukhennate kuamah in thei zo lo hi! A paina lampi zui-in i zon’ hangin i mu zo kei hi! 
Romans11:34 Topa’ lungsim kua in a thei ngei hiam? Amah tawh a vaihawm kua ahi ngei hiam? 
Romans11:35 A thukkik dingin na khat peuhpeuh kua in Pasian tungah pia ngei hiam? 
Romans11:36 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na khempeuh in amah panin ahi zongin, amah hangin ahi zongin, amah adingin ahi zongin a piang uh hi. A tawntungin amah in minthan’na ngah ta hen. Amen." 
Romans12:1 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, a hing biakna, a siangtho leh Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin, na pumpi uh Pasian kiangah na piak nadingun Pasian’ hehpihna tawh kong thuum hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua bang hihna in a kilawm biakna nasepna ahi hi." 
Romans12:2 Hih leitung mite bangin na om kei un. A hoih, a deihhuai, a kicing ahi Pasian’ deihna in bang ahi hiam ci-in na khen theih nadingun na lungsim uh bawl thakin, na lim uh na kilamdangsak un." 
Romans12:3 Kei tunga hong kipia hehpihna thupha hangin note’ kiangah kong gen-inah: No-le-no na kingaihsut ding zah valun kithupi ngaihsut kei un; Pasian in mikim tunga hong hawmsak upna zah tawh kizui-in a man thukhenna tawh nomau ciat kingaihsun un. 
Romans12:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, pumpi khat sungah na tampi i nei a, tua nate in nasepna-za khat guak a neih loh uh mah bangin," 
Romans12:5 a tampi ahi eite in Khazih sungah pum khat bek i hi a, i vekpi-in pumpi’ nate i hi hi." 
Romans12:6 Hong piak hehpihna thupha mah bangin eite in nam tampi hehpih phatna i ngah tek a, kamsangpa za i ngah leh, upna zah bangin kamsang na sem ni." 
Romans12:7 Nasepna za i ngah leh, tua na sem ni. Thuhilh mi in thuhilh na sem ta hen." 
Romans12:8 Hansuah mi in mi hansuah na sem ta hen. Hehpihna a pia mi in lungkimin pia ta hen. A uk mi in hahkatin uk ta hen. Midang a hehpih mi in hehpihna lungsim tawh pia ta hen. 
Romans12:9 Simtat loin itna lungsim om ta hen. Gitlohna mudahin gamtat hoih beel un. 
Romans12:10 Ute naute itna panin, khat leh khat dawmin na ki-it ta un. Minphatna panin midangte na pumpi uh sangin na phat zaw un." 
Romans12:11 Nasep hahkat un la, thadah kei un. Lungdamna tawh Topa’na na sem un." 
Romans12:12 Lawpin lungdam un. Gimna hong tun’ ciangin thuak un. Thungen tawntung un. 
Romans12:13 Misiangthote a sapna bangun na hawm un. Zindo na hahkat un. 
Romans12:14 No hong bawlsiate thupha na pia un. Hamsiat loin thupha na pia un. 
Romans12:15 Mi lungdamte tawh kibangin na lungdam khawm un. A kapte tawh na kap khawm un. 
Romans12:16 Khat leh khat na lungsim uh na kituaksak un. Min san’na na lunggulh kei un. Lung kiniamsakna deih un. Kei mipil mi ka hi ci-in kingaihsun kei un. 
Romans12:17 Midangte in note hong bawlsiat bangin na thuk kei un. Mi khempeuh mai-ah a kilawm gamtatna na hanciam un. 
Romans12:18 Note in na hih zawh zahun mi khempeuh tawh na kilem un. 
Romans12:19 Ka itte aw, midangte in note tungah hong khialh leh, a mawhna na thuk kei un. Pasian’ hehpihna na pia un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Thukkikna in keima aa ahi hi. A mawhna tawh kituakin ka thuk ding hi, Topa in a ci hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho in a gen hi." 
Romans12:20 Tua tham loin, “Na gal a gil a kial leh, an na vaak in. Tui a duh leh, a dawn ding na pia in. Tua bangin na bawl leh, ama lu tungah mei-amte a koih na hi ding hi." 
Romans12:21 Gitlohna na lel kei un, gamtatpha tawh gitlohna na zo un." 
Romans13:1 A hong uk mangte ukna khempeuh na mang un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in thu a piak kei leh, ukna aana a nei kei ding uh hi. Ukna za a nei khempeuh Pasian piak za ahi hi." 
Romans13:2 Tua ahih ciangin ukna a nial mi in Pasian’ thu a nial ahi hi. Tua bang a nialte in mawhna daan a thuak ding uh hi. 
Romans13:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ukna za a neite in, gamtat hoih mite kihtak ding ahi kei uh hi, gamtat hoih lote kihtak ding ahi uh hi. Ukna za a neite na kihtak nop kei leh, ahoihin gamta in. Tua bang na hih leh ukna neite kiangah pahtawina na ngah ding hi." 
Romans13:4 Amah in nang noptuam nadinga Pasian’ na sem ahi hi. A hoih lo a gamta mi na hih leh, na kihta in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amah in a valkhong a, namsau tawi ahi kei hi. Gamtat hoih lo ahihte a mawhna daan pia ding Pasian’ sawltak ahi hi." 
Romans13:5 Tua ahih ciangin, daan kihtakna hang bekin a mang na hi kei uh hi; nomau kitheihna lungsim hangin na mang uh hi." 
Romans13:6 Tua thu hangin phiangsiah na pia uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in Pasian’ sawltak ahi uh ciangin, tua nasepna a tawntung a sem uh hi." 
Romans13:7 Mi khempeuh ngah ding a kilawm bangin na pia un. Phiangsiah ngah ding a kilawmte phiangsiah na pia un. Kihtak ding a kilawmte na kihta un. Zahtak ding a kilawmte na zahtak ta un. 
Romans13:8 Khat leh khat ki-itna longal bangmah na kibasak kei un. A lawmte a it mi in Thukham a zui khin zo hi. 
Romans13:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Mi’ zi tawh na mawh kei in, Mi na that kei in, Mi’ na na gu kei in, Mi’ na na deihgawh kei in, a cihna thukhamte akipan adang thukham khempeuh in, “Na pumpi na it bangin na lawmte na it in,” cihna thukham khat sungah a om uh hi." 
Romans13:10 Itna in lawmte a siasak thei kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin itna in thukham zuihna thu kicin’na ahi hi. 
Romans13:11 Tua tham loin, eite hong gupna in eite upna ni tawh a nai sangin, tu-in hong naizaw ahih ciangin note in ihmutna pana khan’lawh nading hun hong tung zo hi ci-in na thei un." 
Romans13:12 Zan a bei dektak hi, sun hong nai zo hi. Tua ahih ciangin khuamial gamtatna paaikhia-in khuavak galnan’na silh ni." 
Romans13:13 Pawikhamna, guih theih zu kham luatna ahi zongin, hukna, lanna kihhuaina ahi zongin, kitotna, kidemna ahi zongin tangin, sun laitak mah bangin kilawmin gamta ni." 
Romans13:14 Topa Zeisu Khazih silh un la, na pumpi huaiham na’ng uh note in na ngaihsun kei un." 
Romans14:1 Upna neu mi na mang un. Ahih hangin up khialh nading thute tua mi tawh na kikum kei un. 
Romans14:2 Mi khat in an pawl khempeuh neek theih nadingin upna a nei hi. Ahih hangin mi a thaneem mi in gah leh teh bek a ne hi. 
Romans14:3 An pawl khempeuh a ne mi in a ne lo mi simmawh kei hen. A ne lo mi in a ne mi dongtel kei hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in tua pa a mang zo hi." 
Romans14:4 Mi dang’ sawltak a dongtel nangmah in kua mi na hi hiam? Tua pa in a Topa thu dotna-ah a kip ahi zongin, a kip lo ahi zongin ahi ding hi. Ahih hangin a Topa in tua pa kipsak theihna a nei ahih ciangin a kipsak ding hi." 
Romans14:5 Mi khat in ni khat sangin ni khat a manpha zaw hi ci-in a ciamteh hi. Mi khat in ni khempeuh a kibang hi ci-in a ciamteh thei hi. Mikim in ama lungsimah pha a sak bang hi ta hen. 
Romans14:6 Ni a tang mi in Topa hangin a tang hi. An a ne mi in Topa hangin an a ne hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in Pasian’ hehpihna a phat hi. An ne lo mi in Topa hangin ne lo a, Pasian’ hehpihna a phat hi." 
Romans14:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite lakah kuamah in ama ading a nungta kei hi; kuamah in ama ading a si kei hi." 
Romans14:8 Eite i nuntak leh, Topa ading i nungta hi. Eite i sih leh, Topa ading i si hi. Tua ahih ciangin eite i nungta ahi zongin, i si ahi zongin, Topa’ aa i hi hi." 
Romans14:9 Khazih in misite leh mi nungtate’ Topa a suah nadingin sihna thuak a, a sih khit ciangin a hing kik hi." 
Romans14:10 Nang in bang hangin na u na nau dongtelin thu na khen hiam? Na u na nau bang hangin na simmawh hiam? Eite khempeuh in Pasian’ thukhenna tokhom mai-ah i ding ding hi. 
Romans14:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Lai Siangtho sungah: “Ka nuntak bangin ka mai-ah mi khempeuhte a khukdin’ ding uh a, Leii khempeuh in Pasian a phat ding uh hi, ci-in Pasian in thu a pia hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans14:12 Tua ahih ciangin eite khempeuh in eima thu tekah Pasian’ thudotna i thuak ding hi. 
Romans14:13 Tua ahih ciangin eite in tu-a kipanin khat leh khat thu kisuah loin om ni. Unau khat puk nading ahi zongin, a khialh nading ahi zongin hih loh nadingin na ciamteh zaw un." 
Romans14:14 Bangmah in a pian’pih tawh a kihhuai kei hi, keimah in Topa Zeisu muangin thei-in ka lungkim hi. Ahih hangin a kihhuai a sa mi khat a om leh, ama tungah a kihhuai hi." 
Romans14:15 Na u na nau in nang an nekna hangin a dah leh, nang in itna tawh na gamta kei hi. Amah tang ding Khazih a si khin mi khat na an nekna tawh na siasak kei in." 
Romans14:16 Tua ahih ciangin na hih theihna uh ah gensiat nading omsak kei un. 
Romans14:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ Gam in an nekna, tui dawnna-ah a kip kei hi. Kha Siangtho hanga kingah dikna, kilemna leh lungdamna-ah a kip hi." 
Romans14:18 Tua bang gamta a, Khazih’ na a sem mi in Pasian lungdam sak a, mite mai-ah minphathuai ahi hi." 
Romans14:19 Tua ahih ciangin kilem nading, khat leh khat kikipsak nading tawh kizom nate zui ni." 
Romans14:20 An nekna hangin Pasian bawlna na susia kei un. An khempeuh a siangtho hangin midangte a puk nading a ne mi in a khial hi. 
Romans14:21 Sa nekna, leenggahtui dawnna-a kipan na u na nau puk nading na khempeuh tan’huai hi." 
Romans14:22 Na neihsa na upna, nangmah ading Pasian mai-ah na om sak in. A man’sa thu-ah amah le amah a kimawhsak lote in mi hampha ahi uh hi." 
Romans14:23 A um khial mi in a nek leh, upna lungsim nei loin ne ahih ciangin amah le amah a kimawhsak ahi hi. Upna lungsim tawh kituak lo gamtatna khempeuh in mawhna ahi hi." 
Romans15:1 A thahat eite in eite deih bang zui loin thahat lote a thanemna i thuakpih ding hi. 
Romans15:2 Eite khempeuh in i lawmte noptuam na’ng ngaihsunin, amah i kipsak nading ama deihna zui ni." 
Romans15:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih in zong ama deihna zui lo a, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, “Nang hong simmawhte a simmawhna kam in keima tungah hong tung hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans15:4 Eite in Lai Siangtho pan i ngah thuakzawhna leh hehnepna hangah lawpna i neih nadingin, Lai Siangtho-ah nidang lai-a a kigelhsa thu in eite hong thu hilhna-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans15:5 Note in eite Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Pa ahi Pasian, lungsim kituakin na kam uh tawh na phat nadingun," 
Romans15:6 Khazih Zeisu deih bangin khat leh khat kilung tuakin na om nadingun, kithuakzawhna leh hehnepna a pia Pasian in hong hehpih ta hen." 
Romans15:7 Tua ahih ciangin Khazih in note hong man’ mah bangin note in Pasian’ minphatna kilangsakin, khat leh khat na kimang un." 
Romans15:8 Khazih in Pasian’ thuman thutak hangah pute pate tungah a piak thuciamna a kip nadingin ahi zongin, Gentailte in zong Pasian’ hehpihna ngahin Pasian a minthan’sak theih nading uh ahi zongin, vun atna a thuak mite’ nasem mi a suak hi. Lai Siangtho sungah: “Tua ahih ciangin Gentailte lakah na hehpihna ka phat a, Nangma min phatna la ka sa ding hi,” ci-a a kigelh bang ahi hi." 
Romans15:9  
Romans15:10 Khatvei amah in: “Gentailte aw, note in ama mipawlte tawh na lungdam khawm un,” a ci hi." 
Romans15:11 Khatvei leuleu: “Gentailte khempeuh aw, Topa phat un, mipawl khempeuhte in amah phat ta un,” a ci hi." 
Romans15:12 Kamsangpa Isaiah in: “Jessi bul meeng in Gentailte a uk ding mi ahi ding hi. Gentailte in amah a muang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans15:13 Note in Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna hangah lametna pha tawh na dim nadingun, upna nei-in lungdamna, noptuamna a pawlpawlte tawh na dim nadingun, muan’na hong pia Pasian in hong pia ta hen." 
Romans15:14 Ute naute aw, note in lungsim pha tawh dimin, pilna tawh na dim uh a, khat leh khat thu na kihilh thei uh, ci-in ka um hi." 
Romans15:15 Kha Siangtho in hong sian’ thosak deihhuai biakna ahi Gentailte pia dingin," 
Romans15:16 keimah in Pasian’ Lungdamna Thuhilh na semin Gentailte tungah Khazih’ nasem ka hih nading, Pasian in kei hong piak hehpihna thupha hanginah ute naute aw, note hong phawksak kikin, lau loin lai ka gelh hi." 
Romans15:17 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian tawh a kituak nate hangah note lamsang ah keimah in Khazih Zeisu suangin ka kisathei hi. 
Romans15:18 Gentailte in kam tawh ahi zongin, gamtatna tawh ahi zongin, thungaih nading Khazih in" 
Romans15:19 lim leh nalamdang vangliatna leh Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna lakin keima tungah a bawl nate bek ka gen ngam hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khua panin Ilirikum gam dongin, kimkot mun khempeuh ah, Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu a vekpi-in ka hilh khin zo hi." 
Romans15:20 Ahi hi. Midangte khuamphuhna tungah ka lam loh na’ngin, Khazih’ min a kizak ngeilohna munah Lungdamna Thu hilh dingin lungsim takpi tawh ka hahkat hi." 
Romans15:21 Lai Siangtho sungah: “Tua mi thu, kuamah in a lah ngei loh hangin amaute in a mu ding uh hi. A za ngei lo mite in a thei ding uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans15:22 Tua ahih ciangin note omna munah kong pai theih loh nading tam veipi hong kikham zo hi. 
Romans15:23 Tu lai takin hih munte-ah ka hih ding om lo ahih ciangin note omna-ah kong pai ding pen sau veipi-in deihin," 
Romans15:24 Spain ka pai ciangin lampi-ah note tawh kimu-in, note tawh kikhawl khawmin, deihna teng a kicin’ khit ciangin tua gamah note hong khakna thupha ka ngah ding hi ci-in ka lamen hi." 
Romans15:25 Tu-in ahih leh, misiangthote vaakin Jerusalem khuapi-ah ka pai ding hi." 
Romans15:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Makedonia gam mite leh Akhaia gam mite in Jerusalem khuapi-ah misiangtho zawngte sum hawm uh a, lungsim takpi tawh a pia zo uh hi." 
Romans15:27 Ahi hi, lungsim takpi a nei uh ka cih hangin amaute in tuate tungah leiba nei-in a kingaihsun uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Gentailte in Kha Siangtho piak thuphate Judah mite tawh a ngah khawm uh ahih leh, leitung sum pia-in amau zong Judah mite a vaak ding uh a kilawm hi." 
Romans15:28 Tua ahih ciangin hih na ka sep a, hih na piakna lim takin ka koih khit ciangin, note kiang tawnin Spain gamah ka pai ding hi." 
Romans15:29 Note omna mun kong tun’ ciangin a kicing Khazih’ thupha tawh kong pai ding, ke’n ka thei hi." 
Romans15:30 Ute naute aw, keimah in Judah gamah a om thu nialte’ khut tung pan ka suahtak nading ahi zongin, Jerusalem khuapi-ah keimah in an vaakna ka sep ding misiangthote in a deih nadingun ahi zongin, Pasian’ deihna bangin lungdamna tawh note omna-ah kong tung ding a, note tawh noptuamna ka ngah khawm nadingin ahi zongin, note in keimah tawh hahkatin keimah ading Pasian kiangah thu na ngetsak ta un, ci-in i Topa Zeisu Khazih leh Kha Siangtho-a itna tawh note kong thuum hi." 
Romans15:31  
Romans15:32  
Romans15:33 Nopna hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh tawh omkhawm ta hen. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Kenkhrea khua-ah a om pawlpi nasem numei ahi, i sanggamnu Foebe note kiangah kong tungsak hi." 
Romans16:2 Misiangthote in ahih ding a kilawm bangin, Pasian hangah tua numei na tungsak un la, amah huh dinga a kisapnate khempeuh na huh ta un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in mi tampi ahi zongin, keimah ahi zongin hong huh mi ahi hi." 
Romans16:3 Kei tawh kibang Khazih Zeisu’ nasem khawm Prisilla leh Akuila na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:4 Amaute in keima nuntakna tang ding amau ngawng a dawh ngamte ahi uh hi. “Amau in hehpihna a nei uh hi,” ci-in kei guak hi lo, Gentail pawlpite khempeuh in a phat uh hi." 
Romans16:5 Amau inn sungah a om pawlpi zong na hopihsak un. Asia gamah Khazih ading a gah masabel ka it Epainetas zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:6 Note nasem a hahkat Mari na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:7 Kei tawh thongkia khawm, keima behte ahi Andronikas leh Junias zong na hopihsak un. Amaute in sawltak lakah maiphatna a ngah mi ahi uh a, kei mai-ah Khazih’ sunga om mite ahi uh hi." 
Romans16:8 Pasian hangah ke’n ka it Amflias na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:9 Kote tawh Khazih’ nasem khawmpa Urbanas leh ka it Stakhus zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:10 Nungzui taktak ahi Epelles leh Aritobulus’ innkuante zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:11 Ka beh Herodion leh Narkissas’ innkuante lakah Topa nung a zuite zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:12 Topa’ nasemte ahi Trifana leh Trofosa na hopihsak un. Topa’ nasem ahi it ding a kilawm numei Persis zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:13 Topa’ teelsa Rufas leh a nu ahi, ke’n zong nu ka cih, na hopihsak un."
