2Corinthians4:13 Tua ahih ciangin, “Keimah in umin, ka gen hi” ci-a a kigelh mah bangin kote in zong upna lungsim nei ka hih ciangun ka gen uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:14 Topa Zeisu sihna pan a thosakpa in Zeisu tawh kote zong hong thosak kik ding a, note tawh a kiangah a hong tum khawmsak ding hi cih ka thei hi." 
2Corinthians4:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hehpihna in mite hangin khang a, Pasian’ minthan’na ading hehpihna phatna a kicin’ nadingin na khempeuh note ading ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Tua ahih ciangin thanem lungkia loin ka om uh hi. Kote uh pum pua lamah a om mi in a kisiatsiat hangin ka pum sung uhah a om mi in ni khat nung ni khat kibawl thakna a ngah hi. 
2Corinthians4:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote maitangah a kilangte in tawlkhat bek kip a," 
2Corinthians4:18 a kilang lo nate a kip tawntung ahih ciangin a kilang nate en lo ciamteh loin, a kilang lo nate ka en ka ciamteh uh ciangin tawlkhat bek ka thuak uh gimna a zangin a tawntung a gik minthan’ nading a piangsak hi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Kote omna ahi leibuk in a siat leh, khut tawh kibawl lo Pasian’ bawlsa, a kisia ngei lo vantungah inn a om cih ka thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kote in vantung pan a piang omna silh nadingin thuumin ka om uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:3 Tua bang silh lehang puan nei loin om ding i hi kei ding hi. 
2Corinthians5:4 Hih bukah a om kote in vangik pua-in thuumin ka tau uh hi. Puan silh loin om nuam ka hih manun a thuum ka hi kei uh hi; a si thei nuntakna in nuntakna sungah a phumcip dingin puan silhin om nuam ka hih manunah ka thuum uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:5 Tua bang thupha ngah nading a hong bawlpa in Pasian ahi hi. Tua Pasian in hong tung ding hun ading Kha Siangtho ahi maleep eite hong pia zo hi. 
2Corinthians5:6 Tua ahih ciangin pumpi-ah ka om lai tengun Pasian tawh ka kigamla uh hi cih thei-in lau loin ka om uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:7 Kote in mit’ muhna tawh hi loin, upna tawh ka nungta uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:8 Pum leh tak tawh kikhenin Topa tawh innah omkhawm tawntung dingin ut zaw-in lau lohna lungsim ka nei uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:9 Tua ahih ciangin kote in pumpi sung ahi innah ka om uh hi taleh, pumpi tawh kikhenin ka om uh hi taleh, Pasian ka lungdamsak nading uh ngimna nei-in ka hahkat uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite khempeuh in pumpi-ah i gamtatna ahoih ahoih lo bangin thukhenna ngah ciat dingin Khazih’ tokhom mai-ah i tung tek ding hi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Tua ahih leh, Topa kihtakna kote in thei-in midangte ka zol lai takun Pasian mai-ah ka kilang uh hi. Note lungsim mai-ah zong ka kilang uh hi ci-in ka um uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:12 Kote in note mai-ah komau pumpi uh kiphat kik ka hi kei uh hi; lungsim ngaihsun loin, a meel ngaihsunin a kisathei mite’ kam na thukkik theih nadingun, kote hangah kisaktheih nading bek kong gen uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mihai hi le-ung Pasian ading ka hai uh hi. Mipil hi le-ung note ading mipil ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khempeuh tang ding mi khat bek si ahih ciangin mi khempeuh a si uh ahi zongin," 
2Corinthians5:15 a nungta mite in amau deih bang uh a hin’ loh uh a, amaute tang ding si-a a thokik pa’ deihna bang a hin’ nadingun mi khempeuh tangding sihna a thuak ci-in ahi zongin ka ciamteh uh a, Khazih hong itna in zawhthawhna tawh kote hong zol ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:16 Tua ahih ciangin tu-a kipan kote in ci-le-sa pawlte ngaihsunin kuamah ka thei kei uh hi. Ci-le-sa pawlte ngaihsunin Khazih ka theih ngei uh hangin tu-a kipanin tua bang ka thei ngei nawn kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:17 Tua ahih ciangin Khazih sungah a om mi in mithak a suak hi. Alui nate kikheel a, athak a piang zo hi." 
2Corinthians5:18 Na khempeuh Pasian panin a piang hi. Pasian in Khazih hangin amah tawh hong kilemsak a, tua kilemna thu tawh kipawl nasepna za kote hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:19 Tua thu in, Pasian in Khazih sungah om a, leitungmite’ mawhna ciamteh loin amah tawh kilemsak a, tua kilemsakna thu kote hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:20 Tua ahih ciangin kote in Khazih tang ding sawltak ka hi uh hi. Note in Pasian tawh na kilem un ci-in Pasian in kote tungah hong hansuah mah bangin kote in zong Khazih tang ding kong thuum uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:21 Pasian in mawhna a nei lo Khazih, eite tangding mawhna a suaksak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in tua mi hangin Pasian’ dikna i suah theih nading ahi hi." 
2Corinthians6:1 Note in Pasian’ hehpihna thupha na ngah uh a mawkna na suaksak kei un ci-in kote in Topa tawh nasem khawm mi ka hih ciangun note hong hansuahin kong zol uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “A kilawm hun ciangin nangma kam ka ngai hi, gupna ni ciangin nang kong huh hi,” Pasian in a cih mah bangin tu laitak in a kilawm hun ahi hi, tu laitak in gupna ni hun ahi hi." 
2Corinthians6:3 Ka nasepna uhah mawhsakna a om loh nadingin kipuk nading sukkhakna khat beek ka hih kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:4 Bawlsiat thuakna, zawn’khal thuakna, a kipelh zo lo gimna thuakna," 
2Corinthians6:5 satna tupna thuakna, thong sung khumna, mi tawh kitotna, nasepna, ihmu lo a, ngakna, gilkial thuakna," 
2Corinthians6:6 lungsim siangthona, pilna, lungduaina, hehpihna bawlna, Kha Siangtho ngahna, it kheem lo it takpina," 
2Corinthians6:7 thuman thuhilhna, Pasian’ vangliatna lahna, dikna galhiam ziat lam leh vei lamah silhna hang ahi zongin," 
2Corinthians6:8 minthan’na leh simmawhna ahi zongin, phatna leh kosiatna thuakin ahi zongin, mikheemte bang ahi zongin, thuman gen mi hi-in," 
2Corinthians6:9 kuama theih loh mi bangin ahi zongin minthan’na a ngahte hi-in, sihna a thuak mite bangin ahi zongin a hing mite hi-in, thahna a thuak mi bang ahi zongin thahna tawh kipelh mite hi-in," 
2Corinthians6:10 a dahte bang ahi zongin a nuam tawntung mi hi-in, a zawng mite bang ahi zongin a ngah a hau mite hi-in, sum khat beek a nei lo mi bang ahi zongin na khempeuh a nei mite hi-in Pasian’ nasemte ka hi takpi uh a, na khempeuh tawh kilangin ka lak uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:11 Korin mite aw, kote kam un note kiangah hon’sa-in a om hi. Ka lungsim uh zong a zai hi." 
2Corinthians6:12 Kote-ah note in a kawcik na hi kei uh hi: ki-itna hehpihna-ah na kawcik uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:13 Kote’ thupha nong thukkik nadingun lungsim a zai nei un. Tua bang ka cih ciangin ka tate ka hilh bangin kong ci hi. 
2Corinthians6:14 A thu-um lote tawh kipawlin kithutuak lo hakkol na puakhawm kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, dikna thu in gitlohna tawh bang ci-a kigawm thei ding hiam? Khuavak in khuamial tawh bang ci kizom thei ding hiam?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Khazih in Belial tawh bang ci kilem theih ding hiam? Thu-umte leh thu-umlote in bangci ngah khawm thei ding hiam? 
2Corinthians6:16 Pasian’ biakinnpi in milimte tawh bangci kizom thei ding hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh, eite in a nungta Pasian’ biakinnpi i hi hi. Pasian’ thupiakna in: “Amaute sungah ka teeng ding a, amau sungah ka vak kawikawi ding hi; Amau Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute in zong keima mi ahi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Corinthians6:17 Tua ahih ciangin: “Tua mite lak pan paikhia un la, a tuamin om un. A siangtho lote na lawng kei un." 
2Corinthians6:18 Note’ Pasian ka hi ding hi, Note zong ka tanu ka tapa na hi ding uh hi,” Vanglian Topa in a ci hi." 
2Corinthians7:1 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw, tua thuciamna eite tawh kikum ahih ciangin i pumpi kihhuainate leh lungsim kihhuainate khempeuh panin kisiangthosakin, Pasian kihta-in, a siangtho gamtatna tawh dimin om ni." 
2Corinthians7:2 Kote ading na lungsim uh na za sak un. Kote in kuamah tungah ka khial kei uh hi. Kuamah ka bawlsia kei uh hi. Kuamah kheemin a sum ka la kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians7:3 Note hong mawhsak nadingin hih bang ka ci kei hi. No tawh nuntak khawm nadingin ahi zongin, sih khawm nadingin ahi zongin ka deih dongin note ka lungtang sungah kong it hi ci-in tuma-in ka hong ci zo hi." 
2Corinthians7:4 Note kiangah lau loin ka hong ci hi; note hangin ka kisathei mahmah hi. Hehnepna tawh ka dim hi. Ka thuakna uh gimna khempeuh ah a kigen thei loin ka lungdamzaw hi. 
2Corinthians7:5 Makedonia gamah ka tun’ uh ciangin ka pumpi ading tawlngakna bangmah om lo hi. Na khempeuh panin bawlsiatna ka thuak uh hi. Pua lamah kidona a om hi, sung lamah launa a om hi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahih hangin a kinuaisiah mite a hehnem thei Pasian in Titu hong tun’na hangin kote hong hehnem hi. 
2Corinthians7:7 Titu hong tun’na hang bekin hong kihehnem hi loin note kiangah Titu in a ngah hehnepna hangin zong hong hehnemsak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na lunggulhna uh, na thuumna uh, komau phat nading na deihna lungsim uh a lian hi, ci-in kote kiangah a hong gen ciangin ka lung uh a dam semsem hi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Tuma-a kong khak lai in note hong dahsak hangin a masa-in ka kisik zongin tu-in ka kisik kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua lai in note tawlkhat bek hong dahsak hi cih ka thei hi." 
2Corinthians7:9 No hong dahsak ahih maninah a nuam ka hi kei hi, hong dahsaka hong kisiksak ahih manin ka lung a dam hi. Kote hangin note noptuamna uh a neukha beek a kisiat loh nadingin Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin ka hong dahsak hi." 
2Corinthians7:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ deihna tawh kituak dahna in hong gup nading tawh kizom kisik kikna lungsim hi a, a kikheel kik thei lo kisikna lungsim hong pia hi. Leitunga dahna in sihna a piangsak hi." 
2Corinthians7:11 Pasian’ deihna tawh kituak note dahna in note sungah bang ci bang phawkna, bang ci bang mawh kiphelna, bang ci bang hehna, bang ci bang launa, bang ci bang lunggulhna, bang ci bang deihna lungsim, bang ci bang thuman tawh daan piak thu-a bawlphatna ci-in en ta un. Note in hih thu sung pan mawhsakna tawh na kipelh uh hi ci-in na khempeuh hangin na lak zo uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Tua mah bangin keimah in note kiangah gelh a, kong piak ciangin mawhna a hih mi leh mawhna a thuak mi bek ngaihsuna gelh ka hi kei hi; kote phattuamna ading Pasian mai-ah bawl nopna lungsim na neih uh na kilatsak nadingun ka hong gelh hi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih ciangin kote in hehnepna ka ngah zo uh hi. Tua hehnepna-ah zong note khempeuh in Titu’ lungsim na noptuamsak zo uh a, ama lungdamna hangin kote ka lungdam semsem uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Keimah in note hangin ka kisaktheihna kam ama kiangah ka gen zo ahih ciangin tu-in ka zum nading a om kei hi. Kote in na khempeuh note kiangah thuman kong gen uh bangin Titu mai-ah ka kisaktheihna kam zong a mantak ahih lam a kitel hi. 
2Corinthians7:15 Note in launa leh liin’na tawh amah na tungsak uh a, a thu na ngaihna uh amah in a ngaihsut ciangin note hong itna hehpihna lungsim a dim hi." 
2Corinthians7:16 Keimah in na khempeuhah note tawh kipawlin ka lungmuang semsem a, ka nuam hi." 
2Corinthians8:1 Ute naute aw, Makedonia gamah a om pawlpite tungah a bawl Pasian’ hehpihna thupha note zong kong zasak uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:2 Tua pawlpite in a zawn’ khalna hanga ze-etna tampi a thuak lai takun, a lungdamna uh lian ahih ciangin nakpi zawngkhal napi-in sumpi piakna nasia takin a khang hi." 
2Corinthians8:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amau in a hih theih zah tham loin, a hih theih zah sanga tamzaw amau lungsim ut thu-in piak nopna lungsim a nei uh hi ci-in teci ka pang hi." 
2Corinthians8:4 Amaute in misiangthote’ vakna huhna a nasep theih nading uh hansuahna zolna kam tampi tawh kote kiangah hong thuum uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:5 Tua bang a hih uh ciangin kote lawpna zah tham loin a hih uh a, Pasian deihna tawh kituakin a masa-in Pasian kiangah ahi zongin, kote kiangah ahi zongin, amau mahmah hong kipia uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua ahih ciangin Titu in note kiangah hong kipatsa bangin hih hehpihna zong a zawh khit nadingin kote in amah ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:7 Ahih hangin note in upna, thuhilhna, pilna, hahkatna a pawlpawl leh nong itna uh-a kipan na khempeuh tawh na dim uh mah bangin hih hehpih piakna zong na dimsak ta un." 
2Corinthians8:8 Tua bang kong cih ciangin thupiakna tawh hong ci ka hi kei hi. Midangte’ hahkatna paulamin note itna lungsim in a man hiam, a man lo hiam, ze-etna tawh kong ci hi." 
2Corinthians8:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, i Topa Zeisu Khazih in a hau napi-in zawngkhalna a thuakna tawh note in hauhna na ngah nadingun note tangdingin zawngkhalna a thuak thupha hehpihna na thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Hih thu panin keimah in ka lungsim ngaihsutna kong lak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nikumin lungsim hanciamna-ah zong note in a pia masa bek hi loin a ut masa na hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih ciangin nidang lai-inah hih nopna lungsim hanciamna a om mah bangin tu-in na hih theih zahun hih un la, hih thu na zosiang un." 
2Corinthians8:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih nopna lungsim a om leh, hih zawh lohna ngaihsun loin, hih zawh ding bek ngaihsutna in a deihhuai na ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:13 Hih thu kong gen ciangin midangte in noptuamna ngahin note in zawn’na na thuak nading uh hanciam ka hi kei hi. 
2Corinthians8:14 “A tam a kaikhawmpa’ aa dim val lo a, tawm a kaikhawmpa’ aa dim lah lo hi,” ci-a Lai Siangtho’ kam bangin a kihawmna thu ngaihsunin, tu-in note’ hauhna in amaute zawn’na huhin ahi zongin, a nungciangin amaute hauhna in note’ zawn’na hong huhin ahi zongin, a kikim dimdiamin a suah nading ka hanciam hi." 
2Corinthians8:15  
2Corinthians8:16 Note ading huhna hahkatna ka hanciamna bang uh Titu’ lungsim sungah a guang Pasian in phatna ngah ta hen. 
2Corinthians8:17 Amah in kote hanthotna thu a ngai tham loin, hih nopna lungsim nei a, ama thu-in note kiangah hong pai hi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu hilhna-ah pawlpi khempeuh lakah phatna a ngah sanggampa zong Titu tawh kong sawl khawm uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:19 Tua sanggampa in Pasian’ pahtawina ahi zongin, komau lungsim phatna ahi zongin kilangsak a, hehpihna sumpi piakna nasepna-ah kote tawh hong tonkhawm dingin pawlpite in teelin a koihpa ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Kote in tua a tampi sumpi piak hehpihna na ka sep lai takun mawhsakna a om loh nadingin ka kikem uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa mai bek hi lo, mite mai-ah zong a kilawm a kituaka gamtat ding ka hanciam uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tua nihte tawh a dang sanggampa zong kong paisak uh hi. Tua sanggampa na khempeuh ah tam veipi ka ze-et uh a, ka theih bangin a hahkatpa ahi hi. Tu-in note a hong muan’ mahmah maninah a hahkat semsem hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titu in bang ci bang mi ahi hiam ci-a hong dong mi a om leh, ka kikholhpih ka lawmpa ahi hi, note huh dingin kei tawh a semkhawm mi zong ahi hi. I sanggamte zong bang ci bang mite ahi uh hiam ci-a hong dong mi a om leh, pawlpi’ sawltakte ahi uh hi, Khazih in a pahtawi mite zong ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:24 Tua ciangin note ki-itna uh ahi zongin, kote in note hangah ka kisaktheih nading uh ahi zongin pawlpite mai-ah tuate tungah a kilangin na lak un." 
2Corinthians9:1 Misiangthote’ vakna thu note kiangah kong gelh hangin na phattuamna uh om tuam lo ding hi. 
2Corinthians9:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in huh nopna lungsim na neih uh ka thei hi. Tua huh nopna lungsim hangin ka kisathei hi. “Akhaia gam mite in nikum pekin a khol zo uh hi,” ci-in Makedonia gam mite kiangah ka gen thei hi. Note’ thanopna lungsim in mi tampi a hansuah zo hi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ahih hangin note hanga kote’ kisaktheihna in a mawkna suak loin, tua kam mah bangin a kigingkholsa-in na om nading uh ka u ka naute kong sawl hi." 
2Corinthians9:4 Tua bang a hih kei leh, Makedonia mi kimkhat in kei tawh hong pai khawmin note a kholsa-a na om loh uh hong mu le-uh note’ zum ding gen loh, lau lo-a kong muan’na sa uhah kote in ka maizum ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:5 Tua ahih ciangin nidang a, kiciamsa note’ sumpi piakna, zawhthawh thu-a piak sum bang hi loin, hehpihna bangin khol kholh nadingin ka u ka naute in no kiangah hong pai masa-in, tua sumpi na kiginkholh nadingun hong hansuah loin om leng, kilawm ka sa kei hi." 
2Corinthians9:6 Khaici tawmkha a vawhte in tawmkha a at ding hi, citpiakna tawh a tampi a vawhte in a tampi a at ding hi ci-in na ciamteh un." 
2Corinthians9:7 Mi khempeuh in amau lungsim sung uhah a hanciam bangin pia uh hen. Hazatna lungsim tawh ahi zongin, khia loin om thei lo ding cihna lungsim tawh ahi zongin kipia lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, piak nopna lungsim tawh a pia mi bek Pasian in a it hi." 
2Corinthians9:8 Note in na khempeuhah na zat khop ding uh sum a pawlpawl na neih niloh uh a, gamtatpha apawlpawl tawh na dim mahmah nadingun thupha apawlpawl a kicin’ nading Pasian in a hih thei hi." 
2Corinthians9:9 Lai Siangtho in: “Amah in a hawmthang zo hi, mi zawngte a thupha a hawm zo hi; Ama dikna in a kip tawntung hi,” a ci hi." 
2Corinthians9:10 Khaici vawhte’ khaici ahi zongin, nek theih an ahi zongin a piapa in note vawh ding khaici hong pia a, a khangsak ding a, note dikna’ gahte a tamsak ding hi." 
2Corinthians9:11 Tua bangin note in hehpihna lungsim tawh apawl apawl hawmsak a, na piak nadingun na khempeuh na hauh uh ciangin kote tungah Pasian’ hehpihna phatna ding a om ding hi." 
2Corinthians9:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih nasepna in Pasian’ mite lak-a, mizawngte zawn’na a huh tham loin, Pasian’ hehpihna phat nadingin na tampi tawh a dim hi." 
2Corinthians9:13 Note in Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu deihna-ah a kilanga na zuih uh ahi zongin, tua misiangthote-a kipan mi khempeuh hehpihna lungsim tawh hawmin na piakna uh ahi zongin, amau in a ngaihsut uh ciangin tua kivakna lim teci paulamin Pasian’ hehpihna a phat thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:14 Note tungah a lamdang Pasian’ hehpihna thupha amaute in ngaihsunin, note ading thungenin, note hong lunggulh uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:15 A kigen khin zo lo hong piakkhong letsong thupha hangin Pasian tungah hehpihna phatna om ta hen! 
2Corinthians10:1 Note kiangah kiniamsak a, note tawh a kikhen ciangin a hang keimah Paul in Khazih’ lungnemna leh hehpihna tawh note kong thuum hi." 
2Corinthians10:2 Kote in ci-le-sa ngeina bangin a gamta mi ka hi uh ci-in hong ngaihsun mi kimkhatte kiangah lau lo-a ka hanciam bangin, note kiangah ka hong tun’ ciangin tua zah lau lohnate om loh nadingin kong thuum hi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote in ci-le-sa ngeina bangin ka gamtat uh hangin ci-le-sa ngeina bangin gal ka do kei uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:4 Kote’ galdona-a ka zat uh hiamte in ci-le-sa tawh kipawl ahi kei hi: khuapi kulhte a cim gawpsak thei, Pasian mai-ah vangliatna tawh a dim hiam ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tua hiamte tawh mi hanciamna ahi zongin, Pasian theihna pilna lang khatah a kiphasak ngaihsutnate ahi zongin khuplet gawpin, lungsim khempeuh manin khumcipin Khazih’ thu ka ngaisak uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:6 Note thungaihna in a kicin’ khit ciangin thungai lo khempeuh daan pia dingin a baihsa-in ka om uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:7 Note in na maitang uh a, omte bek en na hi uh hi. Mi khat in, “Kei Khazih’ mi ka hi,” ci-in amahmah a ki-up leh, tuapa in Khazih’ mi a hih bangin kote zong Khazih’ mi ka hih thu uh, khat vei amahmah in ngaihsun ta hen." 
2Corinthians10:8 Note sukgawp nading hi lo, hong kipsak nadingin Topa in kote a hong piak thuneihna-ah a tampi ka kisaktheih hangin zumna ka thuak kei ding hi." 
2Corinthians10:9 Ka hong piak lai tawh note hong tawng bangin ka hi nuam kei hi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Ama lai in a gik a vanglian tawh kidim lai a hih hangin ama pumpi ahih leh, hatna nei lo, thu-a kimang lo kam a pau thei mi hi,” a ci mi a om thei hi." 
2Corinthians10:11 Kote in ka pumpi uh a om loh ciangin lai sungah ka gelh uh kammal bangin ka hih uh bangin, komau pumpi uh a om ciangin zong a hihte ka hi uh hi, ci-in tua mite in ciamteh ta uh hen." 
2Corinthians10:12 Amau mah a kiphatte tawh kisimkhopna ahi zongin, kidemna ahi zongin ka hih ngam kei uh hi. Tuate in khat leh khat kitehin kidem uh a, pilna nei lo uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kote ka hih uh leh, ka sep ding uh kheng a, ka bawlna uhah ka kisathei kei ding uh hi. Pasian in hong hawmsak ka nasep ding uh kitehna sungah ka hihna uh bekah ka kisathei ding uh hi. Tua kitehna in note dongin ka hong ban uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Note dong hong ban lo bangin kote in khengin sem ka hi kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu hilh dingin note omna dongin kong tung zo uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:15 Kote in ka nasep nading uh khenin mi dangte’ nasepna sungah ka tum uh ahih maninah kisathei ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:16 Tua bang amau sepna sungah a kibawlsa nate-ah kisathei loin, note gam lang khatah galkah-in Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu hilh theihna om nadingin note thu-upna a khan’ lai takin kote nasepna in a tanzau mahmah ding hi ci-in ka lawp uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:17 Tua ahih ciangin a kisathei mi in Topa sung bekah kisathei ta hen. 
2Corinthians10:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amahmah a kiphat mi in san’ huai lo hi; Topa’ phatna a ngah mi in san’ ding a kilawm hi." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ka haina neukha note in na thuak le-uh teh ka ut hi. 
2Corinthians11:2 Na thuak taktak un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in note nungak siangtho bangin Khazih kiangah kong piak nadingin pasal khat tawh ka hong kiteengsak zo ahih ciangin, Pasian tawh kipawl lunghihmawhna tawh, note ading ka lunghimawh hi." 
2Corinthians11:3 Gulpi in ama zuauna tawh Evua a kheem mah bangin note lungsim ngam-in kisia-in, Khazih lamah a om khin na lungsim siangtho uh a mangthang ding hi ci-in ka lunghihmawh hi." 
2Corinthians11:4 No omna-ah a hong pai mi in ko hong hilh loh Zeisu khat hong hilh zongin, na ngah ngei loh uh Kha Siangtho na ngah uh zongin, na ngaih nai loh uh Lungdamna Thu na ngai uh zongin tua-pa na thuak thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:5 Keimah in sawltak liante nuaiah neukha bek a neuzaw ka hi kei hi. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ka kam hangin a pil lo mi ka hi zongin pilna lamsangah pil lo mi ka hi kei hi. Hih thu khempeuh note apawl pawlin kong lak zo uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:7 Note pahtawi nadingin keima pumpi ka niamsak a, thaman la loin note kiangah Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu kong gen kong hilh ciangin ka mawh hiam?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Note nasem dingin adang pawlpite tung pan thaman dangka sang a, amau sum a sut ka suak ta hi." 
2Corinthians11:9 No tawh ka omkhawm lai takin na khat peuhpeuh ka deih ciangin kuamah tungah vangik ka guan’ kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Makedonia gam pan a hong pai ute naute in ka deihna khempeuh hong pia hi. Note tungah gimna khat ka suah loh nadingin kei in na khempeuhah ka kikem hi. A nung ciangin zong ka kikem lai ding hi." 
2Corinthians11:10 Khazih’ thuman thutak in keima sungah a om mah bangin Akhaia gamah hi bang ka kisaktheihna kuamah in hong khaam zo kei ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:11 Bang hang hiam? Note ka hong it loh hang ahi hiam? Kong it cih Pasian in a thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:12 Thu nei nuamte in a neih theih loh nading ahi zongin, amau kisaktheihna-ah kote banga tel taka, kilat theih nading ahi zongin ka hih bangin ka hih lai ding hi." 
2Corinthians11:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua bang mite in sawltak zuau ahi uh hi. Khazih’ sawltak banga kibawl a kheem thei nasemte ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:14 Hih thu in lungmanhuai hi lo hi. Satan nangawn in khuavak tawh kipawl vantungmi bangin a kibawl thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:15 Tua bang ahih ciangin ama nasemte zong thudikna’ nasem bangin a kibawl leh, bang genna a om ding hiam? Amau in amau gamtatna hangin a tawpna-ah a thuak ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:16 Khatvei ka genin ah, keimah in mihai hi ci-in kuamah in hong um kei hen. Ahih kei leh, kei zong a neukha ka kisaktheih na’ngin, kei mihai bangin hong ngaihsunin hong thuak un." 
2Corinthians11:17 Hih bang ka genna in Topa’ thupiak bangin gen ka hi kei hi, mihai bangin, lau loin, kisathei-in ka gen hi." 
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tampite in ci-le-sa ah kisathei uh ahih ciangin keimah in zong ka kisathei ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:19 No mipilte na hih uh ciangin ki-itna lungsim tawh mihaite na thuak uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:20 Mi khat in note sila hong suaksak ahi zongin, hong ne ahi zongin, hong man ahi zongin, a kiphasak ahi zongin, na biang uh hong beeng ahi zongin na thuak uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Kote hatna nei lo hi ci-a hong kikosiatna paulamin kong ci hi. Ahih hangin na khat peuhpeuh ah mi khat lau loin a om leh, keimah in zong lau loin ka om hi ci-in mihai bangin ka gen hi." 
2Corinthians11:22 Amaute in Hebru mi ahi uh hiam? Kei in zong ka hi hi. Amaute in Israel mi ahi uh hiam? Kei in zong ka hi hi. Amaute in Abraham’ suan ahi uh hiam? Kei in zong ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Amaute in Khazih’ nasemte ahi uh hiam? Kei in zong ka hizaw hi ci-in mihai bangin ka gen hi. Gim mahmaha nasem zaw mi, thong sungah khiatna a thuakzaw mi, satna tupna kisim zo lo a thuak mi, sihna ding tawh tam veipi kituak ka hi hi." 
2Corinthians11:24 Nga vei dongin Judah mite’ khut sungah sawmli-ah khat a kiam satna ka thuak zo hi. 
2Corinthians11:25 Thum vei dongin ciing pum tawh satna ahi zongin, khat vei suang tawh den’na ahi zongin ka thuak zo hi. Thum vei dong teembaw siatna ka thuak zo hi. Sun khat leh zan khat tawntung tuipi sungah ka om zo hi." 
2Corinthians11:26 Tam veipi thuhilhin ka zin hi, gun galkah kihtakna, mi suamte kihtakna, ka mi pawlte’ hong bawlsiatna launa, Gentailte’ bawlsiatna launa, khuapi sungah a tung launa, gam lakah a tung launa, tuipi launa, u leh nau banga kibawl mite’ bawlsiatna launa, hih gimna khempeuh ka thuak zo hi." 
2Corinthians11:27 Gim mahmah a, hahkatna tawh nasepna, tamveipi gilkialna dangtakna, tam veipi antan’na, khuadam thuakna, puan nei lo-a omna, hih gimna khempeuh ka thuak zo hi." 
2Corinthians11:28 A pua lamah a om tua thute tham loin, pawlpi khempeuh lunghihmawhna tawh nisimin gimna ka thuak hi." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ka tha kiam lohin kua tha kiam ahi hiam? Ka lunggim lohin kua in khial ahi hiam? 
2Corinthians11:30 Kisathei ding ka hih leh, ka thanemna bek suangin ka kisathei ding hi." 
2Corinthians11:31 Keimah in zuau thu ka gen kei hi cih a tawntung thupha a ngah Topa Zeisu’ Pa leh Pasian in a thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:32 Damaskas khua-a Aretas kumpipa’ khua ukpa in kei hong man dingin Damaskas khua ah hong pan’ lai takin," 
2Corinthians11:33 nungzuite in seeng sungah khuapi kulh tung panin hong khiasuk uh a, ama khut sungpan ka suakta hi." 
2Corinthians12:1 Keimah in kisaktheihna ka bawl ding a kilawm loh hangin ka bawl ding hi. Ahih hangin Topa hong muhsak mangmatna leh thupiakkholhna thu kong gen ding hi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Tuma kum sawm leh li lai takin Khazih sungah a om mi khat, thumna vantung dongin a paipih ka thei hi. Ama pumpi tonpih hiam, tonpih lo hiam ka thei kei hi—Pasian in a thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Tuapa Paradis khua-ah a paipih hi. Mite gen dinga kilawm lo, kigen thei lo kam a zakna thu a thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:4 A pumpi a thei hiam, thei lo hiam ka thei kei hi—Pasian in a thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:5 Tua bang mi hangin ka kisathei ding hi. Keimah pumpi a hih leh, thanemna sim loh, ka kisathei kei ding hi." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kisathei nuam hi leng zong mihai ka hi kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in a man takin thu ka gen ding hi. Midang khat in kei hong muh sangin, ka thu a zak sangin, keimah hong up zawk loh nadingin gen loin ka om ding hi." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ka ngah mangmatnate a lamdan’ mahmah hangin kisaktheihna lungsim ka neih loh nadingin kei hong daantat na’ng Satan’ sawltak ahi, ka pum hong sun ling khat hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Tua zawn’khalna tawh kipelh nadingin Topa kiangah thum vei dongin ka ngen hi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ka thuum khit ciangin, “Ka hehpihna thupha in nang ading a kicing hi, ka vangliatna in thanemna ah a kicing hi,” ci-in thu hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Khazih’ vangliatna in kei tungah hong tun’ nadingin ka thanemna hangin ka kisaktheih zawk nading ka utzaw hi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Tua ahih ciangin Khazih hangin thanemna, kosiatna, zawn’khalna, bawlsiatna, a haksa gimna ka thuak ciangin ka nuam hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka thanem ciangin ka thahat hi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Mihai ka suak zo hi! Note in kei, zawhthawhna tawh mihai nong suaksak zo uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note phatna ngah ding ka kilawm hi. Keimah in bangmah ka hih loh hangin sawltak a lian belte nuaiah neukha beek a gina lozaw ka hi kei hi." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ahi takpi-in na khempeuh ah thuakna tawh nalamdangte leh dipkuat huaite, vangliatnate tawh, sawltakte’ lim note lakah a kilang khinzo hi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Keimah in note ading vangik ka suah lohna sim loh, note in pawlpi dangte sangin bangah a gina lozaw na hi uh hiam? Tua bang ka khialhna hong maisak un." 
2Corinthians12:14 Thum veina note kiangah hong pai dingin a kigingin ka om hi. Ahih hangin note’ adingin vangik ka hi kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, note neihsate deihin, a zong ka hi kei hi, nomau mahmah kong zong hi. Tanute tapate in a nu a pate ading sum khol ahi kei uh hi; a nute a pate in a tanute a tapate ading sum a khol uh hi." 
2Corinthians12:15 Keimah in note kha uh nopsak nadingin ka neihsate ahi zongin, ka pumpi ahi zongin, lungdamna tawh ka beisak nuam hi. Keimah in note a tam zaw-in kong it leh, note in kei a tawm zaw-in nong it ding uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Keimah in note tungah vangik khat ka suah lohna maan ta hen. Ahi zongin mipil ka hih ciangin kheemna tawh note hong man hi ta leng zong," 
2Corinthians12:17 note kiangah ka hong paisak mi khatpeuh tung tawnin note’ neihsa kheemna tawh la ngei ka hi hiam? 
2Corinthians12:18 Titu in note kiangah a pai nading ka thuum a, amah tawh i sanggampa khat kong paisak hi. Titu in kheemna tawh note sum a la hiam? Kote in lungsim kibangin a gamta hilo ka hi uh hiam? Lam khat bek zui hilo ka hi uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Kote in note mai-ah tu dongin kisuan’takna kampau hi ci-in nong um uh hiam? Khazih sungah kipin Pasian mai-ah ka gen uh hi. Ahih hangin ka itte aw, ko ka hihna uh na khempeuh note kipsak nadingin ka hih uh hi." 
2Corinthians12:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka hong tun’ ciangin note in ka deih mi na hih loh uh a, keimah in zong no deih loh mi hi ding ahi zongin, note lakah kitotna, gendaina, nakpi-a hehna, kiseelna, kiphunsanna, kikhenna, kiphatsak theihna, buaina a suah ding ahi zongin," 
2Corinthians12:21 nidang hunin khialin kihhuai gamtatna, numei tawh mawhna, huk luatna, lan luatnate hih kha-in, tu dongin kisik lo-a om mi tampi hangin lungsim nuam loin ka thuum a, note mai-ah ka Pasian in kei hong niamkhiatin amaute hanga hong kidahsak khak ding ka lau hi." 
2Corinthians13:1 Hih in note kiangah kong pai ding a thum veina ahi hi. Teci nih bang thum bang kam hangin thu khempeuh a kip ding hi. 
2Corinthians13:2 Khat vei kong tun’ ciangin ka hong dawm kei ding hi ci-in a masa-a mawh neite-a kipan a om lai mite khempeuh kiangah nidang a, ka gen tham loin, tu-in zong no tawh ka omkhawm loh hangin, nih veina-a omkhawm lai mah bangin khat vei kong genkhol hi." 
2Corinthians13:3 Note lakah thanem lo-a a thahat Khazih in keima tungah hong genna teci note in na zong uh ahih ciangin, ka hong tun’ ciangin ka hong dawm kei ding hi." 
2Corinthians13:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua Khazih in thanemna hangin singlamteh tungah sihna a thuak zongin Pasian’ vangliatna tawh a nungta hi. Kote in zong Khazih sungah ka thanem uh zongin Pasian’ vangliatna hangin Khazih tawh note lakah ka nungta khawm ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:5 Note in thu-upna sungah kipin na om uh hiam, na om kei uh hiam, nomau pumpi uh na kisittel ciat un. Nomau pumpi uh na kize-et un. A kisittel zo lote na hih kei uh leh, Zeisu Khazih in note sungah a om hi ci-in nomau thu nomau in thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians13:6 Kote in a kisittel zo lote ka hi kei uh hi cih thu note in na theih ding uh kong muang hi. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kote in a kisittel zo mi ka hihna uh a kilat nading deihna hi loin, a kisittel zo lo mi bang ka hi uh zongin, note in ahoih na gamtat theih nadingun, gamtat hoih lo khat beek na gamtat loh nadingun Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Kote in thuman lang khatah bangmah ka hih thei kei uh hi, thuman lamah ka hih thei bek uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Kote in thanemin note in na thahat lai takun ka lung uh a dam hi. Note na kicin’ nadingun thu ka ngen uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:10 Tua ahih ciangin a kiphel khiatsuk nading hi lo, a kilam nadinga Topa in kei hong piak thuneihna thu a om mah bangin, kong tun’ ciangin nakpi-a kong bawl loh nadingin no tawh ka omkhawm loh lai takin hih thu kong gelh hi." 
2Corinthians13:11 A tawpna thu in ute naute aw, na cidam ta un. Kicin’na, kihehnepna na nei un. Lungsim kikhatin om un. Khat leh khat kilemin om un. Tua bang na hih uh leh, itna nopna Pasian in no tawh hong omkhawm ding hi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Khat leh khat a siangtho napna tawh na kihopih un. 
2Corinthians13:13 Misiangthote khempeuh in note hong hopih uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:14 Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha ahi zongin, Pasian hong itna ahi zongin, Kha Siangtho’ kihotheihna ahi zongin note khempeuh tawh omkhawm ta hen." 
Galatians1:1 Mite kiang pan hi lo, mite’ thu tawh hi lo, Zeisu Khazih’ thu tawh ahi zongin, tua Zeisu sihna panin a thosak Pa Pasian’ thu tawh ahi zongin sawltak ahi keimah Paul akipan," 
Galatians1:2 keimah tawh a omkhawm ute naute khempeuh in Galati gamah a om pawlpite kiangah ka hong zasak uh hi. 
Galatians1:3 I Pa Pasian leh Topa Khazih kiang pan hehpihna thupha leh nopna in nomau tungah om ta hen. 
Galatians1:4 Tua Zeisu in Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin a gilo ahi hih leitung pan eite hong gumkhia dingin ah eite khialhna ading ama pumpi kipia hi. 
Galatians1:5 Tua Pasian in minthan’na ngah tawntung ta hen! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Khazih’ hehpihna thupha hangah note hong sampa tawh hih zah taka manlangin kikhenin ‘lungdamna thu’ na sang uh ahih ciangin lamdang ka sa hi! 
Galatians1:7 Tua Lungdamna Thu in ‘lungdamna thu dang’ ahi kei hi. Note hong bawlsia-in Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu a lumlet nuam mi kimkhat a om uh hi. 
Galatians1:8 Ahih hangin nomau kiangah ka hong hilh uh Lungdamna Thu longal adang Lungdamna Thu kote ahi zongin, vantung pana hong pai vantungmi khat ahi zongin, hong hilh mi in hamsiatna thuak ta hen." 
Galatians1:9 Na san’sa uh Lungdamna Thu sim loh lungdamna thu a dang, mi khatpeuh peuh in hong hilh leh, tua mi in hamsiatna thuak ta hen, ci-in ka cihsa bangin tu-in ka ci kik hi." 
Galatians1:10 Tu-in keimah in mi’ deihna zui ka hi hiam? Ahih kei leh, Pasian’ deihna zui ka hi hiam? Mite’ pahtak ding hanciam ka hi hiam? Mite’ pahtak nading hanciam ka hih leh, Khazih’ sila ka hi kei hi." 
Galatians1:11 Ute naute aw, keimah in ka hilh Lungdamna Thu in mite’ thu ahi kei hi," 
Galatians1:12 mite kiang pan ka ngah ahi kei hi, mite kiangah ka sin zong ahi kei hi. Zeisu Khazih’ thupiakna hang bekin ka ngahna thu note kiangah ka hong zasak hi." 
Galatians1:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nidang lai-in Judah ngeina zui-in ka om a, ka gamtat ahi Pasian’ pawlpi a kigen thei loin ka bawlsiat a, ka sukgawp thu ahi zongin," 
Galatians1:14 ka pu ka pate’ khut tung pan ka ngah ngeina siamin ka zuih zawk thu ahi zongin note in na thei uh hi. 
Galatians1:15 Ahih hangin ka nu’ gil sung pan hong teelkhia a, ama hehpihna thupha tawh hong sam Pasian in," 
Galatians1:16 a Tapa’ Lungdamna Thu Gentailte kiangah hilh dingin, ama deihna tawh kituakin ama Tapa kei sungah a kilatsak ciangin, keimah in si-le-sa tawh vaihawm loin," 
Galatians1:17 eimah sawltak a suak mite omna Jerusalem khua-ah zong pai loin Arabia gamah pai-in khatvei Damasakas khua-ah ka ciahkik hi. 
Galatians1:18 Tua nung kumthum khit ciangin Kefas tawh kimeltheih nadingin Jerusalem khua-ah pai-in amah tawh nisawm leh ninga ka omkhawm hi. 
Galatians1:19 Amah leh Topa’ nau Jeim longal adang sawltakte khat beek ka mu kei hi. 
Galatians1:20 nomau kiangah hih bangin ka zaksakna-ah thu zuau ka zang kei hi ci-in Pasian mai-ah ka kiciam hi. 
Galatians1:21 Tua nung ciangin Siria gam leh Kilikia gamah pai-in 
Galatians1:22 Judah gama Khazih sungah a om pawlpi mite in ka meel-in hong ciamteh uh hi loin," 
Galatians1:23 “Eite hong bawlsia ngei mi in nidang lai a, a sukgawpsa upna thu, tu-in amahmah in a hilh hi,” ci-in a zakna bek uh tawh" 
Galatians1:24 keimah hangin Pasian’ min a phat uh hi. 
Galatians2:1 Tua nung kumsawm leh kumli khit ciangin keimah in Titu samin, Barnabas tawh Jerusalem khua-ah ka paito kik hi." 
Galatians2:2 Pasian in thu hong piak bangin pai-in Gentailte kiangah Lungdamna Thu ka hilhnate, amaute ka zasak hi. Ahih hangin ka nasep thu leh ka sepsate in a mawkna a suah loh nadingin, a minthang mite kiangah ka gen sim hi." 
Galatians2:3 Ahih hangin keimah tawh a tonkhawm Titu in Grik mi ahi napi-in a vunat dingin thu a pia kei uh hi. 
Galatians2:4 Khazih Zeisu hangah i ngahsa suahtakna thu en simin eite sila hong suahsak nadingun kheemna tawh a hong tumsim ute naute banga kibawl mite’ thu hangin tua bang hong bawl uh hi. 
Galatians2:5 Thuman thu ahi Lungdamna Thu in nomau sungah kip-a, a om nadingin kote in tua mite thu mitphiat sung nangawn ka mang ka ngai kei uh hi." 
Galatians2:6 Mi lian a kicite in nidang lai-inah bang ci mi ahih thu kei tawh kisai lo hi, Pasian in mi maitang zahtak a nei kei hi. Tua mite tawh kipawlin bangmah ka ngah lo tham loin," 
Galatians2:7 vunatna a thuak mite lakah Piter in sawltak a suah nadingin Piter tungah a bawlpha mi in Gentailte lakah kei sawltak ka suah nadingin keimah tungah hong bawlpha a," 
Galatians2:8 vunatte tawh a kipawl Lungdamna Thu Piter tungah a piak mah bangin vunat lote tawh a kipawl Lungdamna Thu kei tungah a hong piakna, amaute in a theih uh ciangin khuamte a kici Jeim, Kefas, leh Johan-te in" 
Galatians2:9 ka ngah hehpihna thupha a theih uh ciangin, amaute in vunatte kiangah pai nadingin leh kote in Gentailte kiangah pai nadingin, amaute in Barnabas leh kei tungah kilawmtatna tawh a khut taklam uh hong pia uh hi." 
Galatians2:10 komau in mizawngte ka ngaihsut nadingun amaute’ deihna khat bek a om hi. Tua na zong kei in sep ding hahkatna lungsim ka nei hi. 
Galatians2:11 Tua nung ciangin Antiok khua-ah Kefas hong pai ciangin amah mawhsak nading thu om ahih maninah, kei in amah tel takin nialin ka kham hi." 
Galatians2:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi kim khat in Jeim kiang pan a hong tun’ ma-in Gentailte tawh an a ne khawm hi. Ahih hangin tuate hong tun’ khit uh ciangin amah in vunatte a kihtak maninah nungkinin a tuam om hi." 
Galatians2:13 A dang Judah mite in zong amah tawh simtat khawmin, amau simtat manin Barnabas nangawn in amaute lam a zui hi." 
Galatians2:14 Amaute in Lungdamna Thu tawh kituak thuman thutak bangin a tang takin a zuih loh uh ka muh ciangin mite khempeuh mai-ah Kefas kiangah, “Nang, Judah mi na hi napi-in Judah ngeina bang gamta loin, Gentailte’ ngeina bang na gamtat leh, Gentailte in Judah ngeina bang a zuih nadingun bang hangin amaute zawhthawh thu tawh na bawl hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Galatians2:15 Thukham zuihna hangin diktan’sakna kingah lo hi, Zeisu Khazih’ thu-upna bek hangin diktan’sakna kingah hi ci-in mawhna a nei Gentailte hi loin, a pian’na pan Judah mite ahi eite in i theih mah bangin" 
Galatians2:16 Thukham zuihna hangin diktan’sakna a ngah lo, Khazih upna hangin diktan’sakna a ngah eite in zong Zeisu Khazih’ thu i um zo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Thukham zuihna hangin kuamah in dikkisakna a ngah kei ding hi." 
Galatians2:17 Khazih sungah diktan’sakna ngah nading ka hahkat napi-in eite mahmah in zong mawhna nei mi i hih a kilat leh, Khazih in mawhna thu bawl mi ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lo hi." 
Galatians2:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nidanga ka suksiatna ka lamkik leh, mawhnei mi ka hi ci-in kilangsak hi." 
Galatians2:19 Keimah in Pasian hangin ka nuntak theih nadingin Thukham tawh Thukham hangin si-in ka om hi. Keimah in Khazih tawh singlamteh tungah sihna ka thuakkhawm zo hi. 
Galatians2:20 Keima pumpi a nungta lai ahi kei hi, Khazih in keima sungah a nungta hi. Tu-in ka pum sungah a nungta ka nuntakna in kei hong it a, keimah tangding ama pumpi a paai Pasian Tapa’ upna tawh a nungta hi." 
Galatians2:21 Pasian’ hehpihna thupha ka paaikhia kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, thukham zuihna hangin dikkisakna kingah leh, Khazih in a mawkna-in sihna a thuak hi." 
Galatians3:1 Pilna a nei lo Galati mite aw, singlamteh tungah sihna a thuak Zeisu Khazih in no mai-ah a tel takin hong kilak napi-in, note a kua in hong bum hiam?" 
Galatians3:2 Thukham zuihna hangin Kha Siangtho na ngah uh hiam, ahih kei leh, upna thu na ngahna uh hangin na ngah uh hiam ci-in thu khat bek note kiangah ka thei nuam hi." 
Galatians3:3 Hih zah takin pilna nei lo na hi uh hiam? Kha Siangtho suangin na kipat khit uh ciangin ci-le-sa suangin na tangtun’ zo ding uh hiam? 
Galatians3:4 Hih zah tak gimna a mawkna-in na thuak uh hiam? A mawkna taktak ding ahi hiam? 
Galatians3:5 Tua tham loin, Kha Siangtho note hong pia a, note lakah nalamdang hong lakpa in Thukham na zuihna hangun hong bawl ahi hiam, ahih kei leh, upna thu na ngaihna hang bek uh ahi hiam?" 
Galatians3:6 Tua bangin “Abraham in Pasian um a, a upna hangin Pasian in amah midikin a sang hi,” Lai Siangtho in a ci hi." 
Galatians3:7 Tua ahih ciangin upna a nei mite in Abraham’ suante taktak ahi uh na thei un. 
Galatians3:8 Pasian in upna tawh Gentail mite’ dikkisakna a kipsak hi ci-in Lai Siangtho in thei kholin, Abraham kiangah, “Nangmah hangin mi pawl khempeuh in thupha a ngah ding uh hi,” ci-in Lungdamna Thu a na hilh khol hi." 
Galatians3:9 Tua ahih ciangin thu-upna a nei mite in a um Abraham tawh thupha a ngah khawm uh hi. 
Galatians3:10 Thukham tawh kipawl gamtatna a suang mi khempeuh in hamsiatna nuai-a om mi ahi uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Thukham laibu sungah a kigelh thu khempeuh a zui tawntung lo mi khempeuh in hamsiatna a thuak uh hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh hi." 
Galatians3:11 Thukham zuihna hangin mi khat beek in Pasian mai-ah diktansakna a ngah kei hi cih tel takin a kilang hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Midik in thu upna tawh a nungta ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Galatians3:12 Thukham in upna tawh a kikum kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Tua gamtatna a gamta mi in tua gamtatna hangin a nungta ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian mai-ah Thukham hangin kuamah in diktan’sakna a ngah zo kei ding hi." 
Galatians3:13 “Sing khuam tungah kikhaina a thuak mi khempeuh in hamsiatna a thuak mi ahi uh hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Khazih in eite tang dingin hamsiatna a thuak ciangin Thukham’ hamsiatna pan eite a hong tankhia zo hi." 
Galatians3:14 Tua in Khazih Zeisu hangin Abraham’ thupha in Gentailte tungah a tun’ na’ng ahi zongin, eite in thu-upna hanga Kha Siangtho tawh kipawl thuciamna i ngah na’ng ahi hi." 
Galatians3:15 Ute naute aw, leitung mi bangin thu ka geninah, mi ahih hangin kiciamnate a kibawl khit ciangin kuamah in a paaikhia thei kei a, kuamah in behlapin thu a guang thei kei hi." 
Galatians3:16 Thuciamna Abraham leh a suan a khakte tungah a koih zo hi. “A suan a khakte,” ci-in mi tampite ngaihsunin thu a pia kei hi. “Nangma suan mi khat bek,” ci-in ngaihsunin thu a pia hi. Tua mi khat in Khazih ahi hi." 
Galatians3:17 Ke’n kong cih inah, Pasian in a kipsak kiciamna kum zali leh kum sawmthum khit ciangin a piangkik Thukham in a mawkna a suah nadingin a paaikhia ahi kei hi." 
Galatians3:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, innluahna in thukham tawh kipawl ahih leh, kiciamna thu tawh kipawl lo hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in Abraham kiangah kiciamna hangin tua luahna a pia zo hi." 
Galatians3:19 Tua ahih ciangin Thukhamna in a bang phatuam ahi hiam? Kiciamna a ngah a suan a khakte a hong pai matengin khialhna hangah a pia thuah hi. Tua thukham in vantungmite hangah sepkhiat dingin a kikham mi’ khut ah a kikoih hi. 
Galatians3:20 A kikham mi in lang khat bek tawh a kipawl kei hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in khat bek ahi hi. 
Galatians3:21 Tua ahih ciangin Thukham in Pasian’ thukhamnate lang khatah om ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nuntakna a pia thei thukham a om leh, a man takpi tua thu hangin dikna kingah zo hi." 
Galatians3:22 Tu-in ahih leh, a um mite in Zeisu Khazih upna tawh kipawl kiciamna a ngah nadingun Lai Siangtho in na khempeuhte mawhna sungah a khakcip hi." 
Galatians3:23 Upna thu hong tun’ma-in eite in thukham nuaiah ukna thuakin i om a, a nung ciangin a kilang ding upna lamenin kikhum cipna thuakin i om hi." 
Galatians3:24 Tua ahih ciangin eite in upna hangin diktan’sakna i ngah nadingin Thukham in eite Khazih kiangah hong kha dingin eite hong cingpa a suak hi. 
Galatians3:25 Tu-in ahih leh, upna thu hong tung ahih ciangin tua hong cing khut nuaiah i om nawn kei hi." 
Galatians3:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note khempeuh in Khazih Zeisu upna hangin Pasian’ tate na hi uh hi." 
Galatians3:27 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih sungah bataizna a ngah mi khempeuh in Khazih a silh uh hi." 
Galatians3:28 Khazih Zeisu sungah Judah mi a om kei, Grik mi a om kei, sila a om kei, sila lo a om kei, pasal a om kei, numei a om kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih Zeisu sungah note khempeuh in pum khat bek na hi uh hi." 
Galatians3:29 Note in Khazih aa na hi uh leh, Abraham suan leh khakte na hi uh a, thuciamna bangin innluah mi na hi uh hi." 
Galatians4:1 Ahih hangin ke’n kong cih-inah, innluahpa in sum khempeuh a ukpa ahih hangin a neu lai takin sila tawh a kilamdang kei hi." 
Galatians4:2 A pa thuciamna a hun a tun’ matengin amah in a cingte leh a keemte’ khut nuai-ah a om hi. 
Galatians4:3 Tua mah bangin eite i neu lai takin leitung thungeek khut nuai-ah sila in, i om hi." 
Galatians4:4 A hun a cin’ ciangin eite in tapa’ za i ngah nadingin Thukham khut nuai mite tankhia dingin numei gil sungah hong gai-in, Thukham khut nuaiah a hong suak a Tapa Pasian in a sawl hi." 
Galatians4:5  
Galatians4:6 Tua bangin note in tate na suak uh ahih ciangin,“Abba, Pa,” cisakin a Tapa’ Kha Siangtho eite lungsim sungah Pasian in hong sawl hi." 
Galatians4:7 Tua ahih ciangin sila hi nawn loin tapa na hi uh hi. Tapa na hih uh leh, Pasian hangin innluahpa zong na hi uh hi." 
Galatians4:8 Ahih hangin note in tua hun lai takin Pasian na theih loh lai takun a pian’ lim in Pasian ahi lo mite’ sila-in na om uh hi. 
Galatians4:9 Tu-in ahih leh, note in Pasian na thei khin uh tham loin, Pasian in note hong theih khit ciangin, thahat lo, nopna hong pia thei lo thungeek lamah, a bang hangin kihei kikin sila kaikik nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians4:10 Note in nite, khate, hunte, kumte na tang ta uh hi!" 
Galatians4:11 Note adingin a mawkna-in ka hahkat hi ci-in note thu hangin lunghimawhin ka om hi. 
Galatians4:12 Ute naute aw, keimah in note bang ka hih maninah keimah bangin na hi un ci-in ka hong thuum hi. Keima tungah note in a neukha beek na khial kei uh hi." 
Galatians4:13 Ahih hangin keimah in a masa-in pumpi dam lohna hangin note kiangah Lungdamna Thu ka hong hilh na thei uh hi. 
Galatians4:14 Keima sungah a om note thuak ze-etna note in ngaihsun loin, nial loin Pasian’ vantungmi bang ka hi zongin, Khazih Zeisu bang ka hi zongin, na hong sang uh hi." 
Galatians4:15 Tua ahih leh, note lungdamna thupha koi lam tungsak ta na hi uh hiam? Na mittang uh lakhia-in, kei hong pia thei hi le-uh cin nong pia zo ding uh hi ci-in note ading teci ka pang hi." 
Galatians4:16 Tua ahih leh, keimah in thuman thutak note kiangah ka hong gen ciangin note’ gal suak ka hi hiam?" 
Galatians4:17 Tua mite in note a kilawmin hahkatin hong zo lo tham loin, note in amaute na zon’ nadingun a pua lamah note hong koih nuam ahi uh hi." 
Galatians4:18 Ahih hangin a hoihna zon’na ngahna in nomau tawh ka omkhawm laitak bek hi loin, a tawntung hoihna ahi hi." 
Galatians4:19 Khazih in note sungah kip-a, a om matengin note ading ta suak gimna ka thuak ka ta neute aw," 
Galatians4:20 tu-in note tawh omkhawmin ka kam pauna ka kheel nuam hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nomau hangah ka lungmang hi." 
Galatians4:21 Thukham nuai-ah a om nuamte aw, note in Thukham za lo na hi uh hiam, kei kiangah hong gen un." 
Galatians4:22 Lai Siangtho sungah: “Abraham in tapa nih a nei hi. Khat in sila numei tawh a neih tapa ahi hi, khat in sila hi lo numei tawh a neih tapa ahi hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Galatians4:23 Sila numei’ tapa in ci-le-sa ngeina bangin a suak hi. Sila lo numei’ tapa ahih leh, thuciamna hangin a suak hi." 
Galatians4:24 Tua thute-ah genteh nadingin a om hi. Tua numeite in thuciamna nih ahi uh hi. Hagar ahi numei khat in Sinai Mual tung pan hong piang, sila suahsak nading thu ahi hi." 
Galatians4:25 Tua Hagar in Arabia gam Sinai Mual hi a, tu-in a om Jerusalem khua tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in a tate tawh sila-in a om hi." 
Galatians4:26 Ahih hangin tung lamah a om Jerusalem khua ahih leh, eite nu ahi, sila numei hi lo numei ahi hi." 
Galatians4:27 Lai Siangtho sungah: “Ta suak ngei lo a ciing numei aw, na lungdam in! Nausuak gimna a thuak ngei lo numei aw, kiko in! Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, pasal a nei numei’ tate sangin, A kipaaikhia numei in ta tamzaw a nei hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Galatians4:28 Ute naute aw, eite in Isaak bangin kiciamna tawh kipawl tate i hi hi." 
Galatians4:29 Ahih hangin tua lai taka ci-le-sa ngeina bangin a suak ta in Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh a suak ta pen a bawlsiat mah bangin tu-in zong ahi hi. 
Galatians4:30 Ahih hangin Lai Siangtho in bang ci gen hiam? “Sila-numei a tapa tawh hawlkhia in. Silanu’ tapa in sila lo numei’ tapa tawh innluah khawm thei lo ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Galatians4:31 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, eite in sila-numei’ tate i hi kei hi: sila-lo numei’ tate i hi hi." 
Galatians5:1 Khazih in eite suahtakna thu i ngah nadingin hong suaktasak hi. Tua ahih ciangin kipin om un la, sila suahna hakkol pua-in, kikhihna zangkik nawn kei un." 
Galatians5:2 En-un, keimah Paul in kong geninah, vunatna na thuak uh leh, Khazih hangin bangmah noptuamna na ngah kei ding uh hi." 
Galatians5:3 Tua bang ahi hi. Vunatna a thuak mi khempeuh teci ka pankik inah, tua bang mite in Thukham khempeuh siit loin a zuih nadingin leiba nei mi ahi uh hi." 
Galatians5:4 Thukham hangah diktan’sakna a ngah nuam note in, Khazih tawh kikhenin, ama hehpihna pan na puk zo uh hi." 
Galatians5:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote in upna tawh dikna ngah ding ci-in lamenin Kha Siangtho tung tawnin ngakin ka om uh hi." 
Galatians5:6 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih Zeisu sungah vunatna in phattuamna a om kei hi, vunat lohna in zong phattuamna a om kei hi; itna tawh nasep theihna upna bek in phattuamna a om hi." 
Galatians5:7 Nidangin note in a pha takpi-in na tai uh hi. Thuman thutak na ngaih loh nadingun a kua in hong kheem hiam? 
Galatians5:8 Hih kheemna zolna in note hong sampa kiang pan piang ahi kei hi. 
Galatians5:9 Silngo tawm khat in annel lom a vekpi a tawksak thei hi. 
Galatians5:10 Note in lungsim tuamdang na nei kei ding uh hi ci-in keimah in Topa sungah note tawh kipawlin upna taktak ka nei hi. Note hong khelbawl mi in kuakua ahih hangin ama mawhna dan a thuak ding hi. 
Galatians5:11 Ka ute naute aw, kei ka hih leh, vunatna thu ka hilh lai leh, a bang hangin bawlsiatna ka thuak hiam? Tua bang ka hilh leh, singlamteh tawh kipawl pukna thu in paihkhiatna a thuak zo hi." 
Galatians5:12 Note hong khialsak mite in amaute mah kiget ta uh hen ka ci hi! 
Galatians5:13 Ute naute aw, note in suahtakna thu ngah dinga hong sap mi na hih uh leh, si-le-sa nopsak na’ngin tua suahtakna zang kei un. Ki-itna tawh khat leh khat’ nasem mi na suak zaw un." 
Galatians5:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Na pumpi na it bangin na lawmte na it in,” a cihna thukham na zuih uh leh, Thukham khempeuh a zui khin na suak uh hi." 
Galatians5:15 Ahih hangin khat leh khat na kipeh, na kinek uh leh, khat leh khat na kisiasak ding uh hi ci-in lunghimawhin kikem un." 
Galatians5:16 Ke’n kong cihinah, Kha Siangtho hangin na nungta un. Na nuntak uh leh, na si-le-sa uh deihna zui loin na om ding uh hi." 
Galatians5:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, si-le-sa in Kha Siangtho tawh kido hi. Kha Siangtho in si-le-sa tawh kido hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na sep nop uh bangin na sep theih loh nadingun tuate nih in khat leh khat kilem lo uh hi." 
Galatians5:18 Kha Siangtho in note hong kha leh, thukham nuaiah na om kei uh hi." 
Galatians5:19 Si-le-sa’ gamtatnate a kilang zo hi. Tua gamtatnate in: numei tawh mawhna, kihhuai gamtatna, lunggulh luat khialhna," 
Galatians5:20 milim biakna, mibumna, kitot na’ng bawlna, kitotna, kidemna, hehna, kiseelna, kithutuah lohna, kipawl khenna" 
Galatians5:21 en’na, zukham luatna, pawikhamna akipan tua bang gamtatnate ahi uh hi. Tau banga gamta mite in Pasian’ Gam a luah kei ding uh hi ci-in nidanga kong cih mah bangin tu-in zong ka hong ci khol hi." 
Galatians5:22 Kha Siangtho’ gah in: itna, lungdamna, kilemna, lungduaina, mi hehpihna, gitna, diktatna," 
Galatians5:23 lungnemna, pumpi’ deihna khamna te ahi uh hi. Tua bangin a gamta mite thukham in a kham kei hi." 
Galatians5:24 Khazih Zeisu’ aa-te in si-le-sa’ deihna leh lunggulhnate singlamteh tungah a khencip zo uh hi. 
Galatians5:25 Eite in Kha Siangtho hangah nungta i hih leh, Kha Siangtho hangin gamta ni." 
Galatians5:26 Khat leh khat kibawlsiatna, khat leh khat kihazatna tangin mawkna minthan’nate lunggulhin om kei ni." 
Galatians6:1 Ute naute aw, mi khat kikeem khialin mawhna khatpeuh ahih khak leh, Kha Siangtho a nei note in mawhna hong zolna tawh na kipelh nadingun kikeemin, lungnemna tawh tua bang mi na kipsak un." 
Galatians6:2 Van puak ding a omte khat leh khat kihuhin na pua un la, Khazih’ thukham na zui un." 
Galatians6:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khat in bangmah ahi lo napi-in na khat peuhpeuh ka hi ci-in a ki-up leh, tua mi in ama pumpi a kheem hi." 
Galatians6:4 Ahih hangin mi khempeuh in ama bawlna thu kidong ciat uh hen. Tua bang ahih leh, midangte tawh kiteh loin ama tung bekah lung kiphat theihna a om ding hi." 
Galatians6:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khempeuh in ama van ciat a pua ding uh hi." 
Galatians6:6 Pasian’ Thu a sin mi in a hilhpa tungah a hoihna a om khempeuh hawmsawn ta hen. 
Galatians6:7 Note in na ngaihsun khial kei un. Pasian in thudon lohnate mang ahi kei hi. Mi khatpeuh in khaici a vawh bangin a gah a at kik ding hi. 
Galatians6:8 Ama pumpi ading khaici a vawh mi in ama ci-le-sa hangah muatna a at ding hi. Kha Siangtho hangah khaici a vawh mi in Kha Saingtho hangah nuntak tawntungna a at ding hi. 
Galatians6:9 Eite in lungkia loin gamtat hoih gamta ni. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, lungkia loin i om leh, a hun a tun’ ciangin a gah i at ding hi." 
Galatians6:10 Tua ahih ciangin eite in a kilawm a kituak hun i neih bangin mi khempeuh tungah thupha bawlin, adiak diakin thu-um innkuanpihte tungah nakpi-in bawl ni." 
Galatians6:11 Bang zah a lian laimalte tawh ka khutin ka gelh, na en un." 
Galatians6:12 Amaute pumpi uh tawh kipawl minthan’na a deih mite in, Khazih’ singlamteh hangah thuakna leh bawlsiatna tawh kipelh nuam bekin, note vunat thuak nadingin zawhthawh thu tawh hong zol uh hi." 
Galatians6:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, vunatna a thuak mite in Thukham zui loin note’ pumpi uh hangin kisathei nuamin note vunat nading a deih uh hi." 
Galatians6:14 Kei ka hih leh, eite Topa Zeisu Khazih’ singlamteh sim loh, bangmah dangah ka kisathei het kei ding hi. Tua singlamteh ah hih leitung in kei ading kikhenin a om hi. Keimah in zong leitung ading kikhenin ka om hi." 
Galatians6:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, vunatna in phattuamna a om kei hi, vunat lohna in zong phattuamna a om kei hi: mi thak suahna bek in phattuamna a om hi." 
Galatians6:16 Hih ngeina a zui mi khempeuh tungah ahi zongin, Pasian’ Israel mi pawlte tungah ahi zongin nopna leh hehpihna om ta hen." 
Galatians6:17 Tu-a kipanin kuamah in kei hong nawngkaisak kei hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka pumpi tungah Zeisu’ ciamtehnate ka pua hi." 
Galatians6:18 Ute naute aw, i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha in note lungsim uh tawh omkhawm ta hen. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Pasian’ deihna hangin Khazih Zeisu’ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in Efesa khua-ah a om misiangthote leh Khazih Zeisu sunga midikte kiangah thu kong zasak hi. 
Ephesians1:2 I Pa Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih kiang pan hehpihna thupha leh nopna note tungah om ta hen. 
Ephesians1:3 Eite in Pasian mai-ah itna sungah siangthoin, mawhna tawh kikhen nadingin leitung pian’ma-in eite Khazih sungah hong teel mah bangin, vantung tawh kipawl omna-ah thuphate khempeuh tawh Khazih hanga eite hong hehpih i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Pa Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen." 
Ephesians1:4  
Ephesians1:5 Tua Pasian in a it a Tapa hanga eite hong hehpihna vangliatna a phate phat dinginah 
Ephesians1:6 Zeisu Khazih hangin ama tapa-za i ngah nadingin hong deih hong hehpihna hangin, amahmah adingin amasa-ah hong koih khol hi." 
Ephesians1:7 Pilna khempeuh leh phawktheih pilna khempeuh tawh kituak, eite tungah hehpihna a kicin’sak mah bangin tua Zeisu’ sisan hangin mawh maisakna ahi tatkhiatna thupha ama sungah eite in i ngah hi." 
Ephesians1:8  
Ephesians1:9 Pasian in a ngimsa bangin hih a, Khazih hanga a sepsawm a sehsa thuthuk eite hong thei sak hi." 
Ephesians1:10 A hun a kicin’ cianga a sep ding Pasian’ geelna in vantung leh leitungah a om na khempeuh gawmin Khazih uk sak ding ahi hi. 
Ephesians1:11 Ama deihna tawh kipawl hanciamna bangin tanglai peka eite hong ciamtehsa bangin eite in tua Khazih sungah luahna na i hi hi. 
Ephesians1:12 Tua bang ahihna in Khazih hanga a muang zo eite in a vangliatna phat dingte i suah na’ng hi. 
Ephesians1:13 Note in zong note hong gupna thu tawh kipawl Lungdamna Thu ahi thuman thutak ngai-in, tua Khazih na up khit uh ciangin thuciamna tawh kipawl Kha Siangtho-a ciamtehna na ngah zo uh hi." 
Ephesians1:14 Pasian’ neihsa leh Pasian’ vangliatna a phat nading deihna-in tua Kha Siangtho in tatkhiatna hun dong eite luahna maleep ahi hi. 
Ephesians1:15 Tua ahih ciangin note in Topa Zeisu upna leh misiangtho khempeuhte na itna uh thu ka theih khit ciangin," 
Ephesians1:16 note paulamin hehpihna ka phat niloh a, note ading thungenin ka om hi." 
Ephesians1:17 Ka thungetna in: eite Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Pasian, vangliatna Pa in amah theihtel nadingin pilna ahi zongin, theih baihna lungsim ahi zongin hong piak nadingin," 
Ephesians1:18 hong sapna tawh kipawl lametna in bang ci bang lametna hi ahi zongin, misiangthote’ neih Topa luahna vangliatna bangzaha lian ahi zongin," 
Ephesians1:19 eite tungah hong bawlpha a lian mahmah vangliatna bangzaha lian ahi zongin note in na theih nadingun, na pilna mittang uh a vak nadingin thu ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians1:20 Tua vangliatna in Khazih sihna pan a thawh sak kik ciangin Khazih tungah a bawl vangliatna ahi hi. 
Ephesians1:21 Na khempeuh a sang belna, ukna, vangliatna leh aana-a kipan tu laitak leitung bek hi lo, nung ciangin a piang ding leitungah a kisam a kiphuak min khempeuh tung, vantungah ama ziat lam a sang mahmah omna-ah a tu sak hi." 
Ephesians1:22 Pasian in Khazih’ khe nuai-ah na khempeuh khiasukin, na khempeuh tungah a uk lutang suak sakin pawlpi adingin a pia hi." 
Ephesians1:23 Tua pawlpi in na khempeuh, na khempeuh tawh a kicing sakpa’ kicin’na a hi Khazih’ pumpi ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:1 Note in nidang lai-inah leitung thu na zui uh a, van lama vangliatna a uk topa ahi nialna’ tate tungah tu-in zong na a sem kha’ deihna bangin, na mawhnate uh, na gitlohnate uh sungah si-in na om lai takun Pasian in note hong nungta sak hi." 
Ephesians2:2  
Ephesians2:3 Tua mite tawh eite khempeuh in zong nidang lai-in i ci-le-sa deihna ah lungsim deihna zui-in, si-le-sa deihna bangin gamta-in i om a, adang mite bangin ngeina bangin a hehna a thuak mi i hi hi." 
Ephesians2:4 Ahih hangin hehpihna tawh kidim Pasian in eite hong it phat maninah," 
Ephesians2:5 mawhna khialhna sungah si-a om eite Khazih tawh hong hing khawm sak zo hi. Note in hehpihna hang bekin gupna na ngah uh hi. 
Ephesians2:6 Khazih tawh eite hong tho sak a, vantung khua tawh kipawl omna-ah Khazih Zeisu tawh hong tu sak khawm hi." 
Ephesians2:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih Zeisu hangah eite hong hehpih a, a kicing mahmah ama hehpihna thupha a nung ciangin a kilatsak nading ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in thu-upna hangah hehpihna tawh gupna na ngah zo uh hi. Note ut thu-a ngah na hi kei uh hi: Pasian’ letsong ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:9 Kuamah in a kisaktheih loh nadingin note’ gamtat pha hangin gupna na ngah kei uh hi. 
Ephesians2:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in gamtat hoih i gamtat nadingin Khazih Zeisu sungah a pian’sak ama bawlsa i hi hi. Tua gamtatna pha eite in i gamtat nadingin Pasian in tua gamtatna a na siam khol zo hi." 
Ephesians2:11 Tua ahih ciangin khut tawh kibawl ci-le-sa sungah kibawl ‘vunat’ kici mite in vunat lo a cih uh, ci-le-sa pan Gentail mi ahi note in," 
Ephesians2:12 tua hun lai takin Khazih tawh kikhenin, Israel mi pawl hi loin, kiciamna a om thuciamna thute tawh kikum loin, lametna om loin, leitungah Pasian nei loin na om uh na ngaihsun ta un." 
Ephesians2:13 Ahih hangin nidang lai a, gamlapi-ah a om note in tu-in Khazih’ sisan hangin Khazih Zeisu kiang nai na tung zo uh hi." 
Ephesians2:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua Khazih in eite gal kilemna hi a," 
Ephesians2:15 ngeina tawh kipawl Thukham kilemlohna thu a pumpi sungah a paihkhiat khit ciangin kikhen khia a, om kikal dalna kawm phelkhia-in, mi pawl nihte pawl khat bek a suak sak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, gal kilem sakin ama sungah tua pawl nihte in pawl thak khat bek a suah nadingin bawl pha a, pawl khat bek suah khin a," 
Ephesians2:16 Khazih in singlamteh hangin kilemlohna thatin, tua mi pawl nihte pawl khat bek suak sakin Pasian tawh hong kilem sak nading ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:17 Amah hong kumsuk a, a gamla-in a om mite kiangah ahi zongin, a nai-in a om mite kiangah ahi zongin gal kilemna Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi." 
Ephesians2:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih hangin ei pawl nihte in Kha Siangtho khat tawh Pa kiangah nai-in lut theih nading thu i ngah hi." 
Ephesians2:19 Tua ahih ciangin note in tu-a kipanin mi pawl dangte ahi zongin, khual mite ahi zongin, na hi nawn kei uh a, Pasian’ mite tawh gammi khat na hi uh hi; Pasian’ innkuanpihte zong na hi uh hi." 
Ephesians2:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, sawltakte-a kipan kamsangte ahi, khuam tungah note in zomin a kilam mi na hi uh hi. Khazih in tua innkiunuai suang ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:21 Tua suang leh inn khempeuh in kizomin khang a, Topa sungah a siangtho biakinnpi ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:22 Topa sungah note in zong Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian’ teenna na suah nadingun a kilam na hi uh hi. 
Ephesians3:1 Tua thu hangin note phattuam nadingin ngaihsunin, keimah a hong piak Pasian’ hehpihna thupha note in na zak uh leh, Gentail mi ahi note hangin Khazih Zeisu’ thongkiapa kei Paul in," 
Ephesians3:2  
Ephesians3:3 nidang lai-inah thu tawm ka gelh mah bangin, Pasian’ thupiak kholhna hangin thuthuk hong kilang sak hi." 
Ephesians3:4 Tua thute na sim le-uh teh, Khazih’ thuthukte ka theih note in na thei ding uh hi." 
Ephesians3:5 Tua thuthukte in a siangtho sawltakte leh Pasian’ kamsangte kiangah tu lai taka Kha Siangtho hangin a kilat mah bangin, nidang lai-inah mihingte kiangah a kilang ngei kei hi." 
Ephesians3:6 Tua thuthuk in: Gentailte in Lungdamna Thu hangin Judah mite tawh a luah khawm mi, pumpi khat’nate suak khawmin Khazih Zeisu tawh kipawl thuciamna a zomkhawm mi a suak uh hi." 
Ephesians3:7 A vangliatna-a bawlphatna bangin keimah hong piak Pasian’ hehpihna ka ngah mah bangin, tua Lungdamna Thu a hilh nasem ka suak zo hi. A kizong khia khin zo lo Khazih hauhna thu Gentailte kiangah hilh dingin ahi zongin," 
Ephesians3:8  
Ephesians3:9 na khempeuh a bawl Pasian sungah tanglai tawntungin kiseelin a om thuthuk tawh kipawl thu in bang ci bang ahi cih mi khempeuh a theih sak nading ahi zongin Pasian mite lakah a neu bel mi sangin a neuzaw keimah tua hehpihna thupha hong pia zo hi. 
Ephesians3:10 Tua ahih ciangin i Topa Khazih Zeisu sungah Pasian’ tawntung ngimna omsa bangin vantungah a om ukna leh vangliatnate in pawlpi hangin, a lamdang Pasian’ lungpilna a kitheih nading ahi hi." 
Ephesians3:11  
Ephesians3:12 Tua Topa Zeisu sungah upna hangin eite lungkimin, lau lohna lungsim nei-in, Pasian kiangah tum theihna i ngah hi." 
Ephesians3:13 Tua ahih ciangin note’ minthan’ nading ngaihsunin note ading ka thuak gimna hangin lungkia kei un ci-in kong hanthawn hi. 
Ephesians3:14 Tua ahih ciangin vantung leitungah a om mi khempeuhte’ pianna, Pa Pasian mai-ah khukdin’in thungenin ka om hi." 
Ephesians3:15  
Ephesians3:16 Ka thungetna in: Topa in ama Kha Siangtho hangin note sung mi un hatna tawh kip tawntungin," 
Ephesians3:17 upna hangin Khazih in note lung sungah a om nadingin, minthan’na tawh a dim mah bangin note hong pia-in, itna thu-ah zungkha-in, khuam zong kiphut kipin note in," 
Ephesians3:18 misiangthote tawh a dung, a vai, a sang, a niamte khenin na theih khawm nading uh ahi zongin," 
Ephesians3:19 nomau pilna tawh na theih zawh loh uh Khazih’ itna na theih tel nading uh ahi zongin, note in hih thei-in Pasian’ kicin’na a om khempeuh tawh na kidim nading uh thu ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians3:20 Eite tungah hong bawl vangliatna mah bangin, i nget i ngaihsut sangin ahih thei zaw Pasian tungah pawlpi sungah ahi zongin, Zeisu Khazih sungah ahi zongin khan tawntungin minthan’na om tawntung ta hen! Amen." 
Ephesians3:21  
Ephesians4:1 Tua ahih ciangin a hong sapna thupha note in na ngah uh tawh kituakin na zuih nadingun, Topa hanga thongkia keimah in hansuahin kong zol hi." 
Ephesians4:2 Na khempeuh panin kiniamsakna tawh, lungnemna tawh, lungduaina tawh dimin, itna lungsim tawh khat leh khat kithuakin," 
Ephesians4:3 kilem a, kipawlin, kikhopna hangin note in Kha Siangtho hanga na ngah uh pum khat bek ahihna na zuih nadingun na hahkat un." 
Ephesians4:4 Note hong sapna lametna khat bek hangah hong koih ahih mah bangin, pumpi khat, Kha Siangtho khat bek a om hi." 
Ephesians4:5 Topa khat bek, upna khat bek, baptaizna khat bek, mi khempeuh tungah a om, mi khempeuh lakah a kizeel, mi khempeuh sungah a om, mi khempeuh’ Pa ahi Pasian khat bek a om hi." 
Ephesians4:6  
Ephesians4:7 Ahih hangin Khazih in a hong hawm sak mah bangin i vekpi-in a hehpihna thupha i ngah ciat hi. 
Ephesians4:8 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho in: “A sang munah amah a kahtoh ciangin, mi tampi manin paipih a, mite kiangah thupha letsong a pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Ephesians4:9 “Amah a kahtoh”, a cih ciangin lei nuai-ah a kumsuk thu ngaihsunin ci hilo hiam?" 
Ephesians4:10 A kumsuk mi in midang ahi kei hi, na khempeuh a kicing sak dingin, vantung na khempeuhte a dawn khengin a kahto mi ahi hi." 
Ephesians4:11 Khazih’ pumpi lamin nasep nading ahi zongin, misiangtho kipsak nading ahi zongin amah in mi kimkhatte sawltak za ahi zongin, mi kimkhat kamsang za ahi zongin, mi kimkhat Lungdamna Thu, thuhilh za ahi zongin, mi kimkhat pawlpi kem Sia za leh laihilh za ahi zongin a koih hi." 
Ephesians4:12  
Ephesians4:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite khempeuh in thu-upna lamah ahi zongin, Pasian’ Tapa theihna ah ahi zongin, kipum khatin Khazih’ kicin’na lim mun ahi, a khangham mi suahna i tun’ dongin i piang hi." 
Ephesians4:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi dangte in mi kheemna mawhna lamah zol dingin, kheemna thu gen ahih ciangun, eite in a nung ciangin thuhilhna khempeuh ah huih in a let kawikawi naupang suak loin," 
Ephesians4:15 itna tawh thuman thutak geninah lutang ahi Khazih dongin na khempeuh i khan’ nading ahi hi. 
Ephesians4:16 Tua lutang pan guh-le-tangte in thahatna ngahin, a pumpi khempeuh kizom kimatin, na khempeuh in amau nasep tek a sep mah bangin, itna tawh ama pumpi lam dingin a khang sak hi." 
Ephesians4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Gentailte in a lungsim kiphatsakna uh tawh a gamtat bangun note in na gamtat nawn loh nadingun Topa’ deihna bangin thuumin kong hanthawn hi. 
Ephesians4:18 Tua mite in a lungsim uh khauh a, neu kha beek thei lo ahih ciangun pilna khuavak kiliahin Pasian’ nuntakna tawh a kikhen uh hi." 
Ephesians4:19 Amaute in maizumna nei lo uh a, a deihgawhna uh a lian mahmah kihhuai gamtatna nam khempeuh a gamtat nadingun, amau pumpi in a lunggulhna uh khut sungah a kipia uh hi." 
Ephesians4:20 Ahih hangin tua bang suah nading note in Khazih thu na sin kei uh hi. 
Ephesians4:21 Nidang lai-inah na gamtatna uhah a hong khem thei huaihamna lungsim hangin a muat thei mi lui suahkhia-in lungsim ngaihsutna thak na ngah khit uh ciangin, thuman thutak tawh kipawl dikna leh siangthona hangin Pasian tawh a kibanga kibawl mi thak na silh nadingun Zeisu’ thu na zak na ngaih uh ciangin, Zeisu-a thuman thutak a om mah bangin tua Topa kiangah thu na sin un." 
Ephesians4:22  
Ephesians4:23  
Ephesians4:24  
Ephesians4:25 Tua ahih ciangin zuau thu paaikhia un la, thuman thutak tawh khat leh khat na kigen un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in pumpi khat’ nate ciat i hi hi." 
Ephesians4:26 Hehna tawh khialhna om sak kei un. Na hehna uh dam loin ni na tum sak kei un. 
Ephesians4:27 Dawimangpa hun na pia kei un. 
Ephesians4:28 Nidang lai-a guta mi in gu nawn loin, sapna neite a hop zawh, a piak zawh nadingin ama khut tawh nasepna a hoih hahkatin sem ta hen." 
Ephesians4:29 Nomau kam sungpan kam hoih lo khat beek pusuak kei hen. A za mite phattuamna a piang sak dingin, a sapna bangin a kipsak nadingin kam hoih na zang un." 
Ephesians4:30 Tatna’ Ni a tun’ dongin note hong ciamtehna ahi Pasian’ Kha Siangtho na dah sak kei un. 
Ephesians4:31 Kimuhdahna khempeuh, hehna khempeuh, thangpaihna khempeuh, han’sanna khempeuh, mindai nading mi gensiatna khempeuh, hazatna khempeuhte note kiang pan na paaikhia un!" 
Ephesians4:32 Khat leh khat na kihehpih un, thupha na kibawl un la, Khazih’ hangah Pasian in na mawhna uh hong maisak mah bangin note khat leh khat mawhna kimaisak un." 
Ephesians5:1 Tua ahih ciangin note in Pasian’ it tate na hih uh mah bangin Pasian a suun mite na suak un. 
Ephesians5:2 Khazih in note hong it maninah Pasian mai-ah namtui om nadingin ama pumpi kipia-in, kibia-in, eite tangding a kipaih mah bangin note in itna tawh gamta un." 
Ephesians5:3 Numei tawh khialhna, lunggulh kihhuaina, apawl pawl huaihamnate, misiangthote in tan’ ding a kilawm ahih maninah kampau nangawnin kizom kei un." 
Ephesians5:4 A kilawm lo kihhuaina kam, a mawkna kam, amawkna kamsiate zong paaikhia un la, Pasian’ hehpihna phatna kamte zang un." 
Ephesians5:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, numei tawh a khial mi ahi zongin, mi kihhuai mi ahi zongin, milim bia mi ahi huaiham mi khat beek in Khazih leh Pasian’ Gam sungah luahna a ngah kei ding hi ci-in na thei uh hi." 
Ephesians5:6 A mawkna kam tawh note kuamah kikheem sak kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tuate hangin Pasian’ hehna in a nial thei mite tungah a tung hi." 
Ephesians5:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute tawh na gamta khawm kei un. 
Ephesians5:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nidang lai-inah note in khuamial na hi uh hi; tu-in na hih uh leh, Topa sungah khuavak na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin khuavak’ tate bangin na gamta un." 
Ephesians5:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, khuavak’ gah in a hoihna khempeuh, dikna khempeuh, thuman thutak ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:10 Topa lungdam sakna in bang ahi hiam ci-in kanin," 
Ephesians5:11 a gah nei lo khuamial gamtatna tawh kipawl lo tham loin, tua gamtatna a mawhna na lak un," 
Ephesians5:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in munbu-na sungah a gamtatnate uh gen ding nangawn a zumhuai ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:13 A om na khempeuh in a mawhna a kilat ciangin khuavak tawh a kilang hi. Kilatna a ngah khempeuh in khuavak ahi hi. 
Ephesians5:14 Tua ahih ciangin: “A ihmu mi aw, Khanglo in la, sihna pan thokik in! Tua bang ahih leh, Khazih in nang tungah hong taang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ephesians5:15 Tua ahih ciangin note in bang na ci gamtat uh hiam na kikem un. Pilna nei lo bang hi loin, pilna nei bangin na hi un la," 
Ephesians5:16 tuni hunte in a gilo ahih maninah, ahun na teel un." 
Ephesians5:17 Tua ahih ciangin mihai suak loin, Topa’ deihna in bang ahi hiam ci-in na thei un." 
Ephesians5:18 Hong khamsak thei leenggahzu tangin, Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin om un." 
Ephesians5:19 Late-a kipan kha la leh phatna la apawlpawlte tawh khat leh khat na kikum un la, na lungsim tak uh tawh Topa mai-ah la sa un." 
Ephesians5:20 Na khempeuh ah hong hehpihna lian hi ci-in i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ min suangin Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna na puak tawntung un. 
Ephesians5:21 Khazih zahtakna hangin khat leh khat nuai-ah na pumpi uh na kiniamsak un. 
Ephesians5:22 Zite aw, Topa’ ukna na man’ uh mah bangin na pasalte uh ukna na mang un." 
Ephesians5:23 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih in pawlpi’ lutang ahih mah bangin pasal in a zi’ lutang ahi hi. Khazih in ama pumpi’ Honpa ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:24 Ahih hangin pawlpi in Khazih’ ukna a man’ mah bangin zite in zong a pasalte uh ukna khempeuh mang ta uh hen. 
Ephesians5:25 Pasalte aw, Khazih in pawlpi a it mah bangin na zite uh na it un." 
Ephesians5:26 Tua pawlpi in siangtho-in mawhsakna om lo ahih ciangin," 
Ephesians5:27 a nin ban’na om lo, sa tonna om loin, a mel kilawma om pawlpi, Khazih in amahmah a kipiak nading-inah Pasian’ thu tawh tui-ah a sil khit ciangin, siangthosak nadingin tua pawlpi adingin ama pumpi a pia hi." 
Ephesians5:28 Tua mah bangin pasalte in zong amau pumpi uh a it uh mah bangin a zite uh a it ding uh kilawm hi. A zi a it mi in ama pumpi a it mi ahi hi. 
Ephesians5:29 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama ci-le-sa a mudah mi khat beek a om kei hi. Khazih in pawlpi a vaak a kep mah bangin mi in zong ama sa a vaak a kem hi." 
Ephesians5:30 Eite in Topa’ pum tung nate i hi hi. 
Ephesians5:31 Tua ahih ciangin pasal in a nu a pa nusia-in a zi a beel ding a, tua mi nih in pumkhat sakhat a suak ding uh hi." 
Ephesians5:32 Hih thu in thuthukpi ahi hi. Tua bang ka cih ciangin Khazih leh pawlpi ngaihsunin ka gen hi. 
Ephesians5:33 Ahih hangin note in zong na pumpi ciat uh na it uh mah bangin na zite uh na it un. Numeite in zong a pasalte uh zahtak uh hen. 
Ephesians6:1 Tanute tapate aw, Topa’ deih bangin na nute na pate thu uh na mang un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih gamtatna in thuman ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:2 “Nangmah in nuam sa-in leitungah na nuntakna a sau nadingin ah na nute na pate na zahtak in,” ci-in thuciamna tawh kipawl a masa bel thukham ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:3  
Ephesians6:4 Pate aw, na tapate na tanute uh heh nading bawl kei un. Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin tai-in hilh un la, vaak un." 
Ephesians6:5 Silate aw, Khazih thu na ngaih uh mah bangin launa tawh, kihta-in, liingin, lungka loin, ci-le-sa bangin na tote uh thu na mang un." 
Ephesians6:6 Mite lungnemsak mi bangin amaute mai bekah mang hi loin, Khazih’ sila bangin lungkimin Pasian’ deihna bangin mite’ nasem bang bek hi loin, Topa’ nasem bangin itna lungsim tawh na sem un." 
Ephesians6:7  
Ephesians6:8 Thuhoih bawla gamta mi in sila hi taleh, sila lo hi taleh, Topa khut sung pan thaman a ngah ding na thei ta un." 
Ephesians6:9 Tote aw, tawn’na om loin na silate uh tungah tua bangin na bawl un. No leh amau Topa in vantungah om a, amah in kuama maitang zahtak lo hi cih na thei un." 
Ephesians6:10 A khak belin, Topa-ah ahi zongin, ma vangliatna’ hatna-ah ahi zongin, thahatin om un." 
Ephesians6:11 Dawimangpa’ kheemna na nan’ zawh nadingun Pasian’ galhiam khempeuh silh un. 
Ephesians6:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in ci-le-sa tawh kido i hi kei hi; asang belte tawh ahi zongin, ukte tawh ahi zongin, vangliatna tawh ahi zongin, leitung tawh kipawl khuamial ukte tawh ahi zongin, vantung tawh kipawl munah a om gilo khate tawh ahi zongin i kido hi." 
Ephesians6:13 Tua ahih ciangin a haksa gitlohna ni a tun’ ciangin khaam zo-in, phatmawhna khempeuh manin na do zawh nadingun Pasian’ hiamte khempeuh na silh un." 
Ephesians6:14 Tua ahih ciangin thuman thutak kawnggak na gak un la, dikna awmdalna na bulh un la," 
Ephesians6:15 kilemna tawh kipawl Lungdamna Thu-a kipan kisak kholhna khedap bulh un la, do un." 
Ephesians6:16 Dawimangpa hong kapna mei-thaltang a dal zo upna lum tawi-in hiam khempeuh tungah na silh un. 
Ephesians6:17 Gupna sik-lukhu khu un la, Pasian’ Thu ahi Kha Siangtho tem tawi un." 
Ephesians6:18 Thungetna pawlpawlte, thuumna pawlpawlte, Kha Siangtho tawh a tawntungin thu na ngen un. Tua bang thunget nading thakiam loin, misiangtho khempeuh ading thu nget sakin om un." 
Ephesians6:19 Tua tham loin keimah in sikkhau kikhihna thuakin Lungdamna Thu thuthuk hangin sawltak nasem ka hih ciangin tua thuthukna hilh dinginah lau loin ka kam ka hon’ theih nading ahi zongin, tua thu in a hilhhuai ahih mah bangin lau loin ka gen theih nading ahi zongin kei ading thu na ngetsak un." 
Ephesians6:20  
Ephesians6:21 Note in keima tungah thu hong piang khempeuh na theih nadingun Topa sungah lungsim nei a, sawltak na a sem Tikhikas in nomau kiangah thu a vekpi-in hong gen ding hi." 
Ephesians6:22 Note in kote thu na theih nading uh leh amah in note lungsim hong hehnep nadingin note kiangah ka hong sawl hi. 
Ephesians6:23 Ute naute tungah nopna om ta hen. Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih kiang pan na ki-itna un upna tawh om ta hen. 
Ephesians6:24 Kisia lo itna tawh i Topa Zeisu Khazih a it mite khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen. 
Philippians1:1 Khazih Zeisu’ silate ahi uh Paul leh Timoti in Filippi khua-ah a om pawlpi siate leh upate-a kipan Khazih Zeisu sungah kip-a a om misiangthote khempeuh thu kong zasak uh hi. 
Philippians1:2 I Pa Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih kiang pan hehpihna thupha leh nopna in note tungah om ta hen. 
Philippians1:3 Keimah in thu ka nget simin lungdamna tawh note khempeuh ading thungen tawntungin, note in a kipatcil-a kipan tu dongin Lungdamna Thu khan’sakna-ah na kipawl khopna uh thu ka ngaihsut ciangin, Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat hi." 
Philippians1:4  
Philippians1:5  
Philippians1:6 Tua bang ka phatna-ah note tungah a pha nasep hong panpa in Zeisu Khazih’ Ni dongin a kicingin hong bawlin, hong zosak ding hi ci-in ka lungkim hi." 
Philippians1:7 Note khempeuh ading tua bang lungsim ka neih ding a kilawm hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note khempeuh in keimah tawh thupha na ngah khawm uh a, keima thongkiatna-ah ahi zongin, Lungdamna Thu lamah hutna leh kipsakna-ah ahi zongin nong huh uh a, tua thu hangin note kong phawk tawntung hi." 
Philippians1:8 Keimah in note khempeuh Khazih Zeisu’ hehpihna tawh bang zah takin kong ngaihna thu Pasian in keima teci ahi hi. 
Philippians1:9 Note in ahoih apha nate na theih nadingun, theihna apawlpawl khempeuh hangah na ki-itna uh khangin a kicin’ nadingin ahi zongin, Pasian minthan’ nading leh phat nadingin, Zeisu Khazih hangah dikna’ gah tawh dimin, Khazih’ Ni dongin na lungsim uh a siangtho leh genbaang lo ahih nadingin ahi zongin note ading thu kong ngetsak hi." 
Philippians1:10  
Philippians1:11  
Philippians1:12 Ute naute aw, keimah tungah hong tung nate in Lungdamna Thu khaam lo tham loin, a khangsak zaw hi ci-in na theih nadingun ka deih hi." 
Philippians1:13 Tua ahih ciangin ka thongkiatna in Khazih hang ahi hi cih kumpipa a vil galkap khempeuh-a kipan midangte lakah a kilang hi. 
Philippians1:14 Topa sungah a om ute naute lak pan a tampite in kei thuak khau kikhihna hangin thu-upna ah lungkimin lau loin, Pasian’ Thu a hilh ngam semsem uh hi." 
Philippians1:15 Mi kimkhatte in ki-en’na lungsim leh kitotna lungsim tawh Khazih’ thu a hilh uh hi. 
Philippians1:16 Keimah in Lungdamna Thu hu dingin hong kikoih ka hihna thu kimkhatte in thei-in, ki-itna lungsim tawh a hilh uh hi." 
Philippians1:17 Kimkhat ahih uh leh, lungsim siangtho nei lo uh a, kihenna ka thuak lai takin hong gimsak behlap nuamin hanciam uh a, kitotna lungsim tawh Khazih’ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Philippians1:18 Tua bang ahih ciangin bang ci bang hiam? Kheemna tawh hi taleh, dikna tawh hi taleh bang ci bangin thuhilh ahi zongin Khazih thu a hilh uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin keimah in ka lungdam a, tunung ciangin zong ka lung a dam lai ding hi." 
Philippians1:19 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in bangmah maizum loin, launa om loin, Khazih’ minthan’na ka pumpi sungah ka kilatsak tawntung mah bangin tu-in zong ka hing ahi zongin, ka si ahi zongin a kilang ding hi ci-in nakpi-in ka lamet mah bangin, note’ thungetna hang ahi zongin, Zeisu Khirs’ Kha Siangtho huhna hang ahi zongin, ka gimnate in kei hong gupna thu ahi hi ci-in ka thei hi." 
Philippians1:20  
Philippians1:21 Kei ka nuntakna in Khazih ahi hi; si leng a hoihzaw ding hi.
