Philippians1:22 Ahih hangin ka pumpi sungah nungta-in, tua nuntakna in ka nasepna-ah gah a pian’sak ding leh, ka teel ding ka thei kei hi." 
Philippians1:23 Thu nih kikal ah cih nading meel thei loin ka om hi. Pai-in Khazih tawh ka om ding ka lunggulh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, keima adingin a phazaw mahmah ding hi." 
Philippians1:24 Ahih hangin ka pum sungah om leng nomau ading a phazaw ding hi. 
Philippians1:25 Tua bangin pumpi cidamin ka om ding um ka hih ciangin nomau omna-ah khatvei ka hong pai ding maninah, note in Khazih Zeisu sungah keimah hangin lungdam kisathei zaw-in na om nadingun, note in upna-ah khangin na lungdam nading uh, kei in pumpi sungah omin note khempeuh tawh omkhawm nading thu ka ngah ding hi ci-in ka thei hi." 
Philippians1:26  
Philippians1:27 Note in galte hangin lau loin, lungsim kha khatah kipin, Lungdamna Thu tawh kipawl upna ading, lungsim kituakin na hahkatna uh, ka hong tun’ ciangin note tawh kimu-in ahi zongin, a kikhenin i om ahi zongin ka zak theih nadingin Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu tawh akilawm akituakin gamtat ding na hanciam un." 
Philippians1:28 Tua bangin galte hangah lau lohna in amaute’ adingin kisiat nading lim ahi hi; note’ adingin ahih leh, Pasian’ vaihawmna bangin gupna lim ahi hi." 
Philippians1:29 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in ni danga na muh uh bangin, tu-in na zak uh bangin ka thuak galdona bangin, note in zong na thuak uh ahih ciangin Khazih upna bekah hi loin, ama hanginah gimna thuak nading zong thu na ngah uh hi." 
Philippians1:30  
Philippians2:1 Tua ahih ciangin Khazih sungah hansuahna ahi zongin, itna tawh kipawl lungnopna ahi zongin, Kha Siangtho tawh kihotheihna ahi zongin, hehpihna leh diksakna ahi zongin na khatpeuh peuh a om leh, khat leh khat ki-it ciatin, khat leh khat lungsim kikhen loin hanciamna kibangin, lungsim kikhatin na om manunah ka lungdamna na cingsak un." 
Philippians2:2  
Philippians2:3 Huaihamna lungsim, a mawkna minthan’ deihna lungsim neihna tawh bangmah na hih kei un. Midangte in note sangin a phazaw hi ci-in lungsim niamkhiatna tawh khat leh khat na kingaihsun un." 
Philippians2:4 Nomau noptuamna bek ngaihsun loin, midangte’ noptuam nadingin khat leh khat na kingaihsun un." 
Philippians2:5 Khazih Zeisu sungah a om lungsim note sungah om ta hen: 
Philippians2:6 Amah in Pasian’ lim leh meel tawh dimin a om napi-in, Pasian tawh kibatnate ka khah kei ding hi ci loin," 
Philippians2:7 Ama minthan’na paai-in, sila lim la-in, Mi tawh kibatna-ah a suak hi." 
Philippians2:8 Tua bang lim tawh dimin kimu a, Sihna a thuak tham loin, singlamteh tungah a sih dongin, Thumang-in ama pumpi a kiniamsak hi." 
Philippians2:9 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in amah pahtawi-in Min khempeuhte sangin min a lianzaw a pia hi. 
Philippians2:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Vantung, leitung, leinuai-a om mi khempeuh in, Zeisu’ min hangin khukdin’ uh a, “Pa Pasian’ minthan’na kilatsak nadingin, ‘Zeisu Khazih in Topa ahi hi,’ ci-in, Leii khempeuh in a mang ding uh hi." 
Philippians2:11  
Philippians2:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw, note in thu na man’ tawntung uh bangin keimah maitangah tham loin, ka muh lohna-ah zong thungai-in, launa liin’na lungsim tawh, gupna na ngahna uh semkhia un." 
Philippians2:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in ama deihna bangin na sepnop nading uh leh na sep theih nadingun Pasian mahmah in nomau sungah hong sem ding hi." 
Philippians2:14 Note in na hihna khempeuh uh ah thuum lo, tau lo, kinial loin na hih un." 
Philippians2:15 Tua bangin na hih uh leh, mawhsak nading om loin, kuama tungah khialhna om loin, lungkawi-a kisia mi pawlte lakah mawhna neu kha beek a nei lo Pasian’ tate na suak ding uh hi. Nuntakna tawh kipawl thu hilhin, vantunga aksite bangin tua mi pawlte lakah na taang ding uh hi." 
Philippians2:16 Tua ahih leh, kei in a mawkna-in tai ka hi kei a, a mawkna-in nasemin hahkat ka hi kei hi ci-in Khazih’ Ni ciangin lungdam kisathei-in ka om ding hi." 
Philippians2:17 Tua tham loin, na piak uh biakna, note upna biakna tungah ka pumpi ka piakhia zongin, ka nuam hi; note khempeuh tawh ka lungdam khawm hi." 
Philippians2:18 Tua mah bangin note in zong nuam un la, keimah tawh lungdam khawm un." 
Philippians2:19 Ahih hangin note thu thei-in ka lungnop tuam nadingin, note kiangah Timoti ka hong sawl ding hi ci-in Zeisu sungah ka lamen hi." 
Philippians2:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in note phattuam nading lungsim pha a neih bangin a nei khat beek keima kiangah a om kei hi." 
Philippians2:21 Amaute in Zeisu Khazih’ phattuamna zong loin amaute’ phattuamna bek a zong uh hi. 
Philippians2:22 Ahih hangin ta in a pa tawh na a sepkhawm mah bangin Timoti in kei tawh Lungdamna Thu khan’sakna-ah na a semkhawm hi ci-in ama teci thu note in na thei uh hi. 
Philippians2:23 Tua ahih ciangin keima tungah bang thu a piang ka theih khit ciangin, amah note kiangah amanlangin kong sawl ding hi ci-in lamenin ka om hi." 
Philippians2:24 Ahih hangin keimahmah zong note kiangah a sawt loin ka hong pai ding hi, ci-in Topa sungah ka um hi." 
Philippians2:25 Ahih hangin nasepna leh galdona ah keimah hong vaak, hong khoi mi ahi, note sawltak ahi, ka naupa Epafroditas, note kiangah tu-in ka hong sawl ding kilawm ka sa hi." 
Philippians2:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a ci natna thu note in na zak uh bangin, amah in note hong ngai-in, nakpi lungzuangin a om hi." 
Philippians2:27 Amah in si dek takin a gim mahmah hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in amah a hehpih hi. Amah bek ahi kei hi, keima dahna a kibehlap sawnsawn loh nadingin kei zong hong hehpih hi." 
Philippians2:28 Tua ahih ciangin note in amah na muhkik uh ciangin na lungdam nading uh ahi zongin, keima dahna zong a kiam nading ahi zongin nomau kiangah hahkatin ka hong sawl hi." 
Philippians2:29 Tua ahih ciangin Topa sungah lungdamna tawh amah na tungsak un la, tua bang mite na zahtak un." 
Philippians2:30 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in kei nong vaak, nong khoina uh a kicing lote amah in kicingsak dingin Khazih adingin ama nuntakna a sih dektak zah dongin a hanciam zo hi." 
Philippians3:1 A khak bel thu in: ka it ka ute ka naute aw, Topa sungah na lungdam ta un. Hih bangin ka hong gelhkik hangin ka gim kei hi, note ading bitna ahi hi." 
Philippians3:2 Tua uite, gilo-a gamtate na peel un, vun-atna thu ah a kineih mite na peel un." 
Philippians3:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian Kha Siangtho hangin bia a, i pumpi muang loin, Khazih Zeisu hangah lungdamna kisaktheihna bek a nei eite in, vun-atna taktak a ngah mite i hi hi." 
Philippians3:4 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh, ci-le-sa ah zong suan’ ding ka nei hi. Midang khatpeuh in ci-le-sa ah suan’ ding ka nei hi ci-in a ki-up leh, keimah in ka nei zaw hi." 
Philippians3:5 Keimah in ni giat ni-in vun-atna ka thuak hi. Israel mi Benjamin’ suan ka hi hi. Hebru mi pana piang Hebru mi taktak ka hi hi. Thukham lam pan ci leeng Farisai mi ka hi hi. 
Philippians3:6 Lungsim khauhna pan ci leeng pawlpi bawlsiapa ka hi hi. Thukham hangin kingah dikna lam pan ci leeng mawhsak nading om lo mi ka hi hi. 
Philippians3:7 Ahih hangin keima phattuamna hong piangsak na khempeuh Khazih ading supna hi ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. 
Philippians3:8 Tua tham loin keimah in Khazih Zeisu ka Topa ka theih tel nadingin na khempeuh supna hi ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. 
Philippians3:9 Topa hangin na khempeuh ka taan zo a, sihna pan thawhkikna thu ka ngah theih nadingin Topa’ thuak sihna sungah tumin, tua Topa ahi zongin, ama thawhkikna’ vangliatna ahi zongin, ama gimthuakna zomin thuakna ahi zongin theih tel nadingin, thukham hanga ka ngah keima dikna om loin, Khazih upna hanga ka ngah upna hangin Pasian hong piak dikna muan’na tawh Khazih a meetin ngahin, tua Topa ah kip-a ka om zawh nadingin nadangte khempeuh eek hi ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians3:10  
Philippians3:11  
Philippians3:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin ka ngah zo hi ahi zongin, kicin’na-ah ka tum zo hi ahi zongin ci nuam ka hi kei hi. Ahih hangin noptuamna khat pia dingin Khazih Zeisu in kei hong man a, tua noptuamna ka let khak nading-inah, zui-in ka delh hi." 
Philippians3:13 Ute naute aw, tua noptuamna keimah in ka len zo hi ka cih loh hangin, ka nasepna khat in ka nungah a om nate ngaihsun loin, ka mai lamah a omte zamin," 
Philippians3:14 Khazih Zeisu sungah Pasian in tung lam pan hong sapna tawh kipawl lungdamna ngah nadingin, kidemin kung dongin hahkatin ka tai hi." 
Philippians3:15 Tua ahih ciangin a kicing eite khempeuh in tua bangin lungsim nei ciat ni. Note in na khatpeuh peuh ah na lungsim ngaihsutna uh a kibat kei leh, Pasian in tua na a hong lak ding hi." 
Philippians3:16 Ahih hangin i phak zawh zah bangin lam khat bek zui ni. 
Philippians3:17 Ute naute aw, kei’ gamtat mah bangin a kituakin na gamta un. Note lakah ka hong piak uh lim tawh kituakin a gamta mite zong na ciamteh un." 
Philippians3:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nidang lai-in tam veipi kong genkhol a, tu-in zong khitui luangin ka hong gen mah bangin, Khazih’ singlamteh galin do-in a gamta mi tampi a om hi." 
Philippians3:19 Tua mite in kisiatna-ah a tung ding uh hi, amaute’ pasian in a gilpi uh ahi hi; amaute in a maizumhuai a gamtatnate uh ah a kiphasak uh hi. Amaute in leitung nate a lunggulh uh hi." 
Philippians3:20 Eite in i hih leh, vantung gam tawh kipawl mi i hi hi. Tua gam panin Honpa ahi Topa Zeisu Khazih hong paisuk kik ding hi ci-in eite in ngakin, lamenin i om hi." 
Philippians3:21 Topa in na khempeuh ama nuai-ah a khia thei, a bawlphatna vangliatna hangin a ginalo eite pumpi, minthan’na tawh a dim pumpi a suahsak nadingin hong kikheelsak ding hi." 
Philippians4:1 Tua ahih ciangin ka lungnopna leh ka kisaktheihna lukhu, ka it ka ngaih ahi ute naute aw, tua bangin Topa sungah kipin om un, ka itte aw!" 
Philippians4:2 Eu-odia leh Sintikhe in Topa sungah a lung kituak nadingun ka thuum hi. 
Philippians4:3 Lawm naseppih taktak aw, tua numeite huh dingin ka hong thuum hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in kei leh Klement-a kipan nuntakna laibu sungah min kikhum adang ka naseppihte tawh Lungdamna Thu ka hilh khawmna-ah hong huhin, a hahkat mi ahi uh hi." 
Philippians4:4 Topa sungah lungdam tawntungin om un. Khatvei ka hong genkik-in ah lungdam un! 
Philippians4:5 Mi khempeuh mai-ah na lungsim nemna uh na lak un. Topa hong tun’na a nai zo hi. 
Philippians4:6 Bangmah thu-ah lungmang loin, na khempeuh ah hehpihna phatin na nget nopnate uh Pasian kiangah na ko un." 
Philippians4:7 Tua bang na hih uh leh, kuamah in a tel zawh loh Pasian’ nopna in Khazih Zeisu sungah note lungsim uh leh na ngaihsutnate uh hong keem ding hi." 
Philippians4:8 A khak bel thu in: ute naute aw, thuman thu tawh kipawl nate, zahtakhuai nate, adik nate, a siangtho nate, deihhuai nate, phathuai nate khempeuh ahi zongin, tatna pha khatpeuh peuh, thu phatna khatpeuh peuh tawh a kipawl nate ahi zongin na lungsim sung uhah na ngaihsun un." 
Philippians4:9 Note in nidang lai-in keima kiangah sinin na zaksa, na muhsa, na ngahsa uh nate na zui un, Tua bangin na zuih uh leh, nopna’ Pasian in note tawh hong omkhawm ding hi." 
Philippians4:10 Tu-in zong keimah adingin na phawkkik uh ahih maninah, keimah in Pasian sungah ka lungdam mahmah hi. Ni dangin na hong phawk uh hangin hih theihna thu na ngah kei uh hi." 
Philippians4:11 Tua bang ka cih ciangin keimah tunga kitangsapna ngaihsunin ci ka hi kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kei in ka thuakna khempeuh ah ka lungkim nadingin ka kisin zo hi." 
Philippians4:12 Simmawhna ahi zongin, hauhna ahi zongin ka thuak thei hi. Ankhamna, gilkialna, sum hauhna, zawn’nate thuak dinginah na khempeuh panin ka kisin zo hi." 
Philippians4:13 Hong thahatsakpa Khazih hangin na khempeuh ka hih thei hi. 
Philippians4:14 Ahih hangin gimna ka thuak lai takin note in kei tawh kizopna hangin a pha-in na bawl zo uh hi. 
Philippians4:15 Lawm Filippi mite aw, Lungdamna Thu hilh ding kipanin Makedonia gam pan ka paikhiat lai takin, piakna leh ngahna in note sim loh kuamah pawlpi in kei tawh a kizom kei uh hi." 
Philippians4:16 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Thesalonika khua-ah ka om lai takin ka sapnate note in khatvei nong piak khit uh ciangin, nong piakik lai uh hi." 
Philippians4:17 Tua bang ka cih ciangin huhna sumpi a zong ka hi hi, a ci ka hi kei hi. Note ading a gah a khan’na bek ka zong hi." 
Philippians4:18 Keimah in na khempeuh ka nei ta a, ka hau hi! Pasian tungah a lungdamhuai, a san’ huai gim namtui biak piakna ahi note’ hong khak huhnate Epafroditas’ khut sung pan ka ngah maninah ka hau hi." 
Philippians4:19 Ka Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh kipawl hauhna a om mah bangin, note kisapna khempeuh Khazih Zeisu sungah hong kicingsak ding hi." 
Philippians4:20 Eite’ Pa leh Pasian tungah a tawntungin minthan’na om tawntung ta hen. Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Khazih Zeisu sungah a om misiangthote khempeuh na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a omkhawm ute naute-a kipan misiangthote in note hong hopih uh hi. 
Philippians4:22 Kaisar kumpipa’ inn sungah a om misiangthote in hong hopih pha diak uh hi. 
Philippians4:23 Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha in note lungsim kha tawh omkhawm ta hen. Amen. 
Colossians1:1 Pasian’ deihna hangin Khazih Zeisu’ sawltak keimah leh i sangampa Timoti in Kolose khua-ah a om Khazih sungah misiangthote leh a thuman ute naute kiangah thu ka hong zasak uh hi. I Pa Pasian kiang panin hehpihna thupha leh nopna in note tungah om ta hen. 
Colossians1:2  
Colossians1:3 Khazih Zeisu sungah na upna uh leh misiangthote ading na itna uh thu ka zakna uh ahi zongin, thuman thu ahi Lungdamna Thu note in nidanga na zak uh mah bangin, note ading vantungah a kikhol lametna ngaihsunin ahi zongin, note ading ni simin thungenin, i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Pa Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat uh hi." 
Colossians1:4  
Colossians1:5  
Colossians1:6 Tua thu in leitung khempeuh ah a kizelh khit mah bangin, note kiangah zong hong tung zo hi; note’ sungah hih Lungdamna Thu in a gah gahin, a khan’ toh mah bangin mi khempeuh tungah zong a piang thei hi." 
Colossians1:7 Kote ading Khazih’ nasem muanhuai, ka it uh sila ka hih khawmpih uh Epafras in note hong hilh bangin, note in na zak uh Pasian’ hehpihna a man taka na theih ni uh pana kipan tua nopna na ngah uh hi." 
Colossians1:8 Amah in Kha Siangtho sungah a om note’ ki-itna zong kote kiangah hong gen zo hi. 
Colossians1:9 Tua ahih ciangin kote in zong ka zak uh ni pan akipan, note ading thungen tawntungin ka om uh hi." 
Colossians1:10 Ka thungetna un: note in gamtat hoihna apawlpawl ahi gah gahin, Pasian theihna pilna khan’ tohna nei-in ahi zongin, lungdamna tawh na khempeuh thuakin lungduai nadingin ama minthan’na, vangliatna bangin," 
Colossians1:11 thahatna tawh dimin ahi zongin Topa tawh a kilawmin gamta-in, na khempeuh ah a hong theihsak nadingin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna leh pilna apawlpawl tawh, ama deihna khempeuh na tel nadingun thu ka ngen uh hi." 
Colossians1:12 Khuavakna sungah a om misiangthote’ luahna, eite in zomin i luah theih nadingin hong bawlin, khuamialna’ vang pan eite hong hotkhiat khit ciangin, a it a Tapa’ Gam sungah hong tumsakpa Pasian hehpihna ka phat uh hi." 
Colossians1:13  
Colossians1:14 Tua a Tapa’ sisan hangin i mawhnate maisakna ahi hong tatkhiatna thupha i ngah hi. 
Colossians1:15 Tua Tapa in mittang a, kimu thei lo Pasian’ lim hi a, a om khempeuhte mai-ah zong ta Upa ahi hi." 
Colossians1:16 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua Tapa hangin Pasian in vantung ahi zongin, leitung ahi zongin-ah a om khempeuh a kimutheite, a kimu thei lote, kumpi tokhomte ahi zongin uknate ahi zongin, a sang belnate ahi zongin, vangliatna ahi zongin, na khempeuh a piangsak hi. Tua Tapa hangah ahi zongin, tua Tapa ading ahi zongin na khempeuh a piangsak hi." 
Colossians1:17 Tapa in na khempeuh a pian’ ma-in om a, amah hangin na khempeuh a kip hi." 
Colossians1:18 Amah in pawlpi ahi, pumpi’ lutang ahi hi. Na khempeuh ah amahmah a sangbel a suah nadingin a kipahtawi hi a, misite lakpan Ta upa a suak hi." 
Colossians1:19 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a kicin’na khempeuh a Tapa sungah a kipsak nading ahi zongin," 
Colossians1:20 singlamteh tungah a buak sisan hangin gallemna piangsakin, leitung nate ahi zongin, vantung nate ahi zongin, na khempeuh in Tapa hangah Pasian tawh a kilem theih nading ahi zongin a deih hi." 
Colossians1:21 Nidang lai-inah Pasian tawh kikhenkhia-in, gilo gamtatnate in na lungsim sung uhah gal ahi uh note zong," 
Colossians1:22 ci leh sa-ah sihna a thuak maninah tu-in kilemna a hong piangsak hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, van nuai-ah a om a pian’sak khempeuhte kiangah hilhin note in na zaksa uh Lungdamna Thu lametna pan kiam loin, khuam bangin kiphutin, kipna tawh na up uh leh, siatna om lo a, siangtho-in Pasian mai-ah hong kipiak nading ahi hi. Keimah Paul zong tua thu tawh kipawl a, nasemin hong kikoih zo hi." 
Colossians1:23  
Colossians1:24 Tu-in note adingin gimna thuakna ah lungdamin, Khazih’ gimna neu kha a kisam lai, pawlpi ahi ama pumpi adingin keima pumpi sungah hong kicingsak hi." 
Colossians1:25 Tua ahih ciangin tanglai tawntung kiseelin a om hangin tu-in Topa’ misiangthote kiangah a kilak thu thuk ahi Pasian thu a vekpi-in hilh dinginah note adingin kei, zaa hong piak mah bangin kei in pawlpi sungah nasem ka suak zo hi." 
Colossians1:26  
Colossians1:27 Gentailte lakah hih thu thukpi tawh kipawl alianpi nopsakna bang zahin lian ci-in misiangthote in a theih nadingin Pasian in a deih hi. Tua thu thukpi in: vanglian lametna thu ahi, note sungah a om Khazih ahi hi." 
Colossians1:28 Khazih hangin mi khempeuh in kicin’na ngahin mi khempeuh tungah pia dingin, kote in mi khempeuh phawksakin pilna apawlpawl tawh tai-in, hilhin Khazih’ thu ka hilh uh hi." 
Colossians1:29 Tua bang deihna-in kei in hahkatin keima tungah, vanglianpi tawh hong bawlphatna bangin semin, demin ka om hi." 
Colossians2:1 Note leh Laodikia khuamite-a kipan kei maitang mu ngei lo mi a om khempeuhte in, ki-itna tawh kipawlin Khazih ahi Pasian’ thu thukpi thei-in up khialhna om lo pilna hauhnate tawh dimin, lungsim kihehnep nadingin bang zaha lian kidemna, kidona ka thuak thu note ka hong theisak nuam hi." 
Colossians2:2  
Colossians2:3 Tua Khazih sungah pilna sum, theihna sum a om khempeuh kiseelin om hi." 
Colossians2:4 Kuamah in kheemna kam tawh note hong kheem zawh loh nadingin hih thu ka hong gen hi. 
Colossians2:5 Keima pumpi in note tawh kikhenin ka om hangin, ka lungsim note tawh omkhawm a, note in a ngeina bangin na bawl theihna uh ahi zongin, Khazih sungah upna kipin na om uh ahi zongin ka muh ciangin ka lung a dam hi." 
Colossians2:6 Tua ahih ciangin Khazih Zeisu, Topa-a na san’ khit uh ciangin tua Topa sungah gamta-in, zung kha-in, kilamin omin, kihilhna na ngah khit uh mah bangin upna-ah kipin, hehpihna phatna tawh upna khangin kicingin om un." 
Colossians2:7  
Colossians2:8 Khazih thu zui lo mite’ tangthu leh leitung thungeek zui-in, leitung pilna leh mawkna khempeuh hangin note kuamah in hong sut, hong bawlsiat theih loh nadingin kikem un." 
Colossians2:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ lim tawh a dim khempeuh in Khazih’ pum sungah kilangin a om hi." 
Colossians2:10 Ukna thu leh vangliatna thu a uk Topa sungah note in kicingin na om uh hi. 
Colossians2:11 Khazih’ sungah vunatna hangin ci-le-sa pumpi paaikhia-in, khut tawh kibawl lo vunatna Topa tawh na ngah uh baptaizna hangin, amah tawh na kivui khawm uh hi. Khazih sihna pan a thosak Pasian’ vangliatna na upna uh hangin baptaizna ngahin tua Topa tawh thawhkikna na ngah uh hi." 
Colossians2:12  
Colossians2:13 Mawhna-ah ahi zongin, pumpi vunatna ngah lohna-ah ahi zongin si-in a om note, Khazih tawh kibangin hong hingsak a, eite khialhna khempeuh a hong maisak hi." 
Colossians2:14 Eite lang khatah kilem lo-a a om ngeina tawh kipawl kiciamna lai sumangin, singlamteh tungah khen a, eite kikal sung pan a paaimang hi." 
Colossians2:15 A sangbel vangliatna leh uknate a laksak khit ciangin, kitel takin lak a, singlamteh hangin zawhna pawi a khaam hi." 
Colossians2:16 Tua ahih ciangin annek tuidawn ahi zongin, pawikham ni, kha det ni, Nipi ni tawh kipawl thute ahi zongin, note kuamah in kidongin thu kikhensak kei un." 
Colossians2:17 Tua nate in a nung ciangin a hong piang ding lim hi a, pumpi ahih leh, Khazih ahi hi." 
Colossians2:18 Lutang suang loin, pumpi ci-le-sa tawh kipawl ama lungsim tawh kisathei mawkin, ama theih loh a muh loh thute kantelin lungsim kiniamsakna-ah ahi zongin, vantungmi biakna-ah ahi zongin, nuamsa-a a om mi khat nangawn note lungdamna kisutsak kei un." 
Colossians2:19 Lu tung pan pumpi khempeuh in a guh a taang tawh a kipawlnate hangin thahatna piangin, Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin a khang thei hi." 
Colossians2:20 Note in leitung thungeek pan Khazih tawh na sikhawm uh ahih leh, bang hangin tua leitungah a om lai bangin na gamta uh hiam? Khatvei zatna tawh a muat pak thei nate ahi, mihing ngeina banga kihilhna leh kikhalna lel ahi—‘Len kei in,’ ‘Ciam kei in,’ Lawng kei in,’ kici thute bang hangin mangin na om uh hiam?" 
Colossians2:21  
Colossians2:22 Tua nate khempeuh zatna hangin muat nading a piang ding hi. 
Colossians2:23 Tua bang ngeina in ut thu biakna, lung kiniamsakna, pumpi bawlsiatna tawh kipawl pilna a nei bangin a om hangin, pumpi deihna zuih loh nading, khaam nadingin a kiman’na khat beek a om kei hi." 
Colossians3:1 Tua ahih ciangin note in Khazih tawh thokik khawm na hih uh leh, Pasian’ ziat lamah a tu Khazih’ omna mun, tung lamah a om nate na zong un." 
Colossians3:2 Leitungah a om nate lunggulhin om kei un, atung lam nate bek lunggulhin om un." 
Colossians3:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in na si zo uh a, note nuntakna in Khazih tawh Pasian sungah kiseel khawmin a om uh hi." 
Colossians3:4 Eite nuntakna ahi Khazih hong kilat ciangin, note in zong tua Topa tawh minthang khawmin na kilang ding uh hi." 
Colossians3:5 Tua ahih ciangin numei tawh mawhna, kihhuai gamtatna, nu leh pa kilunggulh luatna, deihgawhna, milim biakna ahi, huaihamna note sungah a om nate sisak un." 
Colossians3:6 Tua khialhna hangin Pasian’ hehna in a nialte’ tate tungah a tung hi. 
Colossians3:7 Tua mite tawh note zong nidanga na kipawl lai takun tua khialhnate na gamta uh hi. 
Colossians3:8 Tu-in ahih leh, tua khialhna khempeuh ahi zongin, hehna, thangpaihna, hazatna, mindai nading gensiatna, kam kihhuai zatnate ahi zongin, na muk uh pan paaikhia un." 
Colossians3:9 Khat leh khat zuauthu kigen kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in mi lui gamtatna leh mi lui pum suahkhia-in, a hong piangsakpa’ lim bangin, pilna maan adingin a kibawlpha mithak a sillh mi na hi uh hi." 
Colossians3:10  
Colossians3:11 Tua bawlphatna-ah Grik mi a om kei hi, Judah mi a om kei hi, vunat mi a om kei hi, vunat lo mi a om kei hi, mi pil lo a om kei hi, Sithia mi a om kei hi, sila a om kei hi, sila lo mi a om kei hi; Khazih in na khempeuh hi a, na khempeuh sungah a om hi." 
Colossians3:12 Tua ahih ciangin note in Pasian’ teel mi, a siangtho mi, a it mite bangin hehpihna, thupha bawlna, sin kiniamsakna, lungneemna, heh baih lohna lungsimte na silh un." 
Colossians3:13 Khat leh khat na kimawhsak nading uh a om ciangin kithuak un la, na kiniamsak un. Topa in note mawhna hong maisak mah bangin note zong khat leh khat na kimaisak ciat un." 
Colossians3:14 Kicin’na tawh a kipawl pawlkhat suahna ahi ki-itna, tua nate tungah thuahin silh un." 
Colossians3:15 Note lungsim sung uhah Khazih’ nopna na uksak un. Tua bang deihna-in note in pum khat bek sungah hong sapna a ngah na hi uh hi. Hehpihna phatna lungsim na nei un. 
Colossians3:16 Khazih’ thu in pilna apawlpawl tawh note sungah om ta hen. Late-a kipan biakna la leh Kha Siangtho tawh kipawl la apawlpawl tawh note khat leh khat kihilhin, kitai-in, hehpihna thupha lungsim nei-in, Pasian tungah lasa-in phat un." 
Colossians3:17 Kampau ahi zongin, bawlna ahi zongin, na hihna khempeuh uhah Topa Zeisu’ min suangin, tua Topa hangah Pa Pasian’ hehpihna phatin na khempeuh na bawl un." 
Colossians3:18 Numeite aw, Topa sungah a kilawm mah bangin, pasalte hong ukna na mang un." 
Colossians3:19 Pasalte aw, na zite uh na it un la, a tung uhah na hangsan kei un." 
Colossians3:20 Tapate tanute aw, thu khempeuhah na nute na pate uh thu na mang un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nute pate thuman’na in Pasian’ deihna ahi hi." 
Colossians3:21 Pate aw, na tapate na tanute uh lungkiat nading, thanem nading a om loh nadingin amaute hehsak kei un." 
Colossians3:22 Silate aw, Pasian kihta-in, mihing pahtaak ding ut-a mi’ maitang bekah mang hi loin, lungka loin, ci-le-sa tawh kipawl na tote uh thu khempeuh na mang un." 
Colossians3:23 Mi’ nasem bang bek hi loin, Topa’ nasem bangin na hihna khempeuh uhah itna lungsim tawh hih ta un." 
Colossians3:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa Khazih’ nasem na hih uh ciangin luahna ahi thaman tua Topa’ khut tung pan na ngah ding uh hi ci-in na thei un." 
Colossians3:25 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, dik lo-a gamta mi in ama hihna mawhna a thuak ding hi. Kuama maitang zahtakna a om kei ding hi." 
Colossians4:1 Tote aw, note in zong vantungah om Topa khat na neih uh na thei un la, thuman thutak leh a kilawm a kituakin na silate uh na bawl un." 
Colossians4:2 Thungen tawntung un la, hong hehpihna phatin ngak un." 
Colossians4:3 Keimah in Khazih’ thu thuk hangin thongkiatna ka thuak a, tua thu thukna gen dinginah Pasian in thuhilhna kongkhak, kote ading a hong hon’ nading ahi zongin, tua thu thukna hilh ding a kilawm mah bangin ka hilh theih nading uh ahi zongin, kote ading thu hong ngetsak un." 
Colossians4:4  
Colossians4:5 Pua lamah a om mite mai-ah pilna tawh gamta un la, a hun na teel un." 
Colossians4:6 Mi khempeuh tungah bang ci dawn’ kik ding cih na theih nadingun, note kam in ci al bangin a al limna tawh dimin kilawm tawntung ta hen." 
Colossians4:7 Topa sungah dikna nei-in nasem khawm sila ka hihpih, a it huai mi ahi sanggampa Tikhikas in keima thu a om khempeuh note kiangah a hong gen ding hi." 
Colossians4:8 Note in kote thu na theih nading uh leh amah in note lungsim hong hehnep theih nadingin, amah in ahi zongin, note sung pan a piang dikna a nei, a it huai mi Onesimas note kiangah ka hong sawl ding hi. Amaute in hih khua-ah a om thu khempeuh note kiangah a hong hilh ding uh hi." 
Colossians4:9  
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kia khawm mi Aristarkhas akipan Barnabas’ nau Marka leh Justas a kici Zeisu te in note a hong hopih uh hi. Marka thu tawh kipawl note kiangah ka hong khak zo hi. Amah note kiangah a hong tun’ ciangin dawnin na tungsak un. 
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kia khawm mi Aristarkhas akipan Barnabas’ nau Marka leh Justas a kici Zeisu te in note a hong hopih uh hi. Marka thu tawh kipawl note kiangah ka hong khak zo hi. Amah note kiangah a hong tun’ ciangin dawnin na tungsak un. 
Colossians4:11 Vunatna a thuak mite lakah hih mite bek Pasian’ Gam ading ka naseppihte ahi uh a, kei hong hehnem uh hi." 
Colossians4:12 Note lakah a piang Khazih Zeisu’ sila Epafras in note hong hopih hi. Note kicingin Pasian’ deihna khempeuh ah lunghihmawhna om loin na lungkim nadingun, note ading hahkatin thu a ngen tawntung hi." 
Colossians4:13 Note-a kipan Laodikia khua leh Hierapolis khua ah a om mite adingin nakpi-in a hahkatna thu keimah in amah ading teci ka pang hi. 
Colossians4:14 Itna a ngah zato mangpa Luka leh Demas in note hong hopih uh hi. 
Colossians4:15 Laodikia khua-ah a om ute naute a hi zongin, Nimfa akipan ama innah a om pawlpi ahi zongin na hopihsak un." 
Colossians4:16 Hih lai na sim khit uh ciangin Laodikia khua-ah a om pawlpite zong na simsak un. Laodikia khua pan a kingah ding lai zong na sim un. 
Colossians4:17 Arkhippas kiangah zong, “Nangmah in Topa’ khut sungah na ngah nasepna na zawh khit nadingin ciamteh in,” ci-in na gen un." 
Colossians4:18 Kei Paul in ka khut tawh note hopihna hih lai kong gelh hi. Kei’ thuak kikhihna na ngaihsun un. Note tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paul, Silvanas leh Timoti-te in Pa Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih sungah kip-a a om Thesalonika pawlpi kong zasak uh hi: Hehpihna thupha leh nopna in nomau tungah om ta hen." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Eite Pa leh Pasian mai-ah note in umin, gamta-in, itin, hahkatin, i Topa Zeisu Khazih lamenin, na thuaknate uh kote in ka ngaihsun tawntung uh a, Pasian in a it ute naute aw, note ngah hong teelna thei-in, note khempeuh thu hangin Pasian’ hehpihna phat tawntungin note ading thu ka ngen tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:3  
1Thessalonians1:4  
1Thessalonians1:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote in note tawh ka omkhawm lai takun, note adingin bang ci mi ka hih uh na theih uh mah bangin, kote’ hilh Lungdamna Thu in note sungah kampau bek hi loin vangliatna tawh ahi zongin, up khialhna om loin lungkim taktakna tawh a dim thu ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Note in gimna lian na thuak uh hangin Kha Siangtho tawh akipawl lungdamna tawh, Pasian thu sangin kote tawh Topa ngeina bangin a gamta mite na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Makedonia gam leh Akhaia gamah thu-um mite khempeuh ading note in limpha a lak mi na hi uh hi. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note kiang panin Topa thu in Makedonia gam leh Akhaia gamah kizeel tham loin, note in Topa’ thu na upna uh mun khempeuh a tung hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote in bangmah ka gen ding uh a om kei hi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote in note lakah bang ci ka hong lut uh tham loin, a nungta leh thuman thutak Pasian’ na note in sem ding ahi zongin, a hong tung ding hehna pan eite hong gumkhia Zeisu ahi, sihna pan Pasian in a thawh kiksak a Tapa in vantung pan a hong kum kik ding a ngak ding ahi zongin, milimte pan Pasian kiangah bang na ci kihei uh, amau mah in a zasak uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:10  
1Thessalonians2:1 Ute naute aw, kote in note kiangah ka hong lutna uh a mawkna suak lo hi cih nomau mah in na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Note in na theih uh mah bangin kote in Filippi khua-ah zawn’khalna leh bawlsiatnate ka thuak khit uh ciangin, i Pasian suangin nakpi-in nialna tawh Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu nomau kiangah lau loin ka hong hilh uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kote in zuauthu hilhna, kihuaina, kheemna tawh hong hansuahin hong zol thei ka hi kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Lungdamna Thu zui dinga kilawm mi ci-in Pasian in ko hong koih mah bangin mite lungsim uh kimsak bang hi loin, lungsim a hong dongtel Pasian lungkimsak bangin thu ka hilh uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in na theih uh mah bangin, kote in mi phatna kam khat beek ka zang kei uh a, a kiseel huaihamna lungsim neu kha beek a om loh thu, Pasian in kote ading teci a pang hi." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Tua tham loin, Khazih’ sawltak ka hi uh ahih ciangin vangik a suan thei mi ka hi uh napi-in, mite’ piak minthan’na note kiangah ahi zongin, midangte kiangah ahi zongin zong loin, note lakah dam damin ka sem uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Note ka hong it mahmah uh a, nu in nawine naungeekte a khoi mah bangin kote in note hong it hong ngai-in, Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu tham loin, kote nuntakna uh nangawn piak nopna lungsim ka nei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:8  
1Thessalonians2:9 Ute naute aw, kote in gimpi mahmahin nasemin ka hahkatna thu uh na thei uh hi. Note lakah mi khat peuhmah tungah vangik ka suah loh nadingun kote in sun tawh, zan tawh nasemin Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu note kiangah ka hong hilh uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Amahmah Gam leh a vangliatna sungah hong sam, hong tungsak Pasian tawh a kilawm a kituak na gamtat nadingun pa in a tate a bawl mah bangin kote in note khempeuh bang ci bangin kong hansuah uh a, kong vaikhak uh note in na theih uh mah bangin upna sungah a tung note lakah kote in, bang ci bangin siangthoin, mawhsak nading om loin ka om uh note in, kote ading teci pang mi na hi uh hi; Pasian in zong ko ading teci pang mi ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians2:11  
1Thessalonians2:12  
1Thessalonians2:13 Ka hilh uh Pasian’ thu note in ngahin na san’ lai takun, mi kam sung pan a pusuak thu bangin sang loin, Pasian’ thu a man taktak hi ci-in a um note sungah a bawlpha Pasian’ thu bangin na san’na uh ngaihsunin, kote in Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Judah gamah Khazih Zeisu sungah a om pawlpite in Judah mite’ khut tung pan gimna a thuak uh bangin, ute naute aw, note in zong na mipawlte khut sung uh ah tua bangin na thuak uh ahih ciangin, Judah gamah a om pawlpite bangin a gamta mi na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Tua Judah mite in, Topa Zeisu akipan kamsangte a that zo uh hi. Kote zong hong hawlkhia uh a, Pasian lungsim tawh kituak loin mi khempeuh tawh zong kilem lo uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Tua mite in amau mawhna a dimsak tawntung nadingun Gentailte in gupna sungah a tun’ nadingun kote thuhilh hong khaam uh hi. Amau tungah hehna a vekpi-in a tung zo hi! 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ute naute aw, kote in lungsim tawh hi lo, pum bek tawh note tawh a tom kha i kikhen hangin, nomau maitang uh mu nuamin, kong ngaih mahmah uh lungsim tawh hahkat zaw-in ka om uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Tua ahih ciangin kei Paul in note kiangah kong pai nading nihvei dong ka hanciam hangin Satan in kote hong kham hi. 
1Thessalonians2:19 I Topa Zeisu hong kum ciangin a mai-ah kote lametna, lungdamna leh kisaktheihna lukhu in bang ahi hiam? Note hilo na hi uh hiam?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in kote minthan’na leh lungdamna na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Tua ahih ciangin kote in lunghimawhin ka thuak zawh nawn loh uh ciangin Athen khuapi-ah komau bek ka om lai nading uh ka ut uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:2 Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu hilhin, i sanggampa Timoti note kiangah ka hong sawl uh hi. Hih gimnate hangin kuamah a lungkiat loh nadingin, note hong kipsak a, na upna uh ah note hong hansuah nadingin amah ka hong sawl uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:3 Hih gimnate thuak dingin kote hong kikoih hi ci-in nomau mah in na thei uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in gimna i thuak ding hi ci-in note tawh ka omkhawm lai takun ka hong gen zo uh hi. Kong gen uh mah bangin zong a piang hi ci-in na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Tua ahih ciangin a ze-et thei, a zol theipa in no hong ze-et a, ka sepna un a mawkna a suak kha ding hi ci-in lunghimawhin ka thuak zawh nawn loh ciangin, note upna ka theih nadingin ka hong sawl hi." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Tu-in ahih leh, Timoti in note kiang pan hong ciahkik a, note upna leh ki-itna uh a kip hi ci-in ahi zongin, kote in note kong ngaih uh mah bangin note in kote hang ngai-in, ni simin hong ngaihsun a, hong phawk uh hi ci-in ahi zongin, lungdam thu hong zasak ahih ciangin," 
1Thessalonians3:7 ute naute aw, kote in lunghihmawhna khempeuh leh ko thuak gimna-ah note thu-upna uh hangin hehnepna ka ngah uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in Topa sungah na kip uh leh, kote ka nungta uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:9 I Pasian mai-ah note thu hangah kote lungdamna khempeuh ngaihsunin, note hangin Pasian’ hehpihna bang ci thukkik zawh ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Note maitang uh mu-in, nomau’ kisap lai khempeuh a kicin’sak nadingun kote in sun tawh zan tawh nakpi-in thu ka ngenngen uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Note omna-ah ka hong pai nading lampi i Pa Pasian mahmah leh i Topa Zeisu in hong bawlsak ta hen. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Tua Topa in a misiangthote tawh a hong kumsuk khawm ciangin, eite Pa Pasian mai-ah Topa in amau lungsim sian’thona-ah mawhsak nading om loin, a kipsak nadingin, kote in note kong it uh mah bangin note khat leh khat ahi zongin, mi khempeuh ahi zongin na itin, ki-itna ah khangin na kicin’ nadingun Pasian in hong bawl ta hen." 
1Thessalonians3:13  
1Thessalonians4:1 A khak bel thu in ute naute aw, note in bang ci nuntak ding ahi zongin, Pasian lungdamsak nadingin bang ci gamtat ding ahi zongin kote kiang pan na ngah khin zo uh hi. Tua ahih manin tua mah bangin na khangto semsem un ci-in Topa Zeisu paulamin, hong thuumin kong hansuah uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Topa Zeisu’ thuneihna tawh hih bang lamlahnate kong piak uh na thei uh hi. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Pasian’ deihna in note in numei tawh khialhna tangin na sian’tho nading uh ahi zongin," 
1Thessalonians4:4 Pasian thei lo Gentailte in numei leh pasal kilunggulh luatna a neih bangun om loin, note na vekpi-un sian’thona leh a meel kilawm tawh na pumpi uh na kep theih nading uh ahi zongin," 
1Thessalonians4:5  
1Thessalonians4:6 hih thu-ah kuamah in a u, a nau tungah kheemna tawh a khialh loh nading ahi zongin a hong deih hi. Kote in hilhin, thuciam ka hong piaksa uh bangin Topa in tua banga khialhna khempeuh a thuk mi ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pasian in kihhuaina-ah eite hong sam ahi kei hi, sian’thona-ah hong sam hi." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tua ahih ciangin hih thu a nial mi in mi bek nial ahi kei hi, note Kha Siangtho a hong pia Pasian nial ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ute naute ki-itna thu ahih leh, note kiangah gelhin mi khatpeuh kong piak nading a om kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note khat leh khat na ki-it nading uh Pasian’ hilhna a ngah mi na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Tua tham loin, Makedonia gam mun khempeuh ah a om ute naute khempeuh tungah tua bang na hih uh hi. Ahih hangin ute naute aw, note in khangin, na hauh semsem theih nadingun ahi zongin," 
1Thessalonians4:11 a pua lamah a om mite mai-ah akilawm gamta-in, sapna a om loh nadingin kote in ka hong vaikhak uh mah bangin, nuam takin omin, nomau’ na sem ciatin, nomau khut uh tawh na sep nadingun kote in hansuahin ka hong thuum uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:12  
1Thessalonians4:13 Ute naute aw, muan’na a nei lo midangte a dah bangun note in na dah loh nadingun a si mite’ thu thei loin na om ding uh ka deih kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Zeisu in a sih khit ciangin a thawhkik eite in i up leh, tua bangin Zeisu sungah a si mite zong amah tawh Pasian in a kha khawm ding hi." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Topa’ thupiak kholhna bangin kote in note kiangah kong gen uh thu in: Topa hong kumsuk dongin nungta-in a om lai eite in a si mite mai-ah omna ngah ding i hi peuhmah kei ding hi. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa mah in kikona tawh, vantungmi mangpa’ kikona tawh, Pasian’ peengkul tumna tawh, vantung pan hong kumsukin, Khazih sungah a sisa mite in a tho masa ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Tua khit ciangin nungta-a om lai eite in van kim lai-ah Topa dawn dingin tua mite tawh meii tungah puakna i ngah mah bangin, Topa tawh i omkhawm tawntung ding hi." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Tua ahih ciangin hih thute tawh note khat leh khat na kihehnem un. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ute naute aw, a hun leh a nite thu gelh a, kong piak nading a om kei hi." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, zan a, gutate hong pai mah bangin Topa’ Ni in hong tung ding hi ci-in note mah in a tel takin na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Amaute in, “Nopsakna a om hi, launa om lo hi,” ci-in a gen lai takun, ta gai numei tungah ta suah hun gimna a tun’ bangin amaute tungah kisiatna gal in thakhatin tung ding a, suahtakna neukha beek a ngah kei ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ahih hangin ute naute aw, tua Ni in guta mi bangin note tungah a hong tun’ nadingin ah note in khuamial lakah a om na hi kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note khempeuh in khuavak’ tate, sun lai’ tate na hi uh hi. Eite in zan tawh ahi zongin, khuamial tawh ahi zongin a kipawl i hi kei hi." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tua ahih ciangin adang mite a ihmut bangun eite ihmu loin, pilvangin kikem ni." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a ihmu mite in zanin a ihmu thei uh hi. A kham a guite in zong zanin a kham thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Eite i hih leh, sun lai tawh kipawl mite i hih ciangin ei mahmah kikepna nei-in, upna leh itna tawh kipawl awmdalna ahi zongin, bulhin, gupkhiatna’ lametna tawh kipawl siklukhu ahi zongin khu-in om ni." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Hehna thuak dingin Pasian in eite hong koih ahi kei hi. I Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin gupna i ngah nadingin hong koih a, eite i hing lai ahi zongin, i si zo ahi zongin Topa tawh i hin’ khawm nadingin, eite tangdingin sihna a thuak zo hi." 
1Thessalonians5:10  
1Thessalonians5:11 Tua ahih ciangin note in na hihsa uh bangin, khat leh khat kihansuah un la, khat leh khat kikipsak un." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Tua tham loin, ute naute aw, note lakah nasep a hahkatte leh Topa sungah hong makaih a, thu hong hilh mite na ciamteh un la," 
1Thessalonians5:13 a bawlnate hangah ki-itna lungsim tawh na zahtak nadingun, kote in kong thuum uh hi. Khat leh khat kilemin na om un." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ute naute aw, thadah zulhtat mite a kikep nadingun na hilh un, lungsim zawmte na hansuah un, thanemte na huh un, mi khempeuh tungah na lungduai un." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mi dangte tungah hehna na thukkik loh nadingun na kikeem un. Khat leh khat tungah ahi zongin, mi khempeuh tungah ahi zongin thuhoih lamsang hahkat tawntungin na bawl un." 
1Thessalonians5:16 A tawntungin na lungdam ta un. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Thungen niloh un. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Na khempeuh ah a hong hehpihna phat un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in tua bang na bawl dingun Zeisu Khazih hangah Pasian’ deihna ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Kha Siangtho’ huhna na mitsak kei un. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Pasian kamsangte’ thu na simmawh kei un. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Na khempeuh sinin ahoih nate na len tawntung un; 
1Thessalonians5:22 khialhna nam kim na tang un. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Nopna hong pia Pasian mah in note khempeuh hong siangthosak ta hen. Note lungsim, na kha leh na pumpi uh, i Topa Zeisu Khazih hong pai kik ciangin mawhsakna tawh a kipelh nadingun hong keem ta hen." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Note a hong sampa in thuman tawh dim ahih ciangin, tua bangin a hong bawl ding hi." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Ute naute aw, kote ading thu hong ngetsak un." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ute naute khempeuh, a siangtho kinapna tawh na kihopih un." 
1Thessalonians5:27 Hih lai ute naute khempeuh kiangah na simsak nadingun Topa paulamin note thu kong pia uh hi. 
1Thessalonians5:28 I Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha note tungah om ta hen. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paul, Silvanas leh Timoti te in i Pa Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih sungah kip-a a om Thesalonika pawlpi kong zasak uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih kiang pan hehpihna thupha leh nopna in nomau tungah om ta hen. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Ute naute aw, na upna uh khang mahmahin, note khempeuh khat leh khat na ki-itna uh zong khang ahih ciangin, kote in hih ding a kilawm bangin note hangin Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Tua ahih ciangin note in bawlsiatna khempeuh ahi zongin, na thuak uh gimna ahi zongin, thuakzawhna leh upna na neih uh kote in ngaihsunin, Pasian’ pawlpi lakah note hangin ka kisathei uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Note in Pasian’ Gam hangin gimna thuakin, tua Gam tawh a kilawm mi-in hong simna thu na ngah nadingun, thuman tawh Pasian’ thukhenna tua bangin a kilang hi." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa Zeisu in ama vangliatna tawh kipawl vantungmite tawh, vantung pan meikuangin hong kilang a, Pasian a thei lo mite, i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Lungdamna Thu a ngai lo mite daan a piak ciangin, note hong gimsak ngei mite tungah gimna ahi zongin, gimna a thuak ngei note tungah kote tawh nopsakna ahi zongin, Pasian in a thukkik nading thu in thuman ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians1:7  
2Thessalonians1:8  
2Thessalonians1:9 Tua Topa in ama misiangthote hangin minthan’na a ngah nading ahi zongin, kote’ teci pan’na thu note in um na hih uh ciangin a um mite khempeuh hangin nakpi-in lamdangsakna ngah nading ahi zongin, a hong pai ding Ni-ah tua mite in Topa maitang tawh ahi zongin, vangliatna tawh kipawl minthan’na tawh ahi zongin kikhenin, kisiat tawntungna ahi mawhna’ daantatna a thuak ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:10  
2Thessalonians1:11 Tua ahih ciangin i Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha tawh kizui-in tua i Topa Zeisu’ min in note hangin vangliatna a ngah nading ahi zongin, note in zong tua Topa hangin vangliatna na ngah nading uh ahi zongin note in hong sapna thupha a ngah ding a kilawm mi ci-in eite Pasian in hong ciamtehin," 
2Thessalonians1:12 hoihna tawh kipawl deihna khempeuh leh upna tawh kipawl gamtatna khempeuh a vangliatna tawh a kicin’ nadingin kote in note ading thu ka hong ngetsak tawntung uh hi. 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ute naute aw, i Topa Zeisu Khazih hong paina leh eite in ama kiangah i kikhopna thu panin," 
2Thessalonians2:2 Topa’ Ni a hong tun’ hun a nai zo bangin kamsan’na hang ahi zongin, kam pan pusuak thu hang ahi zongin, kote kiang pan hong khak uh lai hang ahi zongin, note in lungkiatna leh lunghimawh lin’na a manlangin na thuak loh nadingun ka hong thuum uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Kuamah in note bangmah hangin hong kheem kei hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua Ni hong tun’ ma-in langpan’na lian a piang masa ding a, kisiatna’ ta ahi Gilo Mi in hong piang ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Tua mi in thu nial a, pasian a kici khempeuh ahi zongin, a kibia na khempeuh ahi zongin, tuate sangin ama pumpi pahtawi zaw-in, Pasian’ biakinnpi sungah tu-in, “Pasian ka hi hi,” ci-in a pumpi lakin a om ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Keimah in note tawh ka omkhawm lai takin hih thu ka hong gen zo hi ci-in phawk lo na hi uh hiam? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Tua mi in ama hun laitak a kilatsak nadingin a kikhamna thu zong tu-in na thei uh hi. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a kiseel gitlohna in tu nangawnin na a sep laitak ahi hi. Ahih hangin a nial mi a kilakkhiat dongin a kham mi khat a om hi." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Tua ciangin a kiseel Gilo Mi a kilang ding hi. Tua mi Topa Zeisu in ama kam sung pan a pusuak hu tawh siasakin, ama hong kilatna’ vangliatna tawh a mangthang ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Tua a kiseel Gilo a hong pian’na thu in, Satan bawlna bangin zuauna tawh kipawl vangliatna, nalamdang leh dipkuat huaina apawl pawlte tawh ahi zongin," 
2Thessalonians2:10 kisiatna a ngah mite ading diklohna khemna apawl pawlte tawh ahi zongin a piang ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua mite in gupna a ngah nadingun ki-itna tawh kipawl thuman a sang kei uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in thuman thutak um loin, gitlohna-ah a nuamsa mi khempeuh in thukhenna a thuak nadingun, zuauthu um dingin, khemna in hahkat a, a sep theihna thu amaute lakah Pasian in a piangsak hi." 
2Thessalonians2:12  
2Thessalonians2:13 Ahih hangin Pasian in a it ute naute aw, note in Kha Siangtho’ sian’thosakna tawh, thuman thutak na upna uh tawh, gupna na ngah nadingun Pasian in a masa belin note hong teel ahih ciangin kote in hih ding a kilawm bangin, note’ hangin Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Tua bang deihna hangin ka thu hilh uh Lungdamna Thu tawh note hong sam zo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ vangliatna na ngah nading uh ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, kam sung pan hong pusuak thu hang ahi zongin, kote lai hang ahi zongin note in na sinsa uh ngeinate ah kipin lenin, deih un." 
2Thessalonians2:16 I Topa Zeisu Khazih mahmah leh, eite hong it-a hong hehnep tawntungna thu ahi zongin, hehpihna thupha tawh apha lametna ahi zongin a hong pia, i Pa Pasian in," 
2Thessalonians2:17 note’ lungsim hong hehnemin, na ahoih leh thu ahoih apawl apawlah note hong kipsak ta hen." 
2Thessalonians3:1 A khak bel thu in ute naute aw, Topa thu in note kiangah a piang mah bangin kizeelin, vangliatna a ngah nading leh," 
2Thessalonians3:2 a nial mite leh migilote’ khut tung pan kote hong hotkhiat nading thu hong ngetsak un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi khempeuh in thu-um mi ahi kei uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ahih hangin Topa in midik hi a, note hong kipsakin thu hoih lote tawh hong kipelhsak ding hi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Kote’ thupiakna bangin note in tu-in na gamta uh tham loin, a nung ciangin zong na gamta ding uh hi ci-in Topa suangin kote in ka lungkim uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Pasian it nading ahi zongin, Khazih bangin thuak zawh nading ahi zongin Topa in note lungsim hong hilh ta hen." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Ute naute aw, kote kiangah na san’ uh ngeina thu bangin a gamta lo, thadahin a zulhtat ute naute khempeuh na pel un ci-in i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ min tawh thu kong pia uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote hong piak lim zui-in note na gamtat nading uh a kilawm hi ci-in na thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote in note lakah thadah zulhtatin ka gamta kei uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:8 A man pia loin kuama an ka ne kei uh hi. Note lakah kuamah tungah vangik ka suah loh nadingun gimpi-in hahkatin, sun tawh zan tawh na ka sem uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Tua bang ka bawl uh ciangin a ngah ding, a la dingin kilawm ka kisak lohna hang uh hi loin, note zuih dingin komau pumpi in limpha ka suah nadingun ka bawl uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, kote in note tawh ka omkhawm lai takun, “Mi khat peuhmah in na a sep nop kei leh, tua mi in an ne kei hen,” ci-in thu kong pia uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Note lakah amau’ na bangmah sem lo a, amau tawh kisai lo thute ah a kitaaklah, a vakthap mi kimkhat a om hi cih thu ka za uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tua bang mite in nuamtakin nasemin, amau khut pana piang an a neek nadingun i Topa Zeisu Khazih suangin thu ka pia uh a, hansuahin ka zol uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ute naute aw, no na hih uh leh, thakiam loin ahoih nate na gamta un." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Hih lai sungah ka gelh uh thupiaknate mi khat peuhmah in a ngaih kei leh, tua mi na ciamteh un; a maizum nadingin amah tawh na kipawl kei un." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahih hangin gal bangin na ngaihsun kei un; sanggam bangin na hilh un. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Nopna’ Topa mahmah in note a tawntungin nopna apawl pawl hong pia ta hen. Topa in note khempeuh tawh omkhawm ta hen. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Keimah Paul in note hopihna ka khut tawh kong gelh hi. Hih banga ka gelh thuhilhna lai khempeuh pen a tuam a, keima ciaptehna ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians3:18 I Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha in note khempeuh tawh omkhawm ta hen. 
1Timothy1:1 Eite Honpa Pasian leh i lametna Khazih Zeisu thupiakna tawh Khazih Zeisu sawltak keimah Paul in: 
1Timothy1:2 Upna sungah ka ta taktak ahi Timoti kiangah kong zasak hi. Pa Pasian leh Khazih Zeisu i Topa’ hehpihna thupha, hehpihna leh nopna nangma tungah om ta hen." 
1Timothy1:3 Thu hilhna tuamdang hilh lo ding ci-in ahi zongin, upna hangah a om Pasian ngeina kipsak loin khat leh khat kinialna a bawl thei tanglai thu leh khang ciamtehna mang lo ding ci-in ahi zongin, mi kimkhat na kham nadingin Efesa khua-ah na om nadingin, Makedonia gamah ka pai laitakin ka hong thuum bangin om lai in, kong ci kik hi." 
1Timothy1:4  
1Timothy1:5 Hih thupiakna’ deihna bulpi in, lungsim siangtho, lungsim kisuan’na om lohna leh thuman upna tawh a kipawl itna ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:6 Tua gamtatnate mi kimkhatte in zui tawntung loin, a mawkna kampauna lamah a pialkhia uh hi." 
1Timothy1:7 Tuate in Thukham hilhna a sep nop uh hangin amau kampau ahi zongin, bang ci thu lamah amaute in a kiptakin ahilh uh ahi zongin a thei kei uh hi." 
1Timothy1:8 Thukham pen midik mi ading kikoih hi lo hi: midik lo mi, ukna thu ngai lo mi, Pasian bia lo leh mawhnei mi, a siangtho lo leh pausia a gen thei mi, a nu leh a pa a bawlsia thei mi, midang a that mi, numei tawh a khial mi, pasal leh pasal tawh a mawh mi, mi a gu thei mi, zuauthu a gen thei mi, hi lopi-a kiciam thei mite-a kipan thuhilh pha tawh a kilem lo khempeuhte adingin a kikoih hi ci-in thei-in tua thu a pha-a zang mi ading Thukham in phattuamna hong pia thei hi ci-in eite in i thei hi." 
1Timothy1:9  
1Timothy1:10  
1Timothy1:11 Tua bang i cih ciangin thupha a ngah a vanglian Pasian in kei hong kepsak Lungdamna Thu tawh a kituak hi. 
1Timothy1:12 Tua thu kei hong keemsak ahih ciangin tha hong dimsak i Topa Khazih Zeisu’ hehpihna ka phat hi. 
1Timothy1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh, keimah in Pasian a kosia ngei mi, a bawlsia ngei mi, a khialtat ngei mi ka hih hangin thudik mi ci-in Topa in hong ciamteh a, thuhilh za-ah hong koih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, upna nei lo, thu thei loin ka bawlna hang hi." 
1Timothy1:14 Eite Topa’ hehpihna thupha in zong Khazih Zeisu sungah a om upna leh itna tawh, a kigen khin zo loin tamin a om hi." 
1Timothy1:15 Zeisu Khazih in mawhneite gum dingin leitungah hong paisuk hi, a cihna thu in thuman thutak hi a, a vekpi-in san’ ding a kilawm hi. Tua mawhnei mite lakah keimah in a mawhnei bel mi ka hi hi." 
1Timothy1:16 Ahih hangin nuntak tawntungna ngah ding, a nung ciangin a um ding mite’ zuih ding lim ka hih nadingin mawhna a lianbel a nei keima tungah, Khazih in ama thuakzawhna lungsim khempeuh hong lah nadingin kei hong hehpih zo hi." 
1Timothy1:17 A om tawntung Kumpipa ahi, a si thei lo, mit in a muh theih loh, khat bek a om Pasian in a tawntungin pahtawina leh minthan’na ngah ta hen. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timoti aw, nangmah hong ngaihsunin a kigensa thu genkholhna kam bangin nang in upna leh theihna lungsim siangtho suangin, a pha galdona na do nadingin, a tungah ka hong gensa thupiakna kikoihna thu, nang ka hong pia hi." 
1Timothy1:19 Mi kimkhat in tua upna a nial uh a, amau upna teembaw a siasak uh hi." 
1Timothy1:20 Tua mite lakah Himenaius leh Alekzander a om uh hi. Tuate in thu gensiatna kam a gen nawn loh nading uh a kisin nadingun Satan ka keemsak zo hi. 
1Timothy2:1 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian biakna lamah nuamsa-in, a kilawm gamtatna apawlpawlte bawlin kilemin, nuam takin i om nadingin, kumpi-a kipan ukna a nei mi khempeuh leh mi pawl khempeuhte ading thungenin, thuumin, itna pia-in, hehpihna phatna bawl dingin a masa-in ka hong zol hi." 
1Timothy2:2  
1Timothy2:3 Tua bang hihna in hihna pha hi a, eite hong Honpa Pasian’ deihna tawh kituak ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:4 Tua Pasian in mi khempeuh in gupna ngahin, thuman thutak a theih nading a deih hi." 
1Timothy2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Pasian khat bek om a, Pasian leh mite kikal ah mimah ahi hong kikham Khazih Zeisu khat bek a om hi." 
1Timothy2:6 Tua Zeisu in mi khempeuh tankhia dinginah ama pumpi a pia hi. Amah a hun a tun’ ciangin teci pang dingin a om hi. 
1Timothy2:7 Keimah in tua teci pang mi za-ah ahi zongin, sawltak za-ah ahi zongin, upna thu leh thuman thutak thu Gentailte kiangah a hilh za-ah ahi zongin hong koih hi, ka cih ciangin thuzuau ka gen kei hi, thuman thutak ka gen hi." 
1Timothy2:8 Tua ahih ciangin mun khempeuh ah pasalte in hehna, kinialna om loin a khut siangtho lamto-in thu a nget ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Timothy2:9 Tua mah bangin numeite in a kipheek sam tawh ahi zongin, kham tawh ahi zongin, suangmanpha tawh ahi zongin a man pha puan tawh ahi zongin kizeem loin, zumhuaina tawh khuaval tat loin a kilawm puan tawh ahi zongin, Pasian thu a mang numeite’ kizep nading a kilawm puan tawh ahi zongin, Pasian a biaksiam numeite’ kizep nading a kilawm gamtatna pha tawh ahi zongin a kizep ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Timothy2:10  
1Timothy2:11 Numei in na khempeuh ah ukna mangin pau loin om hen. 
1Timothy2:12 Numei in thuhilh ding ahi zongin, pasal tungah a uk ding ahi zongin thu ka pia kei hi; amah in pau loin a om ding ka deih hi." 
1Timothy2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Adam a piangsak masa a, a nung ciangin Evua a piangsak hi." 
1Timothy2:14 Tua tham loin, Adam in kheemna a thuak kei hi, numei in kheemna thuak a, a khial hi." 
1Timothy2:15 Ahih hangin numeite in khuaval lohna, upna, itna leh siangthona-ah kipin a om uh leh, nausuahna-ah gupna a ngah ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:1 Thuhilhpa za a deih mi in na pha a deih hi, a cihna in thuman thutak ahi hi." 
1Timothy3:2 Tua ahih ciangin thuhilhpa in mawhsak nading tawh a kipelh mi, zi khat bek a nei mi, a lungsim kip mi, a khuaval lo mi, a kilawm a kituak-a gamta mi, zindo siam mi, thuhilh siam mi ahi ding hi." 
1Timothy3:3 Tua pa in zu ne loin, midang a sat a vua mi hi loin, a lungduai mi, thusia lamah a kiseel hat lo mi, sum a duh lo mi ahi ding hi." 
1Timothy3:4 Amah in ama inn pha takpi-in uk zoin a tate, na khempeuhah khuaval loin, a uk thei mi ahi ding hi." 
1Timothy3:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh, mi khat in a inn a uk zawh kei leh, Pasian’ pawlpi a bangci kep theih ding hiam?" 
1Timothy3:6 Kisaktheihna tawh hai-in, Dawimangpa’ thuak mawhna thukhenna a thuak ding lauhuai ahih ciangin pawlpi sungah a tum thak mi ahi kei ding hi." 
1Timothy3:7 Tua tham loin, amah in kosiatna leh mawhsakna leh Dawimangpa’ thangsiahna tawh a kipelh nadingin a pualam mi lakah zahtakna a ngah mi ahi ding hi." 
1Timothy3:8 Tua mah bangin pawlpi upate in zong khuaval lo mi, thu lang gen lo mi, zu dawnin a noptat lo mi, sum siangtho lo deih lo mi ahi ding uh a," 
1Timothy3:9 theihna lungsim siangtho tawh upna thu thukpi a zang ding uh hi. 
1Timothy3:10 Tua mite in a masa-in ze-etna thuak ta uh hen. Tua nung ciangin mawhsak nading a om kei leh, pawlpi upa na sem ta uh hen." 
1Timothy3:11 Tua mah bangin amau’ zite in zong khuaval lo ding uh a, mite’ dai nading thu gensiam mi hi loin thuman thutak a nei mi, na khempeuhah a diktat mi ahi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:12 Upate in zi khat bek nei-in, amau’ tate leh a inn uh a pha takpi-in uk ta uh hen." 
1Timothy3:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh, upa na pha takpi-a a semte in amau adingin a hoih a phatna ahi zongin, Khazih Zeisu sungah a om upna hangah launa om lohna a ngah uh hi." 
1Timothy3:14 Nangma kiangah a sawt loin ka hong pai ding hi ci-in ka lamet hangin, a sawt veipi ka khawl leh, nangmah in Pasian’ innpi sungah mite in bang ci gamtat ding uh hiam cih na theih nadingin, hih bang lai gelhin ka hong pia hi. Tua innpi in a nungta Pasian’ pawlpi, thuman thutak khuam leh bulpi ahi hi." 
1Timothy3:15  
1Timothy3:16 Pasian biakna thu thukpi in bang zah lian hiam cih nial nading a om kei hi: ‘Amah in pumpi-ah a kilang hi, a thumanna Kha Siangtho tawh a kilang hi, vantungmite in a mu uh hi, minam khempeuh lakah a thu kihilh hi, Leitung khempeuh ah a thu ki-um hi, minthan’na tawh vantungah kilak tohna a ngah hi.’" 
1Timothy4:1 Kha Siangtho in a tel taka a genkholh inah, a tawpna hun ciangin," 
1Timothy4:2 amau lungsim uh kisuan’na-ah sik sa tawh ciamtehna a ngah khit uh ciangin, zuauthu a gen thei mite’ simtatna hangin mi kimkhat in upna thu zui nawn loin, a kheem thei khate ahi zongin, dawigilote’ thuhilhna ahi zongin a ngai ding uh a, kiteen’ loh nading ahi zongin, thuman thutak um-a a thei mite in hehpihna phat-a a neek ding uh Pasian’ bawlsa an pawl pawlte tan’ ding ahi zongin, a kham ding uh hi." 
1Timothy4:3  
1Timothy4:4 Pasian’ bawlsa khempeuh a pha hi a, hehpihna phatin a kisan’ leh, bangmah tan’ ding a om kei hi." 
1Timothy4:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Pasian’ thu tawh ahi zongin, thungetna tawh ahi zongin a kisiangthosaksa ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:6 Hih nate nang in ute naute kiangah na hilh leh, upna thu leh tu dongin nang na zuih thuhilhna a hoih tawh kivakin, Khazih Zeisu’ nasem hoihpa na hi ding hi." 
1Timothy4:7 Numei teekte in a gen theih uh ahi mawkna tangthute paaikhia in. Pasian biakna lamah nuamsa a, na om nadingin na kiseksak in." 
1Timothy4:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh, pumpi ading kiseksakna in phattuamna tawmkha a pia thei hi; Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna in tu laitak nuntakna leh tu nung ciangin a piang ding nuntakna tawh kipawl thu kiciamna ngah a, na khempeuhah phattuamna hong pia thei hi," 
1Timothy4:9 a cihna kam in thuman thutak hi a, a vekpi-in san’ ding a kilawm kam zong ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:10 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh Gumpa ahi, a um mite a man takpi a gum, a nungta Pasian, eite in muangin i um a, hahkatin semin, simmawhna zong i thuak hi." 
1Timothy4:11 Hih thute vaikhak in la, hilh in." 
1Timothy4:12 Khangno lai na hih hanginah kuamah kisimmawhsak kei in. Thugenna, gamtat ngaihsutna, midang itna, upna, siangthona sung pan a um mite ading limpha na suak in." 
1Timothy4:13 Ka hong pai matengin Lai Siangtho simin, mi hansuahna leh thuhilhnate hahkatin om in." 
1Timothy4:14 Genkholhna tawh, pawlpi upate’ khutngakna tawh nang hong kipia thupha letsong zang loin om kei in." 
1Timothy4:15 Na khan’tohna mi khempeuh mai-ah a kilat nadingin hih nate deihpha in la, hahkat in." 
1Timothy4:16 Nangmah ahi zongin, na thuhilhna ahi zongin, kikeem in la, na om in. Hih nate-ah na kip tawntung in. Tua bang na hih leh, nangmah ahi zongin, na thu a ngaite ahi zongin gupna na ngahsak ding hi." 
1Timothy5:1 Khangham upate na taai kei in, pa bangin na thuum in. Tangvalte na sangampa bangin ahi zongin," 
1Timothy5:2 nupite nute bangin ahi zongin, nungakte na khempeuhah a siangtho tawh ahi zongin thu na hilh in." 
1Timothy5:3 Meigong taktak ahi numeite na zahtak in. 
1Timothy5:4 Ahih hangin ta leh tu a nei meigongnu ahih leh, a tute a tate in a masa-in amau innkuanpihte zahtakin, a pa, a pite’ hehpihna thukkik nading sin uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh, tua bang hihna in Pasian mai-ah a deihhuai ahi hi." 
1Timothy5:5 Meigongnu taktak hi a, khat guak a om lai numei in Pasian muang a, sun tawh zan tawh thungenin a om tawntung hi." 
1Timothy5:6 Ahih hangin a mawktatna-ah, nopsa-a a om meigongnu ahih leh, a nuntak hangin si-in a om hi." 
1Timothy5:7 Tua mite in mawhsakna tawh a kipelh nadingun hih thute vaikhak in. 
1Timothy5:8 Mi khat in ama mite, ahi takpi gen leeng ama innkuanpihte, a kep kei leh, thu-upna nial a, a um lo mite sangin a gilo zaw hi." 
1Timothy5:9 Meigongnu in kum sawmguk a phak kei leh, a min na khum kei in. Amah in pasal khat a nei ngei," 
1Timothy5:10 na pha sem a, maipha a ngah, a tate a khoi thei, zin a do thei, mi siangthote’ khe a sil thei, gimna thuakte a hehnem thei, nasepna a pha khempeuh a sem thei numei ahih leh, tua numei a min na khum ta in." 
1Timothy5:11 A khangno lai meigongnute ahih uh leh, a min uh khum kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, tua numeite in nopsakna lungsim nei-in, Khazih tawh kilem loin pasal nei nuam uh a," 
1Timothy5:12 a masa thuciamna siasak uh ahih ciangin thukhenna a thuak uh hi. 
1Timothy5:13 Tua tham loin, inn khat pan inn khatah vak kawikawi-in, thadah tham loin, kam tamin, a gen tuak lo nate genin, amau tawh kikum lo thu-ah a kihel thei uh hi." 
1Timothy5:14 Tua ahih ciangin a khangno meigongnute in pasal a neih nading, ta zong a neih nading, a inn sung a uk nading, i galte in hong gensiat theih loh nading ahih nadingun ka deih hi." 
1Timothy5:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh, a kimkhat in tu lai nangawnin Satan nung a zui uh hi." 
1Timothy5:16 Thu-um numei khatpeuh in a inn sungah meigongte a neih leh, pawlpi tungah van suan loin amahmah in vaak hen. Tua bang ahih leh, meigongnu taktak ahi-te pawlpi in a vaak thei ding hi." 
1Timothy5:17 Pawlpi a pha takpi-a ukte, a man takpi ci leeng Pasian’ thu gen a, thuhilhin a hahkatte in, a zah nih zahtakna ngah ding a kilawm na ciamteh in." 
1Timothy5:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh: “Buh a cil bawng’ kam na hencip kei in,” leh “Nasemte in thaman ngah ding a kilawm hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho in a gen hi." 
1Timothy5:19 Teci nih bang thum bang a om kei leh, pawlpi ukpa tungah mawhsakna kam na ngai kei in." 
1Timothy5:20 Midangte in zong a lau theih nadingun, a khial mite, mi khempeuh mai-ah na taai in." 
1Timothy5:21 Thu ma khen loin, gup tuam neihna lungsim tawh bangmah bawl loin, hih thute na zuih nadingin Pasian’ mai, Khazih Zeisu’ mai leh a kiteel vantungmite mai-ah pha takpi-in thu kong pia hi." 
1Timothy5:22 Thu ngaihsun masa loin kuama tungah a manlangin khutngakna nei kei in. Midangte mawhna tawh na kikum kei in, nangma nuntakna siangtho sak in." 
1Timothy5:23 Na gilpi ading leh na cinatna ading tu-a kipan tui bek dawn loin leenggahzu tawm na zang in. 
1Timothy5:24 Mi kimkhatte a gitlohna uh kilangin thu kikhen masa thei hi. Mi kimkhat a gitlohna un, a nung uh hong zui hi." 
1Timothy5:25 Tua mah bangin a kilang gamtatna hoih a om thei hi, a kilanglo gamtatna hoih a kiseel zo kei hi." 
1Timothy6:1 Pasian’ min leh a thuhilhna in gensiatna a thuak loh nadingin, hakkol nuai-ah a omte in a tote uh a zahtak mahmah nading uh kilawm hi ci-in ciamteh uh hen." 
1Timothy6:2 A tote in thu-um mi ahih uh leh, unau khat ahih uh ciangin nasim lo, thudon loin, om kei uh hen. A nasepna-ah noptuamna a ngah mite in, a um mite leh it tuak mite ahih uh ciangin a nasep pha takin seem zaw ta uh hen. Hih thute hilh in la, hansuah in." 
1Timothy6:3 Thuhilhna tuam hilhin, i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ kam ahi, kam siangtho ahi zongin, Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna tawh a kilawm thuhilhna ahi zongin, a mang lo mi khatpeuh a om leh," 
1Timothy6:4 tua mi in kisathei-in, bangmah thei loin thu kidotna kikumin, a kam bek tawh a seel mihai ahi hi. Tua bang a bawl leh, en’na, kitotna, gensiatna, hazatna tawh upkhialhna lungsim neihna in thuman thu tawh a kipelh mite kitotnate a piang thei hi." 
1Timothy6:5 Tuate in Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna in sum hauhna hong piangsak hi ci-in a um uh hi. 
1Timothy6:6 Lungkimin Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna in hauhna lianpi a piangsak thei hi. 
1Timothy6:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh, eite in leitungah bangmah pua loin i tung a, bangmah pua loin i paikhia ding hi." 
1Timothy6:8 Tua ahih ciangin neek ding, puansilh ding a om zah tawh lungkimin i om ding hi." 
1Timothy6:9 Sum a hau nuam mite in kheemna sungah, thang awkna sungah, hai-a noptuamna a siasak thei, deihgawhna atuam atuamte sungah a kia thei uh hi. Tua bang deihgawhna in mite kisiatna sungah a tum mangsak thei hi." 
1Timothy6:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh, sum hauh nopna in khialhna pawl khempeuh bul ahi hi. Mi kimkhat in sum hauh nopna hangin upna lampi pan paikhia-in, lunggimna apawlpawl tawh amau pumpi uh a vut let zo uh hi." 
1Timothy6:11 Pasian’ mi aw, nang na hih leh, tua mawhnate pel in la, dikna, Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna, upna, itna, thuakzawhna, lungnemnate na phak matengin na delh in." 
1Timothy6:12 Upna thu tawh kipawl galdona a pha na do in. Nuntak tawntungna na len in. Tua nuntakna ngah dingin nang in hong sapna na ngah a, teci tampite maiah na pang ngei hi." 
1Timothy6:13 Topa Zeisu Khazih hong kilat dongin nang in a nin baang loin mawhsak nading om loin, thupiakna na zuih nadingin na khempeuh a nungta sak Pasian mai-ah ahi zongin Pontias Pilat maiah pha takpi-a thuman teci a pang Khazih Zeisu mai-ah ahi zongin, keimah in nangma tungah thu kong pia hi." 
1Timothy6:14  
1Timothy6:15 Sihna tawh kipelh mi khat bek ahi, kuamah in a naih theiloh khuavak sungah om a, kuamah in a muh ngei loh, a muh theih loh, thupha a ngah Topa khat bek ahi kumpite’ Kumpipa, topate’ Topa in ama ciamtehna hun hong tun’ ciangin tua Topa’ hong kilat khiatna hong lak ding hi. Tua Pasian in pahtawina, vangliatna ngah tawntung ta hen. Amen." 
1Timothy6:16  
1Timothy6:17 Hih leitungah sum hau mite in lungsim kiliatsakna tawh kipelhin, a kip tawntung thei lo sum hauhna muang loin, eite lungdam nading na khempeuh a kicingin hong pia Pasian muangin, nuntakna taktak ahi nuntakna ngah nadingin, hong tung ding hun ciangin, amau ading a bulpi pha zong kholin, midangte tungah thupha bawlna, gamtat hoihna kicingin, midang hopnopna lungsim nei-in, khat leh khat kipawl nadingin kilemna thu bawl nading thu na pia in." 
1Timothy6:18  
1Timothy6:19  
1Timothy6:20 Timoti aw, nang hong kipia na, a pha takpi-in kem in. Nate’ thu pilna hi ci a, kiphuak khial, pilna thu tawh kipawl hi lo a, mawkna kamte, nate’ pilna khamna kinialnate na pel in." 
1Timothy6:21 Tua nate’ pilna, mi kimkhat in a mang uh a, a bawl manun upna lam pan a pial zo uh hi. Nangma tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen." 
2Timothy1:1 Khazih Zeisu sungah a om nuntakna hong pia ning ci-in a thuciamna mah bangin, Pasian’ deihna hangin Khazih Zeisu sawltak keimah Paul in:" 
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka tapa Timoti kong zasak hi. Pa Pasian leh i Topa Khazih Zeisu kiangpan hehpihna thupha, hehpihna leh nopna nang tungah om ta hen." 
2Timothy1:3 Keimah in na khitui luang phawk kikin, ka lungdamna a kicin’ nadingin nangmah kong mu nuam a, na pi Lois leh na nu Eunis sungah a masa-in kip-a, a om upna ahi zongin, ka lungkim mah bangin nangma sungah kiphatsakna hi loin a om upna ahi zongin ka phawk a, sun tawh zan tawh thu ka nget ciangin, nangmah hong mangngilh loin hong ngaihsunin, ka pute ka pate in a biak uh bangin ka lungsim kisuan’na om lo siangthona tawh ka biak Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat hi." 
2Timothy1:4  
2Timothy1:5  
2Timothy1:6 Tua ahih ciangin nangma tungah ka khut ngakna tawh, nang, Pasian in hong piak letsong thupha na kuan’sak det nadingin kei in ka hong phawksak hi." 
2Timothy1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Pasian in eite launa lungsim hong pia ahi kei hi; vangliatna, itna leh ei-le-ei ki-uk zawhna Kha hong pia zo hi." 
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahih ciangin Topa teci pan’na ahi zongin, tua Topa’ thongkiapa ahi keimah ah ahi zongin zum kei in. Pasian hong piak a vangliatna bangin Lungdamna Thu tawh kizomin gimna na thuak in." 
2Timothy1:9 Tua Pasian in eite gamtatna hang hi lo, tang lai a hun hong tun’ ma-in, Khazih Zeisu sungah eite ading ama hanciamna leh a hong piak hehpihna a ngaihsut kholhsa bangin eite hong gumkhia a, a siangtho sapna tawh hong sam hi." 
2Timothy1:10 Tua hehpihna thupha in eite hong Gumpa Topa Zeisu Khazih hong kilatna hangin tu-in a kilang zo hi. Tua Topa in sihna mangthang sak a, nuntakna leh a kisia thei lo nuntakna, Lungdamna Thu hangin hong langsak hi." 
2Timothy1:11 Tua thu hilh ding za-ah ahi zongin, sawltak za-ah ahi zongin, laihilh za-ah ahi zongin kei hong koih zo hi." 
2Timothy1:12 Tua thu hangah hih gimnate zong ka thuak hi. Ahih hangin ka zum kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, ka uppa ka thei a, ama kiangah ka piak nate zong tua Ni dongin a kem zo ding hi ci-in ka um hi." 
2Timothy1:13 Keima kiangah na zaksa, na ngahsa a pha hilhnate, Khazih Zeisu sungah a om upna leh itna tawh na lenkip in." 
2Timothy1:14 Nangma kiangah hong kipia a pha na, eite sungah a om Kha Siangtho huhna tawh na kem in." 
2Timothy1:15 Asia gamah a om mi khempeuh in kei kiangpan a pialkhiat zawh uh na thei hi. Tuate lakah Figelas leh Hermogenes zong a om uh hi. 
2Timothy1:16 Topa in Onesiforas’ innkuanpihte tungah hehpihna tungsak ta hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh, amah in kei tam veipi hong thakhauh sak hi. Keima sikkhau hangin zong zum loin," 
2Timothy1:17 Rom khuapi sungah a hong tun’ ciangin hahkatin kei hong zong a, hong mu hi." 
2Timothy1:18 Amah in tua Ni ciangin Topa khut sung panin hehpihna a ngah nading Topa in thupha pia ta hen. Amah in Efesa khua-ah zong bang zah takin hong kem hiam cih nangmah in a pha takpi-in na thei hi. 
2Timothy2:1 Tua ahih ciangin ka ta aw, nangmah in, Khazih Zeisu sungah a om hehpihna thupha tawh thahatin om in." 
2Timothy2:2 Teci tampi mai-ah keima kiang pan na zaksa nate, dikna tawh dimin midangte a hilhsawn thei ding mite’ tungah na ap in." 
2Timothy2:3 Nang in Khazih Zeisu’ galkap siampa bangin keimah tawh gimna na thuak khawm in. 
2Timothy2:4 Na a sep lai takin galkap in amah galkap a tumsak mi’ deihna bangin ahih theih nadingin, hih leitung vaite tawh a kikai-awk sak kei hi." 
2Timothy2:5 Tua mah bangin mi khat in tai a kidem ciangin ngeina bangin a kidem kei leh, a gualzote’ ngah lukhu a ngah kei ding hi." 
2Timothy2:6 Nasep hahkat lokho mi in a gahte a ngah masapen ahi ding hi. 
2Timothy2:7 Ka thu na ciamteh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in na khempeuh ah pilna a hong pia ding hi." 
2Timothy2:8 Kei’ gen Lungdamna Thu bangin David’ suan ahi, sihna pan a hingkik Zeisu Khazih na ngaihsun in." 
2Timothy2:9 Tua Lungdamna Thu hangin keimah in mi gilo bangin khau kikhihna dongin gimna ka thuak hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ thu ahih leh, a kikhihna om lo hi." 
2Timothy2:10 Tua ahih ciangin a kiteel mite in zong a tawntung minthan’na tawh Khazih Zeisu sungah gupna a ngah nadingun na khempeuh ka thuak hi. 
2Timothy2:11 A dikna thu panin: ‘Amah tawh sihna i thuakkhawm zawh leh, Amah tawh i hingkhawm ding hi;" 
2Timothy2:12 I thuak leh, amah tawh i maangkhawm ding hi. Eite in amah i nial leh, Amah in eite hong nial ding hi." 
2Timothy2:13 Eite i muanhuai loh hangin, Ama muanhuaina a kip den hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, Amah in amah leh amah a kitheihmawh bawl thei kei hi." 
2Timothy2:14 Hih thu teng amaute na phawksak in. Bangmah phattuamna a piangsak lo, a za mite’ lungsim a siasak ding kam bek hangin kinialna a om loh nadingin, Topa mai-ah amaute ciamna thu na pia in." 
2Timothy2:15 Nangmah in zumhuaina om loin thuman thutak a man takin a khen theipa na suah nadingin Pasian mai-ah a deihhuai mi suakin, na pumpi na piak nadingin ah hahkat in." 
2Timothy2:16 Thutak hi lo, a mawkna kamte na tang in." 
2Timothy2:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh, tuate in Pasian biak lohna lamah khangto-in, a dam ngei lo meima bangin a ne ding hi. Tua mite lakah Himenaius leh Filetas a om uh hi." 
2Timothy2:18 Amaute in, “Misite’ thawhkikna a kheng zo hi,” ci-in thu-upna lam pan pialin mi kimkhatte’ upna a siasak uh hi." 
2Timothy2:19 Ahih hangin, “Topa in ama mite a thei hi,” ci-in ahi zongin, “Topa’ min a muangte in dik lohna pan paikhia hen,” ci-in ahi zongin ciamtehna a om, a to mahmah Pasian’ bulpi in, kipin a om hi." 
2Timothy2:20 Inn lian mahmah sungah kham leh ngun nate bek a om kei hi; sing nate leh lei nate zong a om hi. Tua nate lakah kimkhat in minthan’na ding a om hi, kimkhat in minthan’ loh nading a om hi." 
2Timothy2:21 Tua ahih ciangin tua nate tawh ama pumpi a kisiangthosak mi in minthan’na na, siangthona na, inn neipa zat ding a kilawm na, nasepna pha pawl khempeuh ading a suak ding hi." 
2Timothy2:22 Khangno’ deihgawhna lungsim na tang in la, lung siangthona tawh Pasian kiangah thu a ngen mite tawh, dikna, upna, itna leh nopna delhin na zuikhawm in." 
2Timothy2:23 Hai-a pilna om lo thu kidotna in kitotna piangsak thei hi ci-in thei in la, tang in." 
2Timothy2:24 Pasian’ sila in a kitawng thei kei hi, mi khempeuhte thu dam takin ahih thei mi, thu a hilh thei mi, a thuak zo mi ahi ding hi." 
2Timothy2:25 A kam a nial mite in thuman a theih nadingun Pasian in kisikkikna pia kha ding a, Dawimangpa in ama deihna zui dingin thangsiah-a a awk mite phawkin, tua awkna pan suahtakna a ngah khak theih nadingun lungnemna tawh thuhilh mi ahi ding hi." 
2Timothy2:26  
2Timothy3:1 A nunung bel nite lai takin a haksa hunte a hong piang ding hi ci-in na ciamteh in. 
2Timothy3:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh, mite in amau pumpi uh it mi, sum it mi, a kisathei mi, lungkhauh mi, mi gensia thei mi, a nute a pate thu a mang lo mi, hehpihna a phawk lo mi, a siangtho lo mi," 
2Timothy3:3 ngeina bang itna a nei lo mi, kitotna lungsim nei mi, mi a gendai thei mi, a pumpi kikem zo lo mi, a hangsan mi, a hoih lam a deih lo mi," 
2Timothy3:4 thuciam a siasak mi, thuhilh a ngai nuam lo mi, kisaktheihna tawh a hai thei mi, Pasian sangin leitung nopsakna a it zaw mi," 
2Timothy3:5 Pasian biakna puatham teng zui uh a, ahih hangin a vangliatna a nial mi ahi ding uh hi. Tua bang mite na peel in." 
2Timothy3:6 Tua mite lakah simtatin innte sungah a lut khit uh ciangin, deihgawhna atuam atuam zui-in," 
2Timothy3:7 a kihilh niloh hangin cikmah hunin thuman thutak a thei thei lo numei haite’ thuzawh mite a om uh hi. 
2Timothy3:8 Zannes leh Zabres in Moses a nial uh mah bangin tua mite in zong thuman thutak a nial uh hi. Amaute a lungsim uh kisia-in upna thu-ah thudotna a thuak zo lo mi ahi uh hi. 
2Timothy3:9 Tua mi nihte’ haina in mi khempeuh mai-ah a kilang mah bangin, hih mite’ haina zong kilang ding a, amaute in sotto khangto thei lo ding uh hi." 
2Timothy3:10 Nang na hih leh, keima thu hilhna, ka gamtatna, ka hanciamna, ka upna, ka lungduaina, ka itna, ka zawhna, ka thuak bawlsiatna leh gimna-a kipan," 
2Timothy3:11 Antiok khua, Ikonium khua leh Listra khuate-ah ka thuak gimna na thei hi. Tua thu khempeuhte pan Topa in kei hong gumkhia hi." 
2Timothy3:12 Ahi hi. Khazih Zeisu sungah kipin a nungta nuam mi khempeuhte in zong bawlsiatna a thuak ding uh hi. 
2Timothy3:13 A gilo leh mi kheem thei mite a hih uh leh, gilo semsem ding uh a, midangte kheemin, amau mahmah zong a kikheem ding uh hi." 
2Timothy3:14 Nang na hih leh, na sinsa thu leh na lungsim sunga na san’sa thu-ah ahi zongin, Khazih Zeisu sunga upna tungtawn a, gupkhiatna na ngah nadingin lungpilna a hong pia thei Lai Siangtho, na neu lai-a kipanin na theihsa thu ahi zongin, ciamteh in la, tua na sinsa, na upsa thute-ah kipin om in." 
2Timothy3:15  
2Timothy3:16 Pasian in ama humopna tawh hong piak Lai Siangtho-a om khempeuh in, Pasian’ mi in kicing a, ahoih na apawlpawlte a sep theih nading a, a kigingkhol mi a suah nadingin, thu hilh ding, mawhna lak ding, diktat nading thu hilh ding, leh thuman thutak hilh nadingin thupha a bawl hi." 
2Timothy3:17  
2Timothy4:1 Pasian mai-ah ahi zongin, a nungta mi leh mi si tungah thu a khen ding Khazih Zeisu mai-ah ahi zongin, Zeisu hong kilat nading leh ama kumpigam suangin thu ka hong piakna in:" 
2Timothy4:2 Pasian thu hilh in, a hun a om zongin a om kei zongin hahkatin mawhna lakin, taai in; lungnemna khempeuh tawh thu hilhin hansuah in." 
2Timothy4:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh, mite in thu hilhna pha mang loin, a bil uh thakin, amau deihgawhna bang thuhilh a tampi, amau ading a koih ding uh a," 
2Timothy4:4 thuman thutak ngai loin, tangthu ngai-in a paikhiat hun uh a tung ding hi." 
2Timothy4:5 Nangmah na hih leh, na khempeuh sungah na lungsim na kikeem in, gimna thuak in, thuhilh sia’ na mah na sem in; nang nasep ding nasepna a vekpi-in na sem in." 
2Timothy4:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh, keimah in tu lai takin biakna tau tungah kisungin ka om lai hi. Ka paina hun a hong tung zo hi." 
2Timothy4:7 Galdona a pha ka do zo hi, tai nading lam a mong dongin ka tai zo hi, upna thu ka keem zo hi." 
2Timothy4:8 Tu-a kipanin dikna lukhu, keimah ading a kikoih khol zo hi. Tua Ni ciangin thuman tawh a khenpa in tua lukhu kei hong pia ding hi. Keimah bek hong pia kei ding hi, ama kilat ding thu a lamente khempeuh zong a pia ding hi." 
2Timothy4:9 Ka kiangah a manlangin na hong pai nading hahkat in. 
2Timothy4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Demas in tu lai nuntakna a it maninah kei hong taisanin, Thesalonika khua-ah a pai zo hi. Kresen in Galati gamah a pai zo hi. Titu in Dalmatia gamah a pai zo hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek ka kiangah a om hi. Marka hong zawn in la, hong tonpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, ama nasepna ka phattuampih mahmah hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek ka kiangah a om hi. Marka hong zawn in la, hong tonpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, ama nasepna ka phattuampih mahmah hi." 
2Timothy4:12 Tikhikas ahih leh, Efesa khua-ah ka sawl zo hi." 
2Timothy4:13 Troas khua-ah Karpas kiangah ka koih ka puanza leh laibute, leh a man takin savun lai dalte ahi zongin, na hong pai ciangin hong pua in." 
2Timothy4:14 Sumsungpa Alekzander in keimah tungah a hoih lo tampi hong bawl hi. Amah in a hihna bangin ama tungah Topa in a thuk ding hi. 
2Timothy4:15 Tua mi nangmah zong na kikeem in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, amah in eite thu nakpi-in a nial hi." 
2Timothy4:16 Amasa-a ka kihutna thu ka gen lai takin keima lamah kuamah a om kei hi, mi khempeuh in kei hong taisan uh hi. Tua thu hangin amaute tungah mawhsakna om kei hen." 
2Timothy4:17 Thuhilhna khempeuh ka hilh theih nading ahi zongin, Gentail mi khempeuh in a zak nadingun ahi zongin, Topa in kei lamah om a, keima tha hong dimsak a, humpinelkai’ kam sung pan hong honkhia hi." 
2Timothy4:18 Topa in thu hoih lo khempeuh pan hong honkhia a, ama vantung dongin hong kha ding hi. Tua Topa in a tawntungin minthan’na ngah ta hen. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Prisilla leh Akuila a kipan Onesiforas’ innkuante na hopihsak in. 
2Timothy4:20 Erastas in Korin khua-ah a om lai hi. Trofimas in cina ahih ciangin Miletas khua-ah ka nusia hi. 
2Timothy4:21 Phalbi ma-in hong pai dingin na hahkat in. Eubulus, Pudens, Linas leh Klandia akipan ute naute khempeuh in nang hong hopih uh hi." 
2Timothy4:22 Topa in na kha tawh omkhawm ta hen. Nangma tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen. 
Titus1:1 Zuauthu a gen thei lo Pasian in tanglai hun a tun’ ma-in thuciam a, eite Honpa Pasian’ thukham bangin kei hong piak thuhilhna tawh a kilawm hunte-ah, Pasian thu a latsakna tawh a kipawl, nuntak tawntungna lamenin, Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna tawh a kipawl thuman thutak theih nading ahi zongin, Pasian’ teel mite’ up nading ahi zongin, Pasian’ sila ahi Zeisu Khazih’ sawltak keimah Paul in:" 
Titus1:2  
Titus1:3  
Titus1:4 A kibang khawm upna thu sungah ka ta taktak ahi Titu kiangah thu ka hong zasak hi. Pa Pasian leh eite Honpa Khazih Zeisu kiang pan hehpihna thupha leh nopna nangma tungah om ta hen. 
Titus1:5 Keimah in nang kong vaikhak mah bangin Krete gamah a kisam lai nate vaihawm kikin, khua khempeuh ah pawlpi upa koih nading tua gamah nang kong nusia zo hi."
