Titus1:6 Upate in mawhsak nading tawh a kipelh mi, zi khat bek a nei mi, a tate zong thu-um mi hi-in, leitung nopsakna-ah uang lua hi ci-in mawhsakna a nei lo, thumang lo mi hi lo ding uh hi." 
Titus1:7 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, Pawlpi siapa in Pasian’ neihsa kempa bangin mawhsak nading tawh a kipelh mi ahi ding hi. Ama deihna a zui mi, mi lungtom mi, zu ne a, a kitawng thei mi, midang a vua thei mi, a siangtho lo a deihgawh mi ahi kei ding hi." 
Titus1:8 Zindo a siam thei mi, a hoih lam a deih mi, khuaval zulhtat lo mi, a dik mi, a siangtho mi, a pumpi a kikeem zo mi ahi ding hi." 
Titus1:9 Tua tham loin, amah in thuhilhna siangtho tawh hansuah theih nading ahi zongin, a nial mite kam a thukkik theih nading ahi zongin, thuhilhna thu tawh kilawm dikna kam a zui tawntung mi ahi ding hi." 
Titus1:10 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, ukna mang loin, mawkna kam genin midangte a kheem thei mi tampi om uh hi; vunatna a thuak mite lakah a om thei bel uh hi." 
Titus1:11 Tua mite kam kihu cip ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, amaute in sum siangtho lo hangin ahilh tuak lo thu hilhin, innkuanpih khempeuh lumlet thei uh hi." 
Titus1:12 Amau lakah amau mipawl ahi kamsangpa khat in: “Krete mite in a zuau thei mi, ganhing gilo, anhai thadah mi ahi uh hi,” a ci zo hi." 
Titus1:13 Hih teci thu a man hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Judah mite tangthu ahi zongin, thuman thutak a paaikhia mite’ thukhamte ahi zongin thudon loin, upna thu-ah a kip nadingun amaute nakpi-in taai-in na hilh in." 
Titus1:14  
Titus1:15 Mi siangtho mai-ah na khempeuh a siangtho hi. A siangtho lo leh thu-um lo mite mai-ah ahih leh, bangmah a siangtho kei hi; amaute lungsim uh leh amau lungsim-theihna uh zong a siangtho kei hi." 
Titus1:16 Amaute in, “Pasian ka thei tel uh hi,” a cih uh hangin, a gamtatna uh tawh Pasian a nial uh hi. A kihhuai mi, thungai lo mi, nasepna hoih khat beek ah kiman’na om lo mi ahi uh hi." 
Titus2:1 Nangmah na hih leh thuhilhna siangtho tawh a kituak thute na hilh in. 
Titus2:2 A teek pasalte in a pumpi deihna khaam nading, a khuaval zulhtat loh nading, a lungkip nading, upna lamah a kip nading, itna a neih nading, a thuak zawh nading na hilh in." 
Titus2:3 Tua mah bangin numei teekte in zong Pasian’ thu tawh kilawm gamtatna a bawl nading, midangte a gendai loh theih nading, kham lua-a leenggahzu’ sila ahih loh nading, thu hoih a hilh theih nading tham loin, Pasian’ thu in gensiatna a thuak loh nadingin a khangno numeite in a pasal a it ding, a tate a it ding," 
Titus2:4  
Titus2:5 a khuaval zulhtat loh ding, mi siangtho hi ding, a inn sung khempeuh a keem ding, migi ding, a pasal’ ukna a mang ding, thu a hilh theih nadingun na hilh in." 
Titus2:6 Tua mah bangin tangvalte in zong khuaval zulhtat loh nading na hilh in. 
Titus2:7 Na khempeuh ah gamtatna pha lim, nangmah mah in na pumpi-in na lak in. Thu na hilh ciangin kheemna thu om loin, khuaval zulhtat loin, mawhsakna om lo thu siangtho na hilh in." 
Titus2:8 Tua bang na hih leh, lang khatah a om mi in eite hong gensiat nading thu ngah loin a maizum ding hi." 
Titus2:9 Silate in eite Honpa Pasian’ thuhilhna khempeuh ah a zep theih nadingun amau tote’ ukna mangin, nial loin, na khempeuh a deihhuai mi hih nading leh gu sim loin na khempeuh ah dikna a kilatsak nadingun, hansuahin zol in." 
Titus2:10  
Titus2:11 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, thupha lametna, a lian Pasian leh eite Honpa Topa Zeisu Khazih, minthan’na tawh hong kilat ding eite in lamenin, Pasian thu tawh kituak lo gamtatna leh deihgawhnate" 
Titus2:12  
Titus2:13 nialin; tu lai hunin khuaval zulhtat lohna, thuman gamtatna, Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna bawl nadingin, Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong kilang a, mi khempeuh kiangah gupna thu hong paipih zo hi." 
Titus2:14 Tua Topa in mawhna khempeuh sungpan eite hong tankhia dingin ahi zongin, gamtatna ahoihte ah lungsim utna nei-in, ama hong neihtuam dingin, ama ading siangthosak dingin ahi zongin eite ading ama pumpi a pia hi." 
Titus2:15 Hih thute hilhin, hansuahin zol in, thuneihna aana khempeuh tawh amaute na taai in. Kuamah kisimmawhsak kei in." 
Titus3:1 Mite in gam ukte leh mangte’ ukna uh a man’ nading, nasepna pha khempeuh a sep nading a kigin’ kholh nading;" 
Titus3:2 kuamah gensia loin, kitawng loin, lungkhuah nei loin, mi khempeuh tungah lungnem takpi nading a ngaihsut nadingun thu na hilh in." 
Titus3:3 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, nidang lai-inah eite in zong a pil lo mi, thungai lo mi, kheemna a thuak mi, deihgawhna a pawlpawl leh gualnop uukna’ sila i hi a, hazatna, en’na a gamta mi, a muhdahhuai mi, khat-le-khat kimudah mi i hi ngei hi." 
Titus3:4 Eite Honpa Pasian’ hehpihna leh mite a hong itna hong kilat ciangin," 
Titus3:5 eite gamtatna pha hang hi loin ama hehpihna bangin nihvei suahna tawh kipawl sawp siangna tawh ahi zongin, Kha Siangtho’ hong bawlphat thakna tawh hong gum hi." 
Titus3:6 Eite Honpa Zeisu Khazih hangin eite tungah tua Kha Siangtho a kicingin hong sung hi. 
Titus3:7 Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hangin diktan’sakna i ngah khit ciangin nuntak tawntungna lametna bangin a luah mite i hih nading ahi hi. 
Titus3:8 Hih thu in thuman thutak ahi hi. Hih thu ngaihsunin Pasian a um mite in gamtatna ahoihte ahih tawntung nading a kikep nadingun, hahkatin na hilh nading ka hong deih hi. Hih thute a pha uh tham loin mite’ phattuamna a piangsak thei uh hi." 
Titus3:9 Thu kidong hainate leh khangciamtehna laite, kitotnate, thukham hangin kiseelnate tang in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, tua nate in phattuamna hong pia lo uh hi, a mawkna ahi uh hi." 
Titus3:10 Thu nial a, kikhenthang mi, khatvei, nihvei bang taai-in na hilh khit ciangin," 
Titus3:11 tua bang mi in amahmah thu a kikhen manin mawhna bawlin khialhna ahih mi ahih thei-in paaikhia in. 
Titus3:12 Artemas ahi zongin, Tikhikas ahi zongin, na kiangah kong sawl ciangin Nikopolis khua keima kiangah na hong pai nading na hahkat in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, tua khua-ah phalbi hun sung teng khawl ning ci-in ka hanciam zo hi." 
Titus3:13 Sitni Zenas leh Appolos-te in sapna a neih loh nadingun hahkatin na kha in. 
Titus3:14 I mite in zong a gah nei lo mi hi loin, kisapnate a ngah nadingun, gamtatna ahoih a hih tawntung nadingun sin uh hen." 
Titus3:15 Keima kiangah a om mi khempeuh in nang hong hopih uh hi. Upna sungah ko hong itte na hopihsak in. Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen. 
Philemon1:1 Khazih Zeisu hanga thongkia kei, Paul leh i sanggampa Timoti in kote tawh nasem a, ka it uh Filemon," 
Philemon1:2 leh i sanggamnu Apfia leh ko tawh galkap ahi khawm Arkhippas akipan, nangma inn sungah a om pawlpite ka hong zasak uh hi." 
Philemon1:3 I Pa Pasian leh i Topa Zeisu Khazih kiangpan hehpihna thupha leh nopna note tungah om ta hen. 
Philemon1:4 Nangmah in Topa Zeisu umin, misiangthote khempeuh na it ci-in thu ka zak ciangin ka Pasian’ hehpihna ka phat tawntunga nang ading thungetsakin ka om hi." 
Philemon1:5  
Philemon1:6 Upna na zopna a vanglian-in, Khazih Zeisu sungah eite’ aa ahi, ahoih na a om khempeuhte midangte in a theih nadingun thu ka ngen hi." 
Philemon1:7 Sanggam aw, nangma hangin misiangthote in lungsim thaksuahna a ngah uh ahih ciangin nangma itna ngaihsunin lungdam mahmahin ka nuam zo hi." 
Philemon1:8 Tua ahih ciangin nang in na bawl dinga kilawmte thu kong piak nadingin keimah in Khazih sungah launa lungsim om loin puteekpa hong kici keimah Paul in, tu-in zong Zeisu Khazih thongkia ka hih maninah, itna tawh nangma kiangah kong thuum zaw hi." 
Philemon1:9  
Philemon1:10 Kikhihna ka thuak lai takin ka tapa a hong suak," 
Philemon1:11 nidangin nang adingin kiman’na om lo mi, tu-in ahih leh, kei leh nang adingin a kizang thei ding mi Onesimas ading ka hong thuum hi." 
Philemon1:12 Keima pumpi bang ahi, amahmah na kiangah ka hong ciahsak kik hi." 
Philemon1:13 Lungdamna Thu hangin kikhihna ka thuak lai takin, amah in nangmah tangdingin kei hong kep nadingin ka koih nop hangin, nang in kei tungah," 
Philemon1:14 thupha na hong bawl ciangin, zawhthawh thu bang hi loin, na ut thu-a na bawl ahih nading ka deih a, sawlzawh thu tawh ka hong hih nuam kei hi." 
Philemon1:15 Tua tham loin, nangmah in amah tawh na omkhop tawntung nadingin, amah in nang tawh tawlkhat a kikhen cih huai hi." 
Philemon1:16 Tua bang ka cih ciangin sila bangin ngaihsun nawn loin, tham loin kei in ka it taktak ka nau hi a, nang adingin pumpi sungah ahi zongin, Pasian sungah ahi zongin bang zahin a it huai semsem naupa bangin na ngaihsut nading ka cihnopna hi." 
Philemon1:17 Tua ahih ciangin nangmah in kei pen na lawmpa banga nong ngaihsut leh, amah zong keimah bangin na tungsak in." 
Philemon1:18 Amah in nangma tungah na khatpeuh hong khial ahi zongin, leiba khatpeuh peuh a nei ahi zongin, keima tungah ciamteh in." 
Philemon1:19 Hong lohkik ning ci-in keimah Paul in ka khut tawh ka hong gelh hi. Ahih hangin keima tungah na hong lohkik ding leiba om hi ka cihna a hi kei hi. 
Philemon1:20 Ahi hi, ka sanggam aw, nangmah hangin Topa sungah keima lungsim tawldam ta hen; Khazih sungah ka lungsim hong thakhauh sak in." 
Philemon1:21 Nangmah in ka thu hong mangin, ka genna zah sangin zong ahoihzaw-in na hih ding ci-in ka theih maninah lai ka hong gelh hi." 
Philemon1:22 Tua tham loin, ka giah nading omna mun zong na bawlkhol in. Bang hang hiam na cih leh, nangma thungetna hangin na kiangah tun’ theih nading thu ka ngahkik ding ka lamen hi." 
Philemon1:23 Khazih Zeisu sungah keimah tawh thong a kia khawm Epafros akipan ka naseppih Marka, Aristarkhus, Demas leh Luka-te in nang hong hopih uh hi." 
Philemon1:23 Khazih Zeisu sungah keimah tawh thong a kia khawm Epafros akipan ka naseppih Marka, Aristarkhus, Demas leh Luka-te in nang hong hopih uh hi." 
Philemon1:24  
Philemon1:25 Eite Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna thupha in nangma kha tawh omkhawm ta hen. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Pasian in tang lai-a kamsangte tungah, i pute pate kiangah atuam atuamin thu a piak kikkik khit ciangin, a nunung bel hih nite-ah ama Tapa tungah eite thu hong pia zo hi. Tua a Tapa na khempeuh luah dingin a koih zo hi; ama tungah zong leitung a piangsak hi." 
Hebrews1:2  
Hebrews1:3 Tua a Ta in Pasian’ vangliatna meel leh pianlim hi a, ama vangliatna tawh na khempeuh kipin, eite mawhnate amahmah in a sian’sak khit ciangin, a sang mun vangliatna ziat lamah tu-in a om hi." 
Hebrews1:4 Vantungmite a ngah uh min sangin a phazaw min a ngah mah bangin vantungmite sangin a lianzaw mi ahi hi. 
Hebrews1:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “Nang in ka Tapa na hi hi, Tuni-in na Pa ka suak zo hi,” ci-in ahi zongin, “Keimah in ama Pa ka hi ding hi, Amah in zong ka Tapa ahi ding hi,” ci-in ahi zongin a kua vantungmi kiangah khatvei beek thupia ngei ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews1:6 Lam khat panin a Tapa upa leitungah a hong sawl ciangin: “Pasian’ vantungmi khempeuh in bokin Amah a bia uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Hebrews1:7 Lam khat panin: “Ama vantungmite in huih nung bang ahi zongin, A nasemte meikuang bang ahi zongin a piangsak hi,” ci-in vantungmite ngaihsunin a gen hi." 
Hebrews1:8 A Tapa thu ahih leh: “Pasian aw, na tokhom in A om tawntung tokhom ahi hi, Dikna ahi ukna Ciang in Na gam ukna ciang ahi hi." 
Hebrews1:9 Nang in dikna thu na deih a, Gitlohna thu na mudah hi; Tua ahih ciangin nangma Pasian ahi Pasian in, Nangma lawmte khempeuh sangin Nang hong pahtawi zaw-in, Lungdamna sathau tawh hong nilh zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews1:10 Khatvei: “Topa aw, nang in a kipat cilin Leitung bul na piangsak hi; Vantung zong na khut tawh Na bawl na ahi hi." 
Hebrews1:11 Tuate a kisiat ding uh hangin, Nang na om tawntung ding hi; Tuate puan bangin a tul ding hi." 
Hebrews1:12 Amaute puan bangin na zial ding hi, Amaute puan bangin a kikheel ding uh hi. Nang na hih leh, na kikheel ngei kei ding hi, Na nuntakna a bei ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews1:13 Tua tham loin: “Na galte khempeuh na khe nuai-ah Ka koih matengin, Ka ziat lamah na tu in,” ci a, kua vantungmi khatvei beek thupia ngei ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews1:14 Vantungmite khempeuh in gupkhiatna luah ding mite kem dingun, sawltak nasem khate hilo ahi uh hiam?" 
Hebrews2:1 Tua ahih ciangin eite in i zaksa thute panin kinkhia lo paikhiat loh nading, lungsim takpi tawh kidophuai hi." 
Hebrews2:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, vantungmite tungah thu hong piakna kipin om a, zuih khialhna leh thungaih lohna apawl apawlte in thuak ding a kilawm thukhenna thuak uh ahih leh, a kipat cil a, Topa in hilhin, kam a za mite in a hong kipsak uh a lian mahmah gupna thudon loin om lehang, mawhna daan tawh bang ci kipelh ding i hi hiam?" 
Hebrews2:3  
Hebrews2:4 Tua teci a pang mite tawh Pasian in lim tawh ahi zongin, a lamdang nate tawh ahi zongin, nalamdang tuamtuamte tawh ahi zongin, ama deihna bang a hawmsak Kha Siangtho piak thupha tawh ahi zongin teci a pang khawm hi." 
Hebrews2:5 Eite in i hilh a nung ciangin a piang ding leitung in vantungmite nuai-ah a koih kei hi. 
Hebrews2:6 Lai Siangtho khat sungah mi khat in: “Na lungngaih nadingin mi in bang hi lel ahi hiam? A en dingin na hong pai nadingin mihing tapa in bang ahi hiam? 
Hebrews2:7 Amah vantungmite nuai-ah a neukha na nuaikhiat zo hi, Amah minthan’na leh pahtawina na khusak hi. Na khut-a na pian’sakte na uksak a," 
Hebrews2:8 Na khempeuh ama khe nuai-ah na koih zo hi,” ci-in teci a pang hi. Na khempeuh a koih zo hi a cih ciangin a koih loh a om lai khat beek a om kei hi. Tu hunin na khempeuh ama khe nuai-ah a koihna i mu nai kei hi." 
Hebrews2:9 Tu-in ahih leh, vantungmite nuai-ah neukha bek niamkhiatna a thuak mi Zeisu in Pasian’ hehpihna hangin mi khempeuh taang dingin sihna a thuak nading thu sang ahih ciangin, minthan’na leh pahtawina a ngahna thu i thei hi." 
Hebrews2:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ta tampite vanglian nopsakna-ah a khak nadingin, tua mite’ gupna a piangsakpa in gimna a thuakna hangin kicin’na a tun’ nadingin na khempeuh bawl a, a uk Pasian in a kilawm hi." 
Hebrews2:11 A siangthosak theipa leh siangthona a ngah mite in innkuan khat pan a piang uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu in amaute, “Ute naute aw,” ci-in sap ding a maizumpih kei hi." 
Hebrews2:12 Tua bang a cihna in: “Ka ute ka naute kiangah Na min ka gen ding hi, Mihon laizangah nangmah phatna la ka sa ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Hebrews2:13 Mun khat panin, “Pasian ka muang ding hi,” a ci hi. Khatvei leuleu: “Kei-a kipan Pasian hong piak tate a om uh hi,” ci-in a kigen hi." 
Hebrews2:14 Tua hi a, tua tate in a si a sa tawh kizom uh ahih ciangin Khazih in zong sihna a thuak ciangin, Dawimangpa ahi sihna a ukpa a suksiat nading ahi zongin, sihna kihta ahih manunah a nungta lai takun a tawntungin a kikhum bangin a omte a suahtak sak nadingin ahi zongin, tua tate bangin si-le-sa a la hi." 
Hebrews2:15  
Hebrews2:16 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in a man takin vantungmite a huh kei hi; Abraham’ suante a huh hi." 
Hebrews2:17 Tua ahih ciangin amah in mite mawhna tang ding Pasian tawh kipawl nate ah hehpihna tawh ahi zongin, dikna tawh ahi zongin a dim Siampi Ukpa a suah nadingin, a u a naute tawh a kibat taktak nading thu a om hi." 
Hebrews2:18 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, amahmah in ze-etna thuakin gimna thuak ngei zo ahih ciangin ze-etna a thuakte a huh nadingin a siam hi." 
Hebrews3:1 Tua bang ahih leh, vantunggam tawh kipawl hong sapna thupha a ngah misiangtho ute naute aw, a thuman Sawltak leh Siampi Ukpa ahi ci-a i san’ Zeisu tel takin enin ngaihsun un." 
Hebrews3:2 Moses in Pasian’ innpi sung khempeuh ah a diktat mah bangin Zeisu in amah a koihpa mai-ah a diktat hi. 
Hebrews3:3 Inn lampa in inn sangin minthan’na a neih zawk mah bangin Zeisu in Moses sangin a lianzaw minthan’na ngah dingin a kilawm hi ci-in eite in i ciamteh hi. 
Hebrews3:4 Inn khempeuh mi khat peuhmah in a lam hi. Na khempeuh a piangsakpa in Pasian ahi hi. 
Hebrews3:5 Moses in a nung ciangin a kigen ding nate-ah teci pang dingin nasem hi a, innpi sung khempeuh ah a diktat hi." 
Hebrews3:6 Khazih ahih leh, Tapa ahihna tawh innpi uk a, a diktat hi. Eite in lau lohna ahi zongin, lametna tawh kipawl lungdam kisaktheihna ahi zongin, a tawp mateng i let kip leh, tua innpi i hi hi." 
Hebrews3:7 Tua ahih ciangin Kha Siangtho in a gen mah bangin “Tuni-in ama aw na zak uh leh, na lungsim uh na khuahsak kei un. Keimah hong dong hong ze-etin, Keima hih theih nate, kum sawmli tawntung mu-in, gampa lakah kei tawh kilem lohna bawlin, hong hehsak huna a om bangin om kei un." 
Hebrews3:8  
Hebrews3:9  
Hebrews3:10 Tua ahih ciangin hih khangmite Ka deih kei a, ‘Amaute lungsim sung uhah a khial tawntung uh hi; Keima hih ngeinate a thei kei uh hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Hebrews3:11 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Keima nopsakna sungah a tum thei ngei kei ding uh hi, ci-in hehin ka kiciam hi,” ci-in a gen mah bangin," 
Hebrews3:12 ute naute aw, note lakah khatpeuh peuh in mawh nopna uplahna lungsim tawh a nungta Pasian kiang pan na kinkhiat loh nadingun na kikeem un." 
Hebrews3:13 Mawh kheemna hangin note lakah a lung khauh mi a om khak loh nadingin, “Tu ni,” a kicih lai takin nisimin khat leh khat kihansuah un." 
Hebrews3:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in i kipat cil upna bangin a tawp dongin i kip leh, Khazih tawh a ngah khawmte i hi ding hi." 
Hebrews3:15 Lai Siangtho sungah a gen mah bangin: “Tuni-in note in ama aw na zak uh leh, kilemlohna bawlin hehsakna hunah na om ngei bangun, na lungsim uh na khauhsak kei un.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Thu za napi-un kilemlohna bawlin a hehsak mite kua ahi hiam? Moses nungzui-in Izipt gam pan a paikhia uh mi khempeuhte in tua bang hilo ahi uh hiam? 
Hebrews3:17 Kum sawmli tawntung a deih lo mite in kuate ahi uh hiam? Mawhna khialhna bawlin gam lakah pukin a si mite hilo ahi uh hiam? 
Hebrews3:18 “Note in keima nopsakna sungah na tum kei ding uh hi,” ci-in ciamsiatna a thuak mite, a thungai lote sim loh, kua mite ahi uh hiam?" 
Hebrews3:19 Tua ahih ciangin amau in a up loh manunah a tum zawh loh uh i thei hi. 
Hebrews4:1 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ nopsakna sungah tum zawh nading thu hong kiciamna in eite ading a om lai napi-in, note lakah khat peuhmah in a phak zawh loh khak ding lung hihmawhhuai hi." 
Hebrews4:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in Lungdamna Thu tuate mah bangin i za zo hi. Ahih hangin amau a zak uh thu in a za mite lakah upna tawh a kigawm lo ahih ciangin, phattuamna a om kei hi." 
Hebrews4:3 A um eite in Pasian’ nopsakna sungah i tum hi. Tua bang a genna in: ‘“Amaute in ka nopsakna sungah a tum thei kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in hehin ka kiciam hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in a cil panin a na khempeuh a zo khin hi." 
Hebrews4:4 Ni sagih ni thu, Lai Siangtho sung mun khatah a genin, “Pasian in ama bawl na khempeuh a zawh khit ciangin, ni sagih ni-in tawhnga-in a om hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews4:5 Tua Lai Siangtho sungah a om kik in: “Amaute in ka nopsakna sungah a tum thei kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a om hi." 
Hebrews4:6 Tua ahih ciangin mi kimkhat a tum theih ding uh hangin, Lungdamna Thu nidang lai-inah a za mite in a up loh manunah a tum thei kei uh a," 
Hebrews4:7 Khatvei: “Tuni-in note in ama aw na zak uh leh, na lungsim uh na khauhsak kei un,” ci-in hih zah a sawt zo, “Tu ni,” ci-in David tungah a gen ciangin, nidang lai-in a genna bangin ni khat peuhpeuh ciamtehin a ngaihsun hi." 
Hebrews4:8 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Joshua in tua mite nopsakna pia hi leh, tua nung ciangin a nidang ni thu Pasian in a gen kei ding hi." 
Hebrews4:9 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ mite ading Nipi ni nopsakna a om lai hi. 
Hebrews4:10 Pasian in ama nasepna khempeuh zo khinin tawlnga-a a om bangin, tua nopsakna sungah a tum mi in zong ama nasepna khempeuh zoin tawlnga-in a om hi." 
Hebrews4:11 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in thu ngaih lohna lungsim a neih uh ciangin, a kipuk uh bangin, kuamah kipuk loin tua nopsakna sunga tum nadingin hahkat ciat ni." 
Hebrews4:12 Bang hang hiam i cih leh, Pasian’ thu in nungta a, vangliatna nei a, lang nih a hiam namsau sangin hiamzaw a, nuntakna leh kha ahi zongin, guh-le-tang leh guhngeek ahi zongin, khenin pailet thei a, lungsim ngaihsutnate leh hanciamnate khempeuh a thei thei hi." 
Hebrews4:13 Tua tham loin, eite thu hong khenpa mai-ah a kilang lo na khat beek a om kei hi; na khempeuh a liah a dal om loin Pasian mai-ah kipho laakin a om hi." 
Hebrews4:14 Tua ahih ciangin vantung kheng a, pai Siampi Ukpa lian ahi Pasian’ Tapa Zeisu in, eite aa ahih ciangin eite in i man’sa thu-ah kip takin om ni." 
Hebrews4:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite siampi ukpa in eite hat lohna hong hehpih zo lo mi ahi kei hi; eite thuak mah bangin ze-etna apawl apawl a thuak ngei mi, ahih hangin— mawhna khialhna nei lo ahi hi." 
Hebrews4:16 Tua ahih ciangin eite in hehpihna leh a kilawm hunah hong huhna thupha ngah nadingin, lau lohna lungsim tawh hehpihna’ tokhom kiangah nai ni." 
Hebrews5:1 Mi lakah a kiteelkhia siampi ukpa in mawhna taang ding biaknate leh piaknate mite ading a pia dingin Pasian tawh kipawl nate-ah a kikoih hi. 
Hebrews5:2 Amah in thanem ahih ciangin a pil lo mite, a mawh mite a thuakpih dingin a siam hi." 
Hebrews5:3 Tua ahih ciangin mite mawhna leh ama mawhna taang dingin biakna a pia hi. 
Hebrews5:4 Pasian in Aaron a sap bangin a sap mite longal, kuamah in tua za a lian a la thei kei ding hi." 
Hebrews5:5 Tua mah bangin Khazih in zong siampi ukpa za a ngah nadingin ama pumpi a pahtawi kei hi. “Nang in ka Tapa na hi hi; Tuni-in nang kong piangsak hi,” ci-in a thu a piapa in Khazih a pahtawi hi." 
Hebrews5:6 Tua mah bangin Lai Siangtho mun khatah a gen-inah: “Nang in Melkhizedek’ pawl a tawntung Siampipa na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews5:7 Tua Khazih in mi pumpi bangin a om lai takin, sihna pan a honkhia zopa kiangah kikona, khitui luan’na tawh thungenin thuum a, Pasian kihtakna lungsim hangin thungaihna ngahin," 
Hebrews5:8 Ta taktak ahi napi-in gimna tawlna a thuakna tawh thuman’na a sin hi. 
Hebrews5:9 Tua bangin a kicin’na a tun’ khit ciangin a thumang khempeuhte ading gup tawntungna a bawl mi suak a," 
Hebrews5:10 Melkhizedek’ pawl siampi lian hi ci-in Pasian in a min a phuak hi. 
Hebrews5:11 Tua Melkhizedek thu kote gen ding tampi a om hi. Ahih hangin note bil pil lo na hih uh ciangin a gen nading a haksa hi. 
Hebrews5:12 Note in a sawt vei zo-in thuhilhte a suak khin ding na kilawm napi-un, Pasian thupiakna lakah a kisim masa, a bulpi thute, midangte kiangah khatvei na sin kik nading uh om ahih ciangin zan hak an sam loin, nawizu nete bek na hi uh hi!" 
Hebrews5:13 Nawi bek a ne mi in naupang bang ahih ciangin dikna tawh kipawl thu a siam kei hi. 
Hebrews5:14 Ahih hangin an tak in a sia a pha khen theihna pilna a nei, zakna muhnate zangin zongsang a, amau leh amau a kiseksa, a picing mite’ ading ahi hi." 
Hebrews6:1 Tua ahih ciangin sihna tawh kipawl gamtatnate, kisikkikna, Pasian upna, baptaiznate thuhilhna, khutngakna, misite’ thawhkikna, thukhen tawntungnate a bulpi, eite in lamkik loin, Khazih’ ngeina a kipatna thute koihin kicin’ nadingin kahto ni." 
Hebrews6:2  
Hebrews6:3 Pasian in thu hong piak leh, tua bang i bawl ding hi." 
Hebrews6:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, khatvei khuavakna tungin, vantung hehpihna ciamin, Kha Siangtho tawh a kizom ngei, Pasian’ thu hoih ahi zongin, a nung ciangin a tung ding huna vangliatnate ahi zongin a ciap khit ciangin a tawp kikte ahih uh leh, amaute ading Pasian’ Tapa singlamteh tungah that kikin a simmawh uh ahih ciangin, a nung ciangin kisikkik ding bawl thakna a tung zo kei uh hi." 
Hebrews6:5  
Hebrews6:6  
Hebrews6:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a tungah a kia ngitnget guahtui dawnin, a sem mite ading anteh an-gah a piangsak thei leitang in Pasian kiang pan thupha a ngah hi." 
Hebrews6:8 Ahi zongin lingkung leh thangling a pian’sak leh, paihkhiatna thuakin hamsiat a thuak nadingin, a tawpna-ah meikhuk khulna a thuak ding hi." 
Hebrews6:9 Ka itte aw, tua bang ka cih hangin note in gupna tawh kipawl na leh a hoihzaw nate tawh na kizom uh ci-in kote in ka lungkim uh hi." 
Hebrews6:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, nomau nasepna uh akipan nidang lai-in misiangthote na vaak uh tham loin, tu nangawnin na vaak uh ahi zongin, tua bang hihin ama min hangin na lah uh ki-itna ahi zongin Pasian in a mangngilh dingin thumanlo-pa ahi kei hi." 
Hebrews6:11 Note khempeuh in thadahna nei loin, upna leh thuakna hangin thuciamna a luah ding mite bangin na gamtat zawh nadingun, a tawp dongin upkhialhna nei loin, lametna tawh na dim nadingun, na hahkat nadingun ka deih uh hi." 
Hebrews6:12  
Hebrews6:13 Pasian in Abraham thuciamna a piak ciangin, amah sangin a lianzaw tawh ciam ding om lo ahih ciangin amahmah tawh," 
Hebrews6:14 “Nang a man takpi thupha kong pia ding hi, nang a man takin kong khangsak ding hi,” ci-in a ciam hi." 
Hebrews6:15 Tua mah bangin Abraham in thuakin a ngak khit ciangin a thuciamna bangin a ngah hi. 
Hebrews6:16 Mite in amau sang a lianzawte tawh a kiciam thei uh hi. Kinialna khempeuh kiciamna in a beisak hi. 
Hebrews6:17 Tua ahih ciangin thuciamna a luah ding mite in Pasian’ hanciamna a kikheel zo lo a theih tel nadingun, Pasian in kiciamna tawh a kikham hi." 
Hebrews6:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in zuauthu a zang zo lo thu nih hangin eite mai-ah hong kikoih lametna len a, a beel dinga tai eite in hansuahna khauh i ngah nading ahi hi." 
Hebrews6:19 Tua lametna in puan dalna sungah tumin, lungsim kipna siklum bangin eite ading a om hi." 
Hebrews6:20 Tua sungah Zeisu in Melkhizedek’ pawl ahi, a kip tawntung Siampi Ukpa a suah khit ciangin eite taang dingin a masa in a tum hi." 
Hebrews7:1 Kumpite a thahna panin a ciahkik Abraham dawn a, thupha a piak khit ciangin," 
Hebrews7:2 Abraham in a ngah sum khempeuh seh sawm suah seh khat khenin a piak, Salem Kumpipa ahi, Sang Bel Pasian’ Siampi Melkhizedek in, a min bulpi a khiatna pen dikna’ Kumpipa, tua tham loin, nopsakna’ Kumpipa a cihnopna, Salem Kumpipa hi a," 
Hebrews7:3 pa om lo, nu om lo, a suan a khak om lo, a nuntakna kipatna ahi zongin, a beina ahi zongin nei loin, Pasian’ Tapa tawh kibangin siampi-in a tawntungin a om hi." 
Hebrews7:4 I pu Abraham in a sum ngah ahoih bel seh sawm suah seh khat pia-a a sang tua pa in bang zah a lian na lunggai un. 
Hebrews7:5 Levi’ tate lakah siampi za a ngahte in Abraham’ suante ahi uh a, amau unaute’ khut tung uh panin Thukham mah bangin seh sawm suah seh khat a san’ nadingun thu a ngah uh hi." 
Hebrews7:6 Ahih hangin amau pawl hi lo, tua pa in Abraham’ khut tung pan seh sawm suah seh khat sang a, thuciamna a ngah mi zong thupha a pia hi." 
Hebrews7:7 Milian in mi neute thupha a piakna thu nial nading a om kei hi. 
Hebrews7:8 Tua tham loin, a si thei mite in tu lai takin seh sawm suah seh khat a sang uh hi. Tua lai takin ahih leh, a nungta hi ci-in teci pan’na a ngah mi in seh sawm suah seh khat a ngah hi." 
Hebrews7:9 Tua ahih ciangin seh sawm suah seh khat a ngah theipa Levi in Abraham tung pan seh sawm suah seh khat a pia hi ci-in gen ding thu a om hi. 
Hebrews7:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Melkhizedek in Abraham a dawn lai takin Levi in ama pupi’ pumpi sungah a om lai hi." 
Hebrews7:11 Lam khat panin, Levi’ suan siampi pawlte tawh kizomin mite in Thukham a ngah uh ciangin tua mi pawlte hangin kicin’na a om leh, adang siampi in Aaron’ pawl bangin kisam loin Melkhizedek’ pawl hong pian’ nading thu bang hangin om lai ding ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews7:12 Siampi pawl kikheel ahih leh, Thukham zong kikheel loin a om thei kei ding hi." 
Hebrews7:13 Tua thu genkholhna tawh kipawl mi in biakna tau-ah khatvei beek na a sem ngei lo pawl sung pan a piang hi. 
Hebrews7:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite Topa in Judah pawl sung pan hong piang hi ci-in a kilang hi. Tua pawl thu-ah siampite thu Moses in kam khat beek a gen kei hi." 
Hebrews7:15 Tua tham loin, Melkhizedek bangin adang siampipa a piang zo ahih leh, a tungah laigelhna in a maan ahihna a kilang zaw hi." 
Hebrews7:16 Tua siampi in pum tawh kipawl ngeina thu bang hi loin, a nungta tawntung vangliatna bangin kikoihin a om hi." 
Hebrews7:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “Nang in Melkhizedek’ pawl bangin A tawntung Siampipa na hi hi,” ci-in teci a pang hi." 
Hebrews7:18 Thukham in bangmah kicingsak zo lo ahih ciangin tanglai thukham in thahatna nei lo a, phattuamna pia zo lo ahih ciangin paihkhiatna a ngah zo hi." 
Hebrews7:19 Ahih hangin tua sang a phazaw lametna thu hong piangsak hi. Tua lametna tawh eite in Pasian i nai thei hi. 
Hebrews7:20 Tua mite in kiciamna om loin siampi-za a ngah uh hi. 
Hebrews7:21 Zeisu ahih leh, kiciamna om loin a ngah kei hi. “Topa in, ‘Nang in a tawntung siampi na hi,’ ci-in ciamin a lungsim kikheel nawn lo ding hi,” ci-in thu a koihkholh mah bangin Zeisu in kiciamna tawh siampi za ngah a, a phazaw ciamna thu kikhapna a suak hi." 
Hebrews7:22  
Hebrews7:23 Tuate in si-in a kip tawntung zawh loh man-inah a tampi siampi a suak uh hi. 
Hebrews7:24 Zeisu ahih leh, a tawntung kip ahih ciangin a kikheel ngei lo siampi-za a ngah hi." 
Hebrews7:25 Tua ahih ciangin Zeisu hangin Pasian kiangah a naite’ taang a, a thuum dingin Topa in a nungta tawntung ahih ciangin, a tawntungin hong gum thei hi." 
Hebrews7:26 Tua bang siampi ukpa in siangtho-in, dikin, kihhuaina om loin, mawhneite tawh kikhen khia a, vante sangin a sangzaw munah a tung mi ahih ciangin, eite ading a kilawm hi." 
Hebrews7:27 Siampi ukpa dangte in, a masa-in amau mawhna uh taang ding ahi zongin, tua nung ciangin midangte mawhna –uh taang ding ahi zongin, nisimin biakna a piak uh bangin tua Topa in biakna a piak ding a kisam kei hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama pumpi tawh mite ading khatvei bek a piak hang ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:28 Thukham in a khial thei mite siampi-uk za-ah a koih hi. Thukham nungah kiciamna thu piakkholhna thu in, a tawntung kicingin a om Tapa a koih hi." 
Hebrews8:1 Tu-a-kigensa thute a bulpi in tua bang siampi ukpa i nei a, Amah in vantung vanglianpi tokhom ziat lamah tu-in a om hi." 
Hebrews8:2 Amah in mite lam hi lo, Pasian lam ahi buk taktak, a siangthona munah biakna na a sem mi ahi hi." 
Hebrews8:3 Siampi ukpa khempeuh in biakna leh piakna pia dingin a kikoih ahih ciangin hih siampi ukpa in zong biak nading na khatpeuh mah a nei ding hi. 
Hebrews8:4 Thukham bangin biakna pia ding mite a om uh ahih ciangin tua Topa leitungah a om leh, siampi ahi kei ding hi." 
Hebrews8:5 Moses in buk lam dingin a kisak ciangin, “Mual tungah nang kong lahsa lim bangin na khempeuh na bawl nading na ciamteh in, ci-in thupiakna a ngah bangin, tua siampite in vantung nate a lim leh liim tawh kipawl na a sem uh hi." 
Hebrews8:6 Tu-in ahih leh, Zeisu in a phazaw thuciamnate tungah kip-a a kikoih a phazaw thuciam kikhapna ahih mah bangin, tua sang a lianzaw biakna nasepna za a ngah hi." 
Hebrews8:7 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a masa thuciamna-ah mawhsak nading thu om lo hi leh, a nihna thuciamna om nading thu zon’na a om kei ding hi." 
Hebrews8:8 Tua mite Pasian in mawhsak a, thu a piakna in: “Keimah in hih mi pawlte a pute a pate’ khut uh kai-in, Izipt gam pan ka paipih ni-in, amau ka piak thuciamna tawh a kilamdang, Thuciamna thak, Israel’ innkuante leh, Judah’ innkuanpihte tawh ka bawl ding hun hong tung ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ka piak thuciamna-ah a kip kei uh hi. Keimah in zong a mau don loin ka om hi." 
Hebrews8:9  
Hebrews8:10 A nung ciangin Israel’ innkuanpihte tawh ka thuciamna in, keimah in ka thukhamte, Amaute lungsim sungah ka guang ding hi, a lungtang uhah ka gelh ding hi, amaute Pasian ka hi ding hi, amaute in ka mite ahi ding uh hi." 
Hebrews8:11 Tuate in, ‘Topa thei un,’ ci-in, amau pawl ciat, u leh nau khat leh khat thu kihilh lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a neubel akipan a golbel dongin amaute khempeuh in kei hong thei ding uh hi." 
Hebrews8:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, keimah in amaute mawhnate ka thuak ding hi. Amau mawhnate ka ciamteh kei ding hi, ci-in Topa in thu a pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews8:13 ‘Thuciam thak’ ci-a thu a piak ciangin, thuciamna masa a luisak hi. A kiam a, a luisa in a man’than nading a nai zo hi." 
Hebrews9:1 Lam khat panin, thuciamna masa in biakna ngeina ahi zongin, hih leitung tawh kipawl siangtho mun ahi zongin a nei hi." 
Hebrews9:2 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, puanbuk khat a kibawl hi. A masa dei sungah meivakna, sabuai leh Pasian mai-ah a kikoih khomunte a om uh hi. Hih mun in Siangtho Mun a kici hi." 
Hebrews9:3 A nihna puan dalna sungah Siangtho Bel Mun kici dei khat a om hi. 
Hebrews9:4 Tua dei sungah paknamtui halna, kham tawh a kizut thuciamna singkuangte a om uh hi. Tua singkuang sungah mana koihna kham beel tawh, a paak a paak Aaron’ ciangkhut tawh, thuciamna kigelhna suangpeekte a om uh hi." 
Hebrews9:5 Tua singkuang tungah vangliatna tawh kipawl vantungmi milimte in mawhphelna tokhom khuhin a om uh hi. Tua nate tu-in ka gen siang khin zo kei uh hi. 
Hebrews9:6 Tua ahih ciangin hih na khempeuh kibawla a om ciangin, siampite in biakna bawl dingin buk masa bel ah a tum niloh uh hi." 
Hebrews9:7 A nihna dei sungah siampi ukpa in ama ading ahi zongin, midangte ading ahi zongin, biakna ganhing sisan paipihin, kum khatin, khatvei bek a tum hi." 
Hebrews9:8 A masa dei a om lai tengin Siangtho Bel Munah paina lampi a kilang nai kei hi ci-in Kha Siangtho in hih thu tawh a lak hi. 
Hebrews9:9 Tua dei in biakna leh piaknate tu lai tak hun ading lim ahi hi. Lungsim theihna tawh ngaihsun leng, tua biakna leh piaknate in a bia mite a kicingsak zo lo tham loin," 
Hebrews9:10 neek ding dawn ding, silsiang nading apawl pawlte tawh, pumpi tawh kipawl ngeinate ahi uh a, a kibawl thak hun a tun’ dongin a kip bek uh hi." 
Hebrews9:11 Tu-in khut tawh kibawl lo, hih leitung tawh kipawl lo, a lianzaw, a kicing zaw bukah, a nung ciangin a suak ding phattuamnate siampi ahi Khazih in eite ading a tawntung tatkhiatna thupha hong ngahsak khit ciangin, keel’ si, bawng’ si tawh hi lo, amahmah sisan tawh Siangtho Bel Mun sungah khatvei a tum hi." 
Hebrews9:12  
Hebrews9:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, bawng’ si, keel’ si leh bawngnuno’ kangvute in a nin mite tungah a kitheh ciangin amau pum uh a siangtho sak thei ahih uh leh," 
Hebrews9:14 tua tham loin, mawhna nei loin a tawntung Kha Siangtho tawh amahmah Pasian biakna-a kipia Khazih’ sisan in a nungta Pasian biak nadingin nomau pumpi kisuan’na lungsim uhah a om sihna tawh kipawl gamtatnate tawh kipelhin a siangthosak nadingin a bawl theizaw ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews9:15 Tua ahih ciangin thuciamna masa hun lai takin mawhna a tatkhiat nadingin, sihna thuakna om zo ahih ciangin a sap mite in a luah tawntungna tawh kipawl thuciamna ngah nading, tua Topa in thuciamna thak khamna a suak hi." 
Hebrews9:16 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, sih khit ciang a, luah nading lai a kip leh, sih ciamna lai-at mi a sih phot kul ding hi." 
Hebrews9:17 A sih khit ciangin sih ciamna lai a kip ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, sih ciamna lai-atpa a nuntak lai takin sih ciamna lai in a kip kei hi." 
Hebrews9:18 Tua ahih ciangin thuciamna masa in si tawh loin a kiciam kei hi. 
Hebrews9:19 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Thukham khempeuh Moses in mi khempeuh kiangah a hilh khit ciangin tui tawh kihel bawngno’ si, keel’ si, a san tuumul leh pumpeeng ngeekte la-in Lai Siangtho ahi zongin, mi khempeuh tungah ahi zongin a theh a," 
Hebrews9:20 “Hih si in note kiangah Pasian hong piak thukham thuciamna si ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews9:21 Biakna buk leh, a biakna nate zong tua mah bangin si tawh a theh hi." 
Hebrews9:22 Thukham thu bangin na khempeuh sisan tawh kisiangthosak hi cih ding ahi hi. Sisan kibua loin mawhna maisakna a om kei hi. 
Hebrews9:23 Tua ahih ciangin vantungah a om nate limte in tuate tawh a siangthosak hi. Ahih hangin vantung nate ahih uh leh, a phazawte tawh a siangthosak hi." 
Hebrews9:24 Tua mah bangin a siangthona mun taktak lim ahi, mi khut tawh kibawl a siangtho mun sungah Khazih tum lo hi. eite taang dingin tu-in Pasian mai-ah a pumpi a lah nadingin vantungah a tum hi." 
Hebrews9:25 Tua tham loin, siampi ukpa in Siangthona Mun sungah ama aa ahi lo sisan tawh kum simin a tum bang hi loin, Khazih in a pum tawh tam veipi bia kikkik ahi kei hi." 
Hebrews9:26 Tua banga bia hi leh, lei piancil akipan tam veipi sihna a thuak zo ta ding hi. Tu-in ahih leh, hun tawpna-ah khatvei bek a pumpi paai-in biakna tawh mawhna a paai siang dingin a kilang zo hi." 
Hebrews9:27 Mite in khatvei bek si-in tua nung ciangin thukhenna a thuak uh hi; 
Hebrews9:28 tua mah bangin Khazih in zong mi tampi mawhna puakhia dingin khatvei bek biakna sihna a thuak khit ciangin, amah a lamente gum dingin mawhna tawh kipawl loin, nih veina a hong a paikik ding hi." 
Hebrews10:1 Lam khat panin, Thukham in a nung cianga hong piang ding thuhoihte’ lim taktak hi loin, a liim bek hong lak ahih ciangin kum simin a kipia biaknate tawh a nai mite a kicingsak zo kei hi." 
Hebrews10:2 Ahih kei leh, a bia mite in khatvei bekin a sian’ tho khit uh ciang lungsim kisuan’na om nawnlo ding ahih manin biak piakna piak kikkik ding kisam nawnlo ding hilo ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews10:3 Tu-in ahih leh, hih biakna pia-in, mawhnate kum simin kingaihsunin a om hi." 
Hebrews10:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, bawngtal’ si leh keel’ si in mawhna paaikhia zo lo uh hi." 
Hebrews10:5 Tua ahih ciangin Khazih in leitungah hong pai ciangin: “Pasian aw, gangawh biakna leh piakna na deih kei hi, keimah ading pumpi khat na bawlkhol zo hi." 
Hebrews10:6 Mawhna maisak nading pumpi mei tawh kihal biakna leh, piaknate hangin na lungkim kei hi." 
Hebrews10:7 Tua lai takin keimah in, Lai Siangtho sungah keimah ngaihsunin a kigelh mah bangin, ‘Na deihna bangin sem dingin hong pai ka hi hi, Pasian aw,’ a ci hi." 
Hebrews10:8 Thukham bang bawlnate pan Khazih in, “Biaknate, piaknate, pumpi mei tawh kihal biaknate, mawh maisakna biaknate, nang in na deih kei, na lungkim kei hi,” ci-in a masa-in a cih khit ciangin," 
Hebrews10:9 khatvei, “Na deihna bang sem dingin ka hong pai hi,” a cihna in a nihna a kipsak nadingin a masa pen a paaikhia hi." 
Hebrews10:10 Tua deihna tawh, Zeisu Khazih’ pumpi khatvei piakna hangin eite in siangthona i ngah hi." 
Hebrews10:11 Siampi peuhmah in ni simin na semin, cikmah hunin mawhna a maisak zo lo piaknate pia kikkikin a ding uh hi." 
Hebrews10:12 Tua Topa ahih leh, mawhna maisak nadingin biakna khat bek a piak khit-a kipan, Pasian’ ziat lamah a tawntungin tu-in," 
Hebrews10:13 a galte khempeuh a khe ngakna nuai-ah a khiat dong matengin ngakin a om hi. 
Hebrews10:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, siangthona a ngah mite, khatvei biakna tawh kicin’ tawntungna a ngahsak hi." 
Hebrews10:15 Kha Siangtho in zong eite kiangah teci hong pan’na in: 
Hebrews10:16 “Tua hun khit ciangin amau tawh ka kiciamna un, kei Topa in, “Ka thukhamte amaute lungtang sung uhah ka guan’sak ding hi, Amau lungsim tung uhah ka gelh ding hi,” ci-in tu ma-in thu a piak khit ciangin khatvei:" 
Hebrews10:17 “Amaute mawhnate khialhnate, Lungngai nawn loin ka om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews10:18 Tuate kimaisak leh a nung ciangin mawhna hanga biakna bawl nading thu om nawn lo hi. 
Hebrews10:19 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, Zeisu’ pumpi ahi dalna puan tawh, tua Topa in eite ading a hon’ nuntakna lampi thakah eite in Mun Siangtho Bel sungah Zeisu’ sisan suangin i tum nading launa om lo a," 
Hebrews10:20  
Hebrews10:21 Pasian’ innpi a uk siampi ukpa om ahih ciangin 
Hebrews10:22 eite in lungsim kisuan’na om loh nadingin kitheh a, tui siangtho tawh i pumpi i kisil khit ciangin up khialhna om lo, upna kipin dikna tawh a dim lungsim nei-in Pasian kiangah nai ni." 
Hebrews10:23 Lametna thu tawh kipawl i man’nate sawisak loin lenkip ni. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thuciamna a koihpa in thuman mi ahi hi." 
Hebrews10:24 Tua tham loin, itna lungsim neih nading ahi zongin, a pha-a gamtat nadingin kihansuah nading ahi zongin, khat leh khat kidomto ni." 
Hebrews10:25 Mi kimkhatte’ ngeina bangin khat leh khat kikhopna thu pelh loin, khat leh khat kihansuah ni. A Ni hong nai zo ahih thu na thei uh ahih ciangin na hahkat zaw un." 
Hebrews10:26 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thuman i theih khit ciangin i deihna zui-in i mawh kik leh, a nung ciangin mawh maisak nading biakna a om kei ding hi;" 
Hebrews10:27 daantatna thuak ding cih kihtakhuai a piang ding thu leh thu nial mite a siasak ding hehna meikuang bek a om lai hi. 
Hebrews10:28 Moses’ Thukham a nial mi in teci nih bang, thum bang a om leh, hehpihna ngah loin a si hi." 
Hebrews10:29 Tua bang tham loin, Pasian’ Tapa, a khe tawh sik a, amah a siangthosak thuciamna si a siangtho lo ci-in ngaihsun a, thupha a pia Kha Siangtho a simmawh mi in bang zah a lianzaw daantatna a thuak ding na um uh hiam?" 
Hebrews10:30 “Phulakna in keima thu ahi hi, A mawhna tawh kituakin ka thukkik ding hi,” cih leh, “Pasian in ama mite thu a khen ding hi,” cih thu a piapa i thei hi." 
Hebrews10:31 A nungta Pasian khut sungah puk nading thu in a lauhuai taktak thu ahi hi. 
Hebrews10:32 Note khuavak sungah na tun’ khit uh ciangin mite mai-ah kisiatna, bawlsiatna thuakin, tua bang a thuakte tawh kipawl khat na hi uh ahi zongin, gimna lian mahmahte dona, nidang lai-a na thuak uh na ngaihsun un." 
Hebrews10:33  
Hebrews10:34 Tua lai-in note in khihna a thuak mite na khasiat uh tham loin, neihsa a phazaw a kip tawntung sum a om hi ci-in thei-in na sum na paite uh hong kisuh ciangin na lungdam uh a, na mang uh hi." 
Hebrews10:35 Tua ahih ciangin phattuamna lian mahmah tawh kizom na lau lohna lungsim uh na paaikhia kei un. 
Hebrews10:36 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ deihna bang na nasep khit uh ciangin ama kamciamna na ngah nadingun thuakzawhna lungsim na kisam uh hi." 
Hebrews10:37 “Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, A hong pai dingpa in khawl loin, Tawlno khat khit ciangin a hong tung ding hi." 
Hebrews10:38 Ka midik in upna tawh a nungta ding hi, a nung kin leh, ka lungsim in Tua mi hangin lungdamna a nei kei hi,” ci-in Pasian in thu a pia hi." 
Hebrews10:39 Eite i hih leh, kisiatna tung dingin a nungkin mite lakah i om kei hi; gupkhiatna a ngah upna a nei mite lakah i om hi." 
Hebrews11:1 Upna in lametnate telcianna hi a, a kimu nai lo nate theihtelna ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:2 Tua upna hangin tanglai mite in teci pan’na a ngah uh hi. 
Hebrews11:3 A kimu nate in a kilang nate sung pan piang hi loin, leitungte in Pasian’ thupiakna tawh a piang hi ci-in eite in upna tawh i thei hi." 
Hebrews11:4 Abel in Kain’ biakna sangin a hoihzaw biakna, upna tawh Pasian a bia hi. Tua ahih ciangin dik hi ci-in teci pan’na a ngah hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ama piaknate Pasian in a sang hi. Tua ahih ciangin Abel in a si napi-in a upna hangin thu a hilh lai hi." 
Hebrews11:5 Enok in upna hangin sihna tawh kipelhin a kilato hi. Pasian in amah kilatosak ahih ciangin a kimu nawn kei hi. Amah a kilak toh ma-in Pasian a lungdamsak hi ci-in teci pan’na a ngah hi. 
Hebrews11:6 Upna loin Pasian kilungdamsak zo lo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian kiang a nai mi-in Pasian a om hi cih ahi zongin, cihtakna tawh amah a zong mite amah in thaman a piapa hi cih ahi zongin a um ding hi." 
Hebrews11:7 Noah in a muh nai loh thute-ah thupiakkholhna a ngah khit ciangin upna tawh Pasian kihta-in ama innkuanpihte gum dingin teembaw a lam hi. Tua upna hangin amah in leitung mite mawhna thu khenin a upna tawh kipawl dikkisakna a luah hi. 
Hebrews11:8 Abraham in a luah nading a cih gamah a paikhiat nading Pasian in a sap ciangin amah in koi lamah pai ding cih thei lo napi-in, upna tawh thungai-in a paikhia hi." 
Hebrews11:9 Ama theih lohna gamah zinte bangin om a, thuciamna tawh a kipawl gamah upna tawh zin mi-in a om hi. Tua a thuciamna a luahpih Isaak leh Jakob tawh bukte sungah teengkhawm uh hi." 
Hebrews11:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a luah ding Pasian’ lamsa, bulpi kip a nei khuapi a lamen hi." 
Hebrews11:11 Sarah in a teek khit ciangin ta gai theihna thu vangliatna, upna tawh a ngah hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, thu a ciampa in thumanpa ahi ci-in a um hi." 
Hebrews11:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi si tawh a kibang dektak, mi khat bek ahi Abraham panin a kisim ciangin aksi zah ahi zongin, tuipi gei-ah a kisim zo lo sehnelte zah ahi zongin tampite a suak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:13 Tua a kigensa mi khempeuhte in thuciamna tawh kipawl noptuamna ngah kha loin, gamlapi pan galet-in hopihin, amaute leitungah gamdang mi zinte ahih man-unah upna sungah a si uh hi." 
Hebrews11:14 Tua bang a mang mite in, amau ading gam zongin a om uh ci-in a lak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:15 Tuate in a paikhiatna gam uh a ngaihsun kik hi le-uh tua gamah ciahkik nading thu a om lai hi. 
Hebrews11:16 Ahih hangin amaute in vantung gam ahi, tua sangin a phazaw gam a deih uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in amau Pasian a kicihna maizum loin, amau om nading khuapi a bawlkhol hi." 
Hebrews11:17 Abraham in ze-etna a thuak ciangin upna tawh Isaak biakna-ah a pia hi. “Isaak tung bekah na suan na khak kici ding hi,” ci-a thupiak kholhna akipan thuciamnate lungdamin a sang mi hi-in, khat bek a neih tapa a pia hi." 
Hebrews11:18  
Hebrews11:19 Tua bang a piak ciangin Pasian in sihna pan a thosak thei ding hi ci-in a lungkim hi, etkakna lim-in ci leng, sihna panin a tapa a ngahkik ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:20 Isaak in zong upna tawh a piang ding nate ngaihsunin Jakob leh Esau thupha a pia hi. 
Hebrews11:21 Jakob in zong a sih ding a naih ciangin upna tawh Josef’ tate nih thupha pia-in, a ciangkhut dawnah kinangin Pasian a bia hi." 
Hebrews11:22 Josef in a sih hun a naih ciangin upna tawh Israel mipawlte paikhiatna thu lakin, ama guhte tawh kisai thu a vaikhak hi." 
Hebrews11:23 Moses a suah khit ciangin a meel pha a nu leh pa in mu uh a, upna tawh kumpipa’ thupiakna kihta loin, kha thum tawntung a seel uh hi." 
Hebrews11:24 Moses in a khan’ a cin’ ciangin mawhna tawh kipawl nopsaknate tawlkhat a ngah sangin, Pasian’ mite tawh bawlsiatna a thuakkhawm ding deihzaw a, Izipt gam sum khempeuh sangin Khazih tawh kipawl kosiatna a lianzaw-ah lungkimin upna tawh Faro’ tanu’ tapa kicihna thu a nial hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a nung ciangin a ngah ding thaman a lamen hi." 
Hebrews11:25  
Hebrews11:26  
Hebrews11:27 Kumpipa’ hehna lau loin upna tawh Izipt gam a taisan hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mittang tawh kimu thei lo Pasian a mu zo bangin a lung kip hi." 
Hebrews11:28 Ta upate a sisakpa in Israel mite’ ta upate a sukgawp loh nadingin upna tawh Paisan Pawi ahi zongin, sisan tawh kithehna ahi zongin a bawl uh hi." 
Hebrews11:29 Israel mite in upna tawh San Tuipi laizangah lei keu tung tawn bangin a pai uh hi. Tua mite bangin Izipt mite in ahih sawm uh a, tui sungah a tummang uh hi." 
Hebrews11:30 Jerikho khuapi ni sagih tawntung uum-in a kimkot khit uh ciangin upna tawh a khuapi kulh a cimkhiasak uh hi. 
Hebrews11:31 Numei gilo Rahab in gam ente zawlin manin a inn tungsak ahih manin thungai lote tawh kisia khawm loin, upna tawh a suakta hi." 
Hebrews11:32 Tua longal bang ci gen lai ding a om hiam? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jefthah, David, Samuel akipan kamsangte thu teng gen nading hun kicing zo lo hi." 
Hebrews11:33 Tua mite in upna tawh gamte a zo uh hi, thuman thu a khen uh hi, thuciamna a ngah uh hi, humpinelkai’ kam a khak uh hi," 
Hebrews11:34 meikuang a mitsak uh hi, namsau mai-ah a suakta uh hi, thanemna pan a thahat uh hi, galdona-ah a hang uh hi, gamdang galkapte a taisak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:35 Numeite in sihna pan thokikin amau misite a ngah kik uh hi. Kimkhat in a phazaw thawhkikna a ngah nadingun suahtakna sang loin nakpi satna a thuak uh hi. 
Hebrews11:36 Kim khatte in kosiatna, satgawpna tham loin, leh-henna, thongkiatnate tawh ze-etna a thuak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:37 Suang tawh denna, sing-atna tawh at tanna, ze-etna, namsau tawh thahna a thuak uh hi. Nakpi-in zawngkhalin, bawlsiatna thuakin, tuuvun keelvun silhin a kawivak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:38 Hih leitung in tua mite tawh kilawm lo hi. Amaute in gamlak, mual kuam, leihawm, ken hawm sungah a lal kawikawi, a vak kawikawi uh hi." 
Hebrews11:39 Tua mite khempeuh in upna tawh teci pan’na a ngah uh hangin kamciamna thu a ngah kei uh hi. 
Hebrews11:40 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua mite eite tawh loin, kicin’na a tum loh nadingun Pasian in eite ading a phazaw na a ciamteh hi." 
Hebrews12:1 Tua ahih ciangin hih zaha tam teci pan’nate in ei hong uum ahih ciangin, eite in van khempeuh ahi zongin, hong bawlsia thei mawhna ahi zongin, paaikhia-in" 
Hebrews12:2 eite upna a piangsakpa a kicingsakpa Zeisu a tel takin enin, i mai-ah a om kitaitehna-ah thakiamsak loin kidem ni. Tua Topa Zeisu in ama mai-ah a koih lungnopna thu hangin zumna ngaihsun loin, singlamteh a thuak khit ciangin Pasian’ tokhom ziat lamah a tu hi." 
Hebrews12:3 Thakiamna lungkiatna a om loh nadingin mawhna a nei mite kiangah tua zah khamna a thuak Topa ngaihsun un. 
Hebrews12:4 Note in mawhna khialhna tawh kido-in sisan suah dongin na thuak nai kei uh hi. 
Hebrews12:5 Tua tham loin: “Ka tapa aw, Topa’ thuhilhna ciamteh loin om kei in, na mawhna hong teldot ciangin lungkia kei in." 
Hebrews12:6 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in a itte thu a hilh thei hi, a san’ a tate khempeuh a sat thei hi,” ci-in tate kiangah a cih bangin note hong kigen thuhilhna kam na mangngilh zo uh hi." 
Hebrews12:7 Note in thu hong hilh nading thuak un. Tate tungah kibawl bangin Pasian in note hong bawl hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a pa in a hilh loh ta kua mi ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews12:8 Tate khempeuh in a thuak theih thuhilhna thuak lo na hih uh leh, ta taktak na hi kei ding uh hi, zawlta na hi ding uh hi." 
Hebrews12:9 Lam khat panin, pumpi tawh kipawl pate’ khut tungah eite in hilhna i thuak ciangin, amau i zahtak hi. Tua tham loin, khalam-a i Pa’ ukna thuakin nungta zaw ding hilo i hi hiam?" 
Hebrews12:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua pate in a kilawm ci-in amaute ut bangin tawlkhat bek hong hilh uh hi. Pasian in a hih leh, ama siangthonate eite in i zop nadingin eite noptuamna ding ngaihsunin hong hilh hi." 
Hebrews12:11 Thuhilhna i thuak lai takin lungdamna-in kingaihsun loin dah nading bang kisa thei hi. Ahih hangin thulhilhna a thuak mite in a nung ciangin nopsakna ahi dikna gah a ngah uh hi. 
Hebrews12:12 Tua ahih ciangin thanem-a a om khutte leh tha a nei lo khukte na khauhsak un. 
Hebrews12:13 A khe zawte in a kilawi taktak loh nading, cidamna a ngah nadingin na paina lampi uh na tangsak un." 
Hebrews12:14 Mi khempeuh tawh kilemin nopsakna ahi zongin, a siangtho gamtatna ahi zongin na phak matengun delh un. Tua siangtho gamtatna a om kei leh, kuamah in Pasian a mu thei kei ding hi." 
Hebrews12:15 Note lakah khatpeuh mah in Pasian’ hehpihna thupha ngah loin a om loh nading ahi zongin, a kha kung a zung poin, note hong bawlsia-in mi tampi hong ninsak ding ahi zongin," 
Hebrews12:16 numei gilo tawh a mawhte a om loh nading ahi zongin, khatvei neek bek tawh ama ta upa-za a zuak Esau bangin Pasian’ thu a simmawh mi a om loh nadingin kikemin kidawm un." 
Hebrews12:17 Note in na theih uh mah bangin Esau in a nung ciangin a luah nop hangin nialna a ngah hi. Khitui luangin a zon’ hangin a pa’ lung kikheel nading thu a mu kei hi ci-in na thei uh hi. 
Hebrews12:18 Tua longal note in khut tawh a kilawng kha thei mei kang mualah ahi zongin, a vom meiipi-ah ahi zongin, khuamial ah ahi zongin, huihpi nungah ahi zongin, peengkul tumna aw-ah ahi zongin, kam awging ah ahi zongin a tung na hi kei uh hi. Tua aw a za mite in thu a piakkik loh nadingin a thuum uh hi." 
Hebrews12:19  
Hebrews12:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Ganhing nangawn in tua mual a sukkhak leh, suang tawh kideeng lum ta hen,” ci-a thukhamna aw mite bil in a thuak zo kei uh hi." 
Hebrews12:21 Tua bang a kilatna in kihtakhuai mahmah ahih ciangin Moses in, “Keimah in kihta-in ka liing hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews12:22 Note in Zion Mual ah ahi zongin, a nungta Pasian’ khua ahi vantung Jerusalem khuapi-ah ahi zongin, a kisim zo lo vantungmi tampi kikhopna-ah ahi zongin, vantung lai sungah a kikhum ta-upa pawl a kikhoppina leh pawlpi-ah ahi zongin, mi khempeuh thu a khen ding Pasian kiangah ahi zongin, kicin’na ah a tung midik mite lungsim khate kiangah ahi zongin, thuciamna thak kikham ahi Zeisu kiangah ahi zongin, Abel’ sisan sangin a phazaw a kigen sisan kitheh kiangah ahi zongin, na tung uh hi." 
Hebrews12:23  
Hebrews12:24  
Hebrews12:25 Note in thu hong piapa’ kam na nial loh nadingun kikem un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, leitungah thu genkholhna hong pia mi’ kam a nial mi in mawhna tawh kipelh lo ahih leh, tua tham loin vantung pan thu hong pia kholpa kiang pan eite in pialkhia lehang, mawhna pan i suakta kei zawtham ding hi." 
Hebrews12:26 Tua lai takin a thu piakkholhna aw in leitung a liingsak hi. Tu-in ahih leh, “Khatvei keimah in lei tham loin, van nangawn ka liingsak kik ding hi,” cih kamciamna a om hi." 
Hebrews12:27 “Khatvei,” a cihna kam a khiatna in, a liing lo nate a kip nadingin a liing nate, a pian’sak nate a paaikhia ding hi a cihnopna hi." 
Hebrews12:28 Tua ahih ciangin eite in a liing zo lo gam ngah i hih ciangin kihtakna zahtakna lungsim tawh Pasian a lungdamsak thei biakna na i sep zawh nadingin hong hehpihna lungsim nei ni. 
Hebrews12:29 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, i Pasian in a kangtum thei mei ahi hi." 
Hebrews13:1 Ute naute ki-itna kip ta hen. 
Hebrews13:2 Zinte do nading na mangngilh kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi kimkhat in zin a do laitakun vantungmite ahih lam thei loin zin a do kha uh hi." 
Hebrews13:3 Khau khihna a thuak mi tawh kikhih khawm bangin kingaihsun un: pumpi tawh kipelh lo na hih uh ciangin bawlsiatna a thuakte na ngaihsun un. 
Hebrews13:4 Mi khempeuh lakah kiteen’na kithupisim ta hen. Pasalte leh zite in khat leh khat a thuman ciat ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, numei tawh a mawhte leh mi’ zi tungah a mawhte Pasian in thu a khen ding hi." 
Hebrews13:5 Sumduh luatna tawh na kipelh un. Na neihsa zah uh sum tawh lungkim un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Keimah in nang kong paisan ngei kei ding hi, zong kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” ci-in Pasian in hong gen zo hi." 
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahih ciangin: “Topa in kei hong huhpa hi a, ka lau kei ding hi. Mite in kei tungah bang hong cih thei ding ahi uh hiam?” ci-in kimuan’na lungsim tawh i gen thei hi." 
Hebrews13:7 Pasian’ thu note kiangah hong hilh uh a, note hong uk ngei mite na ngaihsun un. Amaute in bangci gamtatin a si uh teltakin lungngai un la, amau upna lim na zui un." 
Hebrews13:8 Zeisu Khazih in zanni, tuni, atawntungin kikheel loin a om hi." 
Hebrews13:9 A tuam dangdang, a lamdangdang thuhilhna thak zui kei un. An nek hang hi lo, thupha hehpihna hangin lungkhauh a, na om uh leh, a pha hi. An nekna bek a ngaihsun mite in na manpha a ngah zo kei uh hi." 
Hebrews13:10 Buk sungah biakna nasem mite in a nek theih ding ahi lo, biakna tau eite in i nei hi." 
Hebrews13:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, siampi ukpa in mawh maisakna ding biakna gan si, a siangtho mun sungah a tumpih khit ciangin, biakna gan pumpi giahbuk pua lamah mei in a hal hi." 
Hebrews13:12 Tua mah bangin Zeisu in ama sisan tawh mite a siangthosak nadingin khuapi kongkhak pua lamah sihna a thuak hi. 
Hebrews13:13 Tua ahih ciangin eite in Topa tawh kosiatna thuakin giahbuk pualam ama kiangah nai ni. 
Hebrews13:14 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite in hih lai takah a kip ding khuapi i nei kei hi: tunung ciangin a hong piang ding khuapi i zong hi." 
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahih ciangin tua Topa hangin eite in ama min i man’ muk’ gah ahi, phatna biakna Pasian kiangah a tawntungin pia ni." 
Hebrews13:16 Thupha bawlna, sum hawmnate na mangngilh kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in hih bang biaknate ah a lungdam hi." 
Hebrews13:17 No hong uk mite’ thu ngai un la, amau hong gen bangin gamta un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in thusitna a thuakkik ding mite bangin note kha uh noptuam nadingin a kem uh hi. Note noptuamna uh a pian’sak theih nadingin dahna tawh hi loin, lungdam nadingin amaute in sittelna a thuak zawh nadingun kikemin om un." 
Hebrews13:18 Kote ading thu hong ngetsak un. Bang hang na cih uh leh, kote in komau pumpi theihna lungsim a pha nei-in, na khempeuh ah a hoihin gamtat nadingin a deih mi ka hi uh hi ci-in ka lungkim uh hi." 
Hebrews13:19 Keimah in note kiangah a manlang zaw-a kong paikik theih nadingin, kote ading thu hong ngetsak un ci-in kong hansuah hi." 
Hebrews13:20 A tawntung kiciamna sisan hangin Tuucing lianpa ahi, i Topa Zeisu sihna pan a thokiksak nopna Pasian in," 
Hebrews13:21 ama deihna thu Zeisu Khazih hangin eite sungah hong bawlna, note in a deihna na zuih nadingun ahoih na khempeuh ah hong kicingsak ta hen. Tua Topa in a tawntungin minthan’na ngah ta hen. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Ute naute aw, keimah in a tomin gelhin hong zasak ka hih ciangin hansuahna kam na thuak siam un ci-in keimah in note kong thuum hi." 
Hebrews13:23 I sanggampa Timoti a kikhah khitna thu na thei un. Amah in a sawt loin hong tung leh, keimah in amah tawh hong paikhawmin note kong mu ding uh hi." 
Hebrews13:24 Note hong uk mite khempeuh leh misiangthote khempeuh na hopih un. Itali mite in note hong hopih uh hi. 
Hebrews13:25 Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha om ta hen. Amen. 
James1:1 Pasian leh Topa Zeisu Khazih’ sila ahi keimah Jeim in mun khempeuh ah kikhen thangin a om, pawl sawm leh pawl nihte kong hopih hi." 
James1:2 Ka u ka naute aw, ze-etna apawlpawl na thuak uh ciangin lungdam nading bek a hi ci-in na ciamteh un." 
James1:3 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note upna uh hong ze-etnate in thuakzawhna hong khangsak hi ci-in na ciamteh un." 
James1:4 Note in a neu kha beek kisam loin na kicin’ nadingun, thuakzawhna lungsim in kicing takin hong bawlpha ta hen." 
James1:5 Note lakah khatpeuh peuh in lungpilna a deih leh, kosiatna a nei lo, mi khempeuh a kigen thei lo-a a pia nuam Pasian kiangah thungen ta hen. A nget leh a ngah ding hi." 
James1:6 Ahih hangin um khial loin upna tawh ngen ta hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, upkhialhna a nei mi in huih nunga kilok thei tui kilok tawh kibang hi." 
James1:7 Tua bang mi in lungka mi, a hanciamna a bawlna khempeuh ah a kip lo mi hi a, Topa kiang panin bangmah a ngah dingin ki-um kei hen." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Mi kiniamsak sanggamte in a ngah a san’ na uhah kilungdamsak thei ta uh hen. 
James1:10 Sumhau sanggam in kiniamsakna a thuakna ah kilungdamsak thei ta hen. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amah in lopa paak bangin mangthang hi." 
James1:11 Ni in a satna tawh hong suah ciangin lopa kung in keugaw a, a paak a vul thei a, a kilawmna a meelte zong a mangthang thei hi. Tua mah bangin sumhau mi in ama nate-ah vulin a mangthang ding hi." 
James1:12 Ze-etna a thuak zo mi in thupha a ngah ding hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ze-etna a thuak zawh khit ciangin Topa in a it mite a ciamna bangin nuntakna kumpi lukhu a ngah ding hi." 
James1:13 Mi khat in ze-etna a thuak ciangin, “Pasian in kei hong ze-et hi,” ci-in gen kei hen, Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ahoih lo tawh Pasian a kize-et zo kei hi, amah in zong kuamah ahoih lo na tawh a ze-et thei kei hi." 
James1:14 Ama lunggulhna in kai a, zolna a thuak ciangin mi khempeuh in ze-etna a thuak hi." 
James1:15 Tua nung ciangin lunggulhna in gai-in mawhna a suak hi; mawhna in zong a kicin’ ciangin sihna a suak hi. 
James1:16 Ka it ka ute ka naute aw, na kikheem kei un." 
James1:17 A pha a kicing hong piak thupha a om khempeuh in khuavakna’ Pa kiang vantung panin hong pai uh hi. Tua pa in kikheel lo tham loin, kihei-in a lim zong a kiasak kei hi." 
James1:18 Ama pian’ sakte lakah eite in a gah masa bel i suah nadingin thuman thutak tawh ama deihna bangin eite hong piangsak hi. 
James1:19 Ka it ka u ka naute aw, hih thu na thei uh hi. Ahih hangin mi khempeuh in khuazak nading manlang hen, kampau nading ahi zongin, heh nading ahi zongin, manlang kei hen." 
James1:20 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi’ hehna in Pasian’ dikna thu a piangsak kei hi." 
James1:21 Tua ahih ciangin a kihhuai na khempeuh leh hazat luatna lungsimte paaikhia-in, na kha uh hong gum thei note’ lung sungah a kituh Pasian’ thu lungnemna tawh na sang un." 
James1:22 Note’ pumpi uh kikheemin thungaite bek hi kei un; thu banga gamtate na hi un. 
James1:23 Mi khat in thu zui lo-a a ngaih bek leh, tua pa in limlang ah ama maitang a en mi tawh kibang hi." 
James1:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, a mai a et khit ciangin mun dangah pai-in ama meel bang ci bang mi ahi hiam cih a mangngilh pah hi." 
James1:25 Suahtakna tawh kizom a kicing thukham lim takin entel a, a zuisuak mi in thu a zak ciangin mangngilh loin zui ahih manin a sepna ah thupha a ngah ding hi." 
James1:26 Mi khat in, “Pasian ka bia hi,” ci-in amah a ki-up hangin ama kam a kham kei leh, tua mi in a kikheem suak a, ama biakna in a mawkna ahi hi." 
James1:27 I Pa Pasian mai-ah a nin lo, a siangtho biakna in pa nei lo naupangte leh meigong numeite a dah lai takun a en a keem thei a, ama pumpi zong leitung kihhuai nitna tawh kipelh nadingin a kikep theihna ahi hi." 
James2:1 Ka u ka naute aw, a minthang Topa ahi i Topa Zeisu Khazih upna thu-ah mi maitang zahtak tuam nei kei un." 
James2:2 Kham khutbuh bulh a, puanhoih a silh mi leh a kihhuai puansia a silh mizawngte, nih in na kikhopna inn sung uhah hong tumkhawm uh ciangin, puanhoih a silhpa enin, “Omna pha hih lai-ah na tu in,” ama kiangah na ci uh a, mizawngpa kiangah, “Hua lai-ah na ding in, a hih kei leh, ka khe ngakna kiangah tu in,” na cih uh leh, lang khatah maitang zahtak tuamna lungsim nei-in, ahoih lo hanciamna tawh thukhen mi suak hilo na hi uh hiam?" 
James2:3  
James2:4  
James2:5 Ka it ka u ka naute aw, ngai un. Leitung mite mai-ah mizawngte in upna tawh a dim nading ahi zongin, Pasian in a it mite a thuciamna gam a luah nading ahi zongin, tua mite a teel hilo ahi hiam?" 
James2:6 Note na hih uh leh, mizawngte na thudon kei uh hi. Sum haute in note hong bawlsia uh a, thukhenna tokhom mai-ah hong kai uh hilo ahi hiam?" 
James2:7 Note hong kiphuahna min ngaih amaute in a gensia uh hilo ahi hiam? 
James2:8 “Na pumpi na it bangin na lawmte na it in,” a kici Thukham na zuih uh leh, a pha in na gamta zo uh hi." 
James2:9 Ahih hangin mi maitang zahtak tuam na neih uh leh, gitlohna a bawl mi na hi uh hi; thungai lo mi cihna Thukham in note tungah thu hong khen ding hi." 
James2:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Thukham khempeuh a zuih hangin khatpeuh peuh a khial mi in, Thukham khempeuh a khial zo hi." 
James2:11 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Mi’ zi tungah na mawh kei in,” a cipa in, “Mi na that kei in,” ci-in a kham lai hi. Tua ahih ciangin nang in mi zi tungah na mawh loh hangin mi na thah leh, Thukham a khial mi na hi hi." 
James2:12 Suahtakna thu mah zui-in thukhenna a thuak ding mi bangin thu genin gamta un. 
James2:13 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hehpihna a nei lo mi in, hehpihna ngah loin thukhenna a thuak ding hi. Hehpihna in thukhenna zoin a kisathei thei hi." 
James2:14 Ka u ka naute aw, mi khat in, “Upna ka nei hi,” a cih hangin ahoih a gamtat kei leh, bang phattuamna a om hiam? Tua upna in tua mi gumkhia zo ding ahi hiam?" 
James2:15 Unau numei leh pasal khat peuhmah in puan nei loin omin ni sim an nek ding a neih loh ciangin," 
James2:16 note lakah mi khat in, “Nuam takin pai in la, na khua lum-in, gil vah in,” a cih hangin, tua mi pumpi tawh a kituak na zat ding a piak kei leh, bang phattuamna a om hiam?" 
James2:17 Tua mah bangin gamtatna hoih om lo, upna in khat bek om a hih ciangin si-in a om hi." 
James2:18 Ahi hi, khat in, “Nangmah in upna na nei hi. Kei ka hih leh, gamtatna hoih ka nei hi: hong ci ding hi. Gamtatna hoih om lo na upna hong lak in. Keimah in ka hih leh, ka gamtatna tawh ka upna ka hong lak ding hi." 
James2:19 Pasian khat bek a om ci-in na um hi. A pha hi. Dawi gilote in zong umin, kihta-in a liing uh hi." 
James2:20 Kiphasakpa aw, gamtatna hoih om loin upna in phattuamna om lo hi cih theinuam na hi hiam?" 
James2:21 I pa Abraham in ama tapa Isaak pen biakna tau tungah a piak ciangin a gamtatna hoih hangin dikkisakna ngah hilo ahi hiam? 
James2:22 Upna in ama gamtatna tawh bawlpha khawm a, gamtatna hoih hangin a upna a kicing hi ci-in na thei ta in." 
James2:23 ‘Abraham in Pasian um a, ama upna in amah adingin dikna-in kiciamteh hi,’ ci-in a genna a kicing tham loin, ‘Pasian’ lawmpa,’ hi,’ cihna zong a ngah hi." 
James2:24 Mi khat in upna bek tawh dikkisakna a ngah ahi kei hi, gamtatna tawh a ngah hi ci-in na thei uh hi." 
James2:25 Tua mah bangin numei gilo Rahab in sawltakte a tun’sak khit ciangin lam tuam khatah a ciahsak maninah gamtatna hoih hangin dikkisakna ngah hilo a hi hiam? 
James2:26 Kha tawh a om lo pumpi in a si ahih mah bangin gamtatna hoih om lo upna in a si hi. 
James3:1 Ka u ka naute aw, Sia a sem kote in a khauhzaw thukhenna thuak ding ka hih manun note a tampi Sia suah ding na sawm kei un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh eite in thudotna i thuak zaw ding hi ci-in na thei ta un." 
James3:2 Eite khempeuh in na tampi-ah i khial thei hi. Mi khat in kampau a khialh kei leh, tua mi in a kicing mi hi a, ama pumpi khempeuh a keem thei mi zong ahi hi." 
James3:3 Sakol uk nading kamkaih bulh leeng, a pumpi khempeuh i kiheisak thei hi." 
James3:4 Ngai un, teembawte a lian mahmah uh a, huihpi in nakpi-in a mut hangin heina lenpa in a deih bangin, a neu mahmah heina tawh a hei thei hi." 
James3:5 Tua mah bangin leii in na neu ahih hangin alianpi nate a kisaktheihpih thei hi. Bang zah alian sing tampi a neu mahmah mei tawh a kikangsak thei hi cih no na en un. 
James3:6 Leii in mei a hi hi. A gilo na, leitung na ahi eite’ pumpi sungah om a, pumpi khempeuh ninsak a, pumpi hih theihna khempeuh zong hal a, amahmah in hel khua ah halna a thuak hi." 
James3:7 Ganhing apawlpawl khempeuh, vasa apawl apawl khempeuh leh tuipi sungah a om apawl apawl khempeuh mite in a zualsak zo uh hi." 
James3:8 Leii ahih leh, kuamah in a zozo kei hi. Leii in a ommawk thei lo, a gilo ahi, sih theihna a piangsak gu khal tawh a dim hi." 
James3:9 Tua leii tawh eite in i Topa leh i Pa i phat thei hi, Pasian’ lim banga kibawl mite, leii tawh i samsia thei hi." 
James3:10 Kam khat bek panin phatna leh samsiatna a paikhia thei mawkmawk hi. Ka u ka naute aw, tua banga hih ding kilawm lo hi." 
James3:11 Ciktui in a vang khat bek sung pan tuilim leh tuikha phul khia khawm thei ahi hiam? 
James3:12 Ka u ka naute aw, theikung in oliv gah a gah thei hiam? Leengkung in theigah a gah thei hiam? Tua mah bangin tui al in tui lim a piangsak thei kei hi." 
James3:13 Note lakah kua in pilna leh theihna a nei hiam? Tua mi in gamtatna hoihte hihin, pilna, lungnemna tawh ama gamtatnate lak ta hen." 
James3:14 Ahih hangin note lungsim sung uhah hazatna leh kidemna siatna a om leh, thuman thutak tawh kilem loin kisathei kei un." 
James3:15 Tua bang pilna in vantung pan hong tung pilna ahi kei hi; leitung pilna, pumpi pilna, dawi gilo pilna ahi hi." 
James3:16 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hazatna leh kidem nopna a om leh, gamlumna leh a kihhuai gilo bawlna apawl apawl a piangsak uh hi." 
James3:17 Vantung pan hong tung pilna in a masa belin a siangtho hi. A nung ciangin kilemna ahi hi, lungnemna ahi hi, zol baihna ahi hi, hehpihna leh gah pha tawh a dim hi, maitang zahtakna leh simtatna a om kei hi." 
James3:18 Kilemna a piangsak thei mite ading dikna thu khaici kilemna tawh kivawhin a om hi. 
James4:1 Note lakah galdona leh kitotna koi pan hong piang ahi hiam? Note’ pumpi sung uhah a om nate lakah gal a bawl thei na deihgawhnate uh pan piang hilo ahi hiam? 
James4:2 Note in na deihgawh uh hangin na ngah kei uh hi, na that uh a, na deih uh hangin na ngah kei uh hi, na kitawng uh a, na kido uh hi. Thu ngen lo na hih ciangun na ngah kei uh hi." 
James4:3 Thu na nget uh hangin na deihgawh nopsakna hoih lote na ngah nadingun ngen khial na hih ciangun na ngah kei uh hi. 
James4:4 Apangtatte aw, leitung tawh kipawlna in Pasian tawh kilem lohna ahih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih leh, leitung tawh a kipawl mi peuhmah in Pasian’ gal a suak hi." 
James4:5 Lai Siangtho’ thu in: “Eite sunga teeng Kha Siangtho in eite hong aam mahmah hi,” a cihna in a mawkna ahi ci-in na um uh hiam?" 
James4:6 Topa in thupha hehpihna a tamzaw hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah a gen-inah, “A kisatheite Pasian in kham a, ahih hangin lung kiniamkhiat mite thupha hehpihna a pia hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
James4:7 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ ukna na mang un. Dawimangpa na kham un; na kham uh leh, note kiang pan a taikhia ding hi." 
James4:8 Pasian kiangah nai un. Tua bang na hih uh leh, nomau kiangah a hong nai ding hi. Mawhneite aw, na khut uh siangthosak un. Lungka mite aw, na lungsim uh na siangthosak un." 
James4:9 Lunggimna thuakin, thuumin, kapin, om un. Note’ nuihna pen dahna suahsak un. Note’ lungdamna uh zong dahna suaksak un." 
James4:10 Topa mai-ah na kiniamkhiat un. Tua bang na hih uh leh, amah in note hong pahtawi ding hi." 
James4:11 Ute naute aw, khat leh khat na kikosia kei un. A u a nau a kosia mi ahi zongin, a u a nau thukhen mi ahi zongin Pasian’ Thukham a kosia hi; Thukham tungah thu a khen hi. Pasian’ Thukham tungah thu na khen uh leh, Pasian’ thu zui na hi kei uh hi; Thu a khen na hi uh hi." 
James4:12 Thukham a pia mi leh thukhen mipa khat bek a om hi. Tua pa in gup ding ahi zongin, siatsak ding ahi zongin a hih thei hi. Na lawmte tungah thu a khen nang in kua mi na hi hiam?" 
James4:13 “Tu-ni ahi zongin, zingciang ahi zongin hih bang khuapi sungah pai-in kum khat tawntung omin sumbawlin, a meet ngah nading ka bawl ding uh hi,” a ci mite aw, ngai un." 
James4:14 Zingciangin bang thu a piang ding na thei kei uh hi. Note’ nuntakna un bang tawh a kibang hiam? Note in tawlkhat a kilat khit ciangin a mangthang thei tuikhu na hi uh hi. 
James4:15 “Pasian in hong awi leh, eite in nungta-in hih bang ahi zongin, tua bang ahi zongin i hih ding hi,” ci-in na gen dingun a kilawm hi." 
James4:16 Tu-in ahih leh, note na kiphatsakna uhah na kisathei uh hi. Tua bang kisaktheihna ahoih kei hi." 
James4:17 Tua ahih ciangin gamtatna hoih thei napi-in a gamta lo mi tungah mawhna a om hi. 
James5:1 Sum haute aw, tu-in hong pai un; note tungah hong tung ding gimna tawlna hangin kiko-in kap un." 
James5:2 Na sum na paaite uh muat gawpin a om hi. Na puante uh zong nget in a ne khin zo hi. 
James5:3 Na kham na ngunte uh zong a keekseu khin hi. Tuate keekseuna in note lang khatah teci hi a, mei bangin note’ sa hong ne ding uh hi. Note in a nunung bel ni hi napi-in sum na khol uh hi." 
James5:4 Ngai un, note’ lo lai-ah an atte na kheem uh a, a thaman uh pia loin na om uh a hih ciangin tua thaman in kiko-in a om hi. Tua lo-ah a at mite a kikona aw un zong vantungmite’ Topa’ bil sungah a tum zo hi." 
James5:5 Note in leitungah lungdam nopsakna ngahin na om zo uh hi. Kithah ni adingin na lungsim uh na vaak thau zo uh hi. 
James5:6 Midik tungah thu na khen uh a, na that zo uh hi. Amah in no hong thuk kei hi." 
James5:7 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, Topa hong pai matengin thuakin ngak un. Lokho mi in guahzu masa leh guahzu nunung a zuk matengin a manpha leitungah gahte thuum loin ngakin a lamen hi." 
James5:8 Tua mah bangin note in zong thuakin ngak un. Na lungsim uh na kipsak un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa hong pai ding a nai zo hi." 
James5:9 Ute naute aw, thukhenna tawh na kipelh nadingun khat leh na kiphunsan kei un. En un, kongkhak kiangah Thukhenpa ding-in a om hi." 
James5:10 Ute naute aw, gimna tawlna-ah Topa’ min tawh thu a hilh kamsangte’ lim na ciamteh un." 
James5:11 En un, a thuak zo mite in thupha a ngah mite a hi uh ci-in i gen hi. Job’ thuakna thu na za zo uh hi. Pasian in ama thu a zawh khit ciangin a hehpih theih mahmahna thu zong na thei zo uh hi." 
James5:12 Ka u ka naute aw, thu khempeuh tungah kiciamna pha takin na tang un; vantung tawh na kiciam kei un, leitung tawh na kiciam kei un. Bangmah dang tawh na kiciam kei un. Thukhenna tawh na kipelh theih nadingun ah, “Ahi hi,” na cih uh ahi mah hi ta hen; “Ahi kei hi,” na cih uh a hi lo mah hi ta hen." 
James5:13 Note lakah mi khat peuhmah gimna thuak a om hiam? Amah in thungen ta hen. Khat peuhmah a lungdam leh, la sa ta hen." 
James5:14 Note lakah cina a om leh, pawlpi upate sam hen. Tuate in Topa’ min suangin mi cina sathau tawh zutin ama tungah thungen ta uh hen." 
James5:15 Tua bang na bawl uh leh, upna thungetna in cinate a noptuamsak ding a, Topa in amah a thosak ding hi. Amah in mawhna ahih khak leh zong, tua mawhna a maisak ding hi." 
James5:16 Tua ahih ciangin khat leh khat na mawhna uh kipulaakin, na cidam nadingun khat leh khat ading thu na kingetsak un. Midik’ thungetna in nakpi vanglianin muibun mahmah hi." 
James5:17 Elijah in eite bangin leitung mi bek a hi napi-in guah zuk loh nading nakpi-in thu a nget ciangin kumthum leh khaguk tawntung leitungah guah a zu kei hi. 
James5:18 Khatvei thu a nget kik ciangin vantung in guah zusakin, leitung in zong a gah a gah hi." 
James5:19 Ka u ka naute aw, note lakah mi khatpeuh mah in thuman thutak lam pan pial a, a khialh ciangin," 
James5:20 midang khat in tua mi a kiheisak kik leh, mawhnei mi’ lam pialna pan kihei kiksak a, kha khat sihna pan gumkhia a, mawhna tampi a khuhsak mi ahi ding hi ci-in thei ta hen." 
1Peter1:1 Zeisu Khazih’ sawltak keimah Piter in thungaihna leh Zeisu Khazih’ sisan tawh thehna a ngah nading Kha Siangtho in a sian’thosak a," 
1Peter1:2 Pa Pasian’ theih kholh bangin a teelkhiat mite ahi, Pontas gam, Galati gam, Kappadokia gam, Asia gam, Bithunia gam leitung mun khempeuh ah kikhen thangin lal-a om mite kiangah ka hong zasak hi. Hehpihna thupha leh nopna in note tungah hong khang semsem ta hen." 
1Peter1:3 Anungta lametna thu a om nading ahi zongin, a sia thei lo, a kihhuai nitna om lo, a vul thei lo luahna eite in i ngah nading ahi zongin, Zeisu Khazih in sihna pan a thawhkik ciangin hehpihna lianpi tawh kituakin eite hong piang kiksak i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ Pa Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen." 
1Peter1:4  
1Peter1:5 Tua luahna in a nunung bel hun ciangin hong kilat nadingin a kibawlkholsa-a om gupkhiatna i ngah nadingin i upmanin Pasian’ vangliatna in hong kipsak note ading, vantungah kikhol-a a om luahna ahi hi." 
1Peter1:6 Mei tawh a kize-et hangin a kisia thei kham sangin, note upna hong ze-etna un a pha zaw ahih maninah Zeisu Khazih hong kilat ciangin a phat nading, vangliat nading, minthan’ nading a suah nadingun, ze-etna apawlpawl thuak nading a om leh, note in tu-in tawlkhat na thuak uh a, na dah uh hangin a tungah ka gelhsa thupha ngaihsunin na lungdam mahmah un." 
1Peter1:7  
1Peter1:8 Tua Topa note in na muh ngeiloh uh hangin na it uh hi. Tu-in zong na muh theih loh uh hangin umin, vangliatna tawh kipawl a kigen thei lo nopna lungsim tawh lungdamin, na kha uh gupkhiatna ahi note upna’ tupna mun na ngah uh hi." 
1Peter1:9  
1Peter1:10 Tua gupkhiatna thu kamsangte in a tel takin dongin, zongin, note tungah a hong piak ding thupha hehpihna a hilhkhol uh a," 
1Peter1:11 Khazih’ thuak gimnate ahi zongin, tua gimna a thuak khit ciangin a kilang ding minthan’na ahi zongin, amaute sungah a om Khazih’ Kha Siangtho in teci a pan’ kholh ciangin a bang ci, a bang hun a cihnopna ci-in a zong uh hi." 
1Peter1:12 Amaute’ thuhilh nasepnate in amaute ading hi lo, note ading ahi ci-in amaute kiangah a kilang hi. Vantung pan hong sawl Kha Siangtho tawh note kiangah Lungdamna Thu hong hilh mite in tua nate note kiangah tu-in hong hilh uh hi. Tua nate vantungmite in zong a en nuam uh hi." 
1Peter1:13 Tua ahih ciangin lungsim kawnggak gakin om un la, khuaval zulhtat loin Zeisu Khazih a kilat ciangin note kiangah hong tung ding hehpihna thupha lamen khin takpi-in om un." 
1Peter1:14 Note in siamna na neih loh lai takun deihgawhna thu tu-in zui loin, thu a mangthei naupangte bangin piang un la," 
1Peter1:15 a hong sampa a siangtho mah bangin na hihna khempeuh uh na siangthosak un. 
1Peter1:16 Bang hang hiam na cih leh, “Keimah ka siangtho ahih ciangin note in zong na siangtho ta un,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi." 
1Peter1:17 Mi maitang zahtak loin, mi khempeuh ahihna bang thu a khenpa kiangah note in Pa bangin ngaihsunin thu na nget uh leh, leitungah lal-a na om lai tengun launa lungsim tawh na gamta un." 
1Peter1:18 Na pute na pate’ ngeina uh ahi mawkna gamtatna pan kham leh ngun-a kipan a kisia thei sum tawh note hong tankhia ahi kei hi; 
1Peter1:19 hoih lohna om lo, a nin baang lo tuuno tawh kibang ahi Khazih’ manpha bel sisan tawh hong tankhia hi ci-in na thei un." 
1Peter1:20 Tua Khazih in leitung a kipian’sak ma-in a kiciamteh khol hangin, amah hangin Pasian a um note ading a nunung bel hun ciangin hong kilang hi." 
1Peter1:21 Note upna leh na lametna uh, Pasian paulamin a kip theih nadingin, Pasian in tua Topa sihna pan tho kiksakin minthan’na a pia hi." 
1Peter1:22 Note in a kisia thei khaici hangin suakkik na hi kei uh hi; a kisia thei lo khaici ahi, kipin a om Pasian’ thu hangin suakkik na hih uh ciangin unau it kheem bang hi loin, a man takpi it nadingin thuman thutak ngai-in na lungsim uh na siangthosak uh mah bangin, khat leh khat na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh nakpi-in na ki-it un." 
1Peter1:23  
1Peter1:24 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “Mi pawl khempeuh in lopa kung tawh kibang uh hi, Amaute’ minthan’na khempeuh zong lopa pak tawh kibang hi. Lopa kung a keu thei a, a pak zong a pulh thei hi;" 
1Peter1:25 Pasian’ thu ahih leh, a kip tawntung ding hi.” Tua thu in note kiangah hong kihilh Lungdamna Thu ahi hi." 
1Peter2:1 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in a pha hi ci-in note in na ciam zo uh ahih leh, gitlohna khempeuh, mi kheemna leh simtatna leh en’na khempeuh, gensiatna apawl apawl khempeuh note in paaikhia-in hong gupkhiatna ah na khan’toh nadingun Pasian’ thu nawizu siangtho a duh a suak tung naupangte bangin lungsim na nei un." 
1Peter2:2  
1Peter2:3  
1Peter2:4 Mite in a nilkhiat hangin Pasian’ teel nuntakna suangpi ahi, tua Topa kiangah pai-in," 
1Peter2:5 note in zong a nungta suangte bangin a kilam, Kha inn na hi uh hi; Zeisu Khazih hangin Pasian san’ theih ding akilawm biakna a pia thei, a siangtho siampi pawl-in zong a piang na hi uh hi." 
1Peter2:6 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “A kiteel a manpha inn kiu khuam bul suangpi, Zion mual tungah ka koih hi. Tua suangpi a beel mi in, Zumna a thuak kei ding hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigen hi." 
1Peter2:7 Tua ahih ciangin a um note adingin tua suangpi in a manpha mahmah hi. A um lote ading ahih leh: “Inn lamte’n a nilkhiat suang in, Anung ciangin inn kiu suang a piang hi,” cih ahi zongin," 
1Peter2:8 “A puksak nading suangpi, a khialhsak nading suangpi zong ahi hi,” ci-in a kigelh zo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in ngai loin, Pasian’ thu suikha-in a puk uh hi. Tua thu tawh a kituak nadingun tua mite a kikoih uh hi." 
1Peter2:9 Note na hih uh leh, khuamial sung pan a lamdang khuavak sungah a hong sampa’ vanglian hehpihna na lahkhiat nadingun, a hong teel mi pawl, man’na nuam a nei siampi pawl, mi siangtho pawl, Pasian in a uk, a neih mi pawlte na hi uh hi." 
1Peter2:10 Note in nidang lai-inah a mi pawlte na hih loh uh hangin tu-in Pasian’ mi pawlte na hi uh hi. Nidang lai-inah hehpihna na ngah loh uh hangin tu-in na ngah zo uh hi. 
1Peter2:11 Ka itte aw, kha tawh a kido thei pumpi tawh kipawl deihgawhnate khempeuh na tan’ nadingun, khualzinte, mi peemte bang ahi note ka hong thuum hi." 
1Peter2:12 Gentailte in gitlohna a bawl mite ci-in note hong kosiat uh hangin Pasian in hong en a, thu a khen ni ciangin na gamtatna uh a pha amaute in a muh uh ciangin Pasian’ min a phat nadingun, amaute mai-ah a kilawm a kituakin na gamta un." 
1Peter2:13 Topa ading a lian bel kumpipa ahi zongin, a pha lo gamta mite daan pia ding leh a pha gamta mite pahtawi dingin kumpipa in a koih mangte ahi zongin, mite in a koih ukna nei khempeuh ahi zongin na mang un." 
1Peter2:14  
1Peter2:15 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in a pha na gamtat uh leh, mi haite a lungpil lohna kam na thukkik theih nadingun Pasian in tua bangin a deih hi." 
1Peter2:16 To neilo na hih uh hangin to nei lo na hihna uh tawh gitlohna a seel mite bangin na gamta kei un; Pasian’ sila bangin na gamta un. 
1Peter2:17 Mikhempeuh zahtak un. Ute naute na it un. Pasian na kihta un. Kumpipa na zahtak un. 
1Peter2:18 Silate aw, kihtakna tawh na tote uh ukna na mang un. Na tote un mi gi a, lungnemna hoih nei uh ahi zongin, lungkhauh nei uh ahi zongin na mang un." 
1Peter2:19 Mi khat in ahi lo bawlsiatna a thuak ciangin Pasian maitang ngaihsunin a thuak zawh leh, thupha a ngah ding hi." 
1Peter2:20 Mawhna na bawl manunah daan na thuak uh ciangin lungnemin na thuak uh leh, bang phattuamna a om hiam? A pha na bawl uh a, gimna na thuak uh ciangin lungnemin na thuak uh leh, Pasian mai-ah phatna na ngah ding uh hi."
