1Peter2:21 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua bang deihna in note hong sam zo hi. Khazih in zong note ading gimna thuak a, ama khekhap na zuih nadingun a lim a koih zo hi." 
1Peter2:22 Amah in mawhna ahih kei hi, a kam panin zong thu zuau a kimu kei hi." 
1Peter2:23 Kosiatna a thuak lai takin a kosia kik kei hi, gimna a thuak lai takin lau nadingin tawngkik loin, thuman a khenpa’ khut sungah ama pumpi a pia hi." 
1Peter2:24 Eite in mawhna lamah a si i hih khit ciangin dikna lamah i nuntak nadingin, eite mawhnate amahmah in singkhuam tungah ama pumpi-in a thuak hi; ama liamnate hangin damna i ngah zo hi." 
1Peter2:25 Nidang lai-inah note in tuute bangin lam na khialh uh hangin tu-in ahih leh, note kha uh hong Ukpa leh Tuucingpa kiangah na tungkik zo uh hi." 
1Peter3:1 Tua mah bangin zite aw, na pasalte’ ukna uh na mang un. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian thu a ngai lo pasal kim khat a om uh leh, tuate in kihtakna tawh kipawl na gamtatna siangtho uh a muh uh ciangin, Pasian’ thu hang hi lo, amau zite gamtatna pha hangin amaute kingah ding uh hi." 
1Peter3:2  
1Peter3:3 Numeite kizepna pan samphekna, kham leh suangmanpha leh puansilhna ahi pualam kizemsak loin," 
1Peter3:4 Pasian mai-ah a manpha, lungnemna lungsim, a kisia thei lo kizepna ahi, a kimu thei lo lungsim sung kizepna hi ta hen." 
1Peter3:5 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian lamenin a om numei siangthote in zong tang lai-in tua bangin a kizeem uh hi." 
1Peter3:6 Sarah in Abraham, “topa,” ci-in a thu a man’ mah bangin, a pasalte’ ukna uh a mang uh hi. Note in zong a pha-in na gamtat uh a, launa na neih kei uh leh, Sarah’ tanute na suak ding uh hi." 
1Peter3:7 Tua mah bangin pasalte aw, na thungetna uh nialna a om loh nadingin, nuntakna thupha hehpihna tawh kizomin a luahkhawm mite bangin, lungpilna leh thukhualna nei-in, na zite uh tawh omkhawmin, a hat lo zaw a panpih bangin kingaihsunin, na zite uh dawmin na hehpih un." 
1Peter3:8 A tawpkhakna kam in, note khempeuh lungsim kikhatin om un, hehpihna lungsim nei un. Unau bangin na ki-it un, na kidahpih un, lungniamkhiatna na nei un." 
1Peter3:9 Kitawng thuk kei un, kikosia kik kei un. Thupha na kipia un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, note in thupha na luah nadingun hong sapsa mite na hi uh hi." 
1Peter3:10 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh: “Nuntakna-ah nuamsa a, ni hoih a nuam a mu nuam mi in, a leii in phatlohna a bawl loh nadingin kham hen. A muk in zuauthu a gen loh nadingin kham hen:" 
1Peter3:11 Gitlohna peelin, gitna bawl hen: Mi tawh kilem nading zongin, a phak dongin delh hen." 
1Peter3:12 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Topa’ mit in mi dikte a en hi, a bil in zong amau thungetna a ngai hi. Mawhna ahihte ahih uh leh, Topa in a nungngat hi.”" 
1Peter3:13 Note in thupha lamah lungsim a nei mi na hih uh leh, kua in note hong bawlsia ding hiam?" 
1Peter3:14 Thuman thutak hangin gimna na thuak uh leh, thupha na ngah ding uh hi. Amaute’ tawn’na na lau kei un, na lungmang kei un." 
1Peter3:15 Na lungsim sung uhah Khazih in Topa ahi ci-in zahtakna nei un. Note’ lametna thu hong dong mi khempeuh kiangah lungnemna tawh, thusimna lungsim tawh na genkik theih nadingun, a kigingsa-in om tawntung un." 
1Peter3:16 Khazih-ah note gamtat hoih uh a simmawhte in hong kosiat ciangin, note pumpi uh a maizum loh nadingun note lungsim kisuan’na om lo, siangtho-in na om un." 
1Peter3:17 Pasian’ deihna a om leh, phatna na bawl manun na thuakna un, gitlohna na bawl man uh a, thuakna sangin a hoih zaw hi." 
1Peter3:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Khazih in a pum tawh sihna thuakin, kha tawh nuntakna ngah a, eite Pasian kiangah hong khak nadingin a mi dik mi in, mi diklote tangding mawhna hangin khat vei bek gimna a thuak hi." 
1Peter3:19 Tua kha tawh Khazih pai a, thong sungah a kikhum khate kiangah thu a hilh hi." 
1Peter3:20 Tua khate in nidang lai-inah Noah a khan’ lai-in tawmkhat ahi, mi giatte tui tawh a gup nading teembaw a bawl lai takun, Pasian in thuakin a ngak lai takin, thu a ngai lo khate ahi uh hi." 
1Peter3:21 Tu-in baptaizna ahi tua tui in lim bangin, Zeisu Khazih’ thawhkikna hangin note hong gum hi. Tua note a hong gum baptaizna ka cih ciangin pumpi nin a kihhuaina sawp siang a cihnopna hi lo hi; lungsim kisuan’ lohna siangtho tawh Pasian mai-ah a mang ka cihnopna hi." 
1Peter3:22 Tua Topa vantungah kahto a, Pasian’ ziat lamah a tu hi. Vantungmite akipan, a ukte leh vangliatnate in ama nuai-ah kikoihin a om hi." 
1Peter4:1 Tua bangin Khazih in ama pumpi-in gimna thuak ahih ciangin, note in zong a nung ciangin mite deihna bang zui loin," 
1Peter4:2 Pasian’ deihna bang zui-in, na pumpi uh a nuntakna a om lai hun a bei dongin, tua bang lungsim nei-in om un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, gimna a thuak mi in mawhna tawh a kikhen hi." 
1Peter4:3 Gentailte’ deihna zui-in lunggulhna a nin deihgawhna, leenggahzu khamna, pawikhamna, tam dawn luatna, a kihhuai milim biakna-ah om theih nading hunte a kicing ta hi." 
1Peter4:4 Tua hihnate-ah note in amaute tawh kipawlin noptatna-ah kihhuaina na bawl lohna uh amaute in lamdangsa-in hong ko thei uh hi. 
1Peter4:5 Tua mite in a nungta mite leh a si mite tungah thukhen dingin a om kholpa mai-ah thusuahna a thuak ding uh hi. 
1Peter4:6 Tua hanginah a nungta mite in a thuak uh bangin pumpi tawh thukhenna a thuak uh hangin Pasian’ deihna tawh kituak kha tawh a nuntak theih nadingun mi site kiangah Lungdamna Thu a kihilh zo hi. 
1Peter4:7 Na khempeuh a beina hong nai zo hi. Tua ahih ciangin pha takpi kikeemin pil un, thungenin ngak un." 
1Peter4:8 Hihna khempeuh tham loin, note in khat leh khat nakpi-in na ki-it un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, ki-itna in mawhna tampi a seel hi." 
1Peter4:9 Phun loin khat leh khat zin na kido un. 
1Peter4:10 Note in hehpihna letsong na ngah ciat uh mah bangin Pasian’ hehpihna thupha atuamtuam a keem mi phate bangin, khat leh khat na kihawm un." 
1Peter4:11 Pasian in na khempeuhah Topa Zeisu hangin phatna a ngah theih nadingin, mi khatpeuh in thu a hilh leh, Pasian’ thupiak bangin hilh ta hen; mi khatpeuh in na a sep leh, Pasian piak tha bangin sem ta hen. Tua Pasian in a tawntungin minthan’na leh vangliatna nei ta hen. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Ka itte aw, note hong ze-et nadingin na thuak uh mei tawh kisit, bawlsiatna in note tungah lamdangsak huaina ahi ci-in ngaihsun kei un, na lungmang kei un." 
1Peter4:13 Note in Khazih’ gimna a zom na hih uh ciangin ama minthan’na hong kilat ciangin lungdam mahmahna tawh na nuam nadingun, tu-in zong nuam un." 
1Peter4:14 Khazih’ min hangin kosiatna na thuak uh leh, thupha na ngah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, minthan’na tawh kipawl kha ahi Pasian’ Kha Siangtho in note tungah a om hi." 
1Peter4:15 Note lakah kuamah in mi that mi bang ahi zongin, mi sumgu mi bang ahi zongin, a gilo hih bang ahi zongin, midangte’ thusia-a kihel mi bang ahi zongin thuak kei hen." 
1Peter4:16 Ahih hangin Christian ahihna hangin gimna a thuak mi khat a om leh, zum kei hen; ahih hangin tua min puakna hangin Pasian’ min phat ta hen." 
1Peter4:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ innkuante a masa belin thukhen nading hun a tung zo hi. Eite a masa-in thu hong khen leh, Pasian’ Lungdamna Thu a mang lo mite bang suak ding ahi hiam?" 
1Peter4:18 “Mi dikte in gupna ngah nading haksa ahih leh, Pasian a nei lo, mawhna a nei mite in bang suak ding ahi uh hiam?”" 
1Peter4:19 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ deihna bangin gimna a thuak mite in, a pha a gamtatna uh zomin, thuman ahi amaute a Bawlpa’ khut sungah amau kha uh pia ta uh hen." 
1Peter5:1 Tua ahih ciangin upa ahi tham loin, Khazih’ gimna thuakna a mu teci hi a, a kilang ding vangliatna a zom ding keimah in note lakah a om upate kong hansuah hi." 
1Peter5:2 Note lakah a om Pasian’ tuu honte cin’ nading thu panin, zawhthawhna tawh cing loin, a siangtho lo sum hauh nading hi loin, hehpihna lungsim tawh," 
1Peter5:3 atuam atuam na uk uh pawlpite, aana tawh hi loin, tuu honte maiah na pumpi uh limpha suakin, Pasian’ deihna bangin na cing un." 
1Peter5:4 Tua bang ahih leh, Tuucing Ukpa hong kilat ciangin note in, a vul thei lo vangliatna lukhu na ngah ding uh hi." 
1Peter5:5 Tua mah bangin khangnote aw, a khan’ sawt upate ukna na mang un. Ahi hi. Note khempeuh in khat leh khat na kizep nadingun kiniamsakna na silh un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Pasian in a kisatheite a kham hi; a lungniamsakte kiangah hehpihna thupha a pia hi.”" 
1Peter5:6 Tua ahih ciangin a hun a cin’ ciangin Pasian in note hong pahtawi nadingin, ama khut vanglian nuai-ah na kiniamsak un." 
1Peter5:7 Pasian in note hong keem ahih ciangin, na lunghihmawhna khempeuh uh ama tungah na koih un." 
1Peter5:8 Kipin kikeem un. Kikepna tawh na ngak un. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, na gal uh ahi Dawimangpa in a hawk thei humpinelkai bangin kua mi ka ne ding hiam ci-in zong kawikawi-in a om hi." 
1Peter5:9 Leitung mun khempeuhah a om na u na naute un tua bang gimna thuakin a om uh hi ci-in thei un la, upna tawh kipin Dawimangpa na nial un." 
1Peter5:10 Khazih hangin note, ama vangliat tawntung minthan’na ah hong sam, hehpihna thupha khempeuh’ Pasian in tawlkhat gimna na thuak khit uh ciangin, hong cingsak, hong kipsak, hong khauhsak ding hi." 
1Peter5:11 Tua Pasian in a tawntungin vangliatna nei ta hen. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Keimah in note hong hansuahin, hih thute in Pasian’ hehpihna thupha thu a man takpi ahi ci-in teci pangin hih lai a tomin ka gelh khit ciangin, midik ka sak sanggampa Silvanas’ khut sung pan ka hong pia hi.Tua sungah na kip un." 
1Peter5:13 Ka tapa Marka akipan Babilon khuapi sungah a om note tawh a kiteel khawm pawlpite in note hong hopih uh hi. 
1Peter5:13 Ka tapa Marka akipan Babilon khuapi sungah a om note tawh a kiteel khawm pawlpite in note hong hopih uh hi. 
1Peter5:14 Khat leh khat ki-itna napna tawh kihopih un. Khazih sungah a om note khempeuh tungah nopna om ta hen. 
2Peter1:1 Zeisu Khazih’ sila leh sawltak keimah Simon Piter in, eite Pasian leh Honpa Zeisu Khazih’ dikna hangin kote thu-up bangin a manpha upna a ngah mite ka hong zasak hi." 
2Peter1:2 Pasian leh i Topa Zeisu’ theihtel pilna hangin hehpihna thupha leh nopna in note tungah kicing takin om ta hen. 
2Peter1:3 Tua mah bangin ama minthan’na leh ama dikna tawh hong sam Pasian’ theihtel pilna hangin, eite nuntakna leh Pasian lamah nopsakna tawh kipawl na khempeuh ama vangliatna siangtho a hong pia zo hi." 
2Peter1:4 Tuate hangin zong a manpha a lian mahmah thuciamnate eite hong pia zo hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, hih thuciamnate suangin deihgawhna hangin hih leitungah a om kisiat gawpna tawh note in kipelhin, Pasian’ nuntakna tawh kizom mi na suah nading uh ahi hi." 
2Peter1:5 Ahi hi. Tua thu hangin note in upna tungah hoihna, hoihna tungah lungpilna," 
2Peter1:6 lungpilna tungah noptat khamna, noptatna khamna tungah thuakna, thuakna tungah Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna," 
2Peter1:7 Pasian biakna lamah nopsakna tungah ki-unau itna, ki-unau itna tungah ki-itna hahkat mahmahin na koih thuap un." 
2Peter1:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, tua thupha teng note in nei-in na hauh uh leh, i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ theihtelna-ah thadah loh nading ahi zongin, a gah om lo mawkna ahih loh nading ahi zongin, hong bawlpha thei uh hi." 
2Peter1:9 Tua gamtat pha a nei lo mi in mittaw a, a muhna tom a, ama mawhna luite sawp siangna thu a mangngilh hi." 
2Peter1:10 Tua ahih ciangin ute naute aw, note hong sapna leh hong teelna kipsak nadingin, nakpi-in hahkat zaw un. Tua bang na hih uh leh, na puk ngei kei ding uh hi." 
2Peter1:11 Tua bang hangin eite Topa leh Honpa Zeisu Khazih’ tawntung Gam sung lut theihna thu note a kicingin hong kipia ding hi. 
2Peter1:12 Tua ahih ciangin na ngahsa uh thuman thutak note in thei-in tua thu-ah kip khin na hi uh zongin tua nate ngaihsunin note hong phawksak kik dingin ka om khol tawntung ding hi. 
2Peter1:13 I Topa Zeisu Khazih in hong lah sa mah bangin a sawt loin ka pumpi nuntakna ka nutsiat ding thei ka hih ciangin," 
2Peter1:14 hih pumpi nuntakna-ah ka om lai takin note hong phawksakin, kong hansuah ding kilawm ka sa hi." 
2Peter1:15 Ahi hi. Ka sih khit ciangin note in hih thute na phawk tawntung nading uh ka hahkat ding hi. 
2Peter1:16 Kote in i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ vangliatna ahi zongin, a hong paikikna thu ahi zongin, note kiangah kong gen uh ciangin pilna tawh kibawl tangthu zui loin, a thupitna leh a liatna mu-in teci ka hi uh hi." 
2Peter1:17 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, “Hihpa in ka lung hong damsak ka it ka Tapa hi,” ci-in Vanglian Bel sung pan tua Topa tungah aw khat hong tun’ ciangin, Pa Pasian kiang pan minthan’na leh liatna a ngah hi." 
2Peter1:18 Kote in mual siangtho tungah Topa tawh ka omkhawm lai takun, van panin tua aw ka za uh hi." 
2Peter1:19 Tua bang hangin kamsangte’ thugenna thu, eite adingin a kip zaw hi. Note lungsim sungah khuavakin, zingsol suak a, khua hong vak dongin tua thu, khuamialna-ah a tang meivak bangin ngaihsunin na belh dingun a kilawm hi." 
2Peter1:20 Lai Siangtho-ah a om Pasian’ kamsangte’ thu in mi ut thu bangin a khiatna dawk lo hi ci-in a masa belin na thei un. 
2Peter1:21 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian’ kamsangte’ thu in mi’ deih bangin hong tung ngei kei hi, Kha Siangtho hansuahna ngahin mite in Pasian kiang pan a gen sawn uh hi." 
2Peter2:1 Ahih hangin mite lakah kamsang zuau hong piang mah bangin a kikhenthang thei up khialhna ngeina, kheemna tawh guangin, amau pumpi uh a lei Topa nangawn nialin, amau tungah a manlangin kisiatna a tungsak thu zuau hilh siate in note lakah zong a om ding uh hi." 
2Peter2:2 Amau kihhuai gamtatnate mi tampi in mangin, thuman thutak lampi kosiatna a thuaksak ding uh hi." 
2Peter2:3 Amaute huaiham luatna in zuau thu genna tawh note hong kheem ding uh hi. Amaute tungah thukhenna in tang lai-a kipanin ol lo, zekai lo a, amaute kisiatna in zong a ihmu kei hi." 
2Peter2:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, Pasian in a khial vantungmite pammaih sa loin, hel khua sungah a khiat khit ciangin thukhen Ni dongin khuamial khuk sungah a khum hi." 
2Peter2:5 Tang lai leitung zong pammaihsa loin, dikna thu a hilh Noah leh mi sagihte keem a, Pasian bia lote leitungah tuicin a tumsak hi." 
2Peter2:6 Sodom leh Gomorrah khuapite, mei vut suakin, cip siatna daan thu khen a, a nung ciangin Pasian bia lote adingin limin a koih hi." 
2Peter2:7 Tua lai takin mi gilote’ kihhuai gamtatna hangin bawlsiatna a thuak, midik Lot a gumkhia hi." 
2Peter2:8 Tua midik pa in amaute lakah a omkhawm lai takin, amaute’ gitloh gamtatna ni simin a mit tawh mu-in, a bil tawh za ahih manin ama dikna lungsim nakpi-in a buai hi." 
2Peter2:9 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Pasian a biate ze-etna sung pan gumkhia ding ahi zongin," 
2Peter2:10 atak takin ci leeng kihhuai deihgawhna tawh pumpi deihna zui-in, ukna thusim lo-a a dik lo mite thu a khen Ni dongin daantatsakin kikhum nading ahi zongin ahih thei hi. Tua mite in lau loin amau deihna a zui thei mi hi uh a, a lian a ukte a kosia ngam uh hi." 
2Peter2:11 Vantungmite in ahih uh leh, amaute sangin a hat zawk, a vangliat zawk uh hangin Pasian mai-ah amaute in kosiatna mawhsakna a bawl kei uh hi." 
2Peter2:12 Hih mite ahih uh leh, ngaihsut pilna nei lo ganhingte bangin ahi uh a, siatna a thuak ganhingte taktak bangin amaute in a theih tel loh uh nate kosia-in, a siatsak uh hangin, kisiatna a man takin tungin," 
2Peter2:13 gitlohna thaman ahi gitloh bawlna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua mite in sun lai takin pawikham uh a, noptatin a om uh hi. Note tawh pawi a kham uh ciangin amau kheemna tawh noptat lua-in a nin baang kinuh mi ahi uh hi." 
2Peter2:14 Amaute in mi’ zi tungah mawh nop lunggulhna tawh a dim uh a, a kham thei lo mittang nei mi ahi uh hi. A kip lo mite a zol thei uh hi; huaiham luatna-ah a siam thei lungsim nei-in, hamsiatna’ tate ahi uh hi." 
2Peter2:15 Amaute in thuman thutak lam pan pialin, a mangthang uh a, Beora’ tapa Balaam’ lampi a zui uh hi. Tua Balaam in a hoih lo gamtatna thaman deihgawh a," 
2Peter2:16 ama mawhna hangin taaina a thuak hi. Bang ci-a thuak hiam na cih uh leh, kam a pau thei lo la khat in, mi kam pau tawh pau-in tua kamsangpa’ haina a kham hi." 
2Peter2:17 Tua mite in tui om lo-a a kang cikte ahi zongin, huih nakpi-in nunga a leeng meiite ahi uh hi. Amaute ading a mial pha mahmah khuamial a kikoih khol zo hi." 
2Peter2:18 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, khialhna ahih thei mite sung pan a taisuak dek takte tungah kisaktheihna kam mawkna genin pumpi deihna lunggulh luatna tawh, mawhna-ah a zol thei uh hi." 
2Peter2:19 Amaute pumpi uh kisiatna’ sila ahi napi-in, “Suahtakna ka hong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, mi a zo thei na in tua mi’ topa ahi hi." 
2Peter2:20 I Topa leh Honpa Zeisu Khazih theihtelna hangin leitung kihhuaina tawh a suahtak khit uh ciangin, khat vei awk kikin a lelh uh leh, a nung ciangin a pian’ in a pian’masak sangin a gilo zaw hi." 
2Peter2:21 Dikna thu lampi a theih khit uh ciangin thukham siangtho a paaikhia kik sangin tua lampi thei loin a om uh leh, amau ading a pha zaw hi." 
2Peter2:22 ‘Ui in ama luak a ne kik hi; vokpi in a kisil khit ciangin buan lakah a bual kik hi,’ ci-in a man thugentehna bangin tua mite tungah a piang zo hi."

2Peter3:9 Mi kim khat in zekai-a a ciamteh theih uh bangin Pasian in a thuciamna-ah a zekai kei hi. Kuamah kisia loin, mi khempeuhte in kisikkikna a ngah nadingun deihin, amah in note hong thuak hi."

2Peter3:13 Ama thuciamna bangin dikna a om van thak leh lei thak eite in i lamen hi.

1John1:1 A cil panin piang a, komau in za-in, ka mittang uh tawh mu-in, a tel takpi enin, ka khut uh tawh ka lawn’ khitsa uh nuntakna Thu tawh kipawl thute, note kiangah kong zasak uh hi."

Jude1:1 Zeisu Khazih’ sila leh Jeim’ sanggampa keimah Juda in, Pa Pasian hangin itna ngahin, Zeisu Khazih adingin kikemin, sapna a ngah mite kiangah ka hong zasak hi." 
Jude1:2 Note tungah hehpihna, nopna leh itna khang semsem ta hen." 
Jude1:3 Ka itte aw, eite in i ngah khawm gupna thu tawh kizomin note kiangah ka hong gelh thu hahkat a, ka bawl lai takin, misiangthote kiangah khatvei bek a piaksa upna thu ading, lungsim khauhin na do nadingun hansuahin ka hong gelh hi." 
Jude1:4 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, eite Pasian’ hehpihna thupha in kihhuai tat nopna suaksakin, eite hong uk khat bek ahi Topa Zeisu Khazih nialin, Pasian’ thu a deih lo mite in hih thutanna thuak dingin tanglai pek a, a kiciamtehsa mi kimkhat in note’ lakah hong lutsim uh hi." 
Jude1:5 Note in na khempeuh thakhatin na theih uh hangin note ka hong phawksak nop thu in: Topa in Izipt gam sung mi pawlkhat a gupkhiat khit ciangin, a nung nihveina ah a um lo mite a siasak hi." 
Jude1:6 Amau thu ngahna uh kem lo uh a, amau omna uh pan a paikhia vantungmite zong ni lian Ni-a thukhenna dongin khuamial sungah a tawntungin hencipin a khum hi." 
Jude1:7 Tua mah bangin Sodom leh Gomorrah khuapi akipan a kimkot ah a om khuapite zong tua mite bangin a kihhuai noptatna ah gamta-in, a man lo pumpi’ deihna lungsim zui uh ahih maninah, meikuang tawntung daan thuakin, thu hilhkholh nading lim ahihna uh a kilang hi." 
Jude1:8 Tua mah bangin tua mite in tua bangin a pumpi uh kihhuaisak a, ukna thu nial-in, vanmite a gensia uh hi." 
Jude1:9 Vantungmite a ukpa Mikhael nangawn in Dawimangpa tawh kidoin, Moses’ luang tawh kizomin a kinial lai takin, kisiatna bawl ngam loin, “Topa in nang hong taai hen,” a ci bek hi." 
Jude1:10 Tua mite in ahih uh leh, amau theih loh na peuhpeuh a kosia uh hi. A ngaihsun thei lo ganhingte bangin ngeina bangin a theihtheih nate uh hangin, amau pumpi uh a siasak uh hi." 
Jude1:11 Amaute in gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh, amaute in Kain’ lampi zui-in thaman ngah dingin Balaam’ mawhna a manlangin zui-in a delh uh a, Korah’ lehdona bangin a kisia uh hi." 
Jude1:12 Tua mite in note ki-itna pawite ah note tawh an a nekkhawm a dawn khawm lai takun, lau loin amaute kham tak kivakin pawi sungah a nin a kisawh tuucing ahi uh hi; tui om lo, huih in a leen’pih meii bang ahi zongin, pulhkhia-in a gah om lo nihvei si-in a bul pan a kibotkhia singkung bang ahi zongin;" 
Jude1:13 amau zumna thu a phuansak tui kilok gilo bang ahi zongin, khuamial pha mahmah a tawntungin amaute ading a kikoih khol a, a om aksi leeng bang ahi zongin a suak uh hi." 
Jude1:14 Adam pan akipan khang sagihna mi Enok in kamsangpa thu a gen-inah, “Topa in mi khempeuh thukhenin," 
Jude1:15 Pasian’ thu a deih lo mi khempeuh in Pasian deih loh a bawlna uh na khempeuh akipan Pasian’ thu a deih loh uh mawhna a neite in, Topa tungah gensiatna kam khempeuh a kilangsak ding ahi zongin, Topa in a kisim zo lo misiangthote tawh hong paikhawm ding hi,” ci-in a genkhol hi." 
Jude1:16 Tua mite in phunin a mawhsak thei mi, amaute lunggulh deihgawhna bangin a gamta thei mi, a kam un kisaktheihna thu a gen thei mi, amau noptuamna ngaihsunin mi maitang a zahtak thei mi ahi uh hi." 
Jude1:17 Ka itte aw, note na hih uh leh, i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ sawltakte in a masa-in a genkholh thute na phawk un." 
Jude1:18 Amaute in, “A nunung bel hunin Pasian’ deihlohna tawh kipawl amau pumpi uh deihgawhnate bangin zui-in, a kosia thei mite hong kilang ding uh hi,” ci-in note kiangah hong gen zo uh hi." 
Jude1:19 Tua mite in Kha Siangtho nei lo uh a, pawlpi kikhenna a bawl thei mi, pumpi deihna bek a zui thei mite ahi uh hi." 
Jude1:20 Ka itte aw, note in na hih uh leh, a siangtho mahmah upna tungah na pumpi uh lamin, Kha Siangtho tawh thungenin," 
Jude1:21 nuntak tawntungna ngah nadingin i Topa Zeisu Khazih’ hehpihna na ngak lai takun, Pasian’ itna sungah na pumpi uh kemin om un." 
Jude1:22 A um khial kimkhat na hehpih un. 
Jude1:23 Mi kimkhat mei sung pan kaikhia-in na gum un. Mi kimkhat zong pumpi deihgawhna hangin nin tawh a kisawh a puante nangawn uh muhthadah huaisa-in, lauthawng kawmin na hehpih un." 
Jude1:24 Note na kipuk loh nadingun hong kemin, mawhna om loin, lungdam mahmahin note ama’ minthan’na mai-ah hong koih thei, i Topa Zeisu Khazih hangin eite’ Honpa Pasian khat bek tungah minthan’na, thupitna, vangliatna leh ukzawhnate tu-ma hun khempeuh, tu laitak leh a tawntungin om ta hen! Amen."

Revelation1:4 Johan in Asia gamah a om pawlpi sagihte kiangah a zasak hi. Tu lai taka om, a om ngei, tu nung ciangin a hong pai lai ding pa’ kiang pan ahi zongin, ama tokhom mai-ah a om Kha Siangtho sagihte kiang pan ahi zongin, thuman teci pang ahi tham loin mi site lakah a suak masa bel hi a, leitung kumpite a ukpa ahi Zeisu Khazih kiang pan ahi zongin, hehpihna thupha leh nopna note tungah om ta hen. Revelation2:3 nang in thuakzawhna nei-in ka min hangin zong, gim lo cim loin na thuak thu ahi zongin ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:4 Ahih hangin nang tungah gen ding thu ka nei hi. Bang thu ahi hiam na cih leh, a masa bel a, na neih itna na paihkhiat thu ahi hi." 
Revelation2:5 Tua ahih ciangin nang in bangci omna pan na kiam zawh thu na phawk kik khit ciangin na kisikkik in la, a cil-a na gamtat ngei na gamta kik in. Tua bang na hih kei leh, na kiangah ka hong pai ding a, na kisikkik kei leh, na meivakna a omna pan ka khin ding hi." 
Revelation2:6 Nangma tungah a om phatnate in ka muhdah Nikolas pawlte’ gamtatnate kei’ muhdah mah bangin nangmah in zong na muhdahna ahi hi.

Revelation2:11 Kha Siangtho in pawlpite a thupiakna bil nei mi in ngai ta hen. A zo mi nihvei sihna in a su kha kei ding hi.”
